title: Mahabharata
edition: BORI Critical Edition (Muneo Tokunaga / John Smith)
copyright: Electronic text (C) Bhandarkar Oriental Research Institute, Pune, India, 1999

verses.text: nārāyaṇaṃ suraguruṃ jagadekanāthaṃ bhaktapriyaṃ sakalalokanamaskṛtaṃ ca traiguṇyavarjitam ajaṃ vibhum ādyam īśaṃ vande bhavaghnam asurāsurasiddhavandyam
uvāca tān ṛṣīn sarvān dhanyo vo 'smy adya darśanāt veda vaiyāsikīḥ sarvāḥ kathā dharmārthasaṃhitāḥ vakṣyāmi vo dvijaśreṣṭhāḥ śṛṇvantv adya tapodhanāḥ tasya tad vacanaṃ śrutvā naimiṣāraṇyavāsinaḥ
evaṃ pṛṣṭo 'bravīt samyag yathāval lomaharṣaṇiḥ vākyaṃ vacanasaṃpannas teṣāṃ tu caritāśrayam tasmin sadasi vistīrṇe munīnāṃ bhāvitātmanām

śrutaṃ me bhāratākhyānaṃ dharmakāmārthamokṣadam janamejayena pṛṣṭaḥ san vaiśaṃpāyana uktavān ṛṣīṇām agratas tatra dharmiṣṭhānāṃ mahātmanām vyāsadevājñayā tatra yad vaiśaṃpāyanas tadā śrutaṃ vai bhāratākhyānaṃ vedārthaiś copabṛṃhitam tatra me viditaṃ sarvaṃ bhāratākhyānam āditaḥ

namo bhagavate tasmai vyāsāyāmitatejase yasya prasādād vakṣyāmi nārāyaṇakathām imām sarvāśramābhigamanaṃ sarvatīrthāvagāhanam na tathā phaladaṃ sūte nārāyaṇakathā yathā nāsti nārāyaṇasamaṃ na bhūtaṃ na bhaviṣyati etena satyavākyena sarvārthān sādhayāmy aham

puṇye himavataḥ pāde medhye giriguhālaye viśodhya dehaṃ dharmātmā darbhasaṃstaram āśritaḥ śuciḥ saniyamo vyāsaḥ śāntātmā tapasi sthitaḥ bhāratasyetihāsasya dharmeṇānvīkṣya tāṃ gatim praviśya yogaṃ jñānena so 'paśyat sarvam antataḥ
kṣaṇā lavā muhūrtāś ca nimeṣā yugaparyayāḥ
nītir bharatavaṃśasya vistaraś caiva sarvaśaḥ
saṃkṣepeṇetihāsasya tato vakṣyāmi vistaram
evaṃ vai saṃgrahādhyāyaḥ pūrvam eva maharṣiṇā kramaṇaprastarair yuktaḥ kathaṃ cid apy atīva hi etadarthaṃ ca vihitaḥ saṃgraho 'yaṃ yathāśrutaḥ tac chrutvā sarvam ākhyātaṃ loke jñāsyanti mānavāḥ
idaṃ śatasahasrākhyaṃ ślokānāṃ puṇyakarmaṇām upākhyānaiḥ saha jñeyaṃ śrāvyaṃ bhāratam uttamam
ṣaṣṭiṃ śatasahasrāṇi cakārānyāṃ sa saṃhitām triṃśacchatasahasraṃ ca devaloke pratiṣṭhitam pitrye pañcadaśa proktaṃ rakṣoyakṣe caturdaśa ekaṃ śatasahasraṃ tu mānuṣeṣu pratiṣṭhitam
vaiśaṃpāyanaviprarṣiḥ śrāvayām āsa pārthivam pārikṣitaṃ mahābāhuṃ nāmnā tu janamejayam ekaṃ śatasahasraṃ tu mayoktaṃ vai nibodhata
teṣu jāteṣu sarveṣu pāṇḍaveṣu mahātmasu mādryā tu saha saṃgamya ṛṣiśāpaprabhāvataḥ mṛtaḥ pāṇḍur mahāpuṇye śataśṛṅge mahāgirau jātāḥ pārthās tataḥ sarve kuntyā mādryāś ca mantrataḥ
vicitrāṇi ca vāsāṃsi prāvārāvaraṇāni ca kambalājinaratnāni rāṅkavāstaraṇāni ca
yadāśrauṣaṃ sarvaviśvasya sārāṃ prītyā rājñe nirmitāṃ tāṃ mayena gadāṃ cogrāṃ bhīmasenāya dattāṃ tadā nāśaṃse vijayāya saṃjaya
yadāśrauṣaṃ vāsasāṃ tatra rāśiṃ samākṣipat kitavo mandabuddhiḥ duḥśāsano gatavān naiva cāntaṃ tadā nāśaṃse vijayāya saṃjaya
yadāśrauṣaṃ draupadīṃ tāṃ bruvāṇāṃ pravrajyāyām aśrukaṇṭhīṃ rudantīm patyau yuktāṃ nātra vastuṃ hi dharmas tadā nāśaṃse vijayāya saṃjaya
yadāśrauṣaṃ vanavāseṣu pārthān samāgatān ṛṣimukhyaiḥ purāṇaiḥ upāsyamānān sagaṇair jātu sarvāṃs tadā nāśaṃse vijayāya saṃjaya
yadāśrauṣaṃ tīrthayātrāpravṛttaṃ pāṇḍoḥ sutaṃ sahitaṃ romaśena tasmāc chrutaṃ cārjunasyāstralābhaṃ tadā nāśaṃse vijayāya saṃjaya
yadāśrauṣaṃ draupadīṃ saindhavena nānītāṃ (sic) mokṣitāṃ cārjunena jayadrathaṃ mokṣitaṃ jīvaśeṣaṃ tadā nāśaṃse vijayāya saṃjaya
yadāśrauṣaṃ vasataḥ pāṇḍuputrān adṛśyamānān vividhair upāyaiḥ dakṣān pārthān bhīmasenena saṃkhye tadā nāśaṃse vijayāya saṃjaya
yadāśrauṣaṃ lokahitāya kṛṣṇaṃ śamārthinam upayātaṃ kurūṇām śamaṃ kurvāṇam akṛtārthaṃ ca yātaṃ tadā nāśaṃse vijayāya saṃjaya
yadāśrauṣaṃ vāsudeve prayāte rathāṅgahaste phālgunenānvite 'pi grahītukāmaṃ mama putraṃ dvipena tadā nāśaṃse vijayāya saṃjaya
yadāśrauṣaṃ cāpageyena saṃkhye svayaṃ mṛtyuṃ vihitaṃ dhārmikeṇa tac cākārṣuḥ pāṇḍaveyāḥ prahṛṣṭās tadā nāśaṃse vijayāya saṃjaya
yadāśrauṣaṃ bhīmakarmāṇam ugraṃ raṇe bhīmaṃ śoṇitaṃ pītavantam bhittvā vakṣo yuvarājasya sūta tadā nāśaṃse vijayāya saṃjaya
buddhvā cāhaṃ buddhihīno 'dya sūta saṃtapye 'haṃ putrapautraiś ca hīnaḥ saṃcintayann adya vihīnabuddhiḥ kartavyatāṃ nābhijānāmi sūta
kālābhipannā samitir mahātmanāṃ niṣūditā hetur āsīt suto me
niḥśvasantaṃ yathā nāgaṃ muhyamānaṃ punaḥ punaḥ
kṛtavīryaṃ mahābhāgaṃ tathaiva janamejayam
atītān āgatān vāpi vartamānās tathā budhāḥ nānuśocanti rājendra kālo hi jagadantakaḥ
evam uktvā ca rājānaṃ saṃjayo virarāma ha dhṛtarāṣṭro 'pi tac chrutvā dhṛtim eva samāśrayat diṣṭyedam āgatam iti matvā sa prājñasattamaḥ
āraṇyakaṃ ca vedebhya oṣadhibhyo 'mṛtaṃ yathā
caturbhyaḥ sarahasyebhyo vedebhyo hy adhikaṃ yadā tadā prabhṛti loke 'smin mahābhāratam ucyate
yojayānām avistīrṇāñ jāmadagnyaḥ pratāpavān

rāma rāma mahābhāga prītāḥ sma tava bhārgava anayā pitṛbhaktyā ca vikrameṇa ca te vibho varaṃ vṛṇīṣva bhadraṃ te kim icchasi mahādyute yadi me pitaraḥ prītā yady anugrāhyatā mayi yac ca roṣābhibhūtena kṣatram utsāditaṃ mayā ataś ca pāpān mucyeham eṣa me prārthito varaḥ hradāś ca tīrthabhūtā me bhaveyur bhuvi viśrutāḥ evaṃ bhaviṣyatīty āhuḥ pitaro brāhmaṇarṣabhāḥ
sametya taṃ dvijās tāś ca tatraiva nidhanaṃ gatāḥ
duryodhanasya bhīmasya dinārdham abhavat tayoḥ
ākhyānaṃ kathitaṃ kṛtsnaṃ mahābhāratam uttamam kathitaṃ vistarārthaṃ ca yaśo vīryaṃ mahīkṣitām
ādiparva purā proktaṃ pārāśaryeṇa dhīmatā
arjunasyābhigamanaṃ parva jñeyam ataḥ param
nivātakavacair yuddhaṃ parva cājagaraṃ tataḥ
nalākhyānam ataḥ parva mṛgasvapnam ataḥ param tato nahuṣam ākhyānaṃ tato 'nantaram ucyate
pāṇḍavānāṃ praveśaś ca samayasya ca pālanam

mātalīyam upākhyānaṃ caritaṃ gālavasya ca sāvitraṃ vāmadevyaṃ ca vainyopākhyānam eva ca jāmadagnyam upākhyānaṃ parva ṣoḍaśarājakam sabhāpraveśaḥ kṛṣṇasya vidulāputraśāsanam udyogaḥ sainyaniryāṇaṃ śvetopākhyānam eva ca
mantrasya niścayaṃ kṛtvā kāryaṃ samabhicintatam kīrtyate cāpy upākhyānaṃ saināpatye 'bhiṣecanam śvetasya vāsudevena citraṃ bahukathāśrayam
divyaṃ cakṣur dadau yatra saṃjayāya mahān ṛṣiḥ
śukapraśnābhigamanaṃ brahmapraśnānuśāsanam prādurbhāvaś ca durvāsaḥ saṃvādaś caiva māyayā
varṇadharmas tato jñeyam āśramāṇāṃ ca kīrtanam mṛtānāṃ darśanaṃ caiva vyāsenādbhutakarmaṇā
svargārohaṇikaṃ parva tato jñeyam ataḥ param
saubhasya ca vadhaḥ parva bāṇasya narakasya ca janamejayasya yajñe tu nakulākhyānam eva ca

pauṣyaṃ paulomam āstīkam ādivaṃśāvatāraṇam saṃbhavo jatuveśmākhyaṃ hiḍimbabakayor vadhaḥ tathā caitrarathaṃ devyāḥ pāñcālyāś ca svayaṃvaraḥ kṣātradharmeṇa nirjitya tato vaivāhikaṃ smṛtam vidurāgamanaṃ caiva rājyalambhas tathaiva ca vanavāso 'rjunasyāpi subhadrāharaṇaṃ tataḥ haraṇāharaṇaṃ caiva dahanaṃ khāṇḍavasya ca mayasya darśanaṃ caiva ādiparvaṇi kathyate
ślokānāṃ ca sahasraṃ ca pañcāśac chatam eva ca adhyāyānāṃ tathāṣṭau ca parvaṇy asmin prakīrtitāḥ
ślokāgraṃ ca sahasraṃ ca triśataṃ cottaraṃ tathā ślokāś ca caturāśītiḥ parvaṇy asmiṃs tathaiva ca adhyāyānāṃ tataḥ proktaṃ catvāriṃśan maharṣiṇā
maharṣer āśramapade kaṇvasya ca tapasvinaḥ śakuntalāyāṃ duṣyantād bharataś cāpi jajñivān yasya lokeṣu nāmnedaṃ prathitaṃ bhārataṃ kulam
niṣādyāḥ pañcaputrāyāḥ suptāyā jatuveśmani purocanasya cātraiva dahanaṃ saṃprakīrtitam
maharṣer darśanaṃ caiva vyāsasyāmitatejasaḥ tadājñayaikacakrāyāṃ brāhmaṇasya niveśane
kūṭasya dhārtarāṣṭreṇa preṣaṇaṃ pāṇḍavān prati brāhmaṇāt samupaśrutya vyāsavākyapracoditāḥ draupadīṃ prārthayantas te svayaṃvaradidṛkṣavaḥ pāñcālān abhito jagmur yatra kautūhalānvitāḥ
sakhyaṃ kṛtvā tatas tena tasmād eva sa śuśruve

svayaṃvaraṃ ca pāñcālyā rārāyantraprabhedanam nṛpāṇāṃ saha saṃgrāmaḥ pāṇḍavānāṃ mahādbhutam bhīmasenārjunau yatra saṃrabdhān pṛthivīpatīn śalyakarṇau ca tarasā jitavantau mahāmṛdhe dṛṣṭvā tayoś ca tad vīryam aprameyam amānuṣam śaṅkamānau pāṇḍavāṃs tān rāmakṛṣṇau mahāmatī jagmatus taiḥ samāgantuṃ śālāṃ bhārgavaveśmani
kṣattuś ca dhṛtarāṣṭreṇa preṣaṇaṃ pāṇḍavān prati
anantaraṃ ca draupadyā sahāsīnaṃ yudhiṣṭhiram anupraviśya viprārthaṃ phālguno gṛhya cāyudham mokṣayitvā gṛhaṃ gatvā viprārthaṃ kṛtaniścayaḥ samayaṃ pālayan vīro vanaṃ yatra jagāma ha
tatraiva mokṣayām āsa pañca so 'psarasaḥ śubhāḥ śāpād grāhatvam āpannā brāhmaṇasya tapasvinaḥ prabhāsatīrthe pārthasya kṛṣṇena ca samāgamaḥ
śakraprasthaṃ mahābāhuḥ prītyā paramayā yutaḥ nyavasat saha pārthena tatraivodārakarmaṇā
draupadyās tanayānāṃ ca saṃbhavo 'traiva kīrtitaḥ vihārārthaṃ ca gatayoḥ kṛṣṇayor yamunām anu
tathā digvijayo 'traiva pāṇḍavānāṃ prakīrtitaḥ rājñām āgamanaṃ caiva sārhaṇānāṃ mahākratau
dhṛtarāṣṭro mahāprājñaḥ snuṣāṃ paramaduḥkhitām

maitreyaśāpotsargaś ca vidurasya pravāsanam dvijānāṃ bharaṇārthaṃ ca kṛtam ārādhanaṃ raveḥ hitaṃ ca bruvataḥ kṣattuḥ parityāgo 'mbikāsutāt tyaktasya pāṇḍuputrāṇāṃ samīpagamanaṃ tathā punarāgamanaṃ caiva dhṛtarāṣṭrasya śāsanāt karṇaprotsāhanaṃ caiva dhārtarāṣṭrasya durmateḥ vanasthān pāṇḍavān hantuṃ mantro duryodhanasya ca taṃ duṣṭabhāvaṃ vijñāya vyāsasyāgamanaṃ drutam niryāṇapratiṣedhaś ca surabhyākhyānam eva ca maitreyāgamanaṃ cātra rājñaś caivānuśāsanam śāpotsargaś ca tenaiva rājño duryodhanasya ca kirmīrasya vadhaś cātra bhīmasenena saṃyuge

subhadrāyāḥ saputrāyāḥ kṛṣṇena dvārakāṃ purīm nayanaṃ draupadeyānāṃ dhṛṣṭadyumnena caiva hi praveśaḥ pāṇḍaveyānāṃ ramye dvaitavane tataḥ dharmarājasya cātraiva saṃvādaḥ kṛṣṇayā saha saṃvādaś ca tathā rājñā bhīmasyāpi prakīrtitaḥ samīpaṃ pāṇḍuputrāṇāṃ vyāsasyāgamanaṃ tathā pratismṛtyātha vidyāyā dānaṃ rājño maharṣiṇā gamanaṃ kāmyakaṃ cāpi vyāse pratigate tataḥ
mahendralokagamanam astrārthe ca kirīṭinaḥ yatra cintā samutpannā dhṛtarāṣṭrasya bhūyasī
tathākṣahṛdayaprāptis tasmād eva maharṣitaḥ lomaśasyāgamaś cātra svargāt pāṇḍusutān prati
saṃdeśād arjunasyātra tīrthābhigamanakriyā tīrthānāṃ ca phalaprāptiḥ puṇyatvaṃ cāpi kīrtitam pulastyatīrthayātrā ca nāradena maharṣiṇā
indraḥ śyenaḥ kapoto 'gnir bhūtvā yajñe 'bhijagmatuḥ
pūrvaṃ prakṣiptam aśṛṇot pitaraṃ lavaṇāmbhasi

mārkaṇḍeyasya ca tathā devarṣer nāradasya ca tathā yajñavibhūtiś ca gayasyātra prakīrtitā prabhāsatīrthe pāṇḍūnāṃ vṛṣṇibhiś ca samāgamaḥ māndhātuś cāpy upākhyānaṃ rājño 'traiva prakīrtitam aṣṭāvakrasya viprarṣer janakasyādhvare 'bhavat naiyāyikānāṃ mukhyena varuṇasyātmajena hi parājito yatra bandī vāde tena mahātmanā yavakrītasya cākhyānaṃ raibhyasya ca mahātmanaḥ gandhamādanayātrā ca vāso nārāyaṇāśrame vrajan pathi mahābāhur dṛṣṭavān pavanātmajam kadalīkhaṇḍamadhyasthaṃ hanūmantaṃ mahābalam vṛṣaparvaṇaś ca rājarṣes tato 'bhigamanaṃ smṛtam ārṣṭiṣeṇāśrame caiṣāṃ gamanaṃ vāsa eva ca protsāhanaṃ ca pāñcālyā bhīmasyātra mahātmanaḥ kailāsārohaṇaṃ proktaṃ yatra yakṣair balotkaṭaiḥ yuddham āsīn mahāghoraṃ maṇimatpramukhaiḥ saha samāgamaś ca pāṇḍūnāṃ yatra vaiśravaṇena ca samāgamaś cārjunasya tatraiva bhrātṛbhiḥ saha nivātakavacair ghorair dānavaiḥ suraśatrubhiḥ paulomaiḥ kālakeyaiś ca yatra yuddhaṃ kirīṭinaḥ vadhaś caiṣāṃ samākhyāto rājñas tenaiva dhīmatā astrasaṃdarśanārambho dharmarājasya saṃnidhau pārthasya pratiṣedhaś ca nāradena maharṣiṇā avarohaṇaṃ punaś caiva pāṇḍūnāṃ gandhamādanāt bhīmasya grahaṇaṃ cātra parvatābhogavarṣmaṇā bhujagendreṇa balinā tasmin sugahane vane amokṣayad yatra cainaṃ praśnān uktvā yudhiṣṭhiraḥ kāmyakāgamanaṃ caiva punas teṣāṃ mahātmanām tatrasthāṃś ca punar draṣṭuṃ pāṇḍavān puruṣarṣabhān vāsudevasyāgamanam atraiva parikīrtitam pṛthor vainyasya cākhyānaṃ yatroktaṃ paramarṣiṇā saṃvādaś ca sarasvatyās tārkṣyarṣeḥ sumahātmanaḥ matsyopākhyānam atraiva procyate tadanantaram mārkaṇḍeyasamasyā ca purāṇaṃ parikīrtyate aindradyumnam upākhyānaṃ dhaundhumāraṃ tathaiva ca pativratāyāś cākhyānaṃ tathaivāṅgirasaṃ smṛtam hriyamāṇas tu mandātmā mokṣito 'sau kirīṭinā dharmarājasya cātraiva mṛgasvapnanidarśanam kāmyake kānanaśreṣṭhe punargamanam ucyate vrīhidrauṇikam ākhyānam atraiva bahuvistaram durvāsaso 'py upākhyānam atraiva parikīrtitam cakre cainaṃ pañcaśikhaṃ yatra bhīmo mahābalaḥ yatra rāmeṇa vikramya nihato rāvaṇo yudhi
yatrāsya śaktiṃ tuṣṭo 'dād ekavīravadhāya ca

pāṇḍavānveṣaṇārthaṃ ca rājño duryodhanasya ca cārāḥ prasthāpitāś cātra nipuṇāḥ sarvato diśam na ca pravṛttis tair labdhā pāṇḍavānāṃ mahātmanām gograhaś ca virāṭasya trigartaiḥ prathamaṃ kṛtaḥ yatrāsya yuddhaṃ sumahat tair āsīl lomaharṣaṇam hriyamāṇaś ca yatrāsau bhīmasenena mokṣitaḥ
anantaraṃ ca kurubhis tasya gograhaṇaṃ kṛtam

tathendravijayaṃ cāpi yānaṃ caiva purodhasaḥ upahārair vañcayitvā vartmany eva suyodhanaḥ varadaṃ taṃ varaṃ vavre sāhāyyaṃ kriyatāṃ mama śalyas tasmai pratiśrutya jagāmoddiśya pāṇḍavān sāntvapūrvaṃ cākathayad yatrendravijayaṃ ca yaḥ purohitapreṣaṇaṃ ca pāṇḍavaiḥ kauravān prati vaicitravīryasya vacaḥ samādāya purodhasaḥ
dambhodbhavasya cākhyānam atraiva parikīrtitam varānveṣaṇam atraiva mātaleś ca mahātmanaḥ maharṣeś cāpi kathitaṃ caritaṃ gālavasya ca vidulāyāś ca putrasya proktaṃ cāpy anuśāsanam
āgamya hāstinapurād upaplavyam ariṃdamaḥ pāṇḍavānāṃ yathāvṛttaṃ sarvam ākhyātavān hariḥ te tasya vacanaṃ śrutvā mantrayitvā ca yad dhitam sāṃgrāmikaṃ tataḥ sarvaṃ sajjaṃ cakruḥ paraṃtapāḥ
parivādaś ca pāṇḍūnāṃ śvodarśanavilambanam

samīkṣyādhokṣajaḥ kṣipraṃ yudhiṣṭhirahite rataḥ rathād āplutya vegena svayaṃ kṛṣṇa udāradhīḥ pratodapāṇir ādhāvad bhīṣmaṃ hantuṃ vyapetabhīḥ vākyapratodābhihato yatra kṛṣṇena pāṇḍavaḥ gāṇḍīvadhanvā samare sarvaśastrabhṛtāṃ varaḥ
śaratalpagataś caiva bhīṣmo yatra babhūva ha
saināpatye 'bhiṣikto 'tha yatrācāryaḥ pratāpavān duryodhanasya prītyarthaṃ pratijajñe mahāstravit grahaṇaṃ dharmarājasya pāṇḍuputrasya dhīmataḥ
yatra bhīmo mahābāhuḥ sātyakiś ca mahārathaḥ anveṣaṇārthaṃ pārthasya yudhiṣṭhiranṛpājñayā praviṣṭau bhāratīṃ senām apradhṛṣyāṃ surair api
dhṛtarāṣṭrasya putrāś ca tathā pāṣāṇayodhinaḥ nārāyaṇāś ca gopālāḥ samare citrayodhinaḥ
śatarudrīyam atraiva śaṃkarasya mahāstavaḥ vyāsasya cāpy āgamanaṃ māhātmyaṃ kṛṣṇapārthayoḥ
vadhaḥ pāṇḍyasya ca tathā aśvatthāmnā mahātmanā daṇḍasenasya ca vadho daṇḍasya ca vadhas tathā dvairathe yatra karṇena dharmarājo yudhiṣṭhiraḥ saṃśayaṃ gamito yuddhe miṣatāṃ sarvadhanvinām

yathāvad balasainyaṃ ca varṇayām āsa vāyujaḥ pūrayitvāñjaliṃ pūrṇāṃ na dadhno hīdṛśo rasaḥ anyeṣāṃ ca rasānāṃ tu pratijñādṛḍhaniścayaḥ karṇārjunadvairathe tu vartamāne bhayānake śāpenaiva ca karṇasya tataś cakraṃ mahīgatam nāgamātraṃ valīkaṃ ca karṇo 'muñcata phālgune tadbhayāt keśavo bhūmiṃ prāveśayata taṃ ratham
yatra kaumāram ākhyānam abhiṣekasya karma ca

duryodhanasya rājño 'tha yatra bhīmena saṃyuge ūrū bhagnau prasahyājau gadayā bhīmavegayā hradaṃ praviśya yatrāsau saṃstabhyāpo vyavasthitaḥ pravṛttis tatra cākhyātā yatra bhīmasya lubdhakaiḥ kṣepayuktair vacobhiś ca dharmarājasya dhīmataḥ hradāt samutthito yatra dhārtarāṣṭro 'tyamarṣaṇaḥ bhīmena gadayā yuddhaṃ yatrāsau kṛtavān saha samavāye ca yuddhasya rāmasyāgamanaṃ smṛtam
sametya dadṛśur bhūmau patitaṃ raṇamūrdhani
kṛtavarmaṇā ca sahitaḥ kṛpeṇa ca nijaghnivān
pāñcālānāṃ prasuptānāṃ yatra droṇasutād vadhaḥ dhṛṣṭadyumnasya sūtena pāṇḍaveṣu niveditaḥ
priyaṃ tasyāś cikīrṣan vai gadām ādāya vīryavān
drauṇeś ca drohabuddhitvaṃ vīkṣya pāpātmanas tathā
maṇiṃ tathā samādāya droṇaputrān mahārathāt pāṇḍavāḥ pradadur hṛṣṭā draupadyai jitakāśinaḥ etad vai daśamaṃ parva sauptikaṃ samudāhṛtam

putraśokābhisaṃtaptaḥ prajñācakṣur narādhipa kṛṣṇopanītāṃ yatrāsāv āyasīṃ pratimāṃ dṛḍhām bhīmasenadrohabuddhir dhṛtarāṣṭro babhañja ha tathā śokāgnitaptasya dhṛtarāṣṭrasya dhīmataḥ saṃsāragamanaṃ buddhyā hetubhir mokṣadarśanaiḥ vidureṇa ca yatrāsya rājña āśvāsanaṃ kṛtam dhṛtarāṣṭrasya cātraiva kauravāyodhanaṃ tathā sāntaḥpurasya gamanaṃ śokārtasya prakīrtitam
putrapautravadhārtāyās tathātraiva prakīrtitā gāndhāryāś cāpi kṛṣṇena krodhopaśamanakriyā
mahābhāgyaṃ gavāṃ caiva brāhmaṇānāṃ tathaiva ca rahasyaṃ caiva dharmāṇāṃ deśakālopasaṃhitam
sudarśanaṃ tathākhyānaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ dharmam eva ca kathitaḥ śāśvato dharmaḥ kṛṣṇenārjunasaṃnidhau tathā brāhmaṇagītā ca saṃvādo guruśiṣyayoḥ
ślokānāṃ viṃśatiś caiva saṃkhyātā tattvadarśinā

yatra duryodhanādīnāṃ śriyaṃ dṛṣṭvā yudhiṣṭhiraḥ nirvedaṃ paramaṃ gatvā svargaṃ nākāṅkṣad avyayam devānāṃ vacanād yatra tanuṃ tyaktvā mahārathaḥ svargaṃ nityaṃ mahātejāḥ svasthānam agamad vanam svargaṃ prāptaḥ sa ca tathā yātanā vipulā bhṛśam devadūtena narakaṃ yatra vyājena darśitam śuśrāva yatra dharmātmā bhrātṝṇāṃ karuṇā giraḥ nideśe vartamānānāṃ deśe tatraiva vartatām anudarśitaś ca dharmeṇa devarājñā ca pāṇḍavaḥ āplutyākāśagaṅgāyāṃ dehaṃ tyaktvā sa mānuṣam svadharmanirjitaṃ sthānaṃ svarge prāpya sa dharmarāṭ mumude pūjitaḥ sarvaiḥ sendraiḥ suragaṇaiḥ saha etad aṣṭādaśaṃ parva proktaṃ vyāsena dhīmatā

khileṣu harivaṃśasya vyākhyātāḥ paramarṣiṇā yatra divyāḥ kathāḥ puṇyāḥ kīrtitāḥ pāpanāśanāḥ devāsurakathāś caiva vicitrāḥ samudāhṛtāḥ bhaviṣyad api cākhyānaṃ vicitraṃ puṇyavardhanam yatra kṛṣṇasya karmāṇi śrūyante janmanā saha anekaiḥ saṃśrayaiś cāpi jarāsaṃdhavadhena ha vikramād rukmiṇīṃ devīm āhṛtya paravīrahā parīkṣya ca nivāsārthaṃ dvārakāṃ viniveśayat kaliṅgaṃ dantavakraṃ ca raṇe vikramya jaghnivān rājaśulkāṃ ca vai kṛṣṇaḥ satyabhāmām athodvahat tayoditaḥ satyabhāmayā gatvā divam adhokṣajaḥ jitvāmarādhipaṃ yatra pārijātam athānayat jaghne yatra mahābāhur dhenukaṃ raṇamūrdhani narakāsurakālīyahayagrīvaṃ ca dānavam keśiṃ sakāliyadamaṃ kālaneminam eva ca doṣṇāṃ sahasraṃ ciccheda bāṇasyādbhutakarmaṇaḥ naptāraṃ bhāryayā sārdhaṃ mumocad yatra saṃyuge bhāratīyā kathā yatra vṛṣṇivaṃśaś ca kīrtyate bhaviṣyad dharivaṃśasya khilānām iti kathyate vārāhaṃ nārasiṃhaṃ ca vāmanaṃ pauṣkaraṃ tathā
arthaśāstram idaṃ proktaṃ dharmaśāstram idaṃ mahat kāmaśāstram idaṃ proktaṃ vyāsenāmitabuddhinā
dharme matir bhavatu vaḥ satatotthitānāṃ sa hy eka eva paralokagatasya bandhuḥ arthāḥ striyaś ca nipuṇair api sevyamānā naivātmabhāvam upayānti na ca sthiratvam
yo gośataṃ kanakaśṛṅgamayaṃ dadāti viprāya vedaviduṣe ca bahuśrutāya puṇyāṃ ca bhāratakathāṃ śṛṇuyāc ca nityaṃ tulyaṃ phalaṃ bhavati tasya ca tasya caiva
na kiṃ cid uktavantas te | sā tān uvāca |
sa tathety uktvā bhaikṣaṃ caritvopādhyāyāya nyavedayat | sa tasmād upādhyāyaḥ sarvam eva bhaikṣam agṛhṇāt |
nāyāty upamanyuḥ | ta ūcuḥ | vanaṃ gato gā rakṣitum iti | tān āha upādhyāyaḥ |
idaṃ vṛttam api varṣāsu bhūyas tirodhattām aśvinau dāsapatnīḥ bhittvā meghān aśivam udācarantaṃ yad vṛṣṭikarma prathitau balasya
stotuṃ na śaknomi guṇair bhavantau cakṣurvihīnaḥ pathi saṃpramūḍhaḥ durge 'ham asmin patito 'smi kūpe yuvāṃ śaraṇyau śaraṇaṃ prapadye
tasya strīvākyaṃ na kāryam iti dharmalopabhayād evam avadat |
sa uvāca | sarvaṃ kṛtam iti | upādhyāyaḥ pratyuvāca |
tenaivam ukta upādhyāyaḥ pratyuvāca | kimartham upahareyam iti |
tasyās tat strīdhanaṃ iṃdreṇa yajñe tuṣṭena dattam āsīt |
tam uttaṅkaḥ pratyuvāca | na yuktaṃ bhavatānnam aśuci dattvā pratiśāpaṃ dātum | tasmād annam eva pratyakṣīkuru |
mama śāpo bhaviṣyatīti |
kṛtodakakāryaḥ śuciḥ prayato namo devebhyo gurubhyaś ca kṛtvā mahatā javena tam anvayāt | tasya takṣako dṛḍham āsannaḥ | sa taṃ jagrāha |

taṃ nāgalokam aparyantam anekavidhaprāsādaharmyavalabhīniryūhaśatasaṃkulam uccāvacakrīḍāścaryasthānāvakīrṇam apaśyat | sa tatra | kliśyamānam indro 'paśyat | sa vajraṃ preṣayām āsa | gacchāsya brāhmaṇasya sāhāyyaṃ kuruṣveti | atha vajro daṇḍakāṣṭham anupraviśya tadbilam adārayat |
tatrasthān api saṃstaumi mahataḥ pannagān aham |
nadīṃ mandākinīṃ ramyāṃ prasannasalilām anu |
nāgarājāya mukhyāya kuṇḍale āpnuyāṃ yathā naiva te kuṇḍale lebhe tataś cintām upāgamat
tadā vai cintayām āsa upādhyāyyā yad īritam kāle ca samatikrānte śāpaṃ dāsyati manyunā
dvādaśāraṃ dvādaśa māsāḥ |
pauṣye parvaṇi rājendra svasti vācya dvijān atha samāpte parvaṇi tadā svaśaktyā tarpayed dvijān
mayodaṅkasya caritam aśeṣam uktam | janamejayasya sarpasatrasya nimittāntaram idam api |
bhāratādhyayanaṃ sarvaṃ kṛṣṇadvaipāyanāt tadā
bhṛgur maharṣir bhagavān brahmaṇā vai svayaṃbhuvā varuṇasya kratau jātaḥ pāvakād iti naḥ śrutam

jātam ity abravīt kāryaṃ jihīrṣur muditaḥ śubhām sā hi pūrvaṃ vṛtā tena pulomnā tu śucismitā tāṃ tu prādāt pitā paścād bhṛgave śāstravat tadā tasya tat kilbiṣaṃ nityaṃ hṛdi vartati bhārgava idam antaram ity evaṃ hartuṃ cakre manas tadā
asaṃmataṃ kṛtaṃ me 'dya hariṣyāmy āśramād imām

tvayā vṛtā pulomeyaṃ pūrvaṃ dānavanandana kiṃ tv iyaṃ vidhinā pūrvaṃ mantravan na vṛtā tvayā pitrā tu bhṛgave dattā pulomeyaṃ yaśasvinī dadāti na pitā tubhyaṃ varalobhān mahāyaśāḥ athemāṃ vedadṛṣṭena karmaṇā vidhipūrvakam bhāryām ṛṣir bhṛguḥ prāpa māṃ puraskṛtya dānava seyam ity avagacchāmi nānṛtaṃ vaktum utsahe nānṛtaṃ hi sadā loke pūjyate dānavottama
kravyādā ca tanur yā te sā sarvaṃ bhakṣayiṣyati
evaṃ sa bhagavāñ śāpaṃ lebhe 'gnir bhṛgutaḥ purā
śaunakas tu mahāsattvaḥ sarvabhārgavanandanaḥ jātas tapasi tīvre ca sthitaḥ sthirayaśās tataḥ
apsarā menakā brahman nirdayā nirapatrapā
yācayām āsa tāṃ kanyāṃ putrārthe varavarṇinīm
vivarṇā vigataśrīkā bhraṣṭābharaṇacetanā nirānandakarī teṣāṃ bandhūnāṃ muktamūrdhajā
uddālakaḥ kaṭhaś caiva śvetaketus tathaiva ca
te ca sarve dvijaśreṣṭhās tatraivopāviśaṃs tadā
prāṇān apaharantīva pūrṇacandranibhānanā yadi pīnāyataśroṇī padmapatranibhekṣaṇā mumūrṣur api me prāṇān ādāyāśu gamiṣyati pitṛmātṛsakhīnāṃ ca luptapiṇḍasya tasya me

pralapantam atīvārtaṃ ruruṃ dīnataraṃ tadā devadūtaḥ samāgamya vacanaṃ cedam abravīt vilapyamāne tu rurau sarve devāḥ kṛpānvitāḥ dūtaṃ prasthāpayām āsuḥ saṃdiśyāsya hitaṃ vacaḥ sa dūtas tvarito 'bhyetya devānāṃ priyakṛc chuciḥ uvāca devavacanaṃ rurum ābhāṣya duḥkhitam devaiḥ sarvair ahaṃ brahman preṣito 'smi tavāntikam tvaddhitaṃ tvaddhitair uktaṃ śṛṇu vākyaṃ dvijottama
saṃlāpaguṇasaṃpannā pūrṇacandranibhānanā macchokaṃ vākyatoyena vyapanītaṃ kariṣyati
kena karmavipākena bhujagatvam upāgataḥ
brāhmaṇasya tu śāpena prāpto 'haṃ vikriyām imām sadā samupayuktasya vedādhyāyaratasya ca
muhur uṣṇaṃ ca niḥśvasya susaṃbhrāntas tapodhanaḥ
yaṃ samābhāṣya dṛṣṭvā ca śāpād asmād vimokṣyase
evam uktas tu tenāham uragatvam avāptavān
iti svarūpaṃ gṛhyāśu tam ṛṣiṃ vākyam abravīt svarūpaṃ bhāsvaraṃ bhūyaḥ pratipede mahāyaśāḥ idaṃ covāca vacanaṃ rurum apratimaujasam
kṣatriyasya tu yo dharmaḥ sa te nārhati vai dvija
ity uktvāntarhite yogāt tasminn ṛṣivare prabho saṃbhramāviṣṭahṛdaya ṛṣir mene tad adbhutam
sa mohaṃ paramaṃ gatvā naṣṭasaṃjña ivābhavat tad ṛṣer vacanaṃ tathyaṃ cintayānaḥ punaḥ punaḥ
pitre tu sarvam ākhyāya ḍuṇḍubhasya vaco 'rthavat apṛcchat pitaraṃ bhūyaḥ so 'stikasya vacas tadā yat tad ākhyānam akhilaṃ ḍuṇḍubhenātha kīrtitam tat kīrtyamānaṃ bhagavañ chrotum icchāmi tattvataḥ
nikhilena yathātattvaṃ saute sarvam aśeṣataḥ
kathayiṣyāmy aśeṣeṇa sarvapāpapraṇāśanam

sa kadā cin mahābhāgas tapobalasamanvitaḥ cacāra pṛthivīṃ sarvāṃ yatra sāyaṃgṛho muniḥ tīrtheṣu ca samāplāvaṃ kurvann aṭati sarvaśaḥ caran dīkṣāṃ mahātejā duścarām akṛtātmabhiḥ vāyubhakṣo nirāhāraḥ śuṣyann animiṣo muniḥ itas tataḥ paricaran dīptapāvakasaprabhaḥ
yeṣāṃ tu saṃtatir nāsti martyaloke sukhāvahā na te labhante vasatiṃ svarge puṇyavratā api
pitaras te vayaṃ tāta saṃtāraya kulaṃ svayam
ity uktamātre vacane tathety uktvā pitāmahāḥ antardhānaṃ gatāḥ sarve vismayaṃ sa yayau muniḥ
evam uktvā tataḥ prādād bhāryārthe varavarṇinīm
yathāvat prārthitaṃ labdhvā varaṃ tuṣṭābhavat tadā

udyann atha sahasrāṃśur dṛṣṭvā tam aruṇaṃ prabhuḥ svatejasā prajvalantam ātmanaḥ samatejasam sārathye kalpayām āsa prīyamāṇas tamonudaḥ so 'pi taṃ ratham āruhya bhānor amitatejasaḥ sarvalokapradīpasya hy aruṇo 'py amaro 'bhavat
kāraṇaṃ cātha mathane kiṃ jātam amṛtāt param
pūrvaṃ suragaṇāḥ sarve tathā daityāś ca sarvaśaḥ kṣujjarābhyāṃ samākrāntā brahmāṇam upatasthire
acodayad ameyātmā phaṇīndraṃ padmalocanaḥ
. . . . . . . . līlayā madhusūdanaḥ siddharṣisevitaṃ divyaṃ
vāsuker agram āśliṣṭā nāgarājño mahāsurāḥ
devānāṃ vacanaṃ śrutvā brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ
tatra pūrvaṃ viṣaṃ jātaṃ tad brahmavacanāc chivaḥ prāgrasal lokarakṣārthaṃ tato jyeṣṭhā samutthitā kṛṣṇarūpadharā devī sarvābharaṇabhūṣitā
pārijātaś ca tatraiva surabhiś ca mahāmune jajñāte tau tadā brahman sarvakāmaphalapradau tato jajñe mahābhāga caturdanto mahāgajaḥ

etat tad adbhutaṃ dṛṣṭvā nirāśā dānavāḥ sthitāḥ amṛtārthe ca lakṣmyarthe mahāntaṃ vairam āśritāḥ atinirmathanād eva kālakūṭas tataḥ paraḥ jagad āvṛtya sahasā sadhūmo 'gnir iva jvalan trailokyaṃ mohitaṃ yasya gandham āghrāya tad viṣam dadhāra bhagavān kaṇṭhe mantramūrtir maheśvaraḥ tadā prabhṛti devas tu nīlakaṇṭha iti śrutiḥ
sā tu nārāyaṇī māyā dhārayantī kamaṇḍalum āsyamāneṣu daityeṣu paṅktyā ca prati dānavaiḥ devān apāyayad devī na daityāṃs te ca cukruśuḥ
pāyayaty amṛtaṃ devān harau bāhubalena ca nirodhayati cāpena dūrīkṛtya dhanurdharān
ye ye 'mṛtaṃ pibanti sma te te yudhyanti dānavaiḥ
trayodaśasahasrāṇi yojanāni samantataḥ saparvatavanadvīpāṃ daityasyākampayan mahīm
tato halahalāśabdaḥ saṃbabhūva samantataḥ

yuktaṃ mātrā kṛtaṃ teṣāṃ parapīḍopasarpiṇām anyeṣām api sattvānāṃ nityaṃ doṣaparās tu ye teṣāṃ prāṇāntiko daṇḍo daivena vinipātyate evaṃ saṃbhāṣya devas tu pūjya kadrūṃ ca tāṃ tadā āhūya kaśyapaṃ deva idaṃ vacanam abravīt yad ete dandaśūkāś ca sarpā jātās tvayānagha viṣolbaṇā mahābhogā mātrā śaptāḥ paraṃtapa tatra manyus tvayā tāta na kartavyaḥ kathaṃ cana dṛṣṭaṃ purātanaṃ hy etad yajñe sarpavināśanam ity uktvā sṛṣṭikṛd devas taṃ prasādya prajāpatim
sāgarasya paraṃ pāraṃ velāvanavibhūṣitam
mahāntam udakāgādhaṃ kṣobhyamāṇaṃ mahāsvanam
bhīṣaṇair vikṛtair anyair ghorair jalacarais tathā
vajrapātanasaṃtrastamainākasyābhayapradam ḍimbāhavārditānāṃ ca asurāṇāṃ parāyaṇam
āpūryamāṇam atyarthaṃ nṛtyamānam ivormibhiḥ
tatas te taṃ hayaśreṣṭhaṃ dadṛśāte mahājavam śaśāṅkakiraṇaprakhyaṃ kālavālam ubhe tadā
viṣaṇṇavadanā tatra vinatā sarvato 'bhavat dṛṣṭvā kṛṣṇaṃ tu pucchaṃ sā vājirājasya vismitā avākśirā dīnamanā kadrvā dāsatvam āgatā
mahāsattvabalopetaḥ sarvā vidyotayan diśaḥ kāmarūpaḥ kāmagamaḥ kāmavīryo vihaṃgamaḥ
ghoro ghorasvano raudro vahnir aurva ivāparaḥ
nāgakṣayakaraś caiva kāśyapeyo mahābalaḥ devānāṃ ca hite yuktas tv ahito daityarakṣasām na bhīḥ kāryā kathaṃ cātra paśyadhvaṃ sahitā mama

tvaṃ vibhus tapanaḥ sūryaḥ parameṣṭhī prajāpatiḥ tvam indras tvaṃ hayamukhas tvaṃ śaras tvaṃ jagatpatiḥ tvaṃ mukhaṃ padmajo vipras tvam agniḥ pavanas tathā tvaṃ hi dhātā vidhātā ca tvaṃ viṣṇuḥ surasattamaḥ tvaṃ mahān abhibhūḥ śaśvad amṛtaṃ tvaṃ mahad yaśaḥ tvaṃ prabhās tvam abhipretaṃ tvaṃ nas trāṇam anuttamam tvaṃ gatiḥ satataṃ tvattaḥ kathaṃ naḥ prāpnuyād bhayam

tvaṃ pāhi sarvāṃś ca surān mahātmanaḥ jagat prabho taptasuvarṇavarcasā bhayānvitā nabhasi vimānagāminaḥ vimānitā vipathagatiṃ prayānti te ṛṣeḥ sutas tvam asi dayāvataḥ prabho mahātmanaḥ khagavara kaśyapasya ha sa mā krudhaḥ kuru jagato dayāṃ parāṃ tvam īśvaraḥ praśamam upaihi pāhi naḥ mahāśanisphuritasamasvanena te diśo 'mbaraṃ tridivam iyaṃ ca medinī calanti naḥ khaga hṛdayāni cāniśaṃ nigṛhyatāṃ vapur idam agnisaṃnibham tava dyutiṃ kupitakṛtāntasaṃnibhāṃ niśāmya naś calati mano vyavasthitam prasīda naḥ patagapate prayācatāṃ śivaś ca no bhava bhagavan sukhāvahaḥ
meghān ājñāpayām āsa varṣadhvam udakaṃ śubham
. . . . . . . . vidyutpavanakampitaiḥ tair meghaiḥ saṃtatāsāraṃ varṣadbhir aniśaṃ tadā naṣṭacandrārkakiraṇam
rasātalam anuprāptaṃ śītalaṃ vimalaṃ jalam tadā bhūr abhavac channā jalormibhir anekaśaḥ rāmaṇīyakam āgacchan mātrā saha bhujaṃgamāḥ
taṃ dvīpaṃ makarāvāsaṃ vihitaṃ viśvakarmaṇā indratulyabalā ghoraṃ dadṛśuḥ sarvam āyatam suparṇasahitāḥ sarpāḥ kānanaṃ ca manoramam
vāyuvikṣiptakusumais tathānyair api pādapaiḥ
mattabhramarasaṃghuṣṭaṃ manojñākṛtidarśanam ramaṇīyaṃ śivaṃ puṇyaṃ sarvair janamanoharaiḥ
evam uktas tadā tena vinatā prāha khecaram putraṃ sarvaguṇopetaṃ mahāvīryabalācalam
bhavanāni niṣādānāṃ tatra santi dvijottama pāpināṃ naṣṭalokānāṃ nirghṛṇānāṃ durātmanām

tarhi vakṣyāmi vispaṣṭaṃ kāraṇaṃ tan nibodhatha sa te tāta na hantavyaḥ saṃkruddhenāpi sarvadā brāhmaṇānām abhidroho na kartavyaḥ kathaṃ cana na hy evam agnir nādityo bhasma kuryāt tathānagha yathā kuryād abhikruddho brāhmaṇaḥ saṃśitavrataḥ tad etair vividhair liṅgais tvaṃ vidyās taṃ dvijottamam
kiṃrūpo brāhmaṇo mātaḥ kiṃśīlaḥ kiṃparākramaḥ kiṃ svid agninibho bhāti kiṃ svit saumyapradarśanaḥ
prītā paramaduḥkhārtā nāgair viprakṛtā satī
viṣṇuḥ sarvagataḥ sarvam aṅgāni tava caiva ca
vratopavāsaniyatā bhavāmi suralokataḥ bhaviṣyati na saṃdeho yāvad āgamanaṃ tava
tadā nipatyāśanicaṇḍavikramaḥ prasārya pakṣau sa niṣādam āgataḥ
mātā me kuśalā śaśvat tathā bhrātā tathā hy aham na hi me kuśalaṃ tāta bhojane bahule sadā kva gantāsīti vegena mama tvaṃ vaktum arhasi
kṣutpipāsāvighātārthaṃ bhakṣyam ākhyātu me bhavān
śṛṇu tvaṃ vatsa bhadraṃ te kathāṃ vairāgyavardhinīm pitror arthavibhāge vai samutpannāṃ purāṇḍaja tayor janma tu te kṛtsnaṃ pravakṣyāmy anupūrvaśaḥ tan me tattvaṃ nibodhasva yatpramāṇau ca tau matau
vibhāge bahavo doṣā bhaviṣyanti mahātapāḥ
teṣāṃ madhye tvam apy ekaś chadmakṛc ca mahātmabhiḥ evaṃ nirbadhyamānas tu śaśāpainaṃ vibhāvasuḥ
mahābhraghanasaṃkāśaṃ taṃ bhuktvāmṛtam ānaya mahāgirisamaprakhyaṃ ghorarūpaṃ ca hastinam

etasminn eva kāle tu tāv ṛṣī vittalolupau gajakacchapatāṃ prāpya yuyudhāte parasparam pūrṇakumbho dvijā gāvo yac cānyat kiṃ cid uttamam śubhaṃ svastyayanaṃ cāpi bhaviṣyati tavānḍaja yudhyamānasya saṃgrāme devaiḥ sārdhaṃ mahābala ṛco yajūṃṣi sāmāni pavitrāṇi havīṃṣi ca rahasyāni ca sarvāṇi sarve vedāś ca te balam ity ukto garuḍaḥ pitrā gatas taṃ hradam antikāt apaśyan nirmalajalaṃ nānāpakṣisamākulam
teṣāṃ madhye mahān āsīt pādapaḥ sumanoharaḥ sahasrayojanotsedho bahuśākhāsamanvitaḥ khagānām ālayo divyo nāmnā rohiṇapādapaḥ yasya chāyāṃ samāśritya sadyo bhavati nirvṛtaḥ
tapasyato bhayāviṣṭo vainateyo mahābalaḥ nakhair dṛḍhataraṃ vīraḥ saṃgṛhya gajakacchapau
atidaivaṃ tu tat tasya karma dṛṣṭvā maharṣayaḥ vismayotkampahṛdayā nāma cakrur mahākhage guruṃ bhāraṃ samāsādyoḍḍīna eṣa vihaṃgamaḥ garuḍas tu khagaśreṣṭhas tasmāt pannagabhojanaḥ
tāv ubhau bhakṣayitvā tu sa tārkṣyaḥ kūrmakuñjarau
. . . . . . . . gṛhītvā varuṇāyudhān parivāryāmṛtaṃ sarve yūyaṃ madvacanād iha rakṣadhvaṃ vibudhā vīrā . . . . . . . .
carmāṇy api ca gātreṣu bhānumanti dṛḍhāni ca
bhūṣitāni ca anyāni jvalitāny aparāṇi ca śitatīkṣṇāgradhārāṇi vajrachedīni sarvaśaḥ

kena kāmena cārabdhaṃ bhavadbhir homakarma ca yāthātathyena me brūta śrotuṃ kautūhalaṃ hi me avajñātāḥ surendreṇa mūḍhenākṛtabuddhinā aiśvaryamadamattena sadācārān nirasyatā tadvighātārtham ārambho vidhivat tasya kāśyapa
suparṇena ca śūreṇa śvasanena ca pakṣirāṭ
nabhaḥ spṛśantaṃ jvālābhiḥ sarvabhūtabhayaṃkaram
mukhaṃ sahasraṃ sa cakāra pakṣī nadīyutaṃ vahnivināśahetoḥ mahāyutais taiḥ sabalair mahātmā tam agnim iddhaṃ śamayāṃ cakāra
tau dṛṣṭvā sahasā khedaṃ jagāma vinatātmajaḥ katham etau mahāvīryau jetavyau haribhojinau iti saṃcintya garuḍas tayos tūrṇaṃ nirākaraḥ
evam astv iti taṃ viṣṇur uvāca vinatāsutam
etasminn eva kāle tu bhagavān harivāhanaḥ vavrāja tarasā vegād vāyuṃ spardhan mahājavaḥ
ity evam uktvā garuḍaḥ patraṃ caikaṃ vyasarjayat tad utsṛṣṭam abhiprekṣya tasya parṇam anuttamam mūle ca śatrur nakulaḥ phaṇīnāṃ te vai trayaḥ sarpaviṣāpahā[ḥ] smṛtāḥ
tridhā kṛtvā tadā vajraṃ gataṃ sthānaṃ svam eva hi
ity evam ukto garuḍaḥ pratyuvāca śacīpatim
pṛṣṭenānyena gopate | vaktavyaṃ na tu vaktavyaṃ
aṣṭau bhūmīr nava divas trīn samudrāñ śacīpate paraḥ sahasrān parvatān vaheyaṃ kāmayetha cet
evam eva yathāttha tvaṃ sarvaṃ saṃbhāvyate tvayi
devadevaṃ mahātmānaṃ yoginām īśvaraṃ harim sa cānvamodat tat sarvaṃ yathoktaṃ garuḍena vai idaṃ bhūyo vacaḥ prāha bhagavāṃs tridaśeśvaraḥ

vinayāvanato bhūtvā vacanaṃ cedam abravīt idam ānītam amṛtaṃ devānāṃ bhavanān mayā praśādhi kim ato mātaḥ kariṣyāmi śubhavrate parituṣṭāham etena karmaṇā tava putraka ajaraś cāmaraś caiva devānāṃ supriyo bhava
bhavadbhir idam āsīnair yad uktaṃ tad vacas tadā
parasparakṛtadveṣāḥ somaprāśanakarmaṇi ahaṃ pūrvam ahaṃ pūrvam ity uktvā te samādravan
nāgāś ca vañcitā bhūtvā visṛjya vinatāṃ tadā viṣādam agamaṃs tīvraṃ garuḍasya balāt prabho
viprasyāvajñayā śakro mātuḥ sarpā vipadgatāḥ suparṇas tūbhayaprītyā harer apy upari sthitaḥ
kardamaś ca mahānāgo nāgaś ca bahumūlakaḥ
śītavātātapasahaḥ parityaktapriyāpriyaḥ dharme manaḥ samādhāya snāne triṣavaṇe tathā
tam evaṃvādinaṃ śeṣaṃ pitāmaha uvāca ha
śāpāt tasmān mahāghorād uktān mātrā mahābala
anyam eva varaṃ dadmi tavāhaṃ bhujagottama imāṃ tvaṃ sakalāṃ pṛthvīṃ mūrdhnā saṃdhārayiṣyasi
anante 'bhiprayāte tu vāsukiḥ sa mahābalaḥ abhyaṣicyata nāgais tu daivatair iva vāsavaḥ
śāpaḥ sṛṣṭo mahāghoro mātrā khalv avinītayā
sarva eva hi nas tāvad buddhimanto vicakṣaṇāḥ
teṣu tatropaviṣṭeṣu pannageṣu dvijottama elāpatro 'bravīt teṣāṃ mantravidyottamo balaiḥ
śreyaḥ prasādanaṃ manye kaśyapasya mahātmanaḥ jñātivargasya sauhārdād ātmanaś ca bhujaṃgamāḥ na ca jānāti me buddhiḥ kiṃ cit kartuṃ vaco hi vaḥ mayā hīdaṃ vidhātavyaṃ bhavatāṃ yad dhitaṃ bhavet
prāg eva darśitā buddhir mayaiṣā bhujagottamāḥ heyeti yadi vo buddhis tavāpi ca tathā prabho astu kāmaṃ mamādyāpi buddhiḥ smaraṇam āgatā tāṃ śṛṇuṣva pravakṣyāmi yathātathyena pannagāḥ
śāpaduḥkhāgnitaptānāṃ pannagānām anāmayam kṛpayā parayāviṣṭāḥ prārthayanto divaukasaḥ
vāsukeḥ sarparājasya jaratkāruḥ svasā kila sa tasyāṃ bhavitā putraḥ śāpān nāgāṃś ca mokṣyati tasyāṃ janayitā putraṃ vedavedāṅgapāragam
saṃdiśya pannagān sarvān vāsukiḥ śāpamohitaḥ svasāram udyamya tadā jaratkārum ṛṣiṃ prati
tat tasya vacanaṃ śrutvā provāca sa mahādyutiḥ
uktaṃ nāma yathāpūrvaṃ sarvaṃ tac chrutavān aham yathā tu jāto hy āstīka etad icchāmi veditum tac chrutvā vacanaṃ tasya sūtaḥ provāca śāstrataḥ
saṃdiśya pannagān sarvān vāsukiḥ susamāhitaḥ svasāram udyamya tadā jaratkārum ṛṣiṃ prati
tathā vikhyātavāṃl loke parikṣid abhimanyujaḥ
na hi taṃ rājaśārdūlas tathā dharmaparāyaṇam jānāti bharataśreṣṭhas tata enam adharṣayat
uddiśya pitaraṃ tasya yac chrutvā roṣam āharat
pitrā ca tava tat karma nānurūpam ivātmanaḥ kṛtaṃ munijanaśreṣṭha yenāhaṃ bhṛśaduḥkhitaḥ
ananyacetāḥ satataṃ viṣṇuṃ devam atoṣayat vanyānnabhojī satataṃ munir maunavrate sthitaḥ evaṃbhūtaḥ sa tejasvī sa me 'dya mṛtadhārakaḥ
no cet tatas takṣako 'pi yāsyate yamamandiram
sarvathā vartamānasya rājñaḥ kṣantavyam eva hi

arājake janapade doṣā jāyanti vai sadā udvṛttaṃ satataṃ lokaṃ rājā daṇḍena śāsti vai daṇḍāt pratibhayaṃ bhūyaḥ śāntir utpadyate tadā nodvignaś carate dharmaṃ nodvignaś carate kriyām rājñā pratiṣṭhito dharmo dharmāt svargaḥ pratiṣṭhitaḥ rājño yajñakriyāḥ sarvā yajñād devāḥ pratiṣṭhitāḥ devād vṛṣṭiḥ pravarteta vṛṣṭer oṣadhayaḥ smṛtāḥ oṣadhibhyo manuṣyāṇāṃ dhārayan satataṃ hitam manuṣyāṇāṃ ca yo dhātā rājā rājyakaraḥ punaḥ daśaśrotriyasamo rājā ity evaṃ manur abravīt
utsīdeyur ime lokāḥ kṣamā cāsya pratikriyā
śrutvā tu vacanaṃ rājño munir gauramukhas tadā tam anujñāpya vegena prajagāmāśramaṃ guroḥ
na cainaṃ kaś cid ārūḍhaṃ labhate rājasattamam vāto 'pi niścaraṃs tatra praveśe vinivāryate
evam uktas takṣakeṇa kāśyapaḥ punar abravīt
paśya mantrabalaṃ me 'dya nyagrodhaṃ daśa pannaga
yatteyaṃ ca pragṛhya vai vinivarte bhujaṃgama
vidhinā saṃprayukto vai ṛṣivākyena tena tu yasminn eva phale nāgas tam evābhakṣayat svayam
veṣṭayitvā ca bhogena vinadya ca mahāsvanam adaśat pṛthivīpālaṃ takṣakaḥ pannageśvaraḥ
saṃtānaṃ hi paro dharma evam āha pitāmahaḥ
śocyān suduḥkhitān asmān kasmād vedavidāṃ vara
bāndhavānāṃ hitasyeha yathā cātmakulaṃ tathā kas tvaṃ bandhum ivāsmākam anuśocasi sattama śrotum icchāma sarveṣāṃ ko bhavān iha tiṣṭhati
mama pūrve bhavanto vai pitaraḥ sapitāmahāḥ tad brūta yan mayā kāryaṃ bhavatāṃ priyakāmyayā
na dārān vai kariṣye 'ham iti me bhāvitaṃ manaḥ
tatra cotpatsyate jantur bhavatāṃ tāraṇāya vai śāśvatāś cāvyayāś caiva tiṣṭhantu pitaro mama
sa tv araṇyagataḥ prājñaḥ pitṝṇāṃ hitakāmyayā uvāca kanyāṃ yācāmi tisro vācaḥ śanair imāḥ
tvadarthaṃ rakṣyate caiṣā mayā munivarottama na bhariṣye 'ham etāṃ vai eṣa me samayaḥ kṛtaḥ apriyaṃ ca na kartavyaṃ kṛte caināṃ tyajāmy aham
nāvamānāt kṛtavatī divaso 'stam upeyivān
apatyārthaṃ tu me bhrātā jñātīnāṃ hitakāmyayā
bhūya evābhavad bhrātā śokasaṃtaptamānasaḥ
sūtasya vacanaṃ śrutvā śaunakaḥ prāha vismitaḥ
śṛṇu pārthiva yad brūṣe pitus tava mahātmanaḥ caritaṃ pārthivendrasya yathā niṣṭhāṃ gataś ca saḥ
tato gatiṃ samāpannaḥ sarveṣām anivartinīm
sa rājā pṛthivīpālaḥ sarvaśastrabhṛtāṃ varaḥ
āśīviṣas tigmatejā madvākyabalacoditaḥ
śiṣyaṃ gauramukhaṃ nāma śīlavantaṃ guṇānvitam ācakhyau sa ca viśrānto rājñaḥ sarvam aśeṣataḥ

ahaṃ sa takṣako brahman paśya me vīryam adbhutam na śaktas tvaṃ mayā daṣṭaṃ taṃ saṃjīvayituṃ nṛpam ity uktvā takṣakas tatra so 'daśad vai vanaspatim sa daṣṭamātro nāgena bhasmībhūto 'bhavan nagaḥ kāśyapaś ca tato rājann ajīvayata taṃ nagam tatas taṃ lobhayām āsa kāmaṃ brūhīti takṣakaḥ sa evam uktas taṃ prāha kāśyapas takṣakaṃ punaḥ

etasminn eva kāle tu sa rājā janamejayaḥ uvāca mantriṇaḥ sarvān idaṃ vākyam ariṃdamaḥ atha tat kathitaṃ kena yad vṛttaṃ tad vanaspatau āścaryabhūtaṃ lokasya bhasmarāśīkṛtaṃ tadā yad vṛkṣaṃ jīvayām āsa kāśyapas takṣakeṇa vai nūnaṃ mantrair hataviṣo na praṇaśyeta kāśyapāt cintayām āsa pāpātmā manasā pannagādhamaḥ daṣṭaṃ yadi mayā vipraḥ pārthivaṃ jīvayiṣyati takṣakaḥ saṃhataviṣo loke yāsyati hāsyatām vicintyaivaṃ kṛtā tena dhruvaṃ tuṣṭir dvijasya vai bhaviṣyati hy upāyena yasya dāsyāmi yātanām
iyaṃ durātmatā tasya kāśyapaṃ yo nyavartayat
sarpasatraṃ vidhāsyāmi nāgānāṃ kṣayakārakam
krośayojanamātrā hi gokarṇasya pramāṇataḥ patanty ajasraṃ vegena cāgnāv agnimatāṃ vara
uttaṅko hy abhavat tatra netā ca brāhmaṇottamaḥ kuṇḍaladveṣatas tatra sarpān dahati sarvataḥ
jagāma bhayasaṃvignaḥ śaraṇārthī surarṣabham
tathā vidhīyatām etad devadeva jagatpate
sa prāpya yajñāyatanaṃ variṣṭhaṃ dvijottamaḥ puṇyakṛtāṃ variṣṭhaḥ tuṣṭāva rājānam anantakīrtim ṛtviksadasyāṃś ca tathaiva cāgnim
tulyo 'si tenaiva mahātmanā vā gaṅgā devī mānayām āsa yo vai
prasādayainaṃ tvam ato narendra dvijātivaryaṃ sakalārthasiddhaye
āste viṣadharo nāgo nihantā janakasya te
āyātu cendro 'pi satakṣakaḥ pated vibhāvasau nāgarājena tūrṇam jambhasya hanteti juhāva hotā tadājagāmāhidattābhayaḥ prabhuḥ
nāgasya nāśo mama caiva nāśo bhaviṣyatīty eva vicintyamānaḥ

taṃ dṛṣṭvā ṛtvijas tatra vacanaṃ cedam abruvan hotā juhāva tatrasthaṃ takṣakaṃ pannagaṃ tathā hūyamāne tathā caiva takṣakaḥ sapuraṃdaraḥ ākāśe dadṛśe caiva kṣaṇena vyathitas tadā puraṃdaras tu taṃ yajñaṃ dṛṣṭvorubhayam āviśat hitvā tu takṣakaṃ trastaḥ svam eva bhavanaṃ yayau indre gate tu nāgendras takṣako bhayamohitaḥ mantraśaktyā pāvakārciḥsamīpam avaśo gataḥ
śrutvā tan nṛpatir vākyaṃ dadau tasmai varaṃ tadā sarveṣāṃ paśyatāṃ tatra pūrṇakāmo dvijo 'bhavat
avaśān mātṛvāgdaṇḍapīḍitān kṛpaṇān hutān
anye ca bahavo vipra tathā vai kulasaṃbhavāḥ pradīptāgnau hutāḥ sarve ghorarūpā mahābalāḥ
subhojanaḥ parāśaś ca vīryavān ekasāhasaḥ
ete kauravyajā nāgā vibhāvasumukhaṃ gatāḥ
varāhako vāruṇakaḥ sucitrā etraveṇikaḥ
daśaśīrṣāḥ śataśīrṣās tathānye bahuśīrṣakāḥ
pañcayojanavistārā daśadvādaśasaṃkhyayā
samāpite tataḥ satre vidhivad vidhidarśibhiḥ
tato gatvā cāvabhṛthaṃ kṛtvā snānam anantaram prītas tasmai narapatir aprameyaparākramaḥ

taṃ smarantaṃ mahābhāgā na māṃ hiṃsitum arhatha sarpāpasarpa bhadraṃ te gaccha sarpa mahāviṣa janamejayasya yajñānte āstīkavacanaṃ smara āstīkavacanaṃ smṛtvā yaḥ sarpo na nivartate śatadhā bhidyate mūrdhni śiṃśavṛkṣaphalaṃ yathā sa evam uktas tu tadā dvijendraḥ samāgatais tair bhujagendramukhyaiḥ saṃprāpya prītiṃ vipulāṃ mahātmā tato mano gamanāyātha dadhre
ity evaṃ nāgarājo 'tha nāgānāṃ madhyamas tathā uktvā sahaiva te sarvaiḥ svam eva bhavanaṃ yayau
yan māṃ tvaṃ pṛṣṭavān brahmañ śrutvā ḍuṇḍubhabhāṣitam vyetu te sumahad brahman kautūhalam ariṃdama
sarvapāpavinirmukto dīrgham āyur avāpnuyāt gārhasthyaṃ dharmam akhilaṃ prayāyāt putrapautravān mahāpuṇyaṃ yaśaś caiva labhate nātra saṃśayaḥ
brāhmaṇānāṃ purastāt sa nṛpeṇaivaṃ praṇoditaḥ
śṛṇu rājan yathā vīrā bhrātaraḥ pañca pāṇḍavāḥ virodham anvagacchanta dhārtarāṣṭrair durātmabhiḥ
tato duryodhanaḥ krūraḥ karṇasya ca mate sthitaḥ pāṇḍavān vividhopāyai rājyahetor apīḍayat
upāyair bahubhiḥ kṣudraiḥ saṃvṛtair vivṛtair api pāṇḍavān pīḍayām āsa na ca kiṃ cid asādhayat
prāptā hiḍimbī bhīmena yatra jāto ghaṭotkacaḥ

sutapriyaiṣī tān rājā pāṇḍavān ambikāsutaḥ (17ab) tato vivāsayām āsa rājyabhogabubhukṣayā te prātiṣṭhanta sahitā nagarān nāgasāhvayāt prasthāne cābhavan mantrī kṣattā teṣāṃ mahātmanām yena muktā jatugṛhān niśīthe prādravan vanam tataḥ saṃprāpya kaunteyā nagaraṃ vāraṇāvatam nyavasanta mahātmāno mātrā saha paraṃtapāḥ dhṛtarāṣṭreṇa cājñaptā uṣitā jātuṣe gṛhe purocanād rakṣamāṇāḥ saṃvatsaram atandritāḥ (18ab) suruṅgāṃ kārayitvā te vidureṇa pracoditāḥ ādīpya jātuṣaṃ veśma dagdhvā caiva purocanam (18cd) prādravan bhayasaṃvignā mātrā saha paraṃtapāḥ (19ab) dadṛśur dāruṇaṃ rakṣo hiḍimbaṃ vananirjhare hatvā ca taṃ rākṣasendraṃ bhītāḥ samanubodhanāt niśi saṃprādravan pārthā dhārtarāṣṭrabhayārditāḥ (20ab) ekacakrāṃ tato gatvā pāṇḍavāḥ saṃśitavratāḥ (20cd) vedādhyayanasaṃpannās te 'bhavan brahmacāriṇaḥ te tatra prayatāḥ kālaṃ kaṃ cid ūṣur nararṣabhāḥ mātrā sahaikacakrāyāṃ brāhmaṇasya niveśane tatrāsasāda kṣudhitaṃ puruṣādaṃ vṛkodaraḥ (21ab) bhīmaseno mahābāhur bakaṃ nāma mahābalam taṃ cāpi puruṣavyāghro bāhuvīryeṇa pāṇḍavaḥ nihatya tarasā vīro nāgarān paryasāntvayat tatas te śuśruvuḥ kṛṣṇāṃ pañcāleṣu svayaṃvarām śrutvā caivābhyagacchanta gatvā caivālabhanta tām
dhairyād dharmāc ca satyāc ca vijayāc cādhikaṃ priyam arjuno bhrātaraṃ jyeṣṭhaṃ nātyavartata jātu cit
tīrthayātrāṃ ca kṛtavān nāgakanyām avāpya ca atha pāṇḍyasya tanayāṃ labdhvā tābhyāṃ sahoṣitaḥ

iṣṭvā kratūṃś ca vividhān aśvamedhādikān bahūn dhṛtarāṣṭre gate svargaṃ vidure pañcatāṃ gate gamayitvā striyaḥ svargaṃ rājñām amitatejasām vārṣṇeye nilayaṃ prāpte kṛṣṇadārān prarakṣya ca mahāprasthānikaṃ kṛtvā gatāḥ svargam anuttamam
bhrātṝṇāṃ kleśam āyātaṃ gatavān vai paraṃtapaḥ
kathaṃ sā draupadī śaktā dhārtarāṣṭrāṃś ca nādahat
kṣaṇaṃ kuru mahārāja vipulo 'yam anukramaḥ puṇyākhyānasya vaktavyaḥ kṛṣṇadvaipāyaneritaḥ

upākhyānaiḥ saha jñeyaṃ śrāvyaṃ bhāratam uttamam saṃkṣepeṇa tu vakṣyāmi sarvam etan narādhipa adhyāyānāṃ sahasre dve parvaṇāṃ śatam eva ca ślokānāṃ tu sahasrāṇi navatiś ca daśaiva ca tato 'ṣṭādaśabhiḥ parvaiḥ saṃgṛhītaṃ maharṣiṇā
tatkṣaṇāj jāyate dāntaḥ śaśvac chāntiṃ niyacchati
prasūte garbhiṇī putraṃ kanyā satpatim aśnute
vīraṃ janayate putraṃ kanyāṃ vā rājyabhāginīm

bhagavāṃś cāpi deveśo yatra devī ca kīrtyate anekajanano yatra kārttikeyasya saṃbhavaḥ brāhmaṇānāṃ gavāṃ caiva māhātmyaṃ yatra kīrtyate sarvaśrutisamūho 'yaṃ śrotavyo dharmabuddhibhiḥ kīrtyante dhūtapāpmānaḥ kīrtyate keśavas tathā
ahnā yad enaḥ kriyate indriyair manasāpi vā jñānād ajñānato vāpi prakaroti naraś ca yat
idaṃ hi brāhmaṇair loke ākhyātaṃ brāhmaṇeṣv iha
tvaṃ no gatir mahārājann iti vajry avadan muhuḥ
devān ahaṃ pālayitā pālaya tvaṃ hi mānuṣān
evaṃ saṃsāntvya nṛpatiṃ tapasaḥ saṃnyavartayat
prayayau devataiḥ sārdhaṃ kṛtvā kāryaṃ divaukasām tatas tu rājā cedīnām indrābharaṇabhūṣitaḥ indradattaṃ vimānaṃ tadāsthāya prayayau purīm
mārgaśīrṣe mahārāja paurṇamāsyāṃ mahāmaham mārgaśīrṣe mahārāja

reje cedipatis tatra divi devapatir yathā nānāvidhāni dānāni datvārthibhyaḥ suhṛjjanaiḥ alaṃkṛtvā mālyadāmair vastrair nānāvidhais tathā vratibhiḥ sajalaiḥ sarvaiḥ krīḍitvā nṛpaśāsanāt sabhājayitvā rājānaṃ kṛtvā narmāśritāḥ kathāḥ ramante nāgarāḥ sarve tathā jānapadaiḥ saha sūtāś ca māgadhāś caiva naṭante naṭanartakaiḥ prītyā ca naraśārdūla sarve cakrur mahotsavam sāntaḥpuraḥ sahāmātyaḥ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitaḥ mahārājatavāsāṃsi vasitvā cedirāṭ tathā jātihiṅgulikenāktaḥ sadāro mumude tadā evaṃ jānapadāḥ sarve cakrur indramahaṃ tadā yathā cedipatiḥ prītaś cakārendramakhaṃ vasuḥ
haribhir vājibhir yuktam antarikṣagataṃ ratham āsthāya saha śacyā ca vṛto hy apsarasāṃ gaṇaiḥ
nirītikāni sasyāni bhavanti bahudhā nṛpa rākṣasāś ca piśācāś ca na lumpante kathaṃ cana
evaṃ kṛtvā mahendras tu jagāma svaṃ niveśanam
mahiṣī bhavitā kanyā pauṣyaḥ senāpatir bhavet śuktimatyā vacaḥ śrutvā dṛṣṭvā tau rājasattamaḥ
tad retaś cāpi tatraiva pratijagrāha bhūmipaḥ
aṅgulīyena śuklasya rakṣāṃ pravidadhe nṛpaḥ aśokastabakais tāmraiḥ pallavaiś cāpy abandhayat idaṃ vṛthaiva skannaṃ me retaḥ sa sumahān vadhaḥ
saṃgamaṃ mama kalyāṇi kuruṣvety abhyabhāṣata
lajjānatamukhī bhūtvā muner abhyāśam āgatā
tataḥ sa maharṣir vidvāñ śiṣyān āhūya dharmataḥ
vedārthavic ca bhagavān ṛṣir vipro mahāyaśāḥ
āder ādiḥ samastānāṃ sa kartā na kṛtaḥ prabhuḥ
kaivalyaṃ nirguṇaṃ viśvam anādim ajam avyayam
yad āpnoti yad ādatte yac cāti viṣayāṇi ca yac cāsya satato bhāvas tasmād ātmeti kīrtyate
dharmārthakuśalo dhīmān medhāvī dhūtakalmaṣaḥ viduraḥ śūdrayonau tu jajñe dvaipāyanād api
tato duḥśāsanaś caiva duḥsahaś cāpi bhārata durmarṣaṇo vikarṇaś ca citraseno viviṃśatiḥ jayaḥ satyavrataś caiva purumitraś ca bhārata vaiśyāputro yuyutsuś ca ekādaśa mahārathāḥ
kṣatraṃ tadā mahīpāla svadharmaṃ paripāṭhanāt
dharmam evānuvartante na paśyanti sma kilbiṣam babhūvuḥ karmasu sveṣu samyak sarvāḥ prajāḥ sthitāḥ
uttiṣṭha gaccha vasudhe svasthānam iti sāgamat
so 'pi janma manuṣyeṣu lebhe suravaro hariḥ śrīvatsāṅko hṛṣīkeśaḥ sarvadaivatapūjitaḥ
dānavānāṃ ca ye mukhyāḥ tathā bhujagarakṣasām
prāṇināṃ caiva sarveṣāṃ sarvaśaḥ prabhavāpyayam
rudrasyānucaraḥ śrīmān mahākāleti yaṃ viduḥ
anetro varhaparṇaś ca tathā kāśīpatiś ca saḥ
menakā sahajanyā ca pārṣṇinā puñjakas tathā ghṛtasthalā ghṛtācī ca viśvāsī corvaśī tathā
pulahasya sutā rājañ śarabhāś ca prakīrtitāḥ siṃhāḥ kiṃpuruṣā vyāghrā ṛkṣā īhāmṛgās tathā
āpasya putro vaitaṇḍyaḥ śramaśrānto munis tathā
viśvakarmā mahābhāgo tasya putro manojavaḥ
śaṅkhaś ca likhitaś caiva sarvaśāstraviśāradau
ṣaṇḍāmārkau prathamataḥ prathitāv ugratejasau
āsīt tasya sukanyā vai bhāryā cāpi mahātmanaḥ
bhāryā garutmataś caiva bhāsī krauñcī śukī tathā caturthī dhṛtarāṣṭrī ca tāsv apatyān nibodha me
vimalām api bhadraṃ te amalām api bhārata

irāyāṃ kanyakā jātās tisraḥ kamalalocanāḥ vanaspatīnāṃ vṛkṣāṇāṃ vīrudhāṃ caiva mātaraḥ latāruhe ca dve prokte vīrudhā eva tāḥ smṛtāḥ gṛhṇanti ye 'pi tāḥ puṣpaṃ phalāni tarasā pṛthak tato sutās te vijñeyās tān evāhur vanaspatīn puṣpaiḥ phalagrahān vṛkṣān ruhāyāḥ prasavaṃ viduḥ latāgulmāni vallyaś ca tvaksāratṛṇajātayaḥ vīrudho yāḥ prajās tasyās tatra vaṃśaḥ samāpyate
kadrūr nāgam anantaṃ ca prajajñe dharaṇīdharam
siṃhavyāghramṛgāṇāṃ ca pannagānāṃ patatriṇām
kāpathas tu mahāvīryaḥ śrīmān rājan mahāsuraḥ supārśva iti vikhyātaḥ kṣitau jajñe mahīpatiḥ krathas tu rājan rājarṣiḥ kṣitau jajñe mahāsuraḥ pārvateya iti khyātaḥ kāñcanācalasaṃnibhaḥ
candravarmeti vikhyātaḥ kāmbojānāṃ narādhipaḥ arka ity abhivikhyāto yas tu dānavapuṃgavaḥ
saptamas tu babhūvaiṣāṃ pravaro yo mahāsuraḥ

kupathas tv atha vikhyāto dānavānāṃ mahābalaḥ pārvatīya iti khyātaḥ kāñcanācalasaṃnibhaḥ krathanas tu mahāvīryaḥ śrīmān rājan mahāsuraḥ supārśva iti vikhyātaḥ kṣitau jajñe mahīpatiḥ asurāṇāṃ tu yaḥ sūryaḥ śrīmān rājan mahāsuraḥ darado nāma bāhlīko varaḥ sarvamahīkṣitām
kālanemir iti khyāto dānavānāṃ mahābalaḥ sa kaṃsa iti vikhyāta ugrasenasuto balī
sarveṣāṃ devatābhāgaṃ dattvā viddhi mahīpate jayasya parirakṣārthaṃ sa hi sṛṣṭo mahātmanā
karṇa ity abhivikhyātaḥ pṛthāyāḥ prathamaḥ sutaḥ sa tu sūtakule vīro vavṛdhe rājasattama karṇaṃ naravaraśreṣṭhaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ sarvadhanuṣmatām duryodhanasya sacivaṃ mantriṇaṃ śakuneḥ samam
vaśitā sarvabhūtānāṃ saṃhartā cāparājitaḥ
bhīṣmakasya kule sādhvī rukmiṇī nāma nāmataḥ draupadī tv atha saṃjajñe śacībhāgād aninditā
ete tu mukhyāḥ kathitā mayā te rājasattama
bhagavan vistareṇeha bharatasya mahātmanaḥ janma karma ca śuśrūṣus tan me śaṃsitum arhasi
svakarmaniratā viprā nānṛtaṃ teṣu vidyate

saṃbhavaṃ bharatasyāhaṃ caritaṃ ca mahāmateḥ śakuntalāyāś cotpattiṃ śrotum icchāmi tattvataḥ duṣyantena ca vīreṇa yathā prāptā śakuntalā taṃ vai puruṣasiṃhasya bhagavan vistaraṃ tv aham śrotum icchāmi tattvajña sarvaṃ matimatāṃ vara
nānāyudhadharaiś cāpi nānāveṣadharais tathā
balena caturaṅgeṇa vṛtaḥ paramavalgunā
taṃ devarājapratimaṃ mattavāraṇadhūrgatam dvijakṣatriyaviṭśūdrā niryāntam anujagmire dadṛśur vardhamānās te āśīrbhiś ca jayena ca
tato meghaghanaprakhyaṃ siddhacāraṇasevitam vanam ālokayām āsa nagarād yojanadvaye mṛgān anucaran vanyāñ śrameṇa paripīḍitaḥ mṛgān anucaraṃś caiva vegenāśvān acodayat
puṃskokilaninādaiś ca jhillīkagaṇanāditam
siddhacāraṇasaṃghaiś ca gandharvāpsarasāṃ gaṇaiḥ sevitaṃ vanam atyarthaṃ mattavāraṇakiṃnaraiḥ
taṃ tadāpratimaṃ śrīmān āśramaṃ pratyapūjayat
tasyās tīre bhagavataḥ kāśyapasya mahātmanaḥ āśramapravaraṃ puṇyaṃ maharṣigaṇasevitam
vismayotphullanayano rājā tatra babhūva ha tābhir ṛksāmagītābhir atharvaśirasānvitam amitābhir uktābhi(sic) suśruve sa nṛpas tadā
kratvarthāṃś ca prakāśadbhir yajurbhir nirmalasvaraiḥ jaṭāvarṇavibhāgajñair ucyamānāny anekaśaḥ
madhuraiḥ sāmagītaiś ca ṛṣibhir niyatavrataiḥ bhāruṇḍasāmagītābhir atharvaśirasodgataiḥ
śabdacchandoniruktajñaiḥ kālajñānaviśāradaiḥ dravyakarmaguṇajñaiś ca kāryakāraṇavedibhiḥ jalpavādavitaṇḍajñair vyāsagranthasamāśritaiḥ nānāśāstreṣu mukhyaiś ca śuśrāva svanam īritam

suvratābhyāgataṃ taṃ tu pūjyaṃ prāptam atheśvaram rūpayauvanasaṃpannā śīlācāravatī śubhā sā tam āyatapadmākṣaṃ vyūḍhoraskaṃ susaṃhitam siṃhaskandhaṃ dīrghabhujaṃ sarvalakṣaṇapūjitam spaṣṭaṃ madhurayā vācā sābravīj janamejaya
āśramasyābhigamane kiṃ tvaṃ kāryaṃ cikīrṣasi kas tvam adyeha saṃprāpto maharṣer āśramaṃ śubham
svāgataṃ te mahārāja phalamūlodakaṃ ca naḥ parigṛhyopabhuṅkṣva tvaṃ kiṃ ca te karavāṇy aham
dvijaśreṣṭha namo bhadre muniḥ kaṇvaḥ pratāpavān

sthito 'smy amitasaubhāgye vivakṣuś cāsmi kiṃ cana śṛṇu me nāganāsoru vacanaṃ mattakāśini rājarṣer anvaye jātaḥ pūror asmi viśeṣataḥ vṛṇe tvām adya suśroṇi duḥṣanto varavarṇini na me 'nyatra kṣatriyāyā mano jātu pravartate ṛṣiputrīṣu cānyāsu nāvarṇāsv aparāsu ca evaṃ praṇihitātmānaṃ viddhi māṃ kalabhāṣiṇi tasya me tvayi bhāvo 'sti kṣatriyā hy asi kā vada na hi me bhīru viprāyāṃ manaḥ prasahate gatim bhaje tvām āyatāpāṅge bhaktaṃ bhajitum arhasi bhuṅkṣa rājyaṃ viśālākṣi buddhiṃ mā tv anyathā kṛthāḥ
asvatantrāsmi rājendra kāśyapo me guruḥ pitā tam eva prārthaya svārthaṃ nāyuktaṃ kartum arhasi
anyathā santam ātmānam anyathā satsu bhāṣate sa pāpenāvṛto mūrkhas tena ātmāpahārakaḥ
ūrdhvaretā yathāsi tvaṃ kutas teyaṃ śakuntalā putrī tvattaḥ kathaṃ jātā tat tvaṃ me brūhi kāśyapa
tapas tasya mahāghoraṃ brahmacaryaṃ ca saṃśritam
brahmarṣiśāpaṃ rājarṣiḥ kathaṃ mokṣyati kauśikaḥ avamatya tadā devair yajñāṅgaṃ tadvināśitam anyāni ca mahātejā yajñāṅgāny asṛjat prabhuḥ nināya ca tadā svargaṃ triśaṅkuṃ sa mahātapāḥ
saṃśoṣec ca mahodadhim | saṃkṣipec ca mahānadriṃ
paśyatas tatra tasyarṣer apy agnisamatejasaḥ viśvāmitras tatas tāṃ tu viṣamasthām aninditām
devagarbhopamāṃ balāṃ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitām śayānāṃ śayane ramye menakā vākyam abravīt maharṣer ugratapasas tejas tvam avināśinī tasmāt svargaṃ gamiṣyāmi devakāryārtham āgatā

māṃ dṛṣṭvaivābhyapadyanta pādayoḥ patitā dvijāḥ abruvañ śakunāḥ sarve kalaṃ madhurabhāṣiṇaḥ viśvāmitrasutāṃ brahman nyāsabhūtāṃ bharasva vai kāmakrodhāv ajitavān sakhā te kauśikīṃ gataḥ tasmāt poṣaya putrīṃ te dayāvann iti te 'bruvan sarvabhūtarutajño 'haṃ dayāvān sarvajantuṣu

manyunā ghnanti te śatrūn vajreṇendra ivāsurān yasya māṃ dāsyati pitā sa me bhartā bhaviṣyati pitā rakṣati kaumāre bhartā rakṣati yauvane putras tu sthavire bhāve na strī svātantryam arhati amanyamānā rājendra pitaraṃ me tapasvinam adharmeṇa hi dharmiṣṭha kathaṃ varam upāsmahe mā maivaṃ vada suśroṇi taporāśiṃ dayātmakam manyupraharaṇā viprā na viprāḥ śastrapāṇayaḥ agnir dahati tejobhiḥ sūryo dahati raśmibhiḥ rājā dahati daṇḍena brāhmaṇo manyunā dahet krodhito manyunā hanti vajrapāṇir ivāsurān jānāmi bhadre tam ṛṣiṃ tasya manyur na vidyate
ātmano mitram ātmaiva tathā cātmātmanaḥ pitā
brāhmīṃ me pratijānīhi pratijñāṃ rājasattama

tasyās tu sarvaṃ saṃśrutya yathoktaṃ sa viśāṃ patiḥ duḥṣantaḥ punar evāha yad yad icchasi tad vada khyāto lokapravādo 'yaṃ vivāha iti śāstrataḥ vaivāhikīṃ kriyāṃ santaḥ praśaṃsanti prajāhitām lokapravādaśāntyarthaṃ vivāhaṃ vidhinā kuru santy atra yajñapātrāṇi darbhāḥ sumanaso 'kṣatāḥ yathā yukto vivāhaḥ syāt tathā yuktā prajā bhavet tasmād ājyaṃ havir lājāḥ sikatā brāhmaṇās tava vaivāhikāni cānyāni samastānīha pārthiva duruktam api rājendra kṣantavyaṃ dharmakāraṇāt

purohitaṃ samāhūya vacanaṃ cedam abravīt rājaputryā yad uktaṃ vai na vṛthā kartum utsahe kriyāhīno hi na bhaven mama putro mahādyutiḥ tathā kuruṣva śāstroktaṃ vivāhaṃ mā ciraṃ kuru evam ukto nṛpatinā dvijaḥ paramayantritaḥ śobhanaṃ rājarājeti vidhinā kṛtavān dvijaḥ śāsanād vipramukhyasya kṛtakautukamaṅgalaḥ

traividyavṛddhaiḥ sahitāṃ nānārājajanaiḥ saha śibikāsahasraiḥ sahitā vanam āyānti bāndhavāḥ mūkāś caiva kirātāś ca kubjā vāmanakaiḥ saha sahitā kañcukivarair vāhinī sūtamāgadhaiḥ śaṅkhadundubhinirghoṣair vanaṃ ca samupaiṣyati
taṃ na prasādyāgato 'haṃ prasīdeti dvijottamam
. . . . . . . . sadvṛttaḥ sa mahāyaśāḥ evam etan mayā jñātaṃ
na bhayaṃ vidyate bhadre mā śucaḥ sukṛtaṃ kṛtam
kiṃ punar vidhivat kṛtvā suprajās tvaṃ bhaviṣyasi
mama caiva patir dṛṣṭo devatānāṃ samakṣataḥ
ṛtavo bahavas te vai gatā vyarthāḥ śucismite sārthakaṃ sāṃprataṃ hy etan na ca pāpo 'sti te 'naghe

evam astv iti tāṃ prāha kaṇvo dharmabhṛtāṃ varaḥ pasparśa cāpi pāṇibhyāṃ sutāṃ śrīm iva rūpiṇīm adya prabhṛti devi tvaṃ duḥṣantasya mahātmanaḥ pativratānāṃ yad vṛttis tāṃ vṛttim anupālaya ity evam uktvā dharmātmā tāṃ viśudhyartham aspṛśat spṛṣṭamātre śarīre tu paraṃ harṣam avāpa sā

garbhaś ca vavṛdhe tasyāṃ rājaputryāṃ mahātmanaḥ śakuntalā cintayantī rājānaṃ kāryagauravāt divārātram anidraiva snānabhojanavarjitā rājapreṣaṇikā viprāś caturaṅgabalānvitāḥ adya śvo vā paraśvo vā samāyāntīti niścitā dinān pakṣān ṛtūn māsān ayanāni ca sarvaśaḥ gaṇyamānāni varṣāṇi vyatīyus trīṇi bhārata triṣu varṣeṣu pūrṇeṣu ṛṣer vacanagauravāt ṛṣipatnyaḥ subahuśo hetumad vākyam abruvan śṛṇu bhadre lokavṛttaṃ śrutvā yad rocate tava tat kuruṣva hitaṃ devi nāvamānyaṃ guror vacaḥ devānāṃ daivataṃ viṣṇur viprāṇām agnir eva ca nārīṇāṃ daivataṃ bhartā lokānāṃ brāhmaṇo guruḥ sūtikāle prasūyeti bhagavāṃs te pitābravīt kariṣyāmīti kartavyaṃ tadā te sukṛtaṃ bhavet patnīnāṃ vacanaṃ śrutvā sādhu sādhv ity acintayat

jāte tasminn antarikṣāt puṣpavṛṣṭiḥ papāta ha devadundubhayo nedur nanṛtuś cāpsarogaṇāḥ gāyadbhir madhuraṃ tatra devaiḥ śakro 'bhyuvāca ha śakuntale tava sutaś cakravartī bhaviṣyati balaṃ tejaś ca rūpaṃ ca na samaṃ bhuvi kena cit āhartā vājimedhasya śatasaṃkhyasya pauravaḥ anekair api sāhasrai rājasūyādibhir makhaiḥ svārthaṃ brāhmaṇasāt kṛtvā dakṣiṇām amitāṃ dadat devatānāṃ vacaḥ śrutvā kaṇvāśramanivāsinaḥ sabhājayantaḥ kaṇvasya sutāṃ sarve maharṣayaḥ śakuntalā ca tac chrutvā paraṃ harṣam avāpa sā dvijān āhūya munibhiḥ satkṛtya ca mahāyaśāḥ
yathāvidhi yathānyāyaṃ kriyāḥ sarvās tv akārayat
. . . . . . . . svayaṃ viṣṇur ivāparaḥ catuṣkiṣkur mahātejāḥ
ṛkṣāṃś cāpi dvipān anyān vyālān āśramapīḍakān balād bhujābhyāṃ saṃgṛhya balavān saṃniyamya ca

vanaṃ ca loḍayām āsa siṃhavyāghragaṇair vṛtam tataś ca rākṣasān sarvān piśācāṃś ca ripūn raṇe muṣṭiyuddhena tān hatvā ṛṣīn ārādhayat tadā kaś cid ditisutas taṃ tu hantukāmo mahābalaḥ vadhyamānāṃs tu daiteyān amarṣī taṃ samabhyayāt tam āgataṃ prahasyaiva bāhubhyāṃ parigṛhya ca dṛḍhaṃ cābadhya bāhubhyāṃ pīḍayām āsa taṃ tadā mardito na śaśākāsmān mocituṃ balavattayā prākrośad bhairavaṃ tatra dvārebhyo niḥsṛtaṃ tv asṛk tena śabdena vitrastā mṛgāḥ siṃhādayo gaṇāḥ susruvuś ca śakṛnmūtram āśramasthāś ca susruvuḥ nirasuṃ jānubhiḥ kṛtvā visasarja ca so 'patat tad dṛṣṭvā vismayaṃ jagmuḥ kumārasya viceṣṭitam nityakālaṃ vadhyamānā daiteyā rākṣasaiḥ saha kumārasya bhayād eva naiva jagmus tadāśramam
kaṇvena sahitā dṛṣṭvā karma sarve 'timānuṣam

apreṣayati duḥṣante mahiṣyās tanayasya ca pāṇḍubhāvaparītāṅgīṃ cintayā samabhiplutām lambālakāṃ kṛśāṃ dīnāṃ tathā malinavāsasam śakuntalāṃ ca saṃprekṣya pradadhyau sa munis tadā śāstrāṇi sarvavedāś ca dvādaśābdasya cābhavan
siṃhāsanasthaṃ rājānaṃ mahendrasadṛśadyutim śakuntalā nataśirāḥ paraṃ harṣam avāpya ca

abhivādaya rājānaṃ pitaraṃ te dṛḍhavratam evam uktvā sutaṃ tatra lajjānatamukhī sthitā stambham āliṅgya rājānaṃ prasīdasvety uvāca sā śākuntalo 'pi rājānam abhivādya kṛtāñjaliḥ harṣeṇotphullanayano rājānaṃ cānvavaikṣata duḥṣanto dharmabuddhyā tu cintayann eva so 'bravīt kim āgamanakāryaṃ te brūhi tvaṃ varavarṇini kariṣyāmi na saṃdehaḥ saputrāyā viśeṣataḥ prasīdasva mahārāja vakṣyāmi puruṣottama
sa dhārayan manasy enāṃ saputrāṃ sasmitāṃ tadā tadopagṛhya manasā ciraṃ sukham avāpa saḥ
maithunaṃ ca vṛthā nāhaṃ gaccheyam iti me matiḥ nābhijānāmi kalyāṇi tvayā saha samāgamam
dharma eva hi sādhūnāṃ sarveṣāṃ hitakāraṇam nityaṃ mithyāvihīnānāṃ na ca duḥkhāvaho bhavet
putreṇa lokāñ jayati putreṇānantyam aśnute atha putrasya putreṇa modante prapitāmahāḥ
. . . . . . . . . śarīraṃ procyate budhaiḥ bhāryā śreṣṭhatamā loke . . . . . . . .
poṣaṇārthaṃ śarīrasya pātheyaṃ svargatasya vai
antarātmaiva sarvasya putro nāmocyate sadā gatī rūpaṃ ca ceṣṭā ca āvartā lakṣaṇāni ca pitṝṇāṃ yāni dṛśyante putrāṇāṃ santi tāni ca teṣāṃ śīlaguṇācārāḥ saṃparkāc ca śubhāśubhāt

pativratārūpadharāḥ parabījasya saṃgrahāt kulaṃ vināśya bhartṝṇāṃ narakaṃ yānti dāruṇam pareṇa janitāḥ putrāḥ svabhāryāyāṃ yatheṣṭataḥ mama putrā iti matās te putrā api śatravaḥ dviṣanti pratikurvanti na te vacanakāriṇaḥ dveṣṭi tāṃś ca pitā cāpi svabīje na tathā nṛpa na dveṣṭi pitaraṃ putro janitāram athāpi vā na dveṣṭi janitā putraṃ tasmād ātmā suto bhavet
vipravāsakṛśā dīnā narā malinavāsasaḥ te 'pi svadārāṃs tuṣyanti daridrā dhanalābhavat
ātmano 'rdham iti śrautaṃ sā rakṣati dhanaṃ prajā śarīraṃ lokayātrāṃ vai dharmaṃ svargam ṛṣīn pitṝn
devānām api kā śaktiḥ kartuṃ saṃbhavam ātmanaḥ paṇḍitasyāpi lokeṣu strīṣu sṛṣṭiḥ pratiṣṭhitā ṛṣibhyo ṛṣayaḥ ke cic caṇḍālīṣv api jajñire
mamāṇḍānīti vardhante kokilāṇḍāni vāyasāḥ kiṃ punas tvaṃ na manyethāḥ sarvajñaḥ putram īdṛśam malayāc candanaṃ jātam atiśītaṃ vadanti vai śiśor āliṅganaṃ tasmāc candanād adhikaṃ bhavet
adyāyaṃ manniyogāt tu tavāhvānaṃ pratīkṣate
rājasūyādikān anyān kratūn amitadakṣiṇān
. . . . . . . . mūrdhny upāghrāya putrakam evaṃ hi putreṇānye 'pi . . . . . . . .
upajighranti pitaro mantreṇānena mūrdhani
eko bhūtvā dvidhā bhūta iti vādaḥ pradṛśyate
sarasīvāmale somaṃ prekṣātmānaṃ tvam ātmani

śrīmān ṛṣir dharmaparo vaiśvānara ivāparaḥ brahmayoniḥ kuśo nāma viśvāmitrapitāmahaḥ kuśasya putro balavān kuśanābhaś ca dhārmikaḥ gādhis tasya suto rājā viśvāmitras tu gādhijaḥ evaṃvidhaḥ pitā rājan mātā me menakāpsarāḥ
saṃgatā rājaśārdūla pūrvakarmāvasādinī
suṣāva suranārī māṃ viśvāmitrād yatheṣṭataḥ aho jānāmi te janma kutsitaṃ kulaṭe janaiḥ

jātiś cāpi nikṛṣṭā te kulīneti vijalpase janayitvā tvam utsṛṣṭā kokileva parair bhṛtā ariṣṭair iva durbuddhiḥ kaṇvo vardhayitā pitā aśraddheyam idaṃ vākyaṃ yat tvaṃ jalpasi tāpasi bruvantī rājasāṃnidhye gamyatāṃ yatra cecchasi suvarṇamaṇimuktāni vastrāṇy ābharaṇāni ca yad ihecchasi bhogārthaṃ tāpasi pratigṛhyatām
sarvā vāmāḥ striyo loke sarvāḥ kāmaparāyaṇāḥ sarvāḥ striyaḥ paravaśāḥ sarvāḥ krodhasamākulāḥ asatyoktāḥ striyaḥ sarvā na kaṇvaṃ vaktum arhasi
purā naravaraḥ putra urvaśyāṃ janitas tadā āyur nāma mahārāja tava pūrvapitāmahaḥ maharṣayaś ca bahavaḥ kṣatriyāś ca paraṃtapa apsarassu mṛgīṇāṃ ca mātṛdoṣo na vidyate
pāṃsupātena hṛṣyanti kuñjarā madaśālinaḥ
ātmano duṣṭabhāvatvāj jānan nīco 'prasannadhīḥ pareṣām api jānāti svakarmasadṛśān guṇān dahyamānās tu tīvreṇa nīcāḥ parayaśo 'gninā aśaktās tāṃ gatiṃ gantuṃ tato nindāṃ prakurvate
apavādaratā mūrkhā bhavantīha viśeṣataḥ nāpavādaratāḥ santo bhavanti sma viśeṣataḥ
dāruṇāl lokasaṃkleśād duḥkham āpnoty asaṃśayam
abhavye 'py anṛte 'śuddhe nāstike pāpakarmaṇi durācāre kalir bhūyān na kalir dharmacāriṣu
tatra ṣaḍ bandhudāyādāḥ ṣaḍ adāyādabāndhavāḥ
tasmāt putraṃ ca satyaṃ ca pālayasva mahīpate ubhayaṃ pālayan hy etan nānṛtaṃ vaktum arhasi
varaṃ saraśatād yajñaḥ varaṃ yajñāt suputrakaḥ

yaḥ pāpaṃ na vijānāti karma kṛtvā narādhipa na hi tādṛk paraṃ pāpam anṛtād iha vidyate yasya te hṛdayaṃ veda satyasyaivānṛtasya ca kalyāṇaṃ sākṣiṇaṃ tasmāt kartum arhasi dharmataḥ yo na kāmān na ca krodhān na mohād abhivartate amitraṃ vāpi mitraṃ vā sa vai uttamapūruṣaḥ

putratve śaṅkamānasya buddhir jñāpakadīpinī gatiḥ svaraḥ smṛtiḥ sattvaṃ śīlaṃ vidyā ca vikramaḥ dhṛṣṇuprakṛtibhāvau ca āvartā romarājayaḥ samā yasya yadi syus te tasya putro na saṃśayaḥ sādṛśyenoddhṛtaṃ bimbaṃ tava dehād viśāṃpate tāteti bhāṣamāṇaṃ vai mā sma rājan vṛthā kṛthāḥ ṛte 'pi gardabhakṣīrāt payaḥ pāsyati me sutaḥ
evam ukto mahendreṇa bhaviṣyati ca nānyathā sākṣitve bahavo 'py uktā devadūtādayo matāḥ na bruvanti tathā satyam utāho vānṛtaṃ kila asākṣiṇī mandabhāgyā gamiṣyāmi yathāgatam
tasyāḥ krodhasamuttho 'gniḥ sadhūmo mūrdhny adṛśyata saṃniyamyātmano 'ṅgeṣu tataḥ krodhāgnim ātmajam prasthitaivānavadyāṅgī saha putreṇa vai vanam
striyaḥ pavitram atulam etad duḥṣanta dharmataḥ māsi māsi rajo hy āsāṃ duritāny apakarṣati tataḥ sarvāṇi bhūtāni vyājahrus taṃ samantataḥ āhitas tvattanor eṣa ananyāṃ tvaṃ pratīkṣasva
patir jāyāṃ praviśati sa tasyāṃ jāyate punaḥ anyonyaprakṛtir hy eṣā
evam uktvā tato devā ṛṣayaś ca tapodhanāḥ pativrateti saṃhṛṣṭāḥ puṣpavṛṣṭiṃ vavarṣire
siṃhāsanāt samutthāya praṇamya ca divaukasaḥ
śṛṇvantu devatānāṃ ca maharṣīṇāṃ ca bhāṣitam
tatas tasya tadā rājā pitṛkāryāṇi sarvaśaḥ kārayām āsa muditaḥ prītimān ātmajasya ha
brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyā vaiśyāḥ śūdrāś caiva pṛthagvidhāḥ tvāṃ devi pūjayiṣyanti nirviśaṅkaṃ pativratām
anṛtaṃ vāpy aniṣṭaṃ vā duruktaṃ vāpi duṣkṛtam tvayāpy evaṃ viśālākṣi kṣantavyaṃ mama durvacaḥ kṣamyāḥ patikṛtaṃ nāryaḥ pātivratyaṃ vrajanti yāḥ

sa mātaram upasthāya rathantaryām abhāṣata mama putro vane jātas tava śokapraṇāśanaḥ ṛṇād adya vimukto 'haṃ tava pautreṇa śobhane viśvāmitrasutā ceyaṃ kaṇvena ca vivardhitā snuṣā tava mahābhāge prasīdasva śakuntalām putrasya vacanaṃ śrutvā pautraṃ sā pariṣasvaje pādayoḥ patitāṃ tatra rathantaryā śakuntalām pariṣvajya ca bāhubhyāṃ harṣād aśrūṇy avartayat uvāca vacanaṃ satyaṃ lakṣaye lakṣaṇāni ca tava putro viśālākṣi cakravartī bhaviṣyati tava bhartā viśālākṣi trailokyavijayī bhavet divyān bhogān anuprāptā bhava tvaṃ varavarṇini evam uktā rathantaryā paraṃ harṣam avāpa sā śakuntalāṃ tato rājā śāstroktenaiva karmaṇā tato 'gramahiṣīṃ kṛtvā sarvābharaṇabhūṣitām brāhmaṇebhyo dhanaṃ dattvā sainikānāṃ ca bhūpatiḥ
bharate bhāram āveśya kṛtakṛtyo 'bhavan nṛpaḥ tato varṣaśataṃ pūrṇaṃ rājyaṃ kṛtvā tv asau nṛpaḥ kṛtvā dānāni duḥṣantaḥ svargalokam upeyivān dauḥṣantir bharato rājyaṃ yathānyāyam avāpa saḥ
nāśārthaṃ yojayām āsa digantajñānakarmasu
yamaś cāpi suto jajñe khyātas tasyānujaḥ prabhuḥ dharmātmā sa manur dhīmān yatra vaṃśaḥ pratiṣṭhitaḥ
tutoṣa naiva ratnānāṃ lobhād iti ca naḥ śrutam
viśiṣṭo nahuṣaḥ śaptaḥ sadyo hy ajagaro 'bhavat
yatis tu yogam āsthāya brahmabhūto 'bhavan muniḥ

sthitaḥ sa nṛpaśārdūlaḥ śārdūlasamavikramaḥ yayātir api patnībhyāṃ dīrghakālaṃ vihṛtya ca viśvācyā sahito reme punaś caitrarathe vane nādhyagacchat tadā tṛptiṃ kāmānāṃ sa mahāyaśāḥ avetya manasā rājann imāṃ gāthāṃ tadā jagau na jātu kāmaḥ kāmānām upabhogena śāmyati haviṣā kṛṣṇavartmeva bhūya evābhivardhate pṛthivī ratnasaṃpūrṇā hiraṇyaṃ paśavaḥ striyaḥ nālam ekasya tat sarvam iti matvā śamaṃ vrajet yadā na kurute pāpaṃ sarvabhūteṣu karhi cit karmaṇā manasā vācā brahma saṃpadyate tadā yadā cāyaṃ na bibheti yadā cāsmān na bibhyati yadā necchati na dveṣṭi brahma saṃpadyate tadā ity avekṣya mahāprājñaḥ kāmānāṃ phalgutāṃ nṛpa samādhāya mano buddhyā pratyagṛhṇāj jarāṃ sutāt dattvā ca yauvanaṃ rājā pūruṃ rājye 'bhiṣicya ca
pārayitvā tv anaśanaṃ sadāraḥ svargam āptavān
varṇasaṃkarajo dharmaḥ kathaṃ taṃ nāspṛśat tadā jarāsaṃcāraṇaṃ cāpi anyadeheṣu naḥ śrutam
tataḥ sahasraṃ gurugāḥ saṃrakṣan vanyam āharat
gāyantaṃ caiva śuklaṃ ca dātāraṃ priyavādinam nāryo naraṃ kāmayante rūpiṇaṃ sragviṇaṃ tathā

kacaḥ samidhaś ca kuśādīni kāṣṭhabhāraṃ ca bhāmini gṛhītvā śramabhārārto vaṭavṛkṣaṃ samāśritaḥ gāvaś ca sahitāḥ sarvā vṛkṣacchāyām upāśritāḥ asurās tatra māṃ dṛṣṭvā kas tvam ity abhyacodayan bṛhaspatisutaś cāhaṃ kaca ity abhiviśrutaḥ ity uktamātre māṃ hatvā peśīkṛtvā tu dānavāḥ dattvā śālāvṛkebhyas tu sukhaṃ jagmuḥ svam ālayam āhūto vidyayā bhadre bhārgaveṇa mahātmanā tvatsamīpam ihāyātaḥ kathaṃ cit samajīvitaḥ
devayānyā punas tatra kadā cid vanyam āhara ukto 'gacchad vanaṃ taṃ tu dadṛśur dānavāḥ punaḥ vipreṇa punar āhūto vidyayā gurudehajaḥ punar āvṛtya tad vṛttaṃ nyavedayata tat tathā
apibat surayā sārdhaṃ kacabhasma bhṛgūdvahaḥ sā sāyaṃtanavelāyām agopā gāḥ samāgatāḥ
śrutvā putrīvacaḥ kāvyo mantreṇāhūtavān kacam jñātvā bahiṣṭham ajñātvā svakukṣisthaṃ kacaṃ nṛpa
vidyayotthāpyamāno 'pi nābhyeti karavāṇi kim
aśakyo 'sau jīvayituṃ dvijātiḥ saṃjīvito vadhyate caiva bhūyaḥ
akārayām āsa tadā devayānyāḥ kṛte vibhuḥ vidyābalāl labdhamatir mahātmā
asmin muhūrte hy asurān vināśya gacchāmi devān aham adya vipra
yaḥ śrotrayor amṛtaṃ saṃniṣiñced vidyām avidyasya yathā mamāyam taṃ manye 'haṃ pitaraṃ mātaraṃ ca tasmai na druhyet kṛtam asya jānan
śṛṇvatsu bhūteṣv idam āha kāvyaḥ samutthito brahmarāśiḥ purāṇaḥ
brahmahatyāsamaṃ tasya pāpaṃ syād brāhmaṇasya tu yaḥ pāsyati surāṃ mohān narakaṃ cāpi yāsyati
etāvad uktvā vacanaṃ virarāma sa bhārgavaḥ dānavā vismayāviṣṭāḥ prayayuḥ svaṃ niveśanam
guror garīyasī vṛttyā tasmād gurutarā mama na mām arhasi kalyāṇi vaktum evaṃ śucismite
dharmakārye niyuñjānā kanyā saṃprāptayauvanā
ādhūnvasva vidhūnvasva druhya kupya ca yācaki
pratikūlaṃ vadasi ced itaḥ prabhṛti yācaki ākṛṣya mama dāsībhiḥ prasthāsyāmi bahir bahiḥ
tṛṇavīrutsamācchanne svapuraṃ prayayau tadā
praviśya svagṛhaṃ svasthā dharmam āsuram āsthitā
tāṃ dṛṣṭvā rūpasaṃpannāṃ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitām sarvalakṣaṇasaṃpannām apṛcchat sa narādhipaḥ
pṛcchase māṃ kas tvam asi rūpavīryabalānvitaḥ brūhy atrāgamanaṃ kiṃ vā śrotum icchāmi tattvataḥ yayātir nāhuṣo 'haṃ tu śrānto 'dya mṛgakāṅkṣayā kva cid atrāgato bhadre dṛṣṭavān asmi tvām iha

uvāca śokasaṃtaptā ghūrṇikām āgatāṃ puraḥ vṛkṣamūlam upāśritya devatām iva tadvane dhātri tvam ānaya kṣipraṃ devayānīṃ śucismitām ity uktamātre sā dhātrī tvaritānayituṃ gatā yatra yatra sakhībhiḥ sā gatā padam amārgata sā dadarśa tathā dīnāṃ śramārtāṃ rudatīṃ sthitām vṛttaṃ te kim idaṃ bhadre śīghraṃ vada pitāhvayat evam uktāha dhātrīṃ tāṃ śarmiṣṭhāvṛjinaṃ kṛtam yadi madvacanān nādya māṃ necchasi narādhipa tvām eva varaye pitrā paścāj jñāsyasi gaccha hi
tvaritaṃ ghūrṇikā gatvā praviveśa purottamam dvijapravaram āsādya vacanaṃ cedam abravīt
tvaramāṇo 'numārgaṃ sa niścakrāma purottamāt
evaṃ mām āha śarmiṣṭhā śiṣyā tava mahāmune
amṛtāṃ māṃ mṛtāṃ matvā kūpe 'tīva nirūdake anāvṛttāṃ nirīkṣyaiva hṛṣṭā svabhavanaṃ yayau

yac ca kiṃ cit sarvagataṃ bhūmau vā yadi vā divi tasyāham īśvaro nityaṃ tuṣṭenoktaḥ svayaṃbhuvā ahaṃ jalaṃ vimuñcāmi prajānāṃ hitakāmyayā puṣṇāmy auṣadhayaḥ sarvā iti satyaṃ bravīmi te evaṃ viṣādam āpannāṃ manyunā saṃprapīḍitām vacanair madhuraiḥ ślakṣṇaiḥ sāntvayām āsa tāṃ pitā

tasmād akrodhanaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ kāmakrodhau na pūjitau kruddhasya niṣphalāny eva dānayajñatapāṃsi ca tasmād akrodhane yajñas tapo dānaṃ mahat phalam na pūto na tapasvī ca na yajvā na ca dharmakṛt krodhasya yo vaśaṃ gacchet tasya lokadvayaṃ na ca putrabhṛtyasuhṛnmitrabhāryā dharmaś ca satyataḥ tasyaitāny apayāsyanti krodhaśīlasya niścitam
svavṛttim ananuṣṭhāya dharmam utsṛjya tattvataḥ
dahyamānās tu tīvreṇa nīcāḥ parayaśo 'gninā aśaktās tāṃ gatiṃ gantuṃ tato nindāṃ prakurvate

suyantritā narā nityaṃ vihīnā vā dhanair narāḥ durvṛttāḥ pāpakarmāṇaś caṇḍālā dhanino 'pi vā na hi jātyā ca caṇḍālāḥ svakarmavihitair vinā dhanābhijanavidyāsu saktāś caṇḍāladharmiṇaḥ akāraṇād vidviṣanti parivādaṃ vadanti ca na tatrāsya nivāso 'sti pāpibhiḥ pāpatāṃ vrajet sukṛte duṣkṛte vāpi yatra sajjati yo naraḥ dhruvaṃ ratir bhavet tatra tasmāt teṣāṃ na rocaye
niḥsaṃśayo viśeṣeṇa puruṣaṃ marmakṛntanam suhṛnmitrajanās teṣu sauhṛdaṃ na ca kurvate
sa praviśyāsane śukraḥ saṃdaṣṭoṣṭhapuṭo ruṣā
śanair āvartyamāno hi kartur mūlāni kṛntati
śarmiṣṭhayā devayānī krūram uktā bahu prabho viprakṛtya ca saṃrambhāt kūpe kṣiptā manasvinī sā na kalpeta vāsāya tayā hi rahitaḥ katham vaseyam iha tasmāt te tyajāmi viṣayaṃ nṛpa
mā śocīr vṛṣaparvas tvaṃ mā krudhyasva viśāṃ pate
yady eva devān gacches tvaṃ māṃ ca tyaktvā gṛhādhipa sarvatyāgaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā praviśāmi hutāśanam
prasannā devayānī cet priyaṃ nānyataraṃ mama
śukrasya vacanaṃ śrutvā vṛṣaparvā sabāndhavaḥ devayānīṃ prasīdeti papāta bhuvi pādayoḥ
stutyo vandyaś ca satataṃ mayā tātaś ca te śubhe
tyajed ekaṃ kulasyārthe grāmasyārthe kulaṃ tyajet grāmaṃ janapadasyārthe ātmārthe pṛthivīṃ tyajet
yady evam āhvayec chukro devayānīkṛte hi mām
caṇḍāle 'pi niyuṅkṣvādya śirasā dhārayāmi tam guruṃ vā sparśayāmy adya dāsīnāṃ dharmam uttamam
sarvam āhṛtya kartavyam eṣa dharmaḥ sanātanaḥ evaṃ kṛtvā kariṣyāmi yan māṃ vakṣyasi śobhane
āsanapravare divye sarvaratnavibhūṣite
āsanāc ca tataḥ kiṃ cid vihīnāṃ hemabhūṣitām asurendrasutāṃ cāpi śarmiṣṭhāṃ cāruhāsinīm
asyā rūpeṇa te rūpaṃ na kiṃ cit sadṛśaṃ bhavet purā duścariteneyaṃ tava dāsī bhavaty aho śrīr ivāyatapadmākṣī sarvalakṣaṇaśobhitā
asurendrasutām īkṣya tasyāṃ saktena cetasā śarmiṣṭhā mahiṣī mahyam iti matvā vaco 'bravīt
parabhāryā svasā jyeṣṭhā sagotrā patitā snuṣā aparā bhikṣukāsvasthā agamyāḥ kīrtitā budhaiḥ kāmāt krodhād atho lobhād yat kiṃ cit kurute naraḥ devayāni vijānīhi sa gacchen narakaṃ dhruvam
tayor apy anyatā nāsti ekāntaratamau hi tau
kva cid āśīviṣo hanyāc chastram anyaṃ nikṛntati yadṛcchayāgnir dahati manasā hanti vai dvijaḥ
tiṣṭha rājan muhūrtaṃ tvaṃ preṣayiṣyāmy ahaṃ pituḥ gaccha tvaṃ dhātrike śīghraṃ brahmakalpam ihānaya svayaṃvare vṛtaṃ śīghraṃ nivedaya ca nāhuṣam

tato dhātreyikā gatvā śīghraṃ tūśanasaṃ prati dṛṣṭvā cainaṃ yathānyāyam abhivādyedam abravīt devayānyā vṛto bhartā nāhuṣaḥ pṛthivīpatiḥ tatrānujñāṃ kuruṣvādya brahman satyaparāyaṇa gaccha gacchāgrato bhadre gacchāmi sahitas tvayā kariṣyāmi vacas tasyāḥ pṛṣṭvā rājānam acyutam prādurāsīt tadā śukraḥ prajvalann iva tejasā brāhmaṇaḥ sarvabhūtāni tejorāśiḥ prakāśayan
nānyapūrvagṛhītaṃ me tenāham abhayā kṛtā
svayaṃgrahe mahān doṣo brāhmaṇyāṃ varṇasaṃkarāt kacaśāpāt tvayā pūrvaṃ nānyad bhavitum arhati
iyaṃ kumārī śarmiṣṭhā duhitā vṛṣaparvaṇaḥ tāṃ pūjayethā mā caināṃ śayane vai samāhvaya rahasy enāṃ samāhūya na vader na ca saṃspṛśeḥ vahasva bhāryāṃ bhadraṃ te yathākāmam avāpsyasi
vivāhaṃ vidhivat kṛtvā pradakṣiṇam athākarot labdhvā śukrān mahad vittaṃ devayānīṃ tathottamām dvisahasreṇa kanyānāṃ tathā śarmiṣṭhayā saha saṃpūjitaś ca śukreṇa daityaiś ca nṛpasattamaḥ

prītyā paramayā yukto mumude śāśvatīḥ samāḥ aśokavanikābhyāśe devayānī samāgatā śarmiṣṭhayā sā krīḍitvā ramaṇīye manorame tatraiva tāṃ tu nirdiśya saha rājñā yayau gṛham evam eva bahuprītyā mumude bahukālataḥ

śuddhā snātā tu śarmiṣṭhā sarvālaṃkārabhūṣitā aśokaśākhām ālambya suphullaiḥ stabakair vṛtām ādarśe mukham udvīkṣya bhartṛdarśanalālasā śokamohasamāviṣṭā vacanaṃ cedam abravīt aśoka śokāpanuda śokopahatacetasam tvannāmānaṃ kuru kṣipraṃ priyasaṃdarśanād dhi mām evam uktavatī sā tu śarmiṣṭhā punar abravīt
devayānī puṇyakṛtā tasyā bhartā hi nāhuṣaḥ
keśe baddhvā tu rājānaṃ yāce 'haṃ sadṛśaṃ patim gṛhe mudā devayānīputram īkṣya punaḥ punaḥ krīḍann antaḥpure tasyāḥ kva cit kṣaṇam avāpa saḥ
tadā prabhṛti tvāṃ dṛṣṭvā smarāmy aniśam uttame
devayānyāḥ priyaṃ kṛtvā śarmiṣṭhām api poṣaya
dharmasūkṣmārthatattvajñā evam āhur manīṣiṇaḥ ātmaprāṇārthaghāteṣu tad evottamatāṃ vrajet
yathā vadasi kalyāṇi mamāpy etad dhi kāṅkṣitam brāhmaṇasya tu tad vākyaṃ hṛdi me parivartate
dhanaṃ vā yadi vā kāmaṃ rājyaṃ vāpi śucismite
putrārthaṃ bhartṛpoṣārthaṃ striyaḥ sṛṣṭāḥ svayaṃbhuvā apatiś cāpi yā kanyā anapatyā ca yā bhavet tasyā janma vṛthā loke gatis tasyā na vidyate

saha dattāsmi kāvyena devayānyā maharṣiṇā pūjyā poṣayitavyeti na mṛṣā kartum arhasi suvarṇamaṇimuktāni vastrāṇy ābharaṇāni ca yācatāṃ hi dadāsi tvaṃ gogrāmādīni yāni ca bāhiraṃ dānam ity uktaṃ na śarīrāśrayaṃ nṛpa duṣkaraṃ putradānaṃ ca ātmadānaṃ ca duṣkaram śarīradānāt tat sarvaṃ dattaṃ bhavati māriṣa yasya yasya yathākāmaṃ tasya tasya dadāmy aham ity uktvā nagare rājaṃs trikālaṃ ghoṣitaṃ tvayā anṛtaṃ tvayoktaṃ rājendra vṛthā ghoṣitam eva ca tat satyaṃ kuru rājendra yathā vaiśravaṇas tathā
ṛtvikpurohitācāryair mantribhiś caiva saṃvṛtaḥ kṛtvā vivāhaṃ vidhivad datvā brāhmaṇadakṣiṇām puṇye nakṣatrasaṃyoge muhūrte dvijapūjite

tasmin nakṣatrasaṃyoge śukle puṇyarkṣagendunā sa rājā mumude samrāṭ tayā śarmiṣṭhayā saha prajānāṃ śrīr ivāgryā me śarmiṣṭhā hy abhavad vadhūḥ pannagīvograrūpā vai devayānī mamāpy abhūt parjanya iva sasyānāṃ devānām amṛtaṃ yathā tadvan mamāpi saṃbhūtā śarmiṣṭhā vārṣaparvaṇī ity evaṃ manasā dhyātvā devayānīm avarjayat
apatyārthe sa tu mayā vṛto vai cāruhāsini

tasmin kāle tu rājarṣir yayātiḥ pṛthivīpatiḥ mādhvīkarasaṃyuktāṃ madirāṃ madavardhinīm pāyayām āsa śukrasya tanayāṃ raktapiñjarām pītvā pītvā ca madirāṃ devayānī mumoha sā rudatī gāyamānā sā nṛtyantī ca muhur muhuḥ bahu pralapatī devī rājānam idam abravīt rājavad rūpaveṣau te kimarthaṃ tvam ihāgataḥ kena kāryeṇa saṃprāpto nirjanaṃ gahanaṃ vanam dvijaśreṣṭha nṛpaśreṣṭho yayātiś cogradarśanaḥ tasmād itaḥ palāyasva hitam icchasi ced dvija ity evaṃ pralapantīṃ tāṃ devayānīṃ tu nāhuṣaḥ bhartsayām āsa vacanair apāpāṃ pāpavardhinīm tato varṣavarān mūkān paṅgūn vṛddhān sapaṇḍakān rakṣaṇe devayānyāḥ sa poṣaṇe ca śaśāsa tān tatas tu nāhuṣo rājā śarmiṣṭhāṃ prāpya buddhimān reme ca suciraṃ kālaṃ tayā śarmiṣṭhayā saha
śarmiṣṭhākāmuko rājā yadāsīt tadratākulaḥ madirāvivaśāṃ kṛtvā reme śarmiṣṭhayānvaham
prabrūta tattvataḥ kṣipraṃ kaś cāsau kva ca vartate kiṃ na brūta kumārā vaḥ pitaraṃ vai dvijarṣabham
ṛṣiś ca brāhmaṇaś caiva dvijātiś caiva naḥ pitā śarmiṣṭhā nānṛtaṃ brūyād devayāni kṣamasva vai tayā rahaḥ pṛcchyamānās tathyam ūcuś ca dārakāḥ
abhyāgacchati māṃ kaś cid ṛṣir ity evam abravīt yayātim eva nūnaṃ tvaṃ protsāhayasi bhāmini pūrvam eva mayā proktaṃ tvayā tu vṛjinaṃ kṛtam
tava pitrā me guruṇā sahadatte ubhe śubhe tato bhartā ca pūjyaś ca poṣyāṃ poṣayatīha mām
ramasveha yathākāmaṃ devyā śarmiṣṭhayā saha pratijajvāla kopena devayānī tadā bhṛśam nirdahantīva savrīḍāṃ śarmiṣṭhāṃ samudīkṣya ca apavidhya ca sarvāṇi bhūṣaṇāny asitekṣaṇā
yad yad yācati māṃ kaś cit tat tad deyam iti vratam tvayāpi sā ca dattā me nānyaṃ nātham ihecchati matvaitan mama dharmaṃ tu kṛtaṃ brahman kṣamasva mām
putro jyeṣṭhaḥ kaniṣṭho vā yo dadāti vayas tava
jarāyāṃ bahavo doṣāḥ pānabhojanakāritāḥ tasmān na grahīṣye rājann iti me rocate manaḥ
santi te bahavaḥ putrā mattaḥ priyatarā nṛpa jarāṃ grahītuṃ dharmajña tasmād anyaṃ vṛṇīṣva vai
pratyākhyātas tu rājā sa turvaśuṃ pratyabhāṣata
turvaśo tvaṃ priyaṃ kāmaṃ naitat saṃpatsyate kva cit
yatrāśvarathamukhyānām aśvānāṃ syād gataṃ na ca hastināṃ pīṭhakānāṃ ca gardabhānāṃ tathaiva ca bastānāṃ ca gavāṃ caiva śibikāyās tathaiva ca

anuṃ putram athāhūya rājā vacanam abravīt śarmiṣṭhāyāḥ sutaṃ cānum idaṃ vacanam abravīt pūrṇe varṣasahasre tu punas te yauvanaṃ tv aham dattvā ca pratipatsye vai pātmānaṃ jarayā saha {hastyaśvarathayugyānām adhvā na syāt kadā cana {uṣṭrāṇāṃ ca gavāṃ caiva śibikāyās tathaiva ca yad vānyad vāhanaṃ kiṃ cid devo hanyāt kva cit kva cit arājā tava jātaś ca bhaviṣyati ca durmate pratyākhyātaś caturbhiś ca śaptvā tān yadyadicchayā pūroḥ sakāśam agamaj jñātvā pūrum alaṅghinam
guror vai vacanaṃ puṇyaṃ svargyam āyuṣkaraṃ nṛṇām guruprasādāt trailokyam anvaśāsac chatakratuḥ guror anumataṃ prāpya sarvān kāmān avāpnuyāt
yāvad icchasi vā jīvaṃ tāvat tāṃ dhārayāmy aham
evam uktvā yayātis tu kāvyaṃ smṛtvā mahātapāḥ saṃkrāmayām āsa jarāṃ tadā pūrau mahātmani
rūpayauvanasaṃpannaḥ kumāra iva so 'bhavat
yauvanaṃ prāpya rājarṣiḥ sahasraparivatsarān viśvācyā sahito reme vyabhrājan nandane vane alakāyāṃ sa kālaṃ tu meruśṛṅge tathottare yadā sa paśyate kālaṃ dharmātmā taṃ mahīpatiḥ

na jātu kāmaḥ kāmānām upabhogena śāmyati haviṣā kṛṣṇavartmeva bhūya evābhivardhate yat pṛthivyāṃ vrīhiyavaṃ hiraṇyaṃ paśavaḥ striyaḥ ekasyāpi na paryāptaṃ tasmāt tṛṣṇāṃ parityajet yā dustyajā durmatibhir yā na jīryati jīryataḥ yo 'sau prāṇāntiko rogas tāṃ tṛṣṇāṃ tyajataḥ sukham pūrṇaṃ varṣasahasraṃ me viṣayāsaktacetasaḥ tathāpy anudinaṃ tṛṣṇā mamaiteṣv abhijāyate tasmād enām ahaṃ tyaktvā brahmaṇy ādhāya mānasam nirdvandvo nirmamo bhūtvā cariṣyāmi mṛgaiḥ saha
. . . . . . . . mayā dattaṃ tu sānvayam yāvad icchasi tāvac ca yauvanena samanvitam bhuṅkṣva rājyaṃ sudīrghāyuḥ
dharmaṃ collaṅghayan rājā prajānāṃ duḥkham āvahet

mūko 'ndhabadhiraḥ śvitrī svadharmaṃ nānutiṣṭhati coraḥ kilbiṣakaḥ putro jyeṣṭho na jyeṣṭha ucyate ātmanaḥ sadṛśaḥ putraḥ pitṛdevarṣipūjane yo bahūnāṃ guṇataraḥ sa putro jyeṣṭha ucyate jyeṣṭhāṃśahāro guṇakṛd iha loke paratra ca śreyān putraguṇopetaḥ sa putro netaro vṛthā vadanti dharmaṃ dharmajñāḥ pitṝṇāṃ putrakāraṇāt
vedoktaṃ saṃbhavaṃ mahyam anena hṛdayodbhavam tasya jātam idaṃ kṛtsnam ātmā putra iti śrutiḥ
yo vānuvartī putrāṇāṃ sa putro dāyabhāg bhavet
vedadharmārthaśāstreṣu munibhiḥ kathitaṃ purā
yaduṃ ca turvasuṃ cobhau druhyuṃ caiva sahānujam anteṣu sa vinikṣipya nāhuṣaḥ svātmajān sutān
devayānyā ca sahitaḥ śarmiṣṭhayā ca bhārata akarot sa vane rājā sabhāryas tapa uttamam
sādhubhiḥ saṃgatiṃ labdhvā punaḥ svargam upeyivān svargataś ca punar brahman nivasan devaveśmani kālena nātimahatā śakreṇa cyāvitaḥ katham
evam eva tathābdānāṃ paryāyeṇa gataṃ tadā
pūjitas tridaśaiḥ sādhyair yayātir atidhārmikaḥ
kathayitvā kathās tāta śakreṇa saha pauravaḥ

na ca kuryān naro dainyaṃ śāṭhyaṃ krodhaṃ tathaiva ca jaihmyaṃ ca matsaraṃ vairaṃ sarvatraitan na kārayet mātaraṃ pitaraṃ caiva vidvāṃsaṃ ca tapodhanam kṣamāvantaṃ ca devendra nāvamanyeta buddhimān śaktas tu kṣamate nityam aśaktaḥ krośate naraḥ durjanaḥ sajjanaṃ dveṣṭi durbalo balavattaram rūpavantam arūpī ca dhanavantaṃ ca nirdhanaḥ akarmī karmiṇaṃ dveṣṭi dhārmikaṃ cāpy adhārmikaḥ nirguṇo guṇavantaṃ ca śakraitat kalilakṣaṇam viparītaṃ ca devendra eteṣu kṛtalakṣaṇam brāhmaṇo vātha rājā vā vaiśyo vā śūdra eva vā praśasteṣu praśastāraḥ praśasyante yaśasvinaḥ tasmāt praśaste devendra naraḥ saktamanā bhavet alokajñā hy apraśastā bhrātaras te hy abuddhayaḥ antādhipatayaḥ sarve hy abhavan mama śāsanāt tvaṃ hi vai dharmado rājan kathyase dharmam uttamam kathayasva punar me 'dya lokavṛttāntam uttamam
mahādhano yo yajate suyajñair yaḥ sarvavidyāsu vinītabuddhiḥ vedān adhītya tapasā yojya dehaṃ divaṃ samāyāt puruṣo vītamohaḥ na jātu hṛṣyen mahatā dhanena vedān adhīyīta nāhaṃkṛtaḥ syāt
dṛṣṭo hi me parataś cāpi lokaḥ prāptā bhogāḥ sarvato nāsti niṣṭhā
mātāmahaṃ sarvaguṇopapannaṃ tatra sthitaṃ svargaloke yathāvat
svargasya lokasya vadanti santo dvārāṇi saptaiva mahānti puṃsām

sāmānyadharmaḥ sarveṣāṃ krodhalobhau druhākṣame vihāya matsaraṃ stainyaṃ darpaṃ dambhaṃ ca paiśunam krodhaṃ lobhaṃ mamatvaṃ ca yasya nāsti sa dharmavit nityasnāyī brahmacārī gṛhastho vanago muniḥ nādharmam aśanāt prāpyet kathaṃ brūhīha pṛcchataḥ aṣṭau grāsā muner bhakṣyāḥ ṣoḍaśāraṇyavāsinaḥ dvātriṃśataṃ gṛhasthasya amitaṃ brahmacāriṇaḥ ity evaṃ kāraṇaṃ jñeyam aṣṭakaitac chubhāśubham
pāpānāṃ karmaṇāṃ nityaṃ bibhiyād yas tu mānavaḥ sukham apy ācaran nityaṃ so 'tyantaṃ sukham edhate
vidvāṃś caivaṃ matimān āryabuddhir mamābhavat karmalokyaṃ ca sarvam

dharmādharmau suviniścitya samyak kāryākāryeṣv apramattaś cared yaḥ sa vai dhīmān satyasaṃdhaḥ kṛtātmā rājā bhavel lokapālo mahimnā yadā bhavet saṃśayo dharmakārye kāmārthe vā yatra vindanti samyak kāryaṃ tatra prathamaṃ dharmakāryaṃ yan no viruddhyād arthakāmau sa dharmaḥ
alipsamānasya tu me yad uktaṃ na tat tathāstīha narendrasiṃha asya pradānasya yad etad uktaṃ tasyaiva dānasya phalaṃ bhaviṣyati
aṣṭakaś ca śibiś caiva kāśeyaś ca pratardanaḥ aikṣvākavo vasumanāś catvāro bhūmipās tadā sarve tv avabhṛthasnātāḥ svargatāḥ sādhavaḥ saha
sādhv aṣṭaka prabravīmīha satyaṃ pratardanaṃ caupadaśviṃ tathaiva

yataḥ sarvaṃ vistarato yathāvad ākhyātaṃ te caritaṃ nāhuṣasya vaṃśo yasya prathitaḥ kauraveyo yasmiñ jātas tvaṃ manujendrakarmā etat puṇyatamaṃ rājan yayāteś caritaṃ mahat yac chrutvā śrāvayitvā ca svargaṃ yātīha mānavaḥ
putraṃ yayāteḥ prabrūhi pūruṃ dharmabhṛtāṃ varam ānupūrvyeṇa ye cānye pūror vaṃśavivardhanāḥ vistareṇa punar brūhi dauḥṣanter janamejayāt saṃbabhūva yathā rājā bharato dvijasattama
bhūridraviṇavikrāntān sarvalakṣaṇapūjitān dharmanityaḥ sthito rājye śakravīryaparākramaḥ

sunvantaṃ vasunābhaṃ ca garbharamyau yaśasvinau śūrān abhayadān rājā janayām āsa vīryavān yavīyān sunvataḥ putro rathaṃtaryām ajāyata śūraś ca dṛḍhadhanvā ca vapuṣmān sa nṛpottamaḥ rudrāśvaṃ pṛṣadaśvaṃ ca rathāśvaṃ ca gayaṃ manum yavīyāñ janayām āsa gandharvyāṃ bhīmavikramān
anādhṛṣṭir abhūt teṣāṃ vidvān arcepur ekarāṭ ṛcepur atha vikrānto devānām iva vāsavaḥ
so 'śvamedhaśatair īje yamunām anu tīragaḥ triṃśatā ca sarasvatyāṃ gaṅgām anu catuḥśataiḥ dauḥṣantir bharato yajñair īje śākuntalo nṛpaḥ
tatas tān mātaraḥ kruddhāḥ putrān ninyur yamakṣayam
dharme praṇihitātmānaṃ matvā taṃ puruṣottamam
catvāro bhārate vaṃśe suhotras tatra vaṃśabhāk
ajamīḍhas tu rājendra dharmanityo yaśassu ca
aikṣvākyāṃ janayad rājñām ajamīḍho yaśasvinaḥ
viduḥ saṃvaraṇaṃ śūram ṛkṣād rāthaṃtarīsutam
anvakīryanta bharatāḥ sapatnaiś ca mahābalaiḥ
te pratīcīṃ parābhūtāḥ prapannā bhāratā diśam
mahimnā tasya kuravo lebhire pratyayaṃ bhṛśam
śabalāśvādayaḥ sapta tathaivānye mahābalāḥ
aśvasenaś ca balavān kīrtitāḥ sapta nāmataḥ
dhārtarāṣṭrasutān āhus trīn etān prathitān bhuvi pratīpaṃ dharmanetraṃ ca sunetraṃ caiva bhārata pratīpaḥ prathitas teṣāṃ babhūvāpratimo bhuvi
