jñāne tapasi śaurye vā yasya na prathitaṃ yaśaḥ vidyāyām atha lābhe vā mātur uccāra eva saḥ
śrutā me rājadharmāś ca varṇānāṃ ca pṛthak pṛthak āyatyāṃ ca tadātve ca yaḥ paśyati sa paśyati dharmasya jānamāno 'haṃ gatim agryāṃ sudurvidām kathaṃ balāt kariṣyāmi meror iva vimardanam
duryodhanān nṛpasutāt tathā duḥśāsanād api
pratipādya tu rājendra tataḥ kṣipraṃ jvaraṃ jahi
**** **** rṣayo devapatiṃ yathā saṃprāpya tad vanaṃ ramyaṃ
aikātmyaṃ ca gatāḥ sarve dhārtarāṣṭreṇa bhārata
ācāryā mānitās tuṣṭāḥ śāntiṃ vyavaharanty uta
anena brahmaṇā tāta sarvaṃ saṃpratipadyate
idaṃ ca me paraṃ duḥkhaṃ yat tvāṃ pārtha suyodhanaḥ dṛṣṭvā māṃ gaur iti prāha prahasan rājasaṃsadi tasmād duḥkhād idaṃ duḥkhaṃ garīya iti me matiḥ yad asmān prati sabhyeṣu bahv ayuktam abhāṣata

prāñjaliḥ pāṇḍavaṃ kṛṣṇā devānāṃ kurvatī namaḥ vāgbhiḥ paramaśaktābhir maṅgalābhir abhāṣata (25ab) namo dhātre vidhātre ca svasti gaccha vanād vanam dharmas tvāṃ juṣatāṃ pārtha bhāskaraś ca vibhāvasuḥ brahmā tvāṃ brāhmaṇāś caiva pālayantu dhanaṃjaya jyeṣṭhāpacāyī jyeṣṭhasya bhrātur vacanam āsthitaḥ prapadyethā vasūn rudrān ādityān samarudgaṇān viśvedevāṃs tathādityāñ śāntyarthaṃ bharatarṣabha (25cd) svasti te 'stv āntarikṣebhyo divyebhyo bharatarṣabha (25ef) pārthivebhyaś ca sarvebhyo ye ke cit paripanthinaḥ avarodhād vane vāsāt sarvasvaharaṇād api idaṃ duḥkhataraṃ manye putrebhyaś ca vivāsanāt (21ab) mā smāhaṃ kṣatriyakule jātu cit punar ābhavam (21cd) brāhmaṇebhyo namasyāmi yeṣāṃ nāyudhajīvikā dhvaṃsitaḥ svagṛhebhyaś ca rāṣṭrāc ca bharatarṣabha vane pratiṣṭhito bhūtvā sauhārdād avatiṣṭhase jetā yaḥ sarvaśatrūṇāṃ yaḥ pāvakam atarpayat janas tvāṃ paśyatīdānīṃ gacchantaṃ bharatarṣabha asmin nūnaṃ mahāraṇye bhrātaraḥ suhṛdaś ca te tvatkathāḥ kathayiṣyanti cāraṇā ṛṣayas tathā (20ab) yat tat kuntī mahābāho jātasyaicchad dhanaṃjaya (20cd) tat te sarvaṃ tathaivāstu yathā ca manasecchasi vasudevasvasā devī tvām āryā punar āgatam sā paśyatu pṛthā pārtha sahasrākṣam ivāditiḥ (22ab) nūnaṃ te bhrātaraḥ sarve tvatkathābhiḥ prajāgare (22cd) raṃsyante tava karmāṇi kīrtayantaḥ punaḥ punaḥ (23ab) naiva naḥ pārtha bhogeṣu na dhane nota jīvite (23cd) tuṣṭā buddhir bhavitrī vā tvayi dīrghapravāsini āśā saṃjāyate vīra tvayy araṇyaṃ prapadyati (24ab) tvayi naḥ pārtha sarveṣāṃ sukhaduḥkhe pratiṣṭhite (24cd) jīvitaṃ maraṇaṃ caiva svargo 'tha narakas tathā (24ef) āpṛṣṭo me 'si kaunteya svasti prāpnuhi pāṇḍava kṛtāstraṃ svastimantaṃ tvāṃ drakṣyāmi punar āgatam
śanair iva diśaṃ vīra udīcīṃ bharatarṣabhaḥ saṃharaṃs tarasā vṛkṣāṃl latāvallīś ca bhārata asajjamāno vṛkṣeṣu jagāma sumahābalaḥ
so 'gacchat parvatāṃs tāta tapodhananiṣevitān divyaṃ haimavataṃ puṇyaṃ devajuṣṭaṃ paraṃtapaḥ
gatvā sa ṣaḍ ahorātrān saptame 'hani pāṇḍavaḥ prasthendrakīlasya śubhe tapoyogaparo 'bhavat ūrdhvabāhur na cāṅgāni prāspandayata kiṃ cana samāhitātmā niyataḥ sahasrākṣasuto 'cyutaḥ
gandharvair apsarobhiś ca krīḍadbhir upaśobhitam mattaiḥ kiṃpuruṣaiś caiva pānabhūmigatais tathā tat priyābhiḥ samantāc ca vyāvṛtya parivīkṣitaḥ jagāma naraśārdūlo devaṃ draṣṭuṃ pinākinam
nivedayiṣavaḥ pārthaṃ tapasy ugre samāsthitam
teṣāṃ tad vacanaṃ śrutvā munīnāṃ bhāvitātmanām umāpatir bhūtapatir vākyam etad uvāca ha
na vo viṣādaḥ kartavyaḥ phalgunaṃ prati sarvaśaḥ
preṣayitvā nu ditijaṃ mūkaṃ vā pārthaniścitam mayepsitaṃ madīyais tu vastuṃ saha mahābalaḥ tasmād arjunabāṇais tvaṃ nirviddho hi mamaiva ca dehaṃ tyaktvā mahābāho mām evaiṣyasi dānava
mumoca niśitaṃ bāṇaṃ vajrāśanisamaṃ balam

na matkṛte tvayā vīra bhīḥ kāryā vanam antikāt iyaṃ bhūmiḥ sadāsmākam ucitā vasatāṃ vane tvayā tu duṣkaraḥ kasmād iha vāsaḥ prarocitaḥ vayaṃ tu bahusattve 'smin nivasāmas tapodhana bhavāṃs tu kṛṣṇavartmābhaḥ sukumāraḥ sukhocitaḥ kathaṃ śūnyam imaṃ deśam ekākī vicariṣyati gāṇḍīvam āśrayaṃ kṛtvā nārācāṃś cāgnisaṃnibhān nivasāmi mahāraṇye dvitīya iva pāvakiḥ eṣa cāpi mayā jantur mṛgarūpaṃ samāśritaḥ rākṣaso nihato ghoro hantuṃ mām iha cāgataḥ mayaiṣa dhanunirmuktais tāḍitaḥ pūrvam eva hi bāṇair abhihataḥ śete nītaś ca yamasādanam

tasya tad vacanaṃ śrutvā kirātasyārjunas tadā roṣam āhārayām āsa tāḍayām āsa ceṣubhiḥ tato hṛṣṭena manasā pratijagrāha sāyakān bhūyo bhūya iti prāha manda mandety uvāca ha praharasva śarair etān nārācān marmabhedinaḥ ity ukto bāṇavarṣaṃ sa mumoca sahasārjunaḥ
pragṛhyātha dhanuṣkoṭyā jyāpāśenāvakṛṣya ca muṣṭibhiś cāpi hatavān vajrakalpair mahādyutiḥ
sumuhūrtaṃ tathā dhyātvā sacetāḥ punar utthitaḥ tataḥ prīto bhavas tasya bhagavān kāmanāśanaḥ

uvāca cainaṃ vacasā meghagambhīragīr haraḥ jātavismayam ālokya tataḥ kṣīṇāṅgasaṃhatim śaraṇyaṃ śaraṇaṃ gatvā bhagavantaṃ pinākinam mṛnmayaṃ sthaṇḍilaṃ kṛtvā mālyenāpūjayad bhavam tac ca mālyaṃ tadā pārthaḥ kirātaśirasi sthitam apaśyat pāṇḍavaśreṣṭho harṣeṇa prakṛtiṃ gataḥ papāta pādayos tasya tataḥ prīto 'bhavad bhavaḥ
prītyā ca te 'haṃ dāsyāmi yad astram anivāritam tvaṃ hi śakto madīyaṃ tac chastraṃ dhārayituṃ kṣaṇāt

devadeva mahādeva nīlagrīva jaṭādhara kāraṇānāṃ ca paramaṃ jāne tvāṃ tryambakaṃ vibhum devānāṃ ca gatiṃ devaṃ tvatprasūtam idaṃ jagat ajeyas tvaṃ tribhir lokaiḥ sadevāsuramānuṣaiḥ śivāya viṣṇurūpāya viṣṇave śivarūpiṇe dakṣayajñavināśāya harirudrāya vai namaḥ lalāṭākṣāya śarvāya mīḍhuṣe śūlapāṇaye pinākagoptre sūryāya mārjālīyāya vedhase prasādaye tvāṃ bhagavan sarvabhūtamaheśvara gaṇeśaṃ jagataḥ śaṃbhuṃ lokakāraṇakāraṇam pradhānapuruṣātītaṃ paraṃ sūkṣmataraṃ haram
gaṅgāṅkitajaṭaḥ śarvaḥ pārthasyāmitatejasaḥ pragṛhya ruciraṃ bāhuṃ vṛttaṃ tāmratalāṅgulim
brahmāstrajñānasaṃpannair bhavitā me mahāhavaḥ tvatprasādān mahādeva jayeyaṃ tān yathā yudhi
ity evaṃ cintayānasya pārthasyāmitatejasaḥ
tatas tān vāruṇān divyān astrān astravidāṃ varaḥ pratijagrāha vidhivad varuṇād vāsavis tadā
prīto 'ham api te prājña pāṇḍaveya mahābala tvayā saha samāgamya ajitena tathaiva ca
darśanāt te tv idaṃ divyaṃ pradiśāmi nararṣabha amanuṣyān mahābāho durjayān api jeṣyasi
mahātmanā śaṃkareṇa tripuraṃ nihataṃ yadā tadaitad astraṃ nirmuktaṃ yena dagdhā mahāsurāḥ tvadartham udyataṃ cedaṃ mayā satyaparākrama tvam arho dhāraṇe cāsya merupratimagaurava

phalāni ca sugandhīni bhakṣitāni tatas tataḥ susugandhāś ca vāryoghās tvac charīraviniḥsṛtāḥ amṛtāsvādanīyā me pītāḥ prasravaṇodakāḥ śiśur yathā pitur aṅke susukhaṃ vartate naga tathā tavāṅke lalitaṃ śailarāja mayā prabho apsarogaṇasaṃkīrṇe brahmaghoṣānunādite sukham asmy uṣitaḥ śaila tava sānuṣu nityadā
evaṃ sa saṃkramaṃs tatra svargaloke mahāyaśāḥ
puṣpotkaraiḥ śubhaiḥ so 'tha kīryamāṇo nararṣabhaḥ
divyakāntākarāhūtavālavyajanamārutaiḥ

gītavāditranṛtyāni bhūya evādideśa ha tathāpi nālabhac charma tarasvī dyūtakāritam duḥśāsanavadhāmarṣī śakuneḥ saubalasya ca tatas tenātulāṃ prītim upagamya kva cit kva cit gāndharvam atulaṃ nṛtyaṃ vāditraṃ copalabdhavān sa śikṣito nṛtyaguṇān anekān vāditragītārthaguṇāṃś ca sarvān na śarma lebhe paravīrahantā bhrātṝn smaran mātaraṃ caiva kuntīm
vikhyātau triṣu lokeṣu naranārāyaṇāv ṛṣī kāryārtham avatīrṇau tau pṛthvīṃ puṇyapratiśrayām
so 'surān darśanād eva śakto hantuṃ sahānugān nivātakavacān sarvān nāgān iva mahāhrade kiṃ tu nālpena kāryeṇa prabodhyo madhusūdanaḥ tejasaḥ sumahān rāśiḥ prabuddhaḥ pradahej jagat
evam ukte mahendreṇa bībhatsur api lomaśam uvāca prayato vākyaṃ rakṣethāḥ pāṇḍunandanam yathā guptas tvayā rājā caret tīrthāni sattama dānaṃ dadyād yathā caiva tathā kuru mahāmune
lebhe pāśupataṃ cāpi paramāstraṃ mahādyutiḥ
na tatrāvinayaḥ kaś cid adṛśyata tadā dvijaḥ
na rātrau na divā sūta śāntiṃ prāpnomi vai kṣaṇam saṃcintya durnayaṃ ghoram atītaṃ dyūtajaṃ hi tat teṣām asahyavīryāṇāṃ śauryaṃ dhairyaṃ dhṛtiṃ parām anyonyam anurāgaṃ ca bhrātṝṇām atimānuṣam
tāṃś cānyāṃś ca subahūn āhūtān bharatarṣabha
yasya prabhāvād dhi vayaṃ sabhāmadhye dhanuṣmataḥ jitān manyāmahe sarvān dhārtarāṣṭrān sasaubalān
**** **** hṛdayena vicintyatām tad uttiṣṭha mahābāho

iti sarve maheṣvāsaṃ cintayānā dhanaṃjayam anena tu viṣaṇṇo 'haṃ kāraṇena sahānujaḥ vanavāsān nivṛttaṃ māṃ punas te pāpabuddhayaḥ jayantaḥ prīyamāṇā vai devane bhrātṛbhiḥ saha dyūtenaivāhvayiṣyanti balād akṣeṣu tadvidaḥ āhūtaś ca punar dyūte nāsmi śakto nivartitum paṇe ca mama nāsty arthaṃ vidyate vasu kiṃ cana etat sarvam anudhyāyaṃś cintayāno divāniśam na matto duḥkhitataraḥ pumān astīha kaś cana priyavādinam akṣudraṃ dayāyuktam atandritam
na viṣāde manaḥ kāryaṃ tvayā buddhimatāṃ vara āgamiṣyati bībhatsur amitrāṃś ca vijeṣyate
yajvā dānapatir dakṣaḥ sadā śīlapuraskṛtaḥ
kasya cit tv atha kālasya nalaḥ pārthivasattamaḥ
tava caiva yathā bhāryā bhaviṣyati tathānagha vidhāsyāmi naravyāghra so 'nujānātu mā bhavān
vayaṃ hi devagandharvāḥ śaptāś cendreṇa kāraṇāt asmān saṃspṛśya pāṇibhyāṃ yathā mokṣe vrajāmahe evam uktas tato haṃsān pramamajjātha naiṣadhaḥ naiṣadhena tu saṃspṛṣṭā indralokaṃ punar gatāḥ
pāṇḍuvarṇā kṣaṇenātha hṛcchayāviṣṭacetanā
kimarthaṃ duhitā me 'dya nātisvastheva lakṣyate
teṣāṃ bhīmo mahābāhuḥ pārthivānāṃ mahātmanām yathārham akarot pūjāṃ te 'vasaṃs tatra pūjitāḥ
evam ukto naiṣadhena maghavān punar abravīt parārtham īdṛśaṃ vaktuṃ tat kṣamantu maheśvarāḥ
sa vai tvam āgatān asmān damayantyai nivedaya śreyasā yokṣyase hi tvaṃ kurvann amaraśāsanam
asmākaṃ māyayā channas tvaṃ pravekṣyasi niścayam iti śakro naiṣadhaṃ taṃ punar evābhyabhāṣata
devagandharvapatayo dadṛśur vismayānvitāḥ paurajānapadāś caiva ye tatrāsan samāhitāḥ
nirviśeṣavayoveṣarūpāṇāṃ tatra sā śubhā
yathedaṃ vratam ārabdhaṃ nalasyārādhane mayā
varadvayaṃ dadau tasmai prīyamāṇo 'rkanandanaḥ

etat sarvaṃ nalo 'paśyad damayantī ca bhārata yathā svapnaṃ mahārāja tathaiva dadṛśur janāḥ tataḥ svayaṃvaraṃ cakre bhīmo rājātimānuṣam samāgateṣu sarveṣu bhūpāleṣu viśāṃ pate damayanty api tad dṛṣṭvā rājamaṇḍalam ṛddhimat anvīkṣya naiṣadhaṃ vavre bhaimī dharmeṇa bhārata
uṣya tatra yathākāmaṃ naiṣadho dvipadāṃ varaḥ bhīmena samanujñāto jagāma nagaraṃ svakam
janayām āsa ca nalo damayantyāṃ mahāmanāḥ indrasenaṃ sutaṃ cāpi indrasenāṃ ca kanyākām
yo 'dhīte caturo vedān sarvān ākhyānapañcamān nityaṃ tṛptā gṛhe yasya devā yajñeṣu dharmataḥ ahiṃsānirato yaś ca satyavādī dṛḍhavrataḥ
evaṃrūpaṃ nalaṃ yo vai kāmayec chapituṃ kale
mama priye kṛte tasmin kṛtavāṃś ca bhaviṣyasi
puṣkara uvāca paṇena dīvyate vīra nāsti vittaṃ paṇāya me vittahīnena ca nalaḥ krīḍate na mayā saha puṣkareṇaivam uktas tu kalir vacanam abravīt bhaviṣye 'haṃ vṛṣaśreṣṭhas tena dīvya paṇena vai
tataḥ sa rājā sahasā devituṃ saṃpracakrame bhrātrā daivābhibhūtena daivāviṣṭo janādhipaḥ
vṛddhair brāhmaṇamukhyaiś ca vaṇigbhiś ca samanvitaḥ āgataṃ sahitaṃ rājaṃs tvatprasādāvalambinam
bṛhatsenām atiyaśāṃ tāṃ dhātrīṃ paricārikām hitāṃ sarvārthakuśalām anuraktāṃ subhāṣitām
ity evaṃ sā samādiṣṭā bṛhatsenā nareśvara uvāca devyā vacanaṃ mantriṇāṃ sā samīpataḥ
yathā rājñaḥ pradīptānāṃ bhāgyānām adya sārathe
kva nu yāsyāmi manasā cintayāno muhur muhuḥ
uvāca vidyate 'nyac ca dhanaṃ mama narādhama paṇarūpeṇa nikṣipya puṇyaślokas tu durmanāḥ uttarīyaṃ tadā vastraṃ tasyāś cābharaṇāni ca
pīḍyamānaḥ kṣudhā tatra phalamūlāni karṣayan prātiṣṭhata tato rājā damayantī tam anvagāt
etad vākyaṃ nalo rājā damayantīṃ samāhitaḥ uvācāsakṛd ārto hi bhaimīm uddiśya bhārata
bṛhadaśvaḥ ity uktaḥ sa tadā devyā naḷo vacanam abravīt
na caiṣā tejasā śakyā kaiś cid dharṣayituṃ pathi yaśasvinī mahābhāgā madbhakteyaṃ pativratā evaṃ tasya tadā buddhir damayantyāṃ nyavartata kalinā duṣṭabhāvena damayantyā visarjane
ādityā vasavo rudrā aśvinau samarudgaṇau rakṣantu tvāṃ mahābhāge dharmeṇāsi samāvṛtā evam uktvā priyāṃ bhāryāṃ rūpeṇāpratimāṃ bhuvi kalināpahṛtajñāno nalaḥ prātiṣṭhad udyataḥ
nākāle vihito mṛtyur martyānāṃ puruṣarṣabha yatra kāntā tvayotsṛṣṭā muhūrtam api jīvati
ādhāryamāṇeṣu mayā śokamūleṣu duḥkhitaḥ
satyavāg asi māṃ tyaktvā gatasatyaḥ kathaṃ bhavān
māṃ tvaṃ saṃbhāṣaya vibho anāthāṃ nirjane vane itaś cetaś ca dhāvantī śokavyākulacetasā sahasā muhyate bālā muhū roditi śocatī
pativratā sā rudatī bhartṛśokasamākulā
kathaṃ bhavāñ jagāmādya mām utsṛjya vane prabho
samatikramya vegena satvaraḥ sa vanecaraḥ
praphullapadmanayanāṃ tathā madhurabhāṣiṇīm
atibhīme vane tatra yūthabhraṣṭā mṛgī yathā
yathoktaṃ ca tvayā kānta matsamakṣaṃ ca matpriyam smartum arhasi kalyāṇa vacaḥ pārthivanandana
aśvamedhasahasraṃ ca satyaṃ ca tulayā dhṛtam aśvamedhasahasrāt tu satyam evātiricyate
anuvratāṃ mahārāja kiṃ māṃ na pratibhāṣase
iti bhramantī dadarśa śārdūlaṃ ca mahāhanum tam uvāca rudantī tu tvam evātra narādhipaḥ
pṛthivyā rucirākāraṃ cūḍāmaṇim iva sthitam
puṇyaśloka iti khyāto brahmaṇyo vedavittamaḥ
bhītām āśvāsaya ca māṃ nṛpate dharmavatsala
sā dṛṣṭvaivāśramapadaṃ damayantī samāśvasat tāpasaiḥ samupetaṃ ca sā dṛṣṭvaiva samāśvasat
āśvāsitā tadā bhaimī tāpasaiḥ saha saṃgatā
pūjāṃ cakre yathānyāyam ṛṣīṇāṃ sā manasvinī
api svādhyāyayogeṣu dharmadeheṣu vā punaḥ
nārīṇām adhamā nārī yā bhartuḥ prāṇasaṃkṣaye paścāj jīvati nistejāḥ kaleva śaśino divā
cintayām āsa vaidarbhī kim etad dṛṣṭavaty aham
ity evaṃ naraśārdūla vismitā kamalekṣaṇā
aśoka śokāpanuda śokopahatacetasam tvannāmānaṃ kuru kṣipraṃ priyasaṃdarśanād dhi mām

kva nu māṃ kitavaś chitvā vastrārdhaṃ prasthito mama utsṛjya vipine suptām anuraktāṃ priyāṃ priya vaiṣamyam api saṃprāptā gopāyanti kulastriyaḥ ātmānam ātmanā satyotthitasargā na saṃśayaḥ kva nu sā kṣutpipāsārtā bhrāntārāte tapasvinī smarantī tasya mandasya kva vāsāyopatiṣṭhati
yato vayaṃ na paśyāmo nalaṃ pārthivam atra vai
evaṃ prakārair bahubhir daivenākramya hastibhiḥ
pralāpāni tadā tāni damayantī pativratā
bṛhadaśva uvāca sā tu tac cārusarvāṅgī subāhos tuṅgagopuram
dhātrīm uvāca gacchainām ānayeha mamāntikam janena kliśyate bālā duḥkhitā śaraṇārthinī yādṛgrūpāṃ ca paśyāmi vidyotayati me gṛham unmattaveṣapracchannā śrīr ivāyatalocanā
sa kena cid ameyātmā kāraṇena varāṅgane duḥkhitaḥ sarvam utsṛjya praviveśa mahāvanam tatas taṃ duḥkhitaṃ dṛṣṭvā praviśantaṃ ca kānanam
ity uktvā sānavadyāṅgī rājamātaram apy uta sthitāśruparipūrṇākṣī vepamānā suduḥkhitā
vadhyaś ca te 'sakṛn manda iti me vratam āhitam
saha sā nyavasad rājan rājaputryā sunandayā cintayantī nalaṃ vīram aniśaṃ vāmalocanā tataḥ sunandayā sārdhaṃ damayanty avasat sukham sarvakāmaiḥ samuditā patidarśanalālasā
nalasya caritaṃ rājañ chṛṇu me vadato 'dbhutam
tiṣṭha tvaṃ sthāvara iva yāvad eva nalaḥ kva cit ito netā hi tatra tvaṃ śāpān mokṣyasi matkṛtāt
karkoṭakasya nāgasya damayantyā nalasya ca ṛtuparṇasya rājarṣeḥ kīrtanaṃ kalināśanam
ity uktaḥ sa nalenātha ṛtuparṇo narādhipaḥ uvāca suprītamanās taṃ prekṣya ca mahīpate
āyuṣman kasya vā nārī yām evam anuśocasi
naiva kvāpi prapaśyanti nalaṃ vā bhīmaputrikām
kṛśāṃ vivarṇāṃ malināṃ bhartṛśokaparāyaṇām
kiṃ tu rājā dṛḍhaṃ bhīmo janitrī bhrātaraś ca te
sa dṛṣṭo bahuśo nādya lakṣito 'ntarhito mayā
prāhiṇod damayantīṃ tāṃ tadā viprapuraskṛtām
tathā dahati śokāgnir hṛdayaṃ mama nityaśaḥ
ayam artho mṛṣā na syād brāhmaṇasya kathaṃ cana
uvāca cainaṃ mahatā saṃpūjya draviṇena vai
sārathīn sa samānīya vārṣṇeyaprabhṛtīn nṛpaḥ kathayām āsa yad vṛttaṃ brāhmaṇena śrutaṃ tathā bāhukaṃ ca samāhūya damayantyāḥ svayaṃvaram
evam ukto 'bravīd rājā bāhukaṃ prahasaṃs tadā yady evaṃ bhavitā śvo vai kiṃ te kāmaṃ karomy aham
aśvāñ jijñāsamāno vai vicārya ca punaḥ punaḥ
eko lalāṭe dvau mūrdhni dvau dvau pārśvopapārśvayoḥ dvau dvau vakṣasi vijñeyau prayāṇe caika eva tu
saṃkhyātāni mayaitāni sarvāṇy asya vanaspateḥ
praviluptasya śākhe dve paścānyā yā praśākhikā
pratyakṣam etat kartāsmi śātayitvā bibhītakam
tatas taṃ bāhuko rājañ chākhaikoddeśam apy uta phalāni parisaṃkhyātuṃ tvaramāṇopacakrame
taṃ bhrāntarūpaṃ niḥśobhaṃ saṃkliṣṭam akarot kaliḥ
śaraṇaṃ tvāṃ prapanno 'smi śṛṇu cedaṃ vaco mama
bhayārtaṃ śaraṇaṃ yātaṃ yadi māṃ tvaṃ na śapsyase bhaviṣyati nṛṇāṃ rājan kīrtayiṣyanti ye nalam
kalisaṃsargadoṣeṇa apavitro bibhītakaḥ
paraṃ vismayam āpannā śrutvā nādaṃ mahāsvanam
sa tena pūjito rājñā ṛtuparṇo narādhipaḥ sa tatra kuṇḍine ramye vasamāno mahīpatiḥ na ca kiṃ cit tato 'paśyat prekṣyamāṇo muhur muhuḥ sa tu rājñā samāgamya vidarbhapatinā tadā
rājñaś cānyān atikramya prāpto 'yam abhivādakaḥ
paścād udarke jñāsyāmi kāraṇaṃ yad bhaviṣyati
nimittaṃ yat tvayā dṛṣṭaṃ bāhuke daivamānuṣam
ceṣṭitāni viśālākṣi bāhukasya samīpataḥ
tāṃ sma dṛṣṭvaiva sahasā damayantīṃ nalo nṛpaḥ āviṣṭaḥ śokaduḥkhābhyāṃ babhūvāśrupariplutaḥ
karkoṭakaviṣād dagdho mama satyena śobhane
āviṣṭaḥ śokaduḥkhābhyāṃ bāṣpadhārāpariplutaḥ
katham utsṛjya bhartāraṃ nibhṛtaiva vadhūś caret
gṛhe bhīmasya nṛpateḥ parasparasukhaiṣiṇau vasetāṃ hṛṣṭasaṃkalpau vaidarbhī ca nalaś ca ha
uvāca vākyaṃ tattvajño naiṣadhaṃ vadatāṃ varaḥ
ata ūrdhvaṃ tu bhūyas tvaṃ prītimān kṣantum arhasi
niṣadhādhipateś cāpi datvākṣahṛdayaṃ nṛpaḥ
tathaiva sarvasaṃbhāraṃ svam aṃśaṃ vitarāmi te
puṇyaślokaṃ tu rājyasthaṃ śrutvā bhīmo mahīpatiḥ mudā paramayā yukto babhūva bharatarṣabha atha hṛṣṭamanā rājā mahatyā senayā saha sutāṃ prasthāpayām āsa puṇyaślokāya dhīmate
karkoṭakasya nāgasya damayantyā nalasya ca ṛtuparṇasya rājarṣeḥ kīrtanaṃ kalināśanam
idam evānyad atraiva vyāsena parikīrtitam kalinā ca nṛpe dattaṃ rājan varam anuttamam akṣāṇāṃ hṛdaye prāpte ṛtuparṇasya saṃnidhau nalena paṭhitaḥ ślokaḥ kalināśāya bhārata
viṣamāvasthite daive pauruṣe 'phalatāṃ gate viṣādayanti nātmānaṃ sattvāpāśrayiṇo budhāḥ
upapadyati mattaś ca bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ
kaunteyenaivam uktas tu bṛhadaśvo mahāmuniḥ
labdhvā ca pāṇḍavo rājā viśokaḥ samapadyata kathām evaṃ tathā kṛtvā nalasya caritāśrayām āmantrya pāṇḍavān sarvān bṛhadaśvo jagāma ha

pratigṛhyākṣahṛdayaṃ kuntīputro yudhiṣṭhiraḥ āsīd dhṛṣṭamanā rājan bhīmasenādibhir yutaḥ svabhrātṝn sahitān paśyan kuntīputro yudhiṣṭhiraḥ apaśyann arjunaṃ tatra babhūvāśrupariplutaḥ saṃtapyamānaḥ kaunteyo bhīmasenam uvāca ha kadā drakṣyāmi vai bhīma pārtham atra tavānujam matkṛte hi kuruśreṣṭhas tapyate duścaraṃ tapaḥ tasyākṣahṛdayajñānam ākhyāsyāmi kadā nv aham sa hi śrutvākṣahṛdayaṃ samupāttaṃ mayā vibho prahṛṣṭaḥ puruṣavyāghro bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ

vaiśaṃpāyana uvāca tīrthānāṃ caiva māhātmyaṃ pulastyenābhibhāṣitān kadā cit tīrthayātrāyāṃ nārado bhagavān ṛṣiḥ tīrthāni paryaṭaṃs tatra yudhiṣṭhiram upāgamat vinayāvanato bhūtvā paryapṛcchad yudhiṣṭhiraḥ tīrthābhidhānaṃ puṇyaṃ ca nāradāya mahātmane tat te 'haṃ kathayiṣyāmi śṛṇu dharmabhṛtāṃ vara
**** **** rudrāṇāṃ caiva śaṃkaraḥ tridaśānāṃ mahendraś ca
paśyāmi ca diśaḥ sarvās timireṇāvṛtā iva tato 'bravīt sāśrukaṇṭho nakulaḥ pāṇḍunandanaḥ
yasmin divyāni karmāṇi kathayanti raṇājire devā api yudhāṃ śreṣṭhaṃ tam ṛte kā ratir vane
yenārdharājyam ācchidya drupadasya mahātmanaḥ ācāryadakṣiṇā dattā guror droṇasya bhārata
dhanaṃjayotsukānāṃ tu bhrātṝṇāṃ kṛṣṇayā saha śrutvā vākyāni vimanā dharmarājo 'py ajāyata
tam āgatam abhiprekṣya bhrātṛbhiḥ saha dharmarāṭ pratyutthāya yathānyāyaṃ pūjāṃ cakre mahātmane
tato yudhiṣṭhiro rājā dṛṣṭvā devarṣisattamam yathārhaṃ pūjayām āsa vidhivat kurunandanaḥ
tataḥ sa madhureṇātha svareṇa sumahātapāḥ uvāca vākyaṃ dharmajñaḥ pulastyaḥ prītamānasaḥ
tapoviśeṣair bahubhiḥ sthānāny āpur mahaujasaḥ
trīṇi śṛṅgāṇi śubhrāṇi trīṇi prasravaṇāni ca puṣkarāṇyādisiddhāni na vidmas tatra kāraṇam
rājñaś caivādhipatyaṃ hi tatra gatvā samāpnuyāt
tato gaccheta tad vṛttaṃ tīrthaṃ devaniṣevitam snātvā tatra naro bhāti vimalaś candramā yathā
tīrthaṃ devagaṇaiḥ pūjyam ṛṣibhiś ca niṣevitam
vitastāṃ ca samāsādya saṃtarpya pitṛdevatāḥ naraḥ phalam avāpnoti vājapeyasya bhārata kāśmīreṣv eva nāgasya bhavanaṃ takṣakasya ca vitastākhyam iti khyātaṃ sarvapāpapramocanam

ṛṣayaḥ pitaro devā gandharvāpsarasāṃ gaṇāḥ guhyakāḥ kiṃnarā yakṣāḥ siddhā vidyādharā narāḥ rākṣasā ditijā rudrā brahmā ca manujādhipa niyataḥ paramāṃ dīkṣām āsthāyābdasahasrikīm viṣṇoḥ prasādanaṃ kurvaṃś caruṃ ca śrapayaṃs tathā saptabhiḥ saptabhiś caiva ṛgbhis tuṣṭāva keśavam dadāv aṣṭaguṇaiśvaryaṃ teṣāṃ tuṣṭas tu keśavaḥ yathābhilaṣitān anyān kāmān dattvā mahīpate tatraivāntardadhe devo vidyud abhreṣu vai yathā nāmnā saptacaruṃ tena khyātaṃ lokeṣu bhārata
pāṃsavo 'pi kurukṣetre vāyunā samudīritāḥ api duṣkṛtakarmāṇaṃ nayanti paramāṃ gatim dakṣiṇena sarasvatyā dṛṣadvatyuttareṇa ca ye vasanti kurukṣetre te vasanti triviṣṭape
gatiṃ gacchanti paramāṃ snātvā bharatasattama
sa vai snātvārcayitvā ca miśrake pitṛdevatāḥ
vedītīrthe naraḥ snātvā gosahasraphalaṃ labhet
amaraiḥ saha saṃyāti vimānavaram āsthitaḥ
tato gaccheta dharmajña kanyātīrtham anuttamam
tapasvino dharmapathe sthitasya dvijasattama
evam uktvā mahādevas tatraivāntaradhīyata
pāpaṃ praṇaśyate tatra snātamātrasya bhārata
pradakṣiṇam upāvṛtya gosahasraphalaṃ labhet
tasmiṃs tīrthe naraḥ snātvā sthānaṃ mahad avāpnuyāt

tīrthasaṃnayanād evaṃ saṃnītā bhuvi viśrutā tatra snātvā ca pītvā ca svargaloke mahīyate amāvāsyāṃ tu tatraiva rāhugraste divākare yaḥ śrāddhaṃ kurute martyas tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu aśvamedhasahasrasya samyag iṣṭasya yat phalam snāta eva tad āpnoti kṛtvā śrāddhaṃ ca mānavaḥ
yatra dharmo mahābhāgas taptavān uttamaṃ tapaḥ tena tīrthaṃ kṛtaṃ puṇyaṃ svena nāmnā ca cihnitam
kṛcchrena mahatā gatvā tatra snātvā samāhitaḥ
aśītiṃ yojanaśataṃ puṣkaraṃ svargam ucyate aśītiṃ dharmapṛṣṭhāt tu pravadanti manīṣiṇaḥ ṣaṣṭiṃ prayāgād rājendra kurukṣetrāt tu dvādaśa saṃyuktam eva rājendra gaṅgādvāraṃ triviṣṭapam
uṣyaikāṃ rajanīṃ tatra gosahasraphalaṃ labhet
gosahasram avāpnoti kalena * *tottama
**** **** brahmacārī samāhitaḥ aśvamedham avāpnoti
dvādaśāhasya yajñasya phalaṃ sa labhate naraḥ devān pitṝṃś cārcayitvā
tīrṇas tārayate jantur daśa pūrvān daśāparān dṛṣṭvā māheśvaraṃ divyaṃ padaṃ suranamaskṛtam kṛtārthaḥ sarvakṛtyeṣu na śocen maraṇaṃ naraḥ
daśāparān daśa pūrvān narān uddharate kulam
tatroṣya rajanīm ekāṃ svargaloke mahīyate
aśvamedhasya yajñasya phalaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ
avimuktaṃ samāsādya tīrthasevī kurūdvaha darśanād devadevasya mucyate brahmahatyayā prāṇān utsṛjya tatraiva mokṣaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ
aśvamedham avāpnoti viṣṇulokaṃ ca gacchati
yāvajjīvakṛtaṃ pāpaṃ māsenaikena śudhyati tato gayāṃ samāsādya brahmacārī samāhitaḥ

gatvā ca tatra dharmātmann aśvamedhaphalaṃ labhet uraḥ śiraś ca catvāraḥ sa vṛṣo nīḍa ucyate mataṅgasyāśramas tatra maharṣer bhāvitātmanaḥ taṃ praviśyāśramaṃ śrīmac chramaśokavināśanam gavāmayasya yajñasya phalaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ
bhuktavāṃs tatra maṇinā tīrthābhigamya mānavaḥ
tato vipāśaṃ dharmajña samāviśya tato 'nagha guhyaloke mahārāja modate nātra saṃśayaḥ
yatra brahmādayo devā ṛṣayaś ca tapodhanāḥ ādityā vasavo rudrā janārdanam upāsate
tatrāśramo vasiṣṭhasya triṣu lokeṣu viśrutaḥ
trirātropoṣitas tatra agniṣṭomaphalaṃ labhet
tato gaccheta dharmajña tīrthasevanatatparaḥ
stanakuṇḍam upaspṛśya vājapeyaphalaṃ labhet
vājimedhaphalaṃ prāpya śakralokaṃ ca gacchati
mṛgatuṅgaṃ samāsādya vipāpmā bhavati dvijaḥ sarvapāpaviśuddhātmā brahmalokaṃ ca gacchati
**** **** trirātropoṣito naraḥ aśvamedham avāpnoti
lapeṭikāṃ tato gacchet puṇyāṃ puṇyopaśobhitām vājapeyam avāpnoti devaiḥ sarvaiś ca pūjyate
vaśiṣṭhaś ca muniśreṣṭho durvāsāś ca mahātapāḥ
kāveryāḥ saṃgame caiva snātvā daśaguṇo bhavet setutīrthaṃ samāsādya brahmahatyām apohati
bāhudāsaṃgame snātvā vājimedhaphalaṃ labhet
**** **** brahmacārī jitendriyaḥ brāhmaṇān bhojayitvā tu
gosahasram avāpnoti phalaṃ caiva supuṣkalam
tasmiṃs tīrthe mahābāho snātvā pāpaiḥ pramucyate
tato muñjavaṭaṃ gacchet sthānaṃ devasya dhīmataḥ
tasmiṃs tīrthe tu jāhnavyāṃ snātvā pāpaiḥ pramucyate

śrīmat svargyaṃ tathā puṇyaṃ sapatnaśamanaṃ śivam medhājananam agryaṃ vai tīrthavaṃśānukīrtanam aputro labhate putram adhano dhanam āpnuyāt mahīṃ vijayate rājā vaiśyo dhanam avāpnuyāt śūdro yathepsitān kāmān brāhmaṇaḥ pāragaḥ paṭhan
sadbhiḥ śāstrārthatattvajñair brāhmaṇaiḥ saha gamyatām
evam eṣā mahābhāgā pratiṣṭhāne pratiṣṭhitā tīrthayātrā mahāpuṇyā sarvapāpapramocanī
bhīṣmaḥ kurūṇāṃ pravaro yathā pūrvam avāptavān
trailokyaṃ pālayām āsa devarāḍ vigatajvaraḥ
yāñ śrutvā gadato rājan viśoko bhavitāsi ha draupadyā cānayā sārdhaṃ bhrātṛbhiś ca nareśvara śravaṇāc caiva teṣāṃ tvaṃ puṇyam āpsyasi pāṇḍava gatvā śataguṇaṃ caiva tebhya eva narottama
yajeta vāśvamedhena nīlaṃ vā vṛṣam utsṛjet uttārayati saṃtatyā daśa pūrvān daśāvarān
tat tathā tāpasāraṇyaṃ tāpasair upaśobhitam
vistāreṇa yathābuddhi dikṣu tīrthāni me śṛṇu

marutaḥ pariveṣṭāraḥ sadasyāś ca divaukasaḥ uddhṛtaṃ bhūtalasthaṃ vā vāyunā samudīritam payoṣṇyā harate toyaṃ pāpam āmaraṇāntikam svargād uttuṅgam amalaṃ viṣāṇaṃ yatra śūlinaḥ svam ātmavihitaṃ dṛṣṭvā martyaḥ śivapuraṃ vrajet ekataḥ saritaḥ sarvā gaṅgādyāḥ saliloccayāḥ payoṣṇī caikataḥ puṇyā tīrthebhyo hi matā mama
eṣa nārāyaṇaḥ śrīmān kṣīrārṇavaniketanaḥ nāgaparyaṅkam utsṛjya hy āgato mathurāṃ purīm
maṅgaḷaṃ bhagavān viṣṇur maṅgaḷaṃ madhusūdanaḥ maṅgaḷaṃ puṇḍarīkākṣo maṅgaḷaṃ garuḍadhvajaḥ
avyayātmā mahātmā ca kṣetrajñaḥ parameśvaraḥ
trailokye yāni tīrthāni puṇyāny āyatanāni ca saridvanāni śailendrā devāś ca sapitāmahāḥ narmadāyāṃ kuruśreṣṭha saha siddharṣicāraṇaiḥ snātum āyānti puṇyaughaiḥ sadā vāriṣu bhārata
śṛṇuṣvāvahito bhūtvā mama mantrayataḥ prabho kathāpratigraho vīra śraddhāṃ janayate śubhām
nyagrodhākhyas tu puṇyākhyaḥ pāñcālyo dvipadāṃ vara dālbhyaghoṣaś ca dālbhyaś ca dharaṇīstho mahātmanaḥ kaunteyānantayaśasaḥ suvratasyāmitaujasaḥ āśramaḥ khyāyate puṇyas triṣu lokeṣu viśrutaḥ
tat paraṃ paramaṃ devaṃ bhūtānām īśvareśvaram śāśvataṃ paramaṃ caiva dhātāraṃ paramaṃ padam yaṃ viditvā na śocanti vidvāṃsaḥ śāstradṛṣṭayaḥ

satyasaṃdhaṃ mahotsāhaṃ mahāvīryaṃ mahābalam mahāhaveṣv apratimaṃ mahāyuddhaviśāradam mahādhanurdharaṃ vīraṃ mahāstraṃ varavarṇinam maheśvarasutaprakhyam ādityatanayaṃ prabhum tathā jñānagatiṃ skandhaṃ sahajolbaṇapauruṣam
āgatas tvāṃ mahābāho kuru puṇyaṃ yudhiṣṭhira

kṣuttṛṣṇādhvaśramāyāsaśītārtim asahiṣṇavaḥ te sarve vinivartantāṃ ye ca miṣṭabhujo dvijāḥ pakvānnalehyapānānāṃ māṃsānāṃ ca vikalpakāḥ te 'pi sarve nivartantāṃ ye ca sūdānuyāyinaḥ mayā yathocitā jīvyaiḥ saṃvibhaktāś ca vṛttibhiḥ
nāradasya ca rājendra devarṣeḥ parvatasya ca
ṛṣikulyāś ca kārtsnyena loḍayasva yudhiṣṭhira
yatra dharmeṇa vardhante rājāno rājasattama sarvān sapatnān bādhante rājyaṃ caiṣāṃ vivardhate
adharmarucayo rājann alakṣmyā samadhiṣṭhitāḥ
vānīramālinī ramyā nadī pulinaśobhitā divyaṃ pavitrakūṭaṃ ca pavitradharaṇīdharam
akṣaye devayajane akṣayaṃ yatra vai phalam te tu tatropavāsāṃs tu cakrur niścitamānasāḥ
sikatā vā yathā loka yathā vā divi tārakāḥ yathā vā varṣato dhārā asaṃkhyeyāḥ sma kena cit tathā gaṇayituṃ śakyā gayayajñe na dakṣiṇāḥ
tadā prabhṛti rājendra brahmahāsurasattamaḥ manyumān bhrātaraṃ chāgaṃ māyāvī pracakāra ha meṣarūpī ca vātāpiḥ kāmarūpo 'bhavat kṣaṇāt saṃskṛtya bhojayati taṃ viprān sa sma jighāṃsati
tām ilvalena mahatā svareṇa giram īritām śrutvātimāyo balavān kṣipraṃ brāhmaṇakaṇṭakaḥ
kimarthaṃ veha lambadhvaṃ garte yūyam adhomukhāḥ
sa cātha janayām āsa bhāratāpatyam uttamam lebhire pitaraś cāsya lokān rājan yathepsitān
ṛṣir hi pratapā nāma vidhāya varam uttamam
anyathā nopatiṣṭheyaṃ cīrakāṣāyavāsinī naivāpavitro viprarṣe bhūṣaṇo 'yaṃ kathaṃ cana
**** **** mama dharmavilopakaḥ kāme kṛte cariṣyāmi dharmaṃ dṛṣṭaṃ yathāsmṛti yady ayaṃ cepsitaḥ kāmaḥ
kimartham āgamo brahman dhanyo 'smy āgamanena te
vada kāmaṃ muniśreṣṭha dhanyo 'smy āgamanena te

vātāpe pratibudhyasva darśayan balatejasī tapasā durjayo yāvad eṣa tvāṃ nātivartate tatas tasyodaraṃ bhettuṃ vātāpir vegam āharat tam abudhyata tejasvī kumbhayonir mahātapāḥ sa vīryāt tapasogras tu nanarda bhagavān ṛṣiḥ eṣa jīrṇo 'si vātāpe mayā lokasya śāntaye ity uktvā svakarāgreṇa udaraṃ samatāḍayat trir evaṃ pratisaṃrabdhas tejasā prajvalann iva
śabdena mahatā tāta garjann iva yathā ghanaḥ vātāpe niṣkramasveti punaḥ punar uvāca ha taṃ prahasyābravīd rājann agastyo munisattamaḥ kuto niṣkramituṃ śakto mayā jīrṇas tu so 'suraḥ
lomaśaḥ sarvam etat pradāsyāmi hiraṇyaṃ gāś ca yad dhanam rathaṃ tu yam avoco māṃ nainaṃ vidma hiraṇmayam na me vāg anṛtā kā cid uktapūrvā mahāsura
evaṃ sa janayām āsa bhāratāpatyam uttamam
**** **** brahmaghno duṣṭacetanaḥ evaṃ vināśito rājan
kāleyabhayasaṃtrasto devaḥ sākṣāt puraṃdaraḥ jagāma śaraṇaṃ śīghraṃ taṃ tu nārāyaṇaṃ prabhum
vṛtraṃ hataṃ saṃdadṛśuḥ pṛthivyāṃ vajrāhataṃ śailam ivāvakīrṇam
kāleyās te durātmāno bhakṣayantas tapodhanān
kṣayāya jagataḥ krūrāḥ paryaṭanti sma medinīm
śaraṇyaṃ śaraṇaṃ devaṃ nārāyaṇam ajaṃ vibhum
śaraṇāgatasaṃtrāṇe tvam eko 'si dṛḍhavrataḥ

viṣṇum eva puraskṛtya brahmāṇaṃ samupasthitāḥ te tasmai praṇatā bhūtvā tam evārthaṃ nyavedayan sarvalokavināśārthaṃ kāleyāḥ kṛtaniścayāḥ teṣāṃ tad vacanaṃ śrutvā padmayoniḥ sanātanaḥ uvāca paramaprītas tridaśān arthavad vacaḥ viditaṃ me surāḥ sarvaṃ dānavānāṃ viceṣṭitam manuṣyādeś ca nidhanaṃ kāleyaiḥ kālacoditaiḥ kṣayas teṣām anuprāptaḥ kālenopahatāś ca ye upāyaṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi samudrasya viśoṣaṇe agastya iti vikhyāto vāruṇiḥ susamāhitaḥ tam upāgamya sahitā imam arthaṃ prayācata sa hi śakto mahātejāḥ kṣaṇāt pātuṃ mahodadhim samudre ca kṣayaṃ nīte kāleyān nihaniṣyatha evaṃ śrutvā vaco devā brahmaṇaḥ parameṣṭhinaḥ
tāṃs tathā sahitān devān agastyaḥ sapuraṃdarān
te dhātāram upāgamya tridaśāḥ saha viṣṇunā
nirhrādinyā girā rājan devān āśvāsayaṃs tadā
pūrayiṣyati toyaughaiḥ samudraṃ nidhim ambhasām kālayogaṃ pratīkṣanto jagmuś cāpi yathāgatam
lokadhātāram ajaram amareśaṃ purātanam digvāsasaṃ vṛṣaratham acintyādbhutayoginam
kālaṃ śaṃbhuvaraprāptaṃ pratīkṣan sagaro 'nayat
ekaikaśas tataḥ kṛtvā bījaṃ bījaṃ narādhipaḥ ghṛtapūrṇeṣu kumbheṣu tān bhāgān vidadhe tataḥ dhātrīś caikaikaśaḥ prādāt putrarakṣaṇatatparaḥ tataḥ kālena mahatā samuttasthur mahābalāḥ
kapilaṃ te samāsādya vinaśiṣyanty asaṃśayam
sthitvā sarve mahīpālāḥ sāgarāḥ sahitās tadā
samudre pṛthivīpāla padamārgaṃ ca vājinaḥ
vidāryamāṇāṃ pṛthivīṃ sāgarair baladarpitaiḥ
dṛṣṭvā hi hṛṣitāḥ sarve babhūvuḥ sāgarās tadā
ṣaṣṭiṃ sahasrāṇi tadā yugapan munisattamaḥ
sa putranidhanotthena duḥkhena samabhiplutaḥ
krīḍataḥ sahasāsādya tatra tatra mahīpate
śalabhatvaṃ gatā ete mama krodhahutāśane
sa rājarṣir dilīpas tu yuyuje kāladharmaṇā
bhagīrathaṃ mahātmānaṃ satyadharmaparāyaṇam
tadā bhagīratho rājan praṇipatya kṛtāñjaliḥ
tāvat teṣāṃ gatir nāsti sāgarāṇāṃ mahānadi
gaṅgāvataraṇaṃ rājann ayācata mahīpatiḥ
pitṝṇāṃ pāvanārthaṃ te tām ahaṃ manujādhipa
prāpayām āsa dharmajñaḥ pitṛdevāntikaṃ nadīm
jahnunā ca dhṛtā muktā jāhnavī tena saṃsmṛtā
kāleyāś ca yathā rājaṃs tridaśair vinipātitāḥ
makṣikāś cādaśaṃs tatra tapasaḥ pratighātikāḥ nirvedo jāyate tatra gṛhāṇi smarate janaḥ
yudhiṣṭhiraḥ yad etad bhagavaṃś citraṃ parvate 'smin mahaujasi etan me sarvam ācakṣva vistareṇa mahādyute
sā puroktā bhagavatā brahmaṇā lokakartṛṇā devakanyā mṛgī bhūtvā muniṃ sūya vimokṣyase
premoṣitāpacāreṇa tasya rājño yudhiṣṭhira
daivopahatasattvena dharmajñenāpi bhārata
niyojayām āsa ca tās tasya bālasya lobhane
bhavatā nābhivādyo 'ham abhivādyo bhavān mayā vratam etādṛśaṃ brahman pariṣvajyo bhavān mayā
gṛhāṇa kāmād dhi mamopakārāt kuruṣva kāmaṃ yad abhīpsitaṃ me
anyac ca tasyādbhutadarśanīyā vibhāti mālā kanakaprabhāsā kaṇṭhe sthitā vakṣasi ghūrṇamānā yathākṣamālā bhavatā nibaddhā
cartuṃ tathecchā hṛdaye mamāsti dunoti cittaṃ yadi taṃ na paśye
samāyāte ṛṣyaśṛṅge 'tha rājan
tat kopaśānteḥ pratikāram evaṃ kṛtvā sukhī saṃbabhūvātha rājā
gopās tathaite karṣaṇaṃ caivam ete
ity uktvāsāv ṛśyaśṛṅgaṃ mahātmā vibhaṇḍako romapādena rājā saṃpūjito hṛṣṭacetā maharṣir yayau vanaṃ munivaryaiḥ prajuṣṭam
yathā sītā dāśarather mahātmano yathā tava draupadī pāṇḍuputra
eṣa te rudra bhāgo vai mā no yajñam imaṃ jahi ayaṃ te paśur ity evam ūcur devāḥ samāgatāḥ
ity evam uktvā pṛthivī jagāma ca rasātalam nimamajja kuruśreṣṭha yācyamānāpi bhārata
saiṣā sāgaram āsādya rājan vedī samāśritā etām āruhya bhadraṃ te tvam ekas tara sāgaram
oṃ namo viśvaguptāya namo viśvaparāya te sāṃnidhyaṃ kuru deveśa sāgare lavaṇāmbhasi

ā janmaśatasāhasrād yat pāpaṃ kurute naraḥ mucyate sarvapāpebhyaḥ snātvā tu lavaṇāmbhasi evaṃ japan pāṇḍava satyavākyaṃ tato 'vagāheta patiṃ nadīnām anyathā hi kuruśreṣṭha devayonir apāṃ patiḥ kuśāgreṇāpi kaunteya na spraṣṭavyo mahodadhiḥ
tatra drakṣyasi rāmaṃ tvaṃ kṛṣṇājinajaṭādharam
kuśikasyātmajo rājañ jajñe vaṃśasamudbhavaḥ
babhūva śatapatrākṣī rūpeṇāsadṛśī bhuvi
carudvayam idaṃ bhadre jananyāś ca tavaiva ca viśvam āvartayitvā tu mayā yatnena sādhitam prāśitavyaṃ prayatnena tety uktvādarśanaṃ gataḥ
tataḥ punaḥ sa bhagavān kāle bahutithe gate divyajñānād viditvā tu bhagavān āgataḥ punaḥ
upayuktaś carur bhadre vṛkṣe cāliṅganaṃ kṛtam viparītena te subhrūr mātrā caivāsi vañcitā
kālaṃ pratīkṣya taṃ garbhaṃ dhārayām āsa yatnataḥ

taṃ tapyamānaṃ brahmarṣim ūcur devāḥ savāsavāḥ kimarthaṃ tapyase brahman kaḥ kāmaḥ prārthitas tava evam uktaḥ pratyuvāca devān brahmarṣisattamaḥ svargahetos tapas tapye lokāś ca syur mamākṣayāḥ tac chrutvā vacanaṃ tasya tadā devās tam ūcire nāsaṃtater bhavel lokaḥ kṛtvā dharmaśatāny api sa śrutvā vacanaṃ teṣāṃ tridaśānāṃ kurūdvaha
antarikṣān nipatitā narmadāyāṃ mahāhrade uttīrya cāpi sā yatnāj jagāma bharatarṣabha
ity ukto guruṇā rājan krodhāt tu jamadagninā
āgatya karma tat pitre nivedya gatavān vanam
tapaḥ sumahad āsthāya mahābalaparākramaḥ
**** **** mahendre parvatottame rāmam āmantrya dharmātmā
tatas tu kāverim anantatoyāṃ divyāśramair nityam upāttatoyām sahānujaḥ saṃpravigāhya puṇyāṃ nananda naṣṭaklamaśokapāpaḥ
hṛtasvarājyāyatanārthabhārye duryodhanenālpadhiyā ca pārthe
jigye raṇe taṃ nakulaṃ vaneṣu saṃpaśyante me 'dya manaḥ sudīnam
kurvīmahe yac ca hitaṃ bhavet tu rājñe hy asmāyājamīḍhāya nityam
yadartham aicchan manujāḥ suputraṃ śiṣyaṃ guruś cāpratikūlavādam
yathaiva yat tasya puraṃdarasya haridhvajaṃ syandanam āsthitasya
saṃprāpya vai tādṛśīṃ yodhalakṣmīṃ
samāhitaḥ pṛthivīṃ sādhu rājā yaśobhṛtāṃ dharmabhṛtāṃ variṣṭhaḥ yudhiṣṭhiraḥ pālayatāṃ mahātmā
dvijātimukhyair muditair mahātmā saṃstūyamānaḥ stutibhir varābhiḥ
caṣālayūpacamasāḥ sthālyaḥ pātryaḥ srucaḥ sruvāḥ
prasaṃkhyānān asaṃkhyeyān pratyagṛhṇan dvijātayaḥ
uddiśya pāṇḍavaśreṣṭhaḥ sa pratasthe mahīpatiḥ
**** **** candrādityasamaprabham jñānavṛddhaṃ vayovṛddhaṃ
imām eva ca te kanyāṃ dadāmi sudṛḍhavrata bhāryārthī tvaṃ gṛhāṇemāṃ prasīdasva ca bhārgava
apamānād ahaṃ viddho hy anayā darpapūrṇayā
nāmnā cāhaṃ sukanyeti nṛloke 'smin pratiṣṭhitā sāhaṃ sarvātmanā nityaṃ bhartāram anuvartinī
anābharaṇasaṃpannā paramāmbaravarjitā śobhayasy adhikaṃ bhadre vanam apy analaṃkṛtā
tam aśvinor anyatamaṃ cyavanaṃ vā manasvini
tato devāḥ sutuṣṭāś ca cyavanaṃ taṃ patiṃ daduḥ darśayām āsatus tasyāḥ sukanyāyā bhṛgoḥ sutam
tasminn eva sarastīre bibhratau rūpam uttamam
tathaiva mām api brahmañ śreyasā yoktum arhasi
iha riraṃsayā devāḥ pitaraś ca maharṣayaḥ arcayanti mahāprājña kratuṃ tava mahābalāḥ
adyāpīha pragāyanti gāthāṃ tasyaiva dhīmataḥ tāṃ śrutvā cakṣuṣor hāniṃ nāpnuvantīha mānavāḥ śaryātiṃ ca sukanyāṃ ca cyavanaṃ śakram aśvinau ye bhuktvā saṃsmariṣyanti teṣāṃ cakṣur na hīyate
tarpayādya pitṝn devān payasā pāvanena ca
ādisiddhāni kaunteya na vidmas tatra kāraṇam
satyakīrter hi māndhātuḥ kathyamānaṃ tvayānagha
yathā cāsau samabhavac caritaṃ tasya dhīmataḥ
sa kadā cin nṛpo rājann upavāsena duḥkhitaḥ
na ca prāṇair mahārāja viyogas te bhaviṣyati
tato devā mahendraṃ tam apṛcchan dhāsyatīti kim
tathā tvam api rājendra māndhāteva mahīpatiḥ dharmaṃ kṛtvā mahīṃ rakṣan svargalokam avāpsyasi
vaiśaṃpāyana uvāca evam uktaḥ sa kaunteyo lomaśena maharṣiṇā papracchānantaraṃ bhūyaḥ somakaṃ prati bhārata
mamāyam iti manvānā manobhiḥ putram aurasam
kriyatām avicāreṇa tataḥ prāpsyasi putrakān
sa somakavacaḥ śrutvā brāhmaṇo vedapāragaḥ
rājā pṛthivyāṃ vikhyātaḥ sadā dharmaparāyaṇaḥ
duṣkṛtaṃ cāsya vindethā mucyate tvadgurur yathā
kṣīṇapāpaś ca tasmāt sa vimukto guruṇā saha

teṣām iṣṭāni liṅgāni dṛśyante 'dyāpi bhārata yeṣāṃ liṅgair mahārāja saṃstīrṇaiva ca bhūr iyam svayaṃ prakāśabahavo vṛkṣāś caite viśāṃ pate devāś ca ṛṣayaś caiva samāgacchanti nityaśaḥ taptuṃ sāyaṃ tathā prātar dṛśyante te hutāśanāḥ ihāplutānāṃ kaunteya sadyaḥ pāpmā vihanyate kuruśreṣṭhābhiṣekaṃ vai tasmāt kuru sahānujaḥ tato natvāplutāṅgas tvaṃ kauśikīm anuyāsyasi viśvāmitreṇa vai tatra tapas taptam anuttamam tatas tatra samāplutya gātrāṇi sagaṇo nṛpaḥ jagāma kauśikīṃ puṇyāṃ ramyāṃ sphītajalāṃ nadīm eṣaiva ca nadī puṇyā kauśikī nāma bhārata viśvāmitrāśramo ramya eṣa tatra prakāśate āśramaś caiva puṇyākhyaḥ kaśyapasya mahātmanaḥ
atra sthāsyanti ye nityaṃ teṣāṃ vighno bhaved iti
evam etad viditvā tvaṃ rātriṃ vasa mahāmate
**** **** rājan kratubhir iṣṭavān hayamedhena yajñena
iha snātvā tapoyuktāṃs trīṃl lokān sacarācarān
kṣīṇapāpā śubhāṃl lokān prāpnute nātra saṃśayaḥ

yatra gayāśaro nāma pitṝṇāṃ tuṣṭikārakam yatra tīrthāny anekāni devatāyatanāni ca munīnām āśramāś caiva sarvāḥ svargamayāḥ śubhāḥ yatra gayāśiro nāma tīrthaṃ pāpabhayāpaham kṣetram etan mahīpāla praṇamasva yathāvidhi sarvatīrthasamāvāso dṛśyate vibudhācalaḥ
sarvatīrthasamāvāso dṛśyate 'trārbudācalaḥ
vitastāṃ paśya rājendra sarvapāpapramocanīm maharṣibhiś cādhyuṣitāṃ śītatoyāṃ sunirmalām

idam āścaryam aparaṃ deśe 'smin puruṣarṣabha kṣīṇe yuge 'pi kaunteya śarvasya saha pārṣadaiḥ sahomayā ca bhavati darśanaṃ kāmarūpiṇaḥ asmin sarasi ramye vai caitre māsi pinākinam yajanti yājakāḥ samyak parivāraṃ śubhārthinaḥ atropaspṛśya sarasi śraddadhāno jitendriyaḥ kṣīṇapāpaḥ śubhāṃl lokān prāpnute nātra saṃśayaḥ
maṇḍavāṃ ca tathā saṃdhyāṃ drakṣyasy amitavikrama
śṛṇu tvaṃ tatra vai rājañ śyeno yad abhibhāṣata
ekataḥ kratavaḥ sarve samāptavaradakṣiṇāḥ ekato bhayabhītasya prāṇinaḥ prāṇadhāraṇam
hriyamāṇaṃ tathāhāram utpannaṃ kṣudhitasya vai
kṛtsnam etan mayā dattaṃ rājavad vihagottama
yadi prāṇy upakārāya deho 'yaṃ nopayujyate tataḥ kim upacāro 'sya pratyahe kriyate vṛthā
ity evam uktvā rājānam āruroha divaṃ punaḥ uśīnaro 'pi dharmātmā dharmeṇāvṛtya rodasī vibhrājamāno vapuṣāpy āruroha triviṣṭapam
ity uktvā taṃ dānapatim indrāgnī tau tadā nṛpa pūrṇadehaṃ svakaṃ kṛtvā jagmatus tridaśālayam
upāssva kaunteya sahānujas tvaṃ tasyāśramaṃ puṇyatamaṃ praviśya aṣṭāvakraṃ yasya dauhitram āhur yo 'sau bandiṃ janakasyātha yajñe vādī viprāgryo bāla evābhigamya vāde bhaṅktvā majjayām āsa nadyām
kiṃ cādhikṛtyātha tayor vivādo videharājasya samīpa āsīt
tasyaiva śiṣyasya parāṃ ca śiṣyatāṃ jñātvā vikārāṃs tatsutāyās tadānīm
vedān sāṅgān sarvaśāstrair upetān adhītavān asmi tava prasādāt ihaiva garbhe tena pitar bravīmi nedaṃ tvattaḥ samyag ivopavartate
lomaśaḥ sa evam ukto mātulenaiva sārdhaṃ yatheṣṭamārgo yajñaniveśanaṃ tat dharmeṇa saṃprāpya nivāritaḥ san dvāri dvāḥsthaṃ vākyam idaṃ babhāṣe
mā ca tvam āvāṃ vyādhinā tapyamānāv abhibhū tvaṃ bālakau bāliśau ca samāyātau mātulabhāgineyau saṃmoktavyau dvārapāla kṣaṇe 'smin
paśyantu viprāḥ paripūrṇavidyāḥ sahaiva rājñā sapurodhamukhyāḥ
eṣa rājā saṃśravaṇe sthitas te stuhy enaṃ tvaṃ vacasā saṃskṛtena sa cānujñāṃ dāsyati prītiyuktaḥ praveśane yac ca kiṃ cit taveṣṭam

āśaṃsase tvaṃ bandinaṃ vai vijetum avijñātvā tu balaṃ bandino 'sya samāgatā brāhmaṇās tena pūrvaṃ na śobhante bhāskareṇeva tārāḥ āśaṃsanto bandinaṃ jetukāmās tasyāntikaṃ prāpya viluptaśobhāḥ vijñānamattā niḥsṛtāś caiva tāta kathaṃ sadasyair vacanaṃ vistareyuḥ
yathā mahendraḥ pravaraḥ surāṇāṃ nadīṣu gaṅgā pravarā yathaiva tathā nṛpāṇāṃ pravaras tvam eko bandiṃ samabhyānaya matsakāśam

tato 'ṣṭāvakraṃ mātur athāntike pitā nadīṃ samaṃgāṃ śīghram imāṃ viśasva provāca caināṃ sa tathā viveśa samair aṅgaiś cāpi babhūva sadyaḥ nadī samaṃgā ca babhūva puṇyā yasyāṃ snāto mucyate kilbiṣād dhi tvam apy enāṃ snānapānāvagāhaiḥ sabhrātṛkaḥ sahabhāryo viśasva
nānāpuṣpasamākīrṇaḥ phalapuṣpopaśobhitaḥ nānāvihagasaṃghuṣṭas tāpasālaya uttamaḥ raibhyasyaiṣa mahārāja āśramaḥ puṇyakarmaṇaḥ
munis tat kāraṇaṃ jñātvā svayaṃ mahiṣarūpadhṛk śṛṅgeṇādrīn acalayat tato 'yaṃ bhasmasād abhūt
athāśramapadaṃ prāpya yavakrītena yācitā pativratā yavakrīta
tataḥ snuṣākṛtīkṛtya yavakrītam upāgamat yavakrīto 'pi raibhyasya snuṣāṃ matvā jagāma tām
putramṛtyujam āśaucaṃ bharadvājo na jajñivān
tataḥ samīpam āsādya pitaraṃ dṛṣṭavān hatam ajñānāt pitaraṃ hatvā mṛgabuddhyā parāvasuḥ vilapya bahudhā rājan raibhyasya ca mahātmanaḥ
tac chrutvārvāvasuḥ paścāt prāyaścittaṃ vidhāya ca
lomaśa uvāca tac chrutvaiva tadā rājā preṣyān āha sa viṭpate
pratiṣṭhāṃ cāpi vedasya saurasya dvijasattamaḥ evam astv iti taṃ devāḥ procuś cāpi varān daduḥ
tato vai sa yavakrīto brahmacaryaṃ cacāra ha aṣṭau daśa ca varṣāṇi triṃśataṃ ca yudhiṣṭhira
etad dṛśyati devānām ākrīḍaṃ caraṇāṅkitam atikrānto 'si kaunteya kālaśailaṃ ca parvatam
marutaś ca sahāśvibhyāṃ saritaś ca sarāṃsi ca svasti devāsurebhyaś ca vasubhyaś ca mahādyute
apaśyantīha taṃ vīram evam eṣā suduḥkhitā kiṃ punar nakulaṃ tvāṃ ca taṃ ca vīraṃ dhanaṃjayam
guḍākeśaṃ mahātmānaṃ saṃgrāmeṣv apalāyinam
nārāyaṇasamo yuddhe satyasaṃdho dṛḍhavrataḥ taṃ mamāpaśyato bhīma na śāntir hṛdayasya vai
bhṛśaṃ caṭacaṭāśabdo vajrāṇāṃ kṣipyatām iva tatas tāḥ cañcalābhāsaś cerur abhre ca vidyutaḥ
etac chrutvā tu vacanaṃ bhīmasenasya dharmarāṭ bhīmaṃ saṃpūjayaṃs tuṣṭa evam astv ity abhāṣata
mandaṃ mandaṃ gamiṣyāmi vahan drupadanandinīm sarvān vo brāhmaṇaiḥ sārdhaṃ vakṣyanti sahitānagha
āsevitān kiṃpuruṣair gandharvaiś ca samantataḥ
nānāvidhair mṛgair anyair upetān saumyadarśanaiḥ varāhair gavayaiś caiva mahiṣaiś ca samāvṛtān
samadaiś cāpi vihagaiḥ pādapair anvitāṃs tathā
paśyantas te naravyāghrā remire tatra pāṇḍavāḥ
mudā yuktā mahātmāno remire tatra te tadā
prāpya puṇyāṃ devanadīṃ viśālāṃ badarīṃ tathā
tasmin devarṣicarite deśe paramadurgame bhāgīrathīpuṇyajale tarpayāṃ cakrire tadā devān ṛṣīṃś ca kaunteyāḥ paramaṃ śaucam āsthitāḥ
gṛhyāparāṇi puṣpāṇi bahūni puruṣarṣabha
dadṛśuḥ sarvabhūtāni mahābāṇadhanurdharam na glānir na ca vaiklavyaṃ na bhayaṃ na ca saṃbhramaḥ kadā cij juṣate pārtham ātmajaṃ mātariśvanaḥ
vījyamānaḥ supuṇyena nānākusumagandhinā
yakṣarākṣasagandharvanāgakanyāpaṇājire

ṛkṣāś cotsasṛjur vṛkṣāṃs tatyajur harayo guhām vyajṛmbhanta mahāsiṃhā mahiṣāś cāvalokayan tena vitrāsitā nāgāḥ kareṇuparivāritāḥ tad vanaṃ saṃparityajya jagmur anyan mahāvanam varāhamṛgasaṃghāś ca mahiṣāś ca vanecarāḥ vyāghragomāyusaṃghāś ca praṇedur gavayaiḥ saha rathāṅgasāhvadātyūhā haṃsakāraṇḍavaplavāḥ śukāḥ puṃskokilāḥ krauñcā visaṃjñā bhejire diśaḥ tathānye darpitā nāgā mahiṣāś ca mahābalāḥ
vimardaṃ sumahātejā nṛsiṃha iva darpitaḥ
praviveśa tataḥ kṣipraṃ tān apāsya mahābalaḥ vanaṃ pāṇḍusutaḥ śrīmāñ śabdenāpūrayan diśaḥ
śakṛn mūtraṃ ca muñcānāṃ bhayavibhrāntamānasāḥ
āsphoṭayac ca balavān bhīmaḥ saṃnādayan diśaḥ

tataḥ śaṅkhasvanaṃ śrutvā narditaṃ ca muhur muhuḥ vṛkṣāṇāṃ bhajyamānānāṃ śabdaṃ śrutvā tadā girau gandhamādanapārśvastho rāmasyābhimataḥ sakhā hanūmān nāma sa kapir lāṅgūlamadhunot tataḥ tasya dodhūyamānasya lāṅgūlaṃ līlayā muhuḥ tena lāṅgūlaśabdena svanantīva diśo daśa tataḥ pṛthvī ca śailāś ca prakampitam ivābhavat (!)

bhrātaraṃ bhīmasenaṃ tu vijñāya hanumān kapiḥ divaṃgamaṃ rurodhātha mārgaṃ bhīmasya kāraṇāt anena hi pathā mā vai gacched iti vicārya saḥ āsta ekāyane mārge kadalīṣaṇḍamaṇḍite bhrātur bhīmasya rakṣārthaṃ taṃ mārgam avarudhya vai mātra prāpsyati śāpaṃ vā dharṣaṇāṃ veti pāṇḍavaḥ kadalīṣaṇḍamadhyastha evaṃ saṃcintya vānaraḥ
tena śabdena mahatā vyābudhyata mahākapiḥ
lāṅgūlāsphoṭaśabdāc ca calitaḥ sa mahāgiriḥ vighūrṇamānaśikharaḥ samantāt paryaśīryata
tasya śrutvā tu ninadaṃ mahāmegharavasvanam pratinedur gajāḥ siṃhā vitresuś ca mṛgadvijāḥ
vivṛttadaṃṣṭrādaśanaṃ śuklatīkṣṇāgraśobhitam
dṛṣṭvā cainaṃ mahābāhur ekas tasmin mahāvane
bhīmo bhīmabalas tatra praviṣṭaḥ kadalīvanam apaśyad vānaraṃ suptam ekāyanagate pathi
kva vā tvayādya gantavyaṃ prabrūhi puruṣarṣabha
devalokasya mārgo 'yam agamyo mānuṣaiḥ sadā
svāgataṃ sarvathaiveha tavādya manujarṣabha
**** **** mā vṛthā prāpsyase vadham
idaṃ deśam anuprāptaḥ kāraṇenāsmi kena cit
vaiśaṃpāyana uvāca evam uktas tu balavān bhīmo bhīmaparākramaḥ manasācintayad bhīmaḥ svabāhubaladarpitaḥ pucche pragṛhya tarasā hīnavīryaparākramam sālokyam antakasyainaṃ nayāmy adyeha vānaram
śiṣyavat tvāṃ tu pṛcchāmi upapanno 'smi te 'nagha
**** **** tayor bhrātror mahātmanoḥ tayor nāsīt samo vīrye
rākṣasendreṇa balinā rāvaṇena durātmanā suvarṇaratnacitreṇa mṛgarūpeṇa rakṣasā
saṃpātinā samākhyātā rāvaṇasya niveśane sītāṃ mārgan mahābāho
ahaṃ svavīryād uttīrya sāgaraṃ makarālayam sutāṃ janakarājasya sītāṃ surasutopamām
madvākyaṃ cāvadhāryāśu rāmo rājīvalocanaḥ abaddhapūrvam anyaiś ca baddhvā setuṃ mahodadhau vṛto vānarakoṭībhiḥ samuttīrṇo mahārṇavam
tayaiva sahitaḥ sādhvyā patnyā rāmo mahāyaśāḥ gatvā tato 'titvaritaḥ svāṃ purīṃ raghunandanaḥ adhyāvasat tato 'yodhyām ayodhyāṃ dviṣatāṃ prabhuḥ dhārmikaṃ bhaktimantaṃ ca bhaktānugatavatsalam
varaṃ mayā yācito 'sau rāmo rājīvalocanaḥ
tvām anena pathā yāntaṃ yakṣo vā rākṣaso 'pi vā
tato 'dya duṣkaraṃ draṣṭuṃ mama rūpaṃ narottama
kālaṃ kālaṃ samāsādya narāṇāṃ narapuṃgava
tad rūpaṃ yat purā tasya babhūvodadhilaṅghane
sarvaṃ doṣakṛtaṃ yeṣāṃ vairaṃ tatra pratiṣṭhitam
sāmnā mitrāṇi dānena brāhmaṇaṃ kṛtrimāni ca bhedenārīn pradamayet kuṇḍena sādhayet prajāḥ
dvijaśuśrūṣayā śūdrā labhante gatim uttamām
balaṃ cātibalo mene na me 'sti sadṛśaḥ kva cit
śīghraṃ tu kāryasidhyarthaṃ gaccha tvaṃ pāṇḍunandana smartavyo 'smi tvayā vīra kathāsvamitavikrama
rāmābhidhānaṃ viṣṇuṃ hi jagad dhṛdayanandanam sītāvaktrāravindārkaṃ daśāsyadhvāntabhāskaram
nihatān dhārtarāṣṭrāṃs tu tan me vada ca bhārata
baddhvā duryodhanaṃ cādya ānayāmi tavāntikam
**** **** mā bhūt te mānaso jvaraḥ mayā hi prāṇasarvasvaṃ lāṅgūle viniveśitam śatruprāṇaharaṃ yogyaṃ
nānāvihagajuṣṭāni paśyati sma samantataḥ nānākusumacitrāṇi
nīlaśādvalaparyantāṃ citradrumaparicchadām
nānāpakṣigaṇākīrṇāṃ sūpatīrthām akardamām atīva ramyāṃ sujalāṃ jātāṃ parvatasānuṣu
āmantrya yakṣarājaṃ vai tataḥ piba harasva ca nāto 'nyathā tvayā śakyaṃ kiṃ cit puṣkaram īkṣitum
tāṃ tu puṣkariṇīṃ vīraḥ prabhinna iva kuñjaraḥ
agaṇayya sa tān sarvān bhīmasenaḥ pratāpavān padmāny agṛhṇāt sahasā pauruṣe sve vyavasthitaḥ
etasminn antare rājan yudhiṣṭhirasamīpataḥ
anye ca bahavo bhīmā utpātās tatra jajñire
bhinnakāyākṣibāhūrūn saṃcūrṇitaśirodharān taṃ ca bhīmaṃ mahātmānaṃ tasyās tīre vyavasthitam sakrodhaṃ stabdhanayanaṃ saṃdaṣṭadaśanacchadam
uccukruśuś ca te 'nyonyaṃ rākṣasā bhīmadarśanāḥ rājñas te vai kuberasya nalinīṃ vanacāriṇaḥ saṃbhrāntamanasaḥ sarve vyākulenāntarātmabhiḥ upatasthur mahātmānaṃ dharmaputraṃ yudhiṣṭhiram
ājagāma tadā rakṣo nāmnā khyāto jaṭāsuraḥ
janamejayaḥ brahman kathaṃ dharmarājaṃ yamau kṛṣṇāṃ ca rākṣasaḥ jagāma kutra bhīmaś ca gato rākṣasakaṇṭakaḥ vaktum arhasi viprāgrya vṛttam etan mamānagha
jāmadagnyasya śiṣyo 'haṃ rāmasyākliṣṭakarmaṇaḥ
poṣaṇaṃ tasya rājendra cakre pāṇḍavanandanaḥ bubudhe na ca taṃ pāpaṃ bhasmacchannam ivānalam
ghaṭotkacaṃ sānucaraṃ dṛṣṭvā vipradrutaṃ diśaḥ lomaśaprabhṛtīṃs tāṃs tu maharṣīṃś ca samāhitān snātuṃ vinirgatān dṛṣṭvā puṣpārthaṃ ca tapodhanān
vikramya kauśikaṃ khaḍgaṃ mokṣayitvā grahaṃ ripoḥ
tiryag yonigatāś caiva api kīṭapipīlikāḥ dharmasya rākṣasā mūlaṃ dharmaṃ te vidur uttamam etat parīkṣya sarvaṃ tvaṃ samaye sthātum arhasi devāś ca ṛṣayaḥ siddhāḥ pitaraś cāpi rākṣasāḥ
vighasāśān yathāśaktyā kurmahe devatādiṣu gurūṃś ca brāhmaṇāṃś caiva pramāṇapravaṇāḥ sadā
bruvan vai tiṣṭha tiṣṭheti krodhasaṃraktalocanaḥ
bhīmaseno 'py avaṣṭabdho niyuddhāyābhavat sthitaḥ rākṣaso 'pi ca visrabdho bāhuyuddham akāṅkṣata
tataḥ saṃpīḍya balavad bhujābhyāṃ krodhamūrchitaḥ

**** **** dānavendram iveśvaraḥ babhūva puruṣavyāghraḥ prahṛṣṭa iva pāṇḍavaḥ tato yudhiṣṭhiro rājā dhaumyaḥ kṛṣṇā yamau tathā bhīmasenam upāyāntaṃ dadṛśus te ca pāṇḍavam upasaṃhṛtya dhaumyaṃ ca pāṇḍavaṃ ca yudhiṣṭhiram paryaṣvajata durdharṣo yamau cāpi vṛkodaraḥ hataṃ jaṭāsuraṃ dṛṣṭvā pāñcālī bhīmam acyutam muditaṃ pūjayām āsa paulomīva puraṃdaram saṃpūjitaḥ * * sadbhir brāhmaṇān abhivādya ca jitārir mudito bhīmo babhūva bharatarṣabhaḥ

puṣpitair drumakhaṇḍaiś ca mattakokilaṣaṭpadaiḥ mayūraiś cātakaiś cāpi nityotsavavibhūṣitam vyāghrair varāhair mahiṣair gavayair hariṇais tathā śvāpadair vyālarūpaiś ca rurubhiś ca niṣevitam phullaiḥ sahasrapatraiś ca śatapatrais tathotpalaiḥ praphullaiḥ kamalaiś caiva tathā nīlotpalair api mahāpuṇyaṃ pavitraṃ ca surāsuraniṣevitam
paribarhaṃ ca taṃ śeṣaṃ paridāya mahātmane
ramyaṃ himavataḥ prasthaṃ bahukandaranirjharam śilāvihaṃgaviṭapaṃ latāpādapasaṃkulam
gajasaṃghasamāvāsaṃ siṃhavyāghragaṇāyutam
śarabhonnādasaṃghuṣṭaṃ nānāmṛganiṣevitam
tathā vanaspatībhāraṃ bhūribhārāsamadyutim dadhantyaḥ saṃgatāś cārulatāpuṣpasamāgatāḥ

aho śrīmad idaṃ bhīma gandhamādanakānanam viviśuḥ pāṇḍavāḥ sarve vismayotphullalocanāḥ kamalotpalakahlārapuṇḍarīkasugandhinā sevyamānā vane tasmin sukhasparśena vāyunā tato yudhiṣṭhiro bhīmam āhedaṃ prītimad vacaḥ
bhānty ete puṣpavikacāḥ puṃskokilakulākulāḥ
draupadyā sahitā vīrās taiś ca viprair mahātmabhiḥ
kiṃ cakrus tatra te vīrāḥ sarve 'tibalapauruṣāḥ

divyavarṇāni divyāni divyagandhavahāni ca madayantīva gandhena mano me bharatarṣabha yeṣāṃ tu darśanāt sparśāt saurabhyāc ca tathaiva ca naśyatīva manoduḥkhaṃ mamedaṃ śatrutāpana īdṛśaiḥ kusumair divyair divyagandhavahaiḥ śubhaiḥ devatāny arcayitvāham iccheyaṃ saṃgamaṃ tvayā idaṃ tu puruṣavyāghra viśeṣeṇāmbujaṃ śubham gandhasaṃsthānasaṃpannaṃ mama mānasavardhanam
sāśanaṃ satataṃ kuryus tathaiva bharatarṣabha
icchāmi ca naravyāghra puṣpaṃ pratyakṣam īdṛśam ānīyamānaṃ kṣipraṃ vai tvayā bharatasattama

prākāreṇa parikṣiptaṃ sauvarṇena samantataḥ sarvaratnadyutimatā sarvodyānavatā tathā śailād abhyucchrayavatā cayāṭṭālakaśobhinā dvāratoraṇanirvyūhadhvajasaṃvāhaśobhinā vilāsinībhir atyarthaṃ nṛtyantībhiḥ samantataḥ vāyunā dhūyamānābhiḥ patākābhir alaṃkṛtam dhanuṣkoṭim avaṣṭabhya vakrabhāvena bāhunā paśyamānaḥ sa khedena draviṇādhipateḥ puram
saṃrabdhānāṃ mahāghoṣaṃ siṃhānām iva nardatām
śoṇitasya tataḥ petur ghanānām iva bhārata
gadāparighapāṇīnāṃ rakṣasāṃ kāyasaṃbhavāḥ
rukmapaṭṭapinaddhāṃ tāṃ śatrūṇāṃ bhayavardhinīm
tatas taṃ gadayā bhīmo maṇimantaṃ niśācaraḥ jaghāna sahasā mūrdhni sa papāta mamāra ca
sāhasaṃ bata bhadraṃ te devānām api cāpriyam
bhīmasenaṃ mahābāhum apradhṛṣyaparākramam
tatas te tu mahāyakṣāḥ kruddhaṃ dṛṣṭvā dhaneśvaram
anujagmur mahātmānaṃ dhanadaṃ ghoradarśanāḥ
ramyaṃ caiva gireḥ śṛṅgam āsedur yatra pāṇḍavāḥ tat kesarimahājālaṃ dhanādhipatipālitam
devakāryaṃ cikīrṣan sa hṛdayena tutoṣa ha
yas tu kevalasaṃrambhāt prapātaṃ na nirīkṣate
tac chrutvā dhanado vākyaṃ pāṇḍavānāṃ samāgamam utthāya sa ha taiḥ sārdhaṃ calitas tatkṣaṇād vṛtam kuberaḥ prāpya rājānaṃ yudhiṣṭhiram abhāṣata
etac chrutvā tu vacanaṃ dhanadena prabhāṣitam pāṇḍavāś ca tatas tena babhūvuḥ saṃpraharṣitāḥ
vibhavas tāta śailāgre vasānaḥ saha bandhubhiḥ suparṇapitṛdevānāṃ satataṃ mānakṛd bhava ṛjuṃ paśyata mā vakraṃ satyaṃ vadata mānṛtam dīrghaṃ paśyata mā hrasvaṃ paraṃ paśyata māparam
ārṣṭiṣeṇaḥ pariṣvajya putravad bharatarṣabhān
yatra bhūteśvaras tāta sarvaprakṛtir ātmabhūḥ bhāsayan sarvabhūtāni suśriyābhivirājate nātra brahmarṣayas tāta kuta eva maharṣayaḥ prāpnuvanti gatiṃ hy etāṃ yatīnāṃ kurusattama
svayaṃbhuvaṃ mahātmānaṃ devadevaṃ sanātanam
enaṃ tvaharahar meruṃ sūryācandramasau dhruvam pradakṣiṇam upāvṛttau kurutaḥ kurusattama jyotīṃṣi cāpy aśeṣeṇa sarvāṇy anagha sarvataḥ pariyānti mahārāja girirājaṃ pradakṣiṇam
somaś ca vibhajan kālaṃ bahudhā parvasaṃdhiṣu
saṃtyajya kāmān pravrajitās tadaiva pārthās tadā śokaparā babhūvuḥ

uṣitvā pañca varṣāṇi sahasrākṣaniveśane avāpya divyāny astrāṇi sarvāṇi vibudheśvarāt āgneyaṃ vāruṇaṃ saumyaṃ vāyavyam atha vaiṣṇavam aindraṃ pāśupataṃ brāhmaṃ pārameṣṭhyaṃ prajāpateḥ yamasya dhātuḥ savitus tvaṣṭur vaiśravaṇasya ca tāni prāpya sahasrākṣād abhivādya śatakratum anujñātas tadā tena kṛtvā cāpi pradakṣiṇam āgacchad arjunaḥ prītaḥ prahṛṣṭo gandhamādanam
sākṣāt sahasrākṣa iva pratītaḥ śrīmān svadehād avamucya jiṣṇuḥ
devais tu dattā hi yathāstramukhyāḥ prakhyāpayad valkalacīravāsāḥ
tato rajanyāṃ vyuṣṭāyāṃ dharmarājaṃ yudhiṣṭhiram bhrātṛbhiḥ sahitaḥ sarvair avandata dhanaṃjayaḥ
ravonmukhās te saṃprekṣya prīyamāṇāḥ kurūdvahāḥ marudbhir anvitaṃ śakram āpatantaṃ vihāyasā
babhūva paramaprīto devarājaṃ ca pūjayan
**** **** tato 'ham apataṃ mahīm tataḥ prahasya tad bhūtaṃ

tataś cintāṃ samagamaṃ pūjayiṣyāmy ahaṃ punaḥ iti puṣpāṇi saṃgṛhya saikataṃ śaṃkaraṃ prabhum pūjayiṣyaṃs tam adrākṣaṃ kirātaṃ puṣpadhāriṇam tataś cānyāni puṣpāṇi pūjayiṣyan punaḥ punaḥ tāni sarvāṇi dṛṣṭvāhaṃ kirātasya ca mūrdhani iti kṛtvā mahādevaṃ praṇato 'smi punaḥ punaḥ
jagad vinirdahed evam alpatejasi pātitam
svargas tv avaśyaṃ gantavyas tvayā śatruniṣūdana
ihasthaḥ pāṇḍavaśreṣṭha tapaḥ kurvan suduṣkaram
devarājaḥ sahasrākṣas tvāṃ didṛkṣati bhārata
sa ratho haribhir yukto hy ūrdhvam ācakrame tataḥ ṛṣayo devatāś caiva pūjayanti narottama tataḥ kāmagamāṃl lokān apaśyaṃ vai surarṣiṇām gandharvāpsarasāṃ caiva prabhāvam amitaujasām
rathaṃ taṃ tu samāśliṣya prādravad rathayogavit
śaravegair nihatyāham astraiḥ śaravighātibhiḥ jvaladbhiḥ paramaiḥ śīghrais tān avidhyaṃ sahasraśaḥ
tato 'haṃ vāruṇāstreṇa aśmavarṣaṃ viśātavān
balaprajñādayaś cāpi tathānyeṣāṃ ca pāṇḍava
tathā devair avadhyatvaṃ purasyābhedyatvam eva tu manuṣyāṇāṃ durbalatvād upekṣyaiva mahāsuraiḥ
surāsurair avadhyānāṃ dānavānāṃ dhanaṃjaya

tato 'haṃ paramāyasto mātaliṃ paripṛṣṭavān kim ete mama bāṇaughair divyāstraparimantritaiḥ na vadhyante mahāghorais tattvam ākhyāhi pṛcchataḥ sa mām uvāca paryāptas tvam eṣāṃ bharatarṣabha tān uddiśyātha marmāṇi pratighātaṃ tadācara etac chrutvā tu rājendra saṃprahṛṣṭas tam ūcivān nivartaya rathaṃ śīghraṃ paśya caitān nipātitān evam ukto rathaṃ tatra mātaliḥ paryavartayat tato matvā raṇe bhagnaṃ dānavāḥ pratiharṣitāḥ vicukruśur mahārāja svareṇa mahatā tadā abhagnaḥ kaiś cid apy eṣa pāṇḍavo raṇamūrdhani asmābhiḥ samare bhagna ity evaṃ saṃghaśas tadā
prayataḥ praṇato bhūtvā namaskṛtya mahātmane
ṛkṣāśvameṣavaktrāṇām ulūkānāṃ tathaiva ca mīnavāyasarūpāṇāṃ nānāvaktrapracāriṇām
devānāṃ ca ṛṣīṇāṃ ca gandharvāṇāṃ ca sarvaśaḥ
hatāṃs tān dānavān dṛṣṭvā mayā saṃkhye sahasraśaḥ
kurarya iva vāśantyo duḥkhitāś ca muhur muhuḥ
kālakeyavadhaṃ caiva adbhutaṃ romaharṣaṇam
pariṣvajya ca māṃ premṇā mūrdhny upāghrāya sasmitam
paśyāmi bhūmiṃ kaunteya tvayā me pratipāditām
mahābalā mahāmāyā ekena nihitā yudhi
namaskṛtya triṇetrāya vāsavāya ca pāṇḍavaḥ
khecarāṇi ca bhūtāni sarvāṇy evāvatasthire
devatūryāṇy avādyanta ramyāṇi madhurāṇi ca
tato mahātmā sa viśuddhabuddhiḥ saṃprārthayām āsa nagendravaryam

tapobhiḥ kratubhiś caiva vidyayābhijanena ca trailokyaiśvaryam atulaṃ prāptaṃ me vikrameṇa ca atha sarvanṛponmāthī mado māṃ samupāviśat sahasraṃ munimukhyānām uvāha śibikāṃ mama tato vibhraṃśitaś cāham agastyena mahātmanā imām avasthāṃ saṃprāptaḥ paśya daivam idaṃ mama na daivaṃ prajñayā tāta na balotsāhaśaktibhiḥ na sahāyabalaiś cāpi kaś cid apy ativartate atha prajñā ca śauryaṃ ca saṃpadaḥ kāraṇaṃ bhavet prajñāvatāṃ ca śūrāṇāṃ na kadā cid asaṃpadaḥ yathā prājñāś ca śūrāś ca dṛśyante duḥkhajīvinaḥ bhīrumūrkhāś ca sukhinas tasmād daivaṃ hi kāraṇam

patito hi vimānāgryāt sa muniḥ prārthito mayā kuru śāpāntam ity evaṃ provācedaṃ dayānvitaḥ yas tu te vyāhṛtān praśnān prativakṣyati dharmataḥ sa tvāṃ mokṣayitā śāpāt kasmiṃś cit kālaparyaye na ca te matprasādena smṛtibhraṃśo bhaviṣyati balavān api jantus te gṛhīto vaśyam eṣyati
yas tvayā veṣṭito rājan moham eti mahābalaḥ
kathayām āsa tat sarvaṃ mṛgān hantum ito gatam tac chrutvā tvarito rājā bhṛśam udvignamānasaḥ
tato mṛgasahasrāṇi mṛgendrāṇāṃ śatāni ca patitāni vane dṛṣṭvā mārgaṃ tasyāviśan nṛpaḥ
rūkṣamārutabhūyiṣṭhe niṣpatradrumasaṃkaṭe īriṇe nirjale deśe kaṇṭakidrumasaṃkule aśmasthāṇukṣupākīrṇe sudurge viṣamotkaṭe

bhīma uvāca ayam ārya mahāsattvo bhakṣārthaṃ māṃ gṛhītavān yudhiṣṭhira uvāca mucyatām ayam āyuṣman bhrātā me 'mitavikramaḥ vayam āhāramanyaṃ te dāsyāmaḥ kṣunnivāraṇam āhāro rājaputro 'yaṃ mayā prāpto mukhāgataḥ gamyatāṃ neha sthātavyaṃ śvo bhavān api me bhavet vratam etan mahābāho viṣayaṃ mama yo vrajet sa me bhakṣo bhavet tāta tvaṃ cāpi viṣaye mama cireṇādya mayāhāraḥ prāpto 'yam anujas tava nāham enaṃ vimokṣyāmi na cānyam abhikāṅkṣaye
kimarthaṃ ca tvayā grasto bhīmaseno bhujaṃgama
brūhi yat te mayā vācyaṃ tattvaṃ dharmabhṛtāṃ vara

pareṣāṃ ca guṇānveṣī satataṃ puruṣarṣabha sato 'pi doṣān rājendra na gṛhṇāti kadā cana dīnānukampī satataṃ satataṃ sādhuvatsalaḥ nityaṃ dānarataś caiva taṃ devā brāhmaṇaṃ viduḥ yatnena brūhi rājendra kaḥ kālaḥ śrāddhadānayoḥ praśnaṃ praśnavidāṃ śreṣṭha sarvavit tvaṃ mato 'si me yatra vai brāhmaṇaṃ paśyec chrotriyaṃ dhyānatatparam dhanaṃ manyed viśiṣṭaṃ tu sa kālaḥ śrāddhadānayoḥ kiṃ vedyaṃ paramaṃ rājañ śaṃsa me tvaṃ yudhiṣṭhira sarvajño 'si mahābāho vākyair anumimīmahe
tāṃś ca sarvān aśeṣeṇa kathayasva narādhipa
tatas tu nāmakaraṇaṃ tataś caulaṃ vidhīyate tatopanayanaṃ proktaṃ dvijātīnāṃ yathāvidhi
kathaṃ ca sarpatāṃ yāto bhavān vyākhyātum arhati
sa cāyaṃ puruṣavyāghra kālaḥ puṇya upasthitaḥ tad asmāt kāraṇāt pārtha kāryaṃ mama mahat kṛtam
tatas tasmin muhūrte tu vimānaṃ kāmagāmi vai avapātena mahatā tatrāvāpatad uttamam
āpatsv api tvaṃ na jahāsi rājan
diṣṭyā samagrāsi dhanaṃjayena samāgatety evam uvāca kṛṣṇaḥ
yodhās tavārtheṣu narendrayantā kurvantu kāryaṃ sarathāḥ sanāgāḥ
eṣaiva buddhir juṣatāṃ sadā tvāṃ satye sthitāḥ keśava pāṇḍaveyāḥ sadānadharmāḥ sajanāḥ sadārāḥ sabāndhavās tvaccharaṇā hi pārthāḥ
etat sarvaṃ yathāvṛttaṃ mune vaktum ihārhasi
kāṅkṣiṇaḥ sarvakāmānāṃ nāstikā bhinnasetavaḥ
mārkaṇḍeya uvāca tvad yukto 'yam anupraśnaḥ śṛṇu bhārata tattvataḥ
anuśete śayānaṃ ca tiṣṭhantaṃ cānutiṣṭhati anudhāvati dhāvantaṃ pūrvakarma kṛtaṃ naram
ṛṣayas te mahātmānaḥ pratyakṣāgamabuddhayaḥ
sukumāro mahīpālo hehayānāṃ mahībhṛtām
mṛtyuḥ prabhavate yena nāsmākaṃ nṛpasattamāḥ suśuddhānnāḥ śuddhadhanā brahmacaryavratānvitāḥ
saṃbhojya śeṣam aśnīmas tasmān mṛtyubhayaṃ na naḥ kṣāntā dāntāḥ kṣamāśīlās tīrthadānaparāyaṇāḥ puṇyadeśanivāsāc ca tasmān mṛtyubhayaṃ na naḥ
vākyair maṅgalasaṃyuktaiḥ pūjayāno 'bravīd vacaḥ
papracchuḥ praṇatāḥ sarve brahmāṇam iva somapāḥ
saṃyuktau dahataḥ śatrūn vanānīvāgnimārutau
asmābhir brāhmaṇaiḥ kṣatraṃ kṣatreṇa brahma cāvyayam duṣṭānāṃ nigrahaṃ kartā sa ca rājābhidhīyate satyaṃ manyur dayā rakṣā dharmādharmavilokanam vidyante yasya cārāś ca sa rājety abhidhīyate
atriṇā vyāhṛtaṃ pūrvaṃ tat tathaiva na cānyathā

dadāti yo vai kapilāṃ sacailāṃ kāṃsyopadohāṃ draviṇottarīyām tais tair guṇaiḥ kāmaduhātha bhūtvā naraṃ pradātāram upaiti sā gauḥ yāvanti romāṇi bhavanti dhenvās tāvat phalaṃ labhate gopradāne putrāṃś ca pautrāṃś ca kulaṃ ca sarvam āsaptamaṃ tārayate paratra sadakṣiṇāṃ kāñcanacāruśṛṅgīṃ kāṃsyopadohāṃ draviṇottarīyām dhenuṃ tilānāṃ dadato dvijāya lokā vasūnāṃ sulabhā bhavanti svakarmabhir dānavasaṃniruddhe tīvrāndhakāre narake patantam mahārṇave naur iva vātayuktā dānaṃ gavāṃ tārayate paratra yo brahmadeyāṃ tu dadāti kanyāṃ bhūmipradānaṃ ca karoti vipre dadāti dānaṃ vidhinā ca yaś ca sa lokam āpnoti puraṃdarasya
sāṃkhyā yogāḥ paramaṃ yaṃ vadanti paraṃ purāṇaṃ tam ahaṃ na vedmi
tā na śakyā mahatyo vai āpas tartuṃ mayā vinā

svapramāṇam atho vipra tvayā kṛtam anekaśaḥ ghoreṇāviśya tapasā vedhaso nirjitās tvayā nārāyaṇāṅkaprakhyas tvaṃ sāṃparāye 'tipaṭhyase bhagavān ekaśaḥ kṛtvā tvayā viṣṇoś ca viśvakṛt karṇikoddharaṇaṃ divyaṃ brahmaṇaḥ kāmarūpiṇaḥ ratnālaṃkārayogābhyāṃ dṛgbhyāṃ dṛṣṭas tvayā purā
avyaktāya susūkṣmāya nirguṇāya guṇātmane
yugānte manujavyāghra tathākārāś ca bhārata
aṭṭam annam iti prāhuḥ śūlaṃ vikrayam ucyate vedaḥ śivam iti proktaṃ brāhmaṇāś ca catuṣpathāḥ keśo bhaga iti proktas taṃ vikrīyaiva bhuñjate
pāralaukikakāryeṣu pramattā bhṛśanāstikāḥ
hiṃsābhirāmaś ca janas tathā saṃpadyate 'śuciḥ
nagarāṇāṃ vihāreṣu vidharmāṇo yugakṣaye
naitad astīti manujā vartanti nirapatrapāḥ
vīrapatnyas tathā nāryaḥ saṃśrayanti narān nṛpa bhartāram api jīvantam anyān vyabhicaranty uta
kāraṇḍakanibhāḥ ke cit ke cid iṅgulikaprabhāḥ
ke cid dāridryasaṃkāśāḥ ke cit pītāḥ payodharāḥ
garjantaḥ pṛthivīpāla pṛthivīdharasaṃnibhāḥ
vitastāṃ ca mahārāja kāverīṃ ca mahānadīm
sādhyān rudrāṃs tathādityān guhyakān pitaras tathā sarpān nāgān suparṇāṃś ca vasūn apy aśvināv api
bhramaṃs tatra mahīpāla yadā varṣagaṇān bahūn
taṃ dṛṣṭvā devadeveśaṃ munir vacanam abruvam
nirgato 'ham akāmas tu icchayā te mahāprabho
dyaur mūrdhā khaṃ diśaḥ śrotre tathāpaḥ svedasaṃbhavāḥ
mayaiva suvibhaktās te devakāryārthasiddhaye
tvam evāpyaṃ vijānīhi narāṇāṃ bhāvitātmanām
yadā bhavati me varṇaḥ kṛṣṇo vai munisattama
sarvaloke ca māṃ bhaktāḥ pūjayanti ca sarvaśaḥ
sūtātmānaṃ samāhṛta caturddaśavidhānataḥ paramātmānam āviśya supityamittadhī * *
śṛṇu rājan mayā dṛṣṭaṃ yat purā śrutam eva ca anubhūtaṃ ca rājendra devadevaprasādajam
tāmasaṃ yugam āsādya tadā bharatasattama
**** **** ye 'pi nityaṃ dhṛtavratāḥ te 'pi lobhasamāyuktā
rātrau bhokṣyanti vratino gṛhiṇo 'pi yugakṣaye evaṃvidhaṃ kariṣyanti kalau śāstravimohitāḥ
nimneṣv īhāṃ kariṣyanti hetuvādavimohitāḥ
dharmācāraparibhraṣṭā lobhamohasamanvitāḥ
anyāyavartinaś cāpi bhaviṣyanti narādhipāḥ
brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyā vaiśyāḥ parityakṣyanti satkriyām
bhovādinas tathā śūdrā brāhmaṇāḥ prākṛtapriyāḥ pāṣaṇḍajanasaṃkīrṇā bhaviṣyanti yugakṣaye
dakṣiṇāni bhaviṣyanti grahāś cāpy anulomagāḥ pradakṣiṇā bhaviṣyanti pūjayantaḥ parasparam
puṣkariṇyaś ca vividhā devatāyatāni ca
sarvam etad yathātattvaṃ kathitaṃ tava sarvaśaḥ
yudhiṣṭhiraḥ etac chrutvā mayā kiṃ syāt kartavyaṃ munisattama kathaṃ cāyaṃ jito loko rakṣitavyo bhaviṣyati
prājñās tāta na muhyanti kālenābhiprapīḍitāḥ
viprarṣabhāś ca te sarve ye tatrāsan samāgatāḥ
janamejaya uvāca bhūya eva brāhmaṇānāṃ māhātmyaṃ vaktum arhasi pāṇḍavānāṃ yathācaṣṭa mārkaṇḍeyo mahātapāḥ
śrūyatāṃ kathayāmīdaṃ brahmarṣīṇāṃ pūrvacaritam
tataḥ punaḥ sa rājā khaḍgam udyamya śīghraṃ kathayasveti tam āha haniṣye tvām iti sa tad āha rājabhayabhītaḥ sūtaḥ
catvāro vā yātudhānāḥ suraudrāḥ mayā prayuktās tvadvadham īpsamānā

vāmadeva uvāca mamaitau vāmyau pratigṛhya rājan punar dadānīti prapadya me tvam prayaccha śīghraṃ mama vāmyau tvam aśvau yady ātmānaṃ jīvituṃ te kṣamaṃ syāt na brāhmaṇebhyo mṛgayā prasūtā na tv ānuśāsmy adya prabhṛti hy asatyam tavaivājñāṃ saṃpraṇidhāya sarvāṃ tathā brahman puṇyalokaṃ labheyam
sādhvi sthiraṃ ceyam aduṣṭacittā dharme matis te satataṃ prayātu varaṃ ca mattaḥ pratikāṅkṣasva subhru tvayā vṛṣaḥ pālanīyo hi nityam
vṛttena buddhyā ca vivṛddhim etu jīved asau mama putro 'dya vipra
tam aham abruvam | ākulatvāt kāryaceṣṭānāṃ na pratyabhijāne 'ham | sa mām uvāca | asty anyaś cirajātatara iti | tam abruvam |
śrutvā sa rājā rājarṣer indradyumnasya tat tadā mārkaṇḍeyān mahābhāgāt svargasya pratipādanam
devagandharvayakṣāṇāṃ kiṃnarāpsarasāṃ tathā
vaiśaṃpāyana uvāca yudhiṣṭhireṇaivam ukto mārkaṇḍeyo mahāmuniḥ dhaundhumāram upākhyānaṃ kathayām āsa bhārata
rājā hi vīryavāṃs tāta ikṣvākur aparājitaḥ
haniṣyati mahābāhus taṃ vai dhundhuṃ mahāsuram
yasya niḥśvāsavātena kampate bhūḥ saparvatā
kathyamānaṃ mahāprājña vistareṇa yathātatham
caturbhujam udārāṅgaṃ dṛṣṭavān asmi bhārata
viṣṇukarṇamalodbhūtau yojanānāṃ śatoc chritau
**** **** brahmāṇam amitaujasam tau ca vīryamadonmattau
vidhārayan varaṃ vīrau pratigṛhṇāmi kāmataḥ
vināśe tejasā yuktā * * puruṣasattama
anṛtaṃ mā bhaved deva yad dhi nau saṃśrutaṃ tadā
kuvalāśvo narapatiḥ putraiś ca sahitaḥ prabhuḥ putraiḥ saha mahīpālaḥ prayayau bharatarṣabha
pradakṣiṇāś cāpy abhavan vanyās tasya mṛgadvijāḥ
hitārthaṃ sarvalokānām udaṅkasya vaśe sthitaḥ
yugānte sarvabhūtāni pāvakasyeva dhakṣyataḥ
kuvalāśvo mahābāhur dhundhuṃ hatvā jaharṣa ca
nānyad daivatam ity eva strīṇāṃ bhartur dvijottama
ye cakrur eṣu sarveṣu vartamānajugupsayā
mātuḥ pituś ca rājendra satataṃ hitakāriṇaḥ
tāṃ balākāṃ mahārāja vilīnāṃ nagamūrdhani
kṣamasva viprapravara kṣamasva strījaḍatvatām prasīda bhagavan mahyaṃ kṛpāṃ kuru mayi dvija
nāhaṃ balākā viprendra tyaja krodhaṃ tapodhana anayā kruddhayā dṛṣṭyā kruddhaḥ kiṃ māṃ kariṣyasi
kasmāt paribhaven mūḍho brāhmaṇān amitaujasaḥ
mā sma kruddho balākeva na vadhyāsmi pativratā
dhanyā tvam asi kalyāṇi yasyāḥ syād vṛttam īdṛśam
arghyeṇa ca sa vai tena vyādhena dvijasattamaḥ
pāty eṣa rājā janakaḥ pitṛvad dvijasattama
na kiṃ cit phalam āpnoti svadharmasya ca lopanāt
sādhusannītimān eva sarvatra dvijasattama
kariṣye dharmam eveti tṛtīyāt parimucyate
taṃ tu devāḥ prapaśyanti svasyaivāntarapūruṣaḥ
apaśyann ātmano doṣān sa pāpaḥ pretya naśyati
tasmāt tau viduṣāṃ vipra varjanīyau pradhānataḥ
pañca kāni pavitrāṇi śiṣṭācāreṣu nityadā
etan mahāmate vyādha prabravīhi yathātatham yajño dānaṃ tapo vedāḥ satyaṃ ca dvijasattama pañcaitāni pavitrāṇi śiṣṭācāreṣu nityadā
ahany ahani vadhyete dve sahasre gavāṃ tathā
vedadharmāviruddhaṃ yat pramāṇaiḥ pratitaṃ śubham
yat karoty aśubhaṃ karma paśya dharmasya sūkṣmatām
asya kartur gatiṃ sarvāṃ vakṣyāmi dvijasattama
na dehajā manuṣyāṇāṃ vyādhayo dvijasattama
vahanti śibikām anye yānty anye śibikāgatāḥ
tapoyogasamārambhaṃ kurute dvijasattama karmabhir bahubhiś cāpi lokān aśnāti mānavaḥ
puṇyaṃ kurvan puṇyavṛttaḥ puṇyasyāntaṃ na gacchati
dharmeṇa vṛttiṃ kurute dharmaṃ caiva praśaṃsati
tad indriyāṇi saṃyamya tapo bhavati nānyathā
tvaṅmāṃsamedomajjāsthirasaraktāś ca dhātavaḥ
sukhaduḥkhe hi saṃtyajya nirdvaṃdvo niṣparigrahaḥ
bāhyasparśeṣu saktātmā vindaty ātmani yat sukham tad brahmayogayuktā[tmā] sukham a[kṣayyam a]śnute
tasya vyādhasya pitarau brāhmaṇaḥ saṃdadarśa ha
gatim iṣṭāṃ tathā jñānam evaṃ ca paravān bhava
tau prasādya dvijaśreṣṭha yac chreyas tad avāpsyasi
mātāpitroḥ sakāśaṃ hi gatvā tvaṃ dvijasattama

tato mṛgān varāhāṃś ca mahiṣāṃś ca mahīpatiḥ jaghāna puruṣavyāghraḥ sa rājā brāhmaṇottama tato 'ham api krīḍārthaṃ rājñaḥ priyahite rataḥ varān nighnan varāhāṃś ca śaraiḥ saṃnataparvabhiḥ vanadurgeṣu dharmajña samaṃ rājñā mahātmanā vyacaraṃ dhanur ādāya mṛgahā lubdhako yathā tatrāśramasamabhyāśe mayā dharmavidāṃ vara mṛgasya vajrasaṃkāśaḥ śaraḥ kṣiptas tadā dvija
bhūtvā ca dhārmiko vyādhaḥ pitroḥ śuśrūṣaṇe rataḥ
vaktum arhasi me brahmann itihāsam imaṃ śubham
purāṅgirā mahābāho cacāra tapa uttamam
krodhaḥ sa tu mahātejā vijñeyaḥ sarvadehiṣu āraṇyāni tathā grāmyān yo dahan saṃprakāśate svayam utpatitaḥ śrīmān vṛddhimān nāma pāvakaḥ
etaiḥ saha mahābhāga tapas tejasvibhir nṛpa
**** **** tadā sā kanyayā saha bhānor aṅgirasasyātha
sa vanhiḥ prathamo nityaṃ devair anviṣyate prabhuḥ

vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ śrutvemāṃ dharmasaṃyuktāṃ dharmarājaḥ kathāṃ śubhām punaḥ papraccha tam ṛṣiṃ mārkaṇḍeyaṃ tapasvinam kumāras tu yathā jāto yathā cāgneḥ suto 'bhavat yathā rudrāc ca saṃbhūto gaṅgāyāṃ kṛttikāsu ca etad icchāmy ahaṃ śrotuṃ kautūhalam atīva me
keśinn anicchatīṃ kanyāṃ vijane varayasva mām mayi śāstari duṣṭānāṃ vajrahaste madodite
mahāmeghapratīkāśaṃ calat pāvakasaṃkulam
sūryācandramasor ghoraṃ dṛśyate pariveṣaṇam etasminn eva rātryante mahad yuddhaṃ tu śaṃsati sarit sindhur apīyaṃ tu pratyasṛgvāhinī bhṛśam śṛgāliny agnivaktrā ca pratyādityaṃ virāviṇī
tavāpy adharmaḥ sumahān bhavitā vai hutāśana
upayantuṃ mahāvīrya pūrvam eva tvam arhasi
ghoram ārtasvaraṃ sarve dṛṣṭvā krauñcaṃ vidāritam
ity etad vividhākāraṃ vṛttaṃ śuklasya pañcamīm tato yuddhaṃ mahad ghoraṃ ṣaṣṭhyāṃ vṛttaṃ janādhipa strīpuṃsor viparītaṃ ca tathā dvaṃdvāni yāni ca grahā dīptā diśaḥ khaṃ ca rarāsa ca mahī bhṛśam
na bālam utsahe hantum iti śakraḥ prabhāṣate te 'bruvan nāsti te vīryaṃ yata evaṃ prabhāṣase
tāsāṃ tad vacanaṃ śrutvā pātukāmaḥ stanān prabhuḥ
ādāya vajraṃ balavān sarvair devagaṇair vṛtaḥ
atha dṛṣṭvā sthitaṃ skandaṃ śvetasyāgre mahāgireḥ
tvattejasāvamaṃsyanti lokā māṃ surasattama

tasya tad vacanaṃ śrutvā skandasya balavṛtrahā ṛṣibhis taṃ mahāsenaṃ hṛṣṭo devagaṇaiḥ saha sauvarṇe ratnakhacite taruṇāruṇabhāsvare divyāsane samāsthāpya vimalaiḥ puṇyavāribhiḥ mahāsenaṃ tadā śakraḥ senāpatye 'bhiṣiktavān
tac chuklaṃ bhakṣayām āsa vahnis tasmād guho 'bhavat
yā ceṣṭā sarvabhūtānāṃ prabhā śāntir balaṃ tathā agratas tasya sā śaktir devānāṃ jayavardhinī
susaṃvṛtaḥ piśācānāṃ gaṇair devagaṇais tathā
evam ukto bhagavatā mahāseno mahābalaḥ dṛṣṭvā kamalapatrākṣīṃ tanumadhyāṃ yaśasvinīm atīva rūpasaṃpannāṃ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitām sarvalakṣaṇasaṃpannāṃ devasenāṃ śucismitām
jagrāha bharataśreṣṭha devasenāpatis tataḥ
**** **** dharmayuktā mahāvratāḥ bhavadīyaikaśaraṇāḥ
varadā sā hi saumyā ca nityaṃ bhūtānukampinī
mithunaṃ vai mahābhāga tatra tad rudrasaṃbhavam
svena svenānuyogena sarve te 'nuyayur haram
evaṃ sarve suragaṇās tadā vai prītamānasāḥ
skandaṃ sahomayā prīto jvalantam iva tejasā
mahākāyaṃ mahārāja satoyam iva toyadam

**** **** āhūya guham ātmajam uvāca sasmitaṃ devo vivitsuḥ putravikramam daurātmyaṃ paśya putra tvaṃ dānavasya durātmanaḥ jahi śīghraṃ durācāraṃ draṣṭum icchāmi te balam ity uktvā bhagavān skandaṃ pariṣvajya maheśvaraḥ ayojayan nigrahārthaṃ mahiṣasya gatāyuṣaḥ tathābhūte tu bhagavān
patatā śirasā tena dvāraṃ ṣoḍaśayojanam parvatābhena pihitaṃ tad agamyaṃ tato 'bhavat uttarāḥ kuravas tena gacchanty adya yathāsukham
dānaveṣu mahārāja tasmin devāsure yudhi
ajayyo yudhi devānāṃ dānavaḥ sumahābalaḥ
bhavato 'nucarair vīra gaṇaiḥ paramabhīṣaṇaiḥ
praviśya cāśramaṃ puṇyam ubhe te paramastriyau
na cānyonyam asūyante kathaṃ vā te sumadhyame
atyālāpam asaṃtoṣaṃ paravyāpārasaṃkathāḥ
anutiṣṭhāmi taṃ satye nityakālam atandritā
ye ca tatra sthitā rājñi tatpakṣīyāḥ kṣitīśvarāḥ teṣāṃ kālaḥ kṣitīśānāṃ prāptaḥ kṛṣṇe durāsadaḥ
duḥkhitā tena duḥkhena sukhena sukhitā tathā
tavādya pṛthivī rājan nikhilā sāgarāmbarā saparvatavanākārā sahasthāvarajaṅgamā
**** **** dṛśyate sā tavādya vai śatravas tava rājendra
mattabhramarasaṃjuṣṭaṃ nīlakaṇṭharavākulam saptacchadasamākīrṇaṃ puṃnāgabakulair yutam
bhīmārjunayamaiḥ sārdhaṃ sarābhyāśe tadāvasat
nyavedayaṃs tato rājñe gandharvās tatra bhārata rakṣitaṃ bahubhiḥ śūrai rājan dvaitavanaṃ saraḥ
vayam atra yathāprītāḥ krīḍiṣyāmo nirantaram
sāmnaiva tatra vikrāntā mā sāhasam iti prabho

tena muktāḥ śarā ghorāḥ sūryaraśmisamaprabhāḥ viyat saṃchādayām āsur na vavau tatra mārutaḥ hastyārohā hatāḥ petur hastibhiḥ saha bhārata hayārohāś ca sahayai rathaiś ca rathinas tathā pattayaś ca yathā petur viśastāḥ śaravṛṣṭibhiḥ
anye saṃpūrṇayām āsuś cakre cākṣau tathāpare
aṃsāvalambitadhanur dhāvamāno mahābalaḥ
tasya bāhū mahārāja baddhvā rajjvā mahāratham āropya svaṃ mahārāja citraseno nanāda ha
mahatā hi prayatnena saṃnahya gajavājibhiḥ
dīnān duryodhanasyāsmān draṣṭukāmasya durmateḥ
rakṣaṇīyā mahābāho maivaṃ vada mahāmate
paraiḥ paribhave prāpte vayaṃ pañcottaraṃ śatam parasparavirodhe tu vayaṃ pañca śataṃ tu te
dhṛtarāṣṭrasya putrāṇāṃ vimalāḥ kāñcanadhvajāḥ sasvanān adhirohadhvaṃ nityasajjān imān rathān
ete śataṃ vayaṃ pañca yāvad vayaṃ parasparam parais tu paribhūtānāṃ vayaṃ pañca śatottaram
paraiḥ paribhave prāpte vayaṃ pañcottaraṃ śatam parasparavirodhe tu vayaṃ pañcaiva te śatam
yathāsau mṛduyuktena muñce bhīma sakauravān
varapradānaṃ sumahad yācakasya prakīrtitam
āyudhāni ca divyāni vividhāni samādadhuḥ
visarjayata rājānaṃ bhrātaraṃ me suyodhanam
tān samāpatato rājan divyāstrair abhivarṣayan
citrasenas tathovāca sakhāyaṃ yudhi viddhi mām
samastho viṣamasthāṃs tān drakṣyāmīty anavasthitān
neṣyāmy enaṃ durātmānaṃ pākaśāsanaśāsanāt
devalokaṃ tato gatvā gandharvaiḥ sahitās tadā nyavedayac ca tat sarvaṃ citrasenaḥ śatakratoḥ

citrasenas tadā vākyam uvāca prauḍhayā girā muñcadhvaṃ sānujāmātyaṃ sadāraṃ ca suyodhanam gandharvās tu vacaḥ śrutvā citrasenasya vai drutam rājānaṃ mokṣayām āsur baddhaṃ nigaḍabandhanaiḥ sadāraṃ sānugāmātyaṃ bāṇajālamaye vane luṭhantaś cāpi te sarve yudhiṣṭhirasamīpataḥ patitā lajjitāś caiva tasthuś cādhomukhās tadā yudhiṣṭhiro 'pi dayayā tān samīkṣya tathāgatān
abhivādya dharmaputraṃ gatendriya ivāturaḥ
asamarthās tatas tāṃs tu pratiyoddhuṃ viyadgatān
ity abruvan raṇān muktā dharmarājam upāgatāḥ
ākāśacāriṇo vīrā nadanto jaladā iva
parasparaṃ samāgamya prītyā paramayā yutāḥ
kāraṇair asmy abhihitaḥ śatrubhir vai vimānitaḥ akāraṇe 'smy abhijitaḥ śatrubhir vai vimānitaḥ
śatrūṇāṃ śokakṛd rājan suhṛdāṃ śokanāśanaḥ
tad alaṃ duḥkhitān etān kartuṃ sarvān narādhipa
alpatvaṃ ca tathā buddheḥ kāryāṇām avivekitām
tad alaṃ te mahābāho buddhiḥ prāyopaveśane
adhvaryavo dānavānāṃ karma prāvartayaṃs tataḥ
tasmin yajñe dānavānāṃ vartamāne narādhipa
kṛtyāṃ sutīkṣṇadantāgrāṃ dīptāṃ * * [śi]roruhām
dṛḍham enaṃ pariṣvajya pṛṣṭvā ca kuśalaṃ tadā
yaiḥ surāpi ghṛṇāṃ tyaktvā yotsyante saha vairibhiḥ
saṃsmṛtya tāni vākyāni dānavoktāni durmatiḥ
haṃsapaṅktisamākīrṇā bhramatsārasaśobhitā
pratyudgatāś ca kurubhir nāgarair brāhmaṇair api
brāhmaṇaiḥ sahito dhīmān ye tatrāsan samāgatāḥ
prāptān sarvān nṛpān dṛṣṭvā dhārtarāṣṭro mahāmanāḥ
snātaś cāvabhṛtho rājā dhārtarāṣṭro mahāmanāḥ
pravartito hy ayaṃ rājñā dhārtarāṣṭreṇa dhīmatā
rādheyasaubalādīn vai dhārtarāṣṭro mahīpatiḥ
kīlālajaṃ na khādeyaṃ kariṣye cāsuravratam nāstīti naiva vakṣyāmi yācito yena kena cit
satataṃ prīyamāṇo vai devinā saubalena ca
arjunaḥ tvadadhīnā vayaṃ rājan mā tvam asmin vicāraya yatraiva manyase pārtha tatra gacchāmahe vayam
cirasya jātadharmajñaṃ sāsūyam iva te tadā
karmabhūmir iyaṃ tāta phalabhūmir asau parā
mūle siktasya vṛkṣasya phalaṃ śākhāsu dṛśyate
vindate sukham atyantam iha loke paratra ca
rājan pratyakṣam evaitad dṛśyate lokasākṣikam
**** **** śāstrārthakuśalā bhuvi tathaiva pratipadyante
tad duṣkarataraṃ dānaṃ tasmād dānaṃ viśiṣyate
śraddhayā vidhivat pātre dattasyānto na vidyate
deśe kāle ca pātre ca mudgalaḥ śraddhayānvitaḥ vrīhidroṇaṃ pradāyātha paramaṃ padam āptavān
muniḥ sa tu mahārāja mahātmā niyatavrataḥ
śeṣe* * * *lipya hasan gāyan pradhāvati nṛtyate dhāvate caiva buddhyā tat krośate yathā
pāvanaṃ paramaṃ manye darśanaṃ te mahāmune
viśuddhasattvasaṃpanno na tvad anyo 'sti kaś cana dharmo 'pi dhāryate brahman dhṛtiyuktātmanā tvayā
nandanādīni ramyāṇi tatrodyānāni mudgala sarvakāmaphalair vṛkṣaiḥ śobhitāni samantataḥ
devānām api maudgalya kāṅkṣitā sā parā gatiḥ na duḥkham asukhaṃ cāpi rāgadveṣau kuto mune
tatra gatvā nivartante na budhā yoginas tathā

mudgala uvāca mahāntas tu amī doṣās tvayā svargasya kīrtitāḥ nirdoṣa eva yas tv anyo lokaṃ taṃ pravadasva me brahmaṇaḥ sadanād ūrdhvaṃ tad viṣṇoḥ paramaṃ padam śuddhaṃ sanātanaṃ jyotiḥ paraṃ brahmeti yad viduḥ na tatra vipra gacchanti puruṣā viṣayātmakāḥ dambhalobhamahākrodhamohadrohair abhidrutāḥ nirmamā nirahaṃkārā nirdvaṃdvāḥ saṃyatendriyāḥ dhyānayogaparāś caiva tatra gacchanti mānavāḥ
nigṛhītendriyagrāmaṃ samayojayad ātmani yuktacittaṃ tathātmānaṃ yuyoja parameśvare
vaśyendriyaḥ sabhyarucir varoru vṛddhopasevī gurupūjakaś ca
suvismitaḥ parvatavāsanidro na cāpi jānīma taveha nātham
koṭikāśyo jagāmāśu sindhurājaniṣevitam
api tvaṃ kuśalī rājan sahāmātyaḥ sahaprajaḥ kaccid ekaḥ śibīn āḍhyān sauvīrān saha sindhubhiḥ anutiṣṭhasi dharmeṇa ye cānye viditās tvayā

draupadī naivaṃ vada mahābāho nyāyyaṃ tvaṃ na ca manyase pāṇḍūnāṃ dhārtarāṣṭrāṇāṃ svasā caiva kanīyasī duḥśalā nāma tasyās tvaṃ bhartā rājakulodbhavaḥ mama bhrātā ca nyāyyena tvayā rakṣyā mahāratha dharmiṣṭhānāṃ kule jāto na dharmaṃ tvam avekṣase ity uktaḥ sindhurājo 'pi vākyam uttaram abravīt rājñāṃ dharmaṃ na jānīṣe striyo ratnāni caiva hi sādhāraṇāni loke 'smin pravadanti manīṣiṇaḥ svasā ca svasriyā caiva bhrātṛbhāryā tathaiva ca saṃgṛhṇanti ca rājānas tāś ca tatra nṛpodbhavāḥ
yadā draṣṭāsy arjunaṃ vīryaśālinaṃ tadā svabuddhiṃ pratininditāsi
kenātmanāśāya vadāpanītā chidraṃ samāsādya narendrapatnī paryākulā sā tu samīkṣya sūtam abhyāpatantaṃ drutam indrasenam uro ghnatī kaṣṭataraṃ tadānīm uccaiḥ pracukrośa hṛteti devī
purā hi pārthāś ca hatau ca kāpilam prasicyate kṣīradhārā yatadhvam
bandhupriyaḥ śastrabhṛtāṃ variṣṭho mahāhaveṣv aprativāryavīryaḥ
**** **** śūraḥ kṛtajño dṛḍhasauhṛdaś ca mahāhave yaś ca ripupramāthī

tadā tu saṃpravṛtte tu tumule yodhasaṃkṣaye aṅgārakaḥ kuñjaraś ca saṃjayo guptakas tathā śatruṃjayaḥ suprabuddho śubhakṛd bhramakā api śūraḥ parākuḥ kuhako dvādaśaite mahārathāḥ subalāḥ saindhavāś caiva trigartāś ca mahābalāḥ ikṣvākuyodhāḥ prabalā rathinaḥ saha yad dvipāḥ koṭīkṛtya ca pārthaṃ tu śaravarṣair avākiran arjunas tu tataḥ kruddhaḥ śaravarṣaṃ nihatya ca
vidrāvyamāne sainye tu makarair arṇavo yathā
rathāt praskandya padbhyāṃ vai palāyanaparo 'bhavat
**** **** arjunena ca dhīmatā saindhavo 'pi ca pāpātmā
salatābhiḥ *saṃvṛte kirīṭaṃ ratnabhāsvaram āpe vidravya dhāvantaṃ nilīyantaṃ vanāntaram bhīmasenas tu taṃ kakṣe līyamānaṃ bhayākulam mārgamāṇo 'vatīryāśu rathād ratnavibhūṣitāt
taṃ tathā na viceṣṭantam abudhvāpa vṛkodaraḥ
sa mu[mo]caivam uktas tu bhīmas taṃ bandhanāt tadā mumoca taṃ mahāpāpaṃ jayadratham acetasam
nirāhāro jitakrodhaḥ pādāṅguṣṭhāgraviṣṭhitaḥ
mama pāśupatāstreṇa guptaṃ sarvatra sarvadā badaryāṃ taptatapasaṃ nārāyaṇasahāyakam ajitaṃ sarvalokānāṃ

tasmāt tvaṃ pārtharahitān pāṇḍavān vārayiṣyasi ekadā puruṣavyāghra mayā dattaṃ varaṃ tava na śakyate tena jetuṃ tridaśair api duḥsahaḥ kaḥ punar mānuṣo bhāvo raṇe pārthaṃ vijeṣyati tam ekaṃ varjayitvā tu sarvaṃ yaudhiṣṭhiraṃ balam vaiśaṃpāyana uvāca ity evam uktvā nṛpatiṃ sarvapāpaharo haraḥ umāpatiḥ paśupatir yajñahā tripurārdanaḥ vāmanair vikaṭaiḥ kubjair ugraśravaṇadarśanaiḥ vṛtaḥ pāriṣadair ghorair nānāpraharaṇodyataiḥ tryambako rājaśārdūla bhaganetranipātanaḥ umāsahāyo bhagavāṃs tatraivāntaradhīyata
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca drupadasya sutā hy eṣā vedimadhyāt samutthitā ayonijā mahābhāgā snuṣā pāṇḍor mahātmanaḥ
vyasanaṃ pitṛśokādi bhāryāyā haraṇaṃ mahat pitur nideśād vasato vane 'sya svargataḥ pitā
tatas taṃ balavān rāmo ripuṃ bhāryāpahāriṇam saha vānarasainyena jaghāna raṇamūrdhani
tvayā pratyakṣato dṛṣṭaṃ yathā sarvam aśeṣataḥ
śṛṇu rājan purā vṛttam itihāsaṃ purātanam sabhāryeṇa yathā prāptaṃ duḥkhaṃ rāmeṇa bhārata
vimānaṃ puṣpakaṃ nāma kāmagaṃ ca dadau prabhuḥ yakṣāṇām ādhipatyaṃ ca rājarājatvam eva ca

vibhīṣaṇadaśagrīvau tepāte uttamaṃ tapaḥ daśa varṣasahasrāṇi vāyubhakṣau paraṃtapau sarake daśa varṣāṇi aṣṭa varṣāṇi sāgare ūṣur varṣasahasrāṇi gokarṇe 'smiṃs tapovane ceratus tṛṇaparṇāṇi mṛgaiḥ sārdham ariṃdamau bādaryās tv āśrame rājan tepāte paramaṃ tapaḥ ārādhayantau śaucena brahmāṇaṃ sutapasvinau
varaṃ vṛṇīṣva bhadraṃ te prīto 'smīti punaḥ punaḥ
tato devāḥ samāgamya sarve śakrapurogamāḥ agnau vākyaṃ samādhāya brahmaṇe te 'bhyavādayan tataḥ kṛśānur bhagavān bhagavantaṃ pitāmaham praṇamyovāca lokeśaṃ kṛtāñjalir idaṃ vacaḥ
te tathoktā bhagavatā tat pratiśrutya śāsanam sasṛjur devagandharvāḥ putrān vānararūpiṇaḥ

ṛṣayaś ca mahātmānaḥ siddhāś ca saha kiṃnaraiḥ cāraṇāś cāsṛjan ghorān vānarān vanacāriṇaḥ te sṛṣṭā bahusāhasrā daśagrīvavadhe ratāḥ aprameyabalāḥ śūrā vānarāḥ kāmarūpiṇaḥ yasya devasya yad rūpaṃ veṣas tejaś ca yadvidham ajāyanta samās tena tasya tasya sutās tadā
janmādi caritaṃ sarvaṃ vivāhādi mayā śrutam
vṛṣṭir jayanto vijayaḥ siddhārtho rāṣṭravardhanaḥ aśoko dharmapālaś ca sumantraś cāṣṭamo 'bhavat eteṣṭau daśarathāmātyāḥ
śva eṣa puṣyo bhavitā yatra rāmaḥ suto mayā yauvarājye 'bhiṣektavyaḥ pauraiś ca saha mantribhiḥ
pṛthivyāṃ rājarājo 'smi cāturvarṇyasya rakṣitā yas te 'bhilaṣitaḥ kāmo brūhi kalyāṇi māciram
nava pañca ca varṣāṇi daṇḍakāraṇyam āśritaḥ cīrājinajaṭādhārī rāmo vasatu tāpasaḥ
saṃskṛtya pitaraṃ vṛttaṃ bharato dharmavatsalaḥ

uvāca prāñjalir bhūtvā praṇipatya raghūttamam śaśaṃsa maraṇaṃ rājñaḥ so 'nāthāṃś caiva kośalān nātha tvaṃ pratipadyasva svarājyam iti coktavān tasya tad vacanaṃ śrutvā rāmaḥ paramaduḥkhitaḥ cakāra devakalpasya pituḥ snātvodakakriyām abravīc ca tadā rāmo bharataṃ bhrātṛvatsalam pāduke me bhaviṣyete rājyagopte paraṃtapa evam astv iti taṃ prāha bharataḥ praṇatas tadā
tena śūrpaṇakhā dṛṣṭvā sahasrāṇi caturdaśa hatāni yudhi rāmeṇa śarais tīkṣṇaiḥ padātinā
tato jñātivadhaṃ śrutvā rāvaṇaḥ kālanoditaḥ rāmasya vadham ākāṅkṣan mārīcaṃ manasāgamat
samāsenaiva kāryāṇi krodhamarṣasamanvitaḥ
pibeyaṃ vā viṣaṃ ghoraṃ tyajāmy ātmānam adya vai
śuṣyet toyanidhau toyaṃ candraḥ śītāṃśutāṃ tyajet uṣṇāṃśutvam atho jahyād ādityo vahnir uṣṇatām
krodhāt prasphuramāṇauṣṭhī vidhunvānā karau muhuḥ
abhidudrāva saṃkruddhaḥ patagendraṃ daśānanaḥ
evaṃ hṛtvā rāmapatnīṃ rāvaṇo 'gāt svakāṃ purīm dadarśātha purīṃ ramyāṃ bahudvārāṃ manoramām prākāravaprasaṃbādhāṃ nirmitāṃ viśvakarmaṇā praviveśa purīṃ laṅkāṃ sasīto rākṣaseśvaraḥ
aho dhanyaḥ subhāgyo 'sau jaṭāyur iti bhāratīm divi śṛṇvan gataḥ siddhiṃ siddhānām api durlabhām
śakto dharṣayituṃ vīra sumitrānandivardhana
tena tvaṃ saha saṃgamya duḥkhamūlaṃ nivedaya samānaśīlo bhavataḥ sāhāyaṃ sa kariṣyati
tataḥ sītāṃ hṛtāṃ śrutvā sugrīvo vālinā kṛtam duḥkham ākhyātavān sarvaṃ rāmāyāmitatejase
śrūyate dāśarathī rāmo vane pitur anujñayā
ity uktas tu jahāsoccaiḥ sugrīvo bhrātaraṃ prati hetumad vacanaṃ bhrātre provācedaṃ mahātmane
prajñānārthaṃ tadā rāmo niścitya manasā tadā
mokṣitā tvāṃ bhayād asmād rāmaḥ śatruniṣūdanaḥ
vyavasthāpya kathaṃ cit sā viṣādād atimohitā
**** **** āyātā vānarās tadā diśas tisro vānarendrāḥ
kumudo 'pi mahāvīryaḥ plavagarṣabhasattama
evam uktaḥ samudreṇa rāmo vākyam athābravīt
rākṣasaṃ sānubandhaṃ tu mama bhāryāpahāriṇam
draṣṭuṃ senām anuprāptau rāvaṇapriyakāriṇau
pralambabāhūrukarajaṅghāntaravilambinām ṛkṣāṇāṃ dhūmravarṇānāṃ tisraḥ koṭyo vyavasthitāḥ
rākṣasānāṃ balair ghoraiḥ piśācānāṃ ca saṃvṛtaḥ yuddhaśāstravidhānajña uśanā iva cāparaḥ
kṛttottamāṅgaṃ sahyaṃ tad anayānugatāsavām papāta rakṣaḥ sahasā vātarugṇa iva drumaḥ
śirasy abhyahanat pūrvaṃ kālayā ca punaḥ punaḥ tṛṇarājena mahatā lohasārathibhedinā
vegena mahatāviṣṭo rākṣasānāṃ mahad balam yodhayām āsa rājendra śilāvarṣaiḥ samantataḥ
śailavṛkṣāyudhā nādān amuñcan bhīṣaṇās tataḥ

gacchan saṃbodhayām āsa prahāreṇālpacetasam tataḥ saṃlabdhasaṃjñas tu hṛtvā karṇoṣṭanāsikām sugrīvaḥ kumbhakarṇasya jagāma harivāhinīm atha kruddhaḥ kumbhakarṇo miśritān harirākṣasān bhakṣayām āsa balavān mamarda padayor api bhakṣyamāṇān harīn sarvān kumbhakarṇena rakṣasā
vegena mahatāviṣṭas tiṣṭha tiṣṭheti cābravīt
saumitrir adbhutaṃ dṛṣṭvā krūraḥ samarakovidaḥ
