klībaṃ vai sārathiṃ kṛtvā niryāto nagarād bahiḥ
te hi naḥ pratisaṃyātuṃ saṃgrāme na hi śaknuyuḥ katham ekataras teṣāṃ samastān yodhayet kurūn
eko 'smān anuyāty eṣa nānyo loke dhanaṃjayāt sārathiṃ hy uttaraṃ kṛtvā svayaṃ yoddhum ihecchati

duryodhana uvācedaṃ sainikān rathasattamān arjuno vāsudevo vā rāmaḥ pradyumna eva vā te hi naḥ pratisaṃyoddhuṃ saṃgrāme na hi śaknuyuḥ katham ekataras teṣāṃ samastān yodhayet kurūn anyo vai klībaveṣeṇa yady āgacched gavāṃ padam śarais tīkṣṇair arpayitvā pātayiṣyāmi bhūtale
virāṭaputraṃ bībhatsur balavān arimardanaḥ iti vādinam evāśu dhāvantaṃ tarasāgrahīt
uttaraḥ suvarṇamaṇimuktānāṃ yad yad icchasi dadmi te hastino 'śvān rathān gāvaḥ striyaś ca samalaṃkṛtāḥ aśvānāṃ tu sahasre dve śubhrāṇāṃ hemamālinām sarvalakṣaṇayuktānāṃ muñca māṃ tvaṃ bṛhannaḍe
**** **** śreṣṭhasya rajatasya ca dadāmi śataniṣkaṃ te muñca māṃ tvaṃ bṛhannale

mātsyasya putro bālo 'haṃ tena cāsmi sukhoṣitaḥ mātṛpārśvaśayāno 'ham aspṛṣṭātapavāyumān adṛṣṭabalayuddho 'haṃ kutas te kuravaḥ kutaḥ mātṛpārśvaṃ gamiṣyāmi muñca māṃ tvaṃ bṛhannale pralayārṇavasaṃkāśaṃ dṛśyate kauravaṃ balam strīṇāṃ madhye 'ham ajñānād vīryaśauryāṅkitāṃ giram uktavān madagarveṇa ko jetuṃ śaknuyāt kurūn amuktvā vā yadi nayer mariṣyāmi tavāgrataḥ

arjunaḥ saṃyacchāmi hayān yasya na sa bhītaḥ palāyati ādadānaḥ kimarthaṃ tvaṃ palāyanaparobhavaḥ yudhyasva kauravaiḥ sārdhaṃ vijayas te bhaviṣyati yasya yantāsmy ahaṃ yuddhe saṃyacchāmi hayottamān rājño vā rājaputrasya tasya nityaṃ jayo dhruvaḥ sarvathottara yudhyasva yantrā sākaṃ mayā kurūn jitvā mahīṃ yaśaḥ prāpya bhokṣyase sakalām imām hato 'pi prāpsyase svargaṃ na śreyas te palāyanam adya sarvān kurūñ jitvā yathā jayam avāpsyasi tathāhaṃ prayatiṣye 'tra sahāyo 'tra mato hy aham
kathaṃ puruṣaśārdūla śatrumadhye viṣīdasi
śūrān samaracaṇḍāṃś ca nayiṣye yamasādanam
tam āropya rathopasthe vilapantaṃ dhanaṃjayaḥ gāṇḍīvaṃ dhanur ādātum upāyāt tāṃ śamīṃ prati uttaraṃ sa samāśvāsya kṛtvā yantāram arjunaḥ

devavratenaivam ukte vacane hitakāriṇā nadīja laṅkeśavanāriketur nagāhvayo nāma nagārisūnuḥ gatyā sureśaḥ kva cid aṅganeva gurur babhāṣe vacanaṃ tad eva ity uktvā saṃjñayā droṇas tūṣṇīm āsīd viśāṃ pate bhāradvājavacaḥ śrutvā gāṅgeyaḥ saṃjñayābravīt atītaṃ cakram asmākaṃ viṣayāntaram āgatāḥ atītaḥ samayaś cokto hy asmābhir yaḥ sabhātale na bhayaṃ śatrutaḥ kāryaṃ śaṅkāṃ tyaja nararṣabha duryodhanam athālokya saṃjñayā droṇa abravīt
nadīja laṅkeśavanāriketur nagāhvayo nāma nagārisūnuḥ eṣo 'ṅganāveṣadharaḥ kirīṭī jitvāva yaṃ neṣyati cādya gā vaḥ
ity evaṃ vādinaṃ droṇaṃ karṇaḥ kruddho 'bravīd vacaḥ
ehi bhūmiṃjayāruhya vairāṭe mahatīṃ śamīm
naibhiḥ kāmam ahaṃ kartuṃ karma vaijayikaṃ tv iha atisūkṣmāṇi hrasvāni sarvāṇi ca mṛdūni ca āyudhāni mahābāho tavaitāni paraṃtapa
spṛśāmīha śarīraṃ ced apy asyāṃ śokavarjitaḥ
vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ tam uvāca tataḥ śūraḥ pārthaḥ parapuraṃjayaḥ dāyādaṃ sarvamatsyānāṃ kule jātaṃ viśāradam jānāmi tvāṃ mahāprājña śubhaṃ jātyā kulena ca kathaṃ nu pāpakaṃ karma brūyāṃ tvāhaṃ paraṃtapa
so 'pahṛtya mahārhāṇi dhanūṃṣi pṛthuvakṣasām pariveṣṭanapatrāṇi vimucya samupānayat
tad upaśrutya śatrughnaḥ sa tadārjunam abravīt sārathe kim idaṃ śete nāgendro vāpi vā dhanuḥ āmīlya punar unmīlya spṛṣṭvā spṛṣṭvā cakāra saḥ samyag dṛṣṭvā tadāśvastaḥ
na dṛṣṭaṃ na śrutaṃ citraṃ dhanuṣo rūpam īdṛśam
hemapuṅkho gārdhapatraḥ śātravāṇāṃ bhayaṃkaraḥ

uttaraḥ yasyāpidhāne dṛśyante śārdūlāḥ kāñcanāḥ śubhāḥ āśīviṣasamasparśā gatau cājihmagā dṛḍhāḥ kuśāgnipratitaptāni bhānumanti bṛhanti ca (20a)      bindavaś cātra sauvarṇā maṇiprotāḥ samantataḥ śaśisūryaprabhāḥ pṛṣṭhe bhānti rukmapariṣkṛtāḥ pughpāṇy atra suvarṇāni śatapatrāṇi bhāgaśaḥ vismāpanīyarūpaṃ ca bhīmaṃ bhīmapradarśanam nīlotpalanibhaṃ kasya śātakumbhapariṣkṛtam (21ab)     ṛṣabhā yasya sauvarṇāḥ pṛṣṭhe tiṣṭhanti śṛṅgiṇaḥ tālapramāṇaṃ kasyedaṃ maṇirukmavibhūṣitam hāṭakasya suvarṇasya yasmiñ śākhāmṛgā daśa durānamaṃ mahad dīrghaṃ surūpaṃ duṣpradharṣaṇam kasyedam īdṛśaṃ citraṃ dhanuḥ sarve ca daṃsitāḥ candrārkavimalā bhāsaḥ surūpāḥ supradarśanāḥ haṃsāḥ pṛṣṭhe śritā yasya kuśāgnipratimārciṣaḥ śārṅgagāṇḍīvasadṛśaṃ kasyedaṃ sārathe dhanuḥ caturthaṃ kāñcanavapur bhāti vidyudgaṇopamam nīlotpalitam acchidraṃ jātarūpaprabhaṃ dhanuḥ matsyā yasya hiraṇyasya pṛṣṭhe tiṣṭhanti saṃcitāḥ śakracāpopamaṃ divyaṃ kasyedaṃ sārathe dhanuḥ ucchritaṃ phaṇivad dīrghaṃ sāravattvād durānamam (20c)      sahasragodhāḥ sauvarṇā dvīpinaś ca caturdaśa barhiṇaś cātra sauvarṇāḥ śatacandrārkabhūṣaṇāḥ jāmbūnadavicitrāṅgaṃ kasyedaṃ pañcamaṃ dhanuḥ (25ab)     kasyeme kṣuranārācāḥ sahasraṃ lomavāpinaḥ pakṣiṇas tīkṣṇatuṇḍāgrāḥ kasyeme niśitāḥ śarāḥ (26ab)     vipāṭāḥ pṛthavaḥ kasya gṛdhrapatrārdhavājitāḥ (27c,28ab) varāhakarṇās tīkṣṇāgrāḥ kasyeme rucirāḥ śarāḥ vajrāśanisamasparśā vaiśvānarasamārciṣaḥ suvarṇapuṅkhās tīkṣṇāgrāḥ kasya saptaśataṃ śarāḥ (30a)      kasyāyaṃ sāyako dīrgho gavye kośe ca daṃsitaḥ kasya daṇḍo dṛḍhaḥ ślakṣṇo ruciro 'yaṃ prakāśate (30c)      vaiyāghrakośaḥ kasyāyaṃ divyaḥ khaḍgo mahāprabhaḥ (27ab)     kasyāyam asir āvāpe pañcaśārdūlalakṣaṇaḥ (32ab)     kasyāyaṃ nirmalaḥ khaḍgo dvīpicarmādhivāsitaḥ nīlotpalasavarṇo 'yaṃ kasya khaḍgaḥ pṛthur mahān mṛgendracarmāvasitas tīkṣṇadhāraḥ sunirmalaḥ ṛṣabhājinakośas tu kasya khaḍgo mahān ayam yasyāpidhāne dṛśyante sūryāḥ pañca pariṣkṛtāḥ (32a)      kasyāyaṃ vipulaḥ khaḍgaḥ śṛṅgatsarumanoharaḥ nihitaḥ pārṣate kośe tailadhautaḥ samāhitaḥ (33c)      pramāṇavarṇayuktaś ca kasya khaḍgo mahān ayam naitena pratividdhaḥ sañ jīvet kaś cana kuñjaraḥ
vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ abhedyam ajaraṃ śrīmad divyam acchedyam avraṇam mṛdvyā pratyāyayan vācā bhītaṃ śaṅkāvaśaṃ gatam
citram uccāvacair varṇaiḥ ślakṣṇam āyatam avraṇam
tasmāc ca varuṇād agniḥ premṇā prāhṛtya tac chubham agninā pratibhāvyena dattaṃ pārthāya gāṇḍivam
tālapramāṇaṃ bhīmasya maṇirukmavibhūṣitam durānamaṃ mahad dīrghaṃ surūpaṃ duṣpradharṣaṇam
pṛṣṭhe vibhaktāḥ śobhante kuśāgnipratibhāvitāḥ ṛṣabhāś cāpi sauvarṇāḥ pṛṣṭhe tiṣṭhanti śṛṅgiṇaḥ
tapanīyavicitraṃ ca vairāṭe nākulaṃ dhanuḥ
ghorāgrā dīrgharūpāś ca girīṇām api dāraṇāḥ

vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ kvāsau pracchannavāsānāṃ pāṇḍavānāṃ mahātmanām nyastāny atra mahārhāṇi vratasiddhim upeyuṣām ity uttaraṃ tu tat sarvam arjunas tattvato 'bravīt (50a)     hāridravarṇaṃ rājñaś ca kauravyasya mahātmanaḥ vipāṭā bhīmasenasya girīṇām api dāraṇāḥ suprabhāḥ sumahākāyās tīkṣṇāgrāḥ sukṛtā dṛḍhāḥ bhīmena prahitā hy ete vāraṇānāṃ nivāraṇāḥ suvarṇavarṇā rucirāḥ kāladaṇḍopamāḥ śubhāḥ (50c)     nakulasya śarā hy ete vajrāśanisamaprabhāḥ yāṃś ca tvaṃ pṛcchase dīrghān samadhārān samāhitān (52d)     varāhakarṇās tīkṣṇāgrāḥ sahadevasya te śarāḥ (54a)     yas tv ayaṃ sāyako divyo gavye kośe ca daṃsitaḥ (54d)     pārthasyāstram idaṃ ghoraṃ sarvabhārasahaṃ mahat yas tv ayaṃ nirmalaḥ khaḍgo dvīpicarmaṇi daṃsitaḥ rājño yudhiṣṭhirasyāyaṃ kuntīputrasya dhīmataḥ (55a,50d) vaiyāghrakośo bhīmasya pañcaśārdūlalakṣaṇaḥ vāraṇānāṃ sudṛptānāṃ śikṣitaḥ skandhaśātane nīlotpalasavarṇābhaḥ khaḍgaḥ pārthasya dhīmataḥ mṛgendracarmapihitas tīkṣṇadhāraḥ samāhitaḥ darśanīyaḥ sutīkṣṇāgraḥ kuntīputrasya dhīmataḥ (54c)     arjunasyaiṣa nistriṃśaḥ parasainyāgradūṣaṇaḥ (57a)     yas tv ayaṃ pārṣate kośe prakṣipto ruciratsaruḥ (57c)     nakulasyaiṣa nistriṃśo vaiśvānarasamaprabhaḥ (58a)     yas tv ayaṃ piṅgalaḥ khaḍgaś citro maṇimayatsaruḥ (58cd)    sahadevasya khaḍgo 'yaṃ bhārasāho 'tidaṃsitaḥ bhīmasyāyaṃ mahādaṇḍaḥ sarvāmitravināśanaḥ bhedato hy arjunas tūrṇaṃ kathayām āsa tattvataḥ āyudhāni kalāpāṃś ca nistriṃśāṃś cātulaprabhān
vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ etasminn antare pārthaṃ mūḍhātmā na vyajānata virāṭaputraḥ pramukhe papraccha punar eva tu

dharmaśīlaś ca dharmātmā dharmavān dharmavit sudhīḥ dharmādhyakṣo dharmavrato dharmajño dharmamūrtimān dharmaniṣṭho dharmakartā dharmagoptā sudharmakṛt satyārjavakṣamādhāro ghṛṇī dharmaparāyaṇaḥ bhīmasenārjunau cāpi sarve te mātulā mama nakulaḥ sahadevo vā sarvāstrakuśalo raṇe

mā bhais tvaṃ rājaśārdūla sarvaṃ te varṇayāmy aham nātra bhetavyam adyāpi rājaputra yathā tathā vayaṃ te pāṇḍavā nāma vanavāsasya pāragāḥ atīte dvādaśe varṣe channavāsam ihoṣitāḥ tasmād aśaṅkitamanāḥ śṛṇuṣva mahitottara
śrutvaitad vacanaṃ jiṣṇor vismayasphāritekṣaṇaḥ paśyann animiṣaḥ pārthaṃ śanair vācam uvāca ha
tāni loke pravṛttāni vairāṭe śṛṇu tattvataḥ
guṇato daśa nāmāni samavetāni pāṇḍave caranti loke khyātāni viditāni mamānagha
kirīṭaṃ sūryasaṃkāśaṃ bhrājate me śirogatam raṇamadhye rathasthasya sūryapāvakasaṃnibham
yo mamāṅge vraṇaṃ kuryān mama jyeṣṭhasya paśyataḥ yudhiṣṭhirasya rudhiraṃ darśayed vā kadā cana parābhavam ahaṃ tasya kule kuryāṃ na saṃśayaḥ
acchedyaṃ ruciraṃ citraṃ jāmbūnadapariṣkṛtam indradattam anāhāryaṃ
bhujau me bhavataḥ saṃkhye parasainyavināśane
sthito 'smi yattaḥ saṃgrāme vairāṭe vyetu te bhayam etac chrutvā prahṛṣṭātmā vismayotphullalocanaḥ
tasya tad vacanaṃ śrutvā vairāṭiḥ pārṣatottama prahṛṣṭaromā hṛṣṭo 'bhūd vismayotphullalocanaḥ taṃ prekṣya vai mahātmānam arjunaṃ matsyanandanaḥ prāñjaliś cābhivādyātha idaṃ vacanam abravīt

neyaṃ pratijñā pūrṇā me harṣaś cārjuna jāyate devendratanayasyeha sārathiḥ syāṃ mahāmṛdhe iti pūrvaṃ kṛtāsmābhiḥ pratijñā yuddhadurmada pratijñā mama saṃpūrṇā tava sārathyakāraṇāt vismito 'smi mahāsattva sarvaśatrūn vināśaya tvadvākyajalasaṃsiktam utpalaṃ hṛdayaṃ mama gharmābhitaptaṃ vijale mlānapadmam iva hrade
gāṇḍīvaṃ devadattaṃ ca śarān kanakabhūṣitān
vaiśaṃpāyana uvāca arjunasya vacaḥ śrutvā tvarāvān uttaras tadā arjuna uvāca
śarajālavitānāḍhyam ākṣveḷitamahāsvanam
bahunā kiṃ pralāpena śṛṇu me caramaṃ vacaḥ nāhaṃ bibhemi kaunteya sākṣād api śatakratoḥ yamapāśikuberebhyo droṇabhīṣmaśatād api

urvaśīśāpasaṃbhūtaṃ klaibyaṃ māṃ samupasthitam prāptavān urvaśīṃ dṛṣṭvā sudharmāyām ahaṃ tadā nṛtyantīṃ paramaṃ rūpaṃ bibhratīṃ vajrisaṃnidhau apaśyaṃ tām animiṣaṃ kūṭasthām anvayasya me rātrau samāgatā mahyaṃ śayanaṃ rantum icchayā ahaṃ tām abhivādyaiva mātṛsatkāram ācaram sā ca mām aśapat kruddhā śikhaṇḍī tvaṃ bhaver iti śrutvā tam indro mām āha mā bhais tvaṃ pārtha ṣaṇḍataḥ upakāro bhavet tubhyam ajñātavasatau purā itīndro mām anugrāhya tataḥ preṣitavān vṛṣā tad idaṃ samanuprāptaṃ vrataṃ cīrṇaṃ mayānagha
aśvā hy ete mahābāho tavaivāhavadurjayāḥ yogyā rathavare yuktāḥ prāṇavanto jitaśramāḥ
sarvaśatrubhir āyātair devarāja ivāsuraiḥ
indradatte ca te divye uddhṛtyāmucya kuṇḍale praṇamya devān gāṇḍīvam ādāya ruruce śriyā

abhyupeyur mahābhāgaṃ mahāstrāṇi tadārjunam abhidadhyau mahābāhuḥ sarvāstrāṇi rathottame ūcuś ca pārthaṃ sarvāṇi prāñjalīni nṛpātmajam ime sma paramodārāḥ kiṃkarāḥ pāṇḍunandana praṇipatya tataḥ pārthaḥ samālabhya ca pāṇinā sarvāṇi mānasānīha bhavatety abhyabhāṣata pratigṛhya tato 'strāṇi prahṛṣṭavadano 'bhavat
papāta mahatī colkā diśo na pracakāśire
mahāśanimahāśabdaḥ sadṛśo jyāsvano mahān śatrūn vīrāṃś ca saṃtyajya nigrahastho rathe sthitaḥ
uttasthau cottaras tāta smṛtvā punar ihāgataḥ taṃ samāśvāsya bībhatsur abhiyātuṃ pratatvare
khāt papāta rathe tūrṇaṃ divyarūpaṃ manoramam rathaṃ tam āgataṃ dṛṣṭvā dakṣiṇaṃ prākarot tadā
sainyābhyāśam anuprāpya gṛhītvā bhīmam uttamam

śaṅkhaśabdo 'sya so 'tyarthaṃ śrūyate kālameghavat tasya śaṅkhasya śabdena dhanuṣo nisvanena ca vānarasya ca nādena rathanemisvanena ca jaṅgamasya bhayaṃ ghoram akarot pākaśāsaniḥ yāvat svaśaktisāmagryaṃ trailokyaṃ kṣobhayann iva marudbhir daśabhiś caiva prādhmāpayad ariṃdamaḥ
vyabhrājata rathopasthe bhānur merāv ivottare śaṅkhaśabdena vitrastaṃ jyāghātena ca mūrchitam
amānuṣāṇāṃ śabdena bhūtānāṃ dhvajavāsinām
evam uktvā mahābāhuḥ savyasācī paraṃtapaḥ pradadhmau ca mahāśaṅkhaṃ devadattam anuttamam jyāghoṣaṃ talaghoṣaṃ ca kṛtvā bhūtāny amohayat
vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ bhāradvājas tato droṇaḥ sarvaśastrabhṛtāṃ varaḥ rājānaṃ cāha saṃprekṣya duryodhanam ariṃdamam uttaraś cāpi saṃlīno rathopastha upāviśat
autpātikam idaṃ rājan nimittaṃ bhavatīha naḥ na hi paśyāmi vijayaṃ sainye 'smākaṃ paraṃtapa māyāmayastrīvapur ātanoti līlāyitaṃ vā puruṣaḥ purāṇaḥ

diśaṃ te dakṣiṇāṃ sarve viprekṣante punaḥ punaḥ mṛgāś ca pakṣiṇaś caiva savyam eva patanti naḥ vāditroddhuṣṭaghoṣāś ca na gāḍhaṃ prasvananti naḥ yathā meghasya ninado gambhīras tūrṇam āyataḥ śrūyate rathanirghoṣo nāyam anyo dhanaṃjayāt aśvānāṃ svanatāṃ śabdo vahatāṃ pākaśāsanim vānaraś ca dhvajo nityo niḥsaṅgaṃ dhūyate mahān śaṅkhaśabdena pārthasya karṇau me badhirīkṛtau sarvasainyaṃ ca vitrastaṃ nāyam anyo dhanaṃjayāt rājānam agrataḥ kṛtvā duryodhanam ariṃdamam
svārthe sarve vimuhyanti ye 'pi dharmavido janāḥ
**** **** trastānāṃ trāṇam icchatām abhayaṃ yācamānānāṃ
ity eṣa niścayo 'smākaṃ mantro 'bhūn nāgasāhvaye pāṇḍavānāṃ parijñāne sarveṣāṃ naḥ parasparam
**** **** saṃvṛto bhīmarūpayā āyātaḥ kevalāṃ rātrim
śarair enaṃ suniśitaiḥ pātayiṣyāmi bhūtale
sarvalokena vā yuddhaṃ devair vāstu savāsavaiḥ
heṣitaṃ hy upaśṛṇvāne droṇe sarvaṃ vighaṭṭitam
āsayann aparārthāś ca kathyate sma svayaṃ tathā
bhīṣayan pāṇḍaveyebhyo bhavān sarvān imāñ janān pramukhe sarvasainyānām abaddhaṃ bahu bhāṣate yathaivāśvān mārgamāṇās tān evābhiparīpsavaḥ heṣitāny eva śṛṇvanti syād idaṃ bhavatas tathā
hastyaśvarathacaryāsu kharoṣṭrājāvikarmaṇi godhaneṣu pratolīṣu varadvāramukheṣu ca
yathāsmākaṃ jayo vīra cintanīyas tathā tvayā
yady eṣa jāmadagnyo vā yadi vendraḥ puraṃdaraḥ

ekaikaṃ caturaḥ pañca kva cit ṣaṣṭiṃ kva cic chatam mayā paśyata matsyānām iṣubhir nihatān rathān ekaṃ dvau caturaḥ pañca kva cit ṣaṣṭiṃ kva cic chatam hatān paśyata mātaṅgān kīrṇān ekeṣuṇā mayā madbāhumuktair iṣubhis tailadhautaiḥ patatribhiḥ khadyotair iva saṃvṛttam antarikṣaṃ vyarājatām
nivṛttir gacchatāṃ nāsti vaiśvānarasamatviṣām
matkārmukavimuktānāṃ śarāṇāṃ nataparvaṇām kaḥ sahetāgrataḥ sthātum api sarvaiḥ surāsuraiḥ
rathād atirathaṃ śūraṃ sarvaśastrabhṛtāṃ varam vivaśaṃ pārtham ādāsye garutmān iva pannagam
kṣudrakair vividhair bhallair nipatadbhiś ca māmakaiḥ saṃmūḍhacetāḥ kaunteyaḥ kartavyaṃ nābhipadyate
barhibarhiṇavājānāṃ barhiṇāṃ barhiṇām iva patatāṃ patatāṃ ghoṣaḥ patatāṃ patatām iva
kruddhenāstraṃ mayā muktaṃ nirdahet pṛthivīm imām sthitaṃ saṃgrāmaśirasi pārtham ekākinaṃ kimu
paśyantu vīryam iha māmakam adya nāma magne jane samanujāḥ surasiddhasaṃghāḥ śakrātmajasya samare virathīkṛtasya evaṃ punaḥ sa virarāma kṛpo babhāṣe
vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ tasya tad vacanaṃ śrutvā nītiśāstraviśāradaḥ ācāryaḥ kuruvīrāṇāṃ kṛpaḥ śāradvato 'bravīt
eko hi samare śatrūn samarthaḥ pratibādhitum
ekaḥ kirātarūpeṇa sthitaṃ śarvam ayodhayat
eko deveśvaraṃ jitvā astrarājam avāptavān
pāñcālīṃ śrīmatīṃ prāptaḥ kṣatraṃ jitvā svayaṃvare ādāya gatavān pārtho bhavān kva nu gatas tadā
prāvṛtaḥ kuśacīreṇa patituṃ mūrkha manyase
utsṛṣṭaṃ tūlarāśau tu eko 'gniṃ śamayet katham
yuddhāyāvasthitaṃ pārtham āgataṃ pākaśāsanim
na hy asaṃhatya samare pārthaṃ jeṣyāmahe vayam
yattāḥ sarve rathaśreṣṭhaṃ parivārya samantataḥ ṣaḍrathāḥ parikīryantāṃ vajrapāṇim ivāsurāḥ
bahūni dharmaśāstrāṇi paṭhanti dvijasattamāḥ teṣu kiṃ svid idaṃ dṛṣṭaṃ dyūte jīyeta yan nṛpaḥ
kā jātis teṣu sūteyaṃ ke 'nyamantrāḥ kriyāś ca kāḥ keyaṃ varṇeṣu yā rājño vaktṛbhoktṛniyantṛṣu duryodhanam abhiprekṣya karṇaṃ ca kurusaṃsadi aśvatthāmā bhṛśaṃ kruddho duryodhanam atarjayat
yad vṛttaṃ prākṛtaiś cīrṇaṃ loke sadbhir vigarhitam
buddhimān nītimān rājā kṣatriyo yadi vetaraḥ
evam ābhāṣya rādheyaṃ duryodhanam athābravīt
yathā sabhāyāṃ dyūtaṃ tvaṃ mātulena sahākaroḥ tathā yudhyasva saṃgrāme saubalena surakṣitaḥ
vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ tataḥ śāṃtanavas tatra dharmārthakuśalaṃ hitam duryodhanam idaṃ vākyam abravīt kurusaṃsadi
ācāryaputraḥ sahajaṃ niścitaṃ sādhu bhāṣate

tasmāt tattvaṃ na jānāti yat tu kāryaṃ narādhipaḥ dhārtarāṣṭro hi durbuddhiḥ paśyann api dhanaṃjayam vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ evam uktvā tu rājānaṃ punar drauṇim uvāca ha prāñjalir bharataśreṣṭhaḥ sāmnā buddhimatāṃ varaḥ
balasya vyasanāny āhus tāni dhīrā manīṣiṇaḥ mukhe bhedaṃ ca teṣāṃ tu pāpiṣṭhaṃ viduṣāṃ matam
vedāntāś ca purāṇāni itihāsaṃ purātanam jāmadagnyam ṛte rājan ko droṇād adhiko bhavet
naiva nyāyyam idaṃ vācyam asmākaṃ puruṣarṣabha kiṃ tu roṣaparītena guruṇā bhāṣitā guṇāḥ śatror api guṇā grāhyā doṣā vācyā guror api sarvathā sarvayatnena putre śiṣye hitaṃ vadet
gate varṣadvaye caiva pañcapakṣe dinadvaye divasasyāṣṭame bhāge pataty eko 'dhimāsakaḥ
kāmāt krodhāc ca lobhāc ca kāmakrodhabhayād api snehād vā yadi vā mohād dharmaṃ nātyeti dharmajaḥ
āgataṃ phālgunaṃ rājan sarve tatra na saṃśayaḥ
eko 'pi samare pārthaḥ pṛthivīṃ nirdahec charaiḥ bhrātṛbhiḥ sahitas tāta kiṃ punaḥ kauravān raṇe tasmāt saṃdhiṃ kuruśreṣṭha kuruṣva yadi manyase
vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ bhīṣmasyoparate vākye tathā duryodhanasya ca prāptam arthyaṃ ca yad vākyaṃ droṇaś cāha dvijottamaḥ
sarvathā hi mayā śreyo vaktavyaṃ kurunandana kas tvayā sadṛśo loke bhūyas tvaṃ vaktum arhasi

vaiśaṃpāyana uvāca tad vākyaṃ ruruce teṣāṃ bhīṣmeṇoktaṃ mahātmanā tathā hi kṛtavān rājā kauravāṇām anantaram bhīṣmaḥ prasthāpya rājānaṃ godhanaṃ tad anantaram senāmukhyān vyavasthāpya vyūhituṃ saṃpracakrame
vikarṇaś ca mahāvīryo durmukhaś ca paraṃtapaḥ śakuniḥ saubalaś caiva duḥsahaś ca mahābalaḥ droṇasya pārśvam ajitāḥ pālayantu mahārathāḥ

sarve mahārathāḥ śūrā maheṣvāsā mahābalāḥ yudhyantu pāṇḍavaśreṣṭham āgataṃ yatnato yudhi abhedyaṃ parasainyānāṃ vyūhaṃ vyūhya kurūttamaḥ vajragarbhaṃ vrīhimukhaṃ padmacandrārdhamaṇḍalam tasya vyūhasya paścārdhe bhīṣmaś cāthodyatāyudhaḥ sauvarṇaṃ tālam ucchritya rathe tiṣṭhann aśobhata

droṇaṃ kṛpaṃ ca bhīṣmaṃ ca pṛṣatkair abhyavādayat senāmukham abhiprekṣya pārtho vairāṭim abravīt rājānaṃ nātra paśyāmi rathānīke vyavasthitam dakṣiṇaṃ pakṣam āsthāya kuravo yānty udaṅmukhāḥ utsṛjyaitad rathānīkaṃ maheṣvāsābhirakṣitam gavāgram abhito yāhi yāvat paśyāmi me ripum gavāgram abhito gatvā gāś cāśu vinivartaya yāvad ete nivartante kuravo javam āsthitāḥ tāvad eva paśūn sarvān nivartiṣye tavābhibho ity uktvā samare pārtho vairāṭim aparājitaḥ savyaṃ pakṣam anuprāpya javenāśvān acodayat tato 'bhyavādayat pārtho bhīṣmaṃ śāṃtanavaṃ kṛpam dvābhyāṃ dvābhyāṃ tathācāryaṃ droṇaṃ ca niśitaiḥ śaraiḥ
droṇaḥ na kaś cid yoddhum iccheta na ca guptaṃ svajīvitam ayaṃ vīraś ca śūraś ca durdharṣaś caiva saṃyuge
eṣa udāra āyāti rathe ca rathināṃ varaḥ aśvānāṃ stanatāṃ śabdo vahatāṃ pākaśāsanim rathasyāmbudharasyeva śrūyate bhṛśadāruṇaḥ dārayann iva tejasvī vasudhāṃ vāsavātmajaḥ
eṣa dṛṣṭvā rathānīkam asmākam arimardanaḥ hrīmān vadānyo dhṛtimān satkaroti ca pāṇḍavaḥ
ciradṛṣṭo 'yam asmābhiḥ prajñāvān bāndhavapriyaḥ atīva jvalito lakṣmyā pāṇḍuputro dhanaṃjayaḥ

vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ tam adūram upāyāntaṃ dṛṣṭvā pāṇḍavam arjunam nārayaḥ prekṣituṃ śekus tapasyantaṃ yathā ravim sa taṃ dṛṣṭvā rathānīkaṃ pārthaḥ sārathim abravīt śikhī vṛtaḥ srugbhir ivājyasiktaḥ jvalate ratham āsthitaḥ kirīṭī tama iva rātrijam abhyudasya sūryaḥ
ratnavaiḍūryavikṛtaṃ maṇipravarabhūṣitam parijānāmy ahaṃ tasya dhvajaṃ dūrāt samucchritam yady enam iha paśyāmi durbuddhim atimāninam yamāya preṣayiṣyāmi sahāyo 'sya yadīśvaraḥ
ācāryapravarād vāpi bhāradvājān mahārathāt

ity uktvā samare bhīṣmaḥ senayā saha kauravaḥ anvadhāvat tadā pārthaṃ dhārtarāṣṭrasya rakṣaṇe trikośamātraṃ gatvā tu pārtho vairāṭim abravīt iṣupātena senāyāḥ sthāpayāśvān ariṃdama etad agraṃ gavāṃ dṛṣṭaṃ mandaṃ vāhaya sārathe yāhy uttareṇa senāyā gāś caiva pravibhajya ca parikṣipya gavāṃ yūtham atra yotsye suyodhanam gacchanti satvaraṃ gāvaḥ sagopāḥ parimocaya tatra gatvā paśūn vīra sagopān parimocaya antareṇa ca senāyāḥ prāṅmukho gaccha cottara ime tv atirathāḥ sarve mama vīryaparākramam paśyantu kuravo yuddhe mahendrasyeva dānavāḥ
sā cāpi bahulā senā pārthabāṇābhipīḍitā
gāś caiva hi na paśyanti pārthamuktair ajihmagaiḥ arjunas tu tadā hṛṣṭo darśayan vīryam ātmanaḥ pīḍayām āsa sainyāni gāṇḍīvaprasṛtaiḥ śaraiḥ
candrāvadātaṃ sāmudraṃ kurusainyabhayaṃkaram
viyadgatānāṃ devānāṃ mānuṣāṇāṃ raveṇa ca

uttara uvāca puraṃ pratinivartasva pārtha praharatāṃ vara gāvas tvayā jitāś cemāḥ kiṃ yuddheneti vai vṛthā saṃdigdhe 'rthe na yudhyeta puṣṭe vāpi bale sati tvayaikena bahūnāṃ hi vigraheṇa tu kiṃ vṛthā śrutvaitad arjuno vākyaṃ vairāṭer bhītavat tadā prahasya prāha taṃ bhūyo mā bhaiḥ paśyeha kautukam bahūni dṛṣṭapūrvāṇi prāg yuddhāny uttara tvayā paśyemam evaṃ saṃgrāmaṃ bahūnām ekakena yat tato duryodhanaṃ yāntam arjunaṃ tarasā tadā rathāgryāḥ kauravendrasya nipetuḥ sahasākhilāḥ

arjunaḥ susaṃgṛhītair atha raśmibhis tvaṃ hayān niyamya prasamīkṣya yattaḥ saṃpreṣayāśu prativīram enaṃ vaikartanaṃ yodhayituṃ vṛṇomi yāṃ hastikakṣyāṃ bahudhā vicitrāṃ stambhe rathe paśyasi darśanīyām vivartamānaṃ jvalanaprakāśaṃ vaikartanasyaitad anīkam agryam
śaraiḥ sutīkṣṇair hṛdayaṃ vibhidya sahasranetro 'śanineva vṛtram

tam āpatantaṃ parameṇa tejasā samīkṣya vaikartanam abhyarakṣan abhyadravaṃs te rathavīravṛndā vyāghreṇa cākrāntam ivarṣabhaṃ raṇe citrāṅgadaś citrarathaś ca vīraḥ saṃgrāmajid duḥsahacitrasenau viviṃśatir durjayadurmukhau ca vikarṇaduḥśāsanasaubalāś ca śoṇo niṣedhaś ca tam anvayus te vaikartanaṃ śīghrataraṃ yuvānaḥ putrā yayus te sahasodarāś ca vaikartanaṃ pārthagataṃ samīkṣya pragṛhya cāpāni mahābalā raṇe dhanaṃjayaṃ paryakirañ charaughaiḥ teṣāṃ dṛḍhajyākṛtanaikatantrīṃ prāsopavīṇāṃ śarasaṃghakoṇām karāgrayantrāṃ sthiracāpadaṇḍāṃ vīṇām upāvādayad āśu pārthaḥ

arjunaḥ dṛḍhavairī sadāsmākaṃ nityaṃ kaṭukabhāṣaṇaḥ yasyāśrayabalād eva dhārtarāṣṭraḥ sasaubalaḥ asmān nirasya rājyāc ca punar adyāpi yotsyati lāghave cāpratidvandvo dūrapātī mahārathaḥ (7ab)  suprasannamanā vīraḥ kuruṣvainaṃ pradakṣiṇam (7cd)  atraiva cāvirodhena eṣa dharmaḥ sanātanaḥ (8ab)  yadi me prahared droṇaḥ śarīre prahariṣyataḥ (8cd)  tato 'smin prahariṣyāmi nānyathā yuddham asti me bhāratācāryamukhyena brāhmaṇena mahātmanā tena me yudhyamānasya mandaṃ vāhaya sārathe dhvajāgre siṃhalāṅgūlo dikṣu sarvāsu bhāsate (9cd)  bhāratācāryaputras tu so 'śvatthāmā virājate dhvajāgre dṛśyate yasya bālasūryasamaprabhaḥ durjayaḥ sarvasainyānāṃ devair api savāsavaiḥ tena me yudhyamānasya mandaṃ vāhaya sārathe dhvajāgre vṛṣabho yasya dikṣu sarvāsu śobhate ācāryavaramukhyas tu kṛpa eṣa mahārathaḥ droṇena ca samo vīrye pitur me paramaḥ sakhā tena me yudhyamānasya mandaṃ vāhaya sārathe (15a)  yasya kāñcanakambūbhir hastikakṣyāpariṣkṛtaḥ dhvajaḥ prakāśate dūrād rathe vidyudguṇopamaḥ (15c)  eṣa vaikartanaḥ karṇaḥ pratimānaṃ dhanuṣmatām (16d)  eṣa vai spardhate nityaṃ mayā saha sudurjayaḥ jāmadagnyasya rāmasya śiṣyo hy eṣa mahārathaḥ sarvāstrakuśalaḥ karṇaḥ sarvaśastrabhṛtāṃ varaḥ yuddhe 'pratimavīryaś ca dṛḍhavedhī parākramī adyāhaṃ yuddham etena kariṣye sūtabandhunā yuddham etat tu draṣṭāsi balivāsavayor iva mahārathena śūreṇa sūtaputreṇa dhanvinā tena me yudhyamānasya mandaṃ vāhaya sārathe (12ab) yasya caiva rathopasthe nāgo maṇimayo dhvajaḥ (12cd) eṣa duryodhanas tatra kauravo yaśasāvṛtaḥ labdhalakṣo dṛḍhaṃ vedhī laghuhastaḥ pratāpavān tena me yudhyamānasya mandaṃ vāhaya sārathe (17ab) yas tu śvetāvadātena pañcatālena ketunā vaiḍūryadaṇḍena tathā tālavṛkṣeṇa rājate (17cd) hastāvāpī bṛhaddhanvā senāṃ tiṣṭhati harṣayan rāmeṇa jāmadagnyena dvairathe na jitaḥ purā śīghraś ca laghuvedhī ca laghuhastaḥ pratāpavān (21ab) eṣa śāṃtanavo bhīṣmaḥ sarveṣāṃ naḥ pitāmahaḥ kakudaḥ sarvayodhānāṃ sarvaśastrabhṛtāṃ varaḥ (21cd) rājaśriyāvabaddhas tu suyodhanavaśānugaḥ (22ab) paścād eṣa prayātavyo na me vighnakaro bhavet (22cd) etena yudhyamānasya yatnāt saṃyaccha me hayān ity etāṃs tvaritaḥ pārthaḥ kathayitvā tu cottare rūpataś cihnataś caiva yuddhāya tvarate punaḥ
mahāmātraiḥ samārūḍhā vicitrakavacojjvalāḥ
sarvān devān samāropya vaiḍūryakavacāvṛtam
darśanārthaṃ tadā sarve sametā vāsavādayaḥ
draṣṭum abhyāgatā devāḥ svavimānaiḥ pṛthak pṛthak
arjunaṃ prati saṃrabdhaḥ kṛpaḥ paramadurjayaḥ
tataḥ śāradvatas tūrṇaṃ pārthaṃ daśabhir āśugaiḥ vivyādha paravīraghnaṃ niśitair marmabhedibhiḥ
kṛpaś ca dhanur ādāya tathaivārjunam abhyayāt
jīmūta iva gharmānte śaravarṣaṃ vimuñcati nandayan suhṛdaḥ sarvān pratyayudhyata phalgunam vikṛṣya balavac cāpaṃ pāṇḍavo bhīmavikramaḥ
udgataḥ samaye megho dhārābhir iva parvatam
kṛpo babhūva samare vidhūmo 'gnir iva jvalan

bibheda samare pārthaḥ kṛpasya dhvajam uttamam tataḥ paścān mahātejā nārācān sūryasaṃnibhān jagrāha samare pārtho bhūyo bahuśilīmukhān tais tadānīṃ mahābāhuḥ kṛpasya ratharakṣiṇaḥ jaghāna kṣatriyaśreṣṭhān yudhyamānān mahābalān candraketuḥ suketuś ca citrāśvo maṇimāṃs tathā muñjamaulī ca vikrānto hemavarmā bhayāvahaḥ suratho 'tirathaś caiva suṣeṇo 'riṣṭa eva ca nṛketuś ca sahānīkās te nipetur gatāsavaḥ
atha śaktiṃ parāmṛśya sūryavaiśvānaraprabhām cikṣepa sahasā kruddhaḥ pārthāyādbhutakarmaṇe
pragṛhītvā rathas tūrṇaṃ rathād anyan mahādhanuḥ
tān nihatya tataḥ pārtho nimeṣād iva bhārata punar anyān samādatta trayodaśa śilīmukhān
**** **** rathāt tūrṇam amitrahā gadāṃ cikṣepa sahasā pārthāyāmitatejase

vināśāt khaḍgacarmaṇoḥ dantair dantacchadān daṣṭvā cukopa hṛdi dīrghavat bhavatv iti punaś coktvā khecaro vicacāraikaḥ kramāc carmāsidhṛg vibhuḥ tataḥ kṣurāgraiḥ kaunteyo daśabhiḥ khaḍgacarmaṇī nimeṣād iva ciccheda tad adbhutam ivābhavat viṣaṇṇavadanas tatra yuddhād apagatodyamaḥ aśvatthāmnas tu sa rathaṃ kṛpaḥ samabhipupluve svasrīyasya mahātejā jagrāha ca dhanuḥ punaḥ

vaiśaṃpāyana uvāca kṛpe 'panīte droṇas tu pragṛhya sumahad dhanuḥ abhyadravad anādhṛṣyaḥ śoṇāśvaḥ śvetavāhanam sa tu rukmarathaṃ dṛṣṭvā gurum āyāntam antikāt arjuno rathināṃ śreṣṭha uttaraṃ vākyam abravīt
purāṇam itihāsaṃ ca arthavidyā ca mānavī
yasyāham iṣṭaḥ satataṃ mama ceṣṭaḥ sadā ca yaḥ
aparaṃ paśya saṃgrāmam adbhutaṃ mama tasya ca
sa tu rukmarathaṃ dṛṣṭvā kaunteyaṃ samabhidrutam ācāryaṃ taṃ mahābāhuḥ prāñjalir vākyam abravīt
hayāṃś ca rajataprakhyān kaṅkapatraiḥ śilāśitaiḥ avākirad ameyātmā pārthaṃ saṃkopayann iva
saṃyuge saṃcakāśetāṃ kālasūryāv ivoditau
kālamegha ivoṣṇānte phalgunaḥ samavākirat tasya jāmbūnadamayaiḥ śitaiś cāpacyutaiḥ śaraiḥ pracchādayad rathaśreṣṭhaṃ bhāradvājo 'rjunasya vai
śobhate sma mahābāhur gāṇḍīvaṃ vikṣipan dhanuḥ
ādadānaṃ śarān ghorān saṃdadhānaṃ ca pāṇḍavam visṛjantaṃ ca kaunteyaṃ na sma paśyanti lāghavāt
marīcivikacasyeva rājan bhānumato vapuḥ āsīt pārthasya sumahad vapuḥ śaraśatārciṣaḥ kṣipataḥ śarajālāni kaunteyasya mahātmanaḥ
asakṛn muñcato bāṇān dadṛśuḥ kuravo yudhi dikṣu sarvāsu vipulaḥ śuśruve caratas tadā droṇasyāpi dhanur ghoṣo vidyutstanitanisvanaḥ abhavad vismayakaraḥ sainyānāṃ bharatarṣabha
babhāse timiraṃ vyomni vidhūya savitā yathā
ākāśe samadṛśyanta haṃsānām iva paṅktayaḥ
pārthas tu samare śūro darśayan vīryam ātmanaḥ sa mahāstrair mahātmānaṃ droṇaṃ prācchādayac charaiḥ
vivyādha niśitair droṇaḥ śaraiḥ saṃnataparvabhiḥ hṛṣṭaḥ samabhavad droṇo raṇaśauṇḍaḥ pratāpavān
darśayetāṃ mahāstrāṇi bhāradvājārjunau raṇe
aśokānāṃ vanānīva channāni kusumair navaiḥ rejuḥ pārthaśarais tatra tadā sainyāni bhārata
tayoḥ samabhavad yuddhaṃ tumulaṃ bharatarṣabha droṇakaunteyayos tatra balivāsavayor iva atha pūrṇāyatotsṛṣṭaiḥ śaraiḥ saṃnataparvabhiḥ vyadārayetām anyonyaṃ prāṇadyūte pravartite
tatpravṛttaṃ ciraṃ ghoraṃ tayor yuddhaṃ mahātmanoḥ avartata mahāraudraṃ lokasaṃkṣobhakārakam
dṛṣṭvā te vismitāḥ sarve sādhu sādhv ity apūjayan
droṇaṃ yuddhārṇave magnaṃ dṛṣṭvā putraḥ pratāpavān
parājite raṇe droṇe droṇaputraḥ samāgataḥ sadaṇḍa iva raktākṣaḥ kṛtāntaḥ samare sthitaḥ
tato drauṇir mahāvīryaḥ prayayāv arjunaṃ prati
taṃ dṛṣṭvā kruddham āyāntaṃ prabhinnam iva kuñjaram kruddhaḥ samāhvayām āsa drauṇir yuddhāya bhārata
ciccheda tasya cāpaṃ ca sūtaṃ cāśvān rathasya vai vivyādha niśitaiś cāpi śarair āśīviṣopamaiḥ so 'nyaṃ rathaṃ samāsthāya pratyayād rathipuṃgavaḥ
so 'dya karṇa mayā sārdhaṃ vyavahṛtya mahāmṛdhe jñāsyasy avaram ātmānaṃ na cānyān avamanyase
vane dvādaśa varṣāṇi yāni soḍhāni durmate tasyādya pratikopasya phalaṃ prāpnuhi saṃprati
khadyoto dyotate tāvad yāvan nodayate śaśī udite ca sahasrāṃśau na khadyoto na candramāḥ prākṛtān puruṣāñ jitvā vṛthā te karṇa garjitam

abhiyāya hi bībhatsur gāṇḍīvaṃ vikṣipan dhanuḥ jighāṃsuḥ samare karṇaṃ visasarja śarān bahūn (cf. 16a)  taṃ karṇaḥ pratijagrāha vāyuvegam ivācalaḥ (cf. 16cd) śarajālena mahatā varṣamāṇam ivāmbudam tayor devāsurasamaḥ saṃnipāto 'bhavan mahān kiratoḥ śarajālāni nirākāśam anantaram

vavarṣa ca rajo bhaumaṃ karṇapārthasamāgame na sma sūryaḥ pratapati na ca vāti samīraṇaḥ śarapracchāditaṃ vyoma chāyābhūtam ivābhavat gāṇḍīvasya ca nirghoṣaḥ karṇasya dhanuṣas tathā dahyatām iva veṇūnām āsīt paramadāruṇaḥ arjunas tu hayān nāgān rathāṃś ca vinipātayan kṣobhayām āsa tat sainyaṃ karṇaṃ vivyādha cāsakṛt
chinnadhanvā tataḥ karṇaḥ śaktiṃ cikṣepa vegavān tāṃ śaktiṃ samare pārthaś ciccheda niśitaiḥ śaraiḥ

aśeratāvṛtya mahīṃ samagrāṃ pārtheṣumārgeṣu mahādvipendrāḥ hiraṇyakakṣyāḥ śarajālacitrā yathā nagāḥ pāvakajālanaddhāḥ taṃ śatrusenāṅganibarhaṇāni karmāṇi kurvantam amānuṣāṇi vaikartanaḥ pūrvam amṛṣyamāṇaḥ samarpayal lakṣam ivāśu dūrāt
dṛṣṭvā karṇaṃ tadā rājann apayāntaṃ raṇājirāt
tālo 'sau kāñcano yatra vajravaiḍūryabhūṣitaḥ atīva samare bhāti mātariśvaprakampitaḥ dāruṇaṃ prahariṣyāmi rathavṛndāni dārayan
tūṇīśayāḥ supuṅkhāgrā niśitā dundubhisvanāḥ mayā pramuktāḥ saṃgrāme kurūn dhakṣyanti sāyakāḥ
asurān ahanaṃ raudrān raudreṇāstreṇa sārathe hatavān sarvataḥ sarvān dhāvato yudhyatas tadā nivātakavacān hatvā gāṇḍīvāstraiḥ sahasraśaḥ
śīryamāṇāni tūlāni pravṛddheneva vāyunā mayā kurūṇāṃ vṛndāni pātyamānāni paśya vai
rathasiṃhagaṇair yuktaṃ dhanur vallīsamākulam
yat tān sarvān atibalān yotsyamānān avasthitān

anyair devair ahaṃ prāptaḥ ko māṃ viṣahate pumān adya gāṇḍīvanirmuktaiḥ śaraughai romaharṣaṇaiḥ kurūṇāṃ pātayiṣyāmi rathavṛndāni dhanvinām mahāmāyāṃ prasādyāhaṃ māyāstraṃ cāpy aśikṣayam śrīsūryāc cākṣuṣīṃ vidyāṃ brahmāstraṃ brahmaṇo mukhāt grahāstrāṇi grahebhyo 'haṃ mokṣaṃ tattadguror api ādānasaṃdhānavikarṣaṇādi mokṣopasaṃhāramukhās tu pañca divyāstrayoge khalu ye prakārās tattadguromukhataḥ śikṣitā me prasthāpanaṃ yad divyāstraṃ tathā saṃmohanaṃ param vaikalyakaraṇādīni divyāny astrāṇy anekaśaḥ paśya māṃ śatrusainyeṣu prayuñjantaṃ prayogataḥ prāpte tv avasare teṣāṃ yad yad yogeṣu yuñjatām
duḥśāsano 'bhyayāt tūrṇam arjunaṃ bharatarṣabha anye 'pi citrābharaṇā yuvāno mṛṣṭakuṇḍalāḥ
tasya duḥśāsanaḥ ṣaṣṭiṃ vāme pārśve samarpayat asyataḥ pratisaṃdhāya kuntīputrasya dhīmataḥ

vyadrāvayat sa śeṣāṃś ca dhṛtarāṣṭrātmajāṃs tadā vidrāvya ca raṇe pārtho raṇabhūmiṃ vyarājayat tribhiś ca vivyādha nanāda śūraḥ punaś ca vivyādha tribhiḥ pṛṣatkaiḥ sa taṃ dṛṣṭvā samāyāntaṃ nadantaṃ raṇamūrdhani jagrāha śūro niśitāṃs trayodaśa śilīmukhān ekena cāpaṃ hastāc ca caturbhiś caturo hayān dvābhyāṃ ca mukuṭaṃ tasya śiras tv ekena sārathiḥ rathaṃ ca dvābhyāṃ tilaśaḥ kṛtavān arjuno raṇe tathā tadainaṃ hṛdaye tribhir bāṇair ajihmagaiḥ so 'tividdho balavatā arjunena mahātmanā hatāśvaṃ ratham utsṛjya gato yatra suyodhanaḥ nanāda tatra bībhatsur jitvā rājño 'nujān raṇe

dhāvanta iva pārthasya niramitraṃ cikīrṣavaḥ yayuḥ puṅkhāgrapātena phalgunasya patatriṇaḥ ādadānā rathebhyaś ca prāṇān bāhūñ śirāṃsi ca ākāśe samadṛśyanta haṃsānām iva paṅktayaḥ kṣipato laghu citraṃ ca savyaṃ dakṣiṇam asyataḥ pārthasya viśikhā jagmuḥ śataśo 'tha sahasraśaḥ pramathann uttamāṅgāni sotsedhāni dhanuṣmatām prāhiṇot triśataṃ yodhān kurūṇām ātatāyinām pravṛttān rathanīḍebhyaḥ kṣatriyān kṣatriyarṣabhaḥ pragāḍhadhanvā kaunteyo labdhalakṣaḥ pratāpavān

etasminn antare kruddho bhīṣmo droṇam athābravīt dṛṣṭvā kṛpaṃ phalgunena pīḍitaṃ ca jitaṃ raṇe ekaikam asmān saṃgrāme parājayati phalgunaḥ ahaṃ droṇaś ca karṇaś ca drauṇir gautama eva ca anye ca bahavaḥ śūrā vayaṃ jeṣyāma vāsavim
aviṣahya śarān sarve pārthacāpacyutān raṇe
śrāntyā galitaśastrāṇāṃ patatām aśvasādinām
śirāṃsy apātayat saṃkhye kṣatriyāṇāṃ nararṣabhaḥ
jaghāna samare yodhāñ śataśo 'tha sahasraśaḥ
yathā nalavanaṃ nāgaḥ prabhinnaḥ ṣaṣṭihāyanaḥ paraṃ sarvān apāmṛdnād arjunaḥ śastratejasā
tasya mārgān vicarato nighnataś ca raṇājire

vīrottamāṅgapadmāḍhyāṃ śaracāpamahānalām padātimatsyakalilāṃ gajaśīrṣakakacchapām gomāyumṛgasaṃghuṣṭāṃ māṃsaśoṇitakardamām prāvartayan nadīṃ ghorāṃ piśācagaṇasevitām apārām anapārāṃ ca raktodāṃ sarvato vṛtām śarasaṃghamahāvartāṃ nāganakrāṃ duratyayām
abhyavarṣan susaṃkruddhā mahāmeghā ivācalam
nottarasya ca gātrāṇāṃ cakrayor na ca vājinām

nākṣāṇāṃ na ca cakrāṇāṃ na rathānāṃ na vājinām ardayām āsa vai bāṇair arjunaḥ samitiṃjayaḥ duryodhanaṃ trisaptatyā śakuniṃ pañcabhiḥ śaraiḥ droṇam ekena bāṇena kṛpaṃ dvābhyāṃ mahābalaḥ aśītyā sūtaputraṃ tu ṣaṣṭyā drauṇiṃ tathaiva ca duḥśāsanamukhān sarvān sa tatra hy astratejasā ardayām āsa tair bāṇaiḥ pāṇḍavo 'strabhṛtāṃ varaḥ
dyotayantī diśaḥ sarvāḥ pṛthivīṃ ca samantataḥ
evaṃ te sainikās tatra dhārtarāṣṭrasya paśyataḥ
devadattaṃ mahāśaṅkhaṃ pradadhmau yudhi vīryavān tau śaṅkhanādāvatyarthaṃ bhīṣmapāṇḍavayos tadā nādayām āsatur dyāṃ ca khaṃ ca bhūmiṃ ca sarvaśaḥ
sārathiṃ ca hayāṃś cāsya vivyādha daśabhiḥ śaraiḥ urasy atāḍayat pārthaṃ tribhir evāyasaiḥ śaraiḥ tato 'rjunaḥ śarais tīkṣṇair viddhvā kurupitāmaham
amṛṣyamāṇas tad bhīṣmo jānann api ca pāṇḍavam divyenāstreṇa mahatā dhanaṃjayam avākirat tathaiva pāṇḍavo bhīṣmaṃ divyam astram udīrayan pratyagṛhṇād adīnātmā mahāmegham ivācalaḥ
saṃtataṃ śaramālābhir ākāśaṃ samapadyata ambudair iva dhārābhis tayoḥ kārmukaniḥsṛtaiḥ
astrayuddhe tu nirvṛtte śarayuddham avartata
ādadānasya hi śarān saṃdhāya ca vimuñcataḥ vikarṣataś ca gāṇḍīvaṃ nāntaraṃ samadṛśyata
tathaiva bhīṣmaṃ gāṅgeyaṃ draṣṭuṃ notsahate janaḥ

aśvatthāmā tato 'bhyetya drutaṃ karṇam abhāṣata aham eko haniṣyāmi sametān sarvapāṇḍavān iti karṇa samakṣaṃ naḥ sabhāmadhye tvayoditam na tu tat kṛtam ekasmād bhīto dhāvasi sūtaja vaicitravīryajāḥ sarve tvām āśritya pṛthāsutān jetum icchanti saṃgrāme bhavān yudhyasva phalgunam aśvatthāmoditaṃ vākyaṃ śrutvā duryodhanas tadā pratyuvāca ruṣā drauṇiṃ karṇapriyacikīrṣayā mā mānabhaṅgaṃ viprendra kuru viśrutakarmaṇaḥ mānabhaṅgena rājñāṃ tu balahānir bhaviṣyati śūrā vadanti saṃgrāme vācā karmāṇi kurvate parākramanti saṃgrāme svasvavīryānusārataḥ tasmāt taṃ nārhasi bhavān garhituṃ śūrasaṃmatam rājñaivam uktaḥ sa drauṇir gataroṣo 'bhavat tadā
pārtho 'pi kṣātradharmajño visaṃjñaḥ prāharat tataḥ vṛddhāryasya prapaśyantu sutārthe śṛṅgam adbhutam mānaṃ yathā jñānino 'sya cāpatyaṃ pratiyudhyataḥ

parākrame ca śaurye ca vīrye sattve mahāraṇe śastrāstreṣu ca sarveṣu lāghave dūrapātane yasya nāsti samo loke pitṛdattavaraś ca yaḥ jitaśramo jitārātir nistandriḥ khedavarjitaḥ yaḥ svecchāmaraṇo jātaḥ pitṛśuśrūṣaṇe rataḥ duryodhanahitārthāya yuddhvā pārthena saṃgare pṛthāsutahitārthāya parājita ivābhavat

na bhokṣyase so 'dya mahīṃ samagrāṃ yānāni vastrāṇy atha bhojanāni kalyāṇagandhīni ca candanāni yuddhāt parājitya tu bhokṣyase kim suvarṇamālyāni ca kuṇḍalāni hārāṃś ca vaiḍūryakṛtopadhānān cyutasya yuddhān na tu śaṅkhaśabdās tathā bhaviṣyanti tavādya pāpa na bhogahetor varacandanaṃ ca striyaś ca mukhyā madhurapralāpāḥ yuddhāt prayātasya narendrasūnoḥ pare ca loke phalatā na ceha
duryodhanas tvaṃ prathito 'si nāmnā suyodhanas tvaṃ nikṛtipradhānaḥ

tato duryodhanaḥ kruddho vikṣipan dhanur uttamam dhṛtiṃ kṛtvā suvipulāṃ pratyuvāca dhanaṃjayam nāham indrād api kruddhād bibhemi bharatarṣabha bhuktvā suvipulaṃ rājyaṃ vittāni ca sukhāni ca kimarthaṃ yuddhasamaye palāyiṣye narottama evam uktvā mahārājaḥ pratyayudhyata phalgunam saṃnipatya tu śīghrāśvas totrārdita iva dvipaḥ ākrāntabhogas tejasvī dhanur vakra ivoragaḥ rathaṃ rathena saṃgamya yodhayām āsa pāṇḍavam

rājñaś ca sarvān mṛtasaṃnikāśān saṃmohanāstreṇa visaṃjñakalpān nāsāgravinyastakarāṅgulīkaḥ pārtho jahāsa smayamānacetāḥ suvarṇaniṣkābharaṇāni māriṣa māṇikyabāhvaṅgadakaṅkaṇāni anyāni rājñāṃ maṇibhūṣaṇāni
sarvāñ jitān muṇḍitaśīrṣakūrcān pṛthakpṛthagbhāgavirūparaudrān

saṃmohanāstrapratimohitāḥ stha yūyaṃ na jānīta dhanāpahāram paśyātmavastrābharaṇāni rājan virāṭaputreṇa samāhṛtāni nṛpeṣu sarveṣu ca mohiteṣu hantuṃ yad icchet sa haniṣyatīti tadā tu dharmātmatayā nṛvīro na cāhanad vo balabhit tanūjaḥ bhāgyena yuṣmān avadhīn na pārthaḥ saṃdhiṃ kurūṇām anumanyamānaḥ tad yāta yūyaṃ saha sainikaiś ca hatāvaśiṣṭair gajasāhvayaṃ puram
nītāni vastrāṇi ca phālgunena samīkṣya rājā hṛdi lajjitaś ca

gurūṃś ca sarvān abhivādya bāṇair nyavartatodagramanāḥ śanaiḥ saḥ gāṇḍīvadhanvā pravaraḥ kurūṇāṃ śaṅkhaṃ pradadhmau balavān balena te śaṅkhaśabdaṃ tumulaṃ niśamya dhvajasya śrutvā nadato 'ntarikṣe gāṇḍīvaśabdena muhur muhus te bhītā yayuḥ sarvadhanaṃ vihāya tān arjuno dūrataraṃ vibhajya dhanaṃ ca sarvaṃ nikhilaṃ nivartya āpṛcchya tān dūrataraṃ prayātvā

dhanaṃjayaṃ siṃham ivāttavaktraṃ gā vai vijityābhimukhaṃ prayāntam udīkṣituṃ pārthivās te na śekur yathaiva madhyāhnagataṃ tu sūryam ratnāni vāsāṃsi ca tāni gṛhya raṇotkaṭo nāga iva prabhinnaḥ jitvā ca vairāṭim uvāca pārthaḥ prahṛṣṭarūpo rathināṃ variṣṭhaḥ
devāś ca gandharvagaṇāś ca pārthaṃ rājarṣayaś cāpi mudaṃ pratītāḥ saṃpūjayanto javam eva sarve yayuḥ puraskṛtya tadā mahendram

tato hṛṣṭamanāḥ pārtham uttaraḥ pratyabhāṣata kurūn parājitān dṛṣṭvā bhrājamānaṃ ca pāṇḍavam diṣṭyā jayasi durdharṣa mahābāho dhanaṃjaya prādurbhāvaṃ jayaṃ caiva dṛṣṭvā prīto 'smi pāṇḍava niśamya vacanaṃ tasya uttarasya mahātmanaḥ arjunaḥ paravīraghnaḥ pratyuvācottaraṃ tadā diṣṭyā tvam akṣatas tāta diṣṭyā gāvas tavānagha pratyāgatā yathānyāyaṃ śatravaś ca jitā raṇe āvartaya rathaṃ śīghraṃ sadaśvān saṃpraṇodaya apavartaya gāḥ sarvā yāhi caiva śamīṃ prati

prāṇān antarmanoyātān prayāciṣyāmahe vayam vayaṃ cārjuna te dāsā hy anurakṣyā hy anāthakāḥ anāthān duḥkhitān dīnān kṛśān vṛddhān parājitān nyastaśastrān nirāśāṃś ca nāhaṃ hanmi kṛtāñjalīn bhavanto yāntu visrabdhā nirbhayā amṛtās tathā mama pādarajorakṣyā jīvantu suciraṃ bhuvi
prayātāḥ sarvatas tatra namaskṛtya dhanaṃjayam nihatya śatrūn dviṣatāṃ nihantā
hastināpuram uddiśya sarve dīnā yayus tadā
arjunaḥ agre prayāntu nagaraṃ ghoṣayantu ca te jayam

vaiśaṃpāyana uvāca ity evaṃ tau bhāratamatsyavīrau saṃmantrya saṃgamya tataḥ śamīṃ tām abhyetya bhūyo vijayena tṛptāv utsṛṣṭam āropayatāṃ svabhāṇḍam sa śatrusenām abhibhūya sarvām ācchidya sarvaṃ ca dhanaṃ kurubhyaḥ vairāṭir āyān nagaraṃ pratīto bṛhannalāsārathir ekavīraḥ
upāsāṃ cakrire sarve pāṇḍavāḥ saha sainikaiḥ
praviśyāntaḥpuraṃ ramyaṃ strīśatair upaśobhitam
rājā gavāṃ śatasahasrāṇi abhibhūya mamātmajam kuravaḥ kālayanti sma sarve yuddhaviśāradāḥ
matsainyaṃ tvaritaṃ gatvā kurūn prāpya ca cottaram dṛṣṭvā yadi jitā gāvo vijayenābhyanandata
devendrasārathiś caiva mātaliḥ khyātavikramaḥ kṛṣṇasya sārathiś caiva na bṛhannalayā samau

bhavantu te labdhajaye sute me paurāś ca nāryaś ca pure ca martyāḥ te śuklavastrāḥ prabhavantu mārge sugandhamālyābharaṇāś ca nāryaḥ bhajantu sarvā gaṇikā sutaṃ me nāryaś ca sarvāḥ sahasainikāś ca svalaṃkṛtās tāḥ subhagāś ca veśyāḥ putrasya panthānam anuvrajantu

sarve suprītamanasaḥ pratijagmur yathocitam sūtāś ca sarve saha māgadhāś ca hṛṣṭā virāṭasya pure janaughāḥ bheryaś ca tūryāṇi ca vārijāś ca veṣaiḥ parārdhyaiḥ pramadājanāś ca vandipravādaiḥ paṇavānakaiś ca tathaiva vādyāni ca śaṅkhaśabdāḥ sakāṃsyatālaṃ madhuraṃ ca gītaṃ ādāya nāryo nagarāt tadīyāt pratyudyayuḥ putram anantavīryaṃ te brāhmaṇāḥ śāntiparāḥ pradhānāḥ svādhyāyavedādhyayanakramajñāḥ svastikriyāgītajayapradhānāḥ
abhyabhāṣata matsyānāṃ rājā kaṅkam amitrahā trigartāḥ kuravaḥ sarve saṃgrāme nirjitā mayā praviśyāntaḥpuraṃ hṛṣṭau dyūtaṃ devyāmahe vayam
dyūtaṃ kartuṃ na vāñchāmi narendra tava saṃsadi
**** **** dhānyaṃ yugyam ajāvikam vividhāni ca ratnāni
niḥsaṃśayaṃ ca kitavaḥ paścāt tapyati pāṇḍavaḥ vividhānāṃ ca ratnānāṃ dhanānāṃ ca parājaye abhakṣitavināśaś ca vākpāruṣyam anantaram aviśvāsyaṃ budhair nityam ekāhnā dravyanāśanam
evam ābhāṣya vākyais tu krīḍatus tau narottamau
kuravo 'tirathāḥ sarve devair api sudurjayāḥ

kaṅkaḥ tato virāṭaḥ kṣubhito manyunābhipariplutaḥ uvāca vacanaṃ kruddhaḥ parivrājam anantaram tādṛśena tu yodhena maheṣvāsena dhīmatā kuravo nirjitā yuddhe tatra kiṃ brāhmaṇādbhutam yantā tathāvidho yasya rathe tiṣṭhati vīryavān virāṭaḥ pumāṃso bahavo dṛṣṭāḥ sūtāś ca balino mayā vikramya yantā yoddhā ca na me dṛṣṭaḥ kadā cana vipriyaṃ nācared rājñām ānukūlyaṃ priyaṃ vadet ācaran vipriyaṃ rājñāṃ na jātu sukham edhate

tato 'bravīt punaḥ kaṅkaḥ prahasya kuruvardhana bṛhannalāyā rājendra ghuṣyatāṃ nagare jayaḥ uttareṇa tu sārathyaṃ kṛtaṃ nūnaṃ bhaviṣyati nimittaṃ kiṃ cid utpannaṃ tarkaś cāpi dṛḍho mama yato jānāmi rājendra nānyathā tad bhaviṣyati kuravo 'pi mahāvīryā devair api sudurjayāḥ sasomavaruṇādityaiḥ sakuberahutāśanaiḥ

aśvatthāmā vikarṇaś ca somadatto jayadrathaḥ bhūriśravāḥ śalo bhūrir jalasaṃdhiś ca vīryavān duryodhano duṣprasaho duḥśāsanaviviṃśatī vṛṣaseno 'śvasenaś ca vātavegasuvarcasau bāhlīko bhūrisenaś ca yuyutsuś ca paraṃtapaḥ saubalaḥ śakuniś caiva dyumatsenaś ca sālvarāṭ anye ca bahavaḥ śūrā nānājanapadeśvarāḥ kṛpeṇācāryamukhyena sahitāḥ kuravo nṛpa sajjakārmukanistriṃśā rathino rathayūthapāḥ
vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ tena saṃkṣubhito rājā dīryamāṇena cetasā abravīd vacanaṃ tāta ajānan vai yudhiṣṭhiram kaṅka mā mā bravīr vākyaṃ pratikūlaṃ dvijottama
tasya takṣakabhogābhaṃ bāhum udyamya dakṣiṇam virāṭaḥ prāharat kruddhaḥ karṇam āśritya dakṣiṇam
akṣeṇābhihato rājā virāṭena mahīpatiḥ tūṣṇīm āsīn mahābāhuḥ kṛṣṇāṃ saṃprekṣya duḥkhitaḥ tasya raktotpalanibhaṃ śirasaḥ śoṇitaṃ tadā prāvartata mahābāhor abhighātān mahātmanaḥ
sā viṣaṇṇā ca bhītā ca kruddhā ca drupadātmajā bāṣpaṃ niyamya duḥkhaṃ ca bhartur niḥśreyakāriṇī uttarīyeṇa sūkṣmeṇa tūrṇaṃ jagrāha śoṇitas nigṛhya raktaṃ vastreṇa sairandhrī duḥkhamohitā

virāṭo 'syābravīt tatra kim etat kriyatām iti sairandhri brūhi tattvena mama praśnam aśeṣataḥ yad idaṃ śoṇitaṃ rājan kaṅkasya patati kṣitau idaṃ ca rāṣṭraṃ te kṣipraṃ vinaśyeta na saṃśayaḥ na ca dvādaśa varṣāṇi varṣayeta puraṃdaraḥ ītayaś ca pravartante na sasyaṃ jāyate kva cit aśubhaṃ syāc ca rājendra nṛpasya ca purasya ca

bṛhannalāsārathinaṃ praśasya vicitraveṣaḥ pramadājanaś ca purād virāṭasya mahābalasya niṣkramya bhūmiṃjayam abhyanandan praśasyamānas tu jayena tatra putro virāṭasya na hṛṣyati sma saṃbhāṣyamāṇas tu janena tena so 'ntarmanāḥ pāṇḍavam īkṣamāṇaḥ putro virāṭasya tato varāṇi vastrāṇy ādāt pāṇḍusutaḥ sakhībhyaḥ sabhājayaṃś cāpi samāgatās tā diṣṭyājayantac ca balaṃ kumāryaḥ
dvāḥsthaḥ kumāro yodhamukhyaiś ca gaṇikābhiś ca saṃvṛtaḥ paurajānapadair yuktaḥ pūjyamāno jayāśiṣā

indraṃ vāpi kuberaṃ vā yamaṃ vā varuṇaṃ tathā mama śoṇitakartāraṃ mṛdnīyāt kiṃ punar naram kṣaṇamātraṃ tu tatraiva dvāri tiṣṭhatu vīryavān iti provāca dharmātmā yudhiṣṭhira udāradhīḥ ity uktvā kṣamayā yukto dharmarājo yudhiṣṭhiraḥ sabhāyāṃ saha mātsyena tūṣṇīm upaviveśa ha
paśyan yudhiṣṭhiraṃ dṛṣṭyā vakrayā caraṇau pituḥ

hṛdaye 'dahyata tadā mṛtyugrasta ivottaraḥ ko vā jigamiṣan mṛtyuṃ kena spṛṣṭaḥ padoragaḥ śrotriyo brāhmaṇaśreṣṭha indrāsanaratikṣamaḥ pūjanīyo 'bhivādyaś ca na prabādhyo 'yam īdṛśaḥ sa putravacanaṃ śrutvā virāṭo rāṣṭravardhanaḥ virāṭaḥ putra te vijayaṃ śrutvā prahṛṣṭo 'haṃ mahābhuja akṣakrīḍanayānena kālakṣepam akāriṣam tato 'jayat kurūn sarvān uttaro rāṣṭravardhanaḥ ity uktaṃ hi mayā putra neti kaṅko bṛhannalā ajayat sā kurūn sarvān iti mām abravīn muhuḥ praśaṃsite mayā putra vijaye tava viśrute bṛhannalāyā vijayaṃ kaṅkas tu vadate ruṣā
vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ śrutvā pitur bhṛśaṃ kruddhaḥ pitaraṃ vākyam abravīt bṛhannalāpraśaṃsābhir abhyasūyāmy ahaṃ tadā
yāvan na kṣayam āyāti kulaṃ sarvam aśeṣataḥ sphītaṃ vṛddhaṃ ca mātsyānām ayaṃ tāvat pradhakṣyati praṇamya pādayor asya daṇḍavat kṣitimaṇḍale pragṛhya pādau pāṇibhyām ayaṃ tāvat prasādyatām
ity uktvā mārjayām āsa śoṇitaṃ sa narādhipaḥ
**** **** putro rājānam abravīt na yuktam iva tasyātra dvāri sthātuṃ mahātmanaḥ anuttamabhujasyāsya ślāghyasyādbhutakarmaṇaḥ * * * * * * * *
pariṣvajya dṛḍhaṃ rājā praveśya bhavanottamam
śūraś ca laghuhastaś ca karṇo laghuparākramaḥ
sarve caiva mahāvīryā dhārtarāṣṭrā mahābalāḥ taiś ca vīraiś ca te tāta katham āsīt samāgamaḥ

sarve caiva mahāvīryā dhārtarāṣṭrā mahābalāḥ taiś ca vīraiś ca te tāta katham āsīt samāgamaḥ vinirjayasi saṃgrāme * * * * * * * * nūnaṃ prakālya tān sarvāṃs tvayā yuddhe nararṣabhān ācchinnaṃ godhanaṃ sarvaṃ śārdūlānām ivāmiṣam
**** **** bhīṣmadroṇamukhān kurūn dṛṣṭvā viṣaṇṇaṃ saṃgrāme
na hāstinapure bhogā bhoktuṃ śakyāḥ palāyatā

hayānāṃ ca gajānāṃ ca śūrāṇāṃ ca dhanuṣmatām nihatāni sahasrāṇi bhagnā ca kuruvāhinī sūtaputraṃ śarair viddhvā hayān hatvā mahārathaḥ devaputrasamaḥ saṃkhye raktaṃ vastraṃ samādade caturbhiḥ punar ānarcchad bhīṣmaṃ śāṃtavanaṃ raṇe taṃ viddhvātha hayāṃś cāsya śuklaṃ vastraṃ samādade duryodhanaṃ ca balavān bāṇair vivyādha saptabhiḥ taṃ sa viddhvā hayāṃś cāsya pītaṃ vastraṃ samādade droṇaṃ kṛpaṃ ca balavān somadattaṃ jayadratham bhūriśravasam indrābhaṃ śakuniṃ ca mahāratham tribhis tribhiḥ sa viddhvā tu duḥśāsanamukhān api vividhāni ca vastrāṇi mahārhāṇy ājahāra saḥ dvābhyāṃ śarābhyāṃ viddhvā tu tathācāryasutaṃ raṇe cāpaṃ chitvā vikarṇasya nīle cādatta vāsasī
tasmai dāsyāmi tāṃ putrīṃ grāmāṃś caiva tu hāṭakān sphuritaṃ kaṭisūtraṃ ca strīsahasraśatāni ca
āmantrayitvā kaunteyam uttaro vākyam abravīt iti rājñaḥ pravakṣyāmi dharmarājaṃ yudhiṣṭhiram ity uktvā sahasā pārthaḥ praviśyāntaḥpuraṃ śubham
itikartavyatāṃ sarve mantrayitvā tu pāṇḍavāḥ nyavasaṃś caiva tāṃ rātriṃ pāṇḍavā dharmavatsalāḥ putreṇa saha mātsyas tu saṃprahṛṣṭo narādhipaḥ tāṃ rātrim avasad dhīmān samāśvastena cetasā

svamantriteti vijñāya harṣeṇotphullalocanāḥ virāṭasya sabhāṃ jagmus te tīrṇā vratam uttamam jagṛhuś ca tathā sarvaṃ rājño dharmasutasya ca samaye te tu taṃ dṛṣṭvā cārjunaś chatram ādade cāmaraṃ bhīmasenena mādreyau ca varāyudhān varaṃ tāmbūlasaṃpūrṇaṃ draupadī ca svabhājanam yayau tasya sutā hṛṣṭā paracaryākṛte sthitāḥ
acintayat katham ime sabhām āgamya bhūṣitāḥ atiṣṭhan devasaṃkāśāḥ katham anvāviśann iha
muhūrtam iva ca dhyātvā saroṣaḥ pṛthivīpatiḥ kim idaṃ ko vidhis tv eṣa bhayārta iva pārthivaḥ

eṣa vigrahavān dharma eṣa vīryavatāṃ varaḥ eṣa buddhyādhiko loke tapasāṃ ca parāyaṇam eṣo 'stravic ca saṃgrāme trailokye sacarācare na caivānyaḥ pumān vetti na vetsyati kadā cana na devā nāsurāḥ ke cin na manuṣyā na rākṣasāḥ gandharvayakṣapravarāḥ kiṃnarāḥ samahoragāḥ dīrghadarśī mahātejāḥ paurajānapadapriyaḥ pāṇḍavānām atiratho yajñadharmaparo vaśī maharṣikalpo rājarṣis triṣu lokeṣu viśrutaḥ balavān dhṛtimān saumyaḥ satyavādī jitendriyaḥ dhanaiś ca saṃcayaiś caiva śakravaiśravaṇopamaḥ yathā manur mahātejā lokānāṃ parirakṣitā evam eṣa mahātejāḥ prajānugrahakārakaḥ

asya prabhāvāt sarve 'pi bhrātaro 'mī vayaṃ nṛpa mahāprabhāvasaṃyuktā mahābalaparākramāḥ asyaiva tapasāsmākaṃ prabhāvāḥ santy anekaśaḥ vināsya manujais tulyā vayaṃ sarve bhavāma bhoḥ yāvad etasya cādeśaṃ tiṣṭhāmo vayam ādṛtāḥ pālayantaḥ surais tāvad abhipūjyatamāś ca ha
vājināṃ ca śataṃ rājan sahasrāṇy anvayus tadā
mūkamimmiṇirogyādīn dīneḍavyaddhirādikān

chalena yāvad ripubhiḥ satyapāśena bandhitaḥ abhūt tāvan manuṣyeṣu sarvasādhāraṇo hy ayam trayodaśamavarṣasya naṣṭacaryāvrataṃ tv idam pāritaṃ tvatsamakṣaṃ vai tan nistīrṇo 'dya pāṇḍavaḥ yathāvad vratacīrṇo 'yaṃ meghamadhyād yathā raviḥ bhavet pratāpāsahyas tu tadvat paśyainam apy aho yogyas tv ayaṃ narapatir manye śakrāsanasya ca tasmān mā vismayas te 'stu na mṛṣā prabravīmi te
hiḍimbaṃ ca bakaṃ caiva kirmīraṃ ca jaṭāsuram hatvā niṣkaṇṭakaṃ cakre araṇyaṃ sarvataḥ sukham

drupadasya priyā putrī dhṛṣṭadyumnasya cānujā agnikuṇḍāt samudbhūtā draupadīty avagamyatām astrajño durlabhaḥ kaś cit kevalaṃ pṛthivīmanu dhanuḥspṛśāṃ tathā śreṣṭhaḥ kaunteyo 'yaṃ dhanaṃjayaḥ etena khāṇḍavaṃ yasya akāmasya śatakratoḥ dagdhaṃ nāgavanaṃ caiva saha nāgair narādhipa varṣaṃ ca śaravarṣeṇa vāritaṃ durjayena vai karam āhāritāḥ sarve pārthivāḥ pṛthivīpate strīveṣaṃ kṛtavān eṣa tava rājan niveśane bṛhannaḷeti yām āhur arjunaṃ jayatāṃ varaṃ

vaiśaṃpāyana uvāca virāṭanṛpater agre yathādṛṣṭaṃ kurūn prati ya eṣa jāmbūnadaśuddhagaura- tanur mahāsiṃha iva pravṛddhaḥ pracaṇḍaghoṇaḥ pṛthudīrghanetras tāmrāyatākṣaḥ kururāja eṣaḥ ayaṃ punar mattagajendragāmī prataptacāmīkaraśuddhagauraḥ pṛthvāyatāṃso gurudīrghabāhur vṛkodaraḥ paśyata paśyatainam yas tv eṣa pārśve 'sya mahādhanuṣmāñ śyāmo yuvā vāraṇayūthapopamaḥ siṃhonnatāṃso gajarājagāmī padmāyatākṣo 'rjuna eṣa vīraḥ rājñaḥ samīpe puruṣottamau yau yamāvimau viṣṇumahendrakalpau manuṣyaloke sakale samo 'sti yayor na rūpe na bale na śīle ābhyāṃ tu pārśve kanakottamāṅgī yaiṣā prabhā mūrtimatīva gaurī nīlotpalābhā suradevateva kṛṣṇā sthitā mūrtimatīva lakṣmīḥ

anena tāta vīreṇa bhīṣmadroṇamukhā rathāḥ duryodhanena sahitā nirjitā bhīmakarmaṇā ayaṃ dravantaṃ bhītaṃ māṃ devaputro nyavārayat asya bāhubalenāsmi jīvan pratyāgataḥ punaḥ etaddhanuḥpramuktāś ca śarāḥ puṅkhānupuṅkhinaḥ nālakṣyeṣu raṇe petur nārācā raktabhojanāḥ tīkṣṇanārācasaṃkṛttaśirobāhūruvakṣasām kalevarāṇi dṛśyante yodhānāṃ sāśvasādinām anena taṭinī tatra śoṇitāmbupravāhinī pravartitā bhīmarūpā yāṃ smṛtvādyāpi me manaḥ prakampate caṇḍavāyukampitā kadalī yathā

pṛcche 'haṃ kāraṇaṃ kiṃ cid ucyatāṃ tad yathātatham devānām api śaktir vo rūpaprāvartakāriṇī manye 'py ahaṃ yathā pūrvaṃ rūpaṃ vo nādhunā tathā yadā manuṣyasāmānyam abhūd etarhi devavat rūpaṃ kāntiṃ balaṃ dhairyaṃ guṇāḥ sarve 'py anīdṛśāḥ yudhiṣṭhira uvāca satyaśaucatapobhir no guṇaiḥ prītāḥ surā daduḥ dharmadurgāprabhṛtayo rūpaprāvartakṛdguṇān

vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ (15ab)    tasya tad vacanaṃ śrutvā matsyarājaḥ pratāpavān (22ca,23) dhanaṃjayaṃ pariṣvajya pāṃḍavān atha sarvaśaḥ namaskṛtvā tu rājānaṃ rājan rājye 'bhiṣecitam (24ab)    nātṛpyad darśane teṣāṃ virāṭo vāhinīpatiḥ (24cd)    saṃprīyamāṇo rājānaṃ yudhiṣṭhiram athābravīt (25ab)    diṣṭyā bhavantaḥ saṃprāptāḥ sarve kuśalino vanāt (25cd)    diṣṭyā ca caritaṃ kṛcchram ajñātaṃ tair durātmabhiḥ (26ab)    idaṃ rājyaṃ ca vaḥ sarvaṃ yac cāsti vasu kiṃ cana vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ virāṭasya vacaḥ śrutvā pārthasya ca mahātmanaḥ (15cd)    uttaraḥ pratyuvācedam abhipanno yudhiṣṭhire (16ab)    prasādanaṃ prāptakālaṃ pāṇḍavasyābhirocaye tejasvī balavāñ śūro rājarājeśvaraḥ prabhuḥ (16cd)  { uttarāṃ ca varārohāṃ pārthasyāmitrakarśana { praṇipatya prayacchāmas tataḥ śiṣṭā bhavāmahe (19cd)    vayaṃ ca sarve sāmātyāḥ kuntīputraṃ yudhiṣṭhiram prasādya hy upatiṣṭhāmo rājan kiṃ karavāmahe (18a,c)   rājaṃs tvam asi saṃgrāme gṛhītas tena mokṣitaḥ (19a,18d) eteṣāṃ bāhuvīryeṇa gāvaś ca vijitās tvayā kuravo nirjitā yasmāt saṃgrāme 'mitatejasaḥ eṣa tat sarvam akarot kuntīputro yudhiṣṭhiraḥ (17a)     arcyāḥ pūjyāś ca mānyāś ca pratyuttheyāś ca pāṇḍavāḥ (17b)     arghyārhāś cābhivādyāś ca prāptakālaṃ ca me matam (17cd)    pūjyantāṃ pūjanīyāś ca mahābhāgāś ca pāṇḍavāḥ na hy ete kupitāḥ śeṣaṃ kuryur āśīviṣopamāḥ tasmāc chīghraṃ prapadyāmaḥ kuntīputraṃ yudhiṣṭhiram (19e)     prasādayāma bhadraṃ te saha pārthair mahātmabhiḥ uttarām agrataḥ kṛtvā śiraḥsnātām alaṃkṛtām jānāmy aham idaṃ sarvam eṣāṃ tu balapauruṣam kule ca janma mahati phalgunasya ca vikramam uttarāt pāṇḍavāñ śrutvā virāṭo duḥkhamohitaḥ uttarāṃ cāpi saṃprekṣya prāptakālam acintayat tato virāṭaḥ sāmātyaḥ sakalatraḥ sabāndhavaḥ uttarām agrataḥ kṛtvā śiraḥsnātāṃ kṛtāñjaliḥ bhūmau nipatitas tūrṇaṃ pāṇḍavasya samīpataḥ prasīdatu mahārājo dharmaputro yudhiṣṭhiraḥ pracchannarūpaveṣatvān nāgnir dṛṣṭas tṛṇair vṛtaḥ śirasābhiprapanno 'smi saputraparicārakaḥ (20ab)    yad asmābhir ajānadbhir adhikṣipto mahīpatiḥ avamatya kṛtaṃ sarvam ayuktaṃ prākṛto yathā (20cd)    kṣantum arhati tat sarvaṃ dharmajño bandhuvatsalaḥ yad idaṃ māmakaṃ rāṣṭraṃ puraṃ rājyaṃ ca pārthiva sadaṇḍakośaṃ visṛje tava bhṛtyo 'smi pārthiva vayaṃ ca sarve sāmātyā bhavantaṃ śaraṇaṃ gatāḥ taṃ dharmarājaḥ patitaṃ mahītale sabandhuvargaṃ prasamīkṣya pārthivam uvāca vākyaṃ paralokadarśanaḥ yudhiṣṭhiraḥ na te bhayaṃ pārthiva vidyate mayi pratītarūpo 'smy anucintya mānasam etat tvayā samyag ihopapāditaṃ dvijair amātyaiḥ sadṛśaiś ca paṇḍitaiḥ imāṃ ca kanyāṃ samalaṃkṛtāṃ bhṛśaṃ samīkṣya tuṣṭo 'smi narendrasattama kṣāntam etan mahābāho yan māṃ vadasi pārthiva vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ (21a)     tato virāṭaḥ paramābhituṣṭaḥ (21b)     sametya rājñā samayaṃ cakāra (21c)     rājyaṃ ca sarvaṃ visasarja tasmai virāṭaḥ yac ca vakṣyāmi te sarvaṃ mā śaṅkethā yudhiṣṭhira idaṃ sanagaraṃ rāṣṭraṃ savanaṃ savadhūjanam yuṣmabhyaṃ saṃpradāsyāmi bhokṣyāmy ucchiṣṭam eva ca ahaṃ vṛddhaś ciraṃ rājan bhuktabhogaś ciraṃ sukham rājyaṃ dattvā tu yuṣmabhyaṃ pravrajiṣyāmi kānanam
vayaṃ vanāntarāt prāptā na te rājyaṃ gṛhāmahe kiṃ tu duryodhanādīnāṃ rājñāṃ rājyaṃ gṛhāmahe
dūtān mitreṣu sarveṣu jñātisaṃbandhikeṣv api preṣayām āsa kaunteyo virāṭaś ca mahīpatiḥ
abhimanyuṃ samādāya rāmeṇa sahitas tadā sarvayādavamukhyaiś ca saṃvṛtaḥ paravīrahā śaṅkhadundubhinirghoṣair virāṭanagaraṃ yayau
upaplāvyaṃ yayuḥ śīghraṃ pāṇḍavārthe mahābalāḥ tataḥ śatasahasrāṇi prayutāny arbudāni ca samīpam abhivartante yodhā yaudhiṣṭhiraṃ balam samudram iva gharmānte srotaḥśreṣṭhāḥ pṛthak pṛthak
pūjayām āsa vidhivat sabhṛtyabalavāhanān
tasmin kāle niśamyātha dūtavākyaṃ janārdanaḥ dayitaṃ svastriyaṃ putraṃ subhadrāyāḥ sumānitam
kṛṣṇena sahitāḥ sarve pāṇḍavān draṣṭum āgatāḥ bibhyan ke 'pi samājagmuḥ pāṇḍavebhyo hitaiṣiṇaḥ
vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ teṣu tatra sameteṣu rājāno vṛṣṇibhiḥ saha yathārhaṃ pāṇḍavaśreṣṭhe hy avartantābhipūjitāḥ āsan prahṛṣṭamanasaḥ pāribarhaṃ dadus tadā
striyo vṛddhāḥ kuṭumbinya utsavajñāś ca maṅgalaiḥ draupady antaḥpure caiva virāṭasya gṛhe striyaḥ
bhṛṅgāraṃ tu samādāya sauvarṇaṃ jalapūritam pārthasya haste sahasā satām indīvarekṣaṇām snuṣārthaṃ prākṣipad dvāri virāṭo vāhinīpatiḥ
drupadaś ca virāṭaś ca śikhaṇḍī ca mahāyaśāḥ kāśirājaś ca śaibyaś ca dhṛṣṭadyumnaś ca sātyakiḥ saptaite 'kṣauhiṇīpālā yajvāno bhūridakṣiṇāḥ parivārya pāṇḍavaṃ sarve niveśaṃ cakrire tadā
tataḥ pārthāya saṃhṛṣṭo mātsyarājo dhanaṃ mahat agniṃ pradakṣiṇaṃ kurvan saubhadraḥ pāṇim agrahīt
nyavedayan pāṇḍavebhyo virāṭaḥ prītimāṃs tadā rājyaṃ balaṃ ca kośaṃ ca sarvam ātmānam eva ca
bhojanāni ca hṛdyāni pānāni vividhāni ca

janamejayaḥ kṛtvā vivāhaṃ tu kurupravīrās tadābhimanyor muditasya pakṣāḥ viśramya catvāry uṣasaḥ pratītāḥ sabhāṃ virāṭasya tato 'bhijagmuḥ parvaṇy asmin samākhyātaṃ saṃkhyānaṃ paramarṣiṇā virāṭaparve deyāni vāsāṃsi vividhāni ca
janamejaya uvāca oṃ vyāsaṃ vasiṣṭhanaptāraṃ śakteḥ pautram akalmaṣam parāśarātmajaṃ vande śukatātaṃ taponidhim vyāsāya viṣṇurūpāya vyāsarūpāya viṣṇave namo vai brahmanidhaye vāsiṣṭhāya namo namaḥ
kṛṣṇena vṛṣṇipravareṇa tatra
etaiḥ parapreṣyaniyogayuktair icchadbhir āptaṃ svakulena rājyam
tyaktās tathā bandhujanena cāmī dharmeṇa vairīn nihatāś ca hanyuḥ
mādrīsutau caiva kurupravīrau
tato vināśaḥ kurupāṇḍavānāṃ sabāndhavānāṃ bhavitācireṇa tasmād yad uktaṃ madhusūdanena tat sarvalokasya hitaṃ yatadhvam
prayātu dūtaḥ puruṣaḥ pradhāno hitāya teṣāṃ ca tathaiva caiṣām
hitvā hi karṇaṃ ca suyodhanaṃ ca
ayuddham ākāṅkṣata kauravāṇāṃ sāmnaiva duryodhanam āhvayadhvam sāmnā jito 'rtho 'rthakaro bhaveta yuddhe 'nayo bhavitā neha so 'rthaḥ
daśāśā chādayantaṃ mām ekavīraṃ madotkaṭam vijiṣṇuṃ manyate loko yudhyantaṃ ca mahītale satyaṃ mamāntevāsitvaṃ jayasya jayaśālinaḥ chinadmi yadi khaḍgena bhīṣmādīnāṃ śirāṃsy aham
virāṭadrupadau vīrau yamakālopamadyutī
agnido garadaś caiva śastrapāṇir dhanāpahaḥ kṣetradāraharaś caiva ṣaḍ ete hy ātatāyinaḥ ātatāyinam āyāntam api vedāntavādinam jighāṃsantaṃ jighāṃsīyān na tena brahmahā bhavet
aham eko vijeṣyāmi prāhatān saṃvidhāya ca nāhaṃ karomi tadvākyaṃ praṇipātanapūrvakam
tāvad dūtān vayaṃ tūrṇaṃ preṣayiṣyāma māciram sa tu duryodhano nūnaṃ preṣayiṣyati tān nṛpān
vīrabāhuś ca durdharṣo bhūmipo jālakīṭakaḥ vīrabāhuḥ subāhuś ca
ārṣo devā budhaḥ sūtas tathā harihayopamaḥ
vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ drupadenaivam ukte tu vākye vākyaviśāradaḥ vasudevasutas tatra vṛṣṇisiṃho 'bravīd idam
tasmād yad anurūpaṃ hi sāṃprataṃ tv iha manyase taṃ preṣaya yathānyāyaṃ kurubhyo nṛpasattama
kṛtam ity eva saubhrātram ācariṣyanti pāṇḍavāḥ
saṃkulā ca tadā bhūmiś caturaṅgabalānvitā
kṛtabuddhiṣu kartāraḥ kartṛṣu brahmavādinaḥ
śiṣyaiḥ parivṛto vidvān nītiśāstrārthakovidaḥ pāṇḍavānāṃ hitārthāya kauravān prati jagmivān
purohitaṃ te prasthāpya nagaraṃ nāgasāhvayam dūtān prasthāpayām āsuḥ pārthivebhyas tatas tataḥ prasthāpya dūtān anyatra dvārakāṃ puruṣarṣabhaḥ svayaṃ jagāma kauravyaḥ kuntīputro dhanaṃjayaḥ
siṃhāsanagataṃ paścāt parivṛtya ca dṛṣṭavān
paścād duryodhanaṃ śaurir apaśyad amitadyutiḥ

śrībhagavān uvāca dhārtarāṣṭrasya tad vākyaṃ śrutvāmaravarottamaḥ puruṣottamas tv idaṃ vākyaṃ duryodhanam abhāṣata tvaddarśanārthī govinda ahaṃ pūrvam ihāgataḥ prītyarthī sa bhavān sāhyaṃ mama dātum ihārhati
etad viditvā kaunteya vicārya ca punaḥ punaḥ tān vā varaya sāhāyye māṃ sācivyena vā punaḥ
duryodhanas tu tat sainyaṃ sarvam āvarayat tadā sarvakṣatrasya purato devadānavayor api
tataḥ pītāmbaradharo jagatsraṣṭā janārdanaḥ
akṣauhiṇīpatī rājan mahāvīryaparākramaḥ
vicitrasragdharāḥ sarve vicitrāmbarabhūṣaṇāḥ
śalyasya mantribhiḥ sarvair duryodhanavaśānugaiḥ avijñātaṃ ca śalyasya hṛdayasya priyaṃ kṛtam
śilpibhir vividhaiś caiva krīḍās tatra prayojitāḥ tatra mālyāni māṃsāni bhakṣyaṃ peyaṃ ca satkṛtam kūpāś ca vividhākārā manoharṣavivardhanāḥ vāpyaś ca vividhākārā audakāni gṛhāṇi ca

dṛṣṭvā duryodhanaṃ rājā vismitaḥ sa narottamaḥ mantriṇaś cāpi śaṃsanti madrarājaṃ suvismitam duryodhanena te rājañ śuśrūṣitam idaṃ prabho priyaṃ priyārhasya sataḥ kartum arhasi bhūmipa tam aṅkam upaveśyāśu mūrdhni cāghrāya madrarāṭ
yathaiva pāṇḍavās tubhyaṃ tathaiva bhavato hy aham anumānyaṃ ca pālyaṃ ca bhaktaṃ ca bhaja māṃ vibho evam etan mahārāja yathā vadasi bhārata varaṃ dadāmi te prīta evam etad bhaviṣyati

śalya uvāca dṛṣṭvā tu pāṇḍavān rājan na mithyā kartum utsahe ahaṃ gamiṣye draṣṭuṃ vai yudhiṣṭhiram ariṃdamam dṛṣṭvā yudhiṣṭhiraṃ rājan kṣipram eṣye narādhipa avaśyaṃ cāpi draṣṭavyaḥ pāṇḍavaḥ puruṣarṣabhaḥ kṣipram āgamyatāṃ rājan pāṇḍavaṃ vīkṣya pārthiva tvayy adhīnāḥ sma rājendra varadānaṃ smarasva naḥ kṣipram eṣyāmi bhadraṃ te gacchasva svapuraṃ nṛpa pariṣvajya tathānyonyaṃ śalyaduryodhanāv ubhau
cirāt tu dṛṣṭvā rājānaṃ mātulaṃ samitiṃjayam āsanebhyaḥ samutpetuḥ sarve sahayudhiṣṭhirāḥ
nivedya cārghyaṃ vidhivan madrarājāya bhārata kuśalaṃ pāṇḍavo 'pṛcchac chalyaṃ sarvasukhāvaham sa taiḥ parivṛtaḥ sarvaiḥ pāṇḍavair dharmacāribhiḥ tatra pādyam athārghyaṃ ca nyavedayata pāṇḍavaḥ
draupadī ca subhadrā ca abhimanyuś ca bhārata

utthānaṃ saṃyamo dākṣyam apramādo dhṛtiḥ smṛtiḥ dāne tapasi satye ca bhava tāta yudhiṣṭhira kṣamā damaś ca satyaṃ ca ahiṃsā ca yudhiṣṭhira adbhutaś ca punar lokas tvayi rājan pratiṣṭhitaḥ mṛdur vadānyo brahmaṇyo dātā dharmaparāyaṇaḥ dharmās te viditā rājan bahavo lokasākṣikāḥ sarvaṃ jagad idaṃ tāta viditaṃ te paraṃtapa diṣṭyā kṛcchram idaṃ rājan pāritaṃ bharatarṣabha diṣṭyā paśyāmi rājendra dharmātmānaṃ sahānugam nistīrṇaṃ duṣkaraṃ rājaṃs tvāṃ dharmanicayaṃ prabho
duryodhanasya cāsmākaṃ viśeṣo 'tra na vidyate
vāsudevena sārathyaṃ kāryaṃ pārthasya mātula
tejovadhanimittaṃ māṃ tat kariṣyāmi te priyam
ahaṃ tasya bhaviṣyāmi sārathī raṇamūrdhani
devadānavagandharvāḥ kiṃnaroragarākṣasāḥ duḥkhaṃ prāptā yathā rājaṃs tac chṛṇuṣva narādhipa
prajāpatir bhaved eṣa candro vaiśravaṇo yamaḥ varuṇaḥ pāśahasto vā dharma eva bhavet svayam
ghorarūpo mahāraudras tīvras tīvraparākramaḥ
mayā hi nihataḥ śete triśirās tvaṃ ca viddhi vai sa prahvaḥ prāñjalir bhūtvā idaṃ vacanam abravīt

mene kṛtārtham ātmānaṃ hatvā śatruṃ surārihā athainaṃ nābhijānanti varṣam ekaṃ tathāgatam atha saṃvatsare pūrṇe bhūtāḥ paśupateḥ prabho te cākrośanta maghavān naḥ prabhur brahmahā iti tata indro vrataṃ ghoram acarat pākaśāsanaḥ tapasā ca susaṃyuktaḥ saha devair marudgaṇaiḥ samudre ca pṛthivyāṃ ca vanaspatiṣu strīṣu ca vibhajya brahmahatyāṃ ca tāṃś ca saṃyojayad varaiḥ varadas tu varaṃ dattvā pṛthivyai sāgarāya ca vanaspatibhyaḥ strībhyaś ca brahmahatyāṃ nunoda tām tatas tu śuddho bhagavān devair lokaiś ca pūjitaḥ indrasthānam upātiṣṭhat pūjyamāno maharṣibhiḥ

grastā lokāś ca vṛtreṇa sarve bharatasattama tvaṣṭṛtejovivṛddhena vṛtreṇa sumahātmanā sarve gandhendriyarasā hṛtā bhārata tena vai pṛthivī vāyur ākāśa āpo jyotiś ca pañcamaḥ hṛtam etan mahārāja vṛtreṇa sumahātmanā
śalyaḥ sarvaṃ vyāptaṃ jagat tena vṛtreṇetīha naḥ śrutam vṛtrabhūteṣu lokeṣu bhayam indram upāgamat athendro hi mahātejāḥ sametya saha devataiḥ amantrayata tejasvī vṛtrasya vadhakāraṇāt
praṇipatya mahātmānaṃ sarvabhūtanamaskṛtam
gandharvoragarakṣāṇāṃ sarveṣām amarottama
**** **** cakruś caiva vibhor vacaḥ tataḥ sametya vṛtreṇa
etad veditum icchāmi bruvantu ṛṣisattamāḥ
atha dīrghasya kālasya śakraḥ saṃcintya bhārata śakrasya saha vṛtreṇa punar jagmur yathāgatam
varaś cānena saṃprāpto hy avadhyo daivatair api tat kathaṃ tv iha kartavyam upāyaṃ cintaye sadā
jagrāha ca sa taṃ phenam indro vṛtranibarhaṇam nigṛhya śakro bāhubhyāṃ prāhiṇod vṛtramastake
rājā vā kriyatām adya mahendro vātha mṛgyatām
tejasvī ca yaśasvī ca dhārmikaś caiva nityadā
om ity ukte 'tha nahuṣo devarājye 'bhiṣecitaḥ dharmaṃ puraskṛtya tadā sarvalokādhipo 'bhavat
evam uktas tayā devyā vākyam āha bṛhaspatiḥ
avijñātaḥ suragaṇair gato na jñāyate prabho
śalya uvāca viṣṇur visarjayām āsa devān sarṣipurogamān
sā dṛṣṭvā tāṃ tato devīṃ pratyuvāca yaśasvinī
evam uktā tathendrāṇyā devī vākyam athābravīt
sarasas tasya madhye tu padminī mahatī śubhā gaureṇonnatanālena padmena mahatā vṛtā
kena cāsmi tavākhyāta ihastho varavarṇini
yathaiva ca mahārāja tvayā vṛtro niṣūditaḥ
aham indro 'smi devānāṃ lokānāṃ ca maheśvaraḥ mayi havyaṃ ca kavyaṃ ca lokāś caiva sanātanāḥ
atha saṃcintya nahuṣo balavīryeṇa bhārata visṛjya supratīkaṃ ca nāgam airāvataṃ tathā haṃsayuktaṃ vimānaṃ ca hariyuktaṃ tathā ratham sa tu darpeṇa mahatā paribhūya mahāmunīn
hutvāgniṃ so 'bravīd rājañ chakram anviṣyatām iti
tat sarvaṃ kathayadhvaṃ me yathendratvam upeyivān
tvayi praṇaṣṭe deveśa viśvaṃ pravyathitaṃ jagat parasparabhayodvignaṃ babhūvārtam arājakam tato devaiḥ sagandharvaiḥ sarṣisaṃghaiḥ sapāvakaiḥ mānuṣo nahuṣo rājā devarājye 'bhiṣecitaḥ
**** **** ca hi lokapālān sametya vai prītamanā mahendraḥ uvāca cainān
diṣṭyā paśyāma devendra diṣṭyā lokān punarnavān diṣṭyā dharmaḥ sthito loke diṣṭyā lokāḥ pratiṣṭhitāḥ
nahuṣas tu sudurbuddhir durātmā pāpacetanaḥ
saṃgrāme saṃkṣayo ghoro bhaviṣyaty acirād iva
tataḥ śalyaḥ sahānīkaḥ kampayann iva medinīm jagāma dhārtarāṣṭrasya nagaraṃ nāgasāhvayam
ājagāma mahābāhur yavaneśaś ca pārthivaḥ
virāṭanagare dhīraḥ kiṃ tvaṃ tatraiva nāgataḥ
duryodhanaḥ sahāmātyo vinaṅkṣayati na saṃśayaḥ
asmad dhitam idaṃ vākyaṃ bhīṣmeṇoktaṃ mahātmanā eṣa vakṣyati dharmātmā vākyaṃ vākyaviśāradaḥ
putro mahyaṃ mṛtyuvaśaṃ jagāma duryodhanaḥ saṃjaya rāgabuddhiḥ
bhāgaṃ gantuṃ ghaṭate mandabuddhir mahātmanāṃ saṃjaya dīptatejasām
etad balaṃ pūrṇam asmākam evaṃ yat sātvatāṃ nāsti tṛtīyam anyat
ajātaśatruṃ prasaheta ko 'nyo yeṣāṃ sa syād agraṇīr vṛṣṇisiṃhaḥ
śāradvataḥ kuśalī tāta vipraḥ
droṇaḥ saputraś ca kṛpaś ca vīro nāsmāsu pāpāni vadanti kaccit kaccid rājyaṃ dhṛtarāṣṭraṃ saputraṃ sametyāhuḥ kuravaḥ sarva eva
na taṃ dṛṣṭvā kaccid atra pratīpaṃ gantā gṛhāñ jātu jagāma raṅgāt
teṣāṃ sarveṣāṃ śamam evaṃ vidadhyāḥ
dhanāni ratnāni bahūni rājyaṃ kalyāṇarūpāṇi ca vāhanāni na durlabhānīha narapradhānā vṛddhasya rājñaḥ śāsane tiṣṭhatāṃ vaḥ
karmār abhedyac ca dharmān apetam
no vindanti kṣatriyāḥ saṃjayāpi
adhīyīta kṣatriyo 'tho yajeta dadyād dhanaṃ na tu yāceta kiṃ cit na yājayen na tu cādhyāpayīta evaṃ smṛtaḥ kṣatradharmaḥ purāṇaḥ
sa dharmātmā dharmam adhītya puṇyaṃ yad icchayā vrajati brahmalokam
yatrāpramatto rakṣati bhūmipālo niyojayan sveṣu dharmeṣu varṇān
kāmātmāno mandabuddher viceṣṭāṃ
jānāsi tvaṃ dhārtarāṣṭrasya mohaṃ durātmanaḥ pāpavaśānugasya
vanaṃ rājā dhṛtarāṣṭro vane vyāghrāś ca pāṇḍavāḥ siṃho na naśyeta vanābhiguptaḥ
kṛṣīvalā bibhrati ye ca lokaṃ teṣāṃ sarveṣāṃ kuśalaṃ sma pṛccheḥ āśaṃsanto 'smākam anusmaranto yathāśakti dharmamātrāṃ carantaḥ ślāghasva māṃ kuśalinaṃ sma tebhyo hy anāmayaṃ tāta pṛccher jaghanyam
nivedayāsmāsu yathānuvṛttam
tathaiva ye tasya vaśānugāś ca ye cāpy anye pārthivāś ca pradhānāḥ tebhyo yathārhaṃ kuśalaṃ sma sarvaṃ tathā vācyaṃ madvacanād dhi sūta

bhūriśravās tāta nipātayodhī maheṣvāso rathinām uttamo 'gryaḥ gatvā sma taṃ madvacanena brūyāḥ śalyaṃ tathā madvacanāt pratītaḥ maheṣvāso rathinām uttamo 'gryaḥ samaḥ śalo rakṣitā pṛṣṭham asya hrīniṣedho devitā vai matākṣaḥ satyavrataḥ purumitro jayaś ca ye prasthānaṃ tatra me nābhyanandaṃs teṣāṃ sarveṣāṃ kuśalaṃ tāta pṛccheḥ
vṛddhāṃ gāndhārīṃ samupetya saṃjaya kuntyā dvitīyām abhivādya pṛccheḥ
ākhyāya māṃ kuśalinaṃ sma tebhyo hy anāmayaṃ saṃjaya tāta pṛccheḥ
na cāpy etac chakyam ekena vaktuṃ nānādeśyā bahavo jātisaṃghāḥ viproṣito bālavad draṣṭum icchan namasye 'haṃ saṃjaya bhaimasenān te me yathā vācam imāṃ yathoktāṃ tvayocyamānāṃ śṛṇuyus tathā kuru
tatas tu saṃjayaḥ kṣipram ekāhnaiva paraṃtapa yāti sma hāstinapuraṃ niśākāle samāviśat
jāgarti ced abhivādyasya pādau nivedyāhaṃ pāṇḍavoktiṃ sayuktim
akurvataḥ sidhyati cāpi sarvaṃ tasmād āhuḥ puruṣaṃ karmaṇo 'nyat
dhṛtarāṣṭra uvāca anujñāto 'syāvasathaṃ paraihi prapadyasva śayanaṃ sūtaputra prātaḥ śrotāraḥ kuravaḥ sabhāyām ajātaśatror vacanaṃ tvayoktam
evam uktaḥ praviśyātha kṣattā rājānam abravīt
tan me brūhi vidura sarvaṃ yathāvat sāntvaṃ tasmai sarvam ajātaśatroḥ yathā ca nas tāta hitaṃ bhaveta prājñāś ca sarve sukhino bhaveyuḥ

vāksaṃyamaś ca dānaṃ ca naiteṣv etāni kṛtsnaśaḥ ekasmād vṛkṣād yajñapātrāṇi rājan sruk ca droṇī voḍhanī pīḍanī ca etad rājan bruvato me nibodha ekasmāt puruṣāj jāyate 'sac ca sac ca gurutvaṃ tvayi saṃprekṣya bahūn kleśāṃs titikṣate duryodhane saubaleye karṇe duḥśāsane tathā eteṣv aiśvaryam ādhāya kathaṃ tvaṃ bhūtim icchasi ātmajñānaṃ samārambhas titikṣā dharmanityatā
yo 'nyathā santam ātmānam anyathā pratipadyate kitavena kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ caureṇātmāpahāriṇā
kāmād arthaṃ vṛṇīte yo mokṣād arthaṃ sa vindati rājanītiṃ samīkṣyātha sa vai paṇḍita ucyate
yaḥ prāpya mānuṣaṃ janma mokṣadvāram apāvṛtam gṛheṣu sajjate mūḍhas tam ārūḍhacyutaṃ viduḥ
śrāddhaṃ pitṛbhyo na dadāti daivatāni na cārcati suhṛn mitraṃ na labhate tam āhur mūḍhalakṣaṇam
akṣamāvān paraṃ doṣair ātmānaṃ caiva yojayet kṣamā vaśīkṛtir loke kṣamayā kiṃ na sādhyate śāntikhaḍgaḥ kare yasya kiṃ kariṣyati durjanaḥ atṛṇe patito vahniḥ svayam evopaśāmyati
pṛthivyāṃ sāgarāntāyāṃ dvāv imau puruṣādhamau
dvāv imau na virājete viparītena karmaṇā gṛhasthaś ca nirārambhaḥ kāryavāṃś caiva bhikṣukaḥ
dvāv ambhasi niveṣṭavyau gale baddhvā dṛḍhāṃ śilām dhanavantam adātāraṃ daridraṃ cātapasvinam

haraṇaṃ ca parasvānāṃ paradārābhimarśanam suhṛdaś ca parityāgas trayo doṣāḥ kṣayāvahāḥ trividhaṃ narakasyedaṃ dvāraṃ nāśanam ātmanaḥ kāmaḥ krodhas tathā lobhas tasmād etat trayaṃ tyajet bhaktaṃ ca bhajamānaṃ ca tavāsmīti ca vādinam trīn etāñ śaraṇaṃ prāptān viṣame 'pi na saṃtyajet varapradānaṃ rājyaṃ ca putrajanma ca bhārata śatroś ca mokṣaṇaṃ kṛcchrāt trīṇi caikaṃ ca tatsamam
catvāri karmāṇy abhayaṃkarāṇi bhayaṃ prayacchanty ayathākṛtāni mānāgnihotram uta mānamaunaṃ mānenādhītam uta mānayajñaḥ

arthāgamo nityam arogitā ca priyā ca bhāryā priyavādinī ca vaśyaś ca putro 'rthakarī ca vidyā ṣaḍ jīvalokasya sukhāni rājan nārīṃ vigatakāmās tu kṛtārthāś ca prayojanam nāvaṃ nistīrṇakāntārā āturāś ca cikitsakam ārogyam ānṛṇyam avipravāsaḥ sadbhir manuṣyaiḥ saha saṃprayogaḥ svapratyayā vṛttir abhītavāsaḥ ṣaḍ jīvalokasya sukhāni rājan īrṣur ghṛṇī na saṃtuṣṭaḥ krodhano nityaśaṅkitaḥ parabhāgyopajīvī ca ṣaḍ ete nityaduḥkhitāḥ
yasyaitāni nimittāni tasyāsan naḥ parābhavaḥ
sulabhāḥ puruṣā rājan satataṃ priyavādinaḥ apriyasya ca pathyasya vaktā śrotā ca durlabhaḥ
anarthe caiva niratam arthe caiva parāṅmukham
supuṣpitaḥ syād aphalaḥ phalitaḥ syād durāruhaḥ apakvaḥ pakvasaṃkāśo na tu śīryeta karhi cit
tāvan na tasya sukṛtaṃ kiṃ cit kāryaṃ kadā cana
yathā yathā mahat tantraṃ vistaraś ca yathā yathā tathā tathā mahad duḥkhaṃ sukhaṃ tu na tathā tathā
bandhur ātmātmanas tasya yenaivātmātmanā jitaḥ sa eva niyato bandhuḥ sa eva niyato ripuḥ
na devā yaṣṭim ādāya rakṣanti paśupālavat yaṃ hi rakṣitum icchanti buddhyā saṃyojayanti tam
svayaṃvare sthitā kanyā keśinī nāma nāmataḥ rūpeṇāpratimā rājan viśiṣṭapatikāmyayā virocano 'tha daiteyas tadā tatrājagāma ha prāptum icchaṃs tatas tatra daityendraṃ prāha keśinī
etasminn antare tatra sudhanvā pratyadṛśyata iti hovāca vacanaṃ virocanam anuttamam pratyutthāyāsanaṃ tasmai pādyam arghyaṃ dadau punaḥ
na matto hy adhiko 'si tvaṃ guṇato janmato 'pi vā
pitāputrau sahāsītāṃ dvau viprau dvau ca pārthivau dvau caiva vaiśyau śūdrau ca na tv anyāv itaretaraṃ
vidura uvāca ity uktvā jagmatus tau tu prahrādasya gṛhaṃ prati gatvā taṃ dadṛśus tatra daityānām īśvaraṃ tadā tāv āgatāv abhiprekṣya prahrādo vismitas tadā papracchāgamane hetuṃ ubhayor ditijas tataḥ
tat tvāṃ sudhanvan pṛcchāmi mā pṛṣṭam anṛtaṃ vadīḥ

prahlādaḥ na kalmāṣo na kapilo na kṛṣṇo na ca lohitaḥ aṇīyān kṣuradhārāyāḥ ko dharmaṃ vaktum arhati yad yat tattvaṃ vakṣyasi tvaṃ yadi vā nāpi vakṣyasi prahlāda praśnam anaghaṃ mūrdhnā te viphaliṣyati
satyaṃ prabrūhi daityendra satyaṃ hi paramaṃ tapaḥ

sudhanvovāca gāṃ pradadyās tv aurasāya yad vānyat syāt priyaṃ dhanam dvayor vivadatos tathyaṃ vācyaṃ ca matimaṃs tvayā putravān yo bhaved brahman sākṣye cāpi bhavet sthitaḥ tayor vivadator haṃsa kathaṃ dharmaḥ pravartate

haṃsaḥ pṛṣṭo dharmaṃ na vibrūyād gokarṇaśithilaṃ caran dharmād bhraśyati rājaṃs tu nāsya loko 'sti na prajāḥ dharma etān saṃrujati yathā nady anukūlajān ye dharmam anupaśyantas tūṣṇīṃ dhyāyanta āsate śreṣṭho 'rdhaṃ tu haret tatra bhavet pādaś ca kartari pādas teṣu sabhāsatsu yatra nindyo na nindyate anenā bhavati śreṣṭho mucyante ca sabhāsadaḥ prahlādaḥ mohād vā caiva kāmād vā mithyāvādaṃ yadi bruvan dhṛtarāṣṭra tvāṃ pṛcchāmi durvivaktā tu kāṃ vaset
yāṃ ca rātrim abhidrugdho yāṃ ca mitre priye mṛte sarvasvena ca yo hīno durvivaktā tu tāṃ vaset
na krodhino 'rtho na nṛśaṃsasya mitraṃ krūrasya na strī sukhino na vidyā na kāmino hrīr alasasya kośaḥ sarvaṃ tu na syād anavasthitasya
tatra pūrvacaturvargo dambhārtham api sevyate uttaras tu caturvargo nāmahātmasu tiṣṭhati

atha yo naiva vibrūyān na satyaṃ nānṛtaṃ vadet ye dharmam abhyasūyantas tūṣṇīṃ dhyāyanta āsate śreṣṭhaḥ pādaṃ haret tatra bhavet pādaś ca kartari pādas teṣu sabhāsatsu yatra nindyo na nindyate anenāḥ śreṣṭho bhavati pramucyante sabhāsadaḥ eno gacchati kartāraṃ nindārho yatra nindyate
tasmāt pāpaṃ na kurvīta puruṣaḥ śaṃsitavrataḥ
tasmāt puṇyaṃ niṣeveta puruṣaḥ susamāhitaḥ
pūjāṃ ca mahatīṃ prāpya sa sarvatra virocate
punāti hy ātmanātmānaṃ sukṛtaṃ cāsya vindati
vṛttaṃ yatnena saṃrakṣed vittam eti ca yāti ca akṣīṇo vittataḥ kṣīṇo vṛttatas tu hato hataḥ gobhiḥ paśubhir aśvaiś ca kṛṣyā ca susamṛddhayā kulāni na prarohanti yāni hīnāni vṛttataḥ
mahaty apy aparādhe 'pi teṣāṃ daṇḍo visarjanam
jarā rūpaṃ harati hi dhairyam āśā mṛtyuḥ prāṇān dharmacaryām asūyā kāmo hriyaṃ vṛttam anāryasevā krodhaḥ śriyaṃ sarvam evābhimānaḥ
ādeśakṛd vṛttihantā dvijānāṃ preṣakaś ca yaḥ
dyūtam etat purākalpe dṛṣṭaṃ vairakaraṃ nṛṇām tasmād dyūtaṃ na seveta hāsyārtham api buddhimān
bāṇaḥ śākuniko mantrī ekākī stambhasevakaḥ sadyorogī vivādī ca saptaitān sevakāṃs tyajet
nāparīkṣya mahīpālaḥ kuryāt sacivam ātmanaḥ
dharme cārthe ca kāme ca sa rājā rājasattamaḥ
anadhītya yathā vedān na vipraḥ śrāddham arhati evam aśrutaṣāḍguṇyo na mantraṃ śrotum arhati
ahanyamāno bhayakṛn na hatāj jāyate bhayam

uktaṃ mayā jātamātre 'pi rājan duryodhanaṃ tyaja putraṃ tvam ekam tasya tyāgāt putraśatasya vṛddhir asyātyāgāt putraśatasya nāśaḥ na vṛddhir bahumantavyā yā vṛddhiḥ kṣayam āvahet kṣayo 'pi bahumantavyo yaḥ kṣayo vṛddhim āvahet
ye vai bhedanaśīlās tu sakāmā nistrapāḥ śaṭhāḥ
sīdatā yat kṛtaṃ tena tat pāpaṃ samam aśnute
arthasaṃtatikāmaś ca rakṣed etāni nityaśaḥ mitravantaṃ suvākyaṃ ca suhṛdaṃ paripālayet duṣkulīnaḥ kulīno vā maryādāṃ yo na laṅghayet dharmāpekṣī mṛdur hrīmān sa kulīnaśatād varaḥ
na cātiguṇavatsv eṣā nātyantaṃ nirguṇeṣu ca naiṣā guṇān kāmayate nairguṇyān nānurajyate unmattā gaur ivāndhā śrīḥ kva cid evāvatiṣṭhate
ātmanaḥ pratikūlāni vijānan na samācaret
malaṃ pṛthivyā vāhīkāḥ puruṣasyānṛtaṃ malam
ālasyaṃ madamohau ca cāpalaṃ goṣṭhir eva ca stabdhatā cābhimānitvaṃ tathātyāgitvam eva ca ete vai sapta doṣās tu sadā vidyārthināṃ matāḥ
tasmāt tu puruṣo yatnād dharmaṃ saṃcinuyāc chanaiḥ
ahaṃgatenaiva caran vimārgān na cātmano yogam upaiti kaś cit
sadarthayogān avagamāt samantāt pravartate bhogayogena dehī tad vai mahāmohanam indriyāṇāṃ mithyārthayogasya gatir hi nityā mithyārthayogābhihatāntarātmā smarann upāste viṣayān samantāt
amūḍhavṛtteḥ puruṣasyeha kuryāt kiṃ vai mṛtyus tārṇa ivāsya vyāghraḥ

dhṛtarāṣṭra uvāca yān evāhur ijyayā sādhulokān dvijātīnāṃ puṇyatamān sanātanān teṣāṃ parārthaṃ kathayantīha vedā etad vidvān naiti kathaṃ nu karma evaṃ hy avidvān upayāti tatra tathārthajātaṃ ca vadanti vedāḥ sa neha āyāti paraṃ parātmā prayāti mārgeṇa nihatya mārgān ko 'sau niyuṅkte tam ajaṃ purāṇaṃ sa ced idaṃ sarvam anukrameṇa kiṃ vāsya kāryam atha vā sukhaṃ ca tan me vidvan brūhi sarvaṃ yathāvat doṣo mahān atra vibhedayoge hy anādiyogena bhavanti nityāḥ tathāsya nādhikyam apaiti kiṃ cid anādiyogena bhavanti puṃsaḥ ya etad vā bhagavān sa nityo vikārayogena karoti viśvam tathā ca tacchaktir iti sma manyate tathārthayoge ca bhavanti vedāḥ

tasmin sthito vāpy ubhayaṃ hi nityaṃ jñānena vidvān pratihanti siddham tathānyathā puṇyam upaiti dehī tathāgataṃ pāpam upaiti siddham gatvobhayaṃ karmaṇā bhujyate 'sthiraṃ śubhasya pāpasya sa cāpi karmaṇā
yeṣāṃ dharme na ca spardhā teṣāṃ tajjñānasādhanam te brāhmaṇā ito muktāḥ svargaṃ yānti triviṣṭapam tasya samyak samācāram āhur vedavido janāḥ nainaṃ manyeta bhūyiṣṭhaṃ bāhyam ābhyantaraṃ janam
kuśavalkalacelādyaṃ brahmasvaṃ yogino viduḥ
yo 'nyathā santam ātmānam anyathā pratipadyate kiṃ tena na kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ coreṇātmāpahāriṇā
lokaḥ svabhāvavṛttir hi nimeṣonmeṣavat sadā

dhṛtarāṣṭra uvāca kasyaiṣa maunaḥ kataran nu maunaṃ prabrūhi vidvann iha maunabhāvam maunena vidvān uta yāti maunaṃ kathaṃ mune maunam ihācaranti yato na vedā manasā sahainam anupraviśanti tato 'tha maunam yatrotthito vedaśabdas tathāyaṃ sa tanmayatvena vibhāti rājan

etat samṛddham atyṛddhaṃ tapo bhavati kevalam idaṃ jagad bhāti mahānubhāva nirdiśya samyak pravadanti vedās tad viśvavairūpyam udāharanti tadartham uktaṃ tapa etad ijyā tābhyām asau puṇyam upaiti vidvān puṇyena pāpaṃ vinihatya paścāt saṃjāyate jñānavidīpitātmā jñānena cātmānam upaiti vidvān athānyathā vargaphalānukāṅkṣī asmin kṛtaṃ tat parigṛhya sarvam amutra bhuṅkte punar eti mārgam

sanatsujāta uvāca śrīr evam ekā yo 'dhīte tac ca tāvac ca tatsamam etat samṛddham apy ṛddhaṃ tapo bhavati nānyathā tapomūlam idaṃ sarvaṃ yan māṃ pṛcchasi kṣatriya tapasā vedavidvāṃsaḥ paraṃ tv amṛtam āpnuyuḥ kalmaṣaṃ tapaso brūhi śrutaṃ niṣkalmaṣaṃ tapaḥ sanatsujāta yenedaṃ vidyāṃ guhyaṃ sanātanam
doṣatyāgo 'pramādaḥ syāt sa cāpy aṣṭaguṇo mataḥ
doṣā damasya ye proktās tān doṣān parivarjayet śreyāṃs tu ṣaḍvidhas tyāgas tṛtīyas tatra duṣkaraḥ tena duḥkhaṃ taranty eva tasmiṃs tyakte jitaṃ bhavet

iṣṭāpūrtaṃ dvitīyaṃ syān nityaṃ vairāgyayogataḥ kāmatyāgaś ca rājendra sa tṛtīya iti smṛtaḥ apramādī bhaved etaiḥ sa cāpy aṣṭaguṇo mahān satyaṃ dhyānaṃ samādhānaṃ codyaṃ vairāgyam eva ca asteyo brahmacaryaṃ ca tathāsaṃgraha eva ca evaṃ doṣā madasyoktās tān doṣān parivarjayet doṣatyāgo 'pramādaḥ syāt sa cāpy aṣṭaguṇo mataḥ tāṃs tu satyamukhān āhuḥ satye hy amṛtam āhitam satyātmā bhava rājendra satye lokāḥ pratiṣṭhitāḥ nivṛttenaiva doṣeṇa tapovratam ihācaret etad dhātṛkṛtaṃ vṛttaṃ satyam eva satāṃ vratam
na ca dravyais tad bhavati nopayuktaiś ca kāmataḥ
nāsya paryeṣaṇaṃ gacchet pratyarthiṣu kathaṃ cana avicinvann imaṃ vede tataḥ paśyati taṃ prabhum
tan mūlato vyākaraṇaṃ vyākarotīti tat tathā
jñānādiṣu sthito 'py evaṃ kṣatriya brahma paśyati
buddhau pralīne manasi pracintyā vidyā hi sā brahmacaryeṇa labhyā
dhṛtarāṣṭra uvāca brahmacaryeṇa yā vidyā śakyā veditum añjasā tat kathaṃ brahmacaryaṃ syād etad vidvan bravīhi me
yadi sarve pramucyante kāmā ye hṛdi saṃsthitāḥ atha mṛtyor mṛta iti tatra brahma samaśnute
tasmāt tām eva yatnena buddhimān pratipadyate
śiṣyavṛttikrameṇaiva vidyām āpnoti yaḥ śuciḥ brahmacaryavratasyāsya prathamaḥ pāda ucyate
ācāryeṇātmakṛtaṃ vijānañ jñātvā cārthaṃ bhāvito 'smīty anena yan manyate taṃ prati hṛṣṭabuddhiḥ sa vai tṛtīyo brahmacaryasya pādaḥ
jñānādayo dvādaśa yasya rūpam anyāni cāṅgāni tathā balaṃ ca ācāryayoge phalatīti cāhur brahmārthayogena ca brahmacaryam
ākāṅkṣārthasya saṃyogād rasabhedārthinām iva evaṃ hy etat samājñāya tādṛg bhāvaṃ gatā ime
tasmiñ jagat sarvam idaṃ pratiṣṭhitaṃ ya etad vidur amṛtās te bhavanti
yasya deve parā bhaktir yathā deve tathā gurau tasya te kathitā hy arthāḥ prakāśante mahātmanaḥ
tat pratiṣṭhās tad amṛtaṃ lokās tad brahma tad yaśaḥ bhūtāni jajñire tasmāt pralayaṃ yānti tatra ca yoginas taṃ prapaśyanti bhagavantaṃ sanātanam
viṣaṃ bhuṅkṣva sahāmātyair vināśaṃ prāpnuhi dhruvam rājan kena vinā nābhyāṃ sphītaṃ kṛṣṇājinaṃ varam
namaḥ puṃse purāṇāya pūrṇānandāya viṣṇave nirastanikhiladhvāntatejase viśvahetave
ete cānye ca bahavaḥ pārthivā bharatarṣabha
abrūtāṃ tāta dharmeṇa vāsudevadhanaṃjayau
saṃśṛṇvatas tasya durbhāṣiṇo vai durātmanaḥ sūtaputrasya sūta yo yoddhum āśaṃsati māṃ sadaiva mandaprajñaḥ kālapakvo 'timūḍhaḥ
tathā pāñcālaiḥ sṛñjayaiś cāpi rājan
nūnaṃ hy etān nirdahed gāṇḍivaṃ ca
tapodamābhyāṃ dharmaguptyā dhanena

senāgragaṃ daṃśitaṃ bhīmasenaṃ svālakṣaṇaṃ vīrahaṇaṃ pareṣām ghnantaṃ camūm antakasaṃnikāśaṃ tadā smartā vacanasyātimānī yadā draṣṭā bhīmasenena nāgān nipātitān girikūṭaprakāśān kumbhair ivāsṛg vamato bhinnakumbhāṃs tadā yuddhaṃ dhārtarāṣṭro 'nvatapsyat
mahorasko dīrghabāhuḥ pramāthī yuddhe 'dvitīyaḥ paramāstravedī śiner naptā tālamātrāyudho 'yaṃ mahāratho vītabhayaḥ kṛtāstraḥ
vidyut sphuliṅgān iva ghorarūpān
asaṃprāptān astrapathaṃ parasya yadā draṣṭā naśyato dhārtarāṣṭrān akurvataḥ karma yuddhe samantāt tadā yuddhaṃ dhārtarāṣṭro 'nvatapsyat
yadā mūrvyāṃ mūlaniḥśeṣam ugraṃ mahāśabdaṃ vajraniṣpeṣatulyam dodhūyamānasya mahāraṇe mayā gāñjīvanādaṃ śroṣyate mandabuddhiḥ
dvidhābhūtau mahāprājñau viddhi brahman paraṃtapau
tasmād etau mahābhāgau prapadya śaraṇaṃ vibho śriyaṃ bhuṅkṣva mahābāho saputrajñātibāndhavaḥ
nācaraṃ vṛjinaṃ kiṃ cid dhārtarāṣṭrasya nityaśaḥ ahaṃ hi pāṇḍavān sarvān haniṣyāmi raṇe sthitān prāg viruddhaiḥ śamaṃ sadbhiḥ kathaṃ vā kriyate punaḥ
teṣām ekakalāṃ pūrṇāṃ pāṇḍavānāṃ na cārhati
sarve hy astravidaḥ śūrāḥ sarve prāptā mahad yaśaḥ api sarvāmaraiśvaryaṃ tyajeyur na punar jayam
ajeyāḥ pāṇḍavā rājan sendrair api surāsuraiḥ
yaś ca droṇavināśāya samutpanno mahāmanāḥ dhṛṣṭadyumnena senānyā pāṇḍavā abhyayuñjata
yuddhe 'pratirathau vīrau pāṇḍavārthe vyavasthitau
sa vai bhīmo mahāvīryaḥ kruddhaḥ parapuraṃjayaḥ
maheśvarasamaṃ krodhe ko hanyād bhīmam āhave
hiḍimbabakakirmīrapramukhāś ca mahābalāḥ
kṛtāstrau balināṃ śreṣṭhau samareṣv aparājitau
svīkṛtās tair janapadāḥ kuravas te sajāṅgalāḥ kathaṃ vīraur jitāṃ bhūmim akhilāṃ pratipadyathāḥ
prārthayanti mahāyuddhe nānubandham avekṣase
aparokṣaṃ mahārāja sākṣāc cainaṃ bravīmy aham
na hantā vidyate cāpi rājan bhīṣmasya kaś cana
naiteṣām arjunaḥ śakta ekaikaṃ prati vīkṣitum sahitās tu naravyāghrā haniṣyanti dhanaṃjayam
pāñcāleṣu ca bhagneṣu ko 'nyaḥ sthātum ihārhati
bhīmasenānurodhāya hanūmān mārutātmajaḥ ātmapratikṛtiṃ tasmin dhvaja āropayiṣyati
bhuvy antarikṣe divi vā narendra eṣāṃ gatir hīyate nātra sarvā
tataḥ śvetas tu vairāṭiḥ ketumān vāhinīpatiḥ
rājyaṃ daddhvaṃ dharmarājasya tūrṇaṃ
ekaparyaṅkaśayanau dṛṣṭau me keśavārjunau
satyāṅkam upadhānaṃ tu kṛtvā śete janārdanaḥ
na nūnaṃ kalmaṣaṃ kiṃ cin mama karmasu vidyate strīratnābhyāṃ sametau yan mitho mām abhyabhāṣatām vismayo me mahān āsīd āstraṃ me bahu saṃgatam hṛṣṭāni caiva romāṇi dṛṣṭvā tau sahitāv ubhau
tato 'bhyacintayaṃ tatra dṛṣṭvā tau puruṣarṣabhau
bahiścarasya prāṇasya priyasya priyakāriṇaḥ matimān matim āsthāya keśavaḥ saṃdadhe vacaḥ
āvayor vacanāt sūta jyeṣṭhān apy abhivādayan yavīyasaś ca kuśalaṃ paścāt pṛṣṭvaivam uttaram
kṛṣṇasya tad vacaḥ śrutvā bhayaṃ māṃ mahad āviśat tava putrasya lobhaṃ tu vartamānaṃ pramṛśyataḥ
yadā tu mene bhūyiṣṭhaṃ tad vaco guṇadoṣataḥ punar eva kurūṇāṃ ca pāṇḍavānāṃ ca buddhimān
īdṛśe 'bhiniviṣṭasya pṛthivīkṣayakārake adharme cāyaśasye ca kārye mahati dāruṇe pāṇḍavair vigrahas tāta sarvathā taṃ na rocaye
vayaṃ ca te 'pi tulyā vai vīryeṇa ca parākramaiḥ samena vayasā caiva prātibhena śrutena ca astreṇa yodhayugyāsu śīghratve kauśale tathā

sukhāny avāpya sahitāḥ kṛtvā karma suduṣkaram visrabdhāḥ svargam eṣyāmaḥ kāle prāpte gatajvarāḥ athābravīn mahārājo dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ sudurmanāḥ viduraṃ viduṣāṃ śreṣṭhaṃ sarvapārthivasaṃnidhau mohito mṛtyupāśena kālasya vaśam āgataḥ tāta karṇena sahitaḥ putro duryodhano mama
āśābaddhāḥ patanti sma sarva eva gatāsavaḥ
bhīṣmadroṇaprabhṛtayaḥ saṃtrastāḥ sādhuyāyinaḥ virāṭanagare bhagnāḥ kiṃ tatra tava dṛśyatām
trikāladarśī bhagavān dhṛtarāṣṭraṃ mahāmuniḥ ānītau vidureṇeha sabhāṃ śīghraṃ praveśitau
yatra bhāve 'pi yad rājan pṛcchase pāṇḍavān prati
purāṇasadanāc caiva purātana iti smṛtaḥ
uddhoṣayed dharer nāma kākavat tattvacintane caraṇāyudhavad dhyāne bakavat sarvataḥ sthitiḥ
saṃjayaḥ vaktā vācaṃ rājamadhye sabhāyāṃ vṛṣṇiśreṣṭho munibhir bhrājamānaḥ

janamejaya uvāca tato yudhiṣṭhiro rājann upagamya nararṣabham virāṭadrupadau caiva kekayānāṃ mahāratham abravīd upasaṃgamya śaṅkhacakragadādharam abhiyācāmahe gatvā prayātuṃ kurusaṃsadam yathā bhīṣmeṇa droṇena bāhlīkena ca dhīmatā anyaiś ca kurubhiḥ sārdhaṃ na yudhyemahi saṃyuge eṣa naḥ prathamaḥ kalpa etan naḥ śreya uttamam evam uktvā sumanasas te 'bhijagmur janārdanam pāṇḍavaiḥ saha rājāno marutvantam ivāmarāḥ tathā ca duḥsahāḥ sarve sadasyaiś ca nararṣabhāḥ
mṛdupūrvaṃ sāmamiśraṃ sāntvam ugraṃ ca mādhava na tu tan nyāyam āsthāya garhitāś ca tato vayam
evam uktaḥ pratyuvāca dharmarājo janārdanam bhrātṝṇāṃ samavetānāṃ sa kāle puruṣottamam
