suyodhanaś ca duṣṭātmā karṇaś ca sahasaubalaḥ
brāhmaṇānāṃ ca sādhūnāṃ rājñaś ca nagarasya ca

duḥśāsanena pāpena tadā dyūte pravartite anāthavat tadā devī draupadī sudurātmanā ākṛṣya keśe rudatī sabhāyāṃ rājasaṃsadi bhīṣmadroṇapramukhato gaur iti vyāhṛtā muhuḥ bhavatā vāritāḥ sarve bhrātaro bhīmavikramāḥ dharmapāśanibaddhāś ca na kiṃ cit pratipedire
**** **** mātrā syād avadhāraṇe
pāṇḍavānāṃ kurūṇāṃ ca pratipatsye nirāmayam
brūhi madvacanaṃ kṛṣṇa suyodhanam apaṇḍitam kṛcchre vane vā vastavyaṃ pure vā nāgasāhvaye
śuṣyet toyanidhiḥ kṛṣṇe na me moghaṃ vaco bhavet
**** **** bhūṣaṇair vividhair api vipraiś ca vividhaiś citrair
sārathyakarmadakṣeṇa rakṣitaṃ dārukeṇa ca kṛtvā pradakṣiṇaṃ śauriḥ prasthānocitabhūṣaṇaḥ
devatābhyo namaskṛtya brāhmaṇān svasti vācya ca prayayau puṇḍarīkākṣaḥ sātyakena sahācyutaḥ
saṃkṣāmyātha namaskāryā sarveṣāṃ vacanād api
yathāvayo yathāsthānaṃ pūjayasva janārdana
dadāti govinda paraṃ dharmarājñe suyodhanaḥ
pitṛdevātithibhyaś ca kaccit pūjā svanuṣṭhitā

evam uktāḥ keśavena munayaḥ saṃśitavratāḥ nāradapramukhāḥ sarve pratyanandanta keśavam adhaḥśirāḥ sarpamālī maharṣiḥ satyadevalaḥ arvāvasuś ca jānuś ca maitreyaḥ śunako balī bako dālbhyaḥ sthūlaśirāḥ kṛṣṇadvaipāyanas tathā āyodadhaumyo dhaumyaś ca āṇimāṇḍavyakauśikau dāmoṣṇīṣas triṣavaṇaḥ parṇādo ghaṭajānukaḥ mauñjāyano vāyubhakṣaḥ pārāśaryo 'tha śārikaḥ śīlavān aśanirdhātā śūnyapālo 'kṛtaśramaḥ śvetaketuś ca katthāmā vaidaś cāpi hiraṇyadaḥ
sabhāyāṃ madhurā vācaḥ śuśrūṣantas tvayeritāḥ kurūṇāṃ pratipattiṃ ca śrotum icchāma keśava
tvatpādasparśasaṃśuddhā bhūmir duṣṭavivarjitā dharmavṛddhyā śobhamānā prītiṃ cādhāsyatīha naḥ
āsīnam āsane divye balatejaḥsamāhitam
nirvairān matsyapāñcālān pāṇḍavān kurubhiḥ saha kṛtvā sukhaṃ yathādharmaṃ kīrtiṃ ca samavāpnuhi
na bhedasyāntaraṃ dātuṃ prayāṇāyāsya vā punaḥ

prayayau puṇḍarīkākṣaḥ kurūṇāṃ sadanaṃ prati ācakramuś ca panthānaṃ grasamānā ivāmbaram dārukeṇa pracoditā hayās tasya mahātmanaḥ annāni śayyā vāsāṃsi tathā ratnāni sarvaśaḥ duryodhanena kṛṣṇārthaṃ pathi saṃvihitaṃ bahu tāḥ sabhāḥ puṇḍarīkākṣo ratnāni ca mahāyaśāḥ nābhyanandan mahābāhur upāyāt kurusaṃsadam
te svadharmān akurvanta saṃpūjya madhusūdanam
yā prītiḥ puṇḍarīkākṣa tavāgamanakāraṇāt
yaṃ gatvābhimukhaḥ saṃkhye na jīvan kaś cid āvrajet yo jetā sarvabhūtānām ajeyo jiṣṇur acyuta
putrī drupadarājasya vikhyātā satyavādinī
janmaprabhṛti saṃprāptaṃ duḥkhaṃ nānāvidhaṃ bahu aśrupūrṇamukhī khinnā sarvaṃ caivānvacintayat
tan naḥ kleśatamaṃ me syāt putraiḥ saha paraṃtapa
paśyatāṃ kuruputrāṇāṃ na me tad duḥkhakāraṇam
sa tv asyā devaputrāyās tvaṃ nātho madhusūdana
kurūṇāṃ pāṇḍavānāṃ ca lokānāṃ cāparājita sarvasyaitasya vārṣṇeya gatis tvam asi mādhava prabhāvaṃ buddhivīryaṃ ca tādṛśaṃ tava keśava
vicitrair āsanair yuktaṃ praviveśa janārdanaḥ
āsanaṃ sarvatobhadraṃ sarvaratnavibhūṣitam kṛṣṇārtham eva saṃsiddhaṃ dhārtarāṣṭrasya śāsanāt
**** **** nābhyanandaj janārdanaḥ punaḥ punaḥ kauraveyo bhojanena nyamantrayat asakṛt prārthyamāno 'pi
pūjāṃ kṛtāṃ prīyamāṇo ko vidvāṃs tyaktum arhati
dviṣadannaṃ na bhoktavyaṃ dviṣantaṃ naiva bhojayet pāṇḍavān dviṣase rājan mama prāṇā hi pāṇḍavāḥ
na nītir asmat pūjā vo bhavatāṃ kurusattamāḥ duryodhanaś ca yuṣmāsu na ca prītiṃ kariṣyati ta evam uktāḥ kṛṣṇena evam astv iti niryayuḥ

taṃ bhuktavantaṃ vividhāḥ suśabdāḥ sūtamāgadhāḥ abhituṣṭuvur āsīnaṃ dāśārham aparājitam śraddhayā parayā yukta idaṃ vacanam abravīt saṃbhramais tuṣya govinda etan naḥ paramaṃ dhanam anyathā vā viśeṣeṇa kas tvām arcitum arhati
mūḍhaś cākṛtabuddhiś ca indriyāṇām anīśvaraḥ kāmānusārī kṛtyeṣu sarveṣv akṛtaniścayaḥ
mānī maurkhyeṇa pārthānāṃ na paśyaty adhikaṃ balam
mṛtyur jayo veti kṛtaikabhāvāḥ kāmātmāno manyuvaśāvinītāḥ
yā me prītiḥ puṣkarākṣa tvaddarśanasamudbhavā sā kim ākhyāyate tubhyam antarātmāsi dehinām
vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ vidurasya vacaḥ śrutvā praśritaṃ puruṣottamaḥ idaṃ hovāca vacanaṃ bhagavān madhusūdanaḥ
brahmādivasudevāntaṃ vaṃśaṃ samanukīrtayan tuṣṭuvuḥ keśavaṃ tatra bahavaḥ sūtamāgadhāḥ
tān abhyanandad govindaḥ sāmnā paramavalgunā te 'bhyarcya devakīputraṃ divi śakram ivāmarāḥ
tato rathena śubhreṇa mahatā kiṅkiṇīkinā hayottamayujā śīghram upātiṣṭhata dārukaḥ
yodhāḥ paraśuhastāś ca śataśo 'tha sahasraśaḥ

duryodhana uvāca bhīṣmadroṇau parityajya tvayā māṃ madhusūdana kimarthaṃ puṇḍarīkākṣa kṛtaṃ vṛṣalabhojanam bhaktaṃ pṛcchasi rājendra ādaraṃ kiṃ na pṛcchasi bhojanaṃ gatajīrṇaṃ tu ādaram ajarāmaram ādareṇopanītāni śākāny api phalāni ca prīṇanti mama gātrāṇi nāmṛtaṃ mānavarjitam varaṃ hālāhalaṃ prītaṃ sadyaḥ prāṇaharaṃ ca yat na tu bhuktaṃ dhanāḍhyasya bhruvā kuṭiliteyuṣe (sic) na jātiḥ kāraṇaṃ tāta guṇāḥ kalyāṇakāraṇam cāṇḍālam api sadvṛttaṃ taṃ devā brāhmaṇaṃ viduḥ kaivartīgarbhasaṃbhūto vyāso nāma mahāmuniḥ tapasā brāhmaṇo jātas tasmāj jātir na kāraṇam
tvan nimittaṃ viśeṣeṇa neha yuktaṃ viśiṣyate
hitaṃ hi dhārtarāṣṭrāṇāṃ pāṇḍavānāṃ tathā hitam śame prayatamānānāṃ tava śāsanakāṅkṣiṇām
ko nu tān yudhi śatrughna sahitān kurupāṇḍavaiḥ
vartāmahe tvayi ca tāṃ tvaṃ ca vartasva nas tathā
tapasvinau mahātmānau vedapratyayadarśakau
tatas tām ānupūrvīṃ sa punar evānvakīrtayat
saṃnahyasva ca varmāṇi yāni cānyāni santi te yad āhvayasi darpeṇa brāhmaṇapramukhāñ janān
naitādṛk puruṣo rājan kṣatradharmam anusmaran manasā nṛpaśārdūla bhavet purapuraṃjayaḥ
mā sma bhūyaḥ kṣipeḥ kaṃ cid aviditvā balābalam
kāmakrodhau lobhamohau madamānau tathaiva ca mātsaryāhaṃkṛtī caiva kramād eta udāhṛtāḥ
nirmātā sarvalokānām īśvaraḥ sarvakarmakṛt yasya nārāyaṇo bandhur arjuno duḥsaho yudhi kas tam utsahate jetuṃ triṣu lokeṣu bhārata vīraṃ kapidhvajaṃ jiṣṇuṃ yasya nāsti samo yudhi
eṣā vai vāruṇī kanyā surā lokeṣu viśrutā
maharṣe śaṃsa me sarvaṃ pṛcchato jñātum icchataḥ karāmalakavat sarvaṃ tava jñānaṃ mahāmune
kaṇvaḥ mātaler vacanaṃ śrutvā nārado munisattamaḥ abravīn nāgarājānam āryakaṃ kurunandana
katham icchāmi devarṣe guṇakeśīṃ snuṣāṃ prati
kaṇvaḥ āryakasya vacaḥ śrutvā garuḍaṃ prati bhāṣitam
āryakeṇābhyanujñāto gamyatām iti bhārata

kaṇva uvāca tataḥ puraṃdaro vākyam uvāca garuḍaṃ prati tyaktvā rūpaṃ vivarṇas tu sarparūpadharo 'bhavat gatvā viṣṇusamīpaṃ tu pādapīṭhaṃ samāśliṣat na mayā kṛtaṃ vainateya na māṃ kroddhuṃ tvam arhasi dattābhayaḥ sa sumukho viṣṇunā prabhaviṣṇunā śrutvā puraṃdareṇoktam uvāca vinatāsutaḥ
so 'haṃ pakṣaikadeśena kṣobhaye sāgarān api
na tvaṃ vahasi māṃ dorbhyāṃ moghaṃ tava vikatthanam
āropitaṃ samudvoḍhuṃ bhāraṃ taṃ nāśakad balāt
pādāṅguṣṭhena cikṣepa sumukhaṃ garuḍorasi tataḥ prabhṛti rājendra saha sarpeṇa vartate evaṃ viṣṇubalākrānto garvanāśam upāgamat garuḍo balavān rājan vainateyo mahāyaśāḥ
gālavo duḥkhito duḥkhād vilalāpa suyodhana
diktrayaṃ te śrutaṃ brahmañ śṛṇu cāpy uttarāṃ diśam

prakṛtyā puruṣaḥ sārdhaṃ yugāntāgnisamaprabhaḥ na sa dṛśyo munigaṇais tathā devaiḥ savāsavaiḥ gandharvayakṣasiddhair vā naranārāyaṇād ṛte atra viṣṇuḥ sahasrākṣaḥ sahasracaraṇo 'vyayaḥ sahasraśirasaḥ śrīmān ekaḥ paśyati māyayā
tāṃ dṛṣṭvā cārusarvāṅgīṃ tāpasīṃ brahmacāriṇīm grahītuṃ hi manaś cakre rūpāt sākṣād iva śriyam
yadi tvam ātmano hy arthair māṃ caivādātum icchasi tadaiva naṣṭadehas tu yad vai tvaṃ pannagāśana tasyaiva hi prasādena devadevasya cintanāt tvaṃ tu sāṅgas tu saṃjātaḥ punar eva bhaviṣyasi
mādhavī nāma tārkṣyeyaṃ sarvadharmapravādinī
tasya tad vacanaṃ śrutvā brāhmaṇaḥ saṃśitavrataḥ
śroṇyau lalāṭakakṣau ca ghrāṇaṃ ceti ṣaḍunnatam sūkṣmāṇy aṅguliparvāṇi keśalomanakhatvacaḥ svaraḥ sattvaṃ ca nābhiś ca trigambhīraṃ pracakṣate pāṇipādatale rakte netrāntāsyanakhāni ca
himavāṃś caiva menāyāṃ gandhavatyāṃ parāśaraḥ
maudgalyaś candrasenāyām adityāṃ kāśyapo yathā

pulastyaś ca bharadvājyāṃ vṛttyāṃ dharmaś ca śāśvataḥ damayantyāṃ nalaś caiva satyavatyāṃ ca nāradaḥ jaratkārur jaratkārvāṃ pulastyaś ca pratīcyayā menakāyāṃ yathorṇāyus tumburuś caiva rambhayā vāsukiḥ śataśīrṣāyāṃ kumāryāṃ ca dhanaṃjayaḥ vaidehyāṃ ca yathā rāmo rukmiṇyāṃ ca janārdanaḥ
gālavaḥ prayayau śīghraṃ yayātiṃ nahuṣātmajam
nārada uvāca pratyujjagāma taṃ sthānaṃ devalokaṃ narādhipaḥ avyāpya divyasaṃsthānaṃ babhūva vigatajvaraḥ
yathā dharmaratir nityaṃ tena satyena khaṃ vraja
yadi satyaṃ bravīmy etat tena satyena vai vraja
kathaṃ nu mama tatsarvaṃ vipranaṣṭaṃ mahādyute
yayāteś caiva rājarṣeḥ suhṛdāṃ bhūtim icchatām
vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ evam ukto nṛpaśreṣṭha nāradena suyodhanaḥ nātiṣṭhad vacane tasmiṃs tatontas tasya tādṛśaḥ
etat puṇyatamaṃ rājan yayāteś caritaṃ mahat yac chrutvā śrāvayitvā ca svargaṃ yānti ha mānavāḥ
na maṃsyante durātmānaḥ putrā mama janārdana

na śṛṇoti mahābāho vacanaṃ sādhu bhāṣitam gāndhāryāś ca hṛṣīkeśa vidurasya ca dhīmataḥ anyeṣāṃ caiva suhṛdāṃ bhīṣmādīnāṃ hitaiṣiṇām sa tvaṃ pāpamatiṃ krūraṃ pāpacittam acetanam anuśādhi durātmānaṃ svayaṃ duryodhanaṃ nṛpam
amitro nātikartavyo nātideyaḥ kadā cana jīvitaṃ hy api duḥkhārtā na tyajanti kadā cana
yuddhe yena mahādevaḥ sākṣāt saṃtoṣitaḥ śivaḥ
bhīmaseno gadāpāṇis tāvat saṃśāmya pāṇḍavaiḥ
yāvan na niśitā bāṇāḥ śarīreṣu mahīkṣitām yāvan na praviśanty ete tāvac chāmyatu vaiśasam
evaṃvṛttaḥ kathaṃ rājye sthātum arhasi pāpakṛt sa rājyāc ca sukhāc caiva hāsyase kulapāṃsana
yac caibhyo yācamānebhyaḥ pitryam aṃśaṃ na ditsasi tac ca pāpa pradātāsi bhraṣṭaiśvaryo nipātitaḥ
vartamānaṃ jagat sarvaṃ muhūrtān na bhaviṣyati anyanāśena jagato lokasya ca paraṃtapa
āptum āptaṃ tathāpīdam avinītena sarvathā
duryodhana yad āha tvāṃ pitā bharatasattama bhīṣmo droṇaḥ kṛpaḥ kṣattā suhṛdāṃ kuru tad vacaḥ

duryodhanaṃ dhārtarāṣṭraṃ karṇaṃ duḥśāsano 'bravīt no cet saṃdhāsyase rājan svena kāmena pāṇḍavaiḥ baddhvaiva tvāṃ pradāsyanti pāṇḍuputrāya bhārata vaikartanaṃ tvāṃ ca māṃ ca trīn etān bharatarṣabha pāṇḍavebhyaḥ pradāsyanti bhīṣmadroṇau pitā ca te duḥśāsanasya tad vākyaṃ niśamya bharatarṣabha duryodhano dhārtarāṣṭro niḥśvasya prahasann iva ekāntam upasaṃgamya mantraṃ punar amantrayat
ete na śaktāḥ sarve hi sāhasāt kartum udyatāḥ
**** **** sāmātyāḥ saha bandhubhiḥ adyaiva kṛtakṛtyas tu
nigṛhya rājye rājānaṃ sthāpayiṣyāmi pāṇḍavam eṣa me niścayo rājan yady eṣo 'sya viniścayaḥ nardantu sahitāḥ śaṅkhāḥ paṇavānakanisvanaiḥ anāyāsena pārthānāṃ vartatāṃ ca śivaṃ mahat
duryodhana nibodhedaṃ vacanaṃ mama sāṃpratam
anekayugavarṣāyur nihatya narakaṃ mṛdhe nītvā kanyāsahasrāṇi upayeme yathāvidhi
janmāntaram upāgamya hatavān vālinaṃ tathā anye ca bhrātaras tasya kumbhakarṇādayo mṛdhe bibhīṣaṇaṃ tu saṃsthāpya sītāṃ cādāya maithilīm pālayām āsa vidhivad rājyaṃ nihatakaṇṭakam

tato 'nādṛtya vākyāni duḥśāsanapurogamāḥ niyantumanaso duṣṭāḥ kṛṣṇaṃ matvā suyodhanam babandhuḥ pāśajālena devamāyāvimohitāḥ prākrośantaṃ ca rājānaṃ pratimucya savismayāḥ katham āsīd idam iti tad adbhutam ivābhavat
yadā yadā paśyasi vānaradhvajaṃ dhanurdharaṃ pāṇḍavamadhyamaṃ raṇe gadāgrahastaṃ bhramataṃ vṛkodaraṃ tadā tadā dāsyasi sarvamedinīm
yugapac ca viniṣpetuḥ sahitāḥ sarvadevatāḥ
ugrāyudhadharāḥ sarve divyena vapuṣānvitāḥ

tvam eva puṇḍarīkākṣa sarvasya jagataḥ prabhuḥ tasmān me yādavaśreṣṭha prasādaṃ kartum arhasi bhagavan mama netrāṇām antardhānaṃ vṛṇe punaḥ bhavantaṃ dṛṣṭavān asmi nānyaṃ draṣṭum ihotsahe tato 'bravīn mahābāhur dhṛtarāṣṭraṃ janārdanaḥ adṛśyamāne netre dve bhavetāṃ kurunandana
duryodhano 'tha durbuddhiḥ karṇādyair durjanaiḥ saha mādhavasya vapur dṛṣṭvā babhūva trastacetanaḥ
sarvalokeśvaraḥ śauriḥ sarvadevābhivanditaḥ
nirguṇair api govinda putrair upakṛtaṃ mama trailokyanātha pādau te yadayatnān namaskṛtau
sarvaṃ kṣatraṃ kṣaṇenaiva dahyate pārthavahninā
**** **** kālaṃ bhavati kāraṇam anityarājā vasati
parair vihanyamānasya jīvitenāpi kiṃ phalam
niyacchann itarān varṇān vinayan sarvaduṣkṛtān
śāśvataṃ cāvyayaṃ caiva prajāpativinirmitam
niyojayasi yuddhāya paramāteva māṃ tathā
mohāt saṃgarhase mātaḥ priyaṃ putraṃ viśeṣataḥ
aham eva bhaveyaṃ te ripur atyantaro mahān
**** **** durvinītena durdhiyā ramate yas tu putreṇa
prāpyate neha śāntir hi nityam eva tu saṃjaya
iti śrutvā vaco mātuḥ saṃjayaḥ śatrubhiḥ saha kṛtavān saṃyugaṃ kṛṣṇa jayaṃ ca prāptavān dhruvam
tathā cares tvaṃ śvetāśva yathā vāg abhyabhāṣata
tāvad eva mahābāhur niśāsu na sukhaṃ labhet
vikramādhigatā hy arthāḥ kṣatradharmaratāv ubhau
sarvadharmaviśeṣajñāṃ kule jātāṃ yaśasvinīm
aśvatthāmānam āhūya mantrayitvā punaḥ punaḥ
nakulaṃ sahadevaṃ ca balavīryasamanvitau
agniṃ juhotu vai dhaumyaḥ saṃśitātmā dvijottamaḥ
āroha tu rathaṃ pārthair bhrātṛbhiḥ saha pāṇḍavaiḥ
dhṛṣṭadyumnaś ca pāñcālyaḥ sātyakiś ca mahārathaḥ
maitrāvaruṇa āgnīdhrau mahāvīryau bhaviṣyataḥ
teṣām āyuś ca putrāś ca dhanaṃ caiva bhaviṣyati śṛṇvatāṃ cāpi martyānāṃ svargasthānaṃ bhaviṣyati
na yāty aśūnya eko 'pi na ca śūnyaṃ pratiṣṭhitam na lokapālās tiṣṭhanti na ca te dviguṇāḥ smṛtāḥ naiva sapta tathānye vai nava saṃkhyā na vidyate etadvādvapadaṃ tatra bhaviṣyati kathaṃ cana
janasyāsvasthakāriṇyas tat parābhavalakṣaṇam
ekapakṣākṣicaraṇā nartakā ghoradarśanāḥ pakṣiṇo vyasṛjan ghoraṃ tat parābhavalakṣaṇam
uttarā śaṅkhavarṇābhā diśāṃ varṇā udāhṛtāḥ
iti me cintayantyā vai hṛdi duḥkhaṃ pravartate
gaṅgātīre pṛthāpaśyad upasthānagataṃ vṛṣam
pratikūlam ayuktaṃ ca hṛdayaṃ nopasarpati
tasyābhavaṃs trayaḥ putrā druhyo 'nuḥ pūrur eva ca
kulakṣayaṃ cakārāsau rājyalobhād akāraṇāt
arjunenaivam ukte tu bhīmo vākyaṃ samādade
dhṛṣṭadyumnam ahaṃ manye senāpatim ariṃdama
**** **** sāyoguḍajalopalāḥ saśālabhindipālāś ca samadhūc chiṣṭamudgarāḥ sakāṇḍadaṇḍakāḥ sarve sasīraviṣatomarāḥ saśūrpapiṭakāḥ sarve sadātrāṅkuśatomarāḥ sakīlakrakacāḥ sarve
vyāghracarmaparīdhānāḥ suveṣāḥ samalaṃkṛtāḥ
baddhābharaṇanirvyūhā baddhacarmāsipaṭṭiśāḥ
pañcāśac ca śataṃ cāśvā narāḥ pañcaguṇās tataḥ
hṛṣṭāḥ puṣṭāḥ susaṃnaddhā vikrame dṛḍhaniścayāḥ
tathāpi niyatāḥ sarve kṣatriyās tu jaghanyajāḥ
ity uktvā pādayos tasya nipapāta narādhipaḥ rakṣāsmān rājaśārdūla tvām ahaṃ śaraṇaṃ gataḥ
kṛtapratijño rājāsau vāsudevena nirjitaḥ
haniṣyāmi raṇe bhāgaṃ yan me dāsyasi pāṇḍava api droṇakṛpau vīrau bhīṣmakarṇāv atho punaḥ atha vā sarva evaite tiṣṭhantu vasudhādhipāḥ
bhīto 'smīti kathaṃ brūyāṃ dadhāno gāṇḍivaṃ dhanuḥ
tac chrutvā vacanaṃ tasya vijayasya ca dhīmataḥ
tasmād anartham āpannaḥ sthiro bhūtvā niśāmaya

saṃbhāṣitvā ca karṇena bhrātrā duḥśāsanena ca tatra duryodhano rājā niveśya balam ojasā saṃmānayitvā nṛpatīn nyasya gulmāṃs tathaiva ca ārakṣasya vidhiṃ kṛtvā yodhānāṃ tatra bhārata karṇaṃ duḥśāsanaṃ caiva śakuniṃ cāpi saubalam ānāyya nṛpatis tatra mantrayām āsa bhārata
vāsudevasahāyasya garjataḥ sānujasya te
virāṭanagare pārtha yas tvaṃ sūdo hy abhūḥ purā ballavo nāma vikhyātas tan mamaiva hi pauruṣam
evaṃ katthasi kaunteya akatthan kuru pauruṣam sūtaputraṃ sudurdharṣaṃ śalyaṃ ca balināṃ varam
yuyutsutoyaṃ bhagadattamārutaṃ śuśugu(sic)hārdikyamahāsamudram
bhīṣmavegam aparyantaṃ droṇagrāhadurāsadam karṇaśalyajhaṣāvartaṃ kāmbojavaḍavāmukham
**** **** yathoktaṃ sarvam abravīt kaitavyasya tu tad vākyaṃ
kadarthīkṛtya saṃgrāme dāpitāḥ karam uttamam
eṣa yotsyati saṃgrāme ratha ekaguṇo mataḥ
pitāsya tu raṇe karma mahat kartā na saṃśayaḥ
na tasyāsti samo yuddhe gadayā sāyakair api
lokavīrau maheṣvāsau tyaktātmānau mahārathau
praṇipetuś ca sarve vai praśaśaṃsuś ca pārthivāḥ tata ādāya tāḥ kanyā nṛpatīṃś ca visṛjya tān
tasmān māṃ tvaṃ kuruśreṣṭha samanujñātum arhasi
abhinandasva māṃ rājan sadā priyahite ratām pratipālaya māṃ rājan dharmādīṃś cara dharmataḥ tvaṃ hi me manasā dhyātas tvayā cāpy upamantritā
tāṃ tathā bhāminīṃ dṛṣṭvā śrutvā codvignamānasaḥ
rājarṣiḥ sa mahātejā babhūvodvignamānasaḥ tāṃ tathāvādinīṃ śrutvā dṛṣṭvā ca sa mahātapāḥ rājarṣiḥ kṛpayāviṣṭo mahātmā hotravāhanaḥ
evaṃ bruvati vai rājñi kanyā vacanam abravīt
**** **** garjantam asuraṃ yathā samāhūto raṇe rāma
yadā prayācyamāno 'pi prasādaṃ na karoti me
samāhvaya mahābāho yuddhāya tvaṃ tapodhana
adharmaḥ sumahān eṣa yac chayyāmaraṇaṃ gṛhe yadājau nidhanaṃ yāti so 'sya dharmaḥ sanātanaḥ
paścāj jātāni tejāṃsi tṛṇeṣu jvalitaṃ tvayā
rūpaṃ tāsāṃ paśyati tatra lokaḥ sarvās tā vai tīkṣṇarūpā vikośāḥ

tato vai sahasotthāya rāmo mām abhyavartata punar yuddhāya kauravya vihvalaḥ krodhamūrcchitaḥ ādadāno mahābāhuḥ kārmukaṃ tālasaṃmitam śaraṃ cāpy ṛṣayo 'thainaṃ mā rāmety abruvan vacaḥ maharṣimatam āsthāya krodhāviṣṭo 'pi bhārgavaḥ samāharad ameyātmā śaraṃ kālāntakopamam
upasthāsyati rājendra svayam eva tavānagha yena śatrūn mahāvīryān praśāsiṣyasi kaurava
yathākālaṃ tu sā devī mahiṣī drupadasya ha
avamatya ca vīryaṃ me kulaṃ cāritram eva ca vipralambhas tvayāpūrvo manuṣyeṣu pravartitaḥ kuru sarvāṇi kāryāṇi bhuṅkṣva bhogān anuttamān abhiyāsyāmi śīghraṃ tvāṃ samuddhartuṃ sabāndhavam
upayāsyati hi kṣipraṃ sahāmātyair narādhipaḥ
svaṃ te puṃstvaṃ pradāsyāmi strītvaṃ dhārayitāsmi te
maṇiratnasuvarṇānāṃ mālābhiḥ paripūritam nānākusumagandhāḍhyaṃ siktasaṃmṛṣṭaśobhitam
yāvad icched dharir ayaṃ tāvad asti na cānyathā
vīravratadharāḥ sarve sarve sucaritavratāḥ
śaṅkhaś caiva mahābāhur haiḍimbaś ca mahābalaḥ putro 'syāñjanaparvā tu mahābalaparākramaḥ śaineyaś ca mahābāhuḥ sahāyo raṇakovidaḥ abhimanyuś ca balavān draupadyāḥ pañca cātmajāḥ
saṃjayenaivam uktas tu dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ sudurmanāḥ vipulaṃ cintayaṃs tathau gāndhāryā vidureṇa ca
vyāsaṃ vasiṣṭhanaptāraṃ śakteḥ pautram akalmaṣam parāśarātmajaṃ vande śukatātaṃ taponidhim vyāsāya viṣṇurūpāya vyāsarūpāya viṣṇave namo vai brahmanidhaye vāsiṣṭhāya namo namaḥ
niveśaṃ cakrire yoddhuṃ tan me śaṃsa mahāmate kathaṃ vā kauravāḥ sarve bhīmasene camūpatau
pūrvabhāge tu kṣetrasya sthitāḥ pratyaṅmukhā yudhi
. . . . . . . . prahṛṣṭavadanaṃ tataḥ āyodhanaṃ praviviśuḥ . . . . . . . .
samantān nagakalpena garjamānena *rvataḥ
. . . . . . . . rajoyukte ca bhārata durnimittāni sarvāṇi . . . . . . . .
rohiṇīṃ pīḍayaty evam ubhau ca śaśibhāskarau
pṛthivī śoṇitāvartā dhvajoḍupasamākulā kurūṇāṃ vaiśase rājan pāṇḍavaiḥ saha bhārata
viṣamaṃ vedayanty eta ākrandajananaṃ mahat
ābhagnāḥ sumahāvātair aśanībhiḥ samāhatāḥ
evaṃvidhaṃ durnimittaṃ kṣayāya pṛthivīkṣitām bhaumaṃ divyaṃ cāntarikṣaṃ trividhaṃ jāyate 'niśam ete cānye ca bahava utpātā ghoradarśanāḥ pṛthivīpālalokānāṃ sarve vai nāśakārakāḥ
yudhiṣṭhiraṃ ca bhīmaṃ ca vārayiṣyāmi saṃyuge
kuruṣva kāryaṃ yat satyaṃ tvatto mānyo na vidyate
śaknoti na samādhātuṃ dīrṇām indrasamo yudhi
śabdaḥ sparśaś ca rūpaṃ ca rasaś cāpi prakīrtitāḥ
. . . . . . . . vidhivad buddhimaṃs tvayā tattvajñaś cāsi sarvasya . . . . . . . .
sthitā samudram ākramya avarūḍhā bhavaṃs tataḥ
gandharvādyā vasanti sma hy apsarogaṇasevitāḥ
tataḥ kiṃpuruṣāvāsaṃ varṣaṃ himavataḥ param
tenaiva kramayogena parvato gandhamādanaḥ
ketumālaś caturthaś ca meroḥ paścimataḥ sthitaḥ
pūrveṇa yasya vikhyātaḥ parvato gandhamādanaḥ
hiraṇmayaṃ ca śvetādreḥ paraṃ varṣaṃ narādhipa kuruvarṣaṃ tato rājañ śṛṅgavat parvatāt param
tatra devo mahādevo nityam āste sahomayā citre śilātale ramye devarṣigaṇapūjitaḥ
anyāni pañca varṣāṇi galāntaṃ kalpitāni ca
puṣkariṇyaḥ śubhās tatra sukhasparśā manoharāḥ bhūbhāgo dṛśyate tatra padmarāgasamaprabham
bhadrāśvaṃ nāma varṣaṃ tu puro vai gandhamādanāt
indragopakasaṃkāśaṃ jāyate bhāsvaraṃ tu tat
yatra cāyaṃ mahārāja pakṣirāṭ patagottamaḥ
yakṣaḥ so 'pi mahārāja yakṣarājānugauta[? -gotta]maḥ
sthitaḥ sthānasahasreṣu vyāpya vai sa carācaram
kuśikasya ca durdharṣa gādheś caiva mahātmanaḥ somakasya ca durdharṣa dilīpasya tathaiva ca
brahmamedhyāṃ bṛhadvatīm etāś cānyāś ca bahudhā
mānavīṃ vṛṣabhāṃ caiva mahānadyo janādhipa
videhā māgadhāḥ siṃhā mahadāyatayas tathā
kaṭyāś ca pātavaibodhā yākāḥ sāmudraniṣkadāḥ
antargiryās tathā caiva bahirgiryās tathaiva ca
kāraskarāś ca vaṃśāś ca āndhrāś ca dramiḍās tathā colāś caiva tathā pāṇḍyāś cerāś caiva susiṃhalāḥ
ete cānye janapadāḥ prācyodīcyās tathaiva ca
prajāyante ca jātāś ca śataśo 'tha sahasraśaḥ
varārhā yudhi jāyante kṣatriyāḥ śūrasattamāḥ
śalmaliś ca kuśa[ḥ] krauñco dviguṇo hy uttarottaram yathāsaṃkhyaṃ parivṛttaḥ surāsarpiḥpayodhibhiḥ
navameghaprabhaḥ prāṃśuḥ śrīmān ujjvalavigrahaḥ
dugdhodakasamudro 'nyaḥ punar ikṣurasodakaḥ
ikṣūdaś ca surodaś ca sarpiḥkṣīrodadhis tadā dadhimaṇḍodadhiś cānyaḥ śuddhodadhir atho mahān
saṃpūjyate hi plakṣaś ca svadī[?dvī]pakhyātikṛd yathā
vacanād dhṛtarāṣṭrasya kurukṣetraṃ jagāma ha vyāsasya varadānena tvaramāṇas tu saṃjayaḥ dṛṣṭvā tu samare rājan kṣaṇenaiva samāgataḥ
na hato yo mahābuddhiḥ sa hato 'dya śikhaṇḍinā
taṃ vimagnaṃ naravyāghraṃ bhīṣmaṃ śaṃsasi saṃjaya
yac ca yasmiṃś ca kāle ca vṛttaṃ yac ca yathā ca tat
saṃnāhāḥ samadṛśyanta sveṣv anīkeṣv avasthitāḥ
bhagadatto mahāvīryaḥ kausalyaś ca bṛhadrathaḥ
dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ ubhayoḥ senayos tatra dṛṣṭvā ca kurupāṇḍavān animittāny atho brūhi kuśalo hy asi saṃjaya
arjunaḥ sagaro vainyo ye cānye kṣatriyottamāḥ
putrāś ca tava rājendra sārohā sarathā gajaiḥ
kuruyodhavarā rājan vicitrāyudhakārmukāḥ
dhṛṣṭadyumno 'grato yātu ripusainyāni bhīṣayan
senāpraṇetā yogyo 'yaṃ devānām iva pāvakiḥ
bhīmasenaṃ tadā rājan darśayan sa mahābalam

dhvajāgre ruvato bhīmaṃ kapes tasya punaḥ punaḥ śrūyate bhīmaninado nādayāno diśo daśa dṛṣṭvā ca bhīṣayām āsa virāvair vānareśvaraḥ bhrūkṣepotkṣepavikṣepair lāṅgūlena punaḥ kapiḥ ākāśe darśayām āsa pratiśabde mahāsvanam
saghaṇṭā hemakakṣyābhiḥ patākābhir alaṃkṛtāḥ
devair api na śakyeta balaṃ kṣobhayituṃ nṛpa
yatra kṛṣṇaś ca vedātmā sarvasarveśvaro hariḥ jayas tatra mahābāho yathā me prāha nāradaḥ
bhīmasenādibhir yasya pṛtanā dikṣu pālitā
yudhiṣṭhiraṃ parivavruḥ sametāḥ jayāya dhaumyo 'pi jayāya mantrān
tathaiva vipreṣu mahārhajātaṃ rukmamaṇimauktikahemaraupyam
viṣaṇṇarūpāḥ kurusainyamukhyā babhūvire śuṣkakaṇṭhā virūpāḥ
śūrāṇāṃ raṇaśūrāṇāṃ garjatām itaretaram ubhayoḥ senayo rājan mahān vyatikaro 'bhavat anyonyaṃ vīkṣyamāṇānāṃ yodhānāṃ bharatarṣabha
kṛṣṇaṃ kamalapatrākṣaṃ puṇyaśravaṇakīrtanam vāsudevaṃ jagadyoniṃ naumi nārāyaṇaṃ harim
sainye mahati ye sarve netāraḥ śūrasaṃmatāḥ
tvaṃ mānuṣyeṇopahatāntarātmā viṣādamohābhibhavād visaṃjñaḥ kṛpāgṛhītaḥ samavekṣya bandhūn abhiprapannān mukham antakasya
yasya sarve samārambhā nirāśīrbandhanās tv iha tyāge yasya hutaṃ sarvaṃ sa tyāgī sa ca buddhimān

arjuna uvāca bhavaty eṣa kathaṃ kṛṣṇa kathaṃ caiva vivardhate kim ātmakaḥ kim ācāras tan mamācakṣva pṛcchataḥ eṣa sūkṣmaḥ paraḥ śatrur dehinām indriyaiḥ saha sukhatantra ivāsīno mohayan pārtha tiṣṭhati kāmakrodhamayo ghoraḥ stambhaharṣasamudbhavaḥ ahaṃkāro 'bhimānātmā dustaraḥ pāpakarmabhiḥ harṣam asya nivartyaiṣa śokam asya dadāti ca bhayaṃ cāsya karoty eṣa mohayaṃs tu muhur muhuḥ sa eṣa kaluṣaḥ kṣudraś chidraprekṣī dhanaṃjaya rajaḥpravṛtto mohātmā manuṣyāṇām upadravaḥ
smaranto 'pi muhus tv etat spṛśanto 'pi svakarmaṇi saktā api na sajjanti paṅke ravikarā iva
lipsamānaḥ satāṃ mārgaṃ pramūḍho brahmaṇaḥ pathi anekacitto vibhrānto mohasyaiva vaśaṃ gataḥ
bhagavannāmasaṃprāptimātrāt sarvam avāpyate phalitāḥ śālayaḥ samyag vṛṣṭimātre 'valokite
. . . . . . . . pitṝn yānti pitṛvratāḥ bhūtāni yānti bhūtejyā . . . . . . . .
sphuṭaṃ bhagavato bhaktir vihitā kalpamañjarī sādhanecchāsamucitāṃ yenāśāṃ paripūrayet
sarve vedā yat padam āmananti tapāṃsi sarvāṇi ca yad vadanti yad icchanto brahmacaryaṃ caranti tat te padaṃ saṃgraheṇa bravīmi
yaṃ prāpya na punarjanma labhante yogino 'rjuna
sarvatattvagatatvena vijñāte parameśvare antar bahir na sāvasthā na yasyāṃ bhāsate vibhuḥ
sarvagaḥ sarvavaś cādyaḥ sarvakṛt sarvadarśanaḥ sarvajñaḥ sarvadarśī ca sarvātmā sarvatomukhaḥ
evaṃ hi sarvabhūteṣu carāmy anabhilakṣitaḥ bhūtaprakṛtim āsthāya sahaiva ca vinaiva ca
oṣadhīnāṃ yavaś cāsmi dhātūnām asmi kāñcanam saurabheyo gavām asmi snehānāṃ sarpir apy aham sarvāsāṃ tṛṇajātīnāṃ darbho 'haṃ pāṇḍunandana
nānārūpaiḥ puruṣair vadhyamānā viśanti te vaktram acintyarūpam yaudhiṣṭhirā dhārtarāṣṭrāś ca yodhāḥ śastraiḥ kṛttā vividhaiḥ sarva eva tvattejasā nihatā nūnam ete tathā hīme tvaccharīraṃ praviṣṭāḥ
anādimān apratimaprabhāvaḥ sarveśvaraḥ sarvamahāvibhūte
na hi tvad anyaḥ kaś cid apīha deva lokatraye dṛśyate 'cintyakarmā

imāni karmāṇi tavādbhutāni kṛtāni pūrve munayo vadanti na te guṇānāṃ parimāṇam asti na tejasaś cāpi balasya viṣṇo tavādbhutaṃ kiṃ nu bhaved asahyaṃ kiṃ vāśakyaṃ parataḥ kīrtayiṣye kartāsi sarvasya yataḥ svayaṃ vai vibho tataḥ sarvam idaṃ tvam eva aty adbhutaṃ karma na duṣkaraṃ te karmopamānaṃ na hi vidyate te na te guṇānāṃ parimāṇam asti na tejaso nāpi balasya narddheḥ
arjuna uvāca prakṛtiṃ puruṣaṃ caiva kṣetraṃ kṣetrajñam eva ca etad veditum icchāmi jñānaṃ jñeyaṃ ca keśava
prakṛtiṃ puruṣaṃ caiva kṣetraṃ kṣetrajñam eva ca etat te kathayiṣyāmi jñānaṃ jñeyaṃ ca bhārata
svadharme nidhanaṃ śreyaḥ paradharmodayād api

vaiśaṃpāyana uvāca bhāratāmṛtasarvasvagītāyā mathitasya ca sāram uddhṛtya kṛṣṇena arjunasya mukhe hutam sarvaśāstramayī gītā sarvadevamayo hariḥ sarvatīrthamayī gaṅgā sarvavedamayo manuḥ gaṅgā gītā ca gāyatrī govindeti hṛdi sthite caturgakārasaṃyukte punarjanma na vidyate
prabodhitaḥ sa tu tadā viṣṇunā viśvamūrtinā avināśisvarūpaṃ ca dṛṣṭvā tattvena phālgunaḥ kṛtrimaṃ tu jagadrūpaṃ jñātvā yuddhodyato 'bhavat devadattaṃ samāyujya śastrāṇi jagṛhe punaḥ
te sene stimite cāstāṃ vīkṣamāṇe parasparam gaṅgāyamunayor vegau yathaivaitya parasparam evaṃ pravṛtte te sene niḥśabde janasaṃsadi citre iva paṭālekhye darśanīyatare śubhe
bhītaṃ yudhiṣṭhiraṃ matvā bhīmasenaḥ pratāpavān
sātyakiś cārjunaś caiva abhimanyuś ca vīryavān
kvaivaṃ gamiṣyasi śreṣṭha tyaktvāsmān durbalo yathā rājā hi tvaṃ mahābāho vāgyato manyumān iva
yuddhāyāvataraty eva tasya nāsti jayo raṇe yas tu yuddhe samutpanne gurūn dṛṣṭvātha daṃśitān
netrair animiṣaiḥ sarve prekṣante sma yudhiṣṭhiram
kiṃ nu vakṣyati rājāsau dharmaputro yudhiṣṭhiraḥ kiṃ nu vakṣyati bhīṣmo 'sau bharatānāṃ dhuraṃdharaḥ
jayeyaṃ ca ripūn sarvān anujñātas tvayānagha yudhyantaṃ māṃ raṇe vīra tvam anujñātum arhasi
mantrayiṣyāmy ahaṃ rājan yac ca te hitam uttamam

ayudhyamānaṃ saṃhatya sauhṛdena pariplutam nyastaśastraṃ nirudyogaṃ hanyur mā śatravo yudhi nikṣiptaśastre patite vimuktakavace tathā dravamāṇe ca bhīte ca tavāsmīti ca yo vadet striyāṃ strīnāmadheye ca vikale caikaputrake aprasūte ca hīne ca na yuddhaṃ rocayāmy aham idaṃ ca gaditaṃ pārtha paramaṃ vratam āhave
kiṃ te karomi vai kāmaṃ brūhi pāṇḍavanandana evaṃ gate mahārāja yuddhād anyat kim icchasi
vadhopāyaṃ bravīhi tvam ātmanaḥ samare paraiḥ
teṣām arthe mahārāja yoddhavyam iti me matiḥ
tvāṃ hi yokṣyati sūtatve sūtaputrasya mātula duryodhano raṇe śūram iti me naiṣṭhikī matiḥ
na bhaviṣyanti te bālā dhārtarāṣṭrā na saṃśayaḥ
tato jalakriyā caiva tvayā kāryā tathaiva ca
sabalo dhārtarāṣṭrasya kutsayan karma duṣkṛtam
bhagavān uvāca (sic) kṛṣṇaṃ kamalapatrākṣaṃ puṇyaśravaṇakīrtanam vāsudevaṃ jagadyoniṃ naumi nārāyaṇaṃ harim
teṣām ādhāvatāṃ tatra gajāśvakalilo mahān siṃhanādaravonmiśraḥ śaṅkhabherīsamākulaḥ sa ghoṣavāñ śaragrāho dhanurnāgo 'sikacchapaḥ vyāvalgitapurovāta āsīt kṣubdhābdhivat svanaḥ
tau vīrāv atisaṃrabdhau kṛtinau viṣame sthitau
śalyam abhyardayām āsa mahābalaparākramam
ulūkaṃ tu śatānīkaḥ śarair bahubhir āvṛṇot
tathaiva śaravarṣeṇa ulūkaṃ samavidhyata
tathaiva cedirājo 'pi ulūkaṃ pratyavidhyata
aśvārohaiś ca samare hastisādibhir eva ca
muktās tu rathibhir bāṇā rukmapuṅkhāḥ sutejanāḥ te nipetur akuṇṭhāgrā nāgeṣu ca hayeṣu ca
tarjayitvā susaṃhṛṣṭā yāvat prāṇasya dhāraṇam
ekaikena tu mātaṅgā nārācena mahātmanā tāḍitāḥ sahasā jagmuḥ pṛthivīṃ parvatopamāḥ

durādharṣas tu śatrūṇāṃ manāṃsi samakampayat hayāṃś ca sahayārohān pātayām āsa sāyakaiḥ sa rathena maheṣvāso vicaran bahudhā balī maṇḍalāni ca vīthīś ca gomūtrāṇi ca bhārata anyāṃś ca subahūn mārgān rathena rathakovidaḥ vismāpayañ śatrusaṃghān vyacaraj jāhnavīsutaḥ
abhyavarṣac chalyamukhān rathān satālaketunā
viviṃśatis tribhir bāṇaiḥ sarvāvaraṇabhedibhiḥ
viviṃśatis tathā rājan sarve viddhvā mahārathāḥ
pāñcālān atha matsyaṃ ca drupadaṃ senayā vṛtam
sā tu yaudhiṣṭhirī senā gāṅgeyaśarapīḍitā siṃheneva vinirbhinnā śuklā gaur iva gopateḥ
yudhiṣṭhiro mahārāja dṛṣṭvā kṛṣṇam athābravīt

etāvad uktvā nṛpatiḥ sahadevam abhāṣata abhiṣekasya saṃbhārān kṣipram ānaya vai javāt prādurāsīt tato dhaumyaḥ saṃbhārān gṛhya bhārata sahadevena sahitaḥ pāṇḍavāya nyavedayat tatas taṃ puruṣavyāghraṃ drupadasyātmajaṃ yudhi bhadrapīṭhe sukhaṃ nyasya abhiṣecayad acyutaḥ aśobhatābhiṣikto hi drupadasyātmajo balī yathā devāsure yuddhe kārttikeyo hy aśobhata
tac chrutvā jahṛṣuḥ pārthāḥ pārthivāś ca mahārathāḥ
yudhiṣṭhiraś ca dharmātmā mādrīputrau ca pāṇḍavau abhimanyuś ca vikrānta uttamaujāś ca vīryavān
tāvakāḥ pāṇḍavaiḥ sārdhaṃ yathāyudhyanta tac chṛṇu
lāṅgūlāsphoṭaśabdena svanayāno nabhastalam piṅgākṣair dṛṣṭipātaiś ca bhīṣayann arisainikān
drauṇiḥ ṣaṣṭyā naravyāghro vikarṇaś ca tribhiḥ śaraiḥ
śalyaṃ ca daśabhir bāṇais tāvadbhiś ca jayadratham
kṣatriyāṇāṃ śirāṃsy ugraiḥ kṛntañ śastrair mahārathaḥ śūnyān kṛtvā rathopasthān vyacarat phalgunas tadā
ālokād api yuddhaṃ tu samam etad bhaviṣyati
tad apy asya raṇe droṇaś ciccheda saśaraṃ dhanuḥ
sarve kaliṅgakāś caiva saṃnivṛtteṣu cediṣu svabāhubalam āsthāya abhyavartanta pāṇḍavam
taṃ dṛṣṭvā virathaṃ tatra bhīmasenam ariṃdamam śakradevo 'bhidudrāva śitair avakirañ śaraiḥ bhīmasyopari rājendra śakradevo mahābalaḥ
ayutena gajānāṃ ca niṣādaiḥ parivāritaḥ
tato mumoca kāliṅgaḥ śaktiṃ tām akarod dvidhā
padātibhiḥ padātīṃś ca aśvān aśvair gajān gajaiḥ rathān rathaiś ca bahudhā jaghāna samare balī
vibhujya kṣudhitā nādaṃ vidravanti diśo daśa bhramantaṃ kālarūpeṇa bhīmasenaṃ mahābalam
. . . . . . . . ākṣipyānyāny apātayat khaḍgenānyāṃś ca ciccheda . . . . . . . .
papāta śatrusainyeṣu kesarīva mahābalaḥ

gadayā muktayā rājan pātayām āsa dantinaḥ tathā gajaṃ gajenaiva prāhiṇod yamasādanam rathaṃ rathena saṃcūrṇya turaṅgaṃ turageṇa tu padātinaṃ padātena preṣayām āsa mṛtyave punar aśveṣu patati gajeṣu ca punaḥ punaḥ ratheṣu sa padāteṣu vāyuneva mahānalaḥ yathā mṛgāṇāṃ madhye tu kesarīva nakhagrahaḥ evaṃ bhramati sainyeṣu bhīmakarmā vṛkodaraḥ
bhīmena sahasā rājan bhramamāṇena saṃyuge saṃprahṛṣṭo mahāghoṣaṃ . . . . . . . .
etac caturdaśe varṣe bhīmo dṛṣṭvā raṇājiram viśeṣeṇa gajān rājan paraṃ toṣam upāgamat
bhīṣmam evābhyayāt tūrṇaṃ jighāṃsuḥ pāṇḍavarṣabhaḥ
āplutyāplutya vegena carma bhrāmya punaḥ punaḥ asinā tīkṣṇadhāreṇa yodhāñ chittvā mahāhave
mahāpuruṣabhūyiṣṭho vīrayodhaniṣevitaḥ
bhīmaś ca punar āviṣṭaḥ sātvatena narottama praharṣam atulaṃ lebhe bhīmaḥ sātyakinā saha
rorūyamāṇo dṛśyeta dhvajāgre vānareśvaraḥ dṛṣṭyā bhīṣayate śatrūn stabdhakarṇo mahākapiḥ
vayaṃ ca śastribhir bhinnā nṛpair indrasamair yudhi bhīto vyūhasya sarvatra na sthātuṃ kaś cid icchati śaravrātāḥ pradṛśyanta pannagābhāḥ samantataḥ diśaś ca vidiśaś caiva vyāptā hy ārjunasāyakaiḥ
tataḥ sarathanāgāśvā jayaṃ prāpya sasomakāḥ pāñcālāḥ pāṇḍavāś caiva praṇeduś ca punaḥ punaḥ prayayuḥ śibirāyaiva dhanaṃjayapuraskṛtāḥ vāditraghoṣaiḥ saṃhṛṣṭāḥ pranṛtyanto mahārathāḥ
tāvakānāṃ tu taṃ vyūhaṃ pratyavyūhanta pāṇḍavāḥ
tatrānu rathināṃ śreṣṭho vāmaśṛṅge vyavasthitaḥ
prāvartata nadī ghorā paralokāya bhārata

kaś cid utpatya samare varavāraṇam āsthitaḥ keśapakṣe parāmṛśya jahāra samare śiraḥ anye dviradadantāgranirbhinnahṛdayā raṇe vemuś ca rudhiraṃ vīrā niḥśvasantaḥ samantataḥ kaś cit kariviṣāṇastho vīro raṇaviśāradaḥ prāvepac chaktinirbhinno gajaśikṣāstravedinā
rathī ca samare rājann āsādya gajayodhinam sagajaṃ pātayām āsa gajī ca rathinaṃ rathāt rathinaṃ ca hayārohaḥ prāsena bharatarṣabha pātayām āsa samare rathī ca hayasādinam
**** **** āplutyāplutya saṃyuge nistriṃśair niśitais tīkṣṇaiḥ
pitā putraś ca samare kurvāṇau karma duṣkaram rājānaṃ pratyudīyetāṃ bhīmasenaghaṭotkacau
vāryamāṇaṃ mahārāja bhīṣmadroṇakṛpādibhiḥ
pāṇḍūn āvārayiṣyeti kathaṃ yuyudhire nṛpāḥ
paścimāṃ diśam āsthāya sthite cāpi divākare
pātayiṣyāmi durdharṣaṃ kuruvṛddhaṃ pitāmaham
bhīṣmo 'pi rathināṃ śreṣṭhaḥ pārthasyāvārayad diśaḥ
tavāpi putrasya tu kopanasya
itīdam uktvā sa mahānubhāvaḥ sasmāra cakraṃ niśitaṃ purāṇam sudarśanaṃ cintitamātram eva tasyāgrahastaṃ svayam āruroha
asaṃbhramaṃ tad vicakarṣa dorbhyāṃ mahādhanur gāṇḍivatulyaghoṣam uvāca bhīṣmas tam anantapauruṣaṃ govindam ājāv avimūḍhacetāḥ
mamogracakreṇa nikṛnta dehaṃ

śrutvā vacaḥ śāṃtanavasya kṛṣṇo vegena dhāvaṃs tam athābhyuvāca tvaṃ mūlam asyeha bhuvi kṣayasya duryodhanaṃ cādya samuddhariṣyasi durdyūtadevī nṛpatir nivāryaḥ sumantriṇā dharmapathi sthitena tyājyo 'tha vā kālaparītabuddhir dharmātigo yaḥ kulapāṃsanaḥ syāt bhīṣmas tad ākarṇya yadupravīraṃ rājā paraṃ daivatam ity uvāca tyaktas tu kaṃso yadubhir hitārthe dharmāt kurūṇām adhipas tadānīm saṃbodhyamāno na bubodha rājā kleśāya daivād viparītabuddhiḥ śrotā hitaṃ yasya na kaś cid asti vaktā bhṛśaṃ syāt sa tu kiṃ bravītu
tataḥ pratijñāṃ samavāpya bhīṣmaḥ kṛtāñjaliḥ stutyam athākarod vai traivikrame yasya vapur babhāse tathaiva dṛṣṭvā tu samujjvalantam
bhīṣmaṃ śaraiḥ saṃparivārya saṃkhye ciccheda bhūriśravasaś ca cāpam śalyaṃ ca viddhvā navabhiḥ pṛṣatkair duryodhanaṃ vakṣasi nirbibheda
punaḥ punar dhārtarāṣṭrāḥ samagrāḥ
tataḥ śaraughair niśitaiḥ kirīṭī pravartayām āsa nadīṃ sughorām nṛnāgavājikṣatalohitodāṃ narendramajjāsthikamāṃsaphenām
hatapravīrāṃ ca tathaiva dṛṣṭvā senāṃ kurūṇām atha phalgunena
hatadrutāṃ tava putrasya senāṃ dṛṣṭvā tadā bhāratavṛṣṇisiṃhau
rarāja cāraktadigantarālaṃ saśoṇam atyartharathāṅganāmnaḥ hṛdaḥ prabhinnād iva śoṇitaughair viliptavantaḥ sakalaṃ viyogāt
duryodhanaḥ pravyathitāntarātmā yayau tadā prekṣya tadājimadhye
anye ca yodhāḥ śataśaḥ sametāḥ kruddhena pārthena raṇasya madhye
ataḥ paraṃ vyūham acintyarūpaṃ niveśayām āsa mahādhanuṣmān
yathā mahendro 'suravāhinīnāṃ nārāyaṇenendra ivābhiguptaḥ śaśīva sūryeṇa sameyivān yathā tathā mahātmā saha keśavena
tathā na bhūto bhuvi mānuṣeṣu na dṛṣṭapūrvo na ca saṃśrutaś ca
tathaiva bhīṣmāhatam antarikṣe mahāstrajālaṃ kapirājaketoḥ viśīryamāṇaṃ dadṛśus tvadīyā divākareṇeva tamobhibhūtam
dadarśa rājan pāñcālyaḥ senāpatir ariṃdamaḥ
dhanuś ciccheda bhallena tīvravegena phālguniḥ
pārāvatāśvaṃ sa ratham āsthāya paravīrahā
vibhagnāṃś ca praṇaṣṭāṃś ca nityaṃ śaṃsasi māmakān
dhārtarāṣṭrān daśa rathān daśaiva pratyavārayan
samāgatā mahārāja jñātayaḥ śastrapāṇayaḥ
gajānīkena sahitas tena rājā suyodhanaḥ
ghoraḥ pratibhayaś cāsīt pinākīva pinākadhṛk nirmathyamānāṃ kruddhena pragṛhya mahatīṃ gadām
vipradhvastā gajā rājan madaṃ tyaktvā bhayaṃ gatāḥ
nākulis tu śatānīkaḥ samare śatrupūgahā
mārgeṇa gacchamānasya bhīmasyobhayapārśvataḥ dṛśyante patitā nāgā vajreṇeva śiloccayāḥ
keśamajjāsṛgabhyakto raudraṃ bibhrat tadā vapuḥ mārutiḥ śūlahastasya purevābhighnataḥ paśūn
gadayā vyadhamat sarvān vāto vṛkṣān ivaujasā bhīmaseno mahābāhus tava putrasya vai bale sā vai majjāvasāmāṃsaiḥ pradigdhā rudhireṇa ca adṛśyata mahāraudrā gadā nāgāśvaghātinī
gadāmārutavego 'bhūd viṣphūrjitam ivāśaneḥ
yodhās tvadīyāḥ śaravarṣair avarṣan meghā yathā bhūdharam ambuvegaiḥ
tato bhūriśravā rājan somadattasya putrakam
tathaiva ca sutās tubhyaṃ bhīmasenaṃ mahāratham duryodhanamukhāḥ sarve samantāt paryavārayan

manorathadrumo 'smākaṃ cintito bahuvārṣikaḥ saphalaḥ sūta adyeha yo 'haṃ paśyāmi sodarān yatrāśoka samutkṣiptā reṇavo rathanemibhiḥ na prayāsya[?ntya]ntarikṣaṃ hi śaravṛndair digantare tatra tiṣṭhati saṃnaddhaḥ svayaṃ rājā suyodhanaḥ bhrātaraś cāsya saṃnaddhāḥ kulaputrā madotkaṭāḥ
ākarṇapūrṇaiḥ putras te prahasann iva bhārata
abhipatya mahābāhur garutmān iva vegitaḥ
vicitraṃ ca tathā hatvā preṣayām āsa mṛtyave
bhīmo 'pi labdhasaṃjñas tu adravat sa tato raṇe
kailāsagirisaṃkāśaṃ vajrapāṇir ivābhyayāt

madhye trigartā(sic)n rākṣasyo labhante prasravanti ca kāmarūpadharāś caiva bhavanti bahurūpakāḥ praṇamya vikacaḥ pādāv agṛhṇāt pitaraṃ tadā mātuś ca parameṣvāsas tau ca nāmāsya cakratuḥ ghaṭotkacasyoktapūrvaṃ mātā taṃ pratyabhāṣata abravīt tena nāmāsya ghaṭotkaca iti sma ha sa hi sṛṣṭo maghavatā karṇahetor mahātmanā karṇasyāprativīryasya pratiyoddhā mahārathaḥ
preṣitāś ca mahārāja rākṣasaiś ca caturdiśam
nyavartata mahāghoṣo bhīmasenaśarārditaḥ mṛditvā sarvasainyāni tava putrasya bhārata
kampayantaś ca putrāṇāṃ tava cetāṃsi bhūmipa putrāś ca tava rājendra tathaiva śaravikṣatāḥ
yad vṛttaṃ tatra saṃgrāme tad bhavān vaktum arhati
viśvāvāso viśvamūrtir viṣvakseno janārdanaḥ viśvakartā viśvapatir devadeva jagatpate yogeśvara namaste 'stu saṃsārārṇavatāraṇa
vāsudeveti taṃ vidyād yenāhaṃ nirmitaḥ prabho tasmād yācāmi lokeśa caturātmānam ātmanā
sarvabhūteśvaraṃ devaṃ yogaṃ yogeśvaraṃ prabhum
**** **** vāsudeva iti śrutaḥ vāsudevagṛhe sākṣāt **** ****
jagataś cāgrajau vidmas tato devau surarṣabhāḥ
etat puruṣasaṃjñaṃ vai purāṇaṃ rūpam uttamam
śrutaṃ me tāta rāmasya jāmadagnyasya jalpataḥ nāradasya ca devarṣeḥ kṛṣṇadvaipāyanasya ca asito devalaś cāpi vālakhilyās tapodhanāḥ
tasmān nārāyaṇo jajñe devadevaḥ sanātanaḥ nābhau padmaṃ babhūvāsya sarvalokasya saṃbhavaḥ tasmāt pitāmaho jātas tasmāj jātās tv imāḥ prajāḥ
harantaṃ brahmaṇo vedāñ jaghāna brahmaṇaḥ pitā
etad dvaipāyanaḥ prāha stutvā vai puruṣottamam sanatkumārapramukhaiḥ stūyate 'bhyarcyate hariḥ
purāṇapuruṣasyeha yadarthaṃ nṛṣu saṃbhavaḥ

arjunasya māhātmyaṃ hi kathitaṃ tattvato mayā na jeṣyāmi mahāyuddhe vicarantaṃ naraṃ kva cit nārāyaṇaṃ ca saṃgrāme avadhyau tau yataḥ smṛtau dharmarājaś ca bhīmaś ca mādrīputraś ca pāṃḍavau ete 'py avadhyāḥ kathitāḥ purāṇe paramarṣiṇā
na cet kartāsi vacanaṃ saṃdigdhaṃ na tariṣyasi
tasyāṃ rātryāṃ vyatītāyāṃ niryayuḥ kurupuṃgavāḥ puraskṛtya mahātmānaṃ bhīṣmaṃ śāṃtanavaṃ yudhi

ajātaśatruḥ śatrūṇāṃ manāṃsi samakampayat śyenavad vyūhya taṃ vyūhaṃ dhaumyasya vacanāt svayam sa hi tasya suvijñāta agnicityeṣu bhārata makaras tu mahāvyūhas tava putrasya dhīmataḥ svayaṃ sarveṇa sainyena droṇenānumatas tadā yathāvyūhaṃ śāṃtanavaḥ so 'nvavartata tat punaḥ
sa tathā kuru bhadraṃ te yathā vadhyanti pāṇḍavāḥ

uvāca tatra rājānaṃ saṃkruddha iva niḥśvasan bāliśas tvaṃ na jānīṣe pāṇḍavānāṃ parākramam na śakyā hi yathā jetuṃ pāṇḍavā hi mahābalāḥ yathābalaṃ yathāvīryaṃ karma kuryām ahaṃ hi te ity uktvā te sutaṃ rājann abhyapadyata vāhinīm

saṃrabdhānāṃ ca vīrāṇāṃ dhīrāṇām amitaujasām dhanurjyātalaśabdena na prājñāyata kiṃ cana utthiteṣu kabandheṣu sarvataḥ śoṇitodake samare paryadhāvanta nṛpā ripuvadhodyatāḥ śaraśaktigadābhis te khaḍgaiś cāmitatejasaḥ nijaghnuḥ samare śūrās te 'nyonyaṃ ca paraṃtapa babhramuḥ kuñjarāś cātra śarair viddhā niraṅkuśāḥ
bahūnām uttamāṅgānāṃ kārmukāṇāṃ tathaiva ca gadānāṃ parighāṇāṃ ca hastānāṃ corubhiḥ saha pādānāṃ bhūṣaṇānāṃ ca keyūrāṇāṃ ca saṃghaśaḥ rāśayaḥ sma pradṛśyante bhīṣmabhīmaparākrame

duryodhanamate ghore akṣadyūtābhidevane bhīṣme yudhi parākrānte bhīmasenena bhārata prāvartata nadī ghorā śoṇitaughataraṅgiṇī madhye ca mahatī senā keśaśaivalaśādvalā hatārohā hayā rājan rathino virathā api vicerus tatra saṃgrāme nistriṃśavaradhāriṇaḥ
siṃhalāṅgūlam ākāśe jvalantam iva parvatam
gajebhyo gajayodhāś ca vitrastā bhayamohitāḥ vihvalāḥ pratyadṛśyanta na jānanti diśo nṛpa
tataḥ kāmbojamukhyāś ca te haṃsapathakarṇikāḥ gopāsanabalaughāś ca gopāsanapatis tathā
cedikāśipadātaiś ca rathaiḥ pāñcālasṛñjayaiḥ pāṇḍavāḥ sahitāḥ sarve dhṛṣṭadyumnapurogamāḥ tāvakān samare jagmur dharmaputreṇa coditāḥ
prakāśaṃ cakrur ākāśa udyatāsibhir uttamaiḥ
nākuliś ca śatānīkaḥ samare rathapuṃgavaḥ
vapurbhiś ca narendrāṇāṃ candrasūryasamaprabhaiḥ
apāsya tu dhanuś chinnaṃ bhīmaseno mahābalaḥ śarair bahubhir ānarchad bhīṣmaṃ śāṃtanavaṃ yudhi
ākarṇaprahitais tīkṣṇair niśitais tigmatejanaiḥ
sa viddhaḥ phālgunenājau na papāta mahītale
hayo hayaṃ gajo nāgaṃ vīro vīraṃ viśāṃ pate
yat tat sakhyus tu pūrveṇa arjunād upaśikṣitam
yudhyasva samare cādya paśyāmas tava pauruṣam
asahyam asiyuddhāya bhūriśravasam āhave matvā vṛkodaras tūrṇam abhiplutya mahārathaḥ
pṛṣṭhe cāstāṃ maheṣvāsāv āvantyau sapadānugau
athālokya praviṣṭaṃ tam ūcus te sarva eva tu

gadayā bhīmasenena tāḍitā vāraṇottamāḥ bhinnakumbhā mahākāyā bhinnapṛṣṭhās tathaiva ca bhinnagātrāḥ sahārohāḥ śerate parvatā iva rathāś ca bhagnās tilaśaḥ sayodhāḥ śataśo raṇe aśvāś ca sādinaś caiva pādātaiḥ saha bhārata tatrādbhutam apaśyāma bhīmasenasya vikramam yad ekaḥ samare rājan bahubhiḥ samayodhayat antakāle prajāḥ sarvā daṇḍapāṇir ivāntakaḥ
rathaṃ ca śūnyaṃ saṃprekṣya bhīmaṃ prati vicetanaḥ
abhyadhāvad gadāpāṇis tad balaṃ sa mahābalaḥ
raurave narake majjed aplave dustare nṛbhiḥ
abhidrutaṃ śastrabhṛtāṃ variṣṭhaṃ ca samantataḥ lokapālasamaṃ vīra lokavīraiś ca pāṇḍavam
bhīmo tatho pretya ca yājñasenam (sic)
dṛṣṭvā raṇe vākyam idaṃ babhāṣe
pravṛttiṃ bhīmasenasya pārṣatasya ca saṃyuge vijñāya samare śīghraṃ praviśadhvaṃ rathārṇavam gacchantu parayā śaktyā bhavanta iti me matiḥ
droṇam iṣvastrakuśalaṃ sarvavidyāsu pāragam
dharmarājapuraṃ rājan preṣayām āsa vai dvijaḥ
**** **** kekayā draupadīsutāḥ tān dṛṣṭvā samare kruddhās
tribhir anyair maheṣvāsaś cicchedāsya dhvajaṃ tathā
sa tathābhihato rājā smayann iva mahārathaḥ
sa tair vikarṇasya rathāt pātayām āsa vīryavān
durmukho vihvalas tatra niṣasāda rathe vibho visaṃjñaṃ prekṣya te sarve bhrātaraḥ paryavārayan
nanāda sumahānādaṃ prabhinna iva vāraṇaḥ
mumocāsmai śitān bāṇāṃs tīkṣṇān āśīviṣopamān
sa vihvalo rathopasthe niṣasāda sutas tava
nāśayām āsatur vīrau dhṛṣṭadyumnavṛkodarau kauravāṇām anīkāni śaraiḥ saṃnataparvabhiḥ
arjuno vāsudevaś ca kauravāṇām anīkinīm hatvā vidrāvya ca śaraiḥ śibirāyaiva jagmatuḥ
kṛpaś ca saha sodaryais tava rājan padānugaiḥ
naiṣṭhikīṃ buddhim āsthāya svargāya bharatottamāḥ
dhvajaṃ ciccheda bāṇena dhanuś caikena māriṣa athainaṃ chinnadhanvānaṃ chādayann iva bhārata nijaghāna raṇe taṃ tu sūtaṃ cāsya nyapātayat
satvaraṃ bālarakṣārthaṃ gacchāv eti dhanaṃjayaḥ
tatas tvaṃ samare yoddhuṃ rājabhir bahubhir vṛtaḥ
te vāridhārāś ca yathādrirājaṃ tathā ca varṣanti mahānubhāvāḥ
jayadratho bhagnavāhaṃ rathaṃ taṃ tyaktvā yayau yatra rājā kurūṇām bhayena bhīmasya sa mūḍhacetāḥ sasaubalas tatra yuddhasya bhītaḥ
hatāśve tu rathe tiṣṭhañ śaktiṃ cikṣepa dharmarāṭ tām āpatantīṃ sahasā kālapāśopamāṃ śitām ciccheda samare bhīṣmaḥ śaraiḥ saṃnataparvabhiḥ
bhīṣmo 'pi rathināṃ śreṣṭho vivyādha niśitaiḥ śaraiḥ bhrātarau tau mahāvīryau śatrusainyabhayaṃkarau
mattā rudhiragandhena piśitena ca te nṛpāḥ āsvādyāsvādya nṛtyante nādaṃ muñcanti bhīṣaṇam kabandhāni ca nṛtyanti dhanur hastāni saṃyuge prāsam ālambya niśitaṃ nistriṃśaṃ nirmalaṃ mahat
meghāntare yathā vidyuj jvalamāneva dṛśyate
aparājitasya rājendra bhīmaseno mahābalaḥ
nihatā bhīmasenena mahāvīryeṇa saṃyuge
virāṭo drupadaś caiva sahitāḥ sarvasomakaiḥ abhyadravanta saṃgrāme bhīṣmam eva mahārathāḥ kekayā dhṛṣṭaketuś ca kuntibhojaś ca daṃśitaḥ yuktānīkā mahārāja bhīṣmam eva samabhyayuḥ
pratodaiś ca tathā chinnair vikṛtaiś ca mahāyudhaiḥ
vājināṃ bahubhiḥ saṃkhye samantāt paryavārayan
nyavedayata cātmānam arjunasya mahātmanaḥ

sa cāpi naraśārdūlaḥ śārdūlasamavikramaḥ abravīc ca tadā pārtham ayam asmi tadā vibho sthitaḥ preṣyaś ca putraś ca sarvathā hy anuśādhi mām kiṃ karomi ca te kāmaṃ kaṃ vā kāmaṃ tvam icchasi pariṣvajya sutaṃ premṇā vāsaviḥ pratyuvāca tam prītipūrvaṃ ca kāryaṃ ca kāryaṃ prati ca mānada
hataśeṣair mahārāja dvisāhasrair hayottamaiḥ
arjunasya sutaṃ vīram irāvantaṃ yaśasvinam
adyānṛṇyaṃ gamiṣyāmi pitṝṇāṃ mātur eva ca
asya pāpasya durbuddhe phalaṃ prāpnuhi durmate
aśaktaḥ pratiyoddhuṃ vai dṛṣṭvā tasya parākramam
rathā rathaiḥ samāgacchan nāgā nāgaiś ca saṃyuge
sa rudreṇa jitaḥ pūrvaṃ nihato mātariśvanā
sūtaṃ caikena bhallena rathanīḍād apāharat
bhīmaseno 'pi samare nīlaṃ nīlāñjanaprabham āropya svarathaṃ vīro duryodhanam upādravat
parājayaṃ rākṣasena nāmṛṣyata paraṃtapa
na tu kāryas tvayā rājan haiḍimbena durātmanā
dadhāra supratīkaṃ taṃ kṣatradharmā gajena tu
rathaṃ saṃprerayām āsa vegena tvaritojjvalam
**** **** sumuktena mahāraṇe tāḍayām āsa saṃkruddhaḥ **** ****
tatas tu samare kruddho bhīmasenaḥ śilīmukhān
saṃdadhāra mahābāhur bhīmasenaṃ mahābalam
nimīlya nayane 'gṛhṇāt tathā bāṇān vṛkodaraḥ droṇacāpasamudbhūtaṃ śaravarṣaṃ durāsadam
nirāyudham athātmānaṃ sa saṃvīkṣya janādhipa
pravartam iva hārdikyaṃ ghoraṃ yuddham abhūt tataḥ
sāṅgadaiś ca bhujaiś caiva vipraviddhair alaṃkṛtaiḥ
śuśubhe dharaṇī rājan pradīptair iva parvataiḥ srastair ābharaṇaiś caiva vibabhau tu tadā mahī
vivāritavicitrābhiḥ kuthābhiś ca samantataḥ
rarāja subhṛśaṃ bhūmis tatra viśāṃ pate
droṇasya pramukhe vīrā hatās te bhrātaro mama bhīmasenena rādheya mama caiva ca paśyataḥ
mahābala mahāprājña sarvaśāstraviśārada mantrajño mantravān dakṣo nītimān nītikovidaḥ sa śūraḥ sa ca vikrāntaḥ sūryaputraḥ pratāpavān etan mahābhītikaraṃ pratariṣye raṇaṃ katham
padātayaś ca tvaritā nakharaprāsayodhinaḥ parivavrur maheṣvāsaṃ dhārtarāṣṭraṃ mahāratham
devāsure yathendro 'sau saṃgrāme ca bhayaṃkare
avaśyaṃ hitakāmena pārṣatena ca dhīmatā
yasya goptā jagadgoptā śaṅkhacakragadādharaḥ vāsudevo 'nantaśaktiḥ sṛṣṭisaṃhārakārakaḥ sarveśvaro devadevaḥ paramātmā sanātanaḥ ukto 'si bahuśo rājan nāradādyair maharṣibhiḥ
aśakyāḥ pāṇḍavā jetuṃ devair api savāsavaiḥ
mā siṃham iva kākena hataṃ bhīṣmaṃ śikhaṇḍinā paśyema puruṣavyāghra tathā nītir vidhīyatām
anye ca bahavaḥ śūrāḥ śataśo 'tha sahasraśaḥ nānāvidhāyudhā vīrā nānāśastropaśobhitāḥ
yuyudhāno maheṣvāso yudhāmanyuś ca vīryavān
nādhyagacchata vai trāṇaṃ pīḍyamānā durātmanā
nirbhiṇṇas tu śarair ghorair dīpyamānaḥ samantataḥ alaṃbuso bhṛśaṃ bhāti ulkābhir iva kuñjaraḥ
udvṛtya cakṣuṣī rājan krodhāt prasphuritādharau
saubhadraś ca mahābāhuḥ samare ca jitaśramaḥ parākramī mahātejāḥ pitus tulyaparākramaḥ
tathaiva pāṇḍavo droṇaṃ vetty eva priyam ātmanaḥ kṣatradharmarato nityaṃ kṣatradharmeṇa yudhyate
**** **** giryagrād iva kesarī tasthau sa sagado bhīmaḥ saśṛṅga iva parvataḥ siṃho dṛṣṭvā mṛgaṃ yadvat
sādināṃ śastravṛṣṭiṃ ca vyadhamad gadayā tataḥ vāyuvegasamāyukto vyacarat pāṇḍavo yudhi viṣāṇollikhitair gātrair viṣāṇābhihato bhṛśam
tato 'ntare mahārāja bhīmasenaḥ pratāpavān cakāra sumahad yuddhaṃ mahāghoraṃ bhayānakam
aśvān aśvaiś ca saṃmardya rathaiś ca rathinas tathā
dṛśyante sma mahābāho tatra tatra mahābalāḥ
śaṅkhacakraughasaṃpūrṇā chatrakūrmā rathoḍupā
iti duryodhanotsṛṣṭāḥ sarve yuyudhire nṛpāḥ
ayudhyanta mahāraṅge madhyaṃ prāpte divākare sātyakiḥ kṛtavarmāṇaṃ viddhvā pañcabhir āyasaiḥ nākampayata śaineyo satyavān satyakovidaḥ

kaśābhis tāḍayām āsuḥ pārṣṇibhiś ca mahur muhuḥ hayārohā dravanty eva codayanto hayottamān tathā tottranipātaiś ca aṅkuśānāṃ ca vibhramaiḥ gajārohā gajāṃs tūrṇaṃ tvarayantaḥ pradudruvuḥ rathinaś ca pratodaiś ca vāgbhiś caiva punaḥ punaḥ bhartsayanto hayān rājan prādravanti diśo daśa
putrāṃś ca patitān bhūmau mātulāṃś ca pitṝṃs tathā sodarāṃś cāvamardantaḥ pradrutās tatra tatra vai
nānāśastrasamākīrṇo yuddhāyaivābhidaṃśitaḥ
evaṃ tu saubalaṃ sainyaṃ prabhagnaṃ sarvatodiśam
uvāca madrādhipatiṃ rājā duryodhanas tadā
sahadevaś ca saptatyā pārthaś ca navabhiḥ śaraiḥ
**** **** niśitair navabhiḥ śaraiḥ nakulaṃ ca tribhir viddhvā
yathā hi sumahān agniḥ kakṣe carati sānilaḥ tathā bhīṣmo mahārāja divyam astram udīrayan
matsyapāñcālakaikeyān pātayām āsa saṃyuge

tataḥ pravavṛte raudraḥ saṃgrāmo lomaharṣaṇaḥ pāṇḍavānāṃ ca mukhyasya kurūṇāṃ pravarasya ca tālamātre vikarṣantau tāv ubhau raṇakarkaśau dhanuṣī dṛḍhamuṣṭī tāv ubhau pautrapitāmahau śyāmasya palitenāsau saṃgamaḥ pratyaśobhata gaṅgāyamunayor yadvaj jalayoḥ pratisaṃcaraḥ pārthanāmāṅkitā bāṇāḥ petur bhīṣmasya vakṣasi nirguṇānāṃ kṛtaghnānāṃ manāṃsīva hi sādhuṣu bhīṣmasyāpi tato bāṇāḥ petur arjunavakṣasi mahādevapariprāptadhanurvidyāṃ jigīṣavaḥ
vāsudevas tu saṃkruddho roṣāj jajvāla saṃyuge
pratodapāṇir bhagavāñ śuśubhe yādavarṣabhaḥ yathāṃśunārdayac candram amāvāsyāṃ divākaraḥ
abhavat paramaprīto jñātvā pārthasya vikramam
kurvāṇaṃ samare karmāṇy atimānuṣavikramam
vadhyamānā raṇe cāpi bhīṣmeṇāmitrakarśinā
tathaiva yodhā rājendra bhīṣmeṇāmitraghātinā samare mṛditāḥ sarve pāṇḍavāḥ saha sṛñjayaiḥ

udayagiritaṭasthaḥ padminīṃ bodhayitvā mṛdutarakiraṇāgrais tāḥ svayaṃ copabhujya malinamadhupasaṅgāt tāsu saṃjātakopaḥ kṛtaruciravirocir bhānum astaṃ prayātaḥ raṇe karūśādhipacedipair balair vṛtān sadā cakradharasya paśyataḥ
niśāmukhaṃ ca saṃprekṣya ghorarūpaṃ bhayānakam
satyaṃ bṛhaspater vākyaṃ devānām agrataḥ kila bhāṣitaṃ guruṇā pūrvaṃ tan nibodha janārdana putraḥ pitaram āsādya pitā putraṃ ca mānada rājyārthe ghātayed evaṃ kṣatradharmaḥ sanātanaḥ
yuddhād anyatra he vatsāḥ prīyantāṃ mā viśaṅkatha
yathā pṛcchasi mām adya kathaṃ tan me ca vā vibho
strījite strīpradhāne ca strīpradhāyini dharmaja
apumāṃs tasya putras tu pūrvam āsīd viśāṃ pate
katham asmadvidhaḥ kṛṣṇa jānan dharmaṃ sanātanam nyastaśastre ca vṛddhe ca prahared dhi pitāmahe
saṃjaya uvāca arjunasya vacaḥ śrutvā bhīṣmasya vadhasaṃyutam jahṛṣur hṛṣṭaromāṇaḥ sakṛṣṇāḥ pāṇḍavās tadā
svān svān gṛhān abhigatās tāṃ rātrim avasan sukham
bhīṣmaḥ paramasaṃkruddhaḥ śaraiḥ saṃnataparvabhiḥ
sarvam eva mahāyuddhaṃ śrutavantaṃ mahāraṇe
pātayiṣye ripūn anyān pāṇḍavān pratipālayan pratijñāto jayo hy adya pāṇḍavānāṃ mahātmanām
aśakyāḥ pāṇḍavā jetuṃ devair api savāsavaiḥ kiṃ punar martyadharmeṇa kṣatriyeṇa mahābala
tvaramāṇaṃ raṇe yattaṃ saumadattir avārayat
bhīṣmasya vadham icchantaṃ pāṇḍavaprītikāmyayā
ayodhayac ca samare tava putro mahārathaḥ
sā hemavikṛtā śaktir mādhavasya bhujacyutaiḥ
tato droṇasutaṃ yodhān dravamāṇaṃ mahāraṇe visṛjantaṃ śarān dṛṣṭvā
tayoḥ samabhavad yuddhaṃ tumulaṃ romaharṣaṇam
**** **** tiṣṭha tiṣṭheti cābravīt ājaghāna mahābāhuḥ pārṣataṃ taṃ mahāratham
ayodhayetāṃ samare tulyavegau narottamau
tatra yuddham abhūd ghoraṃ tayoḥ puruṣasiṃhayoḥ
yuktaḥ prītyā pāṇḍavānāṃ gāhamāno mahācamūm
tathā kilakilāśabdaḥ śrūyate vānarasya ca yasya lāṅgūlaśabdena sphuṭatīva nabhastalaṃ
abhyudyataṃ raṇe dṛṣṭvā bhairavāstraṃ ca pāṇḍavam
pūrvaṃ caiva mayāśrāvi tapasā ghorarūpiṇā brahmacaryeṇa mahatā phālgunaś carate tapaḥ tat tapaḥ saphalaṃ ceha kairāte savyasācinā
saṃjayaḥ putraṃ samanuśāsyaiva bhāradvājaḥ pratāpavān mahāraṇe mahārājaṃ dharmarājam ayodhayat
etac chrutvā vacas tasya droṇasya ca mahātmanaḥ
droṇasya ca dhanur bhīmas tribhir bāṇair acicchide
sa tu krodhasamāviṣṭo bhīmaseno mahābalaḥ madreśvaraṃ tribhir bāṇair bhṛśaṃ viddhvā mahāyaśāḥ
virarāja mahābāhur lalāṭasthena patriṇā ekaśṛṅgo mahārāja yathā parvatasattamaḥ atha bhīmo mahābāhuḥ kruddhaḥ sarvān mahārathān vimukhīkṛtya bāṇaughais tasthau girir ivācalaḥ

tataḥ kruddho mahābāhur bhīmo bhīmaparākramaḥ vivyādha samare vīras tribhis tribhir ajihmagaiḥ gautamapreritaṃ cāpi tomaraṃ tv anilātmajaḥ kṣurapreṇa dvidhā cakre prahasann iva bhārata hārdikyaprahitaṃ cāpi paṭṭasaṃ tilakāṇḍavat ciccheda samare vīro hy asaṃbhrāntarathaḥ śaraiḥ sa ciccheda śataghnīṃ ca saindhaveneritāṃ bhṛśam bhīmaseno raṇaślāghī navabhiḥ kaṅkapatribhiḥ
ghaṇṭābhiś ca kaśābhiś ca samāstīryata medinī
kuṇḍalair maṇicitraiś ca samāstīryata medinī
te tatheti pratijñāya puraskṛtya śikhaṇḍinam
citrasenas tava sutaṃ vicitraśarakārmukam
pārthahetoḥ parākrānto bhīṣmasyāyodhanaṃ prati
jaghāna bāṇān gāṅgeyas tathā muktāñ śikhaṇḍinaḥ
śalabhā iva rājendra pārtham apratimaṃ raṇe
samadṛśyanta samare dhāvamānāḥ samantataḥ
unmattavan mahārāja yudhyante tatra bhārata
somakāḥ sṛñjayaiḥ sārdhaṃ sarve te yuddhadurmadāḥ
pāṇḍavānāṃ yayuḥ senām ātmano jayagṛddhinaḥ
udvignāḥ samare yodhā vikrośanti dhanaṃjaya
yāvāyavābhyāṃ śuciśukrayoge ātānataptā iva bāṇasaṃghāḥ bhīṣmasya cāpacyutabāṇasaṃghaiḥ pārthasya senā kṛśatām avāpa
ajayyaś caiva sarveṣāṃ lokānām iti me matiḥ
tān apy āśu śarair bhīṣmaḥ pravivyādha mahārathaḥ taiś ca muktāñ śarān bhīṣmo yudhi satyaparākramaḥ nivārayām āsa śaraiḥ samaṃ saṃnataparvabhiḥ śikhaṇḍī tu raṇe bāṇān yān mumoca mahārathaḥ
paśyatāṃ kuruvīrāṇāṃ sarveṣāṃ tatra bhārata
tatrādbhutam apaśyāma pāṇḍavānāṃ parākramam drāvayām āsur iṣubhiḥ sarvān bhīṣmapadānugān

pāṇḍavaiḥ pañcabhiḥ sārdhaṃ sātyakena ca dhanvinā dhṛṣṭadyumnamukhaiḥ sarvaiḥ pāñcālaiś ca samantataḥ bhidyamānāḥ śarais tīkṣṇaiḥ sarve kārṣṇipurogamaiḥ droṇadrauṇikṛpaiḥ sārdhaṃ sarve śalyakṛpādayaḥ tāvakāḥ samare rājañ jahur bhīṣmaṃ mahāmṛdhe
duḥkhārtās te tadā rājan kurūṇāṃ patayo 'bhavan
sa hato draupadeyena pāñcālyena śikhaṇḍinā
kurupāṇḍavayoś chatre ādhāre ca dhanuṣmatām
duḥśāsanaṃ drutataraṃ droṇavijñāpanāya tat sametya puruṣavyāghra tvaramāṇo mahārathaḥ
etac chrutvā tu vacanaṃ bhīṣmād bhāgīrathīsutāt
upadhāne tathā datte bhīṣmasya savyasācinā bhīṣmo 'pi bharatāṃ śreṣṭhaḥ sarvadharmārthatattvavit
prāha sarvān samudvīkṣya bharatān bhārataṃ prati
paśyadhvam upadhānaṃ me pāṇḍavenābhisaṃdhitam
bhavantaḥ kuśalā nityaṃ bhiṣajo vedanāharāḥ uvāca putro gaṃgāyā na vaidyaiḥ kāryam asti me
vidyās tiṣṭhanti kuśalāḥ sadā vyādhicikitsane
avākirañ śāṃtanavaṃ tatra gatvā sahasraśaḥ
upāsāṃ cakrire sarve kurupāṇḍavasainikāḥ
nānāpraharaṇair viddhaḥ śaratalpagatas tathā
nedaṃ mama jalaṃ yogyaṃ pātuṃ naiva kṣamo hy aham
evam uktvā tatovāca bhīṣmaḥ śaraśataiś citaḥ payaḥ pāsyāmi gopālā gomayaṃ na tu gomayam gomayenāgnivarṇena gomayaṃ na tu gomayam
gomukhaiḥ pīḍyamānasya gaur naṣṭo mama gopate gorasaṃ pātum icchāmi gobhir yac ca na dūṣitam
yāvat kṣatraṃ na nighnanti tāvat saṃdhir vidhīyatām
diṣṭaṃ gantā tyaktadharmārthakāmaḥ putrabhrātṛjñātisaṃbandhihīnaḥ evaṃ vo 'stu viditaṃ kauraveyāḥ
dharmārthasahitaṃ vākyaṃ śrutvā hitam anāmayam nārocayata putras te mumūrṣur iva bheṣajam
bhīṣma bhīṣma mahābāho ity uvāca mahādyutiḥ
**** **** na tavādhirathaḥ pitā sūryajas tvaṃ mahābāho
jāto 'si dharmalopena tatas te buddhir īdṛśī nīcāśrayān matsareṇa dveṣiṇī guṇinām api tenāsi bahuśo rūkṣaṃ śrāvitaḥ kurusaṃsadi
vasudevasuto yadvat pāṇḍavāya dṛḍhavrataḥ
adharmaṃ vyādhimaraṇaṃ kṣatriyasya pitāmaha na cec chakyam avasraṣṭuṃ vairam etat sudāruṇam dhanaṃjayena yotsye 'haṃ svadharmaprītamānasaḥ

śraddhayā parayā yukto bhīṣmaparva śṛṇoti yaḥ mucyate brahmahatyāyā jayaṃ vai labhate dhruvam brāhmaṇān bhojayet samyag vastrālaṃkāragodhanaiḥ pūjayec caiva vaktāraṃ bhīṣmaparvaṇi vai gṛhī etad vai parvadānaṃ ca dattvā svarṇādidakṣiṇām samāhitaphalāvāptir jāyate nātra saṃśayaḥ aśvamedhasahasrasya rājasūyaśatasya ca gavāṃ koṭipradānasya phalaṃ syād bhīṣmaparvaṇi bhīṣmaparva idaṃ śrutvā pūjayed yas tu vācakam tena brahmā ca rudraś ca viṣṇuś ca vasavas tathā pūjitā ṛṣayaḥ sarve pitaraś ca sahāgnibhiḥ prasanne vācake vipre prasannāḥ sarvadevatāḥ dharmārthakāmamokṣāṇāṃ sa phalaṃ prāpnuyān naraḥ pañca ślokasahasrāṇi tathā hy aṣṭau śatāni ca ślokāś ca caturāśītiḥ proktā vyāsena dhīmatā
śuklāmbaradharaṃ viṣṇuṃ śaśivarṇaṃ caturbhujam prasannavadanaṃ dhyāyet sarvavighnopaśāntaye
vyāsaprasādād vijñāya sarvaṃ vṛttāntam uttamam sainikānāṃ ca sarveṣāṃ senayor ubhayos tadā khidyamānena manasā jagāma gajasāhvayam
dhārtarāṣṭrān mṛtān sarvān manye saṃjaya saṃyuge
hataṃ śrutvā mama sutaḥ kim akārṣīc ca saṃjaya
saṃprāptāḥ kuravo yuddhe ke 'trātiṣṭhan paraṃtapāḥ
ko hi dauryodhane sainye pumān āsīn mahārathaḥ yaṃ prāpya sumahāyuddhe tan naḥ śaṃsa mahābhaye
jugupsamānāḥ paramaṃ kṣātraṃ karma viśāṃ pate
karṇa karṇeti cakranduḥ śeṣā bhārata pārthivāḥ
lakṣmīr iva surais tyaktā śrutihīnā yathā dvijāḥ
cukruśuḥ sahitā yodhās tatra tatra mahābalāḥ
devān iva yathā viṣṇus trāyate mahato bhayāt
gāvalgaṇiṃ saṃjayaṃ tu śokavyākulalocanaḥ
sa hi vai puruṣavyāghro loke saṃjaya kathyate ārtānāṃ bāndhavānāṃ ca krandatāṃ ca viśeṣataḥ parityajya raṇe prāṇāṃs tattrāṇārthaṃ ca śarma ca
saṃmṛjya divyaṃ dhanur ātatajyaṃ sa rāmadattaṃ ripusaṃghahantā bāṇāṃś ca kālānalatulyakalpān ullāḷayan vākyam idaṃ babhāṣe
athābravīt sūtaputraḥ svasūtaṃ hantāsmy ahaṃ pāṇḍavasomakāṃś ca
utsādya cākhilām urvīṃ sarvakṣatrāntakaṃ gurum udyamyāpy atha vā meruṃ līlayākṣiptam ambhasi
**** **** śokamohapariplutaḥ padbhyām eva jagāmārto
nirdahantam anīkāni pravakṣyati janārdanaḥ
so 'py adya nihataḥ śete śaraiḥ protaḥ śikhaṇḍinā jito yena raṇe rāmo bhavatā vīryaśālinā kṣatriyāntakaro ghoro devadānavapūjitaḥ
mānahā bhava śatrūṇāṃ mitrāṇāṃ nandivardhanaḥ kauravāṇāṃ bhava gatir yathā viṣṇur divaukasām
tathātibalavān rājā jarāsaṃdho 'dbhutopamaḥ samare samaraślāghī na tvayābhyadhiko raṇe
utkalā mekalāḥ pauṇḍrāḥ kaliṅgāndhrāś ca saṃyuge niṣādāś ca trigartāś ca bāhlīkāś ca jitās tvayā
kṣemaṃ vindati sarvatra śatruhāniṃ ca vindati
tathā kuru manuṣyendra yathā duryodhane jayam
yathā ca kuravo yuddhe yodhayanti sma pāṇḍavān kṣatradharmārjitāṃl lokān avāpsyanti na saṃśayaḥ yudhyasva nirahaṃkāro balavīryavyapāśrayāt saṃjaya uvāca evam uktas tu bhīṣmeṇa yuddhāya kṛtaniścayaḥ

atha tatra maheṣvāso vyādiśad rathino varān vāraṇāṃs tatprakāreṇa cakāra tadanantaram sādinaś ca padātāṃś ca yathāśāstraṃ bṛhaspatiḥ sthāpayām āsa tathā putrāṇāṃ te jayapriyaḥ tataḥ pakṣau prapakṣau ca vidhāya bharatarṣabha pakṣakoṭyāṃ punar dvābhyāṃ pakṣau dvābhyāṃ suhṛdvṛtaḥ evam etan mayā vyūhaṃ karṇena vihitaṃ purā prekṣaṇīyam amanyanta rājānaḥ kurubhiḥ saha nṛtyantam iva taṃ vyūhaṃ didhakṣantam ivāhitān kṛtaṃ bṛhaspatimataṃ matvā karṇena dhīmatā balaṃ vyūhaśarīrasya sārānīkaṃ parasparam
hṛṣitāḥ kuravaḥ sarve duryodhanapurogamāḥ tam āgataṃ mahābāhuṃ sarvānīkapuraḥsaram
āhaveṣu viśeṣeṇa bhraṣṭanetreṣv ivāñjanam
adaiśiko yathā sārthaḥ sarvaṃ pāpaṃ samarchati anāyakā tathā senā sarvān doṣān samarchati
sarveṣām eva lokānāṃ viśvasya ca yathā kṣayaḥ viśvotpattisthitilaye śreṣṭho nārāyaṇaḥ prabhuḥ
duryodhanaṃ tadā rājan droṇo vacanam abravīt
pārṣataṃ tu raṇe rājan na haniṣye kathaṃ cana sa hi sṛṣṭo vadhārthāya mamaiva puruṣarṣabha yodhayiṣye tu sainyāni nāśayan sarvasomakān na ca māṃ pāṇḍavā yuddhe yodhayiṣyanti harṣitāḥ
svastivādaravaiś cānyaiḥ ślakṣṇaiḥ puṇyair manoramaiḥ
prādurāsīn mahāśabdaḥ kṛte senāpatau dvije senāpatye mahātmānaṃ sarve saṃhṛṣṭamānasāḥ
dīpyan dṛśyeta hi tathā ketuḥ sarvatra dhīmataḥ
didhakṣantau raṇe kruddhau netrābhyām itaretaram niścarantau mahāvīryau dhunvānau dhanuṣī dṛḍhau samucchritapatākena dhvajena rathināṃ varaḥ ācāryaḥ kurupāṇḍūnāṃ saṃgrāmaśirasi sthitaḥ
śreṇīkṛtāḥ saṃyati moghavegā dvīpe nadīnām iva kāśarohāḥ
sa tu kṛtvā mahatkarma droṇaḥ parabalārdanaḥ
vicitrajāmbūnadabhūṣitadhvajaṃ mahārathaṃ rukmarathaṃ nipātitam niśamya kaś cid dhi na harṣam eyivān ṛte mṛdhe drupadasutāt sasṛñjayāt
daivam eva paraṃ manye na sunītaṃ na pauruṣam madīyo nāyako yatra guṇaśreṣṭho hataḥ paraiḥ
guṇānāṃ sarvayodhānāṃ sthitir āsīn mahādyutiḥ yaṃ mṛtyur vaśagas tiṣṭhet sa kathaṃ mṛtyunā hataḥ
taṃ tu rukmarathaṃ dṛṣṭvā vidravanti sma śatravaḥ divyam astraṃ vikurvāṇaṃ saṃgatāḥ sarvataḥ pare
utsṛjya sarvasainyāni droṇam evābhidudruve
dṛptānāṃ pratiṣeddhā ca cakṣur āsīd acakṣuṣām amarṣī cāvalipteṣu dhārmikeṣu ca dhārmikaḥ
vā kathaṃ nihataḥ pāpai raṇe brāhmaṇapuṃgavaḥ
adīnaṃ puruṣavyāghraṃ hrīmantam aparājitam
brahmakalpo 'bhavad brāhme kṣātre nārāyaṇopamaḥ brahmakṣatre ca yasyāstāṃ vaśe sthāṇor ivākhile sarvān hi māmakān yuddhe sahāśvarathakuñjarān yudhiṣṭhirasya tapasā hatān manyāmahe kurūn
yaḥ sa devān sagandharvān sayakṣoragarākṣasān jetum utsahate droṇaḥ sa kathaṃ nihataḥ paraiḥ na sa pṛṣṭham ares trāsād raṇe śauryāt pradarśayet parām apy āpadaṃ prāpya sa kathaṃ nihataḥ paraiḥ
kaccin nainaṃ bhayāt kṣudrāḥ pārthebhyaḥ pradadū raṇe goptṛbhis taiḥ samutsṛṣṭaḥ kaccin naiṣa parair hataḥ dhṛṣṭadyumnaṃ hi paśyāmi nighnantam iva brāhmaṇam vāryamāṇaṃ raṇe tāta drauṇināmitatejasā
kṣaṇam ekam ahaṃ sūta na śakṣyāmīti jalpitum
yaḥ karoti mahatkarma śatrūṇāṃ vai mahābalaḥ mahākāyo mahotsāho nāgāyutasamo bale
gadāsividyutkalilaḥ śātravāṇāṃ bhayaṃkaraḥ
yadāyāt katham āsīd vas tadā pārthaṃ samīkṣya ha
ko hi śakto raṇe jetuṃ mānavaḥ pārtham īkṣitum
taṃ rathānāṃ varaṃ vīraṃ sadā yuddheṣu durmadam nakulaṃ pāṇḍavaśreṣṭhaṃ ke vīrāḥ paryavārayan
amoghabāṇaḥ siddheṣuḥ śatrubhir yudhi durjayaḥ
ārāvaṃ tumulaṃ kurvan vyathayan bhairavaṃ raṇe
dhanaṃjayopadeśena śreṣṭham iṣvastrakarmaṇi
yasmin nityāni santi sma vīre satyaparākrame
visṛṣṭā dakṣiṇā yasya gaṅgājalam avārayat
śakaṭaṃ pūtanāṃ hatvā bhagnau ca yamalārjunau
pūtanāṃ śakuniṃ hatvā keśinaṃ caiva vājinam ṛṣabhaṃ dhenukaṃ caiva ariṣṭaṃ ca mahābalam vṛkaṃ hatvā mahābāhuṃ dhṛtvā govardhanaṃ girim cāṇūraṃ muṣṭikaṃ caiva raṅgamadhye nihatya ca
govardhanasyoddharaṇe jñātvā vai samasajjata
eka eva dvidhā bhūto dṛśyate mānuṣair bhuvi
pitṝṇām api yaḥ pūrvo vedeṣu paripaṭhyate
sarveṣv api ca lokeṣu bībhatsur aparājitaḥ
śuśrūṣasva sthiro bhūtvā śaṃsato mama bhārata
anurūpaṃ phalaṃ tasya karmaṇo labhyatāṃ tvayā
iccheyaṃ vai mahātmānaṃ dharmātmānaṃ yudhiṣṭhiram bhrātṝṇāṃ paśyatām eva jīvagrāheṇa me dvija prīṇāmy anena kāryeṇa sasuhṛjjanabāndhavaḥ
yadi sarve haniṣyante pāṇḍavāḥ sasutā mṛdhe tataḥ kṛtsnaṃ vaśe kṛtvā niḥśeṣaṃ nṛpamaṇḍalam sasāgaravanāṃ sphītāṃ vijitya vasudhām imām viṣṇur dāsyati kṛṣṇāyai kuntyai vā puruṣottamaḥ
tasmiñ jīvati cānīte hy upāyair bahubhiḥ kṛtaiḥ
sthite pārthe dharmarājo naiva śakyo mayā raṇe
evam ukte tadā tasmin yuddhe devāsuropame
skandhāvāreṣu sarveṣu yathāsthāneṣu māriṣa
anyac ca brūyāṃ rājendra pratijñāṃ mama nityadā
keśaśaivālasaṃyuktāṃ māṃsāsṛkkardamāruṇām
śarīraśatasaṃbādhāṃ gṛdhrakaṅkaniṣevitām mahārathasahasrāṇi nayantīṃ yamasādanam
nadīṃ prāsyandayan droṇaḥ keśaśaivalaśāḍvalām
uvāha śataśo rājan pitṛlokāya vāhinīm
bhittvā ca śaravarṣeṇa śakuniṃ pratyavārayat
tayos tatra mahārāja bāṇavarṣaiḥ prakāśitam khadyotair iva cākāśaṃ pradoṣe puruṣarṣabha
cakre taṃ sarvasainyāni prahṛṣṭāny abhyapūjayan
hatāśvāt sa rathād rājan gṛhya carma mahābalaḥ abhyayād bhīmasenaṃ tu matto mattam iva dvipam
ciccheda samare yattaḥ sa ca yuddhād upāramat

bhagadattas tu rājānaṃ drupadaṃ nataparvabhiḥ saniyantṛdhvajarathaṃ vivyādha puruṣarṣabhaḥ drupadas tu tataḥ kruddho bhagadattaṃ mahāratham ājaghānorasi kṣipraṃ śareṇānataparvaṇā yuddhaṃ yodhavarau loke saumadattiśikhaṇḍinau
chādayām āsa nārācais tiṣṭha tiṣṭheti cābravīt
tayos tu yuddham abhavat parasparavadhaiṣiṇau yudhiṣṭhiraḥ svayaṃ rājā duryodhanam ayodhayat tau putrau tava durdharṣau yuyudhāte parasparam
tasya saṃdhitam ājñāya sāyakaṃ ghoradarśanam
dudhāva sahasā khaḍgaṃ carma cātirathaḥ punaḥ
parivavruḥ sma te sarve pāṇḍavānāṃ mahārathāḥ harṣayantaś ca saubhadraṃ roṣayantaḥ sutāṃś ca te
na hi devāsuraṃ yuddham īdṛgrūpaṃ bhaved iti cintayāmi ca yuddhāni śrutvā ghorāṇi saṃjaya
sāgnidīptā mahāraudrā gadā sā śuśubhe tadā
kopatāmrekṣaṇau vīrau śatrusaṃghavimardanau mahāmātrau mahotsāhau gadāyuddhaviśāradau
bhīmarūpā mahāvegā gadā śalyaṃ raṇe 'nudat
punaḥ śalyena bhīmasya gadāgrād gadayā hatāt saṃgharṣaṇād utthito 'gnir dīpayām āsa medinīm punaś ca bhīmasenena śalyasya mahatī gadā tāḍitā sahasā rājan visasarjātha pāvakam
atha maḍḍukabherimahāmurajāḥ paṇavānakadundubhijharjharibhiḥ vinadanti bhṛśaṃ saha śaṅkharavair vividhaiś ca narottama siṃharavaiḥ
prajānāṃ saṃkṣaye ghore yathā sūryodayo bhavet śūrāṇām udayas tadvat sa āsīt puruṣarṣabha
bāṇair nivārayām āsa paśyatāṃ sarvadhanvinām
taṃ vijitya mahātejā bhāradvājo mahāmanāḥ
asmin muhūrte droṇas tu pāṇḍavaṃ gṛhya harṣitaḥ
mā bhaiṣīr iti saṃvārya śarair droṇam avārayat
kṣobhayitvā balaṃ teṣāṃ pāṇḍavānāṃ mahātmanām
maladāś ca karūśāś ca daradāś ca mahārathāḥ taṅkaṇāś ca parādāś ca yugapatte samāgatāḥ
dvijamukhyaiḥ samuditaiḥ kṛtasvasty ayanāśiṣaḥ muditāś ca prahṛṣṭāś ca jalaṃ saṃspṛśya nirmalam
satyam ākramatāṃ ye ca pratyādityaṃ pramehatām
na hy arjuno raṇe rājan mithyā kiṃ cit pravakṣyati hatāṃs traigartakān paśya mā sma te kaśmalaṃ bhavet
sarvathā na nivarteyam āhūto 'haṃ paraṃtapa trigarto bhrātṛbhiḥ sārdhaṃ sa mām āhvayate bhṛśam tavāpi tu raṇe rakṣā vihitā me janādhipa nirapekṣo gamiṣyāmi vadhāyaiṣāṃ durātmanām
grahaṇe dharmarājasya kṛtotsāhaṃ mahāmṛdhe
vegena śaṅkhān āpūrya harṣayukte mahāsvane
atīva saṃprahṛṣṭās te hy upalakṣya dhanaṃjayam
mayā hatā hi saṃgrāme lokān prāpsyanti puṣkalān

sā senā bharataśreṣṭha niśceṣṭā śuśubhe tadā citrapaṭṭe yathā nyastā kuśalaiḥ śilpibhir naraiḥ svanena tena sainyānāṃ divam āvṛṇvatā tadā sasvanā pṛthivī sarvā tathaiva ca mahodadhiḥ vyūḍhānīkais tu taiḥ sarvaiḥ pṛthivyāṃ samarārṇave svanena sarvasainyānāṃ karṇās tu badhirīkṛtāḥ
tato vyupāramac chabdaḥ prahṛṣṭās te tato 'bhavan
jahāra pārthaḥ sainyeṣu sahasre dve ca yodhinām
bhūyiṣṭhaṃ pratiruddhās te hatair yodhair yaśasvinaḥ
evaṃ bruvāṇaṃ bībhatsuṃ keśavaḥ śatruvāhinīm
anyonyaṃ samare jaghnus tāvakā bharatarṣabha

rudhirotpīḍanās te tu rudhireṇa samukṣitāḥ candanasya raseneva vyabhrājanta raṇājire tataḥ prahasya bībhatsur vyākṣipad gāṇḍivaṃ bhṛśam nyahanat tāñ śarais tīkṣṇais tamaḥ sūrya ivāṃśubhiḥ hatāvaśiṣṭās te bhūyaḥ parivārya dhanaṃjayam sāśvadhvajarathaṃ cakrur adṛśyaṃ śaravṛṣṭibhiḥ

sa hi jāto mahāraudro droṇasya nidhanaṃ prati martyadharmatayā tasmād bhāradvājo vyamuhyata nāśakat taṃ tataḥ kaś cid anīke prativīkṣitum tataḥ kirann iṣūṃs tīkṣṇān drupadasya varūthinīm bhāradvājo yayau tūrṇaṃ pārṣataṃ varjayan yudhi drupadasya mahat sainyaṃ vārayām āsa brāhmaṇaḥ
abhavat tumulaṃ yuddhaṃ parasparavadhaiṣiṇoḥ
naiva khaṃ na diśo bhūmir babhāse na ca bhāskaraḥ
gajair gātravaraiḥ kṣuṇṇā viṣāṇaś ca nipātitāḥ

tato droṇaṃ maheṣvāsaṃ satyajit satyavikramaḥ avidhyan niśitāgraiś ca paramāstraṃ vidarśayan tato 'sya sāratheḥ pañca śarān sarpaviṣopamān amuñcad antakaprakhyān saṃmumohāsya sārathiḥ athāsya sahasāvidhyad dhayān daśabhir āśugaiḥ daśabhir daśabhiḥ kruddha ubhau ca pārṣṇisārathī maṇḍalaṃ tu samāvṛtya vyacarat pṛtanāmukhe dhvajaṃ ciccheda ca kruddho droṇasyāmitrakarśanaḥ droṇas tu tat samālakṣya caritaṃ tasya saṃyuge manasā cintayām āsa prāptakālam ariṃdamaḥ
ācāryas tasya vai cāpaṃ ciccheda tribhir āśugaiḥ
avākirac charais tūrṇaṃ bhāradvājaṃ samantataḥ hayeṣu ca viṣakteṣu vimukho 'bhavad āhave
vegena mahatāmṛdnād vāto drumam ivocchritam tataḥ pāñcālaputrasya yuddhe satyajitas tathā
krūrāya karmaṇe yuktaṃ cikīrṣuḥ karma duṣkaram avākirac charaśatair bhāradvājaṃ samantataḥ
śobhamānāṃ dhvaje cāsya vedīm adrākṣma bhārata himavacchikharākārāṃ carataḥ saṃyuge bhṛśam
te droṇaṃ sahitāḥ śūrāḥ sarvataḥ paryavārayan gabhastibhir ivādityaṃ tapantaṃ bhuvane yathā

śikhaṇḍī tu tato droṇaṃ pañcabhir nataparvabhiḥ kṣatravarmā ca viṃśatyā vasudānaś ca pañcabhiḥ uttamaujās tribhir bāṇaiḥ kṣatradevaś ca saptabhiḥ sātyakiś ca śatenājau yudhāmanyus tathāṣṭabhiḥ yudhiṣṭhiro dvādaśabhir droṇaṃ vivyādha sāyakaiḥ dhṛṣṭadyumnaś ca daśabhiś cekitānas tribhiḥ śaraiḥ
taṃ hatvā vibabhau droṇaḥ kurubhiḥ parivāritaḥ

vārdhakṣemis tu vārṣṇeyo droṇaṃ viddhvā śarottamaiḥ navabhiś cāvanīpālaḥ punar vivyādha pañcabhiḥ citrasenas tato droṇaṃ pāñcālas tv ardayac charaiḥ punar vivyādha saṃkruddhaḥ senābinduś ca pañcabhiḥ suvarmā pañcabhiś caiva dhṛṣṭadyumnaś ca pañcabhiḥ śikhaṇḍī navabhir bāṇaiś cekitānaś ca pañcabhiḥ sātyakiś ca catuḥṣaṣṭyā rājan vivyādha sāyakaiḥ sucitro daśabhir bāṇair droṇaṃ viddhvānadad balī taṃ droṇaḥ samare rājañ śaravarṣair avākirat apātayat tato droṇaḥ sucitraṃ sahasārathim sāśvaś ca samare rājan hato vai prāpatat kṣitau pātyamāno mahārāja babhau jyotir ivāmbarāt
eṣa cāpi mahābāhur himavān iva susthiraḥ vadhiṣyati mahārāja gadayā bhīmavegayā
hrīmantaḥ śatrumaraṇe nipuṇāḥ puṇyalakṣaṇāḥ bahavaḥ pārthivā rājaṃs teṣāṃ vaśagatā raṇe māvamaṃsthāḥ pāṇḍavāṃs tvaṃ nārāyaṇapurogamān
tān ahaṃ śrotum icchāmi vistareṇa pṛthak pṛthak dūyate me manas tāta droṇaṃ prati paraṃtapa śrutvā bhīṣmasya nidhanaṃ tadvad etad bhaviṣyati

sāraṅgaiś ca yudhāmanyur uhyamāno hayottamaiḥ paryavartata durdharṣaḥ kruddho droṇarathaṃ prati pārāvatasavarṇais tu hemabhāṇḍair mahājavaiḥ pāñcālarājasya suto dhṛṣṭadyumno 'bhyavartata pitaraṃ tu pariprepsuḥ kṣatradharmā yatavrataḥ siddhiṃ cāsya parāṃ kāṃkṣañ śoṇākṣaḥ saṃnyavartata padmapatranibhaiś cāśvair mallikākṣair alaṃkṛtaiḥ śikhaṇḍī kṣatradevaś ca svayaṃ pratvarayan yayau
dantavarṇās tu rājānaṃ kālavālā yudhiṣṭhiram durdharṣāyābhisaṃdhāya kruddhaṃ kruddhāya bhārata tathā tittirikalmāṣā hayā vātasamā jave avahaṃs tumule yuddhe
rukmabhāṇḍapraticchannāḥ kauśeyasadṛśā hayāḥ kṣamāvanto 'vahan saṃkhye senābindum araṭṭajāḥ
yuvānam avahan yuddhe yantuḥ preṣyakarāḥ hayāḥ
sahasrasomapratimā hayāḥ kanakabhūṣaṇāḥ vīraṃ tam avahan yuddhe heṣamāṇāḥ samantataḥ

rāsabhāruṇavarṇābhāḥ pṛṣṭhato mūṣakaprabhāḥ valganta iva saṃyattā vyāghradantam udāvahan harayaḥ kālakāś citrāś citramālyavibhūṣitāḥ sudhanvānaṃ naravyāghra pāñcālyaṃ samudāvahan indrāśanisamasparśā indragopakasaṃnibhāḥ kośaiś citrāntarāś citrāś citrāyudham udāvahan

keśavena hate saṃkhye pitary atha narādhipe bhinne kapāṭe pāṇḍyānāṃ vidruteṣu ca bandhuṣu bhīṣmād avāpya cāstrāṇi droṇād rāmāt kṛpāt tathā astraiḥ samatvaṃ saṃprāpya rukmikarṇārjunācyutaiḥ iyeṣa dvārakāṃ hantuṃ kṛtsnāṃ jetuṃ ca medinīm nivāritas tataḥ prājñaiḥ suhṛdbhir hitakāmyayā vairānubandham utsṛjya svarājyam anuśāsti yaḥ sasāgaradhvajaḥ pāṇḍyaś candraraśminibhair hayaiḥ vaiḍūryajālasaṃchannair vīryadraviṇam āśritaḥ divyaṃ visphārayaṃś cāpaṃ droṇam abhyapatad balī
nānādhvajapatākena nānākavacavājinā gato yudhiṣṭhiraṃ bhaktyā tyaktvā sarvasvam īhitam lohitākṣaṃ mahābāhuṃ bṛhantaṃ taṃ varadhvajam mahāsattvā mahākāyā sauvarṇe syandane sthitam
tau droṇabhīṣmau nihitau kim anyad bhāgadheyataḥ
kathaṃ ca vo manas tāta saṃnivṛtteṣv avartata
evam uktvā svayaṃ bhīmam abhyayāt tanayas tava krūraṃ dṛṣṭvā tu te putraṃ bhīmaseno 'bhyavartata
duḥśāsanas tu saṃyāntaṃ droṇāya nakulaṃ yudhi savyadakṣiṇam asyantaṃ śūraḥ śūraṃ nyavārayat
sālvo bhīmarathaḥ śūraṃ śrutasenaṃ mahāhave droṇāyābhimukhaṃ yāntaṃ śaraugheṇa nyavārayat
tam ārjuniḥ śaraiś cakre pitṛvyaṃ jarjarac chavim śaraiś ca draupadīputraṃ citrasenaḥ samāvṛṇot kirantaṃ śarajālāni prabhinnam iva kuṃjaram śrutakarmāṇam āyāntaṃ dauḥśāsanir avāyat
mahārathaṃ tu saubhadraṃ sarvayuddhaviśāradam
ārjuniṃ śrutakīrtiṃ ca draupadeyaṃ mahāratham droṇāyābhimukhaṃ yāntaṃ dauḥśāsanir avārayat tasya kṛṣṇasamaḥ kārṣṇis tribhir bhallaiḥ susaṃśitaiḥ dhanur dhvajaṃ ca sūtaṃ ca chittvā droṇāntikaṃ yayau
tato 'bhimanyuḥ karmāṇi kurvantaṃ citrayodhinam ārjuniḥ kṛtinaṃ śūraṃ lakṣmaṇaṃ samayodhayat
aṅgadaṃ pañcabhir bāṇair avidhyat sa paraṃtapaḥ aṅgado daśabhir bāṇaiḥ punar enam avākirat tataḥ samabhavad yuddham anyonyam itaretaram vīrāṇāṃ jayakāṅkṣāṇām atīva balapauruṣāt
bṛhaddhanur bṛhac caiva jayamitro jayas tathā dhṛṣṭadyumnasutān vīrān putrās te samavārayan

pārtham indram ivāyāntaṃ droṇaṃ prati nijaghnuṣam samārcchat sāyakaughena svayaṃ rājā nyavārayat sa nṛpaṃ sāśvayantāram arātighnam arātihā amṛdnāt taṃ pṛṣatkena duryodhanam ariṃdamam sa jyāṃ mṛdnatpṛṣatkena spṛṣṭvā vṛkṣam ivāśaniḥ vīro vismāpayan yuddhe droṇāyābhimukho 'vrajat alambusas tu saṃkruddho ghaṭotkacam avārayat vṛkarkṣayukte tiṣṭhantaṃ rathe vīro vareṣubhiḥ

bhāradvājas tu senānyaṃ dhṛṣṭadyumnaṃ mahāratham tam eva rājan saṃpaśyann atikramya tathā bahūn mahatā śarajālena kirantaṃ śatruvāhinīm avārayan mahārāja sāmātyaṃ sapadānugam tathānye pārthivā rājan bahutvān nānukīrtitāḥ samasajjanta te sarve yathāyogaṃ yathābalam hayair hayāḥ samājagmuḥ kuñjarair eva kuñjarāḥ padātayaḥ padātaiś ca rathair eva ratharṣabhāḥ akurvann āryakarmāṇi tatra te puruṣarṣabhāḥ kulavīryānurūpāṇi saṃsṛṣṭāś ca parasparam
tatra yuddhāny adṛśyanta pradṛptāni bahūni ca
tadanvayena nāgena bhīmasenam upādravat

vṛkodararathaṃ sāśvam aviśeṣam acūrṇayat padbhyāṃ bhīmo 'py atho dhāvaṃs tasya gātreṣv alīyata jānann añjalikāvedhaṃ nāpākrāmata pāṇḍavaḥ gātrābhyantarago bhūtvā kareṇātāḍayan muhuḥ lālayām āsa taṃ nāgaṃ vadhākāṅkṣiṇam avyayam kulālacakravan nāgas tadā tūrṇam athābhramat nāgāyutabalaḥ śrīmān kālayāno vṛkodaram bhīmo 'pi niṣkramya tataḥ supratīkāgrato 'bhavat bhīmaṃ kareṇāvanamya jānubhyām abhyapātayat grīvāyāṃ veṣṭayitvainaṃ sa gajo hantum aihata karaveṣṭaṃ bhīmaseno bhramaṃ dattvā vyamocayat punar gātrāṇi nāgasya praviveśa vṛkodaraḥ yāvat pratigajāyātaṃ svabalastham avaikṣata bhīmo 'pi nāgagātrebhyo viniḥsṛtyāpayāj javāt
bhīmo 'pi dorbhyāṃ nāgendraṃ nipīḍyāmocayad balī
prāgjyotiṣānādhipater gatvā nā[ga]m abodhayat
tato yudhiṣṭhiro dṛṣṭvā daśārṇādhipatiṃ hatam mahatā rathavaṃśena prāgjyotiṣam abhidravat
so 'tividdho balavatā satyakena viśāṃ pate vyavartata paritrāsān maṇḍalāni śarārditaḥ
yuyutsus tu rathād rājann apākrāmat tvarānvitaḥ tataḥ pāṇḍavayodhās te nāgarājaṃ śarair drutam
sa bhīmenātha bahudhā dantābhyām avapīḍayan mokṣito yuddhaśauṇḍena nāgāyutabalo gajaḥ
cekitānaś catuḥṣaṣṭyā sottarāyudhikaṃ punaḥ pratyavidhyac charaiḥ sarvān bhagadattas tribhis tribhiḥ
abhidhāveti kaunteyaṃ saṃcodayad ivārjunam samucchrito bhṛśārtāyā senāyā subhujo yathā
samantatas tatra janādhipeśvara
siṃhanādaṃ mahat kṛtvā dhanurbāṇaravaiḥ saha vidrāvyamāṇaṃ saṃpaśya hatabhūyiṣṭhanāyakam dṛṣṭvā vinadya sahasā mama senāṃ pramṛdnati
tatas tena śaraugheṇa mahatā samavāstṛtaḥ nāśakan nāma bībhatsur amitrān pratibādhitum
tato janārdanaḥ pārthaṃ pratyuvāca hasann iva vajram astraṃ tu saṃdhāya jahi saṃśaptakān iha
karmaitat pārtha śakreṇa yamena dhanadena ca duṣkaraṃ samare yat te kṛtam adyeti me matiḥ yugapac caiva saṃgrāme śataśo 'tha sahasraśaḥ patitā eva me dṛṣṭāḥ saṃśaptakamahārathāḥ
vavarṣa śaravarṣaṃ tu punar eva dhanaṃjayaḥ
**** **** tad vyaśīryata bhūtale viśīrṇavarmā sa gajaḥ śaraiḥ subhṛśam arditaḥ babhau śirasi mātaṃgo
tau vidhyamānau nārācair bhagadattena bhārata jagmatur naiva saṃmohaṃ cukṣubhāte na cācyutau
tad astram udyataṃ dṛṣṭvā vāsudevaḥ pratāpavān arjunaḥ pṛṣṭhataṃ kṛtvā pratijagrāha vīryavān

padmakośavicitrā ca sarvartukusumākulā jvalanārkenduvarṇāḍhyā tārakojjvalapāvakā tayā padmābhiśobhinyā vāyukampitalolayā śobhate 'bhyadhikaṃ śauriratasīpuṣpasaṃnibhaḥ keśavaḥ keśimathanaḥ śārṅgadhanvārimardanaḥ sandhyābhrair iva saṃchannaḥ prāvṛṭkāle nagottamaḥ
idam astram avasthāpya prāptaṃ māṃ devakīsuta kimarthaṃ puruṣavyāghra svayaṃ pratigṛhītavān

tad etan narakasyāsīd astraṃ sarvāhitāntakam tasmāt prāgjyotiṣaṃ prāptaṃ sarvaśastravighātanam nāsyāvadhyo 'sti loke 'smin mad anyaḥ kaś cid arjuna tasmān mayā kṛtaṃ hy etan mā te 'bhūd buddhir anyathā anunīya tu dāśārhaḥ pāṇḍavaṃ tvarito 'bravīt jahi prāgjyotiṣaṃ kṣipraṃ vākyaśeṣaṃ ca me śṛṇu
vyajāyata dharā devī putraṃ putraśatāvaram
tad astraṃ devagandharvayakṣapannagarākṣasān sarvān samāgatān hanyāt kiṃ punas tvāṃ dhanaṃjaya bhogināṃ caiva durdharṣaṃ mayā dattaṃ surāsuraiḥ jahi prāgjyotiṣaṃ pārtha purā sarvān hinasti saḥ
avadhyo 'yaṃ mahāstreṇa bhagadattaḥ surāsuraiḥ yathāhaṃ narakaṃ lokahitārtham ahanaṃ purā

ghaṇṭāṃ kāñcanasaṃchannāṃ viśvakarmavinirmitām kāñcanaśṛṅkhalānaddhāṃ savyāṃ ciccheda pāṇḍavaḥ sā hatā śaraghātena vajraniṣpeṣasaṃnibhā papāta dūrapātena candrabimbasamujjvalā dakṣiṇāpi hatā rājan ghaṇṭā bāṇaiḥ kirīṭinaḥ papāta dūram adhvānaṃ gatvā sūrya iva kṣitau bhagadattena nirmuktaḥ supratīko 'pi vegataḥ hanumān sūryabimbasya grasanārtham ivodyataḥ
tataḥ saṃdhāya viśikhaṃ dīpyamānam ivānalam avidhyad arjuno nāgaṃ kumbhayor antare bhṛśam
madhye vidīrṇas tasthau sa prāsyandata punaḥ punaḥ syandamānaṃ tato nāgaṃ caraṇābhyām anodayat
tamomayaṃ jagan mene bhagadattaḥ pratāpavān devavākyāt praciccheda śareṇa bhṛśam arjunaḥ chinnamātreṃ 'śuke tasmin ruddhanetro babhūva saḥ

bibheda sakalo deho dvidhābhūto babhūva ha rājñā balavatā tena jānubhyāṃ dhārito raṇe arjunaṃ prati yuddhe na cirakālaṃ dadhāra saḥ evaṃ yuddhaṃ tadā tena rājñā tena durātmanā kirīṭī cārdhabimbena śareṇānataparvaṇā

pūrvadaityaṃ mahāvīraṃ bhagadattaṃ mahābalam kṛṣṇau daśārhabībhatsū jaghnatur yudhi durjayam nāgāyutabalaprāṇaṃ śūram āhavaśobhinam supratīko 'pi balavān nāgāyutasamo balī vaiṣṇavāstreṇa saṃyukto aṃkuśena ca vīryavān trīṇi tejāṃsi tatraiva tretāgnir iva cādhvare bhagadattaṃ raṇe śūraṃ nihanyāt ko 'rjunaṃ vinā arjuno 'pi mahāvīryo hatvā pitṛsakhaṃ raṇe kṣatradharmaṃ vicintyājau dhig dhig ity eva cābravīt tam ādityasamaṃ kāntyā bhūmau nipatitaṃ divaḥ prasamīkṣya tadā pārtho reṇunā tv avaguṇṭhitam
tat tamo bhairavaṃ ghoraṃ bhayakartṛ mahāhave
durdyūtadevin gāndhāre nākṣān kṣipati gāṇḍivam jvalitān niśitāṃs tīkṣṇāñ śarān kṣipati gāṇḍivam
yaudhiṣṭhirāṇy anīkāni pradahanti tatas tataḥ
ataḥ paraṃ raṇe sūta kim akurvanta māmakāḥ
ānantaryam abhiprepsuḥ ṣaḍviṃśatyā samārpayat punaś cāgnisamasparśair āśīviṣaviṣopamaiḥ
kuñjarāṇāṃ ca saṃpāto babhūva kaṭukodayaḥ
anīkānāṃ prabhagnānām avasthānam apaśyatām duṣkaraṃ pratisaṃdhānaṃ bhuvi cāsīt tadā nṛpa
cakreṇa cakram āsādya vīro vīrasya saṃyuge atīteṣupathe kāle jahāra gadayā śiraḥ
bhītaś cānya udakrośad anyo bhīta upādravat asaṃprāptasya taṃ deśam anyo jīvitam ādade
rāmaśiṣyo mahābāhur dhanvināṃ mānahā sadā
tathaivādhirathis tasya bāṇāñ jvalitatejasaḥ
pattyaśvarathamātaṅgās tvadīyāḥ śataśo 'pare karṇam evābhyadhāvanta trāsyamānāḥ prahāriṇaḥ
saṃrambheṇābhisaṃsṛjya nighnatām itaretaram kurūṇāṃ pāṇḍavānāṃ ca droṇārjunasamāgame
mahābale kṣubdhamahārṇavopame mahendrasadmātithitāṃ yiyāsavaḥ
tato duryodhano rājā droṇaṃ dīno 'bhyabhāṣata
saubhadraḥ pṛthivīpāla jahau prāṇān paraṃtapa mahārathaṃ śalyaputraṃ lakṣmaṇaṃ ca tava priyam
vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ abhimanyuṃ hataṃ śrutvā dhṛtarāṣṭro janeśvaraḥ vistareṇa mahārāja paryapṛcchat sa saṃjayam
kesarāṇi ca padmasya sukumārāṇi bhārata kumārā rājalokasya nikṣiptāḥ kesaropamāḥ karṇikāstho mahārāja tasya duryodhano 'bhavat
candanāgurudigdhāṅgāḥ sragviṇaḥ sūkṣmavāsasaḥ sahitāḥ paryadhāvanta kārṣṇiṃ prati yuyutsavaḥ
duryodhanas tu rājendra sainyamadhye vyavasthitaḥ
tataḥ pravavṛte yuddhaṃ tumulaṃ lomaharṣaṇam tāvakānāṃ pareṣāṃ ca mṛtyuṃ kṛtvā nivartanam
śṛṇu rājan mahābāho vacanaṃ mama suvrata purā garbhagate vāpi cakravyūhapraveśanam mukhāt kṛṣṇasya rājendra śrutam asmi mayā prabho tasmād vyūhaṃ praviśyāmi cakrākhyaṃ nṛpasattama

yāto 'ham arjunād rājan subhadrāyāṃ tathaiva ca mahadbalena saṃpūrṇaṃ paśyadhvaṃ pauruṣaṃ mama sarvān haniṣyāmi kurūn droṇamukhyān narādhipa yaiḥ kṛtaṃ duṣkṛtaṃ karma pāṇḍavānāṃ mahātmanām jyeṣṭhā mātā madīyā yat sabhāṃ nītā durāsadaiḥ duḥśāsanena ca tadā pāpena duṣṭakarmaṇā pāñcālāṃ prati rājendra yat kṛtaṃ duṣṭakāribhiḥ tat sarvaṃ cādya tadvyūhe darśayiṣyāmi lāghavāt
nāhaṃ pārthena jātaḥ syāṃ na ca jātaḥ subhadrayā yadi me saṃyuge kaś cij jīvito nādya mucyate yadi caikarathenāhaṃ samagraṃ kṣatramaṇḍalam na karomy aṣṭadhā yuddhe na bhavāmy arjunātmajaḥ
droṇo hi kṛtavān yatnaṃ śastrāstrakṛtaniśramaḥ tvaṃ tu bālaḥ sa balavān saṃgrāmāṇām akovidaḥ
vyavasāyo hi me yoddhuṃ raṇotsavasamudbhavaḥ
yac caitat paśyase sūta sayodhāśvarathadvipam
evam apy ucyamānaḥ sa sārathis taṃ punaḥ punaḥ vīra te tena mā yuddham iti saubhadram abravīt
tad abhedyam anādhṛṣyaṃ droṇānīkaṃ sudurjayam bhittvārjunir asaṃbhrānto viveśācintyavikramaḥ
samāsthitān yodhavarair dāntāśvān sādhusārathīn vipatākādhvajacchattrān vitūṇīrāyudhān api visūtāśvarathābhīśūn viśamyāyoktradaṇḍakān
yathāsurabalaṃ ghoraṃ tryambakenāmitaujasā kṛtvā karma raṇe 'sahyaṃ parair ārjunir āhave
abhimanyur asau vīro viṣṇutulyaparākramaḥ saubhadro ayam āyāto asmāñ jetuṃ mahābalaḥ
tato rathāḥ padātyoghāḥ kuñjarāḥ sādinaś ca ha
abhyadravata taṃ kārṣṇim aśmakendraḥ kṛtatvaraḥ

saubhadraśaranirbhiṇṇāḥ samare 'maravikramāḥ evaṃ śalyo vimṛditas tava pautreṇa bhārata yudhyamāno mahābāhuḥ śakratulyaparākramaḥ jaghāna samare sarvān nānāśastraviśāradān itīva teṣāṃ samare mahātmā pratāpavān nītivatāṃ variṣṭhaḥ yuddhe ca tasmin sa mahābalo ripūṃś cakāra sarvān iṣubhiḥ pradagdhān
tāṃs tathā dravato dṛṣṭvā saubhadraḥ prahasann iva
yat sainyaṃ mama putrasya mama pautraḥ prabādhate yathā caiva hi yat sainyaṃ
abhimanyuṃ mahāsattvaṃ ślāghate vandino yathā tasmāt saṃpaśyatas tasya droṇācāryasya dhīmataḥ
duḥśāsanas tu saṃrabdhaṃ jñātvā bhrātaram agrajam tān nivartya rathodārān atha bhrātaram abravīt
duḥśāsanas tathety ukto bhrātrā tava sutas tadā
tataḥ samabhavad yuddhaṃ tayoḥ puruṣasiṃhayoḥ tasmin kāle mahābāhuḥ saubhadraḥ paravīrahā saśaraṃ kārmukaṃ chittvā lāghavena nyapātayat duḥśāsanaṃ śarair ghoraiḥ saṃtatakṣa samantataḥ

akṣakūṭaṃ samāśritya saubalasyābhavad balam śṛṇu me vacanaṃ tāta pitṛvyo 'si mahāmate sauhṛdaṃ pṛṣṭhataḥ kṛtvā sarvair eva durātmabhiḥ bhuktaṃ rājyam idaṃ mūḍhaiḥ sarvadharmabahiṣkṛtaiḥ suhṛdbhir bhujyate rājyaṃ suhṛdbhir bhujyate sukham vinā suhṛdbhir bhogāś ca aihikāmutrikaṃ ca yat mithyābhūtaṃ ca tat sarvaṃ suhṛdbhir varjitaṃ tadā dūrdyūtadevanā yūyaṃ pāpiṣṭhāḥ pāpavañcakāḥ teṣāṃ tvam agraṇīḥ pāpa yena sā drupadātmajā ānītā ca sabhāṃ sādhvī tasyedaṃ karmaṇaḥ phalam darśayiṣyāmi sarveṣāṃ kurūṇāṃ ca durātmanām
śarair agnisamasparśair ākarṇasamacoditaiḥ
tathā tu vartamāne vai saṃgrāme 'tibhayaṃkare

tataḥ karṇo yayau rājann abhimanyujighāṃsayā bālo 'yaṃ yudhyamāno 'yaṃ mayā yoddhum ihecchati enaṃ vadhiṣyāmi ripuṃ yathā vṛtraṃ śacīpatiḥ evam uktvā tu rādheyo rathārūḍho mahārathaḥ yayau yoddhuṃ mahāvīraḥ kurūṇāṃ tatra paśyatām pradhmāpya śaṅkhaṃ rādheyo mahāmeghaughanisvanam rathenābhyapatad vegād ādityasadṛśena vai dhanuṣā pūryamāṇena maurvīguṇavibhūṣiṇā śarair agniśikhākārair āśīviṣasamaprabhaiḥ

tasmai cikṣepa niśitaṃ śaraṃ paramasaṃhitam sacchattradhvajayantāraṃ sāśvam āśu smayann iva karṇo 'pi cāsya cikṣepa bāṇān saṃnataparvaṇaḥ asaṃbhrāntaś ca tān sarvān agṛhṇāt phalgunātmajaḥ tato muhūrtāt karṇasya bāṇenaikena vīryavān
karṇānujaṃ ca saṃprekṣya tāvakā vyathitābhavan
tiṣṭha karṇa maheṣvāsa kṛpa duryodhaneti ca droṇasya krośato rājaṃs tad anīkam abhajyata
yathā purā vahnisutaḥ surasainyeṣu vīryavān
naivaṃ kṛtaṃ mahatkarma bhīṣmeṇājñāsiṣaṃ tathā sindhurāṭtanayas tv eko yathā pārthān avārayat
tasya cālpena kālena niyamena sutoṣitaḥ prīto maheśvaras tasmai varaṃ caivaṃ dadau tadā sa tu vavre varaṃ tatra pāṇḍaveyān ahaṃ raṇe vārayeyaṃ rathenaikaḥ
yam āhur ajitaṃ saṃkhye śaṅkhacakragadādharam viṣṇusahasramūrdhānaṃ sa kṛṣṇaḥ pāti phālgunam
tenoktas tam ṛte pārthaṃ śarvas tasmai varaṃ dadau ekāham iti rājendra tatraivādarśanaṃ gataḥ

vivyadhuḥ śaravarṣeṇa samantān nṛpasattamāḥ saṃchādyamāno bahubhiḥ pāṇḍavānāṃ mahārathaiḥ na vivyathe mahārāja divyam astram upāśritaḥ chittvā ca tāñ śarān rājañ śaravarṣaiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ chādayām āsa tān sarvāṃs tad abhūd romaharṣaṇam
saṃtrastā vāhinī tubhyaṃ naur ivāsīn mahārṇave
so 'bhimanyus tatas tasya chittvā praṇadato balī
bhinnānīkāś ca diṅmūḍhā bhūyaḥ saṃtrastacetasaḥ bhallair utkṛttaśirasaḥ paralokam athāviśan
