diśāṃ hi vijaye kṛṣṇa sahadevasya cājñayā laṅkāṃ tu gatvā paulastyaḥ karaṃ vai dāpito balāt
śaṅkhaśabdaravāṃś caiva bāṇaśabdāṃś ca daṃsitāḥ
vyāsenaivam athoktas tu dharmarājo yudhiṣṭhiraḥ svayaṃ karṇavadhād vīro nivṛtto bharatarṣabha
asmākaṃ ca mahārāja parebhyo bahavo janāḥ
vīrā vāraṇakumbheṣu suṣupur yuddhakarśitāḥ rātrau ratipariśrāntāḥ kāminīnāṃ kuceṣv iva

pramadayan vasudhāṃ hi sudhākaraḥ kiraṇakesarabhāsurapiñjaraḥ timiravāraṇayūthavidāraṇaḥ samudiyād udayācalakesarī haravṛṣottamagātrasamadyutiḥ smaraśarāsanapūrṇasamaprabhaḥ navavadhūsmitacārumanoharaḥ pravisṛtaḥ kumudākarabāndhavaḥ
tiṣṭha sa tvaṃ mahābāho nityaṃ śiṣyaḥ priyas tava

prācyāṃ diśi sahasrāṃśor aruṇenāruṇīkṛtam tāpanīyaṃ yathā cakraṃ bhrājate ravimaṇḍalam tato rathāśvāṃś ca manuṣyayānāny utsṛjya sarve kurupāṇḍuyodhāḥ divākarasyābhimukhaṃ japantaḥ saṃdhyāgatāḥ prāñjalayo babhūvuḥ
śabdamātreṇa jānīmo vayaṃ te ca parasparam
vidhūyānye karān kruddhāḥ kareṣv eva nyapīḍayan
dṛṣṭvā droṇaṃ mahārāja samakampata[nta] pāṇḍavāḥ tato yodhā pāṇḍavānāṃ mahātman dṛṣṭvā droṇaṃ dīpyamānaṃ śaraughaiḥ tataḥ sarve sṛñjayāḥ pāṇḍavāś ca jighāsanto droṇam evābhijagmuḥ

sa tābhyām ardito vṛddho vṛddhābhyāṃ krodhamūrchitaḥ tau śaraiś chādayām āsa virāṭadrupadāv ubhau droṇena chādyamānau tau kruddhau saṃgrāmamūrdhani droṇaṃ śarair vivyadhatuḥ paramaṃ krodham āsthitau tato droṇo mahārāja krodhāmarṣasamanvitaḥ bhallābhyāṃ bhṛśatīkṣṇābhyāṃ ciccheda dhanuṣī tayoḥ tato virāṭaḥ kupitaḥ samare tomarān daśa daśa cikṣepa ca śarān droṇasya vadhakāṅkṣayā śaktiṃ ca drupado ghorām āyasīṃ svarṇabhūṣitām cikṣepa bhujagendrābhāṃ kruddho droṇarathaṃ prati tato bhallaiḥ suniśitaiś chittvā tāṃs tomarān daśa śaktiṃ kanakavaiḍūryāṃ droṇaś ciccheda sāyakaiḥ

athodyamya gadāṃ bhīmaḥ kāladaṇḍam ivāntakaḥ droṇāya vyasṛjad rājan rathahayapapalvuve (sic) sāśvasūtadhvajaṃ rājan droṇasyāpothayat tadā prāmṛda[dna]n svabahūn yodhān vāyuvṛkṣān ivaujasā anyaṃ tu ratham āsthāya droṇaḥ praharatāṃ varaḥ vyūhadvāraṃ samāsthāya yuddhāya samavasthitaḥ
narā rathai rathā nāgais tathaiva puruṣarṣabha
aśobhanta yathā meghāḥ śāradāś calavidyutaḥ
yodhās te tu mahārāja krodhāmarṣasamanvitāḥ
putras tava mahārāja rājā duryodhano drutam
purā devāsure yuddhe vṛtravāsavayor iva
karṇo 'py anyad dhanur gṛhya hemapṛṣṭhaṃ durāsadam ciccheda paravīraghnaḥ prahasann iva bhārata
tāv anyonyaṃ prati mahān saṃrambhaḥ samajāyata mṛdupūrvam abhūd yuddhaṃ divyāstraviduṣor dvayoḥ
gatam ekastham ācārye gataṃ vedhaś ca pāṇḍave arjune dṛśyate vyaktaṃ nānyasmiṃs tad dhanurdhare lakṣam ekastham ācārye lakṣaṃ vedhaś ca pāṇḍave śaighryam ekastham ācārye śaighryaṃ vedhaś ca pāṇḍave
yadā droṇaṃ mahārāja viśeṣayati pāṇḍavaḥ
tad astraṃ saṃdhitaṃ rājan ghorarūpaṃ mahāhave
saritaś ca pratisrotaḥ samūhur vai kṣaṇāntaram
droṇas tyajya raṇe pārthaṃ pāñcālān anvadhāvata arjuno 'pi raṇe droṇaṃ tyaktvā prādrāvayat kurūn śaraughair atha tābhyāṃ tu chāyābhūtaṃ mahāmṛdhe tumulaṃ prababhau rājan sarvasya jagato bhayam
dhṛṣṭadyumno 'pi rājendra bhagnaṃ dṛṣṭvā tavātmajam
na cūlī baliśas tatra na yamī nāpi pāvakaḥ
tatas tava suto rājan sātvatena samāgataḥ

sātyakiṃ tu tato rājan prahasaṃs tanayas tava ākarṇamuktair niśitair vivyādha triṃśatā śaraiḥ tato 'sya saśaraṃ cāpaṃ kṣurapreṇa dvidhākarot so 'nyat kārmukam ādāya laghuhastas tato dṛḍham sātyakir vyasṛjac cāpi śaraśreṇīṃ sutasya te tām āpatantīṃ sahasā śaraśreṇīṃ jighāṃsayā ciccheda bahudhā rājaṃs tata uccukruśur janāḥ sātyakiṃ ca trisaptatyā pīḍayām āsa vegitaḥ svarṇapuṅkhaiḥ śilādhautair ākarṇāpūrṇaniḥsṛtaiḥ
tayoḥ śarasahasraiś ca saṃchannaṃ vasudhātalam agamyarūpaṃ ca śarair ākāśaṃ samapadyata
rathacakraṃ ca karṇasya babhañja sa mahābalaḥ bhagnacakre rathe 'tiṣṭhad akampaḥ śailarāḍ iva ekacakraṃ rathaṃ tasya tam ūhuḥ suciraṃ hayāḥ ekacakram ivārkasya rathaṃ saptarṣayo 'malāḥ
bhīmasenas tu saṃkruddhaḥ sūtaputram ayodhayat
sasṛjus tarasā vīrān pañcame 'hani bhārata
dṛṣṭvā ca naranāgāśvapattīnāṃ vipulaṃ kṣayam
sadhanur dhanvināṃ śreṣṭho devair api savāsavaiḥ nyastaśastras tu saṃgrāme śakyo hantuṃ bhaven nṛbhiḥ
parapramathanaṃ ghoraṃ mālavasyendravarmaṇaḥ
taiḥ śarair āvṛtaṃ droṇaṃ nāpaśyāma mahāratham bhāskaraṃ jaladai ruddhaṃ varṣāsv iva viśāṃ pate vidhūya tān bāṇagaṇān pāñcālānāṃ mahārathaḥ
brahmāstreṇa tvayā dagdhā anastrajñā narā bhuvi yad etad īdṛśaṃ vipra kṛtaṃ karma na sādhu tat nyasyāyudhaṃ raṇe kṣipraṃ droṇa mā tvaṃ ciraṃ kṛthāḥ mā pāpiṣṭhataraṃ karma kariṣyasi punar dvija
yudhiṣṭhiram upāgamya droṇo vacanam abravīt satyaṃ kathaya rājendra yadi jīvati me sutaḥ
kāminīṣu vivāheṣu gavām arthe tathā dhane brāhmaṇābhyavapattau ca anṛte nāsti pātakam
tasya tv ahaś ca rātriś ca śarān abhyasato 'gamat
tataś ca pārṣato rājan samākṛṣya dhanur mahat śaraṃ mumoca niśitaṃ bhāradvājajighāṃsayā
darśayām āsa kauravya pārṣato vicaran raṇe
bhārataṃ kauśikaṃ caiva sātvataṃ caiva śikṣayā darśayan vyacarad yuddhe droṇasyāntacikīrṣayā caratas tasya tān mārgān vicitrān khaḍgacarmiṇaḥ vyasmayanta raṇe yodhā devatāś ca samāgatāḥ
ṛte śāradvatāt pārthād droṇer vaikartanāt tathā
paśyatas tasya tān mārgān vicitrān khaḍgacarmaṇi

saṃprahṛṣṭācyuto dṛṣṭvā sādhu sādhv iti pūjayan taṃ yaudhāś cābhavan sarve karmaṇānena pūjayan evam uktvā mahārāja vāsudevaṃ dhanaṃjayaḥ prāyāt tava balaṃ jiṣṇur bhāradvājarathaṃ prati tatrāsīd bhairavo nādas tāvakānāṃ jayaiṣiṇām samabhidravatāṃ pārthaṃ daityānām iva vāsavam tatrākaron mahārāja mahīṃ śoṇitakardamām prācchinac cottamāṅgāni pārtho 'śvanaradantinām tāṃ vṛṣṭiṃ sahasā rājann utthitāṃ ghorarūpiṇīm vārayām āsa śaineyo yodhayaṃs tān mahārathān teṣām astrāṇi divyāni saṃhitāni mahātmanām vārayām āsa vidhivad divyair astrair mahāmṛdhe
rāśayaḥ sma vyadṛśyanta tatra tatra raṇājire
prāsphuran nayanaṃ cāsya dakṣiṇo bāhur eva ca vimanāś cābhavad yuddhe dṛṣṭvā pārṣatam agrataḥ
bharanti hi sutān dārāṃs tvadvad ajñānamohitāḥ
yasyārthe śastram ādāya yam apekṣya ca jīvasi idānīṃ tiṣṭha durbuddhe na me jīvan gamiṣyasi
karṇaduryodhanau rājaṃs tvaramāṇaḥ parākramī
utsṛjāmy eva vai prāṇān divaṃ gacchāmi sāṃpratam
pradrute tv atha droṇāya dhṛṣṭadyumne mahārathe

mūrdhānaṃ yasya nirbhidya jyotī rājan mahātmanaḥ jagāma paramaṃ sthānaṃ dehaṃ nyasya rathottame nimīlitākṣaḥ sattvastho nikṣipya hṛdi dhāraṇām om ity ekākṣaraṃ brahma jyotirbhūto mahātapāḥ smaritvā devadeveśam akṣaraṃ paramaṃ prabhum
brahmalokaṃ mahad divyaṃ devaguhyaṃ hi tat param

abhyadravat sa vegena pārṣataḥ khaḍgacarmabhṛt pradrutaṃ tv atha vegena tam ācāryajighāṃsayā prākrośan pāṇḍavāḥ sarve phalgunaś cāpluto rathāt na hantavyo na hantavya iti te sarvato 'bruvan krośatsu pāṇḍaveyeṣu anudhāvati phalgune vikṛtaḥ sarvabhūtasya brahmabhūtaṃ parāmṛśat
vāhayitvā rathaṃ tatra mā droṇaṃ ghātayiṣyasi
rathān nipatitaṃ droṇam ācāryaṃ brāhmaṇaṃ gurum
**** **** catvāras te ca mānuṣāḥ agner iva śikhāṃ dīptām ulkāṃ prajvalitām iva apaśyāma divaṃ stabdhvā mahimānaṃ mahātmanaḥ

ācchinnāḥ paṭṭasaiḥ khaḍgaiḥ prāsaiś ca bharatarṣabha hāhākāreṇa mahatā śastrasaṃtāpatāpitān hatān paryavahad yaudhān sajīvān api cāpare pradhānahatabhūyiṣṭhāḥ kṛtacintāḥ palāyane te ca yaudhā mahārāja nirutsāhās tadābhavan rathino 'śvagajasthāś ca pādātāś ca viśāṃ pate nihatā hatabhūyiṣṭhā mṛtā iva hataprabhāḥ tāvakānāṃ rathaśreṣṭhā udhvastā iva bhasmanā adharmapūrvakaṃ yuddham upaskṛtya parājitāḥ
pāṇḍavās tu mudā yuktāḥ siṃhanādaṃ pracakrire prādravaṃs te sutān dṛṣṭvā sumukhaṃ caiva pārṣatam
udīrṇāṃś ca parān dṛṣṭvā hṛṣyamāṇān punaḥ punaḥ aśrupūrṇekṣaṇās trastā dīnā hy āsan viśāṃ pate
rathānām ayutaṃ gṛhya trisāhasrāṃś ca dantinaḥ vṛṣaseno 'payāt tūrṇaṃ dṛṣṭvā droṇaṃ nipātitam
saṃśaptakabalaṃ gṛhya hataśeṣaṃ kirīṭinā suśarmā prādravad rājan dṛṣṭvā droṇaṃ nipātitam

tato duryodhano rājā aśvatthāmānam abravīt tvarayantaḥ pitṝn anye bhrātṝn anye ca mātulān putrān anye vayasyāṃś ca prādravan kuravas tathā codayantaś ca sainyāni svasrīyāṃś ca tathāpare sambandhinas tathānye ca prādravanta diśo daśa
tasyāsīt sumahad yuddhaṃ śikhaṇḍipramukhair gaṇaiḥ prabhadrakaiś ca pāñcālaiś cedibhiś ca sakekayaiḥ
aplave plavam anvicchan yathāgādhe naro 'mbhasi
vartamāne tathā yuddhe kṣīyamāṇeṣu saṃyuge dhārtarāṣṭreṣu saṃkruddhaḥ pitā te 'stram udairayat
pitā tava susaṃkruddho ripūn abhimukhe sthitaḥ nihanti prabalas tatra vāyur vṛkṣān ivaujasā
jaye hi yatamānānāṃ śrīr dharmaś ca pravartate
sa tvāṃ nihatam ākrandan kṛtvā tvannāmapīḍitaḥ
tataḥ kruddho raṇe drauṇir bhṛśaṃ jajvāla māriṣa yathendhanaṃ mahat prāpya prājvalad dhavyavāhanaḥ talaṃ talena niṣpiṣya dantair dantān upaspṛśan niḥśvasann urago yadval lohitākṣo 'bhavat tadā
śūraś ca kṛtavidyaś ca tejasā jvalanopamaḥ yad abravīt tadā sūta tan mamācakṣva saṃjaya yo veda divyāny astrāṇi sarvaśastrabhṛtāṃ varaḥ
meghastanitanirghoṣā kampate bhayaviklavā
mayi jīvati yat tātaḥ keśagraham avāptavān katham anye kariṣyanti putrebhyaḥ putriṇaḥ spṛhām
śape satyena kauravya iṣṭāpūrtena cānagha ahatvā sarvapāñcālāñ jīveyaṃ na kathaṃ cana
bhaviṣyanti mahārāja maccharair vidiśas tathā
gṛhāṇāstram idaṃ vipra nārāyaṇam anuttamam
tatprasādān mayā prāptaṃ mahāstram idam uttamam
iccheyaṃ yadi dūrasthān nihaniṣyanti me śarāḥ
evam uktvā tato drauṇiḥ śaṅkhaṃ dadhmau sa māriṣa pūrayan pṛthivīṃ sarvāṃ saśailavanakānanām tasya śaṅkhasvanaṃ śrutvā tava sainyāni māriṣa nyavartanta raṇāyaiva bhayaṃ tyaktvā mahārathāḥ
petur ākāśagās tatra vimanaskā viśāṃ pate rodasī ca viyac caiva sarvaṃ jvālāsamāvṛtam
palāyanaparāś cānye yodhāḥ śatasahasraśaḥ avasthitaṃ punar dṛṣṭvā tava putrasya tad balam dharmaputro mahārāja dhanaṃjayam athābravīt
evam etad drutaṃ bhagnaṃ droṇe yudhi nipātite avasthānam avindan vai vikṣataṃ śarapīḍitam
indraviṣṇusamaṃ vīrye kope 'ntakam iva sthitam bṛhaspatisamaṃ buddhyā nītimantaṃ mahāratham
sa eṣa nardati drauṇir gharmānte jalado yathā
sa hi tenaiva naḥ sarvān kṣapayed iti me matiḥ
ciraṃ sthāsyati cākīrtis trailokye sacarācare rāme vālivadhād yadvad evaṃ droṇe nipātite
aho bata mahat pāpaṃ kṛtaṃ karma sudāruṇaṃ yad rājyasukhalobhena droṇo 'yaṃ sādhu ghātitaḥ
vartamāne yathā pāpe ugrakarmaṇi bhārata svadharmam anavasthāpya kim etāni prabhāṣase
aham āvārayiṣyāmi gadayā sarvakauravān tvayā vinā yadi mahīṃ dharmaputrāya dhīmate na dadyāṃ pañcame prāpte divase nāsmi kṣatriyaḥ

kathaṃ vṛddheṣu tiṣṭhatsu dhārmikeṣu mahatsu ca draupadī prāpnuyāt kleśaṃ veśyā yoṣeva bhārata kim u teṣāṃ bilvaphalaṃ mukhe hy āsīn mahātmanām utāho badhirā hy āsan mūkā vāpi dhanaṃjaya andhā vasaṃs tadā te tu yaiś ca noktaṃ hitaṃ vacaḥ atha tatra bhaved dharmo na caivātrāsty anāryakam anurūpaṃ kṛtaṃ cāpi bhīṣmadroṇakṛpādibhiḥ putraiḥ śiṣyaiś ca yat sārdhaṃ saṃnaddhā yoddhum āhave
bahūni kṣāmya śatrūṇāṃ satyadharmaratā vayam tathā tan marṣayitvā tu yathā te utpathasthitāḥ
vāsudeve sthite cāpi droṇaputraṃ praśaṃsasi
mama nāgāyutaṃ pārtha balaṃ bāhvor vidhīyate prapātayeyaṃ ca śaraiḥ sendrān devān samāgatān sarākṣasagaṇān pārtha sāsuroragamānavān
viśeṣāt pitṛhantā me na sa vadhyaḥ kathaṃ mayā yo 'yaṃ pāpaḥ sudurmedhā bāndhavān yudhi jaghnivān tasya viprabruvavadhe kathaṃ pāpaṃ bhaven mama

saṃbandhāvanataṃ pārtha na māṃ tvaṃ bahu manyase svagātrakṛtasopānaṃ niṣaṇṇam iva dantinam kṣamāmi te sarvam eva vāgvyatikramam arjuna draupadyā draupadeyānāṃ kṛte nānyena hetunā kulakramāgataṃ vairaṃ mamācāryeṇa viśrutam tathā jānāty ayaṃ loko na yūyaṃ pāṇḍunandanāḥ

na kṣatriya iti prāhur yo na hanti raṇājire pitaraṃ vā guruṃ vāpi jighāṃsuṃ putraśiṣyayoḥ jihmena vāpy ajihmena hanyād evāvicārayan ity uktaṃ brahmaṇā pūrvaṃ kṣatriyāṇāṃ dviṣadvadhe tasmāc chiṣyeṇa nihataḥ śatrur me brāhmaṇabruvaḥ yaḥ kṣatriyasuto hanyāt pitaraṃ vā guruṃ ca vā aniṣṭaṃ kṣatriyo hanyāt sa vai kṣatriya ucyate
etat kṛtvā mahat pāpaṃ ninditaṃ sarvasādhubhiḥ na lajjase kathaṃ vaktuṃ samitiṃ prāpya śobhanām

tvāṃ ca brahmahaṇaṃ dṛṣṭvā janaḥ sūryam avekṣate brahmahatyā hi te pāpaṃ prāyaścittārtham ātmanaḥ pāñcālaka sudurvṛtta mamaiva gurum agrataḥ guror guruṃ ca bhūyo 'pi kṣipan naiva hi lajjase tiṣṭha tiṣṭha sahasvaikaṃ gadāpātam imaṃ mama tava cāpi sahiṣye 'haṃ gadāpātān anekaśaḥ
varaṃ hi te mṛtaṃ pāpa na ca te vṛttam īdṛśam śrotuṃ vaktavyatāmūlaṃ nīcā vakṣyanti mānavāḥ parān kṣipanti doṣeṇa sveṣu doṣeṣv adṛṣṭayaḥ
adharmeṇa tathā bālaḥ saubhadro vinipātitaḥ
tathāpi bhīmād ātmānam āmucya balinocchritaḥ jagāmānilavegena bhīmam unmucya mādhavaḥ bhīmenāthāśu mahatā vegam āsthāya madhyamam viṣṭabhya vidhṛto darpāt sātyakir daśame pade
tau vṛṣāv iva nardantau balinau bāhuśālinau

bherīś cāvādayan hṛṣṭāḥ paṭahān dundubhīṃś ca ha āḍambarān mṛdaṅgāṃś ca jharjharīś cānakān api maḍḍukān paṇavān vīṇā ḍiṇḍimāṃś ca sahasraśaḥ sarve caiva maheṣvāsā dadhmuḥ śaṅkhān mahāsvanān tato nanāda vasudhā khuranemisamāhatā sa śabdas tumulaḥ khaṃ ca pṛthivīṃ ca vyanādayat kurūṇām atha taṃ śabdaṃ śrutvā ghoraṃ samutthitam pāṇḍavāḥ somakaiḥ sārdhaṃ samapadyanta vismitāḥ te tu dṛṣṭvā kurūn rājan nadato bhairavān ravān abhyavartanta vegena mṛtyuṃ kṛtvā nivartanam

cukṣubhe pṛthivī sarvā diśaś ca pratisasvanuḥ saṃbhrāntāni ca bhūtāni jalajāny api māriṣa te ca sarve tathā yaudhāḥ saṃprahṛṣṭā yuyutsavaḥ vartamāne tathā śabde raudre tasmin bhayānake saṃpatatsu rathaugheṣu tava teṣāṃ ca bhārata
tato 'ntarikṣaṃ khagamair nānāliṅgaiḥ subhairavaiḥ
pāśāś ca vividhākārā nārācāñjalikās tathā saṃpatanta[ḥ] sma dṛśyante śataśo 'tha sahasraśaḥ yathā yugakṣaye ghore paribhūtaṃ jagad bhavet tadvad āsīt tadā rājañ jyotirbhūtaṃ nabhaḥsthalam
rakṣaṇe ca mahān yatnaḥ saindhavasya kṛto yudhi arjunasya vighātārthaṃ pratijñā yena rakṣitā vyūhadvāri vayaṃ caiva dhṛtā yena jigīṣavaḥ vāritaṃ ca mahat sainyaṃ prāviśat tad yathābalam
grahaṇe ca paro yatnaḥ kṛtas tena yathā mama viditaṃ sarvam evaitad bhavatāṃ sarvayodhinām
vanavāsān nivṛttānāṃ samaye ca tathā kṛte snehaś ca darśito nityaṃ pratyakṣaṃ vo mahārathāḥ
sāyudhān yudhyamānān vo hanyād etān api dhruvam

rāmeṇa pṛthivī sarvā niḥkṣatriyagaṇā kṛtā anenāstreṇa bhīmena kṣatram utsāditaṃ purā yat tan nārāyaṇaṃ tejaḥ astratejaḥpramardanam tad astraṃ nirmitaṃ pūrvaṃ viṣṇunā prabhaviṣṇunā yadā nipātito daityo hiraṇyākṣo mahāsuraḥ tadā nārāyaṇāstraṃ hi pūrvasṛṣṭaṃ hi viṣṇunā taṃ nipātya mahādaityaṃ dvāparānte nṛpottama rāmeṇa tapa āsthāya labdhaṃ pūrvaṃ mahātmanā devadevaṃ samārādhya viṣṇuṃ tribhuvaneśvaram tasmād droṇam anuprāptaṃ sarvāstraprativāraṇam tathaitad dhi mahāśastraṃ kena cin na nivāryate nārāyaṇāstrasya nṛpā eṣa yogo nivāraṇe
ye 'ñjaliṃ kurvate vīrā namanti ca vivāhanāḥ
arjunārjuna bībhatso na nyasyaṃ gāṇḍivaṃ tvayā śaśāṅkasyeva te paṅko nairmalyaṃ pātayiṣyati bhīma nārāyaṇāstre me goṣu ca brāhmaṇeṣu ca eteṣu gāṇḍivaṃ nyasyam etad dhi vratam uttamam
samakampanta vitrastāḥ śakṛn mūtraṃ prasusruvuḥ śaṅkhaśabdaṃ mahat kṛtvā bhujaśabdaṃ ca pāṇḍavaḥ tasya śaṅkhasvanaṃ śrutvā bāhuśabdaṃ ca tāvakāḥ samantāt koṣṭhakīkṛtya śaravrātair avākiran

upariṣṭād bhraman yatra yatra yodhān prapaśyati gṛhītaśastrān ārūḍhān vāhaneṣu mahātmasu yatra yatra prayāti sma kramamāṇaṃ raṇājire tatra tatra vimuktās tāḥ sarve 'dṛśyanta saṃghaśaḥ tato 'paśyad raṇe bhīmaṃ gadāhastam ariṃdamam asaṃbhrāntaṃ samāyāntaṃ droṇaputrarathaṃ prati
tad astraṃ vāruṇaṃ bhaktā nārāyaṇasamudbhavam prajajvāla punar bhīmaṃ saṃvṛtya tu raṇājire
tad astraṃ bhīmahuṃkārād apayāti punaḥ punaḥ punaḥ punas tam āyāti huṃkārāt taṃ vimuñcati tato devā sagandharvā bhīmaṃ dṛṣṭvā suvismitāḥ
pātayām āsatuḥ punar bhīmasenaṃ raṇe balāt bhīmaṃ nirāyudhaṃ kṛtvā tadā kṛṣṇadhanaṃjayau
astrasya tu hy eṣa veda mānuṣeṣu na vidyate parāvarajño lokānāṃ na tad asti na vetti yat tad etad astraṃ praśamaṃ yātaṃ kṛṣṇasya mantrite
ghnataitān sumahāvīrya śātravān yuddhakovida
śape ''tmanāhaṃ śaineya satyena tapasā tathā ahatvā sarvapāñcālān yathā śāntim avāpnuyām yad balaṃ pāṇḍaveyānāṃ vṛṣṇīnām api yad balam kriyatāṃ sarvam eveha nihaniṣyāmi somakān
ete hāhākṛtāḥ sarve pragṛhītaśarāsanāḥ vīraṃ drauṇāyaniṃ vīrāḥ sarvataḥ paryavārayan te viṃśatipade yattā guruputram amarṣaṇam
tatas tān ardayan sarvān drauṇir yugapad eva hi
dvābhyāṃ dvābhyāṃ mālavapauravau ca sūtaṃ viddhvā bhīmasenasya ṣaḍbhiḥ
pāñcālās tu tataḥ sarve droṇaputraśarārditāḥ
tān dṛṣṭvā dravataḥ śūrān bībhatsur aparājitaḥ matsyaiś ca somakaiś caiva sahito* *m abhyayāt
pāvakārciḥ parītaṃ tat pārtham evābhipupluve ulkāś ca gaganāt petur diśaś ca na cakāśire tamaś ca sahasā raudraṃ camūm avatatāra tām rakṣāṃsi ca piśācāś ca vinedur abhisaṃgatāḥ
kṛṣṇārjunau hatāv adya droṇaputrasya māyayā iti sma sarve yo[? -rvayo]dhānāṃ matam āsīt tadānagha

hāhākāre tataḥ sainye pāṇḍaveyeṣu bhārata rathasaṃghāś ca dahyanta hayānāṃ prayutāni ca tathā hayānāṃ vṛndāni pattayaś cāpy analpakāḥ guruputrāstravṛrdhyata[?ddhyartha]m ekajvālam abhūd balam vastrair ābharaṇaiś channaiḥ ketubhiś coddhatānalaiḥ dhāvamānaiś ca puruṣair dehabaddhair ivāgnibhiḥ nādahyamānaḥ pāṇḍūnāṃ kaś cit sainye vyadṛśyata udīrṇaṃ droṇaputraṃ ca dṛṣṭvā pārthaḥ paraṃtapaḥ gāṇḍīvaṃ jyāṃ ca bāṇāṃś ca so 'numantrya mahābalaḥ sasarja pra[?rjāpra]timaṃ divyam astraṃ brāhmam atitvaram
tato gāṇḍīvadhanvā ca keśavaś cākṣatāv ubhau

pāṇḍavān muditān dṛṣṭvā sarvān eva svasainikān duryodhanapurogās tu kauravyā vyathitābhavan itthaṃ drauṇimaheṣvāsaṃ pārtham apratimaṃ raṇe yuddhāyodīrṇamanasam apradhṛṣyaṃ surair api āvṛṇvānaṃ diśaḥ sarvā bāṇajālaiḥ samantataḥ dṛṣṭvā gāṇḍīvanirmuktaiḥ śarair āśīviṣopamaiḥ ādityam iva duṣprekṣyaṃ dahantam ahitān raṇe
pṛcchāmi tvām ahaṃ tāta saṃdehaṃ taṃ vadasva me
sarvaghāti mayā muktam astraṃ paramadāruṇam

saṃjaya uvāca tataḥ samāyayau vyāso dṛṣṭvāstraṃ samudīritam taṃ prāptaṃ pūjayitvā tu drauṇiḥ papraccha saṃśayam yan nimittaṃ mahāstreṇa na dagdhau keśavārjunau kenopāyena nirmuktau tan me tvaṃ brūhi tattvataḥ

ādidevo jagannātho lokakartā svayaṃ prabhuḥ ādyaḥ sarvasya lokasya anādinidhano 'cyutaḥ vyākurvate yasya tattvaṃ śrutayo munayaś ca ha ato 'jayyaḥ sarvabhūtair manasāpi jagatpatiḥ tasmād imaṃ jetukāmo ajñānatamasā vṛtaḥ mā śucaḥ puruṣavyāghra viddhi tadvad ihārjunam tasya śaktir asau pārthas tasmāc chokam imaṃ tyaja viśveśvaro 'tha lokādiḥ paramātmā hy adhokṣajaḥ sahasrasaṃmitād aṃśād ekāṃśo 'yam ajāyata devānāṃ hitakāmārthaṃ lokānāṃ caiva sattama
astāvīt samanudhyāyan mahādevaṃ bṛhattaram
**** **** haraṃ śaṃbhuṃ kapardinam
durvāraṇaṃ sudurdharṣaṃ durnirīkṣyaṃ durāsadam atimanyuṃ mahātmānaṃ sarvabhūtapracetasam taṃ devadevaṃ paramāṇum īḍyaṃ saṃkhye divyāviṣudhī ādadānam
ye cānṛtā nāstikāḥ pāpaśīlāḥ
nārāyaṇo devam evaprabhāvam
krīḍamānaṃ mahātmānaṃ bhūtasaṃghagaṇair vṛtam
sa jānubhyāṃ mahīṃ gatvā kṛtvā śirasi cāñjalim
vācaś cārthā devatā lokapālā lokān anye ye purā dhārayanti gatā hi tebhyaḥ paramaṃ tatparaṃ ca tvat saṃbhūtās te ca tebhyaḥ paras tvam
na hastena na pādena na kāṣṭhena na loṣṭunā
**** **** dānavānāṃ vadhāya ca dharmasaṃsthāpanārthāya

devadevas tv acintyātmā ajeyo viṣṇusaṃbhavaḥ yāvaj jīvan vratadharaḥ samadeśacaro bhavet sa eṣa viṣṇurudraś ca śaṃkaro viṣṇusaṃbhavaḥ śarīram ekam etābhyāṃ yogād arthe dvidhākṛtam sarve viṣṇumayā devāḥ sarvaviṣṇumayā gaṇāḥ sarvaṃ vai viṣṇunā vyāptaṃ trailokyaṃ sacarācaram mūrtayas tasya devasya brahmāviṣṇumaheśvarāḥ anantasya mahābāho yac cānyad api kiṃ cana

cintyate yogibhir nityaṃ tad viṣṇoḥ paramaṃ padam yadā yadā hi dharmasya glānir loke pravartate abhyutthānam adharmasya tadātmānaṃ sṛjaty asau matsyaḥ kūrmo varāhaś ca nṛsiṃho vāmano hariḥ sādhyo nārāyaṇo viṣṇuḥ kaśyapasyātmasaṃbhavaḥ rāmo rāmaś ca rāmaś ca vāsudevaś ca yādavaḥ kalkī bhaviṣyate vipro yuge kṣīṇe punar hariḥ ekenaivātmanā viśvaṃ sthāvaraṃ jaṅgamaṃ ca yat tat sarvaṃ viṣṇunā sṛṣṭam anantena mahātmanā tapa eṣa prakurute lokānāṃ hitakāmyayā tapaḥpradhānena kṛto lokaś cāpi pravartate ato nimittaṃ hi haris tapaś carati nityaśaḥ varāṃś ca prārthayaty asmāt pradhānād devasattamāt badarīṃ samupāgamya viṣṇunā viṣṇunā saha tapaś cīrṇaṃ viśālāyām etat te kathitaṃ mayā
muniṃ snigdhāmbudābhāsaṃ vedavyāsam akalmaṣam

śuddhātmānaṃ varaṃ bhīmaṃ vaśinaṃ viśvaretasam śāśvataṃ bhūdharaṃ devaṃ sarvavāgīśvareśvaram jagadyoniṃ jagadbījaṃ jayinaṃ jagato gatim viśvātmānaṃ viśvasṛjaṃ viśvamūrtiṃ yaśasvinam viśveśvaraṃ viśvayoniṃ viśvakarmāṇam īśvaram śaṃbhuṃ svayaṃbhuṃ bhūteśaṃ bhūtabhavyabhavodbhavam yogaṃ yogeśvaraṃ sarvaṃ sarvalokeśvareśvaram sarvaśreṣṭhaṃ jagacchreṣṭhaṃ variṣṭhaṃ parameṣṭhinam lokatrayavidhātāram ekaṃ lokatrayāśrayam sudurjayaṃ jagannāthaṃ janmamṛtyujarātigam jñānātmānaṃ jñānagamyaṃ jñānajñeyaṃ sudurvidam
saṃgrāmeṣu jayaṃ prāpya pālayanti mahīm imām
namo vṛkṣāya senānye madhyamāya namo namaḥ
diśāṃ digdantināṃ caiva dikkālapataye namaḥ
sahasrabāhvor upādāya namo 'saṃkhyeyakarmaṇe
niṣaṅginaṃ paraśuhastaṃ dharmāṇāṃ ca prakāśakam
ugrāyudhāya devāya suvratāya bhavāya ca
mātṝṇāṃ pataye caiva gaṇānāṃ pataye namaḥ
dakṣasya yajamānasya vidhivat saṃbhṛtaṃ purā
sadhūmavisphuliṅgābhaṃ vidyuttoyadasaṃnibham taṃ dṛṣṭvā tu surāḥ sarve praṇipatya maheśvaram
brahmadattavarā hy ete ghorās tripuravāsinaḥ pīḍayanty adhikaṃ lokaṃ yasmāt te varadarpitāḥ tvad ṛte devadeveśa nānyaḥ śaktaḥ kathaṃ cana hantuṃ daityān mahādeva tvaṃ hantā ca suradviṣām
śalyam agniṃ ca vai kṛtvā puṅkhe somam apāṃ patim sa kṛtvā dhanur oṃkāraṃ sāvitrīṃ jyāṃ maheśvaraḥ hayāṃś ca caturo vedān sarvavedamayaṃ ratham prajāpatiṃ rathaśreṣṭhe viniyujya sa sārathim

devyāḥ svayaṃvare vṛttaṃ śṛṇuṣvānyad dhanaṃjaya tato daityā mahābhāga saputrāḥ saparigrahāḥ bhasmībhūtā durātmāno bhinnāś ca tripure purā hatvā daityān mahādevaḥ sarvadevaiḥ sabhājitaḥ ṛṣibhiḥ saṃstutaś caiva parāṃ mudam upāgamat tato brahmā suraiḥ sārdhaṃ bṛhaspatipurogamaiḥ stutim ārebhire kartuṃ bhinne tripuramandire
asūyataś ca śakrasya vajreṇa prahariṣyataḥ

athānyena svarūpeṇa brahmā dṛṣṭvā tam avyayam tataḥ saṃstambhitabhujaḥ śakro devagaṇair vṛtaḥ jagāma śaraṇaṃ tūrṇaṃ brahmāṇaṃ prabhum avyayam te taṃ praṇamya śirasā procuḥ prāñjalayas tadā kim apy aṅkagataṃ brahman pārvatyā bhūtam adbhutam bālarūpadharaṃ dṛṣṭvā nāsmābhis tac ca lakṣitam tasmāt tvāṃ praṣṭum icchāmo nirjitā yena vai vayam ayudhyatā hi bālena līlayā sapuraṃdarāḥ teṣāṃ tad vacanaṃ śrutvā brahmā brahmavidāṃ varaḥ dhyātvā sa śaṃbhuṃ bhagavān bālaṃ cāmitatejasam uvāca bhagavān brahmā śakrādīṃś ca surottamān carācarasya jagataḥ prabhuḥ sa bhagavān haraḥ tasmāt parataraṃ nānyat kiṃ cid asti maheśvarāt yo dṛṣṭo hy umayā sārdhaṃ yuṣmābhir amitadyutiḥ sa pārvatyāḥ kṛte devaḥ kṛtavān bālarūpatām te mayā sahitā yūyaṃ prapadyadhvaṃ tam eva hi

brahmovāca tvaṃ yajño bhuvanasyāsya tvaṃ gatis tvaṃ parāyaṇam tvaṃ bhavas tvaṃ mahādevas tvaṃ dhāma paramaṃ padam tvayā sarvam idaṃ vyāptaṃ jagat sthāvarajaṅgamam bhagavan bhūtabhavyeśa lokanātha jagatpate vyāsa uvāca padmayoner vacaḥ śrutvā tataḥ prīto maheśvaraḥ prasādābhimukho bhūtvā cāṭṭahāsam athākarot

dve tanū tasya devasya vedajñā brāhmaṇā viduḥ ghorā cānyā śivā cānyā te tanū bahudhā punaḥ ghorā tu yā tanus tasya so 'gnir vidyut sa bhāskaraḥ somārdhaṃ punar evāsya āpo jyotīṃṣi candramāḥ vedāṅgāḥ sopaniṣadaḥ purāṇādhyātmaniścayāḥ yad atra paramaṃ guhyaṃ sa vai devo maheśvaraḥ
api varṣasahasreṇa satataṃ pāṇḍunandana
vaḍavāmukheti vikhyātaṃ pibat toyamayaṃ haviḥ
urdhvaliṅgas tataś cokto bhagavān brāhmaṇaiḥ sadā

sūryācandramasor loke prakāśanty aṃśavaś ca ye te keśāḥ saṃjñitās tasya vyomakeśas tataḥ smṛtaḥ kapiḥ śreṣṭha iti prokto dharmaś ca vṛṣa ucyate sa devadevo bhagavān kīrtyate vai vṛṣākapiḥ brahmāṇam indraṃ varuṇaṃ yamaṃ dhanadam eva ca nigṛhya harate yasmāt tasmād dhara iti smṛtaḥ nimīlitābhyāṃ netrābhyāṃ bālyād devyā maheśvaraḥ lalāṭe netram asṛjat tena tryakṣaḥ sa ucyate bhūtaṃ bhavyaṃ bhaviṣyac ca sarvaṃ sarvam aśeṣataḥ bhava eṣa tato yasmād bhūtabhavyabhavodbhavaḥ
kṛṣṇena darśite svapne yas te śailendramūrdhani
aśvamedhasahasrasya rājasūyaśatasya ca iṣṭasya phalam āpnoti durācāro 'pi mānavaḥ gavāṃ koṭiśatasyāpi dānasya phalam aśnute
yaḥ śṛṇoti naro bhaktyā yaś cāpi parikīrtayet divā vā yadi vā rātrau brahmahatyāṃ vyapohati
saṃjaya uvāca etad ākhyāya vai sūto rājñaḥ sarvaṃ tu saṃjayaḥ prayātaḥ śibirāyaiva draṣṭuṃ karṇasya vaiśasam śeṣau varṇau kāmam iṣṭaṃ labhete putrān pautrān nityam iṣṭāṃs tathaiva
nārāyaṇaṃ namaskṛtya naraṃ caiva narottamam devīṃ sarasvatīṃ caiva tato jayam udīrayet
śuklāmbaradharaṃ viṣṇuṃ śaśivarṇaṃ caturbhujam prasannavadanaṃ dhyāyet sarvavighnopaśāntaye
yayor loke pumān astre na samo 'sti caturvidhe tau droṇabhīṣmau śrutvā tu hatau me vyathitaṃ manaḥ
paśyantu pāṇḍuputrās te viṣṇuvāsavayor iva
pāṇḍuputrān raṇe hantuṃ sasainyān kim u saṃhatāḥ
**** **** cakre senāpatiṃ tadā tava putro mahāvīryo bhrātṛbhiḥ sahito 'nagha senāpatyam athāsādya

śibirād dhastinapuraṃ prāpya bhārata saṃjayaḥ praviveśa mahāprājño dhṛtarāṣṭraniveśanam śokenopahataḥ sūto vihvalo bhṛśaduḥkhitaḥ cintayan nidhanaṃ ghoraṃ sūtaputrasya pāṇḍavaiḥ antaḥpuraṃ praviśyaiva saṃjayo rājasattama aśrukaṇṭho bhṛśaṃ trasto rājānam upajagmivān upasthāya ca rājānaṃ viniḥśvasya ca sūtajaḥ nātihṛṣṭamanā rājann idaṃ vacanam abravīt saṃjayo 'haṃ mahārāja namas te bharatarṣabha hato vaikartanaḥ karṇaḥ kṛtvā karma suduṣkaram cedikāśikarūśānāṃ matsyānāṃ somakaiḥ saha kṛtvāsau kadanaṃ śete vātanunna iva drumaḥ goṣṭhamadhye ṛṣabha iva govrajaiḥ parivāritaḥ vyālena nihato yadvat tathāsau nihataḥ paraiḥ nirāśān pāṇḍavān kṛtvā jaye rājan sasātyakān pāñcālānāṃ rathāṃś caiva vinihatya sahasraśaḥ hatvā śūrān maheṣvāsān vidrāvya ca diśo daśa hato vaikartanaḥ karṇaḥ pāṇḍavena kirīṭinā vairasya gatam ānṛṇyaṃ durgamasya durātmabhiḥ hatvā karṇaṃ mahārāja viśalyaḥ pāṇḍavo 'bhavat śoṣaṇaṃ sāgarāṇāṃ vā pātanaṃ śaśisūryayoḥ pṛthivyā dāraṇaṃ yādṛk tādṛk karṇasya pātanam yodhāś ca bahavo rājan hatās tatra jayaiṣiṇaḥ rājāno rājaputrāś ca śūrāḥ parighabāhavaḥ rathaughāś ca naraughāś ca hatā rājan sahasraśaḥ vāraṇā nihatās tatra vājinaś ca mahāhave kṣatriyāś ca mahārāja senayor ubhayor hatāḥ parasparam avekṣyātra parasparakṛtāgasaḥ kiṃciccheṣān parān kṛtvā tīrtvā pāṇḍavavāhinīm pārthavelāṃ samāsādya hato vaikartano vṛṣā jayāśā dhārtarāṣṭrāṇāṃ vairasya ca mukhaṃ nṛpa tīrṇaṃ tat pāṇḍavai rājan yat purā nāvabudhyase procyamānaṃ mahārāja bandhubhir hitabuddhibhiḥ tad idaṃ samanuprāptaṃ vyasanaṃ tvāṃ mahābhayam putrāṇāṃ rājyakāmena tvayā rājan hitaiṣiṇā caritāny ahitāny eva teṣāṃ te phalam āgatam hato duḥśāsano rājan yathoktaṃ pāṇḍavena tu pratijñā bhīmasenena nistīrṇā sā camūmukhe pītaṃ ca kṣatajaṃ tasya dhārtarāṣṭrasya sayuge pāṇḍavena mahārāja kṛtvā karma suduṣkaram
netrāṇi vāriṇāpūrya saritaḥ sāgaraṃ yathā
brūyā nirāśaḥ satataṃ putrāṇāṃ śivakāmukaḥ

etac chrutvā mahārāja dhṛtarāṣṭro 'mbikāsutaḥ dahyamāno 'bravīt sūtaṃ muhūrtaṃ tiṣṭha saṃjaya vyākulaṃ me manas tāta mā tāvat kiṃ cid ucyatām rājāpi nābravīt kiṃ cit saṃjayo viduras tathā tūṣṇīṃ bhūtas tathā so 'tha babhūva jagatīpatiḥ

janamejayaḥ śrutvā karṇaṃ hataṃ yuddhe putrāṃś caiva palāyinaḥ dhṛtarāṣṭro nṛpaśreṣṭho dvijaśreṣṭha kim abravīt prāptavān paramaṃ duḥkhaṃ putravyasanajaṃ mahat kāle yad uktavāṃs tasmiṃs tan mamācakṣva tattvataḥ
etan me sarvam ācakṣva kuśalo hy asi saṃjaya
asicarmadharaḥ śūraḥ pareṣāṃ bhayavardhanaḥ agnicakravad āghūrṇan somadatto nipātitaḥ
ubhau kaliṅgavṛṣabhau bhrātarau yuddhadurmadau kṛtvā nasukaraṃ karma gatau vaivasvatakṣayam
te 'pāvṛttakavīrāś ca nihatāḥ savyasācinā
vikrāntā balavantaś ca bhrātaraḥ saha bhārata
ripūṇāṃ kadanaṃ kṛtvā gatā vaivasvatakṣayam
nihatāḥ samare śūrāḥ parasparasamāgame
yathā skandena mahiṣo yathā rudreṇa cāndhakaḥ
na kṛtaṃ ca tvayā pūrvaṃ daivena vidhinā balāt
nārāyaṇā ballavāś ca rāmāś ca śataśo 'pare anuraktāś ca vijaye bhīṣmeṇa nihatā raṇe
pāñcālāś ca maheṣvāsāḥ prāyo rājann amarṣitāḥ droṇena saha saṃgamya gatā vaivasvatakṣayam
paṭaccaranihantā ca mahatyā senayā vṛtaḥ ambaṣṭhasahitaḥ śrīmān mitrahetoḥ parākramī āsādya lakṣmaṇaṃ vīraṃ duryodhanasutaṃ raṇe sumahat kadanaṃ kṛtvā gato vaivasvatakṣayam
sāmudraś citrasenaś ca saha putreṇa bhārata samudrasenena balād gamito yamasādanam anūpavāsī nīlaś ca vyāghradattaś ca vīryavān aśvatthāmnā mahārāja gamito yamasādanam
lakṣmaṇena hatau rājaṃs tava pautreṇa māriṣa bṛhatkṣatro maheṣvāsaḥ kṣatradevaś ca pārthivaḥ
senābindur nṛpaśreṣṭhaḥ śātravān pratapan yudhi
senābinduḥ kuruśreṣṭhaḥ kṛtvā kadanam āhave
virāṭaputraḥ śaṅkhaś ca uttaraś ca mahārathaḥ kurvantau sumahat karma gatau vaivasvatakṣayam
matsyād avarajaḥ śrīmāñ śatānīko nipātitaḥ
māgadhaḥ paramāstrajño gamito yamasādanam
pāṇḍyarājaś ca vikrānto balavān bāhuśālinā aśvatthāmnā hatas tatra gamito vai yamakṣayam
mahābalaḥ kekayarājaputraḥ sadaśvayuktaṃ ca patākinaṃ ca rathāgryam āruhya kurupravīra vyavasthito yoddhukāmas tvadarthe
gāndhārarājaḥ sasutaś ca rājan durdyūtadevī kalahapriyaś ca gāndhāramukhyair yavanaiś ca rājan vyavasthito yoddhukāmas tvadarthe
**** **** ugrāyudhaḥ kṣaṇabhojī sudarśaḥ jārāsaṃdhiḥ prathamaś cādṛḍhaś ca
mano muhyati cāṅgāni na ca śaknomi dhāritum ity evam uktvā vacanaṃ dhṛtarāṣṭro 'mbikāsutaḥ
uvāca ca punar vākyaṃ saṃśayaṃ bhṛśavihvalaḥ

divyāstravin mahātejāḥ karṇo vaikartano vṛṣaḥ duryodhanasya vṛddhyarthaṃ vartate yo jayāya ca senāgopaś ca sa kathaṃ śatrubhiḥ paramāstravit ghātitaḥ pāṇḍavaiḥ śūraiḥ samarthair vīryaśālibhiḥ vṛṣo mahendro deveṣu vṛṣaḥ karṇo nareṣv api tṛtīyam anyaṃ lokeṣu vṛṣaṃ naivānuśuśrumaḥ
yojitaḥ pārthivaiḥ śūraiḥ samarthair vīryaśālibhiḥ duryodhanasya vṛddhyarthaṃ kṛtsnām urvīm athājayat
śokārṇave nimagno 'smi samudre bhinnanaur iva nṛvṛṣaṃ nihataṃ śrutvā dvairathe rathināṃ varam
cintayann eva sīdāmi mano me 'tīva muhyati
vaiśaṃpāyana uvāca yo 'jayat savarkāmbojān ambaṣṭhān kekayaiḥ saha gāndhārāṃś ca videhāṃś ca jitvā kāryārtham āhave
dharmarājavacaḥ śrutvā aśvatthāmā hatas tv iti
etān hatvā haniṣyāmi paścād vaikartanaṃ raṇe iti vyapadiśan pārtho varjayan sūtajaṃ raṇe sa kathaṃ nihato vīraḥ pārthena paramāhave

na santi patayaḥ kṛṣṇe sarve ṣaṇḍhatilaiḥ samāḥ upatiṣṭhasva bhartāram anyaṃ vā varavarṇini ity evaṃ yaḥ purā vāco rūkṣāḥ saṃśrāvayan ruṣā sabhāyāṃ sūtajaḥ kṛṣṇāṃ sa kathaṃ nihataḥ paraiḥ yadi bhīṣmo raṇaślāghī droṇo vā yudhi durmadaḥ na haniṣyati kaunteyān pakṣapātāt suyodhana sarvān eva haniṣyāmi vyetu te mānaso jvaraḥ kiṃ kariṣyati gāṇḍīvam akṣayyau ca maheṣudhī snigdhacandanadigdhasya maccharasyābhidhāvataḥ sa nūnam ṛṣabhaskandho hy arjunena kathaṃ hataḥ
**** **** kiṃ cid duryodhano 'bravīt viṣame śokaduḥkhābhyāṃ
svayaṃ vairaṃ mahat kṛtvā vāryamāṇaḥ suhṛdgaṇaiḥ pradhānahatabhūyiṣṭhe kiṃ svid duryodhano 'bravīt
dṛṣṭvā vinihataṃ sarve yodhā vāraṇadurjayāḥ
niveśya ca balaṃ ghoraṃ kṣutpipāsābhayair yutam śrameṇa mahatā yuktaṃ tathā droṇavadhena ca dīnarūpā raṇe kṛtvā karma ghorāṃ ca śarvarīm niveśaṃ prāpya sā senā viśramya muditābhavat
upaviṣṭeṣu teṣv evaṃ rājaputreṣu bhārata
āśāṃ bahumatīṃ cakre karṇaṃ prati sa vai tadā hate bhīṣme ca droṇe ca karṇo jeṣyati pāṇḍavān tām āśāṃ hṛdaye kṛtvā samāśvasya ca bhārata
saṃjaya uvāca evam uktas tu rādheyo rājñā duryodhanena ha rājñāṃ madhye mahābāhuḥ prītātmā sa mahābalaḥ harṣayann abravīt karṇo duryodhanam idaṃ vacaḥ sūtaputra na te pārthaḥ sthitvāgre saṃyuyutsati
samaṃ jvaradro[jaraddro]ṇam ahaṃ mahāhave bravīmi sarve kuravo nibodhata na vā mad anyaḥ prahased raṇe 'rjunaṃ kramāgataṃ mṛtyum ivottamāmṛtāt

sa vyarocata rādheyaḥ sūtamāgadhabandibhiḥ stūyamāno yathā bhānur udaye brahmavādibhiḥ tataḥ puṇyāhaghoṣeṇa vāditraninadena ca jayaśabdena śūrāṇāṃ tumulaḥ sarvato 'bhavat jayety ūcur nṛpāḥ sarve rādheyaṃ tatra saṃgatāḥ

saṃjaya uvāca sa satkṛtaḥ stūyamānaḥ suhṛdgaṇavṛto vṛṣā karṇo duryodhanaṃ vākyam abravīt prahasan priyam duryodhanādya sagaṇaṃ pāṇḍūnāṃ pravaraiḥ saha phalgunaṃ sūdayiṣyāmi tvatpriyārthaṃ sabāndhavam saparvatārṇavadvīpāṃ śādhi gāṃ gatapāṇḍavām putrapautraprapautreṣu pratiṣṭhāṃ gamayiṣyasi nāsahyaṃ vidyate mahyaṃ tvatpriyārtham ariṃdama satyadharmānuraktasya siddhir ātmavato yathā
hitaś ca priyakāmaś ca mama putrasya nityaśaḥ
makaravyūham āsthāya daṃśito ravinandanaḥ
tathāśvanaranāgānām anyonyaṃ saṃkulaṃ babhau
sa papāta mahānago bhīmasenasya bhārata
uddhṛtya khaḍgaṃ niśitam abhyadhāvat sa pāṇḍavam
sātvatasya dhanus tatra ubhau cicchidatū raṇe
anumṛjya ca rājendra tad dhanur bhārasādhanam
tāv anyonyasya samare dhanuś chittvā mahārathau hatvā ca sārathī tūrṇaṃ hayāṃś ca rathināṃ varau virathāv asiyuddhāya samājagmatur āhave
anyonyasya vadhe caiva cakratur yatnam uttamam
so 'tividdho mahārāja nārācena mahātmanā mūrchām abhiyayau vīraḥ kaśmalaṃ cāviveśa ha
navatyā jagatīpālaṃ chādayan nataparvabhiḥ
te vadhyamānāḥ samare tava pautreṇa dhanvinā vyadravanta diśas tūrṇaṃ dāvadagdhā iva dvipāḥ tāṃs tu vidravato dṛṣṭvā nirutsāhān dviṣajjaye
atha tatraiva saṃgrāme vartamāne sudāruṇe
aho śauryeṇa saṃpannāv ubhau brāhmaṇapāṇḍavau
aśvatthāmnas tu yad yuddham arjunasya ca saṃjaya
ātithyakarmābhyutthāya dīyatāṃ yadi manyase
evam uktvāsya ciccheda bhallaiḥ saṃnataparvabhiḥ dhanuś citraṃ patākāṃ ca rathaṃ śaktiṃ gadāṃ śubhām
te śarāḥ sūryasaṃkāśāḥ patantaḥ sarvatodiśam
sthitāḥ saṃśaptakā rājan dṛṣṭvā yuddhaṃ mahātmanoḥ
sa tair hṛto vātajavais turaṃgair drauṇir dṛḍhaṃ pārthaśarābhibhūtaḥ gāṇḍīvamuktaiḥ kupito vikarṇair drauṇiṃ śaraiḥ saṃyati nirbibheda
niyamya tu hayān drauṇiḥ samāśvasya ca māriṣa rathāśvanarasaṃbādhaṃ karṇasya prāviśad balam
sa nāgayantṝn samare mahārathān sapattisaṃghāṃs turagān sasādinaḥ dvipāṃś ca bāṇair nijaghāna vīryavān samantato ghnann iva kālacakravat
taṃ pravīrās tvadīyānāṃ nardamānābhidudruvuḥ
vidhvastāyudhatūṇīrān vicakrarathaketanān
ete balādhikāḥ prāptāḥ pārtha kiṃ krīḍase 'nagha
tatas te haṃsasadṛśās turagā vātaraṃhasaḥ tāṃ senāṃ viviśur hṛṣṭā haṃsā iva mahat saraḥ
daṇḍān kanakacitrāṃś ca saṃvṛttā raṇabhūmayaḥ
parighān bhiṇḍipālāṃś ca bhuśuṇḍīḥ kuṇapān api
anukarṣān upāsaṅgān patākā vividhān dhvajān
aśvānāṃ ca yugāpīḍān ratnacitrān uraśchadān
tāṃ yuddhabhūmiṃ pārthasya darśayitvā ca mādhavaḥ arjunaś cāpi nṛpater darśanārthaṃ mahāraṇe
yo hy ākṣipati vīryeṇa sarvān etān mahārathān na mene cātmanā tulyaṃ kaṃ cid eva nareśvaram
prekṣya cāśu rathe yuktān narair anyān hayottamān

etasminn antare karṇo gajānīkam upādravat drāvayām āsa sa tadā pāṇḍavānāṃ mahad balam virathān rathinaś cakre gajān aśvāṃś ca bhārata gajān bahubhir ānarchac charaiḥ saṃnataparvabhiḥ atha drauṇir maheṣvāsaḥ pāṇḍyaṃ śatrunibarhaṇam virathaṃ rathināṃ śreṣṭhaṃ nāhanad yuddhakāṅkṣayā
tam ādravad drauṇiśarāhatas tvarañ javena kṛtvā pratihastigarjitam taṃ vāraṇaṃ vāraṇayuddhakovido dvipottamaṃ parvatasānusaṃnibham

sa tu dvipaḥ pañcabhir uttameṣubhiḥ kṛtaḥ ṣaḍaṃśaś caturo nṛpas tribhiḥ kṛto daśāṃśaḥ kuśalena yudhyatā yathā havis tad daśadaivataṃ tathā sa pādaśo rākṣasabhojanān bahūn pradāya pāṇḍyo 'śvamanuṣyakuñjarān svadhām ivāpya jvalanaḥ pitṛpriyas tataḥ praśāntaḥ salilapravāhataḥ
tataḥ punaḥ samājagmur abhītāḥ kurupāṇḍavāḥ bhīmasenamukhāḥ pārthāḥ sūtaputramukhā vayam
hastinaḥ sumahāmātrān sāśvārohān hayān api rathino 'py ekabāṇena bhramataś cāvapātayat
vadhyatāṃ dāruṇaḥ śabdaḥ patatāṃ stanatām api narāśvebharathānāṃ hi narāśvebharathais tadā
tathā hatā rathāḥ petur aśvārohaiḥ sahasraśaḥ
tathaiva mukhavarṇaś ca keṣāṃ cit tatra dṛśyate madād iva prasuptānāṃ vikṣiptābharaṇasrajām
vīranṛtyaṃ pranṛtyantaḥ śūratālapracoditaiḥ
samantāt siṣicur vīrā meghās toyair ivācalān
tatas taṃ niśitaṃ khaḍgam āvidhya yudhi satvaraḥ dhanuś cānyat samādāya śaraṃ jagrāha vīryavān
**** **** preṣayām āsa saṃyuge tān bāṇāṃs tava putro 'pi chittvaikaikaṃ tribhiḥ śaraiḥ nanāda sumahānādaṃ dārayāṇo vasuṃdharām tato duḥśāsano rājan viddhvā pāṇḍusutaṃ raṇe sārathiṃ navabhir bāṇair
nādas tu sumahān āsīn nādayan vai vasuṃdharām
tathaiva sūtaputreṇa preṣitāḥ paramāhave pāṇḍuputram avacchādya vyatiṣṭhantāmbare śarāḥ
vātāyamānān sahasā prapaśyāma hayottamān
vihayān sahayāṃś cāpi veṣṭamānāṃs tatas tataḥ
rathāṃs tu tatra vicchinnāṃs tilaśaḥ karṇavikramaiḥ
śirobhir bāhubhiś chinnaiś citrair ūrubhir eva ca
yantuś ciccheda samare śiraḥ krodhasamanvitaḥ tārārūpaṃ yathā citraṃ nipapāta mahītale
bhrāntam udbhrāntam āviddham āplutaṃ viplutaṃ sṛtam saṃpātaṃ samudīryaṃ ca darśayām āsa saṃyuge
so 'nyat kārmukam ādāya sudṛḍhaṃ vegavattaram
vicerus tatra samare gautamād bhayaśaṃsakāḥ
vavāma rudhiraṃ gātraiḥ kumbhavaktrād ivodakam rudhireṇa pariklinnaḥ kṛtavarmā tv arājata varṣeṇa kledito rājan yathā gairikaparvataḥ

poplūyamānau hi yathā mahāntau śoṇitahrade tadvad virejatur vīrau śoṇitena pariplutau yathā ca kiṃśukau phullau puṣyamāse 'bhyupāgatau rudhirokṣitasarvāṅgau raktacandanarūṣitau bhujagāv iva saṃkruddhau rejatus tau narottamau tāv ubhau śaranunnāṅgau parasparaśarakṣatau
suśarmā ca sudharmā ca suvarmā caiva bhārata
suvarmāṇaṃ śatenājau suśarmāṇaṃ ca paṃcabhiḥ bhūyaś caiva suśarmāṇaṃ suvarmāṇaṃ tathāṣṭabhiḥ
atha divyāstravic chūro jātamanyur dhanaṃjayaḥ krodham āhārayat tīvraṃ kṛṣṇaṃ cedam uvāca ha prāpayāśvān mahābāho satyasenaṃ prati prabho
arjunena mahārāja tatra tatra mahāraṇe
āsāditas tato rājan rathacakraṃ viśāṃ pate
**** **** pratyagṛhṇād abhītavat tvarayā parayā yukto
te śūrāḥ samare sarve citraṃ laghu ca suṣṭhu ca
hayārohāś ca bahavaḥ parivārya gajottamān talaśabdaravāṃś cakruḥ saṃpatantas tatas tataḥ dhāvamānāṃs tatas tāṃs tu dravamāṇān mahāgajān pārśvataḥ pṛṣṭhataś caiva nijaghnur hayasādinaḥ

tāṃs tu tatra prasaktān vai parivārya padātayaḥ hastyārohān nijaghnus te mahāvegā balotkaṭāḥ apare hastibhir hastaiḥ khaṃ vikṣiptā mahāmṛdhe nipatanto viṣāṇāgrair bhṛśaṃ viddhāḥ suśikṣitaiḥ apare sahasā gṛhya viṣāṇair eva sūditāḥ senāntaraṃ samāsādya ke cit tatra mahāgajaiḥ kṣuṇṇagātrā mahārāja vikṣipya ca punaḥ punaḥ apare vyajanānīva vibhrāmya nihatā mṛdhe puraḥsarāś ca nāgānām apareṣāṃ viśāṃ pate śarīrāṇy atividdhāni tatra tatra raṇājire
nāgāś ca śataśo rājan nirbhinnā bhūmim āviśan
tathā sāvaraṇān kāṃś cit tatra tatra viśāṃ pate
patataś cāparo rājan vijahārāsinā śiraḥ
śūrāṇāṃ harṣajananī bhīrūṇāṃ bhayavardhinī
sarvasainyam udīkṣyaiva krodhād udvṛttalocanaḥ dṛṣṭvā dharmasutaṃ cāpi sainyamadhye vyavasthitam śriyā jvalantaṃ kaunteyaṃ yathā vajradharaṃ yudhi
yudhiṣṭhirasya cikṣepa śarān kanakabhūṣaṇān rukmapuṅkhān prasannāgrān saviṣān iva pannagān
antaraṃ nāgamat tatra rājā naiva suyodhanaḥ
bhīmas tam āha ca tataḥ pratijñām anucintayan nāyaṃ vadhyas tava nṛpa ity uktaḥ sa nyavartata
duryodhanaṃ samādāya palāyanaparo 'bhavat
hastena hastipatihastasamānahastas tūṇīmukhād atha śarān muhur ādadānaḥ vajrīva dānavacamūṃ pragṛhītacāpo bhīmānujas tava narendra camūṃ jagāhe
karṇasya sphurad atyarthaṃ prāsyataḥ sāyakān dhanuḥ nanāda trāsajananaṃ bhūtānām ahitāntakam
raṇe pravṛttāny ahani kathayantaḥ sukhaṃ tathā
nivātakavacānāṃ ca tisraḥ koṭīr jaghāna ha
te 'nujñātā nṛpāḥ sarve svāni veśmāni bhejire
sarveṣāṃ caiva sainyānāṃ karṇam evāgaman manaḥ
karṇaṃ cāpratimaṃ yuddhe devair api durutsaham manyate 'bhyadhikaṃ pārthād daivaṃ cāsya hṛdi sthitam
rājan pūrvanimittāni dharmiṣṭhāni vicintaya
prāṇe śaurye ca vijñāne vikrame cāpi bhārata nimittajñānayoge ca savyasācī na matsamaḥ
sārathis tasya govindo mama tādṛṅ na vidyate
vijayeyam ahaṃ saṃkhye phalgunaṃ kurunandana bhave yudhi jayeyaṃ ca phālgunaṃ kurusattama
kriyatām eṣa kāmo me mā vaḥ kālo 'tyagād ayam
na hi me samare śaktāḥ samudyātuṃ surāsurāḥ kim u pāṇḍusutā rājan raṇe mānuṣayonayaḥ evam uktas tava sutaḥ karṇenāhavaśobhinā saṃpūjya saṃprahṛṣṭātmā tato rādheyam abravīt
evam ukto mahārāja tava putraḥ pratāpavān madreśvaraṃ prati raṇe parasainyabhayaṃkaram sarvaṃ tathākarot tūrṇaṃ rādheyas tad yad abravīt madrarājaṃ ca samare praṇamya ca mahāratham
tvaṃ pāhi sarvataḥ karṇaṃ bhavaṃ brahmeva suvrata madreśvara prayāce 'haṃ śirasā vinayena ca
tvayi yantari rādheyo vidviṣo me vijeṣyate abhīṣūṇāṃ hi karṇasya grahītānyo na vidyate
ṛte hi tvāṃ mahābhāga vāsudevasamaṃ yudhi
yathā ca sarvathāpatsu vārṣṇeyaḥ pāti pāṇḍavam tathā madreśvarādya tvaṃ rādheyaṃ pratipālaya
śalya karṇo 'rjunenādya yoddhum icchati saṃyuge
tathā karṇarathe rājaṃs tvam abhīṣugraho bhava
idānīṃ vikramo hy asya kṛṣṇena sahitasya ca kṛṣṇena sahitaḥ pārtho dhārtarāṣṭrīṃ mahācamūm
udyantau ca yathā sūryau bālasūryasamaprabhau karṇaśalyau raṇe dṛṣṭvā vidravantu mahārathāḥ
saṃyogo yuvayor loke nābhūn na ca bhaviṣyati
sārathyaṃ kriyatāṃ tasya yudhyamānasya saṃyuge yathā ca samare kṛṣṇo rakṣate sarvato 'rjunam tathā tvam api rādheyaṃ rakṣasva ca mahāraṇe
dhārtarāṣṭram athovāca sṛkkiṇī parilelihan evam uktas tu sa krodhāt padā spṛṣṭa ivoragaḥ

ayaṃ cāpy avamāno me na kartavyaḥ kathaṃ cana sakarṇā ye trayo lokāḥ sārjunāḥ sajanārdanāḥ nibaddhāṃs tān raṇe rājan na mucyeyaṃ kathaṃ cana tathāpi śaktaṃ kauravya vihāya hṛdayena mām na cāhaṃ prākṛtaḥ kaś cin na cāpy adhigataḥ svayam
prajānāṃ rakṣaṇaṃ dānaṃ yuddhaṃ kṣatrasya nirmitam
na cāhaṃ sūtaputrasya sārathyam upajagmivān
jñātam eva hi pūrvaṃ te vartma rājarṣisattama
saiṃhikeyās tadodvṛttā vibudhān avasūdayan te nirastāḥ kṛtā devair dānavā balagarvitāḥ
kaś cit prajāpatir ghoras tena sārdhaṃ mahātmanā yuddham āsīn mahāghoraṃ daivatair na iti śrutiḥ parābabhūvur asurā dānavaiḥ saha saṃyuge devair nirastā hy asurā niḥśvasyāmarṣitās tataḥ

vayam icchāma nagaraṃ kartuṃ kāmagamaṃ śubham sarvakāmasamṛddhārtham avadhyaṃ devadānavaiḥ yakṣarakṣoragagaṇair nānājātibhir eva ca na kṛtyābhir na śastraiś ca na śāpair brahmavādinām vadhyeta tripuraṃ devaṃ prasanne tvayi sādaram
brahmovāca vilayaḥ samayasyānte maraṇaṃ jīvitasya ca iti cintya vadhopāyaṃ kaṃ cid eva niśāmaya
teṣāṃ tad vacanaṃ śrutvā dānavānāṃ mahāyaśāḥ
divyamālyāmbaradharā daiteyā rājasattama
māṃsāśanāḥ sudṛptāś ca surair vinikṛtās tathā
pūrṇāṃ divyasya toyasya pīyūṣapratimasya vai
saṃpūrṇabalavīryas tu rājañ śauryasamanvitaḥ evaṃ vīryeṇa saṃyuktāḥ kṛtās tena mahātmanā
ekasmin nihate daitye sṛjanti sma daśāsurān vidhāya sarvalokānāṃ hitaṃ pathyaṃ vidhāya ca tataḥ paramanirvigno hitakārī tāvakātmasu
śrūyatāṃ tridaśāḥ sarve yathedaṃ vākyagauravam
ekeṣuṇā vibhedyāni tāni durgāṇi nānyathā na ca sthāṇumṛte śakto bhettum ekeṣuṇā puraḥ
te devās tena vākyena coditāḥ praṇatāḥ sthitāḥ divyaṃ varṣasahasraṃ vai tapas taptvā surarṣabhāḥ śubhātmāno mahātmāno jagmur vai vṛṣabhadhvajam
devadevaṃ paraṃ sthāṇuṃ varadaṃ tryambakaṃ śivam śarvam īḍyam ajaṃ rudraṃ śaśāṅkāṅkitamūrdhajam
pareṇa yatnena bhavaṃ tridaśāḥ śarvam īśvaram
arhāya caiva śuddhāya kṣayāya krathanāya ca
devāḥ śarvasya vacanaṃ śrutvā harṣam upāgatāḥ
imāny asuradurgāṇi lokāṃs trīn ākramanti ca kaś ca prajāpatir ghorāṃs tān sarvāñ jahi māciram
nāsty anyo yudhi teṣāṃ vai nihantā iti naḥ śrutam
tvatprasāj jagat sarvaṃ sukham aidhata mānada śaraṇyas tvaṃ hi lokeśa te vayaṃ śaraṇaṃ gatāḥ
śrībhagavān uvāca yadi śaktir na vaḥ kā cid vibhartuṃ māmakaṃ balam aham etān haniṣyāmi yuṣmat tejordhabṛṃhitaḥ
viṣṇuṃ somaṃ hutāśaṃ ca tasyeṣuṃ samakalpayan śṛṅgam agnir babhūvāsya bhallaḥ somo viśāṃ pate kuḍmalaś cābhavad viṣṇus tasminn iṣuvare tadā

īṣā nakṣatravaṃśaś ca yugaḥ kṛtayugo 'bhavat kūbaraś ca rathasyāsīd vāsukir bhujagottamaḥ apaskaram adhiṣṭhāne himavān vindhyaparvataḥ udayāstāv adhiṣṭhāne girī cakruḥ surottamāḥ samudram akṣam asṛjan dānavālayam uttamam saptarṣimaṇḍalaṃ caiva rathasyāsīt pariṣkaraḥ gaṅgā sarasvatī sindhur dhuram ākāśam eva ca upaskaro rathasyāsann āpaḥ sarvāś ca nimnagāḥ ahorātrāḥ kalāś caiva kāṣṭhāś ca ṛtavas tathā
aśvāś ca vedāś catvāraḥ purāṇāṅgavibhūṣitāḥ itare cābhavan nāgā hayānāṃ vālabandhanāḥ diśaś ca pradiśaś caiva raśmayo rathavājinām

vaṣaṭkāraḥ pratodo 'bhūd gāyatrī śīrṣabandhanā yo yajñe vihitaḥ pūrvam īśānasya mahātmanaḥ saṃvatsaro dhanus tad vai sāvitrī jyā mahāsvanā divyaṃ ca varma vihitaṃ mahārhaṃ ratnabhūṣitam abhedyaṃ virajaskaṃ vai kālacakrabahiṣkṛtam dhvajayaṣṭir abhūn meruḥ śrīmān kanakaparvataḥ patākāś cābhavan meghās taḍidbhiḥ samalaṃkṛtāḥ rejur adhvaryumadhyasthā jvalanta iva pāvakāḥ kḷptaṃ tu taṃ rathaṃ dṛṣṭvā vismitā devatābhavan sarvalokasya tejāṃsi dṛṣṭvaikasthāni māriṣa yuktaṃ nivedayām āsur devās tasmai mahātmane
chāyām evātmanaś cakre dhanur jyām akṣayāṃ raṇe kālo hi bhagavān rudras tasya saṃvatsaro dhanuḥ
pramāthibhir balaṃ lebhe savegair damane dhṛtaḥ
maharṣibhiḥ stūyamāno vandyamānaś ca bandibhiḥ upanṛttaś cāpsarasāṃ gaṇair nṛttaviśāradaiḥ

tvaṃ deva śakto loke 'smin niyantuṃ pradrutān imān vedāśvān sopaniṣadaḥ sārathir bhava naḥ svayam yoddhuṃ balena sattvena vayasā vinayena ca adhikaḥ sārathiḥ kāryo nāsti cānyo 'dhiko bhavān sa bhavāṃs tārayatv asmān kuru sārathyam avyaya bhavān abhyadhikas tvatto nānyo 'sti bhavitā tv iha tvaṃ hi deveśa sarvais tu viśiṣṭo vadatāṃ vara taṃ rathaṃ tvaṃ samāruhya saṃyaccha paramān hayān tava prasādād vadhyeyur deva daivatakaṇṭakāḥ sa no rakṣa mahābāho daityebhyo mahato bhayāt tvaṃ hi no gatir avyagra tvaṃ no goptā mahāvrata tvatprasādāt surāḥ sarve pūjyante tridive prabho

duryodhanaḥ evam uktvā jaṭābhāraṃ saṃyamya prapitāmahaḥ paridhāyājinaṃ gāḍhaṃ saṃnyasya ca kamaṇḍalum pratodapāṇir bhagavān āruroha rathaṃ tadā tasmād etad yathātattvaṃ jñātvā yuṣmāṃś ca saṃgatān saṃgacchāmi hayān eṣa vibudhāḥ kālamardine
abhīṣūn hi pratodaṃ ca saṃjagrāha pitāmahaḥ
ubhābhyāṃ lokanāthābhyām āsthitaṃ rathasattamam voḍhuṃ na śaktā vedāśvā jānubhyām apatan mahīm
abhīśubhis tu bhagavān udyamya ca hayān vibhuḥ astu vīryaṃ ca śauryaṃ ca vedāśvānām iti prabhuḥ rathaṃ saṃcodayām āsa devānāṃ prabhur avyayaḥ
pibadbhir iva cākāśaṃ tair hayair lokapūjitaiḥ jagāma bhagavān kṣipraṃ jayāya tridivaukasām
trīṇi dṛṣṭvaikasaṃsthāni purāṇy atha pinākadhṛk
ekabāṇena tad devas tripuraṃ parameśvaraḥ nijaghne sāsuragaṇaṃ devadevo maheśvaraḥ bāṇatejognidagdhe tat praviśīrṇaṃ sahasradhā mahad ārtasvaraṃ kṛtvā nāvaśeṣam upāgatam
trailokyam avaśeṣeṇa punar dagdhuṃ pracakrame kālāgnim iva nirdagdhum utthitaṃ taṃ punaḥ punaḥ
evaṃ sa bhagavān devo lokasraṣṭā maheśvaraḥ devāsuragaṇādhyakṣo lokānāṃ vidadhe śivam
svayaṃ lokatrayaṃ sraṣṭā lokānāṃ hitakāmyayā tathā bhavān api kṣipraṃ rudrasyeva pitāmahaḥ
balato rūpato yogād astrasaṃpada eva ca samāsaktaṃ mahīpāla kuru me hitam īpsitam
tvayā rājyaṃ sukhaṃ caiva jīvitaṃ jayam eva ca samāsaktaṃ mahīpāla kuru me hitam īpsitam saṃyacchāsya hayān rājan matpriyārthaṃ paraṃtapa
pratyakṣeṇa mahādevaḥ svāṃ tanuṃ sarvaśaṃkaraḥ
evam uktas tu devena bhārgavaḥ sumahāyaśāḥ pratyuvācātha deveśaṃ śaṃkaraṃ sa kṛtāñjaliḥ
mama yuddhaṃ prayacchadhvaṃ daityā yuddhamadotkaṭāḥ preṣito devadevena vo vijetuṃ mahāsurāḥ ity uktā bhārgaveṇātha daityā yuddhaṃ pracakramuḥ sa tān nihatya samare daityān bhārgavanandanaḥ
sūtena vardhito nityaṃ na śūdro nṛpa eva saḥ viśuddhayoniṃ vijñāya divyāny astrāṇy adāt prabhuḥ
viśiṣṭam avabodhārthaṃ kulasyeti matir mama sarvathā na hy ayaṃ śalya karṇaḥ sūtakulodbhavaḥ
na tv eṣa prākṛtaḥ kaś cit karṇo vaikartano vṛṣaḥ mahātmā hy eṣa rājendra rāmaśiṣyaḥ pratāpavān
**** **** 'dhyuṣite paryupasthite karṇasya yaccha saṃgrāme
saṃjaya uvāca etac chrutvā vacas tasya śalyaḥ karṇaṃ vaco 'bravīt saṃyokṣyāmi raṇe śalya

yadā drakṣyasi bhīmena kuñjarānīkam āhave viśīrṇadantaṃ nihataṃ tadā naivaṃ vadiṣyasi yadā drakṣyasi saṃgrāme dharmaputraṃ yamau tathā śitaiḥ pṛṣatkaiḥ kurvāṇān abhracchāyām ivāmbare asyataḥ kṣiṇvataś cārīn laghuhastān durāsadān pārthivān api cānyāṃs tvaṃ tadā naivaṃ vadiṣyasi
śalyena sahitaṃ dṛṣṭvā karṇam āhavaśobhinam
astrāṇi divyāny adadān mahātmā
*********** rathaprabarhaṃ puruṣaprabarhaḥ
atha vā śakaṭaṃ pūrṇaṃ ratnānāṃ ṣaḍgavāyutam dhuri kṣamair bṛhadbhiś ca gobhir yuktam akālikam
sa cet tad abhimanyeta puruṣo 'rjunadarśivān yuktaṃ hayavarair jaitraṃ kāmbojair abhiniṣṭhitam

sa cet tad abhimanyeta puruṣo 'rjunadarśivān tasmai dadyāṃ śataṃ nāgāñ śataṃ grāmāñ śataṃ rathān suvarṇasya ca mukhyasya hayāgryāṇāṃ śataṃ śatān ṛddhyā guṇaiḥ sudāntāṃś ca dhuryavāhān suśikṣitān tathā suvarṇaśṛṅgīṇāṃ godhenūnāṃ catuḥśatam dadyāṃ tasmai savatsānāṃ yo me brūyād dhanaṃjayam
anyam asmai varaṃ dadyāṃ dhuryān dāntāś catuḥśatam rohiṇī rūpasaṃpannā hemaśṛṅgīś catuḥśatam dadyām asmai payasvinyo yo me brūyād dhanaṃjayam
sa cet tad abhimanyeta puruṣo 'rjunadarśivān

anyaṃ tasmai varaṃ dadyāṃ vaiśyagrāmāṃś caturdaśa susphītān dhanasaṃyuktān pratyāsannavanodakān akutobhayān susaṃpannān rājabhojyāṃś caturdaśa dāsīnāṃ niṣkakaṇṭhīnāṃ māgadhīnāṃ śataṃ tathā pratyagravayasāṃ dadyāṃ yo me brūyād dhanaṃjayam sa cet tad abhimanyeta puruṣo 'rjunadarśivān
khanyād asiṃ tīkṣṇadhāraṃ yathājñaḥ sutejanaṃ nihitaṃ vai pṛthivyām tathā khanasy adya śitān pṛṣatkān yaḥ prārthayasy arjuneneha yuddham
yathā vatsataro bhūtvā jātaskandhena śuṣmiṇā yuddham icched gopatinā tathecchasi kirīṭinā
**** **** vikramaṃ ca mahātmanaḥ tathā kṛṣṇasya māhātmyam ṛṣabhasya mahīkṣitām yathāhaṃ śalya jānāmi
na tathā saṃgataṃ cāpi madrakeṣv iha vidyate
pramehitvā sphijā bhūmiṃ karṣantyo hīnaśodhanāḥ spṛṣṭvā vāgbhir na mṛdbhiś ca nityocchiṣṭā bhavanti hi
jāto 'haṃ yajvanāṃ vaṃśe saṃgrāmeṣv anivartinām rājñāṃ mūrdhābhiṣiktānāṃ svayaṃ dharmaparāyaṇaḥ
ete nipātinaḥ paśya sahitān viyadāśritān ebhis tvam abhiśaknoṣi kasmān na prāpitas tvayā
saṃḍīnoḍḍīnaḍīnaṃ ca punar ḍīnaviḍīnakam
te vai dhruvaṃ viniścitya patadhvaṃ na mayā saha pātair ebhiḥ khalu khagāḥ patituṃ khe nirāśraye
kākaḥ aham ekena pātena haṃsa pātaśataṃ jaye ekenaiva ca haṃsa tvaṃ pāteneha patiṣyasi
kāko 'tha haṃsaṃ cāpalyāc chīghratāṃ pratidarśayan vegenātītya tarasā punar eti muhur muhuḥ tuṇḍenābhyahanac caitaṃ kurvan nāmāpasavyataḥ rorūyann iti cāpy etaṃ samāhvayati vai muhuḥ
bahusattvasamākīrṇaṃ vīcībhir bhīmadarśanam athācireṇa rādheya kāko vegād ahīyata tato 'tīva pariśrāntaḥ kathaṃ cid dhaṃsam anvagāt
avekṣamāṇas taṃ kākaṃ vihvalaṃ taṃ muhur muhuḥ
prabrūhi katame tatra pāte vartasi vāyasa ehy ehi kāka śīghraṃ tvam eṣa tvāṃ pratipālaye

sāgarāmbhasi taṃ dṛṣṭvā patitaṃ dīnacetasam mriyamāṇam idaṃ kākaṃ haṃso vākyam uvāca ha pātavegapramathito haṃsaṃ kāko 'bravīd idam vayaṃ kākāḥ kuto nāma carāmaḥ kākapātikām haṃsa prāṇaiḥ prapadye tvāṃ dvīpāntaṃ prāpayasva mām
sa tvam ekaśataṃ pātaṃ patann abhyadhiko mayā katham evaṃ pariśrāntaḥ patito 'si mahārṇave pratyuvāca tataḥ kākaḥ sīdamāna idaṃ vacaḥ upariṣṭhaṃ tadā haṃsam abhivīkṣya prasādayan
yadi nāma punar jīvan gaccheyaṃ svaṃ niveśanam naivaṃ punar hīnam api kṣeptāhaṃ khevicāriṇam
kṛpayābhiparīto vai kṛpāṃ cakre durātmani
utsṛjaṃś cābravīn maivaṃ punaḥ kāryaṃ tvayeti ha
evam ucchiṣṭapuṣṭaḥ sa kāko haṃsaparājitaḥ balaṃ vīryaṃ mahat karṇa tyaktvā kṣāntim upāgataḥ
tvaṃ śīghram eva vārṣṇeyaṃ pāṇḍavaṃ ca dhanaṃjayam draṣṭāsy ekarathe karṇaṃ tadā naivaṃ vadiṣyasi yadā śaraśataiḥ pārtho darpaṃ tava vadhiṣyati tadā tvam antaraṃ draṣṭā ātmanaś cārjunasya ca
sūryācandramasau yadvat tadvad arjunakeśavau

purā mahendrādrivare samṛddhe tapasvinaṃ rāmam upetya śalya astrārthinaṃ mādya śiṣyaṃ gṛhāṇety athābruvaṃ brāhmaṇacchadmanā ca tatrāvasaṃ brāhmaṇa ity avipro brahmāstralobhād anṛtena cāham taj jāmadagnyena paraṃ mahāstraṃ samantrayuktaṃ vihitaṃ mamāsīt astraṃ yadā tad viditaṃ mamāsīt tadābravīd brāhmaṇo māṃ maharṣiḥ āpadgatenāstram idaṃ prayojyaṃ tvayā raṇe gacchatā sādhayeti
sa dhairyayuktaṃ prasamīkṣya māṃ vai na tvaṃ vipraḥ ko 'si satyaṃ vadeti tasmai tadātmānam ahaṃ yathāvad ākhyātavān sūtavadetya śalya
sa māṃ niśamyātha mahātapasvī saṃśaptavān roṣaparītacetāḥ

karṇaḥ kṛṣṇau jaghnivān ekavīraḥ kṛṣṇau karṇaṃ jaghnivantāv athāpi dhruvaḥ kṣayaḥ kṣatriyapuṃgavānāṃ mahābhayo 'yaṃ samupasthito 'dya astraṃ hi me na pratibhām upaiti yena kṣayaṃ śatrugaṇān nayiṣye tasmāt tam āsādaya madrarāja divyaṃ dhanur yasya maheṣavaś ca astrāṇi divyāni ca santi yasmiṃs tasmin rathaṃ prāpaya śīghram adya śroṣyantīmaṃ kathyamānaṃ vicitraṃ yāvad bhūmau bhavitāro manuṣyāḥ
sahasraraśmipratimaṃ jvalantaṃ diśaś ca sarvāḥ pratapantam ugram
āśīviṣaṃ durdharam aprameyaṃ sutīkṣṇadaṃṣṭraṃ jvalanaprabhāvam krodhapradīptaṃ tv ahitaṃ mahāntaṃ kuntīputraṃ śamayiṣyāmi bhallaiḥ

mānī kṛtāstraḥ kṛtahastayogo divyāstravic chvetahayaḥ pramāthī tasyāham adyātirathasya kāyāc chiro hariṣyāmi śitaiḥ pṛṣatkaiḥ yotsyāmy enaṃ śalya dhanaṃjayaṃ vai mṛtyuṃ puraskṛtya raṇe jayaṃ vā anyo hi na hy ekarathena martyo yudhyeta yaḥ pāṇḍavam indrakalpam
tathāpy ahaṃ pāṇḍavavāsudevau yotsye raṇe madvidhasyaiva karma na prākṛtaḥ sajjate vai kadā cid yaḥ pratyudīyāt kṛṣṇadhanaṃjayau tau
mitraṃ mitrair nandyate prīyate vā saṃtrāyate mānada modate vā

śānte śatrau śāsate kauravendro bhūmiṃ sarvāṃ sarvasaṃpatsamṛddhām prāyeṇa tvaṃ vetsi śalya prabhāvaṃ duryodhanārthaṃ yudhyato me narendra yaśortham arthārtham athetarārthaṃ tasmād ahaṃ pāṇḍavavāsudevau
śalyādyāhaṃ saṃgataḥ pāṇḍavena mucyeyaṃ cej jīvamānaḥ kathaṃ cit śaśvan mṛtyoḥ syām anādhṛṣyarūpo vyaktaṃ tasmāt saṃyugād vipramuktaḥ tasmād astraṃ śatrusaṃghe pramāmi [?]
kadā cid vijayasyāham astrahetor aṭan nṛpa ajñānād dhi kṣipan bāṇān ghorarūpān bhayānakān
kadā cid brāhmaṇasyātha homadhenor ahaṃ nṛpa ajānann akṣipaṃ bāṇaṃ ghorarūpaṃ bhayānakam

śalyam uddhartum āyāntaṃ gavāṃ daśaśataṃ vittaṃ balīvardāṃś ca ṣaṭśatam prayacchann ālabhaṃ kāmaṃ brāhmaṇāt tam ahaṃ tadā dāsīśataṃ niṣkakaṇṭhaṃ śatam aśvatarīrathān kanyānāṃ niṣkakaṇṭhīnāṃ sahasraṃ samalaṃkṛtam
**** **** kuñjarān ṣaṣṭihāyanān aśvānāṃ ca sahasre dve
yat kiṃ cin māmakaṃ vittaṃ tvadadhīnaṃ karomi tat iti māṃ yācamānaṃ vai brāhmaṇaḥ pratyavārayat krodhadīptekṣaṇaḥ śalya nirdahānn iva cakṣuṣā

naitad avyāhṛtaṃ kuryāt sarvaloko 'pi sūtaja yan mayoktaṃ saroṣeṇa gaccha sūtaja mā ciram iti mām asakṛt kruddhaḥ sa uvāca dvijottamaḥ ete hi somarājāna īśvarāḥ sukhaduḥkhayoḥ nāhaṃ bibhemi bībhatsor na śalya madhusūdanāt tasmād bibhemy ahaṃ śāpāt tena satyena te śape saha yuddhaṃ sametābhyām adyedaṃ samupasthitam yuddhe 'smiñ jīvitaṃ me 'dya śalya saṃśayam āgatam śakro 'py amararāṭ tābhyām upagamyāhavaṃ saha saṃśayaṃ paramaṃ gacchet kathaṃ vā manyate bhavān
nānyasmād api kasmāc cid amitād ātatāyinaḥ
dandahyamānās tīkṣṇena nīcāḥ parayaśogninā aśaktās tat padaṃ gantuṃ tato nindāṃ pracakrire

sakhibhāvena sauhārdān mitrabhāvena caiva hi kāraṇais tribhir etais tvaṃ śalya jīvasi sāṃpratam rājñaś ca dhārtarāṣṭrasya kāryaṃ sumahad udyatam mayi tac cāhitaṃ śalya tena jīvasi me kṣaṇam kṛtaś ca samayaḥ pūrvaṃ kṣantavyaṃ vipriyaṃ tava samayaḥ paripālyo me tena jīvasi madraka ṛte śalyasahasreṇa vijayeyam ahaṃ parān śalya uvāca nanu pralāpāḥ karṇaite yān bravīṣi parān prati ṛte karṇasahasreṇa śakyā jetuṃ pare yudhi tathā bruvantaṃ paruṣaṃ karṇo madrādhipaṃ tadā paruṣaṃ dviguṇaṃ bhūyaḥ provācāpriyadarśanam
anāvṛtā maithune tāḥ kāmacārāś ca sarvaśaḥ
yatra lokeśvaraḥ kṛṣṇo devadevo janārdanaḥ vismṛtaḥ puruṣair ugrais teṣāṃ dharmaḥ kathaṃ bhavet
śrāddhatarpaṇakarmeṣu te viprā yatra saṃsthitāḥ tat sarvaṃ viphalībhūtam iti satyavatī śrutiḥ
te kathaṃ vividhān dharmāñ jñāsyante hīnayonayaḥ
brāhmaṇāpasadā yatra tulyakālāḥ prajāpateḥ vedā na teṣāṃ vedyaṃ ca yajñā yajanam eva ca vrātyānāṃ dāśamīyānām annaṃ devā na bhuñjate prasthalā madragāndhārā āraṭṭā nāmataḥ khaśāḥ
brahmaṇā nindite dharme sa tvaṃ loke kim abravīḥ
vākpāruṣyaṃ govadho rātricaryā bahirgehaṃ paravastropabhogaḥ
naiva pāñcanadān pāpān samadān pāti kaś cana guhyakāś ca mahārāja parvataṃ gandhamādanam
sīdhoḥ pānaṃ gurutalpāvamardo bhrūṇahatyā paravittāpahāraḥ
evaṃ jñātvā joṣam āssva pratīpaṃ mā sma krudhyaḥ pāpabhṛtāṃ variṣṭhaḥ pūrvaṃ hatvā tvāṃ saputraṃ balaiś ca paścād dhaṃsye vāsudevārjunau ca

sarvatra santi rājānaḥ svaṃ svaṃ dharmam anuvratāḥ durmanuṣyān nigṛhṇanti santi sarvatra dhārmikāḥ na karṇa deśasāmānyāt sarvaḥ pāpaṃ niṣevate yādṛśāḥ svasvabhāvena devā api na tādṛśāḥ tato duryodhano rājā karṇaśalyāv avārayat sakhibhāvena rādheyaṃ śalyaṃ svāñjalyakena ca tato nivāritaḥ karṇo dhārtarāṣṭreṇa māriṣa

tataḥ prayāntaṃ rādheyaṃ madrarājaḥ smayann iva avasphūrjya idaṃ vākyam abravīt kurusaṃnidhau camūṃ tavemāṃ vipulāṃ samṛddhām asaṃkhyeyām aśvanarākulāṃ ca tathā praveṣṭā samare dhanaṃjayaḥ kakṣaṃ dahan dīpta ivāśrayāśīḥ rathe sthitau vīra raṇe vareṇyau siṃhaskandhau lohitapadmanetrau draṣṭā bhavān adya vinā prayatnāt tathā hi me śakunā vedayanti
sarvān eva maheṣvāsān ajayyān amarair api
ārohaṇair mahāmātrais tomarāṅkuśapāṇibhiḥ
bhiṇḍipāladharāś caiva śūlahastāḥ sucakriṇaḥ teṣāṃ samāgamo ghoro devāsuraraṇopamaḥ

dhanaṃjayo mahārāja dakṣiṇaṃ pakṣam āsthitaḥ bhīmaseno mahābāhur vāmaṃ pakṣam upāśritaḥ sātyakir draupadeyāś ca svayaṃ rājā ca pāṇḍavaḥ vyūhasya pramukhe tasthuḥ svenānīkena saṃvṛtāḥ svabalenārisainyaṃ tat pratyavasthāpya pāṇḍavaḥ pratyavyūhat puraskṛtya dhṛṣṭadyumnaśikhaṇḍinau tat sādināgakalilaṃ padātirathasaṃkulam dhṛṣṭadyumnamukhaṃ vyūham aśobhata mahābalam
avasthitam idaṃ vākyaṃ madrarājaḥ smayann iva
durvāraḥ sarvasainyānāṃ vipākaḥ karmaṇām iva
dhruvam etau mahātmānau vāsudevadhanaṃjayau

camūṃ tavemāṃ vipulāṃ samṛddhām asaṃkhyeyām aśrukulākulāṃ ca dhruvaṃ pravekṣaty ajito dhanaṃjayaḥ kathaṃ dahan dīpta ivāśrayāśaḥ amī hayāś candramarīcivarṇāḥ kṛṣṇapratodena pratudyamānāḥ vahanti bībhatsum udārasattvāḥ sitaprabhāḥ svabhram ivābhrasaṃghāḥ
rarāsa dīptalāṅgūlam ādityam abhitaḥ sthitam
ādityam abhivīkṣante hy aśivāḥ karṇa satvarāḥ
paśya kuntīsutaṃ vīraṃ bībhatsum aparājitam pradharṣayitum āyāntaṃ kapipravaraketanam
yatra kṛṣṇo jagannātho yatra rājā yudhiṣṭhiraḥ yatra gāṇḍīvadhṛk pārtho kathaṃ tvaṃ haṃsi tad balam
rathanemisvanaḥ saṃkhye meghasyevābhigarjitaḥ śrūyate vai yathā vyaktam etau kṛṣṇadhanaṃjayau
yatra kṛṣṇārjunau vīrau yatra rājā yudhiṣṭhiraḥ tatra dharmaś ca satyaṃ ca yato dharmas tato jayaḥ
tadāsthitam anājñāya pratyamitramahadbalam avyūhatārjuno vyūhaṃ putrasya tava durjayam
divyavarmāyudhabhṛtaḥ śārdūlasamavikramāḥ
udīryamāṇaṃ saṃrabdhaṃ dhanaṃjayam abhidravat tad udyataṃ mahat sainyaṃ sāgaraughasamaṃ jave pārthavelāṃ samāsādya viṣṭhitaṃ samadṛśyata
evaṃ māriṣa saṃgrāmo naravājigajakṣayaḥ kurūṇāṃ sṛñjayānāṃ ca devāsurasamo 'bhavat
parivavrur mahārāja pāñcālānāṃ rathā daśa
nakulaḥ sahadevaś ca sātyakiś ca mahārathaḥ

sātyakir vṛṣasenaṃ tu viddhvā saptabhir āśugaiḥ punar vivyādha saptatyā sārathiṃ ca tribhiḥ śaraiḥ vṛṣasenas tu śaineyaṃ śareṇa nataparvaṇā ājaghāna mahārāja śaṅkhadeśe mahāratham śaineyo vṛṣasenena patriṇā paripīḍitaḥ krodhaṃ cakre mahārāja kruddho vegaṃ ca dāruṇam jagrāheṣuvarān vīraḥ śīghraṃ sa daśa pañca ca
sa raṇe yuyudhānena visūtāśvarathadhvajaḥ

draupadeyāṃs trisaptatyā yuyudhānaṃ ca pañcabhiḥ bhīmasenaṃ catuḥṣaṣṭyā sahadevaṃ ca pañcabhiḥ nakulaṃ triṃśatā bāṇaiḥ śatānīkaṃ ca saptabhiḥ śikhaṇḍinaṃ ca daśabhir dharmarājaṃ śatena ca etāṃś cānyāṃś ca rājendra pravīrāñ jayagṛddhinaḥ abhyardayan maheṣvāsaḥ karṇaputro viśāṃ pate

sātyakiṃ bhīmasenaṃ ca dhṛṣṭadyumnaṃ śikhaṇḍinam draupadeyāṃś ca saṃrabdhān yatamānān mahārathān paśyatāṃ sarvasainyānām athaitān sūtanandanaḥ virathān rathinaḥ śreṣṭhān nimeṣārdhāc cakāra ha amoghatvāc ca bāṇānāṃ bhūtasaṃghā visiṣmiyuḥ

pratīcyāṃ diśi taṃ dṛṣṭvā prācyāṃ paśyāma lāghavāt na tu paśyāma rājendra kva nu karṇo vyatiṣṭhata iṣūn eva sma paśyāmo vikirantaṃ samantataḥ chādayanto diśo rājañ śalabhānām iva vrajān tasya tair iṣubhis tīkṣṇaiḥ saṃpatadbhiḥ sahasraśaḥ marīcibhir ivoṣṇāṃśoḥ śitaiḥ saṃnataparvabhiḥ vyāptāḥ sarvā diśo rājan yodhāś ca dadṛśus tadā śaraiḥ saṃvṛtam ākāśaṃ tatrābhram iva cābhavat
tataḥ punar ameyātmā karṇo rājan mahārathaḥ nyahanat samare yodhān yaudhavratam anuṣṭhitaḥ
te hanyamānāḥ karṇena palāyante diśo daśa nādayanto diśaḥ sarvāḥ karṇatrastā vicetasaḥ
tatas te virathāḥ śūrā rathān anyān samāsthitāḥ parivavrur mahārāja dharmaputraṃ yudhiṣṭhiram
muñcanto vividhān bāṇān svarṇapuṅkhāñ śilāśitān
prahartukāmān aparān saṃdhiteṣūṃs tathāparān pragṛhītāyudhān bāhūn anyeṣāṃ ca pradhāvatām nijaghāna raṇe karṇo nānāśastraniṣevitān
tair yodhaiḥ pramukhe vīraṃ dṛṣṭvā vivyādha sāyakaiḥ karṇaḥ pārthaśarair viddhas tottrārdita iva dvipaḥ pramathya sahitān vīrān yudhiṣṭhiram apīḍayat tato yudhiṣṭhiraḥ karṇam āsādya jayatāṃ varam
colaṃ ca cerakaṃ caiva siṃhaladvīpavāsinam karṇo vivyādha saṃkruddho dākṣiṇātyān samantataḥ

nijaghāna maheṣvāsān pāñcālān ekaviṃśatim tataḥ punar ameyātmā cedīnāṃ pravarān daśa nyahanad bharataśreṣṭha karṇo vaikartanas tadā tasya bāṇasahasrāṇi saṃprapannāni māriṣa dṛśyante dikṣu sarvāsu śalabhānām iva vrajāḥ karṇanāmāṅkitā bāṇāḥ svarṇapuṅkhāḥ sutejanāḥ narāśvakāyān nirbhidya petur urvyāṃ samantataḥ karṇenaikena samare cedīnāṃ pravarā rathāḥ sṛñjayānāṃ ca sarveṣāṃ śataśo nihatā raṇe karṇasya śarasaṃchannaṃ babhūva vipulaṃ tamaḥ nājñāyata tataḥ kiṃ cit pareṣām ātmano 'pi vā tasmiṃs tamasi bhūte ca kṣatriyāṇāṃ bhayaṃkare vicacāra mahābāhur nirdahan kṣatriyān bahūn
tatas teṣāṃ mahārāja pāṇḍavānāṃ mahārathāḥ sṛñjayānāṃ ca sarveṣāṃ śataśo 'tha sahasraśaḥ astraiḥ karṇaṃ maheṣvāṃsa samantāt paryavāraya
babhāse puruṣaśreṣṭha udyann iva divākaraḥ sa śarārpitasarvāṅgaś chinnavarmātha saṃyuge kṣatradharmaṃ samāsthāya siṃhanādam athākarot naditvā ca ciraṃ kālaṃ pāṇḍavo rabhaso raṇe
hatvā sūtaṃ ca pārthasya pṛṣṭhagopaṃ ca sāyakaiḥ

vajracchatrāṅkuśair matsyair dhvajakūrmāmbujādibhiḥ lakṣaṇair upapannena pāṇinā pāṇḍunandanam pavitrīkartum ātmānaṃ skandhopari samaspṛśat grahītum icchan sa balāt kuntīvākyaṃ ca so 'smarat taṃ śalyaḥ prāha mā karṇa gṛhṇīthāḥ pārthivottamam gṛhītamātro hatvā tvāṃ mā kariṣyati bhasmasāt

saṃjayaḥ varapradānaṃ kuntyās tu karṇaḥ smṛtvā mahārathaḥ vadhaprāptaṃ tu kaunteyaṃ nāvadhīt puruṣottamam svagṛhaṃ gaccha kaunteya yatra vā keśavārjunau na hi tvāṃ samare rājan hanyāt karṇaḥ kathaṃ cana
udgataḥ pratisṛṣṭānāṃ śastrāṇāṃ ca tatas tataḥ
pralutvā vīra śailānāṃ śikharāṇi dvipopamāḥ
pariṣvakto vijānāti nārībhir uparisthitaḥ iti bāhulatāpāśapāśino divyarūpiṇaḥ samādhāyāpsaraḥsaṃghā nānāyānair divaṃ yayuḥ
duryodhano mahārāja vārayām āsa sarvaśaḥ yodhāṃś ca svabalaṃ caiva samantād bharatarṣabha
madrarājam uvācedaṃ yāhi bhīmarathaṃ prati evam uktaś ca karṇena śalyo madrādhipas tadā
nirapekṣaś ca yudhyasva śaktiṃ svāṃ saṃpradarśayan
evam uktvā tato rājan rādheyo rathināṃ varaḥ
rudhireṇāvasiktāṅgo gatāsuvad ariṃdamaḥ
aśobhata mahārāja pūrṇacandra ivāmbare
chittvā ca kārmukaṃ tūrṇaṃ pāṇḍavasyāśu patriṇā sārathiṃ cāsya bhallena preṣayām āsa mṛtyave
karṇaṃ śalyaṃ ca yugapad gadayā prahasann iva apātayad rathopasthe nihatya vinanāda ha
te 'bhyarditā mārutinā vinadanto bhṛśāturāḥ
upāsarpata vegena anyonyena narādhipa
harṣeṇa mahatā yuktaiḥ kurupāṇḍavasainikaiḥ
śaratomaranārācair gadāśaktiparaśvadhaiḥ
baddhacūḍāmaṇivaraiḥ śirobhiś cārukuṇḍalaiḥ ujjhitair vṛṣabhākṣāṇāṃ bhrājate sma vasuṃdharā
agamyakalpā pṛthivī sarvato bhṛśadurgamā
tathā rejū raṇe nāgā rudhireṇa samāplutāḥ
bhīruvitrāsakāriṇyaḥ śūrāṇāṃ harṣavardhanāḥ
tāṃs tāpayitvā samare pārthaḥ parapuraṃjayaḥ
paśya tān adya samare matprayuktaiḥ sutejanaiḥ patyamānān raṇe kṛṣṇa śarair āśīviṣopamaiḥ
vyanādayad ameyātmā devadattaṃ mahāmṛdhe devadattasvanaṃ śrutvā keśavo 'pi mahāyaśāḥ
nāgam astraṃ tataḥ pārthaḥ prāduś cakre hasann iva pādabandhaṃ sa teṣāṃ vai cakre tena mahāstravit
te baddhāḥ pādabandhena na śekuś ceṣṭituṃ nṛpa tatas tān avadhīt pārthaḥ śaraiḥ saṃnataparvabhiḥ sarvayodhā hi samare bhujagair veṣṭitābhavan
vividhāni ca śastrāṇi pratyavidhyanta sarvaśaḥ
suśarmāṇaṃ mahārāja krodhāviṣṭo mahārathaḥ tataḥ śaraśataiḥ pārthaḥ saṃchādyainaṃ kṣaṇād raṇe diśa āvārayām āsa bāṇais tatra mahāstravit vimukhīkṛtya samare suśarmāṇaṃ dhanaṃjayaḥ
rarāja samare rājañ śakro nighnann ivāsurān
jitvā tān nyahanat pārthaḥ śatrūñ śakra ivāsurān
bhīmasenaṃ sapāñcālaṃ cedikaikeyasaṃvṛtam vaikartanaḥ svayaṃ yuddhvā vārayām āsa kārmukaiḥ tataś cedikarūṣāṃś ca sṛñjayāṃś ca mahārathān karṇo jaghāna saṃkruddho bhīmasenasya paśyataḥ
mahad āsīt tadā yuddhaṃ muhūrtād iva dāruṇam kruddhayoḥ samare rājan rāmarāvaṇayor iva
tatas tu niśitais tīkṣṇaiḥ kṣuraprair hemabhūṣaṇaiḥ
hārdikyaṃ chādayām āsa pārṣato niśitaiḥ śaraiḥ

tad bhajyamānaṃ marṣeṇa brāhmaṇasya śarāhatam tad balaṃ pāṇḍaveyasya droṇaputraśarārciṣā tāpayan bharataśreṣṭha gabhastibhir ivāṃśumān tat tāpyamānaṃ tīkṣṇāgrair brāhmaṇasya ca sāyakaiḥ kṣubhyate pāṇḍavaṃ sainyaṃ

jānāmi tvāṃ yudhi śreṣṭhaṃ vīryavantaṃ balānvitam kṛtāstraṃ kṛtinaṃ caiva tathā laghuparākramam balam etad bhavān sarvaṃ pārṣate yadi darśayet tatas tvāṃ balavantaṃ ca kṛtavīryaṃ ca vidmahe sa hi vai pārṣataṃ dṛṣṭvā samare śatrusūdanam bhavet tava balaṃ kiṃ cid bravīmi tvāṃ na tu dvija
nakulaḥ sahadevaś ca krodhaṃ tīvraṃ samāsthitau tāṃ bāṇavṛṣṭiṃ rājñas tu śaraiḥ śatasahasrabhiḥ (sic) chādayām āsatur ubhau bāṇaughais tanayaṃ tava tatas tayor mahārāja sṛjator aniśaṃ śarān
krodham āsthāya paramaṃ niḥśvasaṃś ca yathoragaḥ bāṇāndhakāraṃ sasṛje tava putras tayos tadā
vivyādha vividhair bāṇaiḥ kālāntakayamopamaiḥ
pāñcālān atha nighnantaṃ karṇaṃ dṛṣṭvā mahāraṇe
taiḥ karṇasyābhavad yuddhaṃ ghorarūpaṃ viśāṃ pate tādṛg yādṛk purā vṛttaṃ devānāṃ dānavaiḥ saha tān sametān maheṣvāsāñ śaravarṣaughavarṣiṇaḥ eko 'bhyabhavad avyagras tamāṃsīva divākaraḥ
sarvato 'bhyahanat kruddho yamadaṇḍanibhaiḥ śaraiḥ bāhlīkān kekayān matsyān vāsātyān madrasaindhavān
nihatais tair mahārāja vegavadbhir mahāgajaiḥ śuśubhe vasudhā rājan vikīrṇair iva parvataiḥ
tadvat tava balaṃ tad vai niścalaṃ samavasthitam
tad balaṃ bharataśreṣṭha vadhyamānaṃ parasparam
kuravaś cāpi dhāvanti bhīmasenabhayārditāḥ
durjayā hy eṣa samare devadānavarākṣasaiḥ
meghastanitanirhrādaḥ sa ratho vānaradhvajaḥ calatpatākas tāṃ senāṃ vimānaṃ dyām ivāviśata
krodhatāmrekṣaṇau śūrau śuśubhāte mahābalau madotkaṭau yathā nāgau dṛṣṭisaṃcāracāriṇau
duryodhanena te sārdhaṃ jātavegāḥ samantataḥ
mahī viyad diśaḥ sarvāḥ samudrā girayo 'pi vā sphuṭantīti janā jajñuḥ pārthasya talanisvanāt
kāmbojas tu tataḥ kruddho dṛṣṭvā pārthaṃ mahāratham

acodayata yantāram arjunāyaiva māṃ vaha tatas taṃ rathināṃ śreṣṭhaṃ bahudakṣiṇam āhave arjunasya rathaṃ kṣipraṃ prāpayām āsa sārathiḥ tato 'rjunaṃ tribhir bāṇair viddhvā bhārasahair yudhi keśavaṃ navabhī rājan bāhvor urasi cāparyat tataḥ kruddho mahārāja pāṇḍavaḥ paravīrahā

yuddhaṃ ghoraṃ tathā tv āsīt tridhābhūte camūmukhe visiṣmāpayiṣor lokaṃ yaśaś cottamam icchatoḥ saṃśaptakāṃs tu kaunteyaḥ kurūṃś cāpi vṛkodaraḥ sūtaputras tu pāñcālān bhūyo 'ghnaṃs tvaritāḥ śaraiḥ evam eṣa mahārāja vināśaḥ pṛthivīkṣitām āsīt kruddhe 'rjune karṇe bhīmasene ca dāruṇe
udīryamāṇaṃ hi raṇe paśyāmi drauṇim āhave guruputra iti hy enaṃ mānayan bharatarṣabha upekṣāṃ kuru mā pārtha nāyaṃ kāla upekṣitum
vartamāne tathā raudre rājan vīravarakṣaye utthitāny agaṇeyāni kabandhāni samantataḥ yudhiṣṭhiro 'pi saṃgrāme prahārair gāḍhavedanaḥ krośamātram apakramya tasthau bharatasattama
anuprayāti saṃgrāme hatān paśya ca sṛñjayān
evam eṣa kṣayo vṛttaḥ pṛthivyāṃ pṛthivīpate tāvakānāṃ pareṣāṃ ca rājan durmantrite tava
vavarṣa śaravarṣāṇi toyavarṣān ivāmbudaḥ
chādayām āsa samare śarair āśīviṣopamaiḥ
sa dṛṣṭvā samare karṇaṃ pārṣataṃ ca mahāratham
rathaṃ rathena saṃpīḍya śatruvīryapraṇāśanaḥ
pataṅgadarśanenādya darśanena vyapohyate śaśismaraṇatanmātrān vaṃśān kṛtam apohyate mayā mārayitavyas tvaṃ paśumāreṇa pārṣata adya śvo vā paraśvo vā satyam etad bhaviṣyati
kṣurapreṇa sutīkṣṇena paśyatāṃ sarvayodhinām

pārṣatasya tataḥ kruddho droṇaputraḥ paraṃtapaḥ tāṃ nikṛttāṃ raṇe dṛṣṭvā drauṇinā pārṣato balī parighaṃ ghoram ādāya kārtasvaravibhūṣitam cikṣepa bhujavīryeṇa pārṣato vai purā nadan tam āpatantaṃ parighaṃ droṇaputrasya lāghavāt ciccheda bahudhā rājañ śarair atiratho raṇe
pragṛhya vipulaṃ khaḍgaṃ jātarūpapariṣkṛtam
etasminn eva kāle tu keśavaḥ paravīrahā abravīd bharataśreṣṭham arjunaṃ jayatāṃ varam paśya drauṇiṃ pārṣatasya yatamānaṃ vadhaṃ prati
utsṛjya samare rājan pāñcālyam amitaujasam
tadā vilokya pārthaṃ ca kṛṣṇo vacanam abravīt rarāja lohitenorvī saṃraktā bahudhā bhṛśam tato rajasi saṃśānte rudhireṇa samantataḥ
karṇena cābhiyukto 'yaṃ bhūpatiḥ śatrutāpanaḥ saṃśayaṃ samanuprāptaḥ pāṇḍavo vai yudhiṣṭhiraḥ
astrair nānāvidhaiś citraiḥ kauravāḥ pārtha saṃyuge
drāvyamāṇā raṇe pārtha karṇenāmitatejasā
trāsayitvā raṇe pārtha rādheyo rathināṃ varaḥ
rādheyaḥ kauravīṃ senāṃ rakṣamāṇaḥ samantataḥ
tvāṃ ca pārthābhisaṃrabdhaṃ karṇaṃ prati mahāratham tvāṃ na marṣayate pārtha nityam eva sumandadhīḥ
asau duryodhanaḥ kruddho rathānīkena daṃśitaḥ
tvāṃ ca dṛṣṭvātisaṃrabdhaṃ karṇaṃ ca bharatarṣabha asau duryodhanaḥ kruddho nottaraṃ pratipadyate

sahitaḥ sa tu duṣṭātmā dhārtarāṣṭro 'bhyavartate eṣa eva nihantavyo mūlaṃ vairasya bhārata mūle chinne yathā nāśaḥ śākhānāṃ jāyate dhruvam tathā duryodhane pārtha hate syur akhilā hatāḥ dhārtarāṣṭrā mahābāho sabhṛtyāmātyabāndhavāḥ paśya sarve yathā yodhā yānti bhīmarathaṃ prati bhīmo 'pi śe[ro]ṣatāmrākṣo hanti śatrūn aśeṣataḥ eṣa dharmasuto rājā yamābhyāṃ paripālitaḥ duryodhano 'pi karṇena rakṣyate sasutena ca kṛtavarmā kṛpo drauṇī rakṣanto 'nyonyam uttamāḥ kulūkaḥ śakuniś caiva kṛtvā rakṣāṃ sthitāv ubhau
bhūtāni caiva sarvāṇi kurupāñcālasṛñjayāḥ
śastram ācchidya śatrūṇāṃ sāyudhānāṃ nirāyudhāḥ tenaivaitān amoghāstrā nighnanti ca nadanti ca śirāṃsy etāni pātyante śatrūṇāṃ bāhavo 'pi ca rathanāgahayā vīrā yaśasyāḥ sarva eva ca
tyaktvā prāṇān maheṣvāsaiḥ pāñcālaiḥ paripātyate
suhṛdaś ca parākrāntāḥ kṛpakarṇādayo vibho nivāraṇe maheṣvāsāḥ pāñcālānāṃ paraṃtapa
rathāś ca vimukhāḥ sarve nivṛtte bharatarṣabhe śatrupakṣam avaskandya śarān asyati mārutiḥ
bhīmasenena mātaṅgāḥ prāpitā yamasādanam girīṇāṃ śikharāṇīva nipatanti nararṣabha
ete dravanti kuravo bhīmasenabhayārditāḥ tyaktvā rathān gajāṃś caiva hayāṃś caiva sahasraśaḥ hastyaśvarathapattīnaṃ dravatāṃ nisvanaṃ śṛṇu bhīmasenasya ninadaṃ drāvayāṇasya kauravān
rājānaṃ ca mahābāhuṃ pīḍayanty āttamanyavaḥ rādheyo bahubhiḥ sārdham asau gacchati vegitaḥ varjayitvā tu bhīruṃ taṃ pārśvato hy ānayad dhanuḥ taṃ pālayan mahārājaṃ dhārtarāṣṭro balānvitaḥ
etac chrutvā mahābāhur vāsudevād dhanaṃjayaḥ
nārāyaṇāṃs tu gopālān vyadhamat pāṇḍunandanaḥ uttamaṃ vegam āsthāya caṇḍavāyur ghanān iva anvakīryanta bhītās te tatra tatraiva bhārata lulitāṃś ca tataḥ śūrān ahanat puruṣottamaḥ

avaśeṣaṃ na paśyāmi mama sainyeṣu saṃjaya aho bata daśāṃ prāpto na hi śakṣyāmi jīvitum jayakāṅkṣī kathaṃ sūta putrāṇām anivartinām kathaṃ jīvāmi nihatāñ śrutvā ca mama sainikān bahunādya kim uktena daivaṃ teṣāṃ parāyaṇam
tiṣṭha tiṣṭha pṛthāputra paśya me 'dya parākramam adya tvāṃ preṣayiṣyāmi yamasya sadanaṃ prati ity uktvā prayayau tūrṇaṃ yatra bhīmo vyavasthitaḥ
yudhāmanyuṃ kṛpo rājann uttamaujasam āhave kṛtavarmā maheṣvāsaḥ paryavārayad āhave
saṃchinnakārmuko rājan sūtaputreṇa saṃyuge
āśīviṣasamaṃ bāṇam āśu mārutaraṃhasam
dhṛṣṭadyumnaṃ na paśyāma ghaṭamānaṃ mahābalam duḥśāsanena saṃruddhaṃ siṃheneva mahāgajam tataḥ sarathanāgāśvāḥ pāñcālāḥ pāṇḍupūrvaja senāpatiṃ parīpsanto rurudhus tanayaṃ tava
etasminn antare kaṣṭaṃ yuddham āsīd viśāṃ pate
nivāritaḥ śaraśataiḥ kruddhena raṇamūrdhani
ratham anyaṃ samāsthāya jagāma pitur antikam
sārathiṃ preṣayām āsa yamasya sadanaṃ prati

yudhiṣṭhiraṃ jighṛkṣantaḥ sarvasainyam avākṣipan tathābhyarditaṃ sahasābhyadhāvat krodhāgnināsau paridahyamānaḥ anyaṃ rathaṃ samupetyāśu caiva bhīmaṃ pravivyādha sucitrapuṅkhaiḥ duḥśāsano 'dyāpi ca citraseno durdyūtasevī kitavaḥ saubalaś ca

sarathān rathinaḥ sarvān pārthacāpacyutaiḥ śaraiḥ drauṇer apahatān saṃkhye dadṛśuḥ sa ca tāṃ tathā prāvartayan mahāghorāṃ nadīṃ paravahāṃ tathā tayos tu vyākule yuddhe drauṇeḥ pārthasya dāruṇe amaryādaṃ yodhayantaḥ paryadhāvann itas tataḥ rathair hatāśvasūtaiś ca hatārohaiś ca vājibhiḥ dviradaiś ca hatārohair mahāmātrair hatadvipaiḥ pārthena samare rājan kṛto ghoro janakṣayaḥ
arjunaṃ jayatāṃ śreṣṭhaṃ tvarito 'bhyetya vīryavān vidhunvāno mahac cāpaṃ kārtasvaravibhūṣitam
ādāya cikṣepa tadā droṇaputraḥ kirīṭine saṃchādya samare drauṇiṃ cicchedāsya ca cārmukam sa chinnadhanvā parighaṃ vajrasparśasamaṃ yudhi
**** **** jāmbūnadapariṣkṛtam ciccheda sahasā rājan prahasann iva pāṇḍavaḥ

tataḥ kruddho mahārāja droṇaputro mahārathaḥ aindreṇa cāstravegena bībhatsuṃ samavākirat tasyendrajālāvatataṃ samīkṣya pārtho rājan gāṇḍivam ādade saḥ aindraṃ jālaṃ pratyahanat tarasvī varāstram ādāya mahendrasṛṣṭam vidārya taj jālam athendramuktaṃ pārthas tato drauṇirathaṃ kṣaṇena pracchādayām āsa tathābhyupetya drauṇis tadā pārthaśarābhibhūtaḥ vigāhya tāṃ pāṇḍavabāṇavṛṣṭiṃ śaraiḥ paraṃ nāma tataḥ prakāśya śatena kṛṣṇaṃ sahasābhyavidhyat tribhiḥ śatair arjunaṃ kṣudrakāṇām tato 'rjunaḥ sāyakānāṃ śatena guroḥ sutaṃ marmasu nirbibheda aśvāṃś ca sūtaṃ ca tathā dhanur jyām avākirat paśyatāṃ tāvakānām
sa viddhvā marmasu drauṇiṃ pāṇḍavaḥ paravīrahā
tataḥ prahasya bībhatsur droṇaputrasya saṃyuge
śrutvā tu ninadaṃ teṣāṃ vadhyatāṃ karṇasāyakaiḥ
eṣa karṇo raṇe bhāti madhyāhna iva bhāskaraḥ nivartaya rathaṃ kṛṣṇa jīvan bhadrāṇi paśyati
saṃjaya uvāca viśramārthaṃ ca kauravya pāṇḍavasya mahātmanaḥ apayāto raṇād vīro rājānaṃ draṣṭum eva ca alaṃ viṣahituṃ hy eṣa kurūṇāṃ saṃprapadyatām
yāhi yāhīti bahuśo vāsudevam acodayat rājānaṃ prati vārṣṇeya dūyate me dṛḍhaṃ manaḥ sa codyamānaḥ pārthena keśighno vṛṣṇinandanaḥ
rājānaṃ prati vārṣṇeya dūyate me dṛḍhaṃ manaḥ suduṣkaraṃ dhārayāmīti pārthaḥ uvāca nārāyaṇam aprameyaṃ kapidhvajaḥ satyaparākramasya śrutvā vaco bhrātur adīnasattvas tadāhave satyavaco mahātmā
taṃ rathaṃ codayām āsa bībhatsor vacanād dhariḥ
kṣaṇenaiva tu rājānam āsedatur ariṃdamau
ity evam abhisaṃgṛhya ubhau tu prāñjalī sthitau śastrakṣatau mahārāja rudhireṇa samukṣitau nihatya vāhinīṃ tubhyam apayātau raṇājirāt rājānam āsādya parisravad vraṇam
**** **** prītaḥ parapuraṃjayaḥ sa bhūtvā puruṣavyāghrau
samīkṣya senāgranarapravīrau yudhiṣṭhiro vākyam idaṃ babhāṣe tāv āgatau prekṣya mahendrakalpau yudhiṣṭhiro duḥkhaparītacetāḥ kṛcchreṇa rājā pratilabhya saṃjñāṃ tataḥ punaḥ prītamanā babhūva
mukhyaṃ sarvasya lokasya rathinaṃ lokaviśrutam
kṛtaṃ ghoraṃ mahābāho dhṛṣṭadyumnasya paśyataḥ
kṛṣṇagrīvo raktaśirāḥ śvetapakṣo vihaṃgamaḥ sa vai vādhrīṇasaḥ prokto yājñikaiḥ pitṛkarmasu
ditsan nṛṇāṃ śakaṭaṃ ratnapūrṇaṃ kathaṃ tvayāsau nihato 'dya karṇaḥ

kaccid vaco 'sya vitathaṃ tvayā kṛtaṃ yat tat priyām avadat tāta karṇaḥ sabhāmadhye rūkṣam anekarūpaṃ dhik pāṇḍavān apatis tvaṃ hi kṛṣṇe kaccid dhruvaṃ śatrur ayaṃ mahātmā hy adhārayad dvādaśa yaḥ samāstu karṇo vrataṃ ghoram amitrasāho duryodhanasyārthaniviṣṭabuddhiḥ
pādau na dhāve yāvad ahaṃ na hanmi dhanaṃjayaṃ samareṣūgravegam kaccid raṇe phalguna taṃ nihatya kaccid vrataṃ tasya bhagnaṃ tvayādya
mahābalaḥ saṃyuge śatruhantā

anavāpyāṃ prāptum icchann acintyaṃ śiśur yathā candramasaṃ grahītum sa pāpātmā sa tu no vidviṣāṇaḥ kaccit karṇo nihato vā tvayā dhik asmin saṃgrāme bhīmarūpe tvayādya vrataṃ tu bhagnaṃ sūtaputrasya pārtha kaccit pāpaṃ vacanaṃ dyūtakāle yac cāpy asau samitau vāsudevam tadoktavān paruṣaṃ so 'tikāmam hitaṃ caran yaḥ satataṃ kurūṇām kaccit sa karṇo nihato 'dya saṃkhe yo dhārtarāṣṭraṃ paripālayan raṇe ekaḥ sadā śoṣayan māmakaṃ balaṃ sa pāñcālān kekayāṃś caiva sarvān śriyaṃ diditsan dhārtarāṣṭrīṃ sa karṇaḥ kaccin mahyaṃ pratyavadhīs tvam adya atho bhāsāś ca sṛgālāś ca gṛdhrā hatasya māṃsāny uddharanti sma kāyāt
yat tat tvayā saṃśrutaṃ me kirīṭin sabhāmadhye dvairatheneha bhūyaḥ ahaṃ karṇaṃ sūdayiṣye saputraṃ tat karma kṛtvā hy anṛṇo 'si kaccit
bravīhi me durlabham etad adya kathaṃ tvayā nihataḥ sūtaputraḥ anudhyāye tvāṃ satataṃ pravīra vṛtre hate 'sau bhagavān ivendraḥ

droṇaṃ hataṃ pārtha karṇo viditvā bhinnāṃ nāvam ivātyagādhe kurūṇām saṃmuhyamānān dhārtarāṣṭrān viditvā nirutsāhāṃś ca vijaye pareṣām sodaryavat tvarito 'mitaujā uttārayiṣyan dhṛtarāṣṭrasya putrān raṇe rathenādhirathir mahātmā tato hi māṃ tvaritaḥ so 'bhyadhāvat

sa māṃ samāsādya narendra yattaḥ samabhyayāt siṃha iva dvipendraḥ akārṣīc ca rathinām ujjihīrṣāṃ mahārāja vadhyatāṃ kauravāṇām tato raṇe bhārata duṣprakampya ācāryaputraḥ pravaraḥ kurūṇām mām ardayām āsa śitaiḥ pṛṣatkair janārdanaṃ caiva viṣāgnikalpaiḥ aṣṭau gavām aṣṭaśatāni bāṇān mayā prayuddhasya vahanti tasya tāṃs tena muktān aham asya bāṇair vyanāśayaṃ vāyur ivābhrajālam
tasyātataṃ maṇḍalam eva sajyaṃ pradṛśyate kārmukaṃ droṇasūnoḥ dṛṣṭir viṣaṃ cāsukaraṃ pareṣāṃ sarvā diśaḥ pūrayānaṃ śaraughaiḥ alātacakrapratimaṃ mahātmanaḥ sadā nataṃ kārmukaṃ brahmabandhoḥ
kṣaṇāc chvāvitsamarūpo babhūva samārdito madvisṛṣṭaiḥ pṛṣatkaiḥ
sa nirviddho vikṣaran droṇaputro rathānīkaṃ cātirather viveśa mayābhibhūtān svarathaprabarhān astraṃ ca paśyan rudhirapradigdham
yāsyāmi tāṃs tārayiṣyan balaughān diṣṭyā bhavān svastimān pārtha dṛṣṭaḥ
tān adya yāsyāmi raṇād vimoktuṃ sarvātmanā sūtaputraṃ ca hantum rathapravīreṇa mahānubhāva dviṣat sainyaṃ nirdahan vistareṇa
evaṃ gate kiṃ ca mayādya śakyaṃ kāryaṃ kartuṃ nigrahe sūtajasya tathaiva rājñaś ca suyodhanasya ye cāpi māṃ yoddhukāmāḥ sametāḥ

imāṃ ca vasatiṃ prāpto bhayāt karṇena bādhitaḥ ahaṃ tvaṃ bhīmasenaś ca mādrīputrau ca pāṇḍavau vāsudevena sahitā vayaṃ karṇena nirjitāḥ punar eva vanaṃ prāpya tapaścaryāṃ carāmahe atha vā dhārtarāṣṭrāṇāṃ paricaryāṃ carāmahe ity evam uktvā bībhatsuṃ roṣāt saṃraktalocanaḥ abravīt punar evātra dharmarājo yudhiṣṭhiraḥ
anvāsya satyena yad āttha pārtha satyaṃ śapan vāsudevena sārdham taṃ naḥ satyam aphalam akārṣīs tvaṃ phalakāle puṣpavṛkṣaṃ nikṛntaḥ
trayodaśemā hi samāḥ sadā vayaṃ tvām anvajīviṣma dhanaṃjayāśayā kāle varṣaṃ devam ivoptabījaṃ tan naḥ sarvān narake tvaṃ nyamajjayaḥ
apāpīyān vāsavāt kuntijāto bahūn saṃgrāmān ayam eva jetā
daityāṃś ca rakṣāṃsi samāgatāni bhūmiṃ ca sarvān nikhilena jetā
rathe sthitaḥ phālguna keśavas te raśmī samādāya raṇe prayātu jahi tvam adyaiva sametya karṇaṃ caidyaṃ yathā keśavo rājamadhye
dhig gāṇḍivaṃ dhik ca te bāhuvīryam asaṃkhyeyān bāṇagaṇāṃś ca dhik te dhik te ketuḥ kesariṇaḥ sutasya kṛśānudattaṃ ca rathaṃ ca te dhik
prahartum icchase kasmāt kiṃ vā te cittavibhramaḥ
yudhiṣṭhireṇa tenāham uktaś cāsmi janārdana
jātas tvatto hi dharmaś cādharmaś ceti parā śrutiḥ
kuntī vā bharataśreṣṭha draupadī vā yaśasvinī
vivāhakāle ratisaṃprayoge prāṇātyaye sarvadhanāpahāre viprasya cārthe hy anṛtaṃ vadeta pañcānṛtāny āhur apātakāni
bhavet satyam avaktavyaṃ na vaktavyam anuṣṭhitam
iti tān khyāpayām āsa sa tebhyaḥ pārtha kauśikaḥ

yat syād ahiṃsāsaṃyuktaṃ sa dharma iti niścayaḥ ahiṃsārthāya bhūtānāṃ dharmapravacanaṃ kṛtam manvādīnāṃ tu kṛtsnaṃ vai ko dharmaṃ vaktum arhati adharmād eva bhavati dharme 'pi ca mahān yathā vyādhakauśikayor yadvad dharmādharmaviruddhayoḥ vedo mūlaṃ hi dharmāṇām iti santo yad abruvan jijñāsate hi vidyānāṃ sādhanāny eva tattvavit vedaṃ brāhmaṇam āsādya puṇyapāpe paraṃtapa sa tu vetti paraṃ dharmam ahiṃsāṃ vetti bhārata
satye sati na pāpebhyo dhanaṃ deyaṃ kadā cana na tat phalam avāpnoti evam āhur manīṣiṇaḥ
yathādharmaṃ yathābuddhi mayā pārthārthitas tava
dhyātvā nūnaṃ hy enasā cāpi mukto vadhaṃ rājño bhraṣṭavīryo vicetāḥ satyāc cyuto lokam imaṃ tyajeyaṃ tasmāt krodhāt pratikṣapeyaṃ dharmaputram

bhṛśārditaś cāpi mahāmanasvī śarair bhṛśaṃ tāḍito yudhyamānaḥ atas tvam etena saroṣamukto duḥkhānvite nedam ayuktarūpam akopito hy eṣa yadi sma saṃkhye karṇaṃ na hanyād iti cābravīc ca jānāti taṃ pāṇḍava eṣa cāpi pāpaṃ loke karṇam asahyam anyaiḥ tatas tvam ukto bhṛśaroṣitena rājñā samakṣaṃ paruṣāṇi pārtha
yadā mānaṃ labhate mānanārhas tadā sa vai jīvati jīvaloke jīvann ayaṃ yena mṛto bhaved dhi tan me nibodheha tavānurūpam
śṛṇu pārtha yathā nityo hataḥ syād bhavatā guruḥ hato bhavety evam ukto guruḥ śastrabhṛtāṃ varaḥ
avadhena vadhaḥ prokto yad gurus tvam iti prabhuḥ tad brūhi tvaṃ yan mayoktaṃ dharmarājasya dharmavit
mā vocas tvaṃ kiṃ cid ihādya rājaṃs tyaktvā yuddhaṃ ya iha vyavasthitas tvam
kāmbojānām ayuta pārvatīyān mṛgān siṃho vinihatyeva cājau
yo bhīmaseno nihatārisaṃghaḥ sa mām upālabdhum ariṃdamo 'rhati padātisaṃghān bahuśo vimṛdya vīrān hatvā śataśo 'thāpramādī prāṇāṃs tyaktvā dustyajān ājimadhye saṃyuddhe yo vairibhir bhīmasenaḥ
duḥkhaṃ priyaṃ te naradeva kartuṃ yasya priyaṃ te na karomy ahaṃ vai na mucyate vai divi ceha vā pumān yas te mad anyo 'priyam ārabheta

sukhaṃ tvatto nābhijānīma kiṃ cid yatas tvam akṣair devituṃ saṃpravṛttaḥ svayaṃ kṛtvā paruṣaṃ pāṇḍava tvaṃ bhūyas tīkṣṇāḥ śrāvayasy adya vācaḥ śete 'smābhir nihatā śatrusenā chinnair gātrair bhūmitale nadantī tvayā hi tat karma kṛtaṃ nṛśaṃsaṃ yasmād doṣaḥ kauravāṇāṃ vadhaś ca hatā udīcyā nihatāḥ pratīcyā naṣṭāḥ prācyā dākṣiṇātyā viśastāḥ kṛtaṃ karmāpratirūpaṃ mahadbhis teṣāṃ yodhair asmadīyaiś ca yuddhe
samuddadhārāsim udārakarmā nihantum ātmānam amitrasāham

rājānam enaṃ tvam itīdam uktvā kiṃ kaśmalaṃ prāviśaḥ pārtha ghoram tvaṃ cātmānaṃ hantum icchasy arighna nedaṃ sadbhiḥ sevitaṃ vai kirīṭin dharmātmānaṃ bhrātaraṃ jyeṣṭham adya khaḍgena cainaṃ yadi hanyā nṛvīra dharmād bhītas tat kathaṃ nāma te syāt kiṃ cottaraṃ vākariṣyas tvam eva sūkṣmo dharmo durvidaś cāpi pārtha viśeṣato 'jñaiḥ procyamānaṃ nibodha hatvātmānam ātmanā prāpnuyās tvaṃ vadhād bhrātur narakaṃ cātighoram
jaitraṃ rathaṃ bhīmam āsthāya kṛṣṇa prayāva śīghraṃ sūtaputraṃ nihantum rājā bhavatv adya sunirvṛto 'yaṃ karṇaṃ raṇe nāśayitāsmi bāṇaiḥ
satyaṃ vadāmy adya na karṇam ājau śarair ahatvā kavacaṃ vimokṣye sa vrīḍayā namraśirāḥ kirīṭī yudhiṣṭhiraṃ prāñjalir abhyuvāca
dharmarājasya tac chrutvā prītiyuktaṃ vacas tataḥ pārthaṃ provāca dharmātmā govindo yadunandanaḥ
abravīt taṃ maheṣvāsaṃ dharmarājo dhanaṃjayam
hataḥ sūto dhanuś caiva rathaḥ śaktir dhvajaḥ śarāḥ
evam uktas tato rājan pārtho vacanam abravīt

saṃjaya uvāca rathe sthitaḥ phālguna keśavas te raśmīn samādāya raṇe prayātu jahi tvam adyaiva sametya karṇaṃ daityaṃ yathā keśavo rājamadhye prayāhi vṛddhiṃ ca diśantu devatā yathāham icchāmi tavāstu tat tathā prayāhi śīghraṃ jahi karṇam āhave puraṃdaro vṛtra ivātmavṛddhaye
prayātau svo 'dya govinda sūtaputrajighāṃsayā
sajjaṃ nivedayām āsa pāṇḍavasya mahātmanaḥ
upasthitaṃ rathaṃ dṛṣṭvā padmanābho raṇāntakṛt
nimittāni ca śubhrāṇi rutaṃ ca mṛgapakṣiṇām
viṣaṇṇaṃ tu tato jñātvā savyasācinam acyutaḥ saṃcodayati tejasvī madhuhā vānaradhvajam
na hi karṇaṃ raṇe prāpya śakto hi syāt puraṃdaraḥ kṣemī pratyāgamet pārtha tādṛśo 'sya parākramaḥ tvāṃ tu prāpya mahāraṅge yatnavān api bhārata nivarteta raṇāt karṇa iti me dhīyate matiḥ
na bhīṣaye tvāṃ pārthāhaṃ harṣaṃ saṃjanayāmi te
