devair api hi saṃrabdhaiḥ sarvalokeśvarair api aśakyaṃ taṃ raṇe manye sarvair api yuyutsubhiḥ
sadāvajānāti hi pāṇḍuputrān asau darpāt sūtaputro durātmā jānāmi te pārtha vīryaṃ yathāvad durvāraṇīyaṃ ca surāsuraiś ca

khaḍgajihvaṃ dhanurāsyaṃ śaradaṃṣṭraṃ tarasvinam dṛptaṃ puruṣaśārdūlaṃ jahi karṇaṃ dhanaṃjaya ahaṃ tvām anujānāmi vīryeṇa ca balena ca jahi karṇaṃ raṇe śūraṃ mātaṅgam iva kesarī yasya vīryeṇa vīryaṃ te dhārtarāṣṭro 'vamanyate tam adya pārtha saṃgrāme karṇaṃ vaikartanaṃ jahi
māgadhaiḥ pārijātaiś ca dākṣiṇātyaiś ca keralaiḥ
hatvā tu balaniṣpiṣṭau bhīṣmadroṇau mahāraṇe
tvām ṛte puruṣavyāghra jetuṃ śaktaḥ pumān iha
nānādeśasamutthāś ca nānādeśasamudbhavāḥ tvāṃ samāsādya bībhatso hatā nāgāś ca saṃyuge
tena śūreṇa balinā muktās tv ayutaśaḥ śarāḥ protsārayati gāṃgeya iti tasyābhavad vratam nihatya nānānṛpatīn āyudhāny āhave tyajet
padātikoṭisāhasrāḥ pravarāyudhapāṇayaḥ
mṛtyur jāto 'vadhīd bhīṣmaṃ śaraughaiḥ pātayan rathāt
kaś ca śakto raṇe kartuṃ tvad anyaḥ puruṣabruvaḥ
droṇaputraṃ kṛpaṃ śalyaṃ bhojam ādhirathiṃ tathā etāṃs tu vai naravyāghra hatvā vīrān mahārathān
yuddhvā yāmy adya tau pārtha saṃrabdhāv ātatāyinau
vyanāśeya ca yuṣmāsu acarmitaḥ suyodhanaḥ (sic)
sarvatrānṛjur aprājñaḥ karṇam āśritya vai purā
prādravanti sma samare diśo bhītābhimanyave
duryodhanaṃ raṇe dṛṣṭvā lajjamāno muhur muhuḥ nāpayāsīt tataḥ pārthaḥ so 'bhimanyor mahāraṇe dṛṣṭvā droṇaṃ vadhopāyam abhimanyos tu pṛṣṭavān
prāhasat sa tu duṣṭātmā karṇaḥ sa ca suyodhanaḥ

na pāṇḍavāḥ prabhavanti tava kṛṣṇe kathaṃ cana dāsabhāryāsi pāñcāli svayaṃ dāsī ca śobhane adya duryodhano hy ekaḥ pṛthivyāṃ nṛpatiḥ smṛtaḥ sarve cāsya mahīpālā yogakṣemam upāsate paśyedānīṃ yathā bhadre vinaṣṭāḥ pāṇḍavāḥ samam anyonyaṃ samudīkṣante dhārtarāṣṭrasya tejasā vyaktaṃ ṣaṇḍhatilā hy ete narake ca nimajjitāḥ preṣyavac cāpi rājānam upasthāsyanti kauravam

śāntaṃ kuru parikleśaṃ kṛṣṇāyāḥ śatrutāpana hatvā śatruṃ raṇe 'ślāghyaṃ garjantam atipauruṣam adya cādhirathir viddhas tava bāṇaiḥ samantataḥ manyatāṃ tvāṃ naravyāghra pravaraṃ sarvadhanvinām gāṇḍīvaprasṛtān ghorān adya gātraiḥ spṛśañ śarān etu karṇo raṇe pārthaḥ śvāvicchalalito yathā

gāṇḍīvapreṣitair bhallaiḥ śitaiś chinnatanucchadaḥ na cet smarati rādheyo vacanaṃ droṇabhīṣmayoḥ suvarṇapuṅkhāḥ śatrughnā nārācā vaidyutaprabhāḥ na ced ādhirather varma bhittvā pāsyanti śoṇitam ugrās tvadbāhunirmuktā na cen marmacchidaḥ śarāḥ adya karṇaṃ mahāvegāḥ prahiṇvanti yamakṣayam
taṃ ca hāhākṛtaṃ dīnaṃ viṣaṇṇaṃ śarapīḍitam

tac caivādya mahad varma gāṇḍīvapreṣitaiḥ śaraiḥ rathopasthe viśīryeta tārājālam ivāmbarāt āśu cādya śarās tasya saṃpatanto mahāhave tvaccharaiḥ saṃnikṛttāgrā viśīryantāṃ mahītale tvayā cādya hate tasya vikrame bharatarṣabha vimukhāḥ sarvarājāno bhavantu gatajīvitāḥ tathā cādhirathau yāte prayāntu kuravo diśaḥ manvānās tvāṃ rathaśreṣṭhaṃ sarvalokeṣu dhanvinam sa caivādya bhayāt tyaktvā dhārtarāṣṭro mahācamūm duryodhano bhayodvigno dravatu svapuraṃ prati tathādya taṃ hataṃ śrutvā dhārtarāṣṭro janeśvaraḥ mohena nipated bhūmau niḥsaṃjño vai mahīpatiḥ adya jānantu te pārtha vikramaṃ sarvadhanvinaḥ yān avocat sabhāmadhye paruṣān bhārata tvayi
hataṃ karṇaḥ sutaṃ dṛṣṭvā priyaṃ putraṃ durātmavān smaratāṃ droṇabhīṣmābhyāṃ vacaḥ kṣattuś ca mānada
asau hi tāvakān pārtha karṇo nighnati saṃyuge śakratulyabalo vīryāc chaṃkarapratimo 'pi vā
te kathaṃ karṇam āsādya vidraveyur mahābalāḥ yas tv ekaḥ sarvapāñcālān ahany ahani nāśayan kālavac carate vīraḥ pāñcālānāṃ rathavraje tam apy āsādya samare mitrārthe mitravatsalāḥ
ete dravanti pāñcālā drāvyante yodhibhir drutam karṇena bharataśreṣṭha paśya paśya tathākṛtān
tad bhārata maheṣvāsān agādhe majjato 'plave karṇārṇave plavo bhūtvā pāñcālāṃs trātum arhasi
bhramarā iva śatrūṇāṃ pātayānā janān prabho
nirjitā bahuśo yodhāḥ palāyanaparāyaṇāḥ

guṇavantaṃ hi yo hitvā nirguṇaṃ kurute prabhum sa śocati nṛpaḥ kṛṣṇa kṣipram evāgate kṣaye yathā hi puruṣaḥ kaś cic chittvā cāmravaṇaṃ mahat palāśasecane buddhiṃ kṛtvā śocati mandadhīḥ dṛṣṭvā puṣpaṃ phale gṛdhnuḥ phalaṃ dṛṣṭvānuśocati tathedaṃ dhṛtarāṣṭrasya puṣpalubdhasya mānada phalaṃ dṛṣṭvā bhṛśaṃ duḥkhaṃ bhaviṣyati janārdana sūtaputre hate tv adya nirāśo bhavitā prabhuḥ
adya rājyāc ca putrāc ca śriyaś caiva nirāśavān sukhāc ca vipulāt kṛṣṇa dhṛtarāṣṭro viyokṣyati
purā devāsure yuddhe vṛtraṃ balabhidā yathā

adya kuntīsuto rājā hate sūtasute mayā suprahṛṣṭamanāḥ prītaś ciraṃ sukham avāpsyati adya cāham anādhṛṣyaṃ keśavāpratimaṃ śaram utsrakṣyāmīha yaḥ karṇaṃ jīvitād bhraṃśayiṣyati yasya caitad vrataṃ mahyaṃ vadhe kila durātmanaḥ pādau na dhāvaye tāvad yāvad dhanyāṃ na phalgunam mṛṣā kṛtvā vrataṃ tasya pāpasya madhusūdana pātayiṣye rathāt kāyaṃ śaraiḥ saṃnataparvabhiḥ
mayā hastavatā muktā nārācā vaidyutatviṣaḥ
adyāgaḥ pāṇḍuputrāṇāṃ samāptim upayāsyati

haniṣye tasya sainyaṃ tu rathebhāśvapadātimat śarān nānāvidhān muktvā trāsayiṣyāmi śātravān ākarṇamuktair iṣubhir yamarāṣṭravivardhanaiḥ bhūmiśobhāṃ kariṣyāmi pātitai rathakuñjaraiḥ tatrāhave mahatsaṃkhye saṃyate yuddhadurmade
pitrye rājye nirāśaś ca dhārtarāṣṭro janādhipaḥ
dharmarājasya vārṣṇeya saṃśrutya śapathaṃ mithaḥ
ity evam uktvācyutam ekavīraḥ kṣipraṃ ripukṣit kṣatajopamākṣaḥ bhīmaṃ mumukṣuḥ samare prayātaḥ karṇasya kāyāc ca śiro jihīrṣuḥ
dhṛtarāṣṭra uvāca mahābhaye pāṇḍavasṛñjayānāṃ mahābhaye māmakānām agādhe dhanaṃjaye tāta raṇāya yāte babhūva tad yuddham atho nu kīdṛk
bherīninādair mukharāṇy agarjan meghā yathā prāvṛṣi mārutās tāḥ

ekaṃ rathaṃ saṃparivārya mṛtyuṃ nayanty aneke ca rathāḥ sametāḥ ekas tathaikaṃ rathinaṃ rathāgryāṃs tathā rathaś cāpi rathān anekān rathaṃ sasūtaṃ sahayaṃ ca kaṃ cit kaś cid rathī mṛtyuvaśaṃ nināya nināya cāpy ekagajena kaś cid rathān bahūn mṛtyuvaśe tathāśvān
nināya pārtho balagarvitākṣo yathāntakaḥ sarvaharo mahaujāḥ
vyāttānanaḥ krūra ivāntakābhaḥ samāsadad bhārata bhīmasenam
pāñcālarājasya sutas tarasvī cakre śikhaṇḍī virathaṃ kṛpaṃ vai
tad viprakīrṇaṃ tv atha bhārataṃ balaṃ punaś ca bhīmaṃ parivārayad raṇe
tvara tvara hy adya viśoka śīghram etān dhvajāgrāṃś ca rathāṃś ca paśya

kati vā sahasrāṇi kati vā śatāni hy ācakṣva me sārathe kṣipram eva sarvaṃ viditvaivam ahaṃ vadāmi tavārthasiddhipradam adya vīra kaikeyakāmbhojasurāṣṭrabāhlikā mlecchāś ca suhmāḥ parataṅkaṇāś ca madrāś ca vaṅgā magadhāḥ kuṇindā ānartakāvartakāḥ pārvatīyāḥ sarve gṛhītapravarāyudhās tvāṃ saṃveṣṭya saṃveṣṭya tato vineduḥ rathe tavāsmin niśitāḥ supītās tato bhallā dvādaśa vai sahasrāḥ
vatsadantānāṃ daśa karṇināṃ ca ardhacandrā dvādaśa ṣaṭśataṃ ca vipāṭhānāṃ pravarāṇāṃ ca sapta śilīmukhānāṃ daśa ca triṃśataṃ ca ayomukhānāṃ kṣudrakāṇāṃ ca triṃśat
śatrūñ jayasvāśusahasravīra mā bhaiṣīs tvaṃ saṃkṣayād āyudhānām
adyaiva nūnaṃ kathayantu siddhāṃ mama pratijñāṃ sarvaloke viśoka na mokṣyate vā samare bhīmasena ekaḥ śatrūn samare vāpy ajaiṣīt āśaṃsitānām idam ekam astu tan me devāḥ sakalaṃ sādhayantu
paśyasva paśyasva viśoka me balaṃ balaṃ pareṣām abhitaś ca bhinnam nānāsvarān paśya vimucya sarve tathā dravante balino dhārtarāṣṭrāḥ
dhanaṃjayo nūnam āyāti sūta tasmād eṣā dīryate bhāratī camūḥ
dodhūyamānasya dhanaṃjayena visphāritaṃ gāṇḍivasyātighoram kruddhena pārthena vikṛṣyato 'dya kaccin nemau tava karṇau vinaṣṭau
vitrāsayan dvipasaṃghān vimarde bibhemy asmād ātmanaivābhivīkṣya vibhrājate cātimātraṃ kirīṭaṃ vicitram etac ca dhanaṃjayasya
pārśve sthitaṃ pārtha dhanaṃjayasya divyaṃ śaṅkhaṃ pāñcajanyaṃ ca paśya
savidyutaś caiva ghanasya śabdaṃ viṣphāryato dhanuṣo gāṇḍivasya dhanaṃjayenābhipannasya kāle śabdo ghoraḥ śrūyate tasya nāsmin kaccic chrotāho badhiro 'si pārtha
jayatu bhuvanabhartā dharmavid dharmarājo diśatu śivam idānīṃ keśavaḥ pāṇḍavebhyaḥ vipulavijayavājī jṛmbhatāṃ vai kirīṭī ripukulavanadāhau mādriputrau bhavetām
trailokanāthasya ca cakrapāṇeḥ
davāgnidagdhair iva vaṃśadagdhaiḥ

śaktibhis tomarair bāṇaiḥ kuṇapaiḥ kuramudgaraiḥ śūlais trimūlaiḥ parighair bhiṇḍipālaiḥ paraśvadhaiḥ karanālair gaḍaiḥ khaḍgair iṣṭibhir muśalais tathā parighaiḥ paṭṭiśaiś caiva gadābhiś ca paraśvadhaiḥ mahāyodhanaraiḥ kṣiptaiḥ saśarkarajapāṃśubhiḥ saśakrāśanisaṃpātaṃ jālaiḥ pāśaiḥ kaḍaṃgaraiḥ pradīptaśikharāvarṣaiḥ śilābhiḥ kāṣṭhaśaṃkubhiḥ mahārṣṭikābhiḥ kāntābhir ayaskāntair vināśinaiḥ praduṣṭacakrebhahayaiḥ sasaṃghair gūḍham āyudhaiḥ śibirād ekam āyāntam arjunaṃ sahakeśavam nānādeśyā nṛpavarā mlecchāś cāyutaśo 'bhyayuḥ
tasyābhidravataḥ karṇaṃ rathaghoṣo mahān abhūt

rathaṃ rathenābhyahanat turagāṃs turagais tathā gajān gajair naravarān narair evānayat kṣayam kaṃ cid gajaṃ samutkṣipya gajaṃ bhīmo 'bhyadhāvata mahauṣadhisamāyuktaṃ hanumān iva parvatam sa tu tenāhanat kruddho giriṇeva mahāgirim kasya cid dantam utpāṭya dantenaivāhanad gajam yathairāvatam āsādya kumbhakarṇaḥ purā raṇe gajau saṃgṛhya pāṇibhyāṃ saṃnipātair amārayat rathān hayān nṛpavarān āviṣṭa iva pāṇḍavaḥ
tasmin raṇe mahārāja maheṣvāsā narās tathā
pariveṣī yathā somaḥ paripūrṇo virājate
haṃsacchatradhvajopetām uṣṇīṣavaraphenilām hārapadmākarāṃ caiva bhūmireṇūrmimālinīm āryavṛttavatīṃ saṃkhye sutarāṃ bhīrudustarām
tathā prāvartayad bhīmo vīrayodhāpahāriṇīm
tato hṛṣṭo mahārāja tava putro mahīpatiḥ sādhu sādhu mahābāho jahi bhīmaṃ śitaiḥ śaraiḥ ayam eva suduṣṭātmā sarvadāsmān prabādhate mardayainaṃ mahābāho vinihatya sukhī bhava
bhīmo 'pi paramāmarṣī tāṃ śaktiṃ saṃnivārya ca mumoca śaravarṣāṇi śakuneḥ sarvamarmasu saubalaḥ so 'pi duṣṭātmā bhīmasenaśarārditaḥ papāta ca rathopasthe paśyatāṃ sarvabhūbhṛtām
agādhe majjatāṃ teṣāṃ karṇo dvīpo 'bhavat tadā
yad ekaḥ samare sarvān yodhamāyāsa māmakān
sarveṣāṃ kuruyaudhānāṃ karṇo vai śatrusūdanaḥ
sahadevasya bhallena dhvajaṃ ciccheda māriṣa
**** **** yatamānān mahārathān yodhayām āsa samare
samardayañ charais tīkṣṇaiḥ pāñcālānāṃ pravāhinīm
pāñcālānāṃ rathaśreṣṭhān drāvayañ chātravāṃs tathā
hatvā tu phalgunaḥ sainyaṃ kauravāṇāṃ pṛthak pṛthak sūtaputrasya saṃrambhaṃ dṛṣṭvā cāpi mahāhave

manuṣyaśīrṣapāṣāṇāṃ hastyaśvakṛtarodhasam śūrāsthicayasaṃkīrṇāṃ kākagṛdhrānunāditām chatrahaṃsaplavopetāṃ vīravṛkṣāpahāriṇīm hārapadmākaravatīm uṣṇīṣavaraphenilām dhanuḥśaradhvajopetāṃ narakṣudrakapālinīm carmavarmabhramopetāṃ rathoḍupasamākulām jayaiṣiṇāṃ ca sutarāṃ bhīrūṇāṃ ca sudustarām tāṃ nadīṃ prāpayitvā tu bībhatsuḥ paravīrahā
evam uktas tu pārthena kṛṣṇo rājaṃs tvarānvitaḥ
sa prayāto rathenāśu kṛṣṇo rājan mahāhave
rathaghoṣas tatas tasya pāṇḍavasya babhūva ha vāsavāstranipātena parvateṣv iva māriṣa

ghṛṇāṃ tyaktvā prasādaṃ ca bhṛgor astraṃ ca saṃsmaran dṛṣṭiṃ muṣṭiṃ ca saṃdhānaṃ smṛtvā rāmopadeśajam dhanaṃjayaṃ jaye prepsuḥ pratyudgamya mahārathān vājividyāparijñāne na me yuddhe bale hariḥ na māṃ vijeṣyate karṇa gadāyuddhe viśeṣataḥ
yo 'rjunaṃ sāgaraughābhaṃ kruddhaṃ veleva vārayet
savyasācinam āyāntaṃ nivāraya mahāraṇe
yathaikena tvayā pūrvaṃ kṛto digvijayo mahān kaliṅgādhipatiṃ jitvā tavānītā tadantare duryodhanasya mahiṣī jarāsaṃdhaṃ vijitya ca tad eva sattvam ālambya jahi pārthaṃ dhanaṃjayam
śalya uvāca ajayyam enaṃ pravadanti yuddhe mahārathāḥ karṇa rathapravīram ekākinaṃ kim u kṛṣṇābhiguptaṃ vijetum enaṃ ka ihotsaheta
adyāhaṃ taṃ nihaniṣyāmi saṃkhye dhanaṃjayaṃ paśyatas te samṛddham
rathān varān eti rathapravīraḥ śīghrair hayaiḥ kauravarājaputraḥ sa cādya māṃ neṣyati kṣipram antaṃ karṇo 'syānte 'py atra bhavet samarthaḥ
atīvānyān dhanuṣā rājaputras tv atīvānyān keśavaś cakrayuddhe te krośamātre nipatanty amoghā na pāṇḍavasya sadṛśo 'sti kaś cit
tam āhvayan sāhasam uttamaṃ vai jāne svayaṃ sarvalokasya śalya

asmin muhūrte nihatau paśya kṛṣṇau tābhyāṃ hataṃ vā yudhi māṃ ripubhyām tāv ubhau puruṣavyāghrau samāne syandane sthitau mām ekam abhiyoddhārau sujātaṃ bata śalya me bhagāṃśamitrāvaruṇāśvinau vā marudgaṇā vā vasavaḥ sahendrāḥ vyastāḥ samastāś ca yudhā na śaktā jetuṃ prasahyārjunam acyutaṃ ca
asmin muhūrte nihatau paśya kṛṣṇau mayā hataṃ vā yudhi mām aribhyām evaṃ bruvāṇaḥ sahasā mahārathas tv abhyadravat pāṇḍavaṃ sūtaputraḥ
śaraiś ca jaghnur yudhi taṃ mahārathā dhanaṃjayaṃ karṇanideśakāriṇaḥ
na saṃdadhan naiva samuddharañ śarān na cābhimuñcann aribhiḥ sa dṛśyate

śarottamān sa prahitān mahārathaiś ciccheda pārthaḥ prahasañ śaraughaiḥ bhūyaś ca tān ahanad bāṇasaṃghān gāṇḍīvadhanvāyatapūrṇamaṇḍalam yathograraśmiḥ śuciśukramadhyagaḥ sukhaṃ vivasvān harate jalaughān tathārjuno bāṇagaṇān nirasya dadāha senāṃ tava pārthivendra
jighāṃsavaḥ pātham asahyavikramaṃ yathaiva vahniṃ śalabhā mahārciṣam
sa droṇaputrasya śarāsanaṃ balī bhallena saṃchidya ca tad vyapātayat
samārpayad bāhusahasravikramas tathā yathā vajradharaḥ purā baleḥ sa pārthabāṇair vinipātitāyudho dhvajāvamarde ca kṛte mahāhave kṛtaḥ kṛpo bāṇasahasrayantrito yathāpageyaḥ prathamaṃ kirīṭinā
śarāndhakāraṃ ca kṛtaṃ mahātmabhis tadā diśo na prababhuḥ śarārditāḥ
saṃchinnabhinnavidhvastair vyaṅgāṅgāvayavaiḥ stṛtā sudurgamā suviṣamā ghorātyarthaṃ sudurdṛśā
sasūtair hatasūtaiś ca sādihīnaiś ca vājibhiḥ īṣācakrākṣabhagnaiś ca rathaiḥ stīrṇā vasuṃdharā
samantāj jaladaprakhyān vāraṇān madavarṣiṇaḥ
niyuktān hi sa tān mene yamāyāśu kirīṭinā
kṛtvā saṃśaptakā ghorāñ śapathān brāhmalaukikān
kṣipram evābhisaṃkruddhāḥ samare 'rijighāṃsayā
nardantaḥ kūjamānāś ca manuṣyagajavājinaḥ
asaṃyuktāś ca te rājan parivṛttā raṇaṃ prati narā nāgā rathāś caiva nadanto 'rjunam abhyayuḥ
gadāpāṇiṃ tadā bhīmaṃ dṛṣṭvā bhārata bhāratāḥ menire tam anuprāptaṃ daṇḍahastam ivāntakam
gajān aśvān hayārohān uddiśyoddiśya bhārata
kṣaṇena bhīmaḥ saṃkruddhas tān ninye vai yamakṣayam
narāśvarathamātaṅgā yudhi gāṇḍīvadhanvanā śaravrātaiś citā rejuḥ kadambā iva kesaraiḥ
kurūṇāṃ tu mahārāja āsīd ārtasvaro mahān narāśvanāgāsuharān dṛṣṭvā bāṇān kirīṭinaḥ
tataḥ śaradhvastam abhūt kurūṇāṃ sumahad balam na tatrāsīd anirbhinno ratho vājī naro gajaḥ
tat sainyaṃ bharataśreṣṭha vadhyamānaṃ śitaiḥ śaraiḥ na jahau samaraṃ prāpya phalgunaṃ śatrutāpanam tatrādbhutam apaśyāma kauravāṇāṃ parākramam vadhyamānāpi yat pārthaṃ na jahuḥ samare prabho
saṃcintayitvā pārthasya vadhe dadhre manaḥ śvasan visphārya sumahac cāpaṃ tataś cādhirathir vṛṣaḥ
śaraughaiś chādayām āsa mahāmegha ivācalam
pāñcālānāṃ harat prāṇāṃs tamāṃsīva tamonudaḥ
tato 'pare bhārata duṣprakampyāḥ pāñcālānāṃ rathasaṃghāḥ sametāḥ pratiśrutā hy antarikṣe gatābhā dhanuḥpravīrās tu rathapravīrāḥ
prītāḥ śukāḥ prādravann antarikṣe guhā girīṇām apatan vayāṃsi yan maṇḍalajyena vijṛmbhamāṇo raudre muhūrte 'bhyapatat kirīṭī
teṣāṃ dhvajān vājisūtān patākās tūṇīr dhanūṃṣi pracakarta bāṇaiḥ
sa tena nirbhinnatanur vṛkodaro nipātitaḥ srastatanur gatāsuvat prasārya bāhū rathavaryam āśritaḥ punaś ca saṃjñām upalabhya cānadat
sa tat kṛtvā rājaputras tarasvī vivyādha bhīmaṃ navabhiḥ pṛṣatkaiḥ

bhīmo 'pi vegād avatīrya yānād duḥśāsanaṃ vegavān abhyadhāvat nādena tenākhilapārśvavartino mūrchākulāḥ patitās tv ājamīḍha sa samīpasthito bhīmo visajñaṃ vīkṣya te sutam cakāra khedaṃ manasā cintāṃ ca paramāṃ yayau acetanasya rudhiraṃ kathaṃ pāsyāmy ahaṃ ripoḥ ajānato 'sya pāpasya durmater mitraghātinaḥ evaṃ vicintayad bhīmo dadarśātha vicetanam vastreṇāvījayac cainaṃ tena saṃjñām avāpa ha dṛṣṭvā sasaṃjñaṃ sāvajñaṃ pādenākramya vakṣasi prahṛṣṭarūpo bhīmas tu sāsīḥ provāca taṃ tadā

bhīmaḥ draupadyās tu kacagrāhe yaḥ prayuktas tvayā karaḥ diśyatāṃ ca sa me pāpin kaṃ tam utpāṭayāmy aham ayaṃ karikarākāraḥ kāminīkucamardanaḥ gosahasrapradātā ca kṣatriyāntakaraḥ karaḥ etac chrutvā tu vacanaṃ bhīmaseno 'tyamarṣaṇaḥ utpāṭayām āsa bhujaṃ vāmetaram ariṃdama śrutvā tu tad bhīmavacaḥ sughoraṃ duḥśāsano bhīmam idaṃ nirīkṣya uvāca bhīmaṃ sa tadā smitena saṃpaśyatāṃ kauravasomakānām sa eṣa me bāhuvaro 'stu bhūya eṣa tvayā rājyaharaḥ samīkṣya dyūtacchalād vañcayitā sametāṃ kliṣṭām āryāṃ paśyatas te tv anena asau karo godhanavān samartho viṣasya dātā bhujagendrakalpaḥ bhikṣābhujo yena kṛtāḥ samastā aṣṭādaśa dvā ca kuruṣva yatnam
tato nipātyāsya śiro 'pahṛtya tenāsinā tava putrasya rājan satyāṃ cikīrṣur matiman pratijñāṃ bhīmo 'pibac choṇitam asya koṣṇam
tathekṣusārasya manoharasya sudhāmṛtasvādurasāni tebhyaḥ
saṃjayaḥ sa pītvā rudhiraṃ tasya caraṇau gṛhya bhārata
ity uccair vacanaṃ prāha pratinṛtya vṛkodaraḥ
śakuner dhārtarāṣṭrasya rādheyasya ca mantrite anubhūtāni duḥkhāni teṣāṃ hetus tvam eva hi
sukhāny etāni jānīmo labdhavanto na saṃśayaḥ

brūhīdānīṃ pāpamate nṛśaṃsa apatir hy asi drupadasyātmajā tvam vibhīṣayānas tava putrasainyam itas tato dhāvati vāhinīṃ te tataḥ kṣaṇād bhārata śūnyam āsīd āyodhanaṃ ghorataraṃ kurūṇām yatrājimadhye prāpibad bhīmaseno duḥśāsanasya rudhiraṃ krodhadīptaḥ sa hatvā samare rājan rājaputraṃ mahābalam pūrṇakāmo madodagraḥ siṃho rurum ivotkaṭam rudhirārdro mahārāja hy aśobhata paraṃtapaḥ sapuṣpaḥ kiṃśuka iva raktād raktataro babhau rudhirārdravapur ghoraḥ kruddho rājan vaco 'bravīt
dṛṣṭvā tu nṛtyantam udagrarūpaṃ kālaṃ yathā tv antakāle prajānām mahad bhayaṃ cādhirathiṃ viveśa jaye nirāśāś ca sutās tvadīyāḥ
tataḥ parivṛto rājan navabhiḥ śatrutāpanaiḥ duḥśāsanād avarajaiḥ putrais tava vṛkodaraḥ
bhīmaṃ samāyāntam amitrasāham bāṇaiḥ kirantaṃ pratiyātya cograṃ vyāttānanaṃ kālam ivāpatantam
śarābhighātāc ca ruṣā ca rājan svayaṃ ca bhāsāstrasamīraṇāc ca jajvāla karṇasya suto 'timātram iddho yathā jyāhutibhir hutāśaḥ
jaghāna cāśvān nakulasya vīro raṇājire sūtaputrasya putraḥ
tato 'sya pakṣān anayad yamāya dvisāhasrān nakulaḥ kṣiprakārī
mahābhaye rakṣyamāṇo mahātmā bhrātrā bhīmenākarot tatra bhīmam
sa tena viddho 'tibhṛśaṃ tarasvī mahāhave vṛṣasenena rājan

vitatya pakṣau sahasā patantaṃ śyenaṃ yathaivāmiṣalubdham ājau avākirad vṛṣasenas tatas taṃ śitaiḥ śarair nakulam udāravīryam sa tān moghāṃs tasya kurvañ śaraughāṃś cacāra mārgān nakulaś citrarūpān athāsya tūrṇaṃ carato narendra khaḍgena citraṃ nakulasya tasya
kṛtvā tu tad duṣkaram āryajuṣṭaṃ narair anyaiḥ karma raṇe mahātmā yayau rathaṃ bhīmasenasya rājañ śarābhitapto nakulo mahātmā
sa bhīmasenasya rathaṃ ca hatvā vavarṣa vai śaravarṣaṃ sughoram
kuṇindarājasya suto 'paras tadā dvipena devāpṛthu[daivāvṛdha?]m abhyapīḍayat vṛkeṇa bāṇābhihato 'patat kṣitau sa vāraṇo babhrusutena sārdham
nināya vaivasvatamandiraṃ raṇe
mādrīsutaṃ nakulaṃ lokamadhye samīkṣya kṛṣṇaṃ bhṛśavikṣataṃ ca
tau tatra śūrau rathakuñjarau raṇe parasparasyābhimukhau mahārathau sasarjatuḥ śarasaṃghān anekān saṃbhrāntarūpau subhṛśaṃ tadānīm
pūrvaṃ tathā vṛṣasenena viddho mahājavaiḥ śvetahayaḥ śarais taiḥ saṃrambham īṣad gamito vadhāya karṇātmajasyātha manaḥ pradadhre
śiraḥ karau caiva dhanuś ca pārtha ekeṣuṇā vṛṣasenasya saṃkhye ciccheda pārtho hy aṅgarājasya sainyaṃ kopāgninā caturaṅgaṃ dadāha
rathau caturbhir jaladair bhagamitrāv ivāmbare
rādheyam abhito dadhmuḥ śaṅkhāñ śatasahasraśaḥ
kṛṣṇaśalyarathopetau tulyarūpau mahārathau siṃhaskandhau siṃhabhujau raktākṣau hemamālinau cāpavidyuddhvajopetau śastrasaṃpattiśobhinau camaravyajanopetau śvetacchattrābhiśobhinau
siṃhaskandhapratīkāśau vyūḍhoraskau mahābalau anyonyaspardhinau rājann anyonyasya vadhaiṣiṇau anyonyam abhidhāvantau goṣṭheṣv iva maharṣabhau prabhinnāv iva mātaṅgau saṃrabdhāv iva cācalau
tau dṛṣṭvā puruṣavyāghrau śārdūlāv iva vegitau babhūva paramo harṣas tāvakānāṃ viśāṃ pate saṃśayaḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ vijaye samapadyata
ubhāv astrabhṛtāṃ śreṣṭhāv ubhau siṃhaparākramau

yamau ca cekitānaś ca prahṛṣṭāś ca prabhadrakāḥ nānādeśyāś ca ye śūrāḥ śiṣṭā yuddhābhinandinaḥ te sarve sahitā hṛṣṭāḥ parivavrur dhanaṃjayam rirakṣiṣantaḥ śatrughnāḥ patyaśvarathakuñjaraiḥ dhanaṃjayasya vijaye dhṛtāḥ karṇavadhe 'pi ca tathaiva tāvakāḥ sarve yattāḥ senāprahāriṇaḥ duryodhanamukhā rājan karṇaṃ jugupur āhave
**** **** hṛṣṭarūpāḥ samantataḥ munayaś cāraṇāḥ siddhāḥ
maṅgaḷyāḥ paśavaś caiva siṃhavyāghrās tathaiva ca
agni(gnī ?) rudraś ca somaś ca yamo vaiśravaṇas tadā mṛgāś ca paśavaś caiva siṃhavyāghrās tathaiva ca vasavaś ca mahendreṇa marutaś ca sahāgninā
brahma kṣatraṃ ca yajñāś ca dakṣiṇāś cārjunaṃ śritāḥ asurā yātudhānāś ca kravyādāś ca mṛgāṇḍajāḥ rākṣasāḥ saha yādobhiḥ śvasṛgālāś ca karṇataḥ
devarṣibrahmarṣigaṇāḥ sarve ca khacarāś ca ye

tataḥ prajāpatis tūrṇam ājagāma mahīpate dvairathaṃ yudhi taṃ draṣṭuṃ karṇapāṇḍavayos tadā vijitya karṇaḥ svid imāṃ vasuṃdharām athārjunaḥ svit pratipadyate 'khilām itīśvarasyāpi babhūva saṃśayaḥ prajāpateḥ prekṣya tayor mahad balam prajāpatis tu taṃ dṛṣṭvā devabhāgaṃ samāgatam abravīt tu tato rājan paśyato vai svayaṃbhuvaḥ ubhāv atirathau śūrāv ubhau dṛḍhaparākramau ubhau sadṛśakarmāṇau vajricakrāyudhopamau aho bata mahad yuddhaṃ karṇārjunasamāgame bhaviṣyati mahāghoraṃ vṛtravāsavayor iva rathayūthapayoḥ pakṣau kurupāṇḍavavīrayoḥ
ko 'nayor vijayī deva kurupāṇḍavayodhayoḥ
svayaṃbho brūhi nas tathyam etayor vijayaṃ prabho

evam uktas tu bhagavāñ jaye tābhyām aniścite ity abravīn mahārāja mahān brahmā prajāpatiḥ dvāv apy etau hi kṛtinau dvāv apy atibalotkaṭau bhaviṣyaty anayor yuddhaṃ trailokyasya bhayāvaham tataḥ prajāpatiṃ tatra sahasrākṣo 'bhyacodayat

yasya cakre svayaṃ viṣṇuḥ sārathyaṃ jagataḥ prabhuḥ svargaṃ ca samanuprāpya sāhāyyaṃ śakra te kṛtam karṇaś ca dānavaḥ pakṣa ataḥ kāryaḥ parājayaḥ evaṃ kṛte bhavet kāryaṃ devānām eva niścitam ātmakāryaṃ ca sarveṣāṃ garīyas tridaśeśvara mahātmā phalgunaś cāpi satyadharmarataḥ sadā vijayas tasya niyataṃ jāyate nātra saṃśayaḥ toṣito bhagavān yena mahātmā vṛṣabhadhvajaḥ kathaṃ vā tasya na jayo jāyate śatalocana
pārthaḥ sarvaguṇopeto devakāryam idaṃ yataḥ kliśyante pāṇḍavā nityaṃ vanavāsādibhir bhṛśam saṃpannas tapasā caiva paryāptaḥ puruṣarṣabhaḥ
naitayos tu samaḥ kaś cid divi vā mānuṣeṣu vā anugamya trayo lokāḥ saha devarṣicāraṇaiḥ sarvadevagaṇāś cāpi sarvabhūtāni yāni ca anayos tu prabhāvena vartate nikhilaṃ jagat

kleśito hi vane pārtho dīrghakālaṃ pitāmaha tasmād eṣa jayed yuddhe tapasābhyadhiko 'rjunaḥ pūrvaṃ bhagavatā proktaḥ kṛṣṇayor vijayo dhruvaḥ tat tathāstu namaste 'stu prabho brūhi pitāmaha tat sahasrākṣavacanaṃ niśamya bhagavān prabhuḥ novāca taj jayaṃ tulyaṃ tayoḥ karṇakirīṭinoḥ tasmād āśāṃ gataḥ śakras tūṣṇīṃbhūte pitāmahe vijayaṃ pāṇḍaveyasya vadhaṃ karṇasya cāhave
nocus tadā jayaṃ tulyaṃ tayoḥ puruṣasiṃhayoḥ
vismayotphullanayanā nānyā bubudhire kriyāḥ
rāhuketū yathākāśe uditau jagataḥ kṣaye
hayā hayān abhyaheṣan spardhamānāḥ parasparam
uvāca praṇayād rājan sāmapūrvam idaṃ vacaḥ
hate tvayi hy ahaṃ hanyām ubhau kṛṣṇadhanaṃjayau
saṃcūrṇitam ivāmarde pādapaṃ paśya dantinā adya rādheyabhāryāṇāṃ vaidhavyaṃ samupasthitam dhruvaṃ svapneṣv aniṣṭāni tābhir dṛṣṭāni mādhava dhruvam adyaiva draṣṭāsi vidhavāḥ karṇayoṣitaḥ
diṣṭyā jayasi vārṣṇeya iti karṇe nipātite
babhūva yuddhaṃ kurupāṇḍavānāṃ yathā surāṇām asuraiḥ sahābhavat
virejatus tau puruṣarṣabhau tadā
te pañca vīrāḥ satataṃ hatā[yā]rathāḥ nikṛttadehārjunabāṇavegaiḥ pradudruvus tatra padātayo bhṛśaṃ ruruha[hū] rathānyeṣu punar yayuś ca tam
tadā sa teṣāṃ yudhi savyasācī kṣuraiḥ praciccheda dhanaṃjayaś ca nāgān hayān rathasūtāṃś ca tatra śirāṃsi teṣām iṣubhiḥ kirīṭī dhanaṃjaye yudhyamāne ca tatra kṣaṇena sarvaṃ kṣayam āviveśa
aho 'rjunenaiva kṛtaṃ mahattaraṃ yad ekavīro yuyudhe mahārathān samīkṣya devāś ca nṛrājamukhyā[ḥ] śaśaṃsu[ḥ] kṛṣṇārjunayor mahad yaśaḥ
na ced dhataṃ śroṣyasi caiva karṇaṃ mahābalaṃ pārthiva sūtaputram vihāya rājyaṃ tv akhilaṃ samastaṃ gantāsi karṇasya pathaṃ vicitram
na cātitīvraṃ pitṛvairam udyataṃ nihantum ugre ripum ulbaṇaṃ yudhi tathāpi tat pathyahitaṃ na cecchataḥ prakāśitaṃ sādhur ihādya pāṇḍavaiḥ

ity evam ukto gurusūnunā kathaṃ sa me sthitaś caiva tathaiva durmanāḥ sakhe tvam evādya kathaṃ pravaktā pārthasya pakṣād yudhi jātaharṣāt vimuktabāhuḥ prahasan sudurbalo duryodhano durgatikālacoditaḥ vṛkodaraṃ hanmi sabāndhavaṃ raṇe kathaṃ bibhemi prayato mahāmṛdhe yuddhāntam ācchādya suyodhanādya karṇasya putrāvadhi mā vyanīnaśaḥ na śroṣyasi tvaṃ yadi me mahāratha tathā hataṃ drakṣyasi pāṇḍavair balam athārjunaṃ kālasamaprabhāvaṃ kathaṃ na draṣṭāsi raṇe carantam tejasvinām adya raviṃ mahāprabhaṃ kathaṃ varāstraṃ samare na paśyasi tvayi pranaṣṭe naravīrasatkṛto bhoktā hi rājyaṃ bhuvi dharmasūnuḥ
ko 'nyo 'sti me duḥkhasakhaḥ sadaiva muktvā bhavantaṃ mama caikavīram
na cāpi karṇaṃ prasahed raṇe 'rjuno mahāgiriṃ merum ivogramārutaḥ na cāśvasiṣyanti pṛthātmajā mayi prasahya vairaṃ bahuśo vicintya

vasuṃdharāyāḥ parivartanaṃ bhaved vrajec ca śoṣaṃ makarālayo 'rṇavaḥ plaveyur apy adrivarā mahāmbudhau na cārjuno jeṣyati karṇam āhave apāṃ pṛthivyā nabhaso nabhasvataḥ sutigmadīpteś ca hiraṇyaretasaḥ abhāva eṣām api sarvato bhaven na cārjuno jeṣyati karṇam āhave
āśīviṣāv agnim ivotsṛjantau vairaṃ mukhābhyām abhiniśvasantau yaśasvinau jajvalatur mṛdhe tadā ghṛtāvasiktāv iva havyavāhau
śarāstraśaktyṛṣṭigadāsisarpau roṣānilodbhūtamahormimālau yathācalau cācalatas tathā tau yathārṇavau cāyayatur yugānte
mahāmahīdhrāv iva pakṣavantau
tataḥ kurūṇām atha somakānāṃ śabdo mahān prādurabhūt samantāt yadārjunaṃ sūtaputro 'parāhṇe mahāhave śailam ivāmbudo 'rchat tathaiva cāsīd rathayoḥ samāgamo mahāraṇe śoṇitamāṃsakardame

punaś ca karṇas tvarito 'tha pārthaṃ ratheṣubhis taṃ daśabhir jaghāna taṃ cāpi pārtho daśabhiḥ śitāgraiḥ kakṣyāntare tīkṣṇamukhair avidhyat karṇas tato bhārata sāṃparāye ghore 'tivelaṃ raṇasaṃvimardī jaghāna pārthaṃ navabhiḥ śitāgraiḥ kakṣyāntare nāgam iva prabhinnam tato 'parābhyāṃ yudhi sūtaputro dvābhyāṃ kṣurābhyāṃ harim āśukārī samājaghāna tvarayā mahātmā yathā surendraṃ namuciḥ prasahya taṃ pāṇḍavaḥ pañcabhir āyasāgrair ākarṇapūrṇair nijaghāna karṇam te śoṇitaṃ tasya papus tadānīṃ kālasya dūtā iva pārthabāṇāḥ karṇo 'pi pārthaṃ sahavāsudevaṃ samācinod bhārata vatsadantaiḥ

pārthāstram astreṇa nihatya tena jaghāna karṇo nṛgajāśvasaṃghān amṛṣyamāṇas tu mahāvimarde mahāratho bhārgavāstraprabhāvāt pāñcālānāṃ pravarāṃś cāpi yodhān krodhāviṣṭaḥ sūtaputras tarasvī bāṇair vivyādhāhave supramuktaiḥ prahasya kṛṣṇau tu narapravīraḥ tataḥ pāñcālāḥ somakāś cāpi rājan karṇenājau pīḍyamānāḥ śaraughaiḥ krodhāviṣṭā vivyadhus taṃ samantāt tīkṣṇair bāṇaiḥ sūtaputraṃ sametāḥ tān astāṃs taiḥ sa nikṛtyāśu bāṇān pāñcālānāṃ rathanāgāśvasaṃghān abhyardayad bāṇagaṇaiḥ prasahya vikṣobhayan samare sūtaputraḥ te bhinnadehā vyasavo nipetuḥ karṇeṣubhir bhūmitale svanantaḥ kruddhena siṃhena yathaiva nāgā mahābalā bhīmabalena tadvat pāñcālānāṃ pravarān saṃnihatya praspardhamānān balino yodhamukhyān tataḥ sa rājan virarāja karṇaḥ śarān vaman megha ivāmbudhārāḥ karṇasya matvā tu jayaṃ tvadīyāḥ parāṃ mudaṃ siṃhanādāṃś ca cakruḥ sarve hy amanyanta vaśe kṛtau tau karṇena kṛṣṇāv iti kauravendra tat tādṛśaṃ prekṣya mahārathasya karṇasya vīryaṃ ca parair asahyam dṛṣṭvā tu karṇena dhanaṃjayasya saṃgrāmamadhye nihataṃ tad astram
pūrvaṃ daityair ajitaṃ kālakeyaiḥ sākṣāt sthāṇor bāhusaṃsparśam etya pāñcālānāṃ yodhamukhyān anekān nijaghnivāṃs tava jiṣṇo samakṣam
sametya pārthaṃ sa nṛśaṃsavādī jīvan nāyaṃ yāsyati kālapakvaḥ
pārthāhave vyaktam astraṃ samartham
karṇaṃ puraskṛtya nadanti sarve tavāstram urvyāṃ pratihatya vīrāḥ kuru prayatnaṃ bharatapravīra dravanty amī sṛñjayasomakāś ca dṛṣṭvā ca karṇaṃ samare prahṛṣṭaṃ tvāṃ cāpi dṛṣṭvā parihīyamānam
iti smoktvā pāṇḍavaḥ savyasācī namaskṛtvā brahmaṇe so 'mitātmā

gāṇḍīvamuktair bhujagair ivograir divākarāṃśupratimair jvaladbhiḥ samīkṣya karṇena kirīṭinas tu tathājimadhye vihitaṃ tad astram tato 'marṣī balavān krodhadīpto bhīmo 'bravīd arjunaṃ satyasaṃdham nanu tv āhur veditāraṃ mahāstraṃ brāhmaṃ vidheyaṃ paramaṃ janās tat punar yuktāstram abhitaḥ kirīṭinn iti smokto 'yojayat savyasācī
sa kārmukajyātalasaṃnipātaḥ sumuktabāṇas tumulo babhūva ghnatos tathānyonyam iṣupravaikair dhanaṃjayasyādhiratheś ca rājan

tato navajyāṃ sudṛḍhāṃ kirīṭī svabāhuvikṣepaṇajāṃ pragṛhya samādade gāṇḍive kṣiprakārī nimeṣamātreṇa mahādhanuṣmān jyācchedanaṃ jyāvidhānaṃ ca tasya naivāvabudhyat sūtaputro laghutvāt pārthasya saṃkhye dviṣatāṃ nihantus tad adbhūtaṃ tatra babhūva rājan te bhinnadehā vyasavo nipetuḥ karṇeṣubhir bhūmitale stanantaḥ kruddhena siṃhena yathāśvayūthyā mahābalā bhīmabalena tadvat punaś ca pāñcālavarās tathānye tadantaraṃ karṇadhanaṃjayābhyām praskandanto balinaḥ sādhumuktaiḥ karṇena bāṇair nihatāḥ prasahya jayaṃ tu matvā vipulaṃ tvadīyās talān nijaghnuḥ siṃhanādāṃś ca neduḥ sarve hy amanyanta vaśe kṛtau tau karṇena kṛṣṇāv iti te vineduḥ
jyāṃ cānumṛjyābhyahanat talatre bāṇāndhakāraṃ tv akarot kṣaṇena śalyaṃ ca karṇaṃ ca kurūṃś ca sarvān bāṇair avidhyad yugapat kirīṭī
prakrīḍamāno 'tha śmaśānamadhye raudre muhūrte rudhirārdragātraḥ
tathā vinunnāṅgam avekṣya kṛṣṇaṃ sarpeṣubhiḥ karṇabhujaprasṛṣṭaiḥ
bhītā dravanti sma nihanyamānā maheṣubhiḥ pārthakarapraṇunnaiḥ tato 'rjuno vai bharatapravīro mahānubhāvaḥ samare nihantā

sarve praṇeśuḥ kuravo vihīnāḥ pārtheṣubhiḥ saṃparitapyamānāḥ suyodhanenātha punar variṣṭhāḥ pracoditāḥ karṇarathānuyāne bhoḥ kṣatriyāḥ śūratamāś ca sarve kṣātre ca dharme niratāḥ stha yūyam na yuktarūpaṃ bhavatāṃ samīpāt palāyanaṃ karṇam abhiprahāya tavātmajenāpi tathocyamānāḥ pārtheṣubhiḥ saṃparitapyamānāḥ naivāvatiṣṭhanta bhayād vivarṇāḥ kṣaṇena naṣṭāḥ pradiśo diśaś ca
mahārathaḥ sūtaputras tathāpi
karṇaḥ sughoreṣvasanaṃ dṛḍhajyaṃ visphārayitvā visṛjañ charaughān udīryamāṇaṃ sma kurūn dahantaṃ suvarṇapuṅkhair iṣubhir mahātmā

tatas tu tau vai puruṣapravīrau rājan varau sarvadhanurdharāṇām tyaktvātmadehau samare 'tighore prāptaśramau śatrudurāsadau hi dṛṣṭvā tu tau saṃprati saṃprayuktau parasparaṃ chidraniviṣṭadṛṣṭī devarṣigandharvagaṇāḥ sayakṣāḥ saṃtuṣṭuvus tau pitaraś ca hṛṣṭāḥ
sa sūtaputras tam apāṅgadeśe avāṅmukhaṃ saṃdhayati sma roṣāt na taṃ sma jānāti mahānubhāvam apāṅgadeśābhiniviṣṭam ājau
prāptasya pārthaḥ praṇatāḥ sva svāhāḥ saṃsthāpya kṛṣṇena punas tadīyam (sic)

tato 'ntarikṣe sumahān ninādaḥ saṃpūjanārthaṃ madhusūdanasya divyāś ca vācaḥ sahasā babhūvur divyāni puṣpāṇy atha siṃhanādāḥ tasmiṃs tathā vai dharaṇīṃ nimagne rathe prayogān madhusūdanasya padā viniṣpiṣya rathottamaṃ taṃ prāveśayaj jagatīṃ kiṣkumātram kṣitiṃ gatā jānubhis te tu vāhās tataḥ śaraḥ so 'bhyahanat kirīṭam
viśuddhajāmbūnadaratnabhūṣitaṃ pārthottamāṅgād aharat tarasvī tad dhemajālāvatataṃ sughoṣaṃ jājvalyamānaṃ nipapāta bhūmau

gokarṇā sumukhī kṛtena iṣuṇā goputrasaṃpreṣitā gośabdātmajabhūṣaṇaṃ suvihitaṃ suvyaktago 'suprabham dṛṣṭvā gogatakaṃ jahāra mukuṭaṃ gośabdagopūri vai gokarṇāsanamardanaś ca na yayāv aprāpya mṛtyor vaśam

tataḥ sa nāgaḥ prahasann ivāhitaṃ papāta cāvekṣya tam arjunas tvaran punaḥ sa matvā praviveśa tūṇaṃ pṛṣṭaś ca karṇena tato 'bravīd idam muktas tvayāhaṃ na samīkṣya karṇa śiro hṛtaṃ yan na mayārjunasya samīkṣya māṃ muñca raṇe tvam āśu hantāsmi śatruṃ tava cātmanaś ca ity evam ukto yudhi sūtaputras tam abravīt ko bhavān ugrarūpaḥ

karṇaḥ tam utpatantaṃ dvipadāṃ variṣṭho dṛṣṭvā vacaḥ pārtham uvāca kṛṣṇaḥ mahoragaṃ pāṇḍava paśya paśya prayojitaṃ tvan nidhanārtham ugram eṣo 'dya hatvā yudhi pāṇḍavānāṃ hantāsmi yuddhe hi svati[vi]krameṇa etad vrataṃ jānamānaḥ prayātu kiṃ vai kṛtā pāṇḍave te pratijñā jitvā ahaṃ yuddhagataṃ yamāya pravartituṃ śvo bhavanaṃ prayātum mitrārtham etan mama jānato 'pi yatnaḥ śarīre yad apāti vīra hantā yadi tvaṃ raṇamūrdhni pārthaṃ kiṃ vābhiśakto 'smi ha kauraveyaiḥ sakṛd eva hi vai karṇa vāsudevaṃ mahābalam aham eva haniṣyāmi pārthaṃ caiva na saṃśayaḥ
tato 'bravīd vāsudevaṃ mahātmā dāśārha ko nv eṣa mamādya nāgaḥ dhanuścyutaḥ śara iva śīghravegaḥ svayaṃ ya āyād garuḍasyeva vaktram
sa eṣa te vairam anusmaran vai tvām adya cāyāti vadhāya pārtha nabhaścyutāṃ prajvalitāṃ maholkāṃ paśyainam āyāntam amitrasāha
hate tu tasmin bhujage kirīṭinā svayaṃ vibhuḥ pārthivabhūtalād atha samujjahārāśu mahābhujaḥ sa taṃ rathaṃ bhujābhyāṃ puruṣottamaḥ punaḥ
jagarja cājīvarhi (?) harṣayan kurun
purā ruṣā gotrasamūhabhidyatā
tasyeṣubhiḥ khaṇḍitakuṇḍalāntaḥ parikṣataś cābhyadhikaṃ tadānīm sa lohitāṅgaśravaṇaś cakāśe salohitāṅgaśravaṇo yathā divi

na cāsya ghoraṃ pratibhāti cāstraṃ yad bhārgavo hy abhyavadan mahātmā cakraṃ tu vāmaṃ grasate 'sya bhūmir yathāsya kālo mṛtyupatir vyatiṣṭhat tato ratho bhārata ghūrṇate sma śāpāt tadā brāhmaṇasattamasya prāptaṃ vadhaṃ śaṃsati cāpy athāstraṃ praṇaśyamānaṃ dvijamukhyaśāpāt
chinne śare sarpamukhe ca ghore pārthena tasmin viṣasāda karṇaḥ
vayaṃ ca nityaṃ prayatāma dharmaṃ cartuṃ yathāśakti yathāśrutaṃ ca
tataḥ śarair bhīmatarair avidhyat stanāntare kṛṣṇadhanaṃjayau saḥ
dvitīyāṃ ca tṛtīyāṃ ca caturthīṃ pañcamīṃ tathā ṣaṣṭhīm athāsya ciccheda saptamīṃ ca tathāṣṭamīm navamīṃ daśamīṃ cāsya tathā caikādaśīṃ vṛṣaḥ jyāśataṃ śatasaṃdhānaḥ sa karṇo nāvabudhyate
tato 'vatīrya rādheyo rathād āśu samudyataḥ cakraṃ bhujābhyām ālambya samutkṣeptum iyeṣa saḥ saptadvīpā vasumatī saśailavanakānanā gīrṇacakrā samutkṣiptā karṇena caturaṅgulam
kṣatradharmam avekṣasva kartum arhasi pāṇḍava bho bho pārtha maheṣvāsa muhūrtaṃ paripālaya
na tvaṃ kāpuruṣācīrṇaṃ mārgam āsthātum arhasi khyātas tvam asi kaunteya viśiṣṭo raṇakarmasu viśiṣṭataram eva tvaṃ kartum arhasi pāṇḍava
yāvat karomi dhanuṣaṃ sajjaṃ matimatāṃ vara
dharme hi gṛddhāḥ satataṃ hi pārthās tebhyas tato vṛddhim asau dadāti dharmād apetāḥ paribaddhalobhās tasmād gatā vai kuravo vināśam
vanavāse vyatīte ca karṇa varṣe trayodaśe na prayacchasi yad rājyaṃ kva te dharmas tadā gataḥ
yad anāryaiḥ purā kṛṣṇāṃ kliśyamānām anāgasam vinaṣṭāḥ pāṇḍavāḥ kṛṣṇe śāśvataṃ narakaṃ gatāḥ patim anyaṃ vṛṇīṣveti vadaṃs tvaṃ gajagāminīm upaprekṣasi rādheya kva te dharmas tadā gataḥ

saṃjaya uvāca evam uktas tadā karṇo vāsudevena bhārata lajjayāvanato bhūtvā nottaraṃ kiṃ cid uktavān krodhāt prasphuramāṇauṣṭho dhanur udyamya bhārata yodhayām āsa vai pārthaṃ mahāvegaparākramaḥ tato 'bravīd vāsudevaḥ phalgunaṃ puruṣarṣabham divyāstreṇaiva nirbhidya pātayasva mahābala prāptās tathā pāṇḍavā bāhuvīryāt sarve samastāḥ parivṛttalobhāḥ nihatya śatrūn samare pravṛddhān sasomakā rājyam avāpnuyus te tathā gatā dhārtarāṣṭrā vināśaṃ dharmābhiguptaiḥ satataṃ nṛsiṃhaiḥ
karṇaś cāpi tato rājan krodharaktāntalocanaḥ

tatrādbhutaṃ bhārata sūtaputraś cakre cakre bhūmim anupraviṣṭe yad yodhayat pāṇḍavam ugravegaṃ vivyādha cainaṃ daśabhiḥ pṛṣatkaiḥ tato 'tividdho bharatapravīraḥ karṇena rājan samare 'rjunas tu babhūva kopena bhṛśaṃ pradīpto ghṛtāvasiktaḥ sadasīva vahniḥ
dṛṣṭvā dhvajaṃ taṃ patitaṃ pṛthivyāṃ kurupravīreṇa nikṛttam āśu nāśaṃsire sūtaputrasya sarve jayaṃ janā bhārata ye tvadīyāḥ

jagrāha pārthas tam atiprahṛṣṭo yo devasaṃghair api durnivāryaḥ saṃpūjito yaḥ satataṃ mahātmā devāsurān yo vijayen maheṣuḥ yaṃ vai prakṛṣṭaṃ prasamīkṣya yuddhe cacāla sarvaṃ sacarācaraṃ jagat svasti jagat syād ṛṣayaḥ pracukruśus tam udyataṃ prekṣya mahāhaveṣum tatas tu taṃ vai śaram aprameyaṃ gāṇḍīvadhanvā dhanuṣi nyayojayat
dharmātmā satyasaṃdhaś ca dharmarājo dayāparaḥ jitendriyaḥ satyavādī tathainaṃ jahi sūtajam
tato vimukto balinā maheṣuḥ prajvālayām āsa diśo nabhaś ca

tato 'rjunas tasya śiro jahāra vṛtrasya vajreṇa yathā mahendraḥ śarottamenāñjalikena rājaṃs tadā mahāstrapratimantritena pārtho 'parāhṇe śira uccakarta vaikartanasyātha mahendrasūnuḥ tat prāpatac cāñjalikena chinnam athāsya kāyo nipapāta paścāt
śareṇa karṇasya śiro jahāra
athāntarikṣe 'pi vigāhya sūryaṃ viveśa tejo jvalitaṃ hi tasya hṛtottamāṅgaṃ ca śarīram ājau papāta karṇasya śarāvakīrṇam
saṃvardhayantaś ca narendrayodhāḥ pārthaṃ samājagmur atīva hṛṣṭāḥ
tad ānanaṃ sūtapurasya rājan vibhrājate padmam ivāpanālam kirīṭikālena tu karṇabhāskaro vyanīyatāstaṃ divasāvasāne

tac chiro bharataśreṣṭha śobhayām āsa medinīm yadṛcchayā mahārāja āditya iva gāṃ gataḥ taṃ dṛṣṭvā samaravimardalabdhanidraṃ daṣṭoṣṭhaṃ rudhiraparītakātarākṣam rādheyaṃ rathavarapṛṣṭhasaṃniṣaṇṇaṃ hīnāṃśur divasakaro muhūrtam āsīt niḥśabdatūryaṃ hatayaudhamukhyaṃ praśāntadarpaṃ dhṛtarāṣṭrasainyam na śobhate sūryasutena hīnaṃ vṛndaṃ grahāṇām iva candrahīnam
karṇe hate pārthabhayāt pradudruvur vaikartane dhārtarāṣṭrāḥ saśalyāḥ avekṣamāṇā muhur arjunasya ketuṃ mahāntaṃ yaśasā jvalantam
vyūḍhoraskaṃ kamalanayanaṃ taptahemāvabhāsaṃ karṇaṃ dṛṣṭvā bhuvi nipatitaṃ pārthabāṇābhitaptam pāṃsugrastaṃ malinam asakṛt putram anvīkṣamāṇo mandaṃ mandaṃ vrajati savitā mandiraṃ mandaraśmiḥ
śalyas tu karṇe nihate kirīṭinā trastaṃ balaṃ prasamīkṣyārtarūpam yayau hate cādhirathau padānuge rathena saṃcchinnaparicchadena
dhṛtarāṣṭra uvāca kathaṃ nu karṇārjunayor vimarde dagdhasya raudre 'hani vidrutasya babhūva rūpaṃ kurusṛñjayānāṃ balasya bāṇonmathitasya saṃkhye

bhīmaś ca bhīmena mahāsvanena nādaṃ kṛtvā rodasī kampayānaḥ āsphoṭayan valgate nṛtyate ca hate karṇe trāsayan dhārtarāṣṭrān tathaiva rājan somakāḥ sṛñjayāś ca śaṅkhān dadhmuḥ sasvajuś cāpi sarve parasparaṃ kṣatriyā hṛṣṭarūpāḥ sūtātmaje nihate vai tadānīm
tīrṇā pratijñā puruṣarṣabheṇa vairasyāntaṃ gatavāṃś cāpi pārthaḥ
saṃjaya uvāca dṛṣṭvā tu sainyaṃ vinivartyamānaṃ putreṇa te madrapatis tadānīm saṃtrastarūpaḥ parimūḍhacetā duryodhanaṃ vākyam idaṃ babhāṣe
balāpaviddhai rathavīrasaṃghaiḥ
saṃyaṃtṛyodhācaraṇair mahāgajaiḥ sphuradbhir ārtaiḥ karuṇaṃ raṇājire suyodhavarmāyudhapādagoptṛbhiḥ prakīrṇatūṇīrapatākaketubhiḥ suvarṇajālāvatatair bhṛśāhatair mahī viyad dyaur jaladair ivāvṛtā
karṇārjunābhyāṃ śarabhinnagātrair hataiḥ pravīraḥ kurusṛñjayānām
nivarta duryodhana yāntu sainikā vrajasva rājañ śibirāya mānada divākaro hy eṣa vilambate prabho punas tvam evātra narendra kāraṇam
yuddhāya rājan viniviṣṭabuddhiṃ hā karṇa hā karṇa iti bruvāṇam
nābhavad vikṛtaṃ kiṃ cin mṛtasyāpi mahātmanaḥ cāruveṣadharaṃ rājañ cārumauliśirodharam tan mukhaṃ sūtaputrasya pūrṇacandrasamadyuti vitresuḥ sarvabhūtāni siṃhasyevetare mṛgāḥ
hato vaikartanaḥ karṇaḥ saputraḥ sahavāhanaḥ arthināṃ pakṣisaṃghasya kalpavṛkṣo nipātitaḥ
visṛjya śaravarṣāṇi pratāpya ca diśo daśa yathā hi jvalano dīpto jalam āsādya śāmyati karṇāgniḥ samare tadvat pārthameghena śāmitaḥ pragṛhya ca yaśo dīptaṃ suyuddhenātmano bhuvi
sa pārthāstravinirdagdho gataḥ paramikāṃ gatim yam āśrityākarod vairaṃ sutas te sa gato divam
mahendravāhapratimena tāv ubhau mahendravīryapratimānapauruṣau
ubhau tadā yādavapāṇḍunandanau
vitrastāś cābhavan sarve kuravo rājasattama śaṅkhaśabdena śūrasya mādhavasyārjunasya ca
yathānurūpaṃ pratipūjya tān atha praśasyamānāv atulaiś ca karmabhiḥ nanandatus tau sasuhṛdgaṇau tadā baliṃ niyamyeva sureśakeśavau
vartamāne tu yuddhe vai tava karṇasya cobhayoḥ draṣṭum āyodhanaṃ pūrvam āgato dharmanandanaḥ subhṛśaṃ gāḍhaviddhatvān nāśakat sthātum āhave tataḥ svaśibiraṃ yātaḥ sa rājā puruṣarṣabha
evam uktvārjunaṃ kṛṣṇaḥ sainikān idam abravīt
tāvad bhavadbhir yat tais tu bhavitavyaṃ narādhipaiḥ
vāsudevaṃ ca vārṣṇeyaṃ papraccha kurunandanaḥ vāsudevārjunau premṇā punaś ca pariṣasvaje
saṃjaya uvāca iti śrutvā vacas tasya keśavasya mahātmanaḥ yatto bhūtvā sahāsmābhir bhuṅkṣva bhogāṃś ca puṣkalān
na tac citraṃ mahābāho yuṣmad bāhuprasādajam
tvadbuddhyā nihate karṇe hatā govinda sarvathā anye ca bahavaḥ śūrā ye ca teṣāṃ padānugāḥ
saṃchinnabhinnakavacaṃ bāṇaiś ca vidalīkṛtam citaṃ śaraśataiḥ karṇaṃ dharmarājo dadarśa ha gandhatailāvasiktābhiḥ kāñcanībhiḥ sahasraśaḥ dīpikābhiḥ kṛtoddyotaṃ paśyate vai vṛṣaṃ tadā
saṃjātapratyayo 'tīva vīkṣya caivaṃ punaḥ punaḥ
saṃjaya uvāca praśaśaṃsus tataḥ sarve rājāno bhūritejasaḥ punar jātam ivātmānaṃ mene kurukulodvahaḥ
evam etan mahac cāsīd yuddhaṃ paramadāruṇam

punaś ca śibiraṃ prāpto bhrātṛbhir bharatarṣabhaḥ yat kṛtvā tu ca kartavyaṃ sukhāsīnaṃ yudhiṣṭhiram pāṇḍavānāṃ maheṣvāsā nyaviśanta paraṃtapāḥ prahṛṣṭamanasaḥ sarve jitvā śatrūn mahārathān tato yudhiṣṭhiraṃ tatra niviṣṭaṃ vai mudānvitam sametya sarve pañcālā vardhayanto yathāvidhi arjunas tu rathāt tūrṇam avaruhya mahāyaśāḥ dharmarājasya caraṇau pīḍayām āsa hṛṣṭavat tam utthāpya mahārāja dharmaputraḥ pratāpavān sasvaje bharataśreṣṭham upajighrann upaspṛśan nakulaḥ sahadevaś ca pāṇḍavaś ca vṛkodaraḥ abhivādya mahārājam asvajanta sma phalgunam dhṛṣṭadyumnaḥ śikhaṇḍī ca pāṇḍavānāṃ ca ye rathāḥ vardhayante sma rājānaṃ nihate sūtanandane tataḥ kṛṣṇo mahārāja sātyakiś cāpi sātvataḥ avardhayetāṃ rājānaṃ nihate sūtanandane vāsudevaś ca kaunteyaṃ praṇayād idam abravīt adya rājan hatāḥ sarve dhārtarāṣṭrāḥ sarājakāḥ hate vaikartane karṇe rathānāṃ pravare rathe yadi lokās trayaḥ sarve yodhayeyuḥ savāsavāḥ tathāpi durjayaḥ sūtas tava kopāt tu sūditaḥ evam uktaḥ pratyuvāca dharmarājo janārdanam tava prasādād govinda hataḥ karṇo mahāyaśāḥ pāṇḍavāś ca jayaṃ prāptā nāśitāś cāpi śatravaḥ tvaṃ hi śakto bhayāt trātuṃ yasya kasya cid āhave tvam asya jagato goptā pāṇḍavānāṃ ca sarvadā tvāṃ samāsādya śakro 'pi modate divi nityaśaḥ tvaṃ pātā pāṇḍuputrāṇāṃ yathaiva jagatas tathā anāścaryo jayas teṣāṃ bhaktir yeṣāṃ tvayi prabho tvayā nāthena govinda nāthavanto vayaṃ yudhi yathendreṇa purā devās tvayā cāpi janārdana svapsyāmy adya sukhaṃ kṛṣṇa nidrāṃ lapsye vasan kṣapām vigataṃ hi bhayaṃ me 'dya tvatprasādān na saṃśayaḥ evam uktas tu pārthena keśavaḥ prāha pāṇḍavam nimittamātraṃ tu vayaṃ tava hy asmin mudāgame yasya te bhrātaraḥ śūrā bhīmasenādayo nṛpa saṃbandhinaś cendravīryāḥ pārṣatapramukhās tathā arhate ca bhavān vaktuṃ priyaṃ nityaṃ hi maddhitam priyo hi me tvam etena vacanena narottama ity ukto dharmarājas tu svarathaṃ hemabhūṣitam dantavarṇair hayair yuktaṃ kālavālair mahīpatiḥ āsthāya puruṣavyāghraḥ svabalenābhisaṃvṛtaḥ prayayau bahuvṛttāntaṃ draṣṭum āyodhanaṃ prati saṃbhāṣamāṇau tau vīrāv ubhau pāṇḍavamādhavau sa dadarśa raṇe karṇaṃ śayānaṃ puruṣarṣabha gāṇḍīvamuktair viśikhaiḥ sarvataḥ sunipīḍitam saputraṃ nihataṃ dṛṣṭvā karṇaṃ rājā yudhiṣṭhiraḥ praśaśaṃsa naravyāghrāv ubhau pāṇḍavamādhavau adya rājāsmi sarvasyāṃ pṛthivyāṃ madhusūdana diṣṭyā jayasi govinda diṣṭyā śatrur nipātitaḥ evaṃ subahuśo rājan praśaśaṃsa janārdanam arjunaṃ ca kuruśreṣṭho dharmarājo yudhiṣṭhiraḥ dṛṣṭvā ca nihataṃ karṇaṃ saputraṃ pārthasāyakaiḥ punar jātam ivātmānaṃ mene kurukulodvahaḥ sametya ca kuruśreṣṭhaṃ kuntīputraṃ yudhiṣṭhiram saṃjaya uvāca evam eṣa kṣayo vṛttaḥ sumahān romaharṣaṇaḥ vaiśaṃpāyana uvāca śrutvaitad vipriyaṃ rājā dhṛtarāṣṭro mahīpatiḥ papāta bhūmau niśceṣṭaḥ kauravyaḥ paramāsanāt tathā satyavratā devī gāndhārī divyadarśinī tatas tūrṇaṃ tu viduras taṃ nṛpaṃ saṃjayas tathā paryāśvāsayatāṃ caitāv ubhāv eva tu bhūmipam tathaivāśvāsayām āsa gāndhārī rājasattamam sa daivaṃ paramaṃ mene bhavitavyaṃ ca tat tathā tābhyām āśvāsito rājā tūṣṇīm āste viśāṃ pate evam ākhyāya rājñe ca saṃjayo rājasattama jagāma śibiraṃ bhūyo hate karṇe mahātmani sa dṛṣṭvā nihataṃ śalyaṃ rājānaṃ ca suyodhanam yodhāṃś ca subahūn rājan sainikāṃś ca sahasraśaḥ tathaiva pāṇḍavīṃ senāṃ nihatāṃ prekṣya saṃjayaḥ sauptike drauṇinā rājan hatavājinaradvipān sa hi dṛṣṭvā hatān sarvān samantād yudhi saṃjayaḥ prayāto hastinapuraṃ śokārto bhayavihvalaḥ hateṣu punar eteṣu prabhūtagajavājiṣu yodhaiś caiva mahārāja nānādeśasamudbhavaiḥ kurukṣetraṃ tu tat sarvaṃ śūnyam āsīj jagatpate nihataiḥ pāṇḍaveyaiś ca dhārtarāṣṭraiś ca saṃyuge yathāviṣayajaṃ vṛttaṃ dhārtarāṣṭrasya saṃjayaḥ nyavedayata tat sarvaṃ yathāvṛttaṃ yathāvidhi
nārāyaṇaṃ namaskṛtya naraṃ caiva narottamam devīṃ sarasvatīṃ caiva tato jayam udīrayet
madrarājaṃ puraskṛtya yuddhāyopajagāma ha
tathāparāhṇe tatrasthaṃ parivārya suyodhanam
suptaṃ śibiram āviśya dhṛṣṭadyumnapurogamān kṛtavarmā kṛpo drauṇir
vidhis tu balavān atra pauruṣaṃ tu nirarthakam
kleśena mahatā yuktaḥ sarvato rājasattama
dṛṣṭvaiva ca narāñ śīghraṃ vyājahārātiduḥkhitaḥ
uvāca bharataśreṣṭhaṃ dhṛtarāṣṭraṃ janādhipam
duryodhanasya bhīmena bhagnāv ūrū sutasya te sa bhūmau patitaḥ śete pāṃśubhiḥ pariguṇṭhitaḥ
gatir me ko bhaved adya iti cintāsamākulaḥ
jñātīn striyo 'tha niryāpya praviśya viduraḥ punaḥ rājānaṃ śocamānas tu taṃ śocantaṃ muhur muhuḥ
yac chrutvā suhṛdāṃ cātikaruṇā samajāyata
karṇaś ca nihataḥ saṃkhye divyāstrajño mahābalaḥ
bhagadatto hato yatra gajayuddhaviśāradaḥ jayadrathaś ca nihataḥ kim anyad bhāgadheyataḥ
mahābalas tathā pāṇḍyaḥ sarvaśastrāstrapāragaḥ nihataḥ pāṇḍavaiḥ saṃkhye kim anyad bhāgadheyataḥ
śatāyuś caiva vikrāntaḥ kim anyad bhāgadheyataḥ
ete cānye ca bahavaḥ kṛtāstrā yuddhadurmadāḥ
bahavo nihatāḥ sūta mahendrasamavikramāḥ
pārthena saṃyuge ghore kim anyad bhāgadheyataḥ
tathā śalyaṃ maheṣvāsaṃ madrāṇām īśvaraṃ vibhum
pātiteṣu turaṃgeṣu gajeṣu ca ratheṣu ca
śvetāś ca vegasaṃpannāḥ śaśikāśasamaprabhāḥ pibanta iva cākāśaṃ rathe yuktās tu vājinaḥ
jāmbūnadavicitrāṅgā vahante cārjunaṃ raṇe
asti kaḥ puruṣaś cādya yo jeṣyati dhanaṃjayam
**** **** kāminī ca mṛtapriyā yathā nadī śuṣkajalā senā karṇaṃ vinā tathā
ajātaśatruḥ kauravyo guruśuśrūṣaṇe rataḥ dhṛtarāṣṭrasya vacanaṃ nāvamaṃsyati dhārmikaḥ kurvanti bhrātaraś cāsya vacanaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ
sa haniṣyati māṃ rudrahastenāpi hi rakṣitam
kṛṣṇaḥ pratyaham evedaṃ vakti nāśe mamoditaḥ teṣu jīvatsu pārtheṣu tasmiñ jīvati keśave vināśam eva yāsyāmi svapāpenaiva sānujaḥ
notsahe 'dya dvijaśreṣṭha pāṇḍavān vaktum īdṛśam
nūnaṃ mudopatiṣṭhanti svarge tān apsarogaṇāḥ
sārdhaṃ duryodhanaḥ svarge khelatāṃ yuddhapātitaḥ
tac chrutvā tava putrasya sattvayuktasya bhāṣitam
prayogabalasaṃhāraprāyaścittaṃ sumaṅgalam prayogaviniyogau ca smṛtiṃ yasya guṇān viduḥ
evam ukte tu kṛṣṇena dharmarājo viśāṃ patiḥ saṃgrāmāya matiṃ cakre tataḥ parapuraṃjayaḥ bherīmṛdaṅgaśaṅkhānāṃ paṭahānāṃ tathaiva ca ninādair ubhayos tatra sainyayor vyāptam ambaram
cakṣur dharmeti yal loke kathyase tvaṃ janādhipa
abravīt tāvakān sarvān karṇasya nidhanena vai
adyācāryasuto drauṇir naiko yudhyeta śatrubhiḥ
kathaṃ ca nihataḥ saṃkhye gadāyuddhaviśāradaḥ
śṛṇu rājann avahito gajāśvanarasaṃkṣayam vakṣye 'haṃ sarvayodhānāṃ saṃgrāmaṃ tava dāruṇam
tasya sthitvā mahārāja mukhe vyūhasya daṃśitaḥ
śastrāstreṣv abhavan ghorāḥ ketavaḥ kṣayakāriṇaḥ bhrāntyāśvāḥ śataśas tatra netrāṇy uccair avarṣayan
citraseno mahārāja nakulena hato raṇe
nakulo bharataśreṣṭhas tābhyāṃ parabalārdanaḥ
tataḥ śaktiṃ samudyamya satyasenāya cikṣipe
caturbhiś caturo vāhān dhvajaṃ chittvā tu pañcabhiḥ tribhir vai sārathiṃ hatvā karṇaputro nanāda ha
sā senā vidrutā rājan diśo daśa bhayadrutā
tathaiva tāvakā yaudhā dharmarājaṃ yudhiṣṭhiram
bhṛgusūnudharāputrau śaśijena samanvitau caramaṃ pāṇḍuputrāṇāṃ purastāt sarvabhūbhujām śastrāgreṣv abhavaj jvālā netrāṇy āhatya varṣatī śiraḥ svalīyanta bhṛśaṃ kākolūkāś ca ketuṣu
pradudrāva mahārāja śalyabāṇaiḥ prapīḍitā
vavarṣa samare kruddho dharmaputraṃ yudhiṣṭhiram

punaś ca bhīmasenasya jaghānāśvāṃs tathāhave so 'vatīrya rathāt tūrṇaṃ hatāśvaḥ pāṇḍunandanaḥ kālo daṇḍam ivodyamya gadāṃ kruddho mahābalaḥ pothayām āsa turagān rathaṃ ca kṛtavarmaṇaḥ kṛtavarmā tv avaplutya rathāt tasmād apākramat
cikṣepa bhīmasenasya so 'sravac choṇitaṃ bahu tam evādāya bhīmas tu tataḥ kopasamanvitaḥ
taṃ dṛṣṭvā karma śalyasya sarvasiddhās tv apūjayan pūrvajanmani prahlādo dṛṣṭo 'smābhir ayaṃ baliḥ
madrarājam asaṃbhrāntaḥ paśyatāṃ sarvadhanvinām saśaktim iva senānyaṃ
**** **** pañcabhiḥ pañcabhiḥ śaraiḥ gātre bāṇais tu te sarve śūrāḥ sarve samarpayan
evaṃ dvaṃdvaśatāny āsaṃs tvadīyānāṃ paraiḥ saha
ciccheda samare rājan sarveṣāṃ ca pṛthak pṛthak
tathāvidhaṃ mahārāja madrarājasya vikramam asahyaṃ mānavair yuddhe tad babhūva nararṣabha
ahaṃ madbhrātaraś caiva sātyakiś ca mahārathaḥ pāñcālāḥ sṛñjayāś caiva na śaktāś ca hi madrapam nihaniṣyati ced adya mātulo 'smān mahāyaśāḥ govindavacanaṃ satyaṃ kathaṃ bhavati kiṃ tv idam
parivārya mudā yuktā yodhayantaś cakāśire
īṣāṇāṃ cāpi yoktrāṇāṃ veṇūnāṃ cāpi sarvaśaḥ bhujānāṃ śirasāṃ caiva chattrāṇāṃ vyajanaiḥ saha tatra kruddhasya pārthasya agamyā samabhūd dharā
sarveṣāṃ patatāṃ caiva chattrāṇāṃ ca samantataḥ
tataḥ kruddhasya pārthasya rathamārge viśāṃ pate
nirucchvāsaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā guruputraṃ mahāmanāḥ so 'sṛjat sāyakān saṃkhye arjuno jayatāṃ varaḥ caturbhiḥ sāyakaiś caiva tāḍayām āsa ghoṭakān
yamadaṇḍanibhaṃ ghoraṃ śatrusainyabhayaṃkaram
kiṃ vā pralapitenātha vyarthenānena kiṃ cana
pratijñāṃ tāṃ tadā rājā kṛtvā madreśam abhyayāt
saṃdadhe vividhān bāṇān darśayan hastalāghavam
puṣpitau śuśubhāte tau vasante kiṃśukau yathā
sukūbaraṃ sucakrākṣaṃ vidheyāśvaṃ susārathim
ardayām āsa viśikhair ulkābhir iva kuñjarān
tataḥ sa viddho vidhidharmasūnunā mahābalenendraparākrameṇa

yad adbhutaṃ karma na śakyam anyaiḥ suduḥsahaṃ tat kṛtavantam ekam śalyaṃ narendraḥ sa viṣaṇṇabhāvād vicintayām āsa mṛdaṅgaketuḥ kim etad indrāvarajasya vākyaṃ moghaṃ bhavaty adya vidher balena jahīti śalyaṃ hy avadat tadājau na lokanāthasya vaco 'nyathā syāt
bhīmaḥ śarair niśitais tigmatejaiḥ śilīmukhair asya cakarta varma

sphuratprabhāmaṇḍalam aṃśujālair dharmātmajo madravināśakāle puratrayaproddharaṇe purastān māheśvaraṃ rūpam abhūt tadānīm āvartanākuñcitabāhudaṇḍaḥ saṃdhyāvihārī tanuvṛttamadhyaḥ viśālavakṣā bhagavān haro yathā sudurnirīkṣyo 'bhavad arjunāgrajaḥ
bāhū prasāryābhimukho 'titūrṇaṃ sa dharmarājasya samīpamadra(?dri)rāṭ
śiraś ciccheda bāṇena bhallena nataparvaṇā
tat sainyaṃ tava putrasya vidrutaṃ sarvato bhayāt
hārdikyaṃ virathaṃ dṛṣṭvā kṛpaḥ śāradvataḥ prabho apovāha tataḥ kṣipraṃ ratham āropya vīryavān
vividhān saritaś coghāñ śoṇitasya viśāṃ pate
pragṛhya ca dhanur ghoram abhyadhāvad yudhiṣṭhiram
vāryamāṇo (sic) mayā pūrvaṃ na kṛtaṃ vacanaṃ tvayā
paśyatāṃ tava putrāṇāṃ pāṇḍuputrair asaṃbhramam
nirāśaś ca hate śalye rājā rājan mahāyaśāḥ
adya diṣṭyā kṣmāśayanaṃ niratāmāmucakṣuṣaḥ (sic) draupadyā yaś ca saṃkalpaḥ saṃsiddha iti ghuṣyatām
adyaiva ca hi pārthānāṃ yat kṛtaṃ pūrvakarmabhiḥ
putrāṇāṃ ca vadhaṃ ghoraṃ bhīmena śroṣyate nṛpaḥ
lābhas teṣāṃ jayas teṣāṃ kutas teṣāṃ parābhavaḥ yeṣāṃ nātho hṛṣīkeśaḥ sarvalokavibhur hariḥ
nigṛhītuṃ tadā kruddhāḥ samantāt paryavārayan
bhīmaseno gadāpāṇir gadayā vajrakalpayā
samabhyadhāvaṃs tvaritā yuddhāya jitakāśinaḥ
martyenāvaśyamartavyaṃ gṛheṣv api kadā cana yudhyataḥ kṣatradharmeṇa mṛtyur eṣa sanātanaḥ
airāvataṃ daityagaṇān vimṛdnañ śakro yathā saṃjanayan bhayāni
airāvaṇasthasya camūvimarde daityāḥ purā vāsavasyeva rājan
śatavarmāṇam atyugraṃ mahāvīraṃ mahābalam
tathā duryodhano rājā saṃgrāme sarvato 'bhavat
durdharaḥ sa pumān kaś cit pāṇḍavān prati bhārata

yantreṇa hanyamānau tu rathāṅgāv api cicchide maṇḍalāgraṃ dhanuś cāpi niśitāṃs tomarān api nārācān ardhanārācān supuṇyān mudgarān api svarṇadaṇḍāṃ ca śaktiṃ ca bhiṇḍipālān parasvadhān nirundhayan satyadhṛtiṃ kṛtvaitat karma dāruṇam
pañcabhir niśitais tīkṣṇaiḥ śarair vivyādha marṣayan
ekacchāyam ivākāśaṃ samabhūt tatra dhanvinām
te dṛṣṭvā dharmarājānaṃ kauravais taṃ tathākṛtam
**** **** devāsuraraṇopamam tathānyat sumahac caiva
jyāghoṣair yodhamukhyānāṃ talaghoṣaiḥ samaṃtataḥ
te yāvat pṛṣṭhato hanti pāṇḍavān raṇadurmadān
suranārīratisukhaṃ vimardam evam anyathā utpāṭitaṃ dvāram etac chrīmat tridaśasadmanaḥ evam uktvā jagāmāśu śakunis tāṃ punaḥ punaḥ lakṣadhvajaṃ vasiṣṭhaṃ ca manonilajavaṃ mahat
kiranto yatra caivāsmān pariśiṣṭo mahāmate mamānudhyānamahimā bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ na ca śāsanakartānyas tvattas tiṣṭhati kaś cana yad ājñāpayasīty evam avadat prītimānasaḥ
śakuniṃ mārayāmo 'dya sahaputraṃ sabāndhavam tato duryodhanaṃ pāpaṃ pāṇḍavānāṃ prasādataḥ
vayaṃ paścād gamiṣyāmaḥ sahitās tyaktajīvitāḥ bhṛśaṃ palāyane tasmād upādhiṃ samupāśritāḥ
evaṃ hi yodhāḥ saṃrabdhāḥ parasparasamāhatāḥ
drāvyamāṇaṃ balaṃ dṛṣṭvā tava putrasya paśyataḥ

hate droṇe ca karṇe ca bhūriśravasi saṃgare duḥśāsane ca śālve ca śalye ca saparicchade bhagadatte ca vīrendre naivāśāmyata hā raṇaḥ yena bhīṣmas tathā droṇaḥ kṛpo vidura eva ca pitā mātā śamasyārthe pratyākhyātās tu pāpinā
rādheye sūtaputre ca naiva śāmyati vaiśasam
nānādeśasamutthe ca hate sainye pṛthagvidhe
hatapravīrāṃ vidhvastāṃ dṛṣṭvā cemāṃ camūṃ raṇe alambuse ca nihate naiva śāmyati vaiśasam bhrātṝn vinihatān dṛṣṭvā vayasyān mātulān api putrān vinihatān saṃkhye naiva śāmyati vaiśasam
nṛpapravīrān vidhvastān dṛṣṭvā cemāṃ mahācamūm
dhanaṃjayaḥ saṃyati sāyakair vā
pitṝn bhrātṝn parityajya vayasyān api cāpare
abhyayus tāvakān yuddhe śataśo 'tha sahasraśaḥ
ekaikaṃ daśabhir bāṇair avidhyad bharatarṣabhaḥ
vatsadantaiś ca bāṇaiś ca karmāraparimārjitaiḥ aśvāṃś ca caturo hatvā
pātyamānān prapaśyāma līnakumbhān kṣaradvraṇān
tatas te kṣatriyāḥ sarve svadharmeṣu vyavasthitāḥ
sarve jayāya dhāvanti mayā labdho 'dya saṃjayaḥ iti bruvāṇaḥ śaineyo rājan mām agrahīt tadā
viniryayau rathenaiva śvetāśvaḥ kṛṣṇasārathiḥ
durvimocananāmā ca duṣpradharṣas tathaiva ca śrutarvā ca mahābāhuḥ sarve yuddhaviśāradāḥ
bhīmam eva samājaghnuḥ smarantaṃ pūrvakilbiṣam
**** **** avacchannā dharābhavat
yathā daityacamūṃ hatvā purā śakro mahābalaḥ
hāhākāras tato jāto hate vīre suśarmaṇi tāvakānāṃ balaughānāṃ rājan durmantritāt tava
**** **** tad anīkavanaṃ mahat adahad bhīmasenas tu helayā bāṇavahninā
ṛṣṭibhiḥ śaktibhiś caiva tomaraiś ca paraṃtapa
śūliyāsa[pāśa?]m atikramya śakralokaṃ samaśnute
sahadevaṃ cābhyavarṣac charaiḥ saṃnataparvabhiḥ ulūkaś ca tato rājan krodhena mahatā yutaḥ
gatotsāhā mahārāja dudruvur bhayapīḍitāḥ ulūkas tu śitair bāṇaiḥ sahadevam avidhyata
tato gāndhāranṛpatiḥ kṛtapraticikīrṣayā
sabhāmadhye vijityā kūṭadyūtena yad bhavān
prāvodayad bhūmipater mahātmā sa siṃhanādaṃ vyanadan mahātmā nihatya pāpaṃ subalasya putraṃ sa nairṛtīm eva diśaṃ mahātmā suvarṇapuṅkhair iṣubhiḥ patantaṃ
mādrīsutaṃ te sahasābhipetur gāndhārayodhāḥ pragṛhītaśastrāḥ
śekur na yoddhuṃ tarasājimadhye
dṛṣṭvā bharataśārdūla kaśmalenābhisaṃvṛtaḥ
daśaikākṣohiṇībhartā tathā duryodhano 'pi san prāptavān vyasanaṃ tīvraṃ daivaṃ hi balavattaram

yasya mūrdhāvasiktānāṃ sahasraṃ maṇimaulinām āhṛtya ca karaṃ sarvaṃ svasya vai vaśam āgatam catuḥsāgaraparyantā pṛthivī ratnabhūṣitā karṇenaikena yasyārthe karam āhāritā purā yasyājñā pararāṣṭreṣu karṇenaiva prasāritā nābhavad yasya śastreṣu khedo rājñaḥ praśāsataḥ āsīno hastinapure kṣemaṃ rājyam akaṇṭakam anvapālayad aiśvaryāt kuberam api nāsmarat bhavanād bhavanaṃ rājan prayātuṃ pṛthivīpate devālayapraveśe ca panthā yasya hiraṇmayaḥ patākāvṛtasūryāṃśutoraṇocchritaśobhinaḥ prayāṇe pṛthivībhartur dhanyānām abhavan gṛhāḥ āruhyairāvataprakhyaṃ nāgam indrasamo balī vibhūtyā sumahatyā yaḥ prayāti pṛthivīpate taṃ bhṛśaṃ kṣatam indrābhaṃ padbhyām eva dharātale tiṣṭhantam ekaṃ dṛṣṭvā tu mamābhūt kleśa uttamaḥ tasya caivaṃvidhasyādya jagannāthasya bhūpate āpadapratimaivābhūd balīyān vidhir eva hi
itas tataḥ palāyante hatanāthā hataujasaḥ adṛṣṭapūrvā duḥkhārtā bhayavyākulalocanāḥ hariṇā iva vitrastāḥ prekṣyamāṇā diśo daśa

saṃsmṛtaḥ kuladharmaś ca sānukrośatayā tvayā diṣṭyā tvāṃ tāta saṃgrāmād asmād vīrakṣayāt puram samāgatam apaśyāma hy aṃśumantam iva prajāḥ andhasya nṛpater yaṣṭir lubdhasyādīrghadarśinaḥ bahuśo yācyamānasya daivopahatacetasaḥ tvam eko vyasanārtasya dhriyase putra sarvadā

paurajānapadair duḥkhād dhā heti bhṛśanāditam nirānandaṃ gataśrīkaṃ hṛtanāgam ivāśayam śūnyarūpam apadhvastaṃ dṛṣṭvā dhvastataro 'bhavat viduraḥ sarvadharmajño viklavenāntarātmanā viveśa nṛpate rājan niśaśvāsa śanaiḥ śanaiḥ
saṃjaya uvāca muhūrtād iva rājendra sarvaṃ śūnyam adṛśyata mattavāraṇasaṃghuṣṭaṃ śibiraṃ vidrute bale yatra śabdena mahatā nānvabudhyan mahārathāḥ tatra śabdaṃ na śṛṇumo manuṣyasyāpi kasya cit
yadā duryodhano yuddhaṃ tyaktvā pattir apākramat
evam uktaḥ pratyuvāca tān sa tatra mahārathān
ariśeṣe bhavati tu saṃdigdho vijayo bhavet rājyaṃ labhe kathaṃ tad dhi pūjitaṃ vijayādibhiḥ
tārakaś ca mahādaityo hy andhakaś ca niṣūditaḥ
saṃjaya uvāca evam ukto mahārāja dharmaputreṇa dhīmatā salilasthas tava suta idaṃ vacanam abravīt
saṃjaya uvāca duryodhanaṃ tava sutaṃ salilasthaṃ mahāyaśāḥ śrutvā tu karuṇaṃ vākyam abhāṣata yudhiṣṭhiraḥ
yasyātapatracchāyāpi svakā bhānos tathā prabhā khedāyaivābhimānitvāt sahet saivaṃ kathaṃ giraḥ
salilāntargataḥ śrīmān putro duryodhanas tava
tatroccaiś cukruśuḥ siddhās tasya vākyāntare nṛpa
na hi me saṃbhramo jātu śakrād api yudhiṣṭhira
avaśyam eva yoddhavyaṃ sarvair eva mayā saha yuktaṃ tv ayuktam ity etad vetsi tvaṃ caiva sarvadā

kṣatradharmaṃ bhṛśaṃ krūraṃ nirapekṣaṃ sunirghṛṇam anyathā tu kathaṃ hanyur abhimanyuṃ tathāgatam sarve bhavanto dharmajñāḥ sarve śūrās tanutyajaḥ nyāyena yudhyatāṃ proktā śakralokagatiḥ parā yady ekas tu na hantavyo bahubhir dharma eva tu tadābhimanyuṃ bahavo nijaghnus tvanmate katham sarvo vimṛśate jantuḥ kṛcchrastho dharmadarśanam padastho vihitaṃ dvāraṃ paralokasya paśyati
iṣuṃ prāsaṃ gadāṃ vāpi varaṃ bhūyo dadāmy aham
na me samarthāḥ sarve vai yoddhuṃ nyāyena ke cana na yuktam ātmanā vaktum evaṃ garvoddhataṃ vacaḥ atha vā saphalaṃ hy etat kariṣye bhavatāṃ puraḥ asmin muhūrte satyaṃ vā mithyā vaitad bhaviṣyati
yat tvayā hi kṛtaṃ pūrvaṃ bhīmasenajighāṃsayā tasyādya kāryavṛttasya vākyasyānṛṇyatāṃ vraja
kṛcchraprāptena ca tathā hārayed rājyam āgatam
**** **** yo 'dya duryodhanaṃ raṇe gadāhastaṃ vijetuṃ vai śaktaḥ syād amaro 'pi hi
na tvaṃ bhīmo na nakulaḥ sahadevo 'tha phalgunaḥ jetuṃ nyāyena śakto vai kṛtī rājā suyodhanaḥ
ekaṃ vāsmān nihatya tvaṃ bhava rājeti vai punaḥ nūnaṃ na rājyabhāgeṣā pāṇḍoḥ kuntyāś ca saṃtatiḥ atyantavanavāsāya sṛṣṭā bhaikṣyāya vā punaḥ
anayā gadayā cāhaṃ saṃyuge yoddhum utsahe bhavantaḥ prekṣakāḥ sarve mama santu janārdana
tad āhvānam amṛṣyan vai tava putro 'tivīryavān pratyupasthita evāśu matto mattam iva dvipam gadāhastaṃ tava sutaṃ yuddhāya samupasthitam dadṛśuḥ pāṇḍavāḥ sarve kailāsam iva śṛṅgiṇam
na saṃbhramo na ca bhayaṃ na ca glānir na ca vyathā āsīd duryodhanasyāpi sthitaḥ siṃha ivāhave

yad etat kathitaṃ pūrvaṃ madīyaṃ durviceṣṭitam sarvaṃ tan na ca me kiṃ cic chaṅkitaṃ kartum eva hi araṇye cāpi vasatiṃ dāsyaṃ ca paraveśmasu tathā rūpaviparyāsam akariṣyam ahaṃ balāt hatāś ca bāndhavās tubhyaṃ kṣayas tulyo 'yam āvayoḥ patanaṃ saṃprati tu me yadi nāma bhaved yudhi tad atiślāghyam eva syāt kālo vā tatra kāraṇam adyāpi hi na me jetā dharmeṇāsti raṇājire chadmanā yadi jeṣyadhvam akīrtiḥ sthāsyati dhruvam adharmyā vāyaśasyā ca paścāt tapsyatha vai dhruvam
upagamyopasaṃgṛhya vidhivat pratyapūjayan pūjayitvā tataḥ paścād idaṃ vacanam abruvan
abhivādya tatas tau tu sasvajāte halāyudham
yathoktaṃ ca yathāvṛttam uktvā pāṇḍavam abravīt
dhīmān arivināśāya kṛtaṃ sarvaṃ sadā hariḥ sasmāra sa tadā tatra idaṃ tatra punaḥ punaḥ
saṃprāptāḥ paribhūtāḥ smo gatir bhava pitaḥ svayam
na tvadvaco gaṇayati nāsmāsu sneham icchati
teṣāṃ kṣaye kṣayo 'smākaṃ vināsmābhir jagac ca kim
samudraṃ paścimaṃ gatvā sarasvatyabdhisaṃgamam ārādhayatu deveśaṃ tataḥ kāntim avāpsyati
lokān prabhāsayām āsa pupoṣa ca vapus tathā tatra snātvā halī rāmo dattvā prīto 'tha dakṣiṇām
kathaṃ ca yājayām āsa papau somaṃ ca vai katham
tathā te samayaṃ kṛtvā gṛhān niṣkramya pārthiva
ājagāma drutaṃ prītā tasmin kūpe sarasvatī
tasyāṃ diśi vicitrāṇi tīrthāni paramāṇi ca

**** **** tathā tīrthāny anekaśaḥ sahasraśatasaṃkhyāni prathitāni pade pade āplutya teṣu tīrtheṣu yathoktaṃ tatra carṣibhiḥ kṛtvopavāsaniyamaṃ dattvā dānāni bhūriśaḥ abhivādya munīṃs tāṃs tu tatra tīrthanivāsinaḥ uddiṣṭamārgaḥ prayayau yatra bhūyaḥ sarasvatī prāṅmukhaṃ vai nivavṛte vṛṣṭir vātahatā yathā
sāyaṃprātarvrataparā naktasaṃbhojanāḥ pare pañcāgnitapaso grīṣme varṣāsv ākāśaśāyinaḥ tṛṇāśinas tathā cānye mārgaśāyina eva ca kaṇṭakapravare ghore svaptāro bhūmiśāyinaḥ

kaṇadhūmabhujaś cānye tathā māsopavāsinaḥ sarvatithyupavāsāś ca tathā hy anye sahasraśaḥ bhūmipātrabhujaś cānye tathā bhūmibhujo 'pi hi āvasathyāgniniratās tretāgniniratās tathā vighasābhyāśinas tīvrās tathānye mitabhojanāḥ
yathāgataṃ puṇyajalā kurukṣetraṃ praviśya ha
haṃsakāraṇḍavākīrṇaṃ cakravākopaśobhitam
sālais tālais tamālaiś ca kakubhaiś ca saketakaiḥ
suveṇur iti vikhyātā prasrutā śīghragāminī
ṛṣiḥ paramadharmātmā tadā puruṣasattamaḥ
uvāca pārvatīnātham indurekhāvataṃsakam
**** **** bhāvā ye jagati sthitāḥ tvām upāsanta varadaṃ

tvaṃ prabhuḥ paramaiśvaryād adhikaṃ bhāsi śaṃkara tvayi brahmā ca viṣṇuś ca lokān saṃdhārya tiṣṭhataḥ tvanmūlaṃ ca jagat sarvaṃ tvadantaṃ ca maheśvara tvayā hi vitatā lokā sapteme sarvasaṃbhava sarvathā sarvabhūteśa tvām evārcanti daivatam tvanmayaṃ hi jagat sarvaṃ bhūtaṃ sthāvarajaṅgamam svargaṃ ca paramasthānaṃ nṛṇām abhyudayārthinām dadāsi ca prasannas tvaṃ bhaktānāṃ parameśvara anāvṛttipadaṃ nṝṇāṃ nityaṃ niḥśreyasārthinām dadāsi karmiṇāṃ karma bhāvayan dhyānayogataḥ na vṛthāsti mahādeva prasādas te maheśvara yasmāt tvayopakaraṇāt karomi kamalekṣaṇa prapadye śaraṇaṃ śaṃbhuṃ sarvadā sarvataḥ sthitam karmaṇā manasā vācā tam evābhijagāma ha
yad idaṃ cāpalaṃ deva kṛtam etat smayādikam
saptasārasvataṃ cāpi yathotpannaṃ tathoditam
sa cāpi tīrthapravaraṃ punar gatvā mahān ṛṣiḥ pītvā payaḥ suvipulaṃ siddhim āyāt tadā muniḥ
sarvakāmasamṛddhaṃ ca tad āśramapadaṃ mahat munibhir brāhmaṇaiś caiva sevitaṃ sarvadā vibho
tatāpa rājan saṃprāpya tīrthaṃ vai sumahātapāḥ
**** **** pathā vai puṇyakarmaṇām tathā gādhisuto rājā
**** **** dhṛtarāṣṭreṇa satkṛtaḥ kiṃ cit prapāṃ pade mātraṃ (sic)
teṣāṃ vipradadau rājā brāhmaṇānāṃ vṛṣāṃs tadā
tataḥ prakṣīyamāṇaṃ tad rāṣṭraṃ tasya mahīpateḥ
na ca śreyo 'dhyagacchat tu kṣīyate rāṣṭram eva ca
yadīcchasi mahābāho śāntiṃ rāṣṭrasya bhūmipa

punas tatra ca rājñas tu yayāter yajataḥ prabhoḥ audāryaṃ paramaṃ kṛtvā bhaktiṃ cātmani śāśvatīm dadau kāmān brāhmaṇebhyo yān yān yo manasecchati yo yatra sthita eveha āhūto yajñasaṃstare tasya tasya saric chreṣṭhā gṛhādiśayanādikam yatra saṃbhojanaṃ caiva dānaṃ nānāvidhaṃ bahu te manyamānā rājñas tu saṃpradānam anuttamam rājānaṃ tuṣṭuvuḥ prītā dattvā caivāśiṣaḥ śubhāḥ

prākampata bhṛśaṃ bhītā vāyunevāhatā latā tathārūpāṃ tu tāṃ dṛṣṭvā munir āha mahānadīm avicāraṃ vasiṣṭhaṃ tvam ānayasvāntikaṃ mama sā tasya vacanaṃ śrutvā jñātvā pāpaṃ cikīrṣitam vasiṣṭhasya prabhāvaṃ ca jānanty apratimaṃ bhuvi
astrodyataḥ samuttiṣṭhad viśvāmitro muniṃ prati taṃ gṛhītāyudhaṃ dṛṣṭvā vasiṣṭhāntakaraṃ munim kauśikaṃ sumahat kruddhaṃ kālamṛtyum ivāparam
te sarve brāhmaṇā rājaṃs tapobhir niyamais tathā upavāsaiś ca vividhair yamaiḥ kaṣṭavratais tathā ārādhya paśubhartāraṃ mahādevaṃ jagatpatim mokṣayām āsus tāṃ devīṃ saricchreṣṭhāṃ sarasvatīm
evam uktvā ca munayo duḥkhāc caināṃ vyamocayan
tān eva śaraṇaṃ jagmū rākṣasāḥ kṣudhitās tathā
avadhūtam avijñātam atiśītaṃ ca yad bhavet patitānnaṃ sūtikānnaṃ puṃścalyānnaṃ ca yad bhavet

eṣā puṇyajalā śakra kṛtā munibhir eva tu nigūḍham asyā gamanam ihāsīt pūrvam eva tu tato 'bhyetyāruṇāṃ devīṃ plāvayām āsa vāriṇā sarasvatyāruṇāyāś ca puṇyo 'yaṃ saṃgamo mahān iha tvaṃ yaja devendra dada dānāny anekaśaḥ atrāplutya sughorāt tvaṃ pātakād vipramokṣyase
brahmaṇo vacanāc chakro 'yajad yajñair anekaśaḥ dattvā dānāny anekāni snātvā tīrthe śatakratuḥ vipāpmā virajāḥ śrīmān brahmavadhyāṃ vidhūya saḥ
pariśrutaḥ kokanadaḥ kṛṣṇakeśo jaṭādharaḥ
samudronmadanaś caiva mahānādī raṇotkaṭaḥ kālakaś ca prahāsaś ca tathāṅgārakavahnikau ete cānye ca bahavo mahāśālī raṇotkaṭaḥ
candramāḥ pāṇikarmā ca uḍukaś ca mahābalaḥ
**** **** dīrghavaktrāś ca bhārata śvagomāyumukhāś caiva
**** **** nānāmālyānulepanāḥ nānāvastradharāś caiva
vigrahaikarasā nityam ajeyāḥ surasattamaiḥ
nānāpraharaṇā ye vai nānāśastrāstrakovidāḥ
vegapāṣviṭapāvāsā kānanākrīḍanaprabhā
vaiṣṇavyo 'tibhayāś cānyāḥ krūrarūpā bhayaṃkarāḥ
śatrūṇāṃ vigrahe nityaṃ bhayadās tā bhavanty uta kāmarūpadharāś caiva jave vāyusamās tathā acintyabalavīryāś ca tathācintyaparākramāḥ
nānāvidhair bahuguṇaiś citrāyudhavibhūṣaṇaiḥ
divyāś ca pradadau tasmai nānāratnasamācitāḥ
ajeyāṃ svaguṇair yuktāṃ nāmnā senāṃ dhanaṃjayām rudratulyabalair guptāṃ yodhānām ayutais tribhiḥ na sā vijānāti raṇāt kadā cid vinivartitum
jvalitālātadhāriṇyā citrābharaṇavarmayā
nanṛtuś ca vavalguś ca jahasuś ca mudānvitāḥ
trailokyaṃ trāsitaṃ sarvaṃ jṛmbhamāṇābhir eva ca
sa caiva bhagavān kruddho daityendrasya sutaṃ tadā sahānujaṃ jaghānāśu vṛtraṃ devapatir yathā
śauryād dviguṇayogena tejasā yaśasā śriyā
bhinne krauñce girivare caṇḍaputre ca pātite
senānīś ca kṛto rājan bāla eva mahābalaḥ
tac ca tīrthaṃ mahārāja yatra japyaṃ jajāpa saḥ

na vaimanasyaṃ tasyāstu mukhabhedo 'tha vābhavat śarīram agninādīpya jalamadhyeva harṣitā tac cāsyā vacanaṃ nityam avartad dhṛdi bhārata sarvathā badarāṇy eva paktavyānīti kanyakā sā tan manasi kṛtvaiva maharṣer vacanaṃ śubhā apacad badarāṇy eva na cāpacyanta bhārata tasyāstu caraṇau vahnir dadāha bhagavān svayam na ca tasyā manoduḥkhaṃ svalpam apy abhavat tadā
yatra pūrvaṃ surapatiḥ kratūnāṃ śatam eva hi
tatrāpi lāṅgalī deva ṛṣīn abhyarcya pūjayā itarebhyo 'py adād dānam arthibhyaḥ kāmado vibhuḥ
priyāpriye tulyavṛttir yamavat samadarśanaḥ
na jñātas tena muninā devalena mahātmanā
jaigīṣavyaḥ kadā cit sa darśayām āsa devalam
tasmād ādityalokaṃ ca vrajantaṃ so 'nvapaśyata
so 'py apṛcchad yadā siddhān abruvan pṛcchate tadā yathābhūtaṃ tathādṛṣṭaṃ prabhāvaṃ tapasāṃ nidheḥ
nātaḥ parataraṃ kiṃ cit tulyam asti prabhāvataḥ tejasas tapasaś cāsya yogasya ca mahātmanaḥ evaṃprabhāvo dharmātmā jaigīṣavyas tathāsitaḥ tayor idaṃ sthānavaraṃ tīrthaṃ caiva mahātmanoḥ
jagāma vṛddhabhāvaṃ ca kaumārabrahmacāriṇī
yathādṛṣṭena vidhinā hutvā cāgniṃ vidhānataḥ

nātaḥ parataraṃ puṇyaṃ bhūmeḥ sthānaṃ bhaviṣyati iha tapsyanti ye ke cit tapaḥ paramakaṃ narāḥ dehatyāgena te sarve yāsyanti brahmaṇaḥ kṣayam ye punaḥ puṇyabhājo vai dānaṃ dāsyanti mānavāḥ teṣāṃ sahasraguṇitaṃ bhaviṣyaty acireṇa vai ye ceha nityaṃ manujā nivatsyanti śubhaiṣiṇaḥ yamasya viṣayaṃ te tu na drakṣyanti kadā cana yakṣyanti ye ca kratubhir mahadbhir manujeśvarāḥ teṣāṃ triviṣṭape vāso yāvad bhūmir dhariṣyati

kurukṣetraṃ gamiṣyāmi kurukṣetre vasāmy aham ity evaṃ niścito bhūtvā tenaiva svargam eṣyati kurukṣetraṃ gamiṣyāmi kurukṣetre vasāmy aham tathā sthānaṃ ca maunaṃ ca vīrāsanam upāsmahe evaṃ pralapamāno 'pi cintayaṃś ca muhur muhuḥ dūrastho yadi vā tiṣṭhaṃl labhet svargaṃ viniścitaḥ
ity uvāca svayaṃ śakraḥ saha brahmādibhis tathā tac cānumoditaṃ sarvaṃ brahmaviṣṇumaheśvaraiḥ
sā tu taptvā tapo ghoraṃ duścaraṃ strījanena ha
tasyāśrame 'śvamedhasya phaḷam āpnoti mānavaḥ
tatra saṃtiṣṭhataś cātha rāmasyāpratimadyuteḥ ājagāma mahātejā nārado bhagavān ṛṣiḥ
nihatāḥ pāṇḍavaiḥ sarve gatāḥ svargagatiṃ prati
**** **** adya rāmāhave dvayoḥ bhīmakauravayor vīra

**** **** samabhyarcya yathāvidhi āsanaṃ ca dadau tasmai paryapṛcchad anāmayam tato yudhiṣṭhiraṃ rāmo vākyam etad uvāca ha madhuraṃ dharmasaṃyuktaṃ śūrāṇāṃ hitam eva ca mayā śrutaṃ kathayatām ṛṣīṇāṃ rājasattama kurukṣetraṃ paraṃ puṇyaṃ pāvanaṃ svargyam eva ca daivatair ṛṣibhir juṣṭaṃ brāhmaṇaiś ca mahātmabhiḥ tatra vai yotsyamānā ye dehaṃ tyakṣyanti mānavāḥ teṣāṃ svarge dhruvo vāsaḥ śakreṇa saha māriṣa
tatas te tu kurukṣetraṃ prāptā naravarottamāḥ
rāmarāvaṇayoś caiva vālisugrīvayos tathā
pūrvapaścimajau meghau vāyunā kṣubhitau yathā garjamānau suviṣamaṃ kṣarantau prāvṛṣīva hi
kekayaiḥ sṛñjayair guptaṃ pāñcālaiś ca mahātmabhiḥ rāmeṇāmitavīryeṇa vākyaṃ śauṇḍīryasaṃmatam
śrutvā duryodhanavacaḥ pratyapadyanta tat tathā
**** **** tumulaṃ romaharṣaṇam krodhasaṃvardhanaṃ niṣṭhām (sic)
ājuhāva tato bhīmo yuddhāya ca suyodhanam evam āhvayamāne tu bhīmasene mahātmani
draupadyāḥ kleśadānasya vastrasaṃharaṇasya ca
adya saukhyaṃ tu rājendra kururājasya durmateḥ samāptaṃ ca mahārāja nārīṇāṃ darśanaṃ punaḥ
**** **** tava hetor durātmanaḥ sarveṣām api cāsmākaṃ duḥkhaṃ prāptaṃ sudurmate
iti duryodhanenoktaḥ pratyuvāca vṛkodaraḥ
saṃgrāme dāruṇe tāta subhṛśaṃ krodhasaṃyutau
yamadaṇḍanibhāṃ rājan ghorāṃ prati ariṃdamaḥ
śabda āsīn mahāṃs tatra tumulo lomaharṣaṇaḥ
udvamac cārciṣo vahniṃ sasphuliṅgaṃ samantataḥ
gadānipātaṃ kriyayā moghaṃ cakre sutas tava sa gadāvarjitaṃ dṛṣṭvā bhīmasenam upādravat so 'gacchac calito rājan kaunteyas trirathāntaram
sa saṃkruddho mahārāja bhīmo bhīmaparākramaḥ

tato yamau yamasadṛśau parākrame sapārṣataḥ śinitanayaś ca vīryavān samāhvayann aham aham ity abhitvaraṃs tavātmajaṃ samabhiyayur vadhaiṣiṇaḥ nigṛhya tān punar api pāṇḍavo balī tavātmajaṃ svayam abhigamya kālavat cacāra ca vyapagatakhedavepathuḥ sureśvaro namucim ivottamaṃ raṇe
asminn arthe purāṇo 'yaṃ śloko 'pi niyataḥ kila śrutaś cośanasā gītaḥ satāṃ nītividāṃ mataḥ
sāhasotpatitānāṃ ca nirāśānāṃ ca jīvite na śakyam agrataḥ sthātuṃ śakreṇāpi dhanaṃjaya
samāplutasya bhīmasya krodharaktekṣaṇasya ca
prahṛṣṭamanasaś cāsan pāṇḍavāḥ sṛñjayaiḥ saha
vṛkodaro mahārāja vākśalyam atiduḥsaham
na śāṭhyaṃ naiva no māyā yathāsya sudurātmanaḥ
gato 'si vairasyānṛṇyaṃ pratijñā pūritā tvayā śubhenaivāśubhenātha karmaṇā viramādhunā
ekādaśacamūnāthaṃ kurūṇām adhipaṃ tathā mā sprākṣīr bhīma pādena rājānaṃ jñātim eva ca hatabandhur hatāmātyo bhraṣṭasainyo hato mṛdhe sarvākāreṇa śocyo 'yaṃ nāvahāsyo 'yam īśvaraḥ
tāta manyur na te kāryo nātmā śocyas tvayā tathā nūnaṃ pūrvakṛtaṃ karma sughoram anubhūyate

ātmā na śocanīyas te ślāghyo mṛtyus tavānagha vayam evādhunā śocyāḥ sarvāvasthāsu kaurava kṛpaṇaṃ vartayiṣyāmas tair hīnā bandhubhiḥ priyaiḥ bhrātṝṇāṃ caiva putrāṇāṃ tathā vai śokavihvalāḥ kathaṃ drakṣyāmi vidhavā vadhūḥ śokapariplutāḥ tvam ekaḥ susthito rājan svarge te nilayo dhruvaḥ vayaṃ narakasaṃjñā vai duḥkhaṃ bhokṣyāma dāruṇam
vilalāpa mahīyān saḥ prakṛtyā karuṇāparaḥ
tato rājānam ālokya roṣasaṃraktalocanaḥ baladevo mahārāja tato vacanam abravīt na caiṣa patitaḥ kṛṣṇa kevalaṃ matsamo 'samaḥ āśritasya tu daurbalyād āśrayaḥ paribhartsyate
bhrātṛbhiḥ sahito bhīmaḥ sārjunair astrakovidaiḥ na vivyathe mahārāja dṛṣṭvā haladharaṃ balī
saṃgatāv iva rājendra kailāsāñjanaparvatau
vāsudevavacaḥ śrutvā sīrabhṛt prāha dharmavit

gacchatv adya mahāprājño bhīmaseno mahābalaḥ nikṛtyā nikṛtiprajñaṃ yo hanyād vairiṇaṃ raṇe adharmo vidyate nātra yad bhīmo hatavān ripum yudhyantaṃ samare vīraṃ kuruvṛṣṇiyaśaskaram anena karṇaḥ saṃdiṣṭaḥ pratīto dhanur acchinat tataḥ saṃchinnadhanvānaṃ virathaṃ pauruṣe sthitam vyāyudhīkṛtya hatavān saubhadram apalāyinam janmaprabhṛti lubdhaś ca pāpaś caiṣa durātmavān nihato bhīmasenena durbuddhiḥ kulapāṃsanaḥ pratijñāṃ bhīmasenasya trayodaśasamārjitām kimarthaṃ nābhijānāti yudhyamāno hi viśrutām ūrdhvam utkramya vegena jighāṃsantaṃ vṛkodaraḥ babhañja gadayā corū na ca sthāne ca maṇḍale
svargaṃ gantā mahārājaḥ sasuhṛjjñātibāndhavaḥ
ity uktavati kaunteye dharmarāje yudhiṣṭhire vāsudevo mahābāhur yudhiṣṭhiram abhāṣata
arjuno 'pi mahābāhur aprītenāntarātmanā novāca kiṃ cid vacanaṃ bhrātaraṃ sādhv asādhu vā
aśvatthāmā kṛpaś caiva kṛtavarmā ca sātvataḥ hataṃ duryodhanaṃ dṛṣṭvā pratyapadyanta saṃjaya
nānena kāryaṃ dṛṣṭena śrutenaiva kathāsv api īdṛśā bhinnamaryādā gatiṃ yāntīha tādṛśīm śrutvaivaṃ vacanaṃ tasya sāsūyavacanaṃ tadā jvalann iva ca roṣeṇa sphurann iva ca bhūpatiḥ
tvayā māyāvinā kṛṣṇa māyām arkapramoṣiṇīm kṛtvā hataḥ sindhupatiḥ kiṃ tan na viditaṃ mama
pāṇḍavāḥ duḥkhitāś cāsan purā vai vāraṇāvate
tasmāt so 'pi hataḥ krūras tava doṣeṇa cātmanaḥ

yāny akāryāṇi cāsmākaṃ kṛtānīti prabhāṣase vaiguṇyena tavātyarthaṃ sarvaṃ hi tad anuṣṭhitam bṛhaspater uśanaso nopadeśaḥ śrutas tvayā vṛddhā nopāsitāś caiva hitaṃ vākyaṃ na te śrutam lobhenātibalena tvaṃ tṛṣṇayā ca vaśīkṛtaḥ kṛtavān asyakāryāṇi vipākas teṣu bhujyatām
na me viṣādo bhīmena pādena śira āhatam kāko vā kaṅkagṛdhro vā nidhāsyati padaṃ kṣaṇāt
**** **** vāditraṃ sumanoharam jaguś cāpsaraso rājño yaśaḥ saṃbaddham eva ca
āścaryaṃ paramaṃ jagmuḥ pāñcālāḥ somakaiḥ saha
hatāṃś ca kauravāñ śrutvādharmataś ca mahīpatīn śokārtāḥ śuśucuḥ sarve pāṇḍavā bharatarṣabha

naiṣa śakyaḥ kadā cit tu hantuṃ dharmeṇa pārthivaḥ te vā bhīṣmamukhāḥ sarve maheṣvāsā mahārathāḥ mayānekair upāyais tu māyāyogena cāsakṛt hatās te sarva evājau bhavatāṃ hitam icchatā yadi naivaṃvidhaṃ jātu kuryāṃ jihmam ahaṃ raṇe kuto vo vijayo bhūyaḥ kuto rājyaṃ kuto dhanam
evaṃ vidhātrā vihitaṃ vadham eṣāṃ mahātmanām daivaṃ puruṣakāreṇa na śakyam ativartitum bhūtaṃ bhavyaṃ bhaviṣyac ca nimeṣād yo haniṣyati kṛtāntam anyathākartuṃ necchet so 'yaṃ dhanaṃjayaḥ

gīrbhir maṅgalayuktābhir vandinaḥ stutipāṭhakāḥ anantavijayaṃ rājā kuntīputro yudhiṣṭhiraḥ pauṇḍraṃ dadhmau mahāśaṅkhaṃ bhīmakarmā vṛkodaraḥ nakulaḥ sahadevaś ca sughoṣamaṇipuṣpakau dhṛṣṭadyumnas tathā jaitraṃ sātyakir nandivardhanam teṣāṃ nādena mahatā śaṅkhānāṃ bharatarṣabha āpupūre nabhaḥ sarvaṃ pṛthivī ca cacāla ha tataḥ śaṅkhāś ca bheryaś ca paṇavānakagomukhāḥ pāṇḍusainyeṣv avādyanta sa śabdas tumulo 'bhavat astuvan pāṇḍavān anye gīrbhiś ca stutimaṅgalaiḥ
arjunasya vacaḥ śrutvā punaḥ prāha janārdanaḥ
bhīṣmadroṇakṛpadrauṇikarṇaśalyamukhān rathān
**** **** prasādād bahavo hatāḥ bhīmasenena ca mayā yamābhyāṃ yudhi mānada karmaṇā manasā vācā tvam asmākaṃ gatiḥ parā
gajān aśvān rathāṃś caiva mahānti śayanāni ca
jayantī yatra devī tu tatra vrajata mā ciram upayācitam etan me yuddhārambhopakalpitam
yudhiṣṭhiras tato rājā prāptakālam acintayat
jetuṃ parān parivyūḍhān prāptāṃś caiva tvayācyuta
tat sarvaṃ na yathā naśyet punaḥ kṛṣṇa tathā kuru saṃdehadolāṃ prāptaṃ naś cetaḥ kṛṣṇa jaye sati
tvaṃ caiva naraśārdūla gāndhārī ca yaśasvinī mā śuco naraśārdūla pāṇḍavān prati kilbiṣam
anyeṣv api ca śūreṣu nyastabhāro mahātmasu
vādikā duḥkhasaṃtaptāḥ śokopahatacetasaḥ

bhrātaras te mahārāja vīryaśakrasamā yudhi śatrūṇāṃ ca nihantāro mahābalaparākramāḥ kva gatāḥ pārthivendrādya saubhrātraṃ ca samāśritam tava putrā mahābhāga lakṣmaṇādyā mahārathāḥ pūrṇendusadṛśā vīrāḥ śāntisaundaryakāntibhiḥ kṛtavān nṛpaśārdūla jayantasamavikramam
imaṃ lokam anityaṃ vā hy adyāhaṃ samacintaye vivekibhir nṛbhir nityaṃ cintyamānā viśeṣataḥ na tu viśvasen nityāṃ vai hy adhruvā vai svabhāvataḥ
**** **** pāṇḍuputrair durātmabhiḥ adharmato gadāyuddhe

diṣṭyā hatā gajā yuddhe sagajārohakā bhṛśam diṣṭyāśvā deśajāḥ sarve kṛtino vegaśālinaḥ kuśalaiḥ sādibhiḥ sārdhaṃ nihatā raṇamūrdhani diṣṭyā raṇe vinihatā rathā hemapariṣkṛtāḥ rathibhir yuddhakuśalaiḥ sārdhaṃ vidalitaiḥ śaraiḥ diṣṭyā yodhā dhanuṣmantaḥ sarve yuddhaviśāradāḥ śaranirbhinnasarvāṅgāḥ samare patitābhavan diṣṭyā mamāyudhāny āśu nāśam āyānti vai kṣaṇāt
svasti haṃto tv ahaṃ yuddhe nihatajñātibāndhavaḥ
tathā tu dṛṣṭvā rājendra vartate vijayo mama
śapeyaṃ rājaśārdūla pādābhyāṃ mama vai pituḥ tava priyaṃ kariṣyāmi kṛtvā kāryam anuttamam īpsitaṃ manasā rājan yathecchasi tathā vada
adya rātrau mahārāja nihaniṣyāmi pāṇḍavān sarvāṃś ca nṛpatīn rājan dhṛṣṭadyumnapurogamān sasainyān yudhiśeṣāṃś ca
tac chrutvā vacanaṃ drauṇer dhṛtarāṣṭra tavātmajaḥ
kṛtavarmakṛpābhyāṃ ca aśvatthāme 'pi gacchati āste rājā cintayānas teṣām āgamanaṃ prati gadāparvaṇi rājendra samāpte 'bhīṣṭade nṛṇām brāhmaṇān bhojayet paścād vaktāraṃ ca supūjayet
nārāyaṇaṃ namaskṛtya naraṃ caiva narottamam devīṃ sarasvatīṃ caiva tato jayam udīrayet
**** **** ye cānye 'nucarā hatāḥ pretakāryāṇi sarvāṇi kārayasva narādhipa
alpabuddhir ahaṃkārī nityaṃ yuddham iti bruvan krūro durmarṣaṇo nityam asaṃtuṣṭaś ca vīryavān śrutavān asi medhāvī satyavāṃś caiva nityadā na muhyantīdṛśāḥ santo buddhimanto bhavādṛśāḥ
eṣā vai sarvasattvānāṃ lokeśvara parā gatiḥ

abhāvādīni bhūtāni bhāvamadhyāni bhārata abhāvanidhanāny eva tatra kā paridevanā na śocan mṛtam anveti na śocan mriyate naraḥ evaṃ sāṃsiddhike loke kimartham anuśocasi kālaḥ karṣati bhūtāni sarvāṇi vividhāny uta na kālasya priyaḥ kaś cin na dveṣyaḥ kurusattama yathā vāyus tṛṇāgrāṇi saṃvartayati sarvaśaḥ tathā kālavaśaṃ yānti bhūtāni bharatarṣabha ekasārthaprayātānāṃ sarveṣāṃ tatra gāminām yasya kālaḥ prayāty agre tatra kā paridevanā

śarīrāgniṣu śūrāṇāṃ juhuvus te śarāhutīḥ hūyamānāñ śarāṃś caiva sehus tejasvino mithaḥ evaṃ rājaṃs tavācakṣe svargyaṃ panthānam uttamam na yuddhād adhikaṃ kiṃ cit kṣatriyasyeha vidyate kṣatriyās te mahātmānaḥ śūrāḥ samitiśobhanāḥ āśiṣaḥ paramāḥ prāptā na śocyāḥ sarva eva hi ātmānam ātmanāśvāsya mā śucaḥ puruṣarṣabha nādya śokābhibhūtas tvaṃ kāryam utsraṣṭum arhasi
kālaḥ pacati bhūtāni kālaḥ saṃharate prajāḥ kālaḥ supteṣu jāgarti kālo hi duratikramaḥ
alabdhalābhāḥ kliśyante labdhalābhānupātinaḥ

yena yena śarīreṇa yad yat karma karoti yaḥ tena tena śarīreṇa tat tat phalam upāśnute ātmaiva hy ātmano mitram ātmaiva ripur ātmanaḥ ātmaiva hy ātmanaḥ sākṣī kṛtasyāpakṛtasya ca śubhena karmaṇā saukhyaṃ duḥkhaṃ pāpena karmaṇā kṛtaṃ bhavati sarvatra nākṛtaṃ bhujyate kva cit na hi jñānaviruddheṣu bahvapāyeṣu karmasu mūlaghātiṣu sajjante buddhimanto bhavadvidhāḥ

yadā prājñāś ca mūḍhāś ca dhanavanto 'tha nirdhanāḥ sarve pitṛvaśaṃ prāpya svapanti vigatajvarāḥ nirmāṃsair asthibhūyiṣṭhair gātraiḥ snāyunibandhanaiḥ kiṃ viśeṣaṃ prapaśyanti tatra teṣāṃ pare janāḥ yena pratyavagaccheyuḥ kularūpaviśeṣaṇam kasmād anyonyam icchanti vipralabdhadhiyo narāḥ
jñānayogena mahatā samuttīrṇā maharṣayaḥ
tatas tu vāyuvegena kalalaṃ kiṃ cid antaram

yadā prājñāś ca mūḍhāś ca dhanavanto 'tha nirdhanāḥ kulīnāś cākulīnāś ca mānino 'thāpy amāninaḥ sarve pitṛvanaṃ prāptāḥ svapanti vigatatvacaḥ nirmāṃsair asthibhūyiṣṭhair gātraiḥ snāyunibandhanaiḥ kiṃ viśeṣaṃ prapaśyanti tatra teṣāṃ pare janāḥ yena pratyavagaccheyuḥ kularūpaviśeṣaṇam yadā sarve samaṃ nyastāḥ svapanti dharaṇītale kasmād anyonyam icchanti pralabdhum iha durbudhāḥ pratyakṣaṃ ca parokṣaṃ ca yo niśamya śrutiṃ tv imām
piśitādair atibhayair mahogrākṛtibhis tathā
vepathuś cābhavad gātre romaharṣaś ca bhārata
kūpamadhye mahānāgam apaśyata mahābalam
śatāt sahasrāl lakṣād vā nirvedo yasya jāyate mohayanti bhṛśaṃ kāmā mandānāṃ viṣayaiṣiṇām

bhramamāṇā na muhyanti saṃsāre na bhramanti te saṃsāre bhramatāṃ rājan duḥkham etad dhi jāyate tasmād asya nivṛttyarthaṃ yatnam evācared budhaḥ upekṣā nātra kartavyā śataśākhaḥ pravardhate yatendriyo naro rājan krodhalobhanirākṛtaḥ saṃtuṣṭaḥ satyavādī yaḥ sa śāntim adhigacchati
jñānauṣadham avāpyeha dūrapāraṃ mahauṣadham chindyād duḥkhamahāvyādhiṃ naraḥ saṃyatamānasaḥ
tathātmamātṛputrādir na duḥkhāni vyapohati

evaṃ jñātvā mahāprājña sa teṣām aurdhvadaihikam kartum arhasi tenaiva phalaṃ prāpsyasi vai sukham na tat kratusahasreṇa nopavāsaiś ca nityaśaḥ abhayasya ca dānena yat phalaṃ prāpnuyān naraḥ na hy ātmanaḥ priyataraṃ kiṃ cid bhūteṣu niścitam aniṣṭaṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ maraṇaṃ nāma bhārata tasmāt sarveṣu bhūteṣu dayā kāryā vipaścitā nānāmohasamāyuktā buddhijālena saṃvṛtāḥ asūkṣmadṛṣṭayo mandā bhrāmyante tatra tatra ha susūkṣmadṛṣṭayo dhīrā vrajanti brahma śāśvatam
tasyāntaṃ nādhigacchāmi ṛte prāṇaviparyayāt
yādṛśo jāyate rājā tādṛśo 'sya jano bhavet adharmo dharmatāṃ yāti svāmī ced dhārmiko bhavet svāmino guṇadoṣābhyāṃ bhṛtyāḥ syur nātra saṃśayaḥ duṣṭaṃ rājānam āsādya gatās te tanayā nṛpa
vidurasya tu tad vākyaṃ śrutvā tu puruṣarṣabhaḥ yujyatāṃ yānam ity uktvā punar vacanam abravīt
sarve hy abhimukhāḥ śūrā yudhyamānā hatāribhiḥ
samāsādyātha vai drauṇiṃ pāṇḍuputrā mahārathāḥ vyajayanta raṇe rājan vikramya tadanantaram
pūrvam ānāyitā rājan kṛṣṇenākliṣṭakarmaṇā duryodhanena yā pūrvaṃ kāritā pratimāyasī yogyābhūmau śramārthāya bhīmam uddiśya cetasā
**** **** samarthaḥ san balābale ātmāparādhāt kasmāt tvaṃ kuruṣe kopam īdṛśam uktavāṃs tvāṃ tadaivāhaṃ bhīṣmadroṇau ca bhārata viduraḥ saṃjayaś caiva tvaṃ tu rājan na tat kṛthāḥ sa vāryamāṇo nāsmākaṃ
kṣamāśīlā purā bhūtvā sādya na kṣamase katham adharmaṃ jahi dharmajñe yato dharmas tato jayaḥ
adharmeṇa jitaḥ pūrvaṃ tena cāpi yudhiṣṭhiraḥ nikṛtāś ca sadaiva sma tato viṣamam ācaram
mā kṛthā hṛdi tan mātar na tat pītaṃ mayānaghe

na pratijñām akaravaṃ pibāmy asṛg arer iti dantoṣṭhaṃ nābhicakrāma rudhiraṃ me ca mā śucaḥ nāsṛk pātuṃ tvayā śakyaṃ mama saṃgrāmamūrdhani vṛthā garjasi mūḍhas tvaṃ nistoyas toyado yathā tad evaṃ bruvamāṇasya tava sūno 'lpacetasaḥ (sic) vibhidya hṛdayaṃ pītaṃ rākṣasyā mama bhāryayā
adhunā kiṃ tu doṣeṇa pariśaṅkitum arhasi
tvayā tu sādhitaṃ karma puṣkarākṣa mahādyute
śyāmānāṃ varavarṇānāṃ gaurīṇām ekavāsasām duryodhanavarastrīṇāṃ paśya vṛndāni keśava aśrulālāmbubhiḥ siktaṃ siktaṃ śīkaravāribhiḥ duryodhanavarastrīṇāṃ sicyate nayanāmbubhiḥ
babhūva bharataśreṣṭha prāṇibhir gatajīvitaiḥ
ity evam abruvaṃ naivaṃ yataḥ kṛṣṇas tato jayaḥ
yaṃ purā paryupāsīnā ramayanti varastriyaḥ taṃ vīraśayane suptaṃ ramayanty aśivāḥ śivāḥ
kāntāsaṅgamukhasparśanidrayāvālikāmukhaḥ (sic)
vibhāti nihatasyāpi śvāpadair ardhabhakṣitam
na smarāmy aparādhaṃ te kiṃ māṃ na pratibhāṣase nanu māṃ tvaṃ purā dūrād abhivīkṣyābhibhāṣase
subhadrāṃ bhadracarita smarethās tridivaṃ gataḥ
kārṣṇinābhihataṃ kṛṣṇa lakṣmaṇaṃ priyadarśanam
duḥṣalāṃ mānuṣaṃ te (sic) rakṣamāṇā mahābhujam
jayadrathe yadi brūyur aparādhaṃ kathaṃ cana madraputre kathaṃ brūyur aparādhaṃ vivakṣavaḥ
kiṃ nu vakṣyati vai satsu goṣṭhīṣu ca sabhāsu ca apuṇyam ayaśasyaṃ ca karmedaṃ sātyakiḥ svayam
ayaṃ sa hantā śatrūṇāṃ mitrāṇām abhayapradaḥ pradātā gosahasrāṇāṃ kṣatriyāntakaraḥ karaḥ
śokārtā yat svasā kṛṣṇā kṛpaṇaṃ paryupāsate vināśaṃ kāṅkṣatī nityaṃ putrāṇāṃ krudhyatī mama
dhṛṣṭadyumnasutāḥ sarve śiśavo hemamālinaḥ rathāgnyagāraṃ cāpārciṃ śaraśaktigadendhanam droṇam āsādya nirdagdhāḥ śalabhā iva pāvakam tathaiva nihatāḥ śūrāḥ śerate rucirāṅgadāḥ
evaṃ mām iha putrasya putraḥ pitaram anvagāt
anāthavad avijñāto lokeṣv anabhilakṣitaḥ
daivād eva vinaśyanti vṛṣṇayo nātra saṃśayaḥ
keṣu keṣu ca lokeṣu gatā hy ete narottamāḥ yudhyamānā hatāḥ saṃkhye ye caivātrāparāṅmukhāḥ
kṣatradharmeṇa nihatās te gatāḥ paramāṃ gatim
citāḥ kṛtvā maheṣvāsān sarvān etān yathāvidhi
kavacāni vicitrāṇi gaṅgām avajagāhire
yaḥ sa vīro maheṣvāso mahābalaparākramaḥ
yo 'vṛṇīta yaśaḥ śūraḥ prāṇair api sadā bhuvi
yaḥ śarormir dhvajāvarto mahābhujamahāgrahaḥ talaśabdapraṇudito mahārathamahāhradaḥ
karṇārjunasahāyo 'haṃ jayeyam api vāsavam

ya idaṃ śṛṇuyād dhīmāñ śraddhābhaktisamanvitaḥ tasya nārāyaṇo devaḥ pradadāti samīhitam mānasaṃ vācikaṃ caiva kāyikaṃ yac ca duṣkṛtam purāṇajñaṃ pūjayitvā brahmahatyā vimucyate putrapautraiḥ parivṛta iha loke sukhaṃ labhet muktvā ca sakalāl lokān indraloke mahīyate

vyāsaṃ vasiṣṭhanaptāraṃ śakteḥ pautram akalmaṣam parāśarātmajaṃ vande śukatātaṃ taponidhim vyāsāya viṣṇurūpāya vyāsarūpāya viṣṇave namo vai brahmanidhaye vāsiṣṭhāya namo namaḥ namo dharmāya mahate namaḥ kṛṣṇāya vedhase brāhmaṇebhyo namaskṛtya dharmān vakṣyāmi śāśvatān namo bhagavate tasmai vyāsāyāmitatejase yasya prasādād vakṣyāmi nārāyaṇakathām imām
mañjūṣāyāṃ samādhāya gaṅgāsrotasy amajjayat
anāgate vartamāne trailokye nātra saṃśayaḥ
aho citraṃ mahac citraṃ viparītam idaṃ jagat yenāpatrapate sādhur asādhus tena tuṣyati
asmaddveṣeṇa saṃtaptaḥ sukhaṃ na smeha vindati
