khyāpanenānutāpena dānena tapasāpi vā nivṛttyā tīrthagamanāc chrutismṛtijapena ca
drohāt kim anyaj jñātīnāṃ gṛdhyante yena devatāḥ
alābhe sati vā lābhe samadarśī mahātapāḥ
te 'pi vai puruṣā loke parvatānām ihopamāḥ
na cāpi śociti hatāḥ svadharme pūrvaiḥ kṛte pārthivamukhyamukhyaiḥ
svāyaṃbhuvena manunā tathānyaiś cakravartibhiḥ yady ayaṃ hy adhamaḥ panthāḥ kasmāt tais tair niṣevitaḥ kṛtatretādiyuktāni guṇavanti ca bhārata yugāni bahuśas taiś ca bhukteyam avanir nṛpa
paralokabhayād ete pāpāḥ pāpaṃ na kurvate
māhendraṃ ca grahaṃ lebhe lokānāṃ ceśvaro 'bhavat
yadi na praṇayed rājan daṇḍaṃ daṇḍyeṣv atandritaḥ
ubhābhyāṃ vadhyate vāyur vidhānam idam ucyate
rajasā śāmyate sattvaṃ rajaḥ sattvena śāmyati
yo hy anāḍhyaḥ sa patitas tad ucchiṣṭaṃ yad alpakam bahv apathyaṃ balavato na kiṃ cit trāyate dhanam
pāram avyaktarūpasya vyaktaṃ tyaktvā svakarmabhiḥ tasminn anirjite yuddhe kām avasthāṃ gamiṣyasi
ātmodarakṛte 'thājñaḥ karoti vighasaṃ bahu
**** **** guruvṛddhopacāyinaḥ devatātithibhṛtyānāṃ nirvapanto yathāvidhi sthānam iṣṭam avāpsyāmo

mameśvarasamaṃ sattvaṃ brahmaṇā caiva yat samam vāsudevasamaṃ caiva na bhūtaṃ na bhaviṣyati tathā tvaṃ yaudhamukhyeṣu sattvaṃ paramam ucyate balam indre ca vāyau ca balaṃ yac ca janārdane tad balaṃ bhīmasene ca tvayi cārjuna vidyate tvatsamaś citrayodhī ca dūrapātī ca pāṇḍava divyāstreṇa ca saṃpannaḥ ko vānyas tvatsamo naraḥ
dhārmikaṃ dharmayuktaṃ ca niḥśeṣaṃ jñāyate mayā
sunirmalaṃ kulaṃ brahmann asmiñ jagati viśrutam

brahmahatyāṃ surāpānaṃ steyaṃ gurvaṅganāgamam mahānti pātakāny āhuḥ saṃyogaṃ caiva taiḥ saha na steyasadṛśaṃ brahman mahāpātakam asty uta jagaty asmin mahābhāga brahmahatyāsamaṃ hi tat sarvapātakināṃ brahman daṇḍaḥ śārīra ucyate taskarasya viśeṣeṇa nānyo daṇḍo vidhīyate brāhmaṇaḥ kṣatriyo vāpi vaiśyaḥ śūdro 'tha vā dvijaḥ sarve kāmakṛte pāpe hantavyā na vicāraṇā rājabhir dhṛtadaṇḍā vai kṛtvā pāpāni mānavāḥ nirmalāḥ svargam āyānti santaḥ sukṛtino yathā uddhṛtaṃ naḥ kulaṃ brahman rājñā daṇḍe dhṛte tvayi

pratyakṣam anumānaṃ ca upamānaṃ tathāgamaḥ arthāpattis tathaitihyaṃ saṃśayo nirṇayas tathā ākāro hīṅgitaś caiva gatiś ceṣṭā ca bhārata pratijñā caiva hetuś ca dṛṣṭāntopanayas tathā uktir nigamanaṃ teṣāṃ prameyaṃ ca prayojanam etāni sādhanāny āhur bahuvargaprasiddhaye pratyakṣam anumānaṃ ca sarveṣāṃ yonir iṣyate pramāṇajño hi śaknoti daṇḍayonau vicakṣaṇaḥ apramāṇavatā nīto daṇḍo hanyān mahīpatim

pramāṇajñā mahīpāla nyāyaśāstrāvalambinaḥ vedārthatattvavid rājaṃs tarkaśāstrabahuśrutaḥ mantre ca vyavahāre ca niyoktavyo vijānatā tarkaśāstrakṛtā buddhir dharmaśāstrakṛtā ca yā daṇḍanītikṛtā caiva trailokyam api sādhayet niyojyā vedatattvajñā yajñakarmasu pārthiva vedajñā ye ca śāstrajñās te ca rājan subuddhayaḥ ānvīkṣikītrayīvārtādaṇḍanītiṣu pāragāḥ te tu sarvatra yoktavyās te ca buddheḥ parāṃ gatāḥ
sukhāntaprabhavaṃ duḥkhaṃ duḥkhāntaprabhavaṃ sukham
yajanti yajñān vijayanti rājyaṃ rakṣanti rāṣṭrāṇi priyāṇi caiṣām
nopabhokṣye varān bhogān rājyaṃ tatparicchadān
śokadāvānalajala śokakūpaprapūraka śokavallīkuṭhārādya śokanāśanakīrtana
kṣatradharmaratāḥ śūrā vedavedāṅgapāragāḥ prāptā vīragatiṃ puṇyāṃ na tāñ śocitum arhasi
krūragrahābhiśamanam āyurvardhanam uttamam agrimāṇāṃ kṣitibhujām upādānaṃ manoharam
ayajvānam adakṣiṇyam adhiśvaityety upāharat
ya sahasraṃ sahasrāṇāṃ gajānām atipadminām ījāno vitate yajñe dakṣiṇām atyakālayat
saṃtuṣṭāḥ sarvasiddhārthā nirbhayāḥ svairacāriṇaḥ narāḥ satyavratāś cāsan rāme rājyaṃ praśāsati
jaghāna rākṣasaṃ rāmaḥ paulastyaṃ lokakaṇṭakam
ājānubāhuḥ sumukho hariskandho mahābhujaḥ
yāni kṛtvā naraḥ pūto bhaviṣyati narādhipa

lakṣyaḥ śastrabhṛtāṃ vā syād viduṣām icchayātmanaḥ prāsyed ātmānam agnau vā samiddhe trir avākśirāḥ japan vānyatamaṃ vedaṃ yojanānāṃ śataṃ vrajet sarvasvaṃ vā vedavide brāhmaṇāyopapādayet dhanaṃ vā jīvanāyālaṃ gṛhaṃ vā saparicchadam mucyate brahmahatyāyā goptā gobrāhmaṇasya ca
pādajocchiṣṭakāṃsyaṃ ca gavāghrātam athāpi vā gaṇḍūṣocchiṣṭam api vā viśuddhyed daśabhis tu tat

anādeśe japo homa upavāsas tathaiva ca ātmajñānaṃ puṇyanadyo yatra prāyaś ca tatparāḥ anādiṣṭaṃ tathaitāni puṇyāni dharaṇībhṛtaḥ suvarṇaprāśanam api ratnādisnānam eva ca devasthānābhigamanam ājyaprāśanam eva ca etāni medhyaṃ puruṣaṃ kurvanty āśu na saṃśayaḥ na garveṇa bhavet prājñaḥ kadā cid api mānavaḥ dīrgham āyur athecchan hi trirātraṃ coṣṇapo bhavet

rājānnaṃ teja ādatte śūdrānnaṃ brahmavarcasam āyuḥ suvarṇakārānnam avīrāyāś ca yoṣitaḥ viṣṭhā vārdhuṣikasyānnaṃ gaṇikānnam athendriyam mṛṣyanti ye copapatiṃ strījitānāṃ ca sarvaśaḥ dīkṣitasya kadaryasya kratuvikrayikasya ca
praviveśa sabhāṃ rājā sudharmāṃ vāsavo yathā
vaiśaṃpāyana uvāca tatas tatra tu rājānaṃ tiṣṭhantaṃ bhrātṛbhiḥ saha uvāca devakīputraḥ sarvadarśī janārdanaḥ
audumbaraṃ ratnapīṭhaṃ vyāghracarmottaracchadam
tata utthāya dāśārhaḥ śaṅkham ādāya pūjitam
samanujñāya kṛṣṇena bhrātṛbhiḥ saha pāṇḍavaḥ pāñcajanyābhiṣiktaś ca rājāmṛtamukho 'bhavat
rathaiḥ kuśalibhiḥ sarvair bhrātṛbhiḥ sasuhṛjjanaḥ lokanāthasya kṛṣṇasya prasādād bharatarṣabha vijitya śatrūn akhilān prajā dharmeṇa rañjayan śāśvataṃ savanadvīpāṃ paripālaya medinīm
etan nāmaśataṃ viṣṇor dharmarājena kīrtitam yaḥ paṭhec chṛṇuyād vāpi sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate
duḥśāsanasya tu gṛhaṃ bheje sarvasamṛddhimat
varṇān saṃsthāpayām āsa nayena vinayena ca
tathāpi bhagavan deva prapannāyābhiyācate
śuklapakṣasya cāṣṭamyāṃ māghamāsasya pārthiva prājāpatye ca nakṣatre madhyaṃ prāpte divākare

taṃ bāhyamuninā caiva gālavena mahātmanā śrīmatā yājñavalkyena śaṅkhena pulahena ca bṛhaspatiś ca śukraś ca cyavanaś ca mahāmuniḥ sanatkumāraḥ kapilo vālmīkis tumburuḥ kuruḥ maudgalyo bhārgavo rāmas tṛṇabindur mahāmuniḥ pippalādaś ca vāyuś ca saṃvartaḥ pulahaḥ kacaḥ kāśyapaś ca pulastyaś ca kratur dakṣaḥ parāśaraḥ marīcir aṅgirāḥ kāśyo gautamo gālavo muniḥ dhaumyo vibhāṇḍo māṇḍavyo dhaumraḥ kṛṣṇānubhautikaḥ ulūkaḥ paramo vipro mārkaṇḍeyo mahāmuniḥ bhāskariḥ pūraṇaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ sūtaḥ paramadhārmikaḥ
tathānyair munibhiś caiva pulastyena mahātmanā
anādinidhanaṃ jiṣṇum ātmayoniṃ sanātanam

anādyantaṃ paraṃ brahma na devā narṣayo viduḥ eko 'yaṃ veda bhagavān dhātā nārāyaṇo hariḥ nārāyaṇād ṛṣigaṇās tathā siddhamahoragāḥ devā devarṣayaś caiva yaṃ viduḥ param avyayam devadānavagandharvā yakṣarākṣasapannagāḥ yaṃ na jānanti ko hy eṣa kuto vā bhagavān iti
sahasrabāhumukuṭaṃ sahasravadanojjvalam
yasmin nityaṃ tapas taptaṃ yad aṅgeṣv anutiṣṭhati sarvātmā sarvavit sarvaḥ sarvajñaḥ sarvabhāvanaḥ

yam ekaṃ bahudhātmānaṃ prādurbhūtam adhokṣajam nānyabhaktāḥ kriyāvanto yajante sarvakāmadam yam āhur jagataḥ kośaṃ yasmin saṃnihitāḥ prajāḥ yasmiṃl lokāḥ sphurantīme jale śakunayo yathā ṛtam ekākṣaraṃ brahma yat tat sadasataḥ param anādimadhyaparyantaṃ na devā narṣayo viduḥ yaṃ surāsuragandharvāḥ sasiddharṣimahoragāḥ prayatā nityam arcanti paramaṃ duḥkhabheṣajam anādinidhanaṃ devam ātmayoniṃ sanātanam apratarkyam avijñeyaṃ hariṃ nārāyaṇaṃ prabhum
hutāśanamukhair devair dhyāyate sakalaṃ jagat haviḥ prathamabhoktā ca tasmai hotrātmane namaḥ
caturbhiś ca caturbhiś ca dvābhyāṃ pañcabhir eva ca hūyate ca punar dvābhyāṃ tasmai homātmane namaḥ
viśve ca marutaś caiva rudrādityāśvināv api vasavaḥ siddhasādhyāś ca tasmai devātmane namaḥ yaḥ śete yogam āsthāya paryaṅke nāgabhūṣite phaṇāsahasraracite tasmai nidrātmane namaḥ
yataḥ sarve prasūyante hy anaṅgātmāṅgadehinaḥ unmādaḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ tasmai kāmātmane namaḥ

yasmāt sarvāḥ prasūyante sargapralayavikriyāḥ yasmiṃś caiva pralīyante tasmai hetvātmane namaḥ yo niṣaṇṇo bhaved rātrau divā bhavati viṣṭhitaḥ iṣṭāniṣṭasya ca draṣṭā tasmai draṣṭātmane namaḥ akuṇṭhaṃ sarvakāryeṣu dharmakāryārtham udyatam vaikuṇṭhasya hi tad rūpaṃ tasmai kāryātmane namaḥ triḥsaptakṛtvo yaḥ kṣatraṃ dharmavyutkrāntagauravam kruddho nijaghne samare tasmai krauryātmane namaḥ vibhajya paṃcadhātmānaṃ vāyur bhūtvā śarīragaḥ yaś ceṣṭayati bhūtāni tasmai vāyvātmane namaḥ

jvalanārkendutārāṇāṃ jyotiṣāṃ divyamūrtinām yas tejayati tejāṃsi tasmai tejātmane namaḥ piṅgekṣaṇasaṭaṃ yasya rūpaṃ daṃṣṭrānakhāyudham dānavendrāntakaraṇaṃ tasmai dṛptātmane namaḥ rasātalagataḥ śrīmān ananto bhagavān vibhuḥ jagad dhārayate kṛtsnaṃ tasmai vīryātmane namaḥ
vaidyuto jāṭharaś caiva pāvakaḥ śucir eva ca dahanaḥ sarvabhakṣāṇāṃ tasmai vahnyātmane namaḥ
caitanyaṃ sarvato nityaṃ sarvaprāṇihṛdi sthitam sarvātītataraṃ sūkṣmaṃ tasmai sūkṣmātmane namaḥ
sāṃkhyair yogair viniścitya sādhyaiś ca paramarṣibhiḥ yasya na jñāyate tattvaṃ tasmai guhyātmane namaḥ
yo jāto vasudevena devakyāṃ yadunandanaḥ śaṅkhacakragadāpāṇir vāsudevātmane namaḥ
candrārdhakṛtaśīrṣāya vyālayajñopavītine pinākaśūlahastāya tasmā ugrātmane namaḥ
avyaktaṃ vyaktarūpeṇa vyāptaṃ sarvaṃ tvayā vibho vyaktāvyaktasvarūpeṇa vyāptaṃ sarvaṃ tvayā vibho avyaktaṃ brahmaṇo rūpaṃ vyaktam etac carācaram

nārāyaṇaṃ sahasrākṣaṃ sarvalokanamaskṛtam hiraṇyanābhaṃ yajñāṅgam amṛtaṃ viśvatomukham daśāśvamedhī punar eti janma kṛṣṇapraṇāmī na punarbhavāya kṛṣṇavratāḥ kṛṣṇam anusmaranto rātrau ca kṛṣṇaṃ punar utthitā ye te kṛṣṇadehāḥ praviśanti kṛṣṇam ājyaṃ yathā mantrahutaṃ hutāśe
tasya yajñavarāhasya viṣṇor amitatejasaḥ praṇāmaṃ ye 'pi kurvanti teṣām api namo namaḥ
nārāyaṇaparaṃ brahma nārāyaṇaparaṃ tapaḥ nārāyaṇaparaṃ cedaṃ sarvaṃ nārāyaṇātmakam
anādinidhanaṃ viṣṇuṃ sarvalokamaheśvaram lokādhyakṣaṃ stuvan nityaṃ sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate stavarājaḥ samāpto 'yaṃ viṣṇor adbhutakarmaṇaḥ gāṅgeyena purā gītaḥ mahāpātakanāśanaḥ

iti smaran paṭhati ca śārṅgadhanvanaḥ śṛṇoti vā yadukulanandanastavam sa cakrabhṛtpratihatasarvakilbiṣo janārdanaṃ praviśati dehasaṃkṣaye yaṃ yoginaḥ prāṇaviyogakāle yatnena citte viniveśayanti sa taṃ purastād dharim īkṣamāṇaḥ prāṇāñ jahau prāptaphalo hi bhīṣmaḥ stavarājaḥ samāpto 'yaṃ viṣṇor adbhutakarmaṇaḥ gāṅgeyena purā gīto mahāpātakanāśanaḥ idaṃ naraḥ stavarājaṃ mumukṣuḥ paṭhañ śuciḥ kaluṣitakalmaṣāpaham vyatītya lokān mahataḥ samāgatān padaṃ saṃgacchaty amṛtaṃ mahātmanaḥ
kimarthaṃ bhārgaveṇedaṃ kṣatram utsāditaṃ purā rāmeṇa yaduśārdūla kurukṣetre mahātmanā
kṣatravīryaṃ ca sakalaṃ tava mātre samarpitam viparyayeṇa te bhadre naitad evaṃ bhaviṣyati mātus te brāhmaṇo bhūyāt tava ca kṣatriyaḥ sutaḥ
dṛṣṭam etat purā bhadre jñātaṃ ca tapasā mayā brahmabhūtaṃ hi sakalaṃ pitus tava kulaṃ bhavet
so 'pi putraṃ hy ajanayaj jāmadagnyaṃ sudāruṇam
**** **** jamadagniṃ taponidhim so 'pi putraṃ hy ajanayad
dattātreyaprasādena rājā bāhusahasravān cakravartī mahātejā viprāṇām āśvamedhike
nācintayat tadā śāpaṃ tena dattaṃ mahātmanā
tannimittam abhūd yuddhaṃ jāmadagner mahātmanaḥ
pratyakṣaṃ rāmamātuś ca tathaivāśramavāsinām śrutvā rāmas tam arthaṃ ca kruddhaḥ kālānalopamaḥ dhanurvede 'dvitīyo hi divyāstraiḥ samalaṃkṛtaḥ candrabimbārdhasaṃkāśaṃ paraśuṃ gṛhya bhārgavaḥ
pṛthivī dakṣiṇā dattā vājimedhe mama tvayā punar asyāḥ pṛthivyā hi dattvā dātum anīśvaraḥ

brāhmaṇā madyapāḥ ke cin mūrkhāḥ paṇḍitamāninaḥ brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyā vaiśyāḥ śūdrāś cotpathagāminaḥ parasparaṃ samāśritya ghātayanty apathi sthitāḥ svadharmaṃ brāhmaṇās tyaktvā pāṣaṇḍāṃś ca samāśritāḥ caurikānṛtamāyāś ca sarve caiva prakurvate svadharmasthān dvijān hatvā tathāśramanivāsinaḥ vaiśyāḥ satpathasaṃsthāś ca śūdrā ye caiva dhārmikāḥ tān sarvān ghātayanti sma durācārāḥ sunirbhayāḥ yajñādhyayanaśīlāṃś ca āśramasthāṃs tapasvinaḥ gopālavṛddhanārīṇāṃ nāśaṃ kurvanti cāpare ānvīkṣakī trayī vārtā na ca nītiḥ pravartate vrātyatāṃ samanuprāptā bahavo hi dvijātayaḥ adharottarāpacāreṇa mlecchabhūtāś ca sarvaśaḥ
tāṃ dṛṣṭvā dravatīṃ tatra saṃbhrāntaḥ sa mahāmanāḥ viparyayeṇa tenāśu
vyokārahemakārādijātiṃ nityam apāśritāḥ
vartamānena varteyaṃ tat kṣipraṃ saṃvidhīyatām
kiṃ punaś cātmano lokān uttamān uttamair guṇaiḥ
pravṛttaś ca nivṛttaś ca sa cāpi viditas tava deśajātikulānāṃ ca jānīṣe dharmalakṣaṇam vedokto yaś ca śiṣṭoktaḥ sa caiva viditas tava
evam uktaḥ pratyuvāca dharmarājo yudhiṣṭhiraḥ
sarvadharmeṣu yo hy arthaḥ sa ca me hṛdi saṃsthitaḥ
yo lobhān na samīkṣeta dharmasetuṃ sanātanam nihanti yas taṃ samare kṣatriyo vai sa dharmavit lohitodāṃ keśatṛṇāṃ gajaśailāṃ dhvajadrumām mahīṃ karoti yuddheṣu kṣatriyo yaḥ sa dharmavit
ārjavena samāyuktā modante ṛṣayo divi
vapanaṃ draviṇādānaṃ svapuryāś ca visarjanam
svāmyamātyasuhṛtkośarāṣṭradurgabalāni ca
śrīvaiśaṃpāyanaḥ etāvad uktvā bhūyo 'pi bhīṣmaḥ kurupitāmahaḥ uvāca vacanaṃ dhīmān sarvataḥ sārasaṃgraham

krīḍāpūrve raṇe dyūte visrambheṇa samanvitam uktaṃ kaitavyam ity etad upāyo navamo budhaiḥ upekṣā sarvakāryeṣu karmaṇāṃ karaṇeṣu ca aniṣṭānāṃ samutthāne trivargo naśyate yayā indrajālādikā māyā vāgjīvanakuśīlavaiḥ sunimittair durnimittair utpātaiś ca samanvitam ḍambho liṅgaṃ samāśritya śatruvarge prayujyate śāṭhyaṃ niśceṣṭatā proktā cittadoṣapradūṣikā

anādinidhano devaś caitanyādisamanvitaḥ jñānāni ca vaśe yasya tārakādīny aśeṣataḥ aṇimādiguṇopetam aiśvaryaṃ na ca kṛtrimam tuṣṭyarthaṃ brahmaṇaḥ putro lalāṭād utthitaḥ prabhuḥ arudat sasvanaṃ ghoraṃ jagataḥ prabhur avyayaḥ jāyamānaḥ pitā putre putraḥ pitari caiva hi buddhiṃ viśvasṛje dattvā brahmāṇḍaṃ yena nirmitam yasmin hiraṇmayo haṃsaḥ śakuniḥ samapadyata kartā sarvasya lokasya brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ sa devaḥ sarvabhūtātmā mahādevaḥ sanātanaḥ asaṃkhyātasahasrāṇāṃ rudrāṇāṃ sthānam avyayam
**** **** devāt prāpya maheśvarāt prajānāṃ hitam anvicchan
prāpya nārīṃ mahābhāgāṃ rūpiṇīṃ kāmamohitaḥ saubhāgyena ca saṃpannāṃ guṇaiś cānuttamāṃ satīm
atrir mahātmā bhagavāṃs tasyāsīd vedakārakaḥ nāradaś cetihāsādīni nityam eva samādadhat
manvantareṣu sarveṣu viṣamā jāyate mahī ujjahāra tato vainyaḥ śilājālān samantataḥ dhanuṣkoṭyā mahārāja tena śailā vivardhitāḥ
āpas tastambhire cāsya samudram abhiyāsyataḥ parvatāś ca dadur mārgaṃ dhvajabhaṅgaś ca nābhavat
dvaidhībhāve ca bhūtānāṃ śapathaḥ kīdṛśo bhavet adharmasya phalaṃ yac ca śapathasya vilaṅghane sarvam etad yathātattvaṃ vyavahāraṃ ca tādṛśam samāsavyāsayogena kathayasva pitāmaha
avaśyabharaṇīyo hi vaiśyo rājñā janādhipa
**** **** yajñas tasyaiva bhārata agre sarveṣu yajñeṣu
saṃpūjyo vai brāhmaṇas triṣu varṇeṣu hṛṣṭaḥ
tasmād varṇas tata[to] vai jātidharmaḥ saṃsṛjyate tasya vai kopa eṣaḥ
guroś chāyānugo nityam adhīyānaḥ suyantritaḥ
aniketaś carann ekaḥ sarvān eva yudhiṣṭhira
evaṃvidho brāhmaṇaḥ kauravendra vṛttād apeto yo bhaven mandacetāḥ
sarvodyogā rājadharmeṣu rājan sthānaṃ cāhū rājadharme purāṇam
tasmād dharmo rājadharmād viśiṣṭo nānyo loke vidyate 'jātaśatro sarvāṇy etāni karmāṇi kṣātre bharatasattama bhavanti jīvalokaś ca kṣatradharme pratiṣṭhitaḥ
bāhlīkāś ca turuṣkāś ca pāñcālāś ca tathā smṛtāḥ
arhān pūjayato nityaṃ saṃvibhāgena pāṇḍava sarvatas tasya kaunteya bhaikṣyāśramapadaṃ bhavet
lokamukhyeṣu satkāraṃ liṅgimukhyeṣu cāsakṛt kurvatas tasya kaunteya vanyāśramapadaṃ bhavet
saṃvibhāgena bhūtānām atithīnāṃ tathārcanāt devayajñaiś ca rājendra vanyāśramapadaṃ bhavet mardanaṃ pararāṣṭrāṇāṃ śiṣṭārthaṃ satyavikrama kurvataḥ puruṣavyāghra vanyāśramapadaṃ bhavet
āhnikaṃ japamānasya devān pūjayataḥ sadā dharmeṇa puruṣavyāghra dharmāśramapadaṃ bhavet mṛtyur vā rakṣaṇaṃ veti yasya rājño viniścayaḥ prāṇadyūte tatas tasya brahmāśramapadaṃ bhavet
yo durbalo na namati sa mahatkleśabhāg bhavet
**** **** vivayomānaṃ tathaiva ca (sic)
varṇinaś cāśramāś caiva mlecchāḥ sarve ca dasyavaḥ
etan me śaṃsa devarṣe dharmakāmārthasaṃśayam
**** **** rājyasya ca vivecanam daṇḍanītiṃ samāśritya
na dārā na ca putraḥ syān na dhanaṃ na parigrahaḥ
rājā prajānāṃ prathamaṃ śarīraṃ prajāś ca rājño 'pratimaṃ śarīram rājñā vihīnā na bhavanti deśā deśair vihīnā na nṛpā bhavanti

vidvāṃsaḥ kṣatriyā vaiśyā brāhmaṇāś ca bahuśrutāḥ daṇḍanītau tu niṣpannā mantriṇaḥ pṛthivīpateḥ praṣṭavyo brāhmaṇaḥ pūrvaṃ nītiśāstrārthatattvavit paścāt pṛccheta bhūpālaḥ kṣatriyaṃ nītikovidam vaiśyaśūdrau tathā bhūyaḥ śāstrajñau hitakāriṇau
antaḥpure ca rāṣṭre ca adhyakṣeṣu ca sarvaśaḥ
sāmabhedān virodhārthaṃ vidhānam upakalpayet

daivānām āśrayāś caityā yakṣarākṣasabhoginām piśācapannagānāṃ ca gandharvāpsarasām api raudrāṇāṃ caiva bhūtānāṃ tasmāt tān parivarjayet śrūyate hi nikumbhena saudāsasya balaṃ hatam maheśvaragaṇeśena vārāṇasyāṃ narādhipa
yathāsaṃbhavaśailāni ceṣṭakāni ca kārayet mṛṇmayāni ca kurvīta jñātvā deśe balābalam

dharmaś cārthaś ca kāmaś ca trivargo vai sanātanaḥ mantraś caiva prabhāvaś ca utsāhaś caiva tāntrikaḥ śaktitrayaṃ samākhyātaṃ trivargasya ca tatparam kāryaṃ ca kāraṇaṃ caiva kartā ca parikīrtitaḥ etat parataraṃ vidyāt trivargād api bhārata sarveṣāṃ ca kṣaye rājan yas trivargaḥ sanātanaḥ sattvaṃ rajas tamaś caiva trivargaḥ kāraṇaṃ smṛtam tenātyantavimuktaś ca muktaḥ puruṣa ucyate kāryasya sarvathā nāśo mokṣa ity abhidhīyate tena mokṣaparaś caiva devadevaḥ pitāmahaḥ tuṣṭyarthasya trivargasya rakṣām āha narādhipa jagato laukikī yātrā yatra nityaṃ pratiṣṭhitā
yaḥ kaś cid dhārmiko rājā sa vipanno 'pi bhūpatiḥ arthakāmavihīno 'pi ciraṃ pālayate mahīm

ślokāś cośanasā gītās tān nibodha yudhiṣṭhira daṇḍanīteś ca yan mūlaṃ trivargasya ca bhūpate bhārgavāṅgirasaṃ karma ṣoḍaśāṅgaṃ ca yad balam viṣaṃ māyāś ca daivaṃ ca pauruṣaṃ cārthasiddhaye prāgudakpravaṇaṃ durgaṃ samāsādya mahīpatiḥ trivargatrayasaṃpūrṇam upādāya tam udvahet ṣaṭ pañca ca vinirjitya daśa cāṣṭau ca bhūpatiḥ trivargair daśabhir yuktaḥ surair api na jīyate na buddhiṃ parigṛhṇīta strīṇāṃ mūrkhajanasya ca daivopahatabuddhīnāṃ ye ca vedair vivarjitāḥ na teṣāṃ śṛṇuyād rājā buddhis teṣāṃ parāṅmukhī strīpradhānāni rājyāni vidvadbhir varjitāni ca mūrkhāmātyaprataptāni śuṣyante jalabinduvat vidvāṃsaḥ prathitā ye ca ye cāptāḥ sarvakarmasu yuddheṣu dṛṣṭakarmāṇas teṣāṃ ca śṛṇuyān nṛpaḥ daivaṃ puruṣakāraṃ ca trivargaṃ ca samāśritaḥ daivatāni ca viprāṃś ca praṇamya vijayī bhavet
yogakṣemāḥ pravartante prajānāṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ
**** **** kṣatriyeṇa vijānatā lipsitavyam alabdhaṃ ca labdhaṃ rakṣyaṃ ca bhārata
yavasodakam ādāya sāntvena vinayena ca
iha loke sukhaṃ prāpya paratra ca mahītale evaṃ tebhyaḥ paracceto (sic) brāhmaṇebhyo yathāvidhi sattvena paribhogāya svargaṃ jeṣyasi durjayam
yadā na kurute dharmaṃ rājā bhūtāni pālayan prajāpuṇyaṃ caturbhāgaṃ tadā na prāpnuyān nṛpaḥ
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca kīdṛśo brāhmaṇo rājñāṃ kāryākāryavicāraṇe kṣamaḥ kartuṃ samartho vā tan me brūhi pitāmaha
sarvasvaṃ brāhmaṇasyedaṃ yat kiṃ cid iha dṛśyate dharmayuktaṃ praśastaṃ ca jagaty asmin nṛpātmaja
dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ hiraṇyaṃ ca striyo ratnāni vāhanam maṅgalaṃ ca praśastaṃ ca yac cānyad api vidyate
brāhmaṇaṃ ca suvidvāṃsaṃ rājaśāstravipaścitam
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca rājñā purohitaḥ kāryaḥ kīdṛśo varṇato bhavet purodhā yādṛśaḥ kāryaḥ kathayasva pitāmaha gauro vā lohito vāpi śyāmo vā nīrujaḥ sukhī akrodhano nacapalaḥ sarvataś ca jitendriyaḥ
rājñaḥ sarvasya cānyasya svāmī rājapurohitaḥ

yudhiṣṭhira uvāca brahmakṣatrasya sāmarthyaṃ kathitaṃ te pitāmaha purohitaprabhāvaś ca lakṣaṇaṃ ca purodhasaḥ idānīṃ śrotum icchāmi brahmakṣatravinirṇayam brahmakṣatraṃ hi sarvasya kāraṇaṃ jagataḥ param yogakṣemo hi rāṣṭrasya tābhyām āyatta eva hi
evam uktaḥ pratyuvāca mucukundo mahīpatiḥ
yaśaś ca tejaś ca mahīṃ ca kṛtsnāṃ prāpnoti rājan vipulāṃ ca kīrtim pradhānadharmaṃ nṛpate niyaccha tathā ca dharmasya caturtham aṃśam
vicitravīryo dharmātmā citravīryo na pārthivaḥ śaṃtanuś ca mahīpālaḥ sarvakṣatrasya pūjitaḥ
gojāvimahiṣāṇāṃ ca vaḍavānāṃ ca poṣakāḥ vṛttyartham abhipadyante tān vaiśyān saṃpracakṣate aiśvaryakāmā ye cāpi sāmiṣārthāś ca bhārata nigrahānugraharatāṃs tān dvijān kṣatriyān viduḥ
prāg uktāṃś cāpy anuktāṃś ca sarvāṃs tān dāpayet karān
yajñaḥ śrutam apaiśunyam ahiṃsātithipūjanam damaḥ satyaṃ tapo dānam etad brāhmaṇalakṣaṇam
kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ mayā sarvaṃ rājyasthenāpi kāryavat nāhaṃ vyutkrāmitaḥ satyān māmakāntaram ābibhaḥ
śuklakarmāsmi sarvatra na durgatibhayaṃ mama dharmacārī gṛhasthaś ca māmakāntaram ābibhaḥ

nārīṇāṃ vyabhicārāc ca anyāyāc ca mahīkṣitām viprāṇāṃ karmadoṣāc ca prajānāṃ jāyate bhayam avṛṣṭir mārako rogaḥ satataṃ kṣudbhayāni ca vigrahaś ca sadā tasmin deśe bhavati dāruṇaḥ yakṣarakṣaḥpiśācebhyo nāsurebhyaḥ kathaṃ cana bhayam utpadyate tatra yatra viprāḥ susaṃyatāḥ gandharvāpsarasaḥsiddhāḥ pannagāś ca sarīsṛpāḥ mānavān na jighāṃsanti yatra nāryaḥ pativratāḥ brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyā vaiśyā yatra śūdrāś ca dhārmikāḥ nānāvṛṣṭibhayaṃ tatra na durbhikṣaṃ na vibhramaḥ dhārmiko yatra bhūpālo na tatrāsti parābhavaḥ utpātā na ca dṛśyante na divyā na ca mānuṣāḥ
brāhmaṇān parirakṣanti teṣāṃ lokā bhavanti ke
ātmatrāṇaṃ ca kurvāṇaḥ parān dasyubhya eva ca
yasminn etāni dṛśyante sa purohita ucyate
na śāṭhyaṃ na ca jihmatvaṃ kālo deśaś ca te daśa
mitrāṇāṃ prakṛtir nāsti tv amitrāṇāṃ ca bhārata upakārād bhaven mitram apakārād bhaved ariḥ yasyaiva hi manuṣyasya naro maraṇam icchati tasya paryāgate kāle punar jīvitam icchati
hriyate hi mahārthaś ca puruṣe vikramaty api

arthe sarvaṃ jagad baddham arthena ca nibadhyate arthe darpo manuṣyāṇāṃ tasmād arthaṃ virocaya ekenaikasya doṣeṇa tad viruddhaṃ pracodaya sa tasya doṣān udbhāvya tasyārthaṃ grāhayiṣyati sāmapūrvaṃ ca keṣāṃ cid bhedena ca parasparam vairaṃ kāraya bhūpāla paścād daṇḍaṃ prayojaya bilvena ca yathā bilvam ākāraṃ chādya buddhimān aśuddhaṃ sacivaṃ rājann aśuddhenaiva nāśaya
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca sabhāsadaḥ sahāyāś ca suhṛdaś ca viśāṃ pate paricchadās tathāmātyāḥ kīdṛśāḥ syuḥ pitāmaha
paricchadās tathāmātyā nedṛśāḥ syuḥ kathaṃ cana
vidharmato viprakṛtaḥ pitā yasyābhavat purā satkṛtaḥ sthāpitaḥ so 'pi na mantraṃ śrotum arhati
kṣatriyān daśa vāṣṭau vā balinaḥ śastrapāṇayaḥ vaiśyān vittena saṃpannān ekaviṃśatisaṃkhyayā
svargaṃ yāti mahīpālo niyuktaiḥ sacivaiḥ saha
tān ācakṣīta daśine daśako viṃśine punaḥ
daśinena vibhaktavyo daśinā viṃśatis tathā
yathā śalyakavān ākhuḥ padaṃ dhūnayate sadā atīkṣṇenābhyupāyena tathā rāṣṭraṃ samāpibet
niyantavyā sadā rājñā pāpā ye syur narādhipa kṛtapāpas tv asau rājā ya etān na niyacchati
madyamāṃsaparasvāni tathā dārā dhanāni ca āhared rāgavaśagas tathā śāstraṃ pradarśayet
atītadivase vṛttaṃ praśaṃsanti na vā punaḥ

mamedam iti nedaṃ ca sādhūnāṃ tāta dharmataḥ naiva vyavasthā bhavati yadā pāpo na vāryate naiva bhāryā na paśavo na kṣetraṃ na niveśanam saṃdṛśyeta manuṣyāṇāṃ yadā pāpabalaṃ bhavet devāḥ pūjāṃ na jānanti na svadhāṃ pitaras tathā na pūjyante hy atithayo yadā pāpo na vāryate
śatravo hy api mitrāṇi tadā mitraṃ bhavanty api
agnitretā trayī vidyā yajñāś ca sahadakṣiṇāḥ sarva eva pramādyanti yadā rājā pramādyati
pāpam ācarato yatra karmaṇā vyāhṛtena vā priyasyāpi na mṛṣyeta sa rājño dharma ucyate
amāyayaiva varteta na ca satyaṃ tyajed budhaḥ damaṃ dharmaṃ ca śīlaṃ ca kṣatradharmaṃ prajāhitam samarthān pūjayed yaś ca na spardheta ca yaś ca taiḥ
yasya rāṣṭre vasanty ete dhānyopacayakāriṇaḥ āyavṛddhau sahāyāś ca dṛḍhamūlaḥ sa pārthivaḥ caṇḍālamlecchajātyāś ca pāṣaṇḍāś ca vikarmiṇaḥ balinaś cāśramāś caiva tathā gāyakanartakāḥ
brūyād yuddhaṃ kariṣyāmaḥ śṛṇu naḥ kuśalaṃ bhavet

nāsty ekasya gajo yuddhe gajaś caikasya vidyate na padātir gajaṃ yudhyen na gajena padātinam hastinā yodhayen nāgaṃ kadā cic chikṣito hayaḥ divyāstrabalasaṃpannaḥ kāmaṃ yudhyeta sarvadā nāge bhūmau same caiva rathenāśvena vā punaḥ rāmarāvaṇayor yuddhe harayo vai padātayaḥ lakṣmaṇaś ca mahābhāgas tathā rājan vibhīṣaṇaḥ rāvaṇasyāntakāle ca rathenaindreṇa rāghavaḥ nijaghāna durācāraṃ rāvaṇaṃ pāpakāriṇam divyāstrabalasaṃpanne sarvam etad vidhīyate devāsureṣu yuddheṣu dṛṣṭam etat purātanaiḥ
yatra yatra hataḥ śūraḥ śatrubhiḥ parivāritaḥ akṣayāṃl labhate lokān yadi dainyaṃ na sevate
śūrasthānam anuprāptaṃ sudevaṃ nāma nāmataḥ
tena puṇyavipākena prāpto 'haṃ tava saṃnidhim
vimānaṃ sūryasaṃkāśam āsthito modate divi
saṃkhyāsamayavistīrṇam abhijātodbhavaṃ bahu
agrataḥ puruṣānīkaṃ śaktaṃ bhaktaṃ kulodgatam
upanyāso bhavet tatra balānāṃ nātidūrataḥ
jātigotraṃ ca vijñāya karma cānuttamaṃ śubham samānadeharakṣārthe kāryā dviguṇavetanāḥ triguṇaṃ caturguṇaṃ caiva vetanaṃ teṣu kārayet
na saṃnipāte pradaraṃ vadhaṃ vā kuryur īdṛśāḥ
ādānārthāya puruṣais tathā karma vidhīyate
āvantikā mahāśūrāś caturaṅge ca māḷavāḥ eko 'pi hi sahasrasya tiṣṭhaty abhimukho raṇe
tathā gajair vājibhir heṣamāṇaiḥ
vaśe kuryān na śamayet tīkṣṇān karkaśapīḍanaiḥ sa yathā neṣyate rājñas tīkṣṇopakaraṇakṣayaḥ hetāv īrṣuḥ phalenerṣuḥ syāc chakra vyavasāyavit doṣeṇa guṇarūpeṇa dviṣato yo jayet sadā
**** **** upāsīta śacīpate tathā priyaṃ ca vaktavyaṃ

tyaktaṃ svāyaṃbhuve vaṃśe śubhena bharatena ca nānāratnasamākīrṇaṃ rājyaṃ sphītam iti śrutiḥ tathānyair bhūmipālaiś ca tyaktaṃ rājyaṃ mahodayam tyaktvā rājyāni te sarve vane vanyaphalāśinaḥ gatāś ca tapasaḥ pāraṃ duḥkhasyāntaṃ ca bhūmipāḥ
anityāṃ tāṃ śriyaṃ matvā śriyaṃ vā kaḥ parīpsati
anyatropanatā hy āpat puruṣaṃ toṣayaty uta tena śāntiṃ na labhate nāham eveti kāraṇāt
itthaṃ naro 'py ātmanaiva kṛtaprajñaḥ prasīdati
sadaiva rājaśārdūla viduṣā hitam icchatā
teṣāṃ pāpaṃ bhrūṇahatyāviśiṣṭaṃ na cāsya tad brahmaphalaṃ dadāti
bhṛto vṛddho yo na bibharti putraḥ svayonijaḥ pitaraṃ mātaraṃ ca tad vai pāpaṃ bhrūṇahatyāviśiṣṭaṃ tasmān nānyaḥ pāpakṛd asti loke

ahiṃsā satyam akrodhas tapo dānaṃ damo matiḥ anasūyāpy amātsaryam anīrṣyā śīlam eva ca eṣa dharmaḥ kuruśreṣṭha kathitaḥ parameṣṭhinā brahmaṇā devadevena ayaṃ caiva sanātanaḥ asmin dharme sthito rājan naro bhadrāṇi paśyati śrauto vadhātmako dharma ahiṃsā paramārthikaḥ
hitaṃ syād yatra bhūtānāṃ patitānāṃ susaṃkaṭe
ye 'nye cāpy anṛtaṃ kuryuḥ kuryād eva vicāraṇam
akṣayebhyo vadhaṃ rājan kuryād evāvicārayan abuddhānuśaye doṣaṃ śreyas tatrānṛtaṃ bhavet na stenaiḥ saha saṃbandhān mucyate śapathād api śreyas tatrānṛtaṃ vaktuṃ satyād iti hi dhāraṇā
dambhenaiva sa hantavyas taṃ panthānaṃ samāśritaḥ cyutaḥ sadaiva dharmebhyo 'mānavaṃ dharmam āsthitaḥ
niryajñās tapasā hīnā mā sma taiḥ saha saṃgamaḥ
pratyāhur nocyamānā ye na hiṃsanti ca hiṃsitāḥ prayacchanti na yācante durgāṇy atitaranti te

asminn arpitakarmāṇaḥ sarvabhāvena bhārata kṛṣṇe kamalapatrākṣe durgāṇy atitaranti te lokarakṣārtham utpannam adityāṃ kaśyapātmajam devam indraṃ namasyanti durgāṇy atitaranti te brahmāṇaṃ lokakartāraṃ ye namasyanti satpatim yaṣṭavyaṃ kratubhir devaṃ durgāṇy atitaranti te yaṃ viṣṇur indraḥ śaṃbhuś ca brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ stuvanti vividhaiḥ stotrair devadevaṃ maheśvaram tam arcayanti ye śaśvad durgāṇy atitaranti te
parṇāhāraḥ kadā cic ca niyamavratavān api kadā cid udakenāpi vartayann anuyantritaḥ
bhīṣma uvāca kṣudhitasya mṛgendrasya bhoktum abhyutthitasya ca
niścityaivaṃ tatas tasya te tat karmāṇy avarṇayan
muner api vanasthasya svāni karmāṇi kurvataḥ utpadyante trayaḥ pakṣā mitrodāsīnaśatravaḥ
pūrvasaṃmānatā yatra paścāc caiva vimānanā na taṃ dhīrāḥ praśaṃsanti saṃmānitavimānitam
asahāyavato hy arthā na tiṣṭhanti kadā cana
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca na santi kulajā yatra sahāyāḥ pārthivasya tu akulīnāś ca kartavyā na vā bharatasattama
sa munis tasya vijñāya bhāvajño bhayakāraṇam rutajñaḥ sarvasattvānāṃ tam aiśvaryasamanvitaḥ
taṃ dṛṣṭvā sa punar dvīpī ātmanaḥ sadṛśaṃ śubham aviruddhas tatas tasya kṣaṇena samapadyata
taṃ dṛṣṭvā śarabhaṃ yāntaṃ siṃhaḥ parabhayāturaḥ ṛṣiṃ śaraṇam āpede vepamānaḥ kṛtāñjaliḥ

cintayām āsa ca tadā śarabhaḥ śvānapūrvakaḥ asya prabhāvāt saṃprāpto vāṅmātreṇa tu kevalam śarabhatvaṃ suduṣprāpaṃ sarvabhūtabhayaṃkaram anye 'py atra bhayatrastāḥ santi sattvā bhayārditāḥ munim āśritya jīvanto mṛgāḥ pakṣigaṇās tathā teṣām api kadā cic ca śarabhatvaṃ prayacchati sarvasattvottamaṃ loke balaṃ yatra pratiṣṭhitam pakṣiṇām apy ayaṃ dadyāt kadā cid gāruḍaṃ balam yāvad anyatra saṃprītaḥ kāruṇyaṃ tu samāśritaḥ na dadāti balaṃ tuṣṭaḥ sattvasyānyasya kasya cit tāvad enam ahaṃ vipraṃ vadhiṣyāmi ca śīghrataḥ sthātuṃ mayā śakyam iha munighātān na saṃśayaḥ

munir uvāca aham agniprabho nāma munir bhṛgukulānvayaḥ manasā nirdahe sarvaṃ jagat saṃdhārayāmi ca mama vaśyaṃ jagat sarvaṃ devān varjya carācaram santi devāś ca me bhītāḥ svadharmaṃ na tyajanti ye svadharmāc calitān sarvān vāṅmātreṇaiva nirdahe kim aṅga tvaṃ mayā nītaḥ śarabhatvam anāmayam krūraḥ sa sarvabhūteṣu hīnaś cāśucir eva ca
śvā pūrvaṃ dvīpy asi vyāghraḥ gajaḥ siṃhas tathāśva[ṣṭa]pāt nijena ca svabhāvena punaḥ śvāno bhaviṣyasi

bhinnānāṃ rājasaṃghātaṃ saṃhatānāṃ ca bhedati ekaḥ kruddho raṇe kuryāt kuñjaraḥ sādhunoditaḥ madaklinnakapolasya kiṃ cid añcitacakṣuṣaḥ svidyadābhogagaṇḍasya kaḥ śobhāṃ varṇituṃ kṣamaḥ vegenādhāvamānasya prasāritakarasya ca kaḥ samarthaḥ puraḥ sthātuṃ stabdhakarṇasya danti[naḥ] **** **** diśo daśa tat sainyaṃ kuñjarā yatra sa nṛpo yasya kuñjarāḥ mūrtimān vijayo rājan kuñjarā madadarpitāḥ

jñātīnām anavajñānaṃ bhṛtyeṣv aśaṭhatā sadā naipuṇyaṃ cārthacaryāsu yasyaite tasya sā mahī ālasyaṃ caiva nidrā ca vyasanāny atihāsyatā yasyaitāni na vidyante tasyeyaṃ suciraṃ mahī vṛddhasevī mahotsāho varṇānāṃ caiva rakṣitā dharmacaryā sadā yasya tasyeyaṃ suciraṃ mahī nītivartmānusaraṇaṃ nityam utthānam eva ca ripūṇām anavajñānaṃ tasyeyaṃ suciraṃ mahī utthānaṃ caiva daivaṃ ca tayor nānātvam eva ca manunā varṇitaṃ pūrvaṃ vakṣye śṛṇu tad eva hi utthānaṃ hi narendrāṇāṃ bṛhaspatir abhāṣata nayānayavidhānajñaḥ sadā bhava kurūdvaha durhṛdāṃ chidradarśī yaḥ suhṛdām upakāravān viśeṣavic ca bhṛtyānāṃ sa rājyaphalam aśnute
evaṃ mayūradharmeṇa vartayan satataṃ naraḥ
ayaṃ viṣṇuḥ sakhā tubhyaṃ dharmasya parirakṣaṇe tvaṃ hi sarvavidhānajñaḥ sattvānāṃ tvaṃ gatiḥ parā
devadevo mahādevaḥ kāraṇaṃ jagataḥ param brahmaviṣṇvindrasahitaḥ sarvaiś ca sa surāsuraiḥ lokasaṃdhāraṇārthaṃ ca lokasaṃkaranāśanam
daśa caikaṃ ca ye rudrās tasyaite mūrtisaṃbhavāḥ nānārūpadharo devaḥ sa eva bhagavāñ śivaḥ

īśvaraś cetanaḥ kartā puruṣaḥ kāraṇaṃ śivaḥ viṣṇur brahmā śaśī sūryaḥ śakro devāś ca sānvayāḥ jñānātmakaḥ śivo hy eva eteṣām api kāraṇam sṛjate grasate caiva tamobhūtam idaṃ yathā aprajñātaṃ jagat sarvaṃ tadā hy eko maheśvaraḥ
vasuhomāc chrutaṃ rājñā māndhātrā bhūbhṛtā purā mayāpi kathitaṃ puṇyam ākhyānaṃ prathitaṃ tathā
arthārtham anyad bhavati viparītam athāparam anarthārtham avāpyārtham anyatrādyopakārakam
duryodhana uvāca kathaṃ tat prāpyate śīlaṃ śrotum icchāmi bhārata yena śīlena saṃprāptāḥ kṣipram ete vasuṃdharām
prahlādo 'pi mahārāja brāhmaṇaṃ vākyam abravīt
adhikāṃ vāpi rājendra tatas tvaṃ śīlavān bhava adhvā jito yānavatā sarvaṃ śīlavatā jitam
sa pūjām ṛṣibhir dattāṃ pratigṛhya narādhipaḥ apṛcchat tāpasān sarvāṃs tapaso vṛddhim uttamām te tasya rājño vacanaṃ pratigṛhya tapodhanāḥ
avajñāpūrvakenāpi na saṃpāditavāṃs tataḥ
vīradyumnas tu taṃ bhūyaḥ papraccha munisattamam
kṛtaghneṣu ca yā saktā nṛśaṃseṣv alaseṣu ca apakāriṣu yā saktā sāśā kṛśatarī mayā
pradānakāṅkṣiṇīnāṃ ca kanyānāṃ vayasi sthite śrutvā kathās tathāyuktāḥ sāśā kṛśatarī mayā
yad etad uktaṃ bhavatā saṃprati dvijasattama
na hi tṛptiṃ parāṃ yāmi dharme kautūhalaṃ hi me
nānyat tīrthaṃ na devo 'nyo dharmo 'nyo na kathaṃ cana naraṃ tāvad ajānantaṃ pāvayanti mahīpatim tasmāt pāpaṃ parityajya bhaktim āsthāya śāśvatīm karmaṇā manasā vācāto bhajann anṛṇo bhavet
**** **** pararāṣṭrāṇi mṛdnataḥ vigrahe vartamānasya
atrāpy udāharantīmam itihāsaṃ purātanam
api tebhyo mṛgān hatvā nayec ca satataṃ vane yasmin na pratigṛhṇanti dasyubhojanaśaṅkayā
asti kāpalyasa iti mṛgayur dharmakovidaḥ
pitaro devatā viprāḥ śapanty atra nivārite
tathā tathā jayel lokāñ śaktyā caiva yathā tathā
anāgatavidhātā ca pratyutpannamatiś ca yaḥ dvāv eva sukham edhete dīrghasūtrī vinaśyati
ulūke mūrdhni saṃnaddhe bhujagārāv avāksthite mārjāre pāśasaṃbaddhe kiṃ kartavyaṃ mayā bhavet kaccid rājaguṇaiḥ ṣaḍbhiḥ saptopāyās tathānagha
evaṃ vicintayām āsa mūṣakaḥ śatruceṣṭitam
pratyapakurvan bahv api na bhāti pūrvopakāriṇā tulyaḥ ekaḥ karoti hi kṛte niṣkāraṇam eva kurute 'nyaḥ

tathaiva tau susaṃtrastau dṛḍham āgatatandritau dṛṣṭvā tayoḥ parāṃ prītiṃ vismayaṃ paramaṃ gatau balinau matimantau ca suvṛttau cāpy upāsitau aśaktau tu nayāt tasmāt saṃpradharṣayituṃ balāt kāryārthakṛtasaṃdhī tau dṛṣṭvā mārjāramūṣikau ulūkanakulau tūrṇaṃ jagmatus tau svam ālayam
arthatas tu nibadhyante mitrāṇi ripavas tathā
eṣāṃ saumyāni mitrāṇi krodhanāś caiva śatravaḥ sāntvitās te na budhyante rāgalobhavaśaṃ gatāḥ
yadi tvaṃ sukṛtaṃ vetsi tatsakhyam anusāraya viśvastaṃ vā pramattaṃ vā etad eva kṛtaṃ bhavet
śaṅkanīyaḥ sa sarvatra priyam apy ācaran sadā kulajānāṃ sumitrāṇāṃ dhārmikāṇāṃ mahātmanām
lomaśa uvāca satāṃ saptapadaṃ mitraṃ kathaṃ tvaṃ māṃ na viśvaseḥ
na viśvased aviśvaste viśvaste nātiviśvaset nityaṃ viśvāsayed anyān pareṣāṃ tu na viśvaset
tayor arthe kṛtajñā sā khecarī pūjanī sadā
ādāyādāya saivāśu tayoḥ prādāt punaḥ punaḥ
brahmadattaḥ sutaṃ dṛṣṭvā pūjanyā hṛtalocanam kṛte pratikṛtaṃ matvā pūjanīm idam abravīt
aviśvāsāt paraṃ hanti viśvāsād vadhyate paraiḥ
bhinnāḥ śliṣṭā na śakyante śastraiḥ suniśitair api sāmnā te 'pi nigṛhyante gajā iva kareṇubhiḥ
ādātavyaṃ na dātavyaṃ priyaṃ brūyān nirarthakam
pāṣaṇḍādyair avijñātair viditvāriṃ vaśaṃ nayet
nāvicārya ciraṃ kāle naro bhadrāṇi paśyati
śūram añjalipātena bhīruṃ bhedena bhedayet lubdham arthapradānena samaṃ tulyena vigrahaḥ
tyaktvā dārāṃś ca putrāṃś ca kasmiṃś cij janasaṃsadi bhakṣyābhakṣyasamo bhūtvā niragnir aniketanaḥ
kukkuṭārāvabahulaṃ gardabhadhvanināditam tad yoṣidbhiḥ kharair vākyaiḥ kalahadbhiḥ parasparam
viśvāmitro 'ham āyuṣmann āgato 'haṃ bubhukṣitaḥ mā vadhīr mama sadbuddher yadi samyak prapaśyasi
durbalo naṣṭasaṃjñaś ca bhakṣyābhakṣyavivarjitaḥ
dharmaṃ tavāpi viprarṣe śṛṇu yat te bravīmy aham
śalyakaḥ śvāvidho godhāḥ śaśaḥ kūrmaś ca pañcamaḥ
* * mūlartuṃlastrittipuṇyaṃ (sic) mohātmake yatra yathā svabhakṣe
yathā cakṣuḥ śabdatattvaṃ na budhyed rūpaṃ paśyec cakṣur evaṃ tathaiva

tathāsya buddhir abhavad vidhināhaṃ śvajāghanīm bhakṣayāmi yathākāmaṃ pūrvaṃ saṃtarpya devatāḥ tato 'gnim upasaṃhṛtya brāhmeṇa vidhinā muniḥ aindrāgneyena vidhinā caruṃ śrapayata svayam tataḥ samārabhat karma daivaṃ pitryaṃ ca bhārata āhūya devān indrādīn bhāgaṃ bhāgaṃ vidhikramāt
sa saṃhṛtya ca tat karma anāsvādya ca tad dhaviḥ toṣayām āsa devāṃś ca pitṝṃś ca dvijasattamaḥ
vedavedāṅgatattvajño japahomaparāyaṇaḥ āśīrvādaparo nityam eṣa rājā purohitaḥ
aruṣṭaḥ kasya cid rājann evam eva samācara
naraḥ pāpasamācāras tyaktavyo dūrato budhaiḥ ātmānaṃ yo 'bhisaṃdhatte so 'nyasya syāt kathaṃ hitaḥ ye nṛśaṃsā durātmānaḥ prāṇiprāṇaharā narāḥ udvejanīyā bhūtānāṃ vyālā iva bhavanti te
sevyamānaṃ vihaṃgaughaiś chāyāvāsaphalārthibhiḥ dhātrā paropakārāya sa sādhur iva nirmitaḥ athābhavat kṣaṇenaiva viyad vimalatārakam mahat sara ivotphullaṃ kumudacchuritodakam
putrapautravadhūbhṛtyair ākīrṇam api sarvataḥ bhāryāhīnaṃ gṛhasthasya śūnyam eva gṛhaṃ bhavet na gṛhaṃ gṛham ity āhur gṛhiṇī gṛham ucyate gṛhaṃ tu gṛhiṇīhīnam araṇyasadṛśaṃ matam
na bhuṅkte mayy abhukte yā nāsnāte snāti suvratā nātiṣṭhaty upatiṣṭheta śete ca śayite mayi hṛṣṭe bhavati sā hṛṣṭā duḥkhite mayi duḥkhitā proṣite dīnavadanā kruddhe ca priyavādinī

yasya bhāryā sadā raktā tathā chandānuvartinī vibhave 'pi hi saṃtoṣas tasya svarga ihaiva hi sā bhāryā yā gṛhe dakṣā sā bhāryā yā pativratā sā bhāryā yā priyaṃ brūte sā bhāryā yā manoramā yasya bhāryā guṇajñā ca bhartāram anugāminī yā cātīva hi saṃhṛṣṭā sā śrīḥ sākṣān na vai dhanam
aho mama vinā vahniṃ dahyate gātrasaṃcayam pativratadharā sādhvī prāṇebhyo 'pi garīyasī
kapoty uvāca aho 'tīva subhāgyāhaṃ yasyā me dayitaḥ patiḥ asato vā sato vāpi guṇān evaṃ prabhāṣate
dāvāgnineva nirdagdhā sapuṣpastabakā latā bhasmībhavatu sā nārī yasyā bhartā na tuṣyati
arāv apy ucitaṃ kāryam ātithyaṃ gṛham āgate chettum apy āgate chāyāṃ nopasaṃharate drumaḥ
harṣeṇa mahatāviṣṭo vākyaṃ vyākulalocanaḥ tathemaṃ śakuniṃ dṛṣṭvā vidhidṛṣṭena karmaṇā

kapoto 'pi ca tāṃ dṛṣṭvā kapotīṃ ca surūpiṇīm harṣeṇa mahatā yuktaḥ pariṣvajyedam abravīt aho mām anugacchantyā kṛtaṃ sādhu śubhaṃ tvayā kṣaṇamātreṇa duḥkhena sukhaṃ tena samārjitam tisraḥ koṭyardhakoṭī ca yāni lomāni mānave tāvat kālaṃ vaset svarge bhartāraṃ yānugacchati vyālagrāhī yathā vyālaṃ bilād uddharate balāt tadvad bhartāram uddhṛtya tenaiva saha modate
brahmahatyāpanodārtham apṛcchad brāhmaṇān bahūn paryaṭan pṛthivīṃ kṛtsnāṃ deśe deśe narādhipaḥ
**** **** kurukṣetrāt sarasvatīm sarasvatyāś ca tīrthāni

yudhiṣṭhira uvāca yad eva śrūyate rājann abhiyogam anujjhatām kadāpy aghaṭamāno 'pi ghaṭetārtho mahān api tad etaṃ saṃśayaṃ chindhi mahāntaṃ hy api me sthitam ṛte pitāmahād bhīṣmāc chettā naivāsya vidyate
kasya cid brāhmaṇasyāsīd duḥkhalabdhaḥ suto mṛtaḥ bāla eva viśālākṣo bālagrahanipīḍitaḥ
śocantas tasya pūrvoktān bhāṣitāṃś cāsakṛt punaḥ taṃ bālaṃ bhūtale kṣipya pratigantuṃ na śaknuyuḥ
niścitārthāś ca te sarve gamanaṃ prati bhārata
**** **** vikrośantas tatas tataḥ mṛtam ity eva gacchanto nirāśās tasya darśane nivartane kṛtadhiyaḥ
sarvam etat prapadyāśu kurutāṃ mā vicāraya
śrībhīṣmaḥ jambukasya vacaḥ śrutvā gṛdhro rājan yad abravīt tat te 'haṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi tvam ihaikamanāḥ śṛṇu
gṛdhrasya vacanaṃ śrutvā jambuko vākyam abravīt ity etad vacanaṃ śrutvā saṃnivṛttās tu mānuṣāḥ apaśyat taṃ tadā suptaṃ drutam āgatya jambukaḥ
teṣāṃ ruditaśabdena gṛdhro 'bhyetya vaco 'bravīt
yadi jīved ayaṃ bhūyo yāvad evaṃ karomy aham
dāruṇe 'smin vanoddeśe bhayaṃ vo na bhaviṣyati ayaṃ saumyo vanoddeśaḥ pitṝṇāṃ nidhanākaraḥ
devyā praṇodito devaḥ kāruṇyārdrīkṛtekṣaṇaḥ

yudhiṣṭhira uvāca balinaḥ pratyamitrasya nityam āsannavartinaḥ upakārāpakārābhyāṃ samarthasyodyatasya ca mohād vikatthanāmātrair asāro 'lpabalo laghuḥ vāgbhir apratirūpābhir abhidruhya pitāmaha ātmano balam āsthāya kathaṃ varteta mānavaḥ āgacchato 'tikruddhasya tasyoddharaṇakāmyayā
yā varāhamṛgaśārdūlapatatrigaṇasaṃkulāḥ
taṃ kadā cin munir dṛṣṭvā nārado vismito 'bravīt dhanyas tvam eka evāsi śālmale vāyuvallabhaḥ
sarvāvāsasya sadbhāvāt sauhṛdāc cābhirakṣati
eṣa tasmād gamiṣyāmi sakāśaṃ mātariśvanaḥ
balādhiko 'haṃ tvattaś ca na bhīḥ kāryā mayā tava ye tu buddhyā hi balinas te bhavanti balīyasaḥ prāṇamātrabalā ye vai naiva te balino matāḥ
sthāvarāṇi ca bhūtāni carāṇy anyāni yāni ca
tasmāc chreṣṭhatamaṃ satyaṃ sarvavarṇeṣu bhārata
anasūyā tu gāmbhīryaṃ dānenaitad avāpyate
dhyānaṃ cāśāṭhyam ity uktaṃ maunenaitad avāpyate
prāṇināṃ lobhayuktānām ete vai śatravaḥ smṛtāḥ
**** **** krodhasyotpattim āditaḥ yathātattvaṃ kṣitipate
yadā prājño viramate tadā sadyaḥ praṇaśyati parāsūyā krodhalobhāv antarā pratimucyate dayayā sarvabhūtānāṃ nirvedād vinivartate
ajñānaprabhavo mohaḥ pāpābhyāsāt pravartate yadā prājñeṣu ramate tadā sadyaḥ praṇaśyati
ajñānaprabhavo lobho bhūtānāṃ dṛśyate sadā asthiratvaṃ ca bhogānāṃ dṛṣṭvā jñātvā nivartate
anyonyaspardhino rājan yajante guṇataḥ sadā
evam eva caran rājaṃs tasmāt pāpāt pramucyate
brahmacārī dvijebhyaś ca dattvā pāpāt pramucyate
avyakteva guṇātīte karmavyāpāravarjite prādurbabhūva jalajaṃ tato jajñe pitāmahaḥ
**** **** gayāya pratyapādayat gayāc ca labdhavān rājā
etāni caiva nāmāni purāṇe niścitāni vai
teneyaṃ pṛthivī dugdhā sasyāni subahūny api dharmeṇa ca yathā pūrvaṃ
arthārthinaḥ santi nityaṃ paritapyanti karmabhiḥ
kāmo dharmārthayor yoniḥ kāmaś cātha tadātmakaḥ nākāmato brāhmaṇāḥ svannam arthān nākāmato dadati brāhmaṇebhyaḥ nākāmato vividhā lokaceṣṭā tasmāt kāmaḥ prāk trivargasya dṛṣṭaḥ
vibhajya kālaṃ parisevyamānaḥ
uktaṃ hi karmaiva phalasya hetuḥ
sa cāpi tān dharmasuto mahāmanās tadā pratītān praśaśaṃsa vīryavān
mantrihīnas tu yo rājann acirāyur bhaven nṛpa tasmāt suśīlaṃ vijñāya mantriṇaṃ ca bahuśrutam niyojayed guṇakaram ātmanaḥ sukham icchatā
kugrāmavāsaṃ ca kumitrasaṅgaṃ kudārarāgaṃ kunarendrasevām kubrāhmaṇe prītim akāraṇaṃ vai kurvanti ye pāpatarās ta eva
sa tatra nyavasad vipro ghṛṇī kiṃ cid asaṃspṛśan kṣudhitaś chandyamāno 'pi bhojanaṃ nābhyanandata
nyavedayad dvārapālān vacanād rājadharmaṇaḥ
channahastā * * kāyā dakṛvecavasaṃmatāḥ (sic) āgaccha gautamety evaṃ tvaramāṇāḥ sasaṃbhramāḥ
pṛṣṭo rājñā sa nājñāsīd gotramātram athābravīt
sa cādya divasaḥ puṇyo hy atithiś cāyam āgataḥ saṃkalpitaṃ caiva dhanaṃ kiṃ vicāryam ataḥ param
tiladarbhodakenātha arcitā vidhivad dvijāḥ viśvedevāḥ sapitaraḥ sāgnayaś copakalpitāḥ viliptāḥ puṣpavantaś ca supracārāḥ supūjitāḥ
tatas tau saṃvidaṃ kṛtvā khagendradvijasattamau nyaṣīdatāṃ mahārāja nyagrodhe vipule tathā gautamaś cintayām āsa rātrau tasya samīpataḥ
tato dākṣāyaṇīputraṃ nāgataṃ taṃ tu bhārata virūpākṣaś cintayan vai hṛdayena vidūyatā
aparāṃ caiva māṃ draṣṭum āyāti sa vihaṃgarāṭ

nyagrodhe rājadharmāṇam apaśyan nihataṃ tataḥ ruditvā bahu tat tad vai vilapya ca sa rākṣasaḥ gato roṣasamāviṣṭo gautamagrahaṇāya vai gṛhīto gautamaḥ pāpo rakṣobhiḥ krodhamūrchitaiḥ rājadharmaśarīrasya kaṅkālaṃ cāpy atho dhṛtam merupṛṣṭhe ca nagaraṃ yātudhānās tato gatāḥ krodharaktekṣaṇā ghorā gautamasya vadhe dhṛtāḥ pārthivasyāgrato nyastaḥ kaṅkālo rājadharmaṇaḥ taṃ dṛṣṭvā vimanā rājā sāmātyaḥ sagaṇo 'bhavat ārtanādo mahān āsīd gṛhe tasya mahātmanaḥ strīsaṃghasya tadā rājan nihate kāśyapātmaje rājā caivābravīt putraṃ pāpo 'yaṃ vadhyatām iti asya māṃsaṃ vayaṃ sarve khādiṣyāmaḥ samāgatāḥ pāpakṛt pāpakarmā ca pāpātmā pāpam āsthitaḥ hantavya eva pāpātmā kṛtaghno nātra saṃśayaḥ kṛtaghnaṃ pāpakarmāṇaṃ na bhakṣayitum utsahe bhīṣma uvāca dāsāḥ sarve samāhūtā yātudhānās tathāpare necchanti sma kṛtaghnaṃ taṃ khādituṃ puruṣottama śirobhiś ca gatā bhūmiṃ mahārāja tato balāt mā nārthaṃ jātanirbandhaṃ kilbiṣaṃ dātum arhasi yātudhānā nṛpeṇoktāḥ pāpakarmā viśasyatām bhakṣyatāṃ tyajyatāṃ vāyaṃ darśanān me 'panīyatām tatas te ruṣitā dāsāḥ śūlapaṭṭasapāṇayaḥ khaṇḍaśo vikṛtaṃ hatvā kravyādbhyo hy adadus tadā kravyādās tv api rājendra necchanti piśitāśanāḥ mṛtān api hi kravyādāḥ kṛtaghnān nopabhuñjate brahmasvaharaṇe core brahmaghne gurutalpage niṣkṛtir vihitā sadbhiḥ kṛtaghne nāsti niṣkṛtiḥ mitradruhaṃ kṛtaghnaṃ ca nṛśaṃsaṃ ca narādhamam kravyādāḥ krimayaś caiva nopabhuñjanti vai sadā
brahmātha svasabhāprāptaṃ bakaṃ dharmaparāyaṇam
mitrād bhogāṃś ca bhuñjīta mitreṇāpatsu mucyate
śuklāmbaradharaṃ viṣṇuṃ śaśivarṇaṃ caturbhujam prasannavadanaṃ dhyāyet sarvavighnopaśāntaye
aham eko na me kaś cin nāham anyasya kasya cit na taṃ paśyāmi yasyāhaṃ taṃ na paśyāmi yo mama

śarīram evāyatanaṃ sukhasya duḥkhasya cāpy āyatanaṃ śarīram yad yac charīreṇa karoti karma tenaiva dehī samupāśnute tat jīvitaṃ ca śarīraṃ ca jātyaiva saha jāyate ubhe saha vivardhete ubhe saha vinaśyataḥ snehapāśair bahuvidhair āviṣṭaviṣayā janāḥ akṛtārthāś ca sīdante jalaiḥ saikatasetavaḥ snehena tilavat sarvaṃ sargacakre nipīḍyate tilapīḍair ivākramya kleśair ajñānasaṃbhavaiḥ saṃcinoty aśubhaṃ karma kalatrāpekṣayā naraḥ ekaḥ kleśān avāpnoti paratreha ca mānavaḥ putradārakuṭumbeṣu prasaktāḥ sarvamānavāḥ śokapaṅkārṇave magnā jīrṇā vanagajā iva putranāśe vittanāśe jñātisaṃbandhinām api prāpyate sumahad duḥkhaṃ dāvāgnipratimaṃ vibho daivāyattam idaṃ sarvaṃ sukhaduḥkhe bhavābhavau asuhṛt sasuhṛc cāpi saśatrur mitravān api saprajñaḥ prajñayā hīno daivena labhate sukham
sukhaṃ svapiti durmedhāḥ svāni karmāṇy acintayan avijñānena mahatā kambaleneva saṃvṛtaḥ
śuklakṛṣṇagatijñaṃ taṃ devāsuravinirgamam
amoghā rātrayaś cāpi nityam āyānti yānti ca
yām eva rātriṃ prathamāṃ garbho bhajati mātaram tām eva rātriṃ prasthāti maraṇāya nivartakaḥ yasyāṃ rātryāṃ vyatītāyāṃ na kiṃ cic chubham ācaret
niyato dehināṃ mṛtyur animittaṃ hi jīvitam
idaṃ me syād idaṃ me syād ity evaṃmanaso narān anavāpteṣu kāmeṣu kṛtāntaḥ kurute vaśe
utpathenaiva dhāvantam utpathenaiva dhāvataḥ
paripanthika sarvasya śreyasaḥ pāpasaṃśraya
kleśair nānāvidhair nityaṃ saṃyojayasi nirghṛṇa
asminn arthe purā gītaṃ śṛṇu rājan mahātmanā

bhīṣma uvāca āśā balavatī kaṣṭā nairāśyaṃ paramaṃ sukham āśāṃ nirāśāṃ kṛtvā tu sukhaṃ svapiti piṅgalā sāmiṣaṃ kuraraṃ dṛṣṭvā vadhyamānaṃ nirāmiṣaiḥ āmiṣasya parityāgāt kuraraḥ sukham edhate gṛhārambho hi duḥkhāya na sukhāya kadā cana sarpaḥ parakṛtaṃ veśma praviśya sukham edhate sukhaṃ jīvanti munayo bhaikṣyavṛttiṃ samāśritāḥ adroheṇaiva bhūtānāṃ sāraṅgā iva pakṣiṇaḥ iṣukāro naraḥ kaś cid iṣāv āhitamānasaḥ samīpenāpi gacchantaṃ rājānaṃ nāvabuddhavān bahūnāṃ kalaho nityaṃ dvayoḥ saṃgharṣaṇaṃ dhruvam ekākī vicariṣyāmi kumārīśaṅkhako yathā
asulabham upalabhya cārthalābhaṃ dhṛtimatibuddhiparākramair upetam budhamanujaniṣevitaṃ samarthair vratam idam ājagaraṃ śuciś carāmi
jantūn uccāvacān aṅge daśato na kaṣāma ca
na dvitīyasya śirasaś chedanaṃ vidyate kva cit na ca pāṇes tṛtīyasya yan nāsti na tato bhayam
yajñadānaprajehāyāṃ yatante śaktipūrvakam
yathāsmiṃś ca tathā tatra jānīyāṃ nṛpasattama duṣkartāro yathā loke yat kurvanti tathā śṛṇu
duṣkarmāpi tathā paścāt pūyate puṇyakarmaṇā tapasā tapyate dehas tapasā vindate mahat
bhṛgur uvāca nārāyaṇo jaganmūrtir antarātmā sanātanaḥ kūṭastho 'kṣara avyakto nirlepo vyāpakaḥ prabhuḥ prakṛteḥ parato nityam indriyair apy agocaraḥ sa sisṛkṣuḥ sahasrāṃśād asṛjat puruṣaṃ prabhuḥ
mahān sasarjāhaṃkāraṃ sa cāpi bhagavān atha
merumadhye sthito brahmā kathaṃ sa sasṛje prajāḥ etan me sarvam ācakṣva yāthātathyena pṛcchataḥ
śabdaṃ śṛṇoti ca tathā ākāśāt tu śarīravān śabdaḥ sparśaś ca rūpaṃ ca raso gandhaś ca bhūguṇaḥ
tathā kharo mṛduḥ ślakṣṇo laghur gurutaro 'pi ca
śānto ghoraś ca mūḍhaś ca tān asaṃgharṣajas tathā
mṛdaṅgabherīśaṅkhānāṃ stanayitno rathasya ca yaḥ kaś cic chrūyate śabdaḥ prāṇino 'prāṇino 'pi vā eteṣām eva sarveṣāṃ viṣaye saṃprakīrtitaḥ evaṃ bahuvidhākāraḥ śabda ākāśasaṃbhavaḥ
mūlam ete śarīrasya vyāpya prāṇān iha sthitāḥ
tan naśyaty ubhayaṃ tadvaj jīvo vātānalātmakaḥ
jīvasya cendhanāgneś ca sadā nāśo na vidyate
ātmā kṣetrajña ity uktaḥ saṃyuktaḥ prākṛtair guṇaiḥ tair eva tu vinirmuktaḥ paramātmety udāhṛtaḥ
jīvam ātmaguṇaṃ vindyād ātmānaṃ paramātmanaḥ
vāryau sarvātmanā tau hi śreyoghātārtham utthitau
agnyāgāre tathā tīre ye na kurvanti te śubhāḥ
loṣṭhamardī tṛṇacchedī nakhakhādī tu yo naraḥ nityocchiṣṭaḥ śaṅkuśuko nehāyur vindate mahat
sāyaṃprātaś ca viprāṇāṃ pūjanaṃ ca yathāvidhi
pāpaṃ kṛtaṃ na sphurate yathāghair vipācyamānaṃ punar eti kartuḥ
kutaḥ sṛṣṭam idaṃ viśvaṃ jagat sthāvarajaṅgamam pralaye ca kam abhyeti tan me vaktum ihārhasi
sṛṣṭipralayasaṃyuktam ācāryaiḥ paridarśitam
ātmānam amalaṃ rājann āvṛtyaivaṃ vyavasthitam tasmin prakāśate nityaṃ tamaḥ somo yathaiva tat tad vidvān naṣṭapāpmaiṣa brahmabhūyāya kalpate aṇḍāvaraṇabhūtānāṃ paryantaṃ hi yathā tamaḥ

sa teṣāṃ guṇasaṃghātaḥ śarīre bharatarṣabha satataṃ pravilīyante guṇās te prabhavanti ca yad vinā naiva śṛṇute na paśyati na dīpyate yad adhīnaṃ yatas tasmād adhyātmam iti kathyate jñānaṃ tad ekarūpākhyaṃ nānāprajñānvitaṃ tadā na te vācānurūpaṃ syād yayā[thā] rā[ra]savivarjitam ākāśāt khalu yājyeṣu bhavanti sumahāguṇāḥ iti tanmayam evaitat sarvaṃ sthāvarajaṅgamam pralaye ca tam abhyeti tasmād utsṛjyate punaḥ mahābhūteṣu bhūtātmā sṛṣṭvā saṃharate punaḥ
cicchaktyādhiṣṭhitā buddhiś cetanety abhiviśrutā cetanānantaro jīvas tad āvetti ca lakṣyate notsṛjan visṛjaṃś caiva śarīraṃ dṛśyate yadā tasmiṃś cetopalabdhiḥ syāt tamo vācchādayaty uta
yena saṃkalpayaty arthaṃ kiṃ cid bhavati tanmanaḥ
sattvaṃ buddhis tamobhāvaḥ prītiyogāt pravartate
na tu tapyati tattvajñaḥ phale jñāte taraty uta

pratigṛhya ca nihnoti hy anyathā ca pradṛśyate na sarpati ca yaṃ prāhuḥ sarvatra pratihanyate dhūmena cāprasanno 'gnir yathārkaṃ na pravartayet dhiṣṇyādhipe prasanne tu sthitim etāṃ nirīkṣate atidūrāc ca sūkṣmatvāt prasthānaṃ na prakāśate prapadya tac chrutāhvāni cinmayaṃ svīkṛtaṃ vinā
lokam āturam asūyate janas tasya taj janayatīha sarvataḥ
ikṣvākoś caiva mṛtyoś ca vivādo dharmakāraṇāt
krameṇa caiṣa vihito japayajñavidhir nṛpa sālambanam iti jñeyaṃ japayajñātmakaṃ śubham

na japo na ca vai dhyānaṃ necchā na dveṣaharṣaṇau yujyate nṛpaśārdūla susaṃvedyaṃ hi tat kila japam āvartayan nityaṃ japan vai brahmacārikam tadarthabuddhyā saṃyāti manasā jāpakaḥ param yathā saṃśrūyate jāpo yena vai jāpako bhavet saṃhitāpraṇavenaiva sāvitrī ca parā matā yad anyad ucitaṃ śuddhaṃ vedasmṛty upapāditam
athābhimatamantreṇa praṇavādyaṃ japet kṛtī yasminn evābhipatitaṃ manas tatra niveśayet samādhau sa hi mantre tu saṃhitāṃ vā yathāvidhi
nirālambo bhavet smṛtvā maraṇāya samādhimān sarvāṃl lokān samākramya kramāt prāpnoti vai param
etad vai brahmaṇaḥ sthānaṃ jāpakasya mahātmanaḥ tatrasthaṃ paramātmānaṃ dhyāyan vai susamāhitaḥ hiraṇyagarbhasāyujyaṃ prāpnuyād vā nṛpottama
yenaiva kāraṇenātra dharmavādasamanvitaḥ
caturbhir akṣarair yuktā somapāne 'kṣarāṣṭakā jagadbījasamāyuktā caturviṃśākṣarātmikā
sadā dānto jitakrodhaḥ satyasaṃdho 'nasūyakaḥ
acalaṃ te manaḥ kṛtvā tyaja dehaṃ mahāmate anena kiṃ te saṃyogaḥ kathaṃ mohaṃ gamiṣyasi
evaṃ te kāryasaṃprītir vartate munisattama
svakāryanirbharā yūyaṃ paropadravahetavaḥ dharma uvāca vayam apy evam avyagrair dhātur ājñāpuraḥsaraiḥ coditā dhāvamānā vai karmabhāgam anuvratāḥ
phalaṃ bravīṣi dharmasya na cej japyakṛtasya mām
sakṛd aṃśo nipatati sakṛt kanyā pradīyate sakṛd eva dadānīti trīṇy etāni sakṛt sakṛt
jijñāsamānau yuvayor manotthaṃ tu dvijottama
tato dharmayamādyās te vākyam ūcur nṛpadvijau asmākaṃ yaḥ smṛto mūrdhā brahmalokam iti smṛtam tatrasthau hi bhavantau hi yuvābhyāṃ nirjitā vayam yuvayoḥ kāma āpannas tat kāmyam aviśaṅkayā
tumburupramukhāś caiva hāhā hūhūs tathaiva ca
ājagāma ca deveśo brahmā vedamayo 'vyayaḥ
sāmānyaśabdaiś ca viśeṣaṇaiś ca sa me bhavāñ śaṃsatu tāvad etat

bṛhaspatir uvāca iṣṭaṃ tv aniṣṭaṃ ca sukhāsukhe ca sāśīs tv avacchandati karmabhiś ca ebhir viyuktaḥ param āviveśa etatkṛte karmavidhiḥ pravṛttaḥ ātmādibhiḥ karmabhir idhyamāno dharme pravṛtto dyutimān sukhārthī
na tair nibaddhaḥ sa tu badhnāti viśvaṃ na cānuyātīha guṇān parātmā
antargatena pāpena dahyamānena cetasā śubhāśubhavikāreṇa na sa bhūyo 'bhijāyate
prasṛtānīndriyāṇy eva pratisaṃharati kūrmavat
ādatte sarvabhūtānāṃ rasabhūtaṃ vikāsavān tadvad dehas tu saṃdṛśya ātmādṛśyaḥ paraḥ sadā grastaṃ hy udgirate nityam udgīthaṃ vetti nityaśaḥ bālye rathābhyāṃ yogena tattvajñānaṃ tu saṃmatam
raśmimaṇḍalahīnas tu na cāsau nāsti tāvatā

avyaktāt prasṛtaṃ jñānaṃ tato buddhis tato manaḥ ātmanaḥ prasṛtā buddhir avyaktaṃ jñānam ucyate tasmād buddhiḥ smṛtā tajjñair manas tasmāt tataḥ smṛtam tasmād ākṛtayaḥ pañca manaḥ paramam ucyate tasmāt paratarā buddhir jñānaṃ tasmāt paraṃ smṛtam tataḥ sūkṣmas tato hy ātmā tasmāt parataraṃ na ca indriyāṇi nirīkṣante manasaitāni sarvaśaḥ

duḥkhopaghāte śārīre mānase cāpy upasthite yasmin na śakyate kartuṃ yatnas taṃ nānucintayet bhaiṣajyam etad duḥkhasya yad etan nānucintayet cintyamānaṃ hi cābhyeti bhūyaś cāpi pravartate prajñayā mānasaṃ duḥkhaṃ hanyāc chārīram auṣadhaiḥ etad vijñānasāmarthyaṃ na bālaiḥ samatām iyāt anityaṃ yauvanaṃ rūpaṃ jīvitaṃ dravyasaṃcayaḥ ārogyaṃ priyasaṃvāso gṛdhyet tatra na paṇḍitaḥ na jānapadikaṃ duḥkham ekaḥ śocitum arhati aśocan pratikurvīta yadi paśyed upakramam sukhād bahutaraṃ duḥkhaṃ jīvite nāsti saṃśayaḥ snigdhasya cendriyārtheṣu mohān maraṇam apriyam parityajati yo duḥkhaṃ sukhaṃ vāpy ubhayaṃ naraḥ abhyeti brahma so 'tyantaṃ na te śocanti paṇḍitāḥ duḥkham arthā hi yujyante pālane na ca te sukham duḥkhena cādhigamyante nāśam eṣāṃ na cintayet
tad evam iṣyate brahma saṃkhyānād vinibhidyate
keśavasya mayā rājan na śakyā varṇituṃ guṇāḥ īdṛśo 'sau hṛṣīkeśo vāsudevaḥ parāt paraḥ

pradyumnam asṛjat tasmāt sarvatejaḥprakāśakam aniruddhas tato jajñe sarvaśaktir mahādyutiḥ apsu vyomagamaḥ śrīmān yoganidrām upeyivān tasmāt saṃjajñire devā brahmaviṣṇumaheśvarāḥ layasthityantakarmāṇas trayas te sumahaujasaḥ
tataḥ sasarja bhagavān mṛtyuṃ lokabhayaṃkaram hartāraṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ sasarja ca janārdanaḥ

vedavidyāvidhātāraṃ brahmāṇam amitadyutim bhūtamātṛgaṇādhyakṣaṃ virūpākṣaṃ ca so 'sṛjat śāsitāraṃ ca pāpānāṃ pitṝṇāṃ samavartinam asṛjat sarvabhūtātmā nidhipaṃ ca dhaneśvaram yādasām asṛjan nāthaṃ varuṇaṃ ca jaleśvaram vāsavaṃ sarvadevānām adhyakṣam akarot prabhuḥ
evaṃvidho 'sau puruṣaḥ ko vainaṃ vetti sarvadā etat te kathitaṃ rājan bhūyaḥ śrotuṃ kim icchasi
śaśabindus tu rājarṣir mahāyogī mahāmanāḥ adhyātmavit sahasrāṇāṃ bhāryāṇāṃ daśamadhyagaḥ sa yogī yogam āpannas tataḥ sāyujyatāṃ gataḥ
dharo dhruvaś ca somaś ca āpaś caivānilo 'nalaḥ pratyūṣaś ca mahābhāgaḥ sāvitraś cāṣṭamaḥ smṛtaḥ
dharmo hi bhagavān viṣṇur varāho yajñarūpadhṛk tanmayaṃ ca jagat sarvam ātmā sarvasya cātmavān

narakādyā mahāghorā hiraṇyākṣam upāśritāḥ udyogaṃ paramaṃ cakrur devānāṃ nigrahe tadā niyutaṃ vatsarāṇāṃ tu vāyubhakṣo 'bhavat tadā hiraṇyākṣo mahāraudro lebhe devāt pitāmahāt varān acintyān atulāñ śataśo 'tha sahasraśaḥ

hiraṇyākṣeṇa bhagavan gṛhīteyaṃ vasuṃdharā na śakṣyāmo vayaṃ tatra praveṣṭuṃ jaladurgamam tān āha bhagavān brahmā munir eva prasādyatām agastyo 'sau mahātejāḥ pātu taj jalam añjasā tatheti coktvā te devā munim ūcur mudānvitāḥ trāyasva lokān viprarṣe jalam etat kṣayaṃ naya tatheti coktvā bhagavān kālānalasamadyutiḥ dhyāyañ jalādanivahaṃ sa kṣaṇena papau jalam śoṣite tu samudre ca devāḥ sarṣipurogamāḥ brahmāṇaṃ praṇipatyocur muninā śoṣitaṃ jalam iti bhūyaḥ samācakṣva kiṃ kariṣyāmahe vibho

trastāṃś ca devān ālokya brahmā prāha pitāmahaḥ yogeśvaro 'yaṃ bhagavān vārāhaṃ rūpam āsthitaḥ nardamāno 'tra saṃyāti mā bhaiṣṭa surasattamāḥ evam uktvā tato brahmā namaścakre pitāmahaḥ devatā munayaś caiva viṣṇuṃ vai muktihetave tato harir mahātejā brahmāṇam abhinandya ca
tatra gatvā mahātmānam ūcuś caiva jagatpatim
pitāmaha uvāca divyaṃ * * * * * * yuddham āsīn mahātmanoḥ hiraṇyākṣasya viṣṇoś ca sarvasaṃkṣobhakāraṇam jaghāna ca hiraṇyākṣam antarbhūmigataṃ hariḥ tad ākarṇya mahātejā brahmā madhuram abravīt
bhūyo 'pi jñānasadbhāve sthityarthaṃ tvāṃ bravīmy aham acintyaṃ vāsudevākhyaṃ tasmāt prabrūhi sattama
tejorāśiṃ mahātmānaṃ satyasaṃdhaṃ jitendriyam
krīḍate bhagavān devo bālakrīḍanakair iva
vaiśyo vaiśyais tathā śrāvyaḥ śūdraḥ śūdrair mahāmanāḥ

tad akṣaram acintyaṃ vai bhinnarūpeṇa dṛśyate paśya kālākhyam aniśaṃ na coṣṇaṃ nātiśītalam na santy ete guṇās tasmiṃs tathā tasmāt pravartate śītalo 'yam anuprāptaḥ kālo grīṣmas tathaiva ca vakṣyanti sarvabhūtāni hy ete sūryodayaṃ prati āgacchanti nivartanti sa kālo guṇarāśayaḥ na caiva prakṛtisthena kālayuktena nityaśaḥ guṇaiḥ saṃbhogam aratis tattvavijñānakovidam puruṣādhiṣṭhitā nityaṃ prakṛtiḥ sūyate parā

śrutir eṣā samākhyātā tadarthaṃ kāraṇātmanā anāmnāyavidhānād vai vedā hy antarhitā yathā yugānte hy astabhūtāni śāstrāṇi vividhāni ca sarvasattvavinā[śā]d vai jīvātmanityayā smṛtāḥ anyasminn aṇḍasadbhāve vartamānāni nityaśaḥ
niyogād brahmaṇo viprā lokatantrapravartakāḥ
nyāyatantraṃ hi kārtsnyena gautamo veda tattvataḥ vedāntakarmayogaṃ ca vedavid brahmavid vibhuḥ dvaipāyano nijagrāha śilpaśāstraṃ bhṛguḥ punaḥ
vakṣye 'haṃ tava yat prāptam ṛṣer dvaipāyanān mayā
buddhīndriyārthā ity uktā daśa saṃsargayonayaḥ sadasadbhāvayoge ca mana ity abhidhīyate vyavasāyaguṇā buddhir ahaṃkāro 'bhimānakaḥ na bījaṃ dehayoge ca karmabījapravartanāt
agnir yathā hy upāyena mathitvā dāru dṛśyate tathaivātmā śarīrastho yogenaivātra dṛśyate
ātmānam anusaṃyāti buddhir avyaktajā tathā tām anveti mano yadval lohavarmaṇi saṃnidhau
yena svabhāvasadbhāvaṃ hetubhūtā sakāraṇā evaṃ prākṛtavistāro hy āśritya puruṣaṃ param

prāṇenāyaṃ hi śānte tu virodhāt pratipālanam dehasyeṣūn ya āste yaḥ śuddho 'cintya sanātanaḥ bhrāmayan neṣato (sic) yāti kālacakrasamanvitaḥ bhūtāni mohayan nityaṃ cakrasya ca rayaṃ gataḥ snehadravyasamāyoge kṣetrapācaṃ na vastuṣu tilavat pīḍite cakre hy ādhiyantranipīḍite bahiś cādhiṣṭhite yadvaj jñānināṃ karmasaṃbhavam
yathākarṇya ca tac chiṣyas tattvajñānam anuttamam
vedasya na vidur bhāvaṃ jñānamārgapratiṣṭhitam

ke cid ātmaguṇaṃ prāptās te muktāś cakrabandhanāt itare duḥkhasadvaṃdvās tathā duḥkhaparāyaṇāḥ śukākarmānurūpaṃ te jāyamānāḥ punaḥ punaḥ krodhalobhamadāviṣṭā mūḍhāntaḥkaraṇāḥ sadā yathā.......saṃchāyā nāsti nityatayā purā guṇān eva tathā cintyā santy eti ca vidur budhāḥ
acalaṃ jñānam aprāpya calacittaś calān iyāt
guṇāḥ kāryāḥ krodhaharṣau sukhaduḥkhe priyāpriye dvaṃdvāny athaivamādīni vijayec caiva sarvavit

bhakṣaṇe śvāpadair mārgād iti cāraṃ karoti cet evaṃ saṃsāramārgeṇa yātrārthaṃ viṣayāṇi ca na gacched bhogavijñānād unmārge padyate tadā tasmād aduḥkhato mārgam āsthitas tam anusmaret nānāparṇaphalā vṛkṣā bahavaḥ santi tatra hi bhoktāro munayaś caiva tasmāt parataraṃ vanam anumānais tathā śāstrair yaśasā vikrameṇa ca
dehamūlaṃ vijānīhi naitāni bhagavān ataḥ upāyataḥ pravakṣyāmi taṃ ca mṛtyuṃ durāsadam
prakṛter guṇasaṃjāto mahān ahaṃkriyā tataḥ ahaṃkārāt punaḥ paścād bhūtagrāmam udāhṛtam avyaktasya guṇebhyas tu tadguṇāṃś ca nibodha tān
asaṃtoṣo 'kṣamā dhairyam atṛptir viṣayādiṣu rājasāś ca guṇā hy ete tatparaṃ tāmasāñ śṛṇu mohas tandrī tathā duḥkhaṃ nidrālasyaṃ pramādatā viṣādī dīrghasūtraś ca tat tāmasam udāhṛtam
yasmin pratiṣṭhitaṃ cedaṃ yasmin sajjñānanirgatiḥ sarvabhūtādhikaṃ nityam ahaṃkāraṃ vilokayet vilokamānaḥ sa tadā svabuddhyā sūkṣmayā punaḥ tad eva bhāti tad rūpam ātmanā yat sunirmalam
mahyaṃ śuśrūṣave vidvan vakṣy etad buddhiniścitam śāntatvād aparāntāc ca ārambhād api caikataḥ prokto hy atra yathā hetur evam āhur manīṣiṇaḥ
sahajair aviśuddhātmā doṣair naśyati rājasaiḥ
tyajec ca manasā caitau śuddhātmā buddhim āsthitaḥ
te brahma punar āyānti na mohād acalā iva

tathā narakagartasthas tṛṣṇārajjubhir ācitaḥ puṇyapāpapraṇunnāṅgo jāyate sa yathā kṛmiḥ maśakair matkuṇair daṣṭas tathā citravadhārditaḥ nānāvyādhibhir ākīrṇaḥ kathaṃ cid yauvanaṃ gataḥ kūrmotsṛjati bhūyaś ca rajjuḥ svasvamukhepsayā yoṣitaṃ narakaṃ gṛhya janmakarmavaśānugaḥ purakṣetranimittaṃ yad duḥkhaṃ vaktuṃ na śakyate kas tatra nindakaś caiva narake pacyate bhṛśam vārdhakyam anulaṅgheta tatra karmārabhet punaḥ bhagavān saṃstutaḥ paścāt kiṃ pravakṣyāmi te bhṛśam
rasarāgāt tathā jihvā jāyate bhāvitātmanaḥ
tvacā ca sparśanaṃ yac ca nāsayā ghrāṇam eva ca

amedhyapūrṇaṃ yad bhāṇḍaṃ śleṣmāntakalilāvṛtam necchate vīkṣituṃ bhāṇḍaṃ kutaḥ spraṣṭuṃ pravartate dehabhāṇḍaṃ malaiḥ pūrṇaṃ bahiḥ svedajalāvṛtam bībhatsaṃ naranārīṇāṃ jñānināṃ narakaṃ matam chidrakumbho yathā srāvaṃ sṛjate tadgataṃ dṛḍham antaḥsthaṃ sraṃsate tadvaj jalaṃ deheṣu dehinām śleṣmāśrumūtrakalilaṃ purīṣaṃ śuklam eva ca kaphajālaviniryāsaḥ sarasaś citta muñcaya

evaṃ putrakalatreṣu jñātisaṃbandhibandhuṣu ādatte hṛdaye kāmaṃ vyādhā[dhyā]dibhir abhiplutaḥ yatas tataḥ paripatann avindan sukham aṇv api bahuduḥkhasamāpannaḥ paścān nirvedam āsthitaḥ jñānavṛkṣaṃ samāśritya paścān nirvṛtim aśnute
vaśā mokṣavatāṃ pāśās tāsāṃ rūpaṃ pradarśakam durgrahaṃ paśyamāno 'pi manyate mohitas tadā evaṃ paśyantam ātmānam anudhyātaṃ hi bandhuṣu ayathātvena jānāmi bhedarūpeṇa saṃsthitam
anakṣasādhyaṃ tad brahma nirmalaṃ jagataḥ param svātmaprakāśam agrāhyam ahetukam acañcalam vivekajñānavācistho hy āśurūpeṇa saṃsthitaḥ vaikārikāt pradṛśyete gairike madhudhāravat
saṃsāramārgam āpannaḥ pratilomaṃ vivarjayet

yojayitvā manas tatra niścalaṃ paramātmani yogābhisaṃdhiyuktasya brahma tat saṃprakāśate aikāntyaṃ tad idaṃ viddhi sarvavastvantarasthitiḥ viśeṣahīnaṃ gṛhṇanti viśeṣāṃ kāraṇātmikām atha vā na prabhus tatra paramātmani vartitum āgāmitattvaṃ yogātmā yogatantram upakramet

tanmayānīndriyāṇy āhus tāvad gacchanti tāni vai atrāhus tritayaṃ nityam atathyam iti cec ca na prathame vartamāno 'sau tritayaṃ vetti sarvadā netarāv upasaṃgamya vijānāti kathaṃ cana svapnāvasthāgato hy eṣa svapna ity eva vetti ca tad apy asadṛśaṃ yuktyā tritayaṃ mohalakṣaṇam yadātmatritayān muktas tadā jānāty asatkṛtaḥ
vyaktabhedam atīto 'sau cinmātraṃ paridṛśyate

sattvaṃ manas tathā buddhir devā ity abhiśabditāḥ tair eva hi vṛtas tasmāj jñātvaivaṃ paramaṃ * * nidrāvikalpena satāṃ * * viśati lokavat svastho bhavati gūḍhātmā kaluṣaiḥ parivarjitaḥ niśādikā ye kathitā lokānāṃ kaluṣā matāḥ tair hīnaṃ yat puraṃ śuddhaṃ bāhyābhyantaravartinam sadānandamayaṃ nityaṃ bhūtvā tat param anviyāt evam ākhyātam atyarthaṃ brahmacaryam akalmaṣam sarvasaṃyogahīnaṃ tad viṣṇvākhyaṃ paramaṃ padam acintyam adbhutaṃ loke jñānena parivartate
agrāhyaṃ yena jānanti taj jñanaṃ daṃśitaś ca tat tenaiva daṃśito nityaṃ na guṇaḥ paribhūyate

bhedavastu tv abhedena jānāti sa yadā pumān tadā paraṃ parātmāsau bhavaty eva nirañjanaḥ kriyāyoge ca bhedākhye bahu saṃkṣipyate kva cit vasurudragaṇādyeṣu svānubhogena bhogataḥ evam eṣa paraḥ sattvo nānārūpeṇa saṃsthitaḥ saṃkṣipto dṛśyate paścād ekarūpeṇa viṣṭhitaḥ
vāyur vidho yathā bhānur viprakāśaṃ gamiṣyati
anyac ca dharmasāmyaṃ yat tapas tat kīrtyate punaḥ
tritayaṃ hy etad ākhyātaṃ yady asmād bhāsituṃ punaḥ svabhāsā bhāsayaṃś cāpi candramā hy atra vartate sūryayoge tu yaḥ saṃdhis tapaḥ sarvaṃ pradīpyate
evam ekāyanaṃ dharmam āhur vedavido janāḥ yathājñānam upāsantaḥ sarve yānti parāṃ gatim
itas tataḥ samāhṛtya rūpaṃ nirvartayiṣyati
pañcasrotasi niṣṇātaḥ pañcarātraviśāradaḥ pañcajñaḥ pañcakṛt pañcaguṇaḥ pañcaśikhaḥ smṛtaḥ
bodhāyanaparān viprān ṛṣibhāvam upāgataḥ evaṃ pṛṣṭaḥ pañcaśikhaḥ saṃprahṛṣṭatanūruhaḥ
nirākariṣṇus tān sarvāṃs teṣāṃ hetuguṇān bahūn śrāvayām āsa matimān muniḥ pañcaśikho nṛpa
na jātu kāmaḥ kāmānām upabhogena śāmyati haviṣā kṛṣṇavartmeva bhūya evābhivardhate
ahaṃvācyaṃ dvijānāṃ yad viśiṣṭaṃ buddhirūpavat vācām agocaraṃ nityaṃ jñeyam evaṃ bhaviṣyati jñānaṃ jñeyaṃ tathājñānaṃ trividhaṃ jñānam ucyate
prāṇādayas tathā sparśā na saṃbādhagatās tathā putrādhīnaṃ bhaviṣyeta cinmātraḥ sa paraḥ pumān
**** **** pāre ca rajasaḥ prabhum virāgād vartate tasmin mano rajasi nityagam tasmin prasanne saṃpaśyed
tasmād eteṣu medhāvī na prasajyeta buddhimān
śete jarāmṛtyubhayair vimuktaḥ kṣīṇe puṇye vigate ca pāpe taponimitte vigate ca niṣṭhe phale yathākāśam aliṅga eva
cakṣū rūpaṃ tathā cittaṃ trayo darśanasaṃgrahe nāsā gandhas tathā cittaṃ trayo ghrāṇasya saṃgrahe tvacaḥ sparśaṃ tathā cittaṃ trayaḥ sparśanasaṃgrahe jihvā rasas tathā cittaṃ trayo rasanasaṃgrahe

aham ity eṣa vai bhāvo nānyatra pratitiṣṭhati yasya bhāvo dṛḍho nityaṃ sa vai vidvāṃs tathetaraḥ dehadharmas tathā nityaṃ sarvabhūteṣu vai dṛḍhaḥ etenaivānumānena tyājyo dharmas tathā hy asau jñānena mucyate jantur dharmātmā jñānavān bhavet dharmeṇa dhāryate lokaḥ sarvaṃ dharme pratiṣṭhitam sarvārthajanakaś caiva dharmaḥ sarvasya kāraṇam sarvo hi dṛśyate loke na sarvārthaḥ kathaṃ cana sarvatyāge kṛte tasmāt paramātmā prasīdati vyaktād avyaktam atulaṃ lokeṣu parivartate
imān svalokān anupaśya sarvān vrajan yathākāśam ivāptakāmaḥ imāṃ hi gāthāṃ pralapan yathāsti samastasaṃkalpaviśeṣamuktaḥ ahaṃ hi sarvaṃ kila sarvabhāve hy ahaṃ tadantar hy aham eva bhoktā
dharmaḥ saṃrakṣyate tais tu yatas te dharmasetavaḥ
atuṣṭir anṛtaṃ moha eṣa mārgo durātmanām
upetavrataśaucā ye bhuñjante brāhmaṇāḥ kva cit tad annam amṛtaṃ bhūtvā yajamānaṃ prapadyate
śraddadhānaḥ sadā ca syād daivatadvijapūjakaḥ
adattvā yo 'tithibhyo 'nnaṃ na bhuṅkte so 'tithipriyaḥ adattvānnaṃ daivatebhyo yo na bhuṅkte sa daivatam
bhaktaṃ bhāgavataṃ nityaṃ nārāyaṇaparāyaṇam dhyāyantaṃ paramātmānaṃ hiraṇyakaśipoḥ sutam

gahanaṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ dhyeyaṃ nityaṃ sanātanam anigraham anaupamyaṃ sarvākāraṃ parātparam sarvāvaraṇasaṃbhūtaṃ tasmād etat pravartate tanmayā api saṃpaśya nānālakṣaṇalakṣitāḥ sa vai pāti jagatsraṣṭā viṣṇur ity abhiśabditaḥ punar darśati saṃprāpte ........ sureśvaraḥ (sic)
anantaraṃ sahasreṇa tadāsīd daitya kā matiḥ
bhīṣma uvāca tataḥ prahasya sa balir vāsavena samīritam niśamya mānagambhīraṃ surarājam athābravīt aho hi tava bāliśyam iha devagaṇādhipa ayuktaṃ devarājasya tava kaṣṭam idaṃ vacaḥ
na jānīṣe bhavān siddhiṃ śubhāṅgasvarūparūpiṇīm kālena bhavitā sarvo nātra gacchati vāsava
aiśvaryamadamohena sa tvaṃ kiṃ nānubudhyase kālena budhyase rājan vinipātena yojitaḥ
garvaṃ hitvā tathā mānaṃ devarāja śṛṇuṣva me mayā ca tvānu sadbhāvaṃ pūrvam ācaritaṃ mahat avaśyakālaparyāyam ātmanaḥ parivartanam avidaṃl lokamāhātmya * * * * * * * *
vidravanti tvayā sārdhaṃ sarva eva divaukasaḥ
tatas tāni na paśyāmi kāle tam api vṛtrahan

kālena coditā śakra mā te garvaḥ śatakrato kṣamasva kālayogaṃ tam āgataṃ viddhi devapa nirlajjaś caiva kasmāt tvaṃ devarāja vikatthase sarvāsurāṇām adhipaḥ sarvadevabhayaṃkaraḥ jitavān brahmaṇo lokaṃ ko vidyād āgataṃ gatim
yad guṇeṣu ca lubdhāsi baler apanayas tu kaḥ
bhūmiśuddhiṃ tataḥ kṛtvā adbhiḥ saṃtarpayanti ye bhūtāni ca yajanty agnau teṣāṃ tvam anapāyinī ye kriyābhiḥ suraktābhir hetuyuktāḥ samāhitāḥ jñānavanto vivatsāyāṃ labdhā mādyanti yoginaḥ
tatheti coktvā sā bhraṣṭā sarvalokanamaskṛtā vāsavaṃ pālayām āsa sā devī kamalālayā
yudhiṣṭhira uvāca vyasaneṣu nimagnasya kiṃ śreyas tad bravīhi me bhūya eva mahābāho sthityarthaṃ taṃ bravīhi me
**** **** saṃtāpād bhraśyate śriyaḥ saṃtāpād bhraśyate cāyur
na śīlena na vṛttena tathā naivārthasaṃpadā
vaśyā bhavanti dhairyeṇa na vā rājño na saṃśayaḥ dhairyavāñ śriyam āpnoti dhairyād dharmo vivardhate
nityaṃ kālaparītātmā bhavaty evaṃ sureśvara
ahaṃ sukhīti nityaṃ ca manasāpi na cintayet
brāhmaṇāś cāpi śūdrāś ca bhogārthe kalpayanty uta

merupādodbhavāṃ gaṅgāṃ nārāyaṇapadacyutām sa vīkṣamāṇo hṛṣṭātmā taṃ deśam abhijagmivān yaṃ * devajavā[?nā]kīrṇaṃ sūkṣmakāñcanavālukam gaṅgādvīpaṃ samāsādya nānāvṛkṣair alaṃkṛtam sālatālāśvakarṇānāṃ candanānāṃ ca rājibhiḥ maṇḍitaṃ vividhaiḥ puṣpair haṃsakāraṇḍavāyutam nadīpulinam āsādya snātvā saṃtarpya devatāḥ jajāpa japyaṃ dharmātmā tanmayatvena bhāsvatā
vivikte puṇyadeśe tu ramamāṇau mudā yutau dadṛśāte 'ntarikṣe tau sūryasyodayanaṃ prati jyotir jvālasamākīrṇaṃ jyotiṣāṃ gaṇamaṇḍitam
arkasya tejasā tulyaṃ tad bhāskarasamaprabham
ahiṃsānirate nityaṃ satyavākye yatendriye
kālo yātaḥ sukhe caiva dharmamārge ca vartatām

kṣudrāḥ saṃskārahīnāś ca nāryo hy udarapoṣaṇāḥ śaucācāraparibhraṣṭā nirlajjā bhogavañcitāḥ ubhābhyām eva pāṇibhyāṃ śiraḥkaṇḍūyanānvitāḥ gṛhajālābhisaṃsthānā hy āsaṃs tatra striyaḥ punaḥ śvaśrūśvaśurayor madhye bhartāraṃ kṛtakaṃ yathā prekṣayanti ca nirlajjā nāryaḥ kulajalakṣaṇāḥ
śvaśurānugatāḥ sarve hy utsṛjya pitarau sutāḥ svakarmaṇā ca jāto 'ham ity evaṃvādinas tathā
mahādevāntare vṛttaṃ devyāś caivāntare tathā yathāvac chṛṇu rājendra jñānadaṃ pāpanāśanam
yac chrutvā pārameṣṭhyena bhavec cāpy amalā matiḥ
aratiḥ krodhacāpalye bhayaṃ naitāni nārade adīrghasūtraḥ śūraś ca tasmāt sarvatra pūjitaḥ
bhedakaṃ bhedatattvaṃ ca tathānyeṣāṃ mataṃ tathā avasthātritayaṃ caiva yādṛśaṃ ca pitāmaha

jñānaṃ brahma ca yogaṃ ca gavātmakam idaṃ jagat tritaye tv enam āyāti tathā hy eṣo 'pi vā punaḥ kenaiva ca vibhāgaḥ syāt turīyo lakṣaṇair vinā jñānajñeyāntare ko 'sau ko 'yaṃ bhāvas tu bhedavat yaj jñānaṃ lakṣaṇaṃ caiva teṣāṃ kartāram eva ca
satyaṃ śaucaṃ tathāyuś ca dharmaś cāpaiti pādaśaḥ
ādau vedamayī divyā yataḥ sarvāḥ pravṛttayaḥ
nānārūpaṃ ca bhūtānāṃ karmaṇāṃ ca pravartanam vedaśabdebhya evādau nirmimīte sa īśvaraḥ nāmadheyāni carṣīṇāṃ yāś ca vedeṣu sṛṣṭayaḥ
arūpam arasasparśam agandhaṃ na ca mūrtimat sarvalokapraṇaditaṃ svaṃ tu tiṣṭhati nānadat
grasate ca yadā so 'pi śāmyati pratisaṃcare
tiṣṭhaty eteṣu bhagavān ṣaṭsu karmasu saṃsthitaḥ
tasminn uparate rūpam ākāśasya prakāśate rūpaṃ prakāśate tatra
tasminn uparate cāsya buddhirūpaṃ prakāśate
sarvabhūtahito maitraḥ samaloṣṭāśmakāñcanaḥ tulyapriyāpriyo dhīras tulyanindātmasaṃstutiḥ aspṛhaḥ sarvakāmebhyo brahmacarye dṛḍhaś ca yaḥ
tretāyuge vidhis tv eṣa dharmāṇāṃ na kṛte yuge
indriyair api buddhyā vā gṛhyate na kadā cana
vidyāmayaṃ taṃ puruṣaṃ nityaṃ jñānaguṇātmakam
tasmin yaḥ saṃsthito hy agnir nityaṃ sthālyām ivāhitaḥ ātmānaṃ taṃ vijānīhi nityaṃ tyāgajitātmakam
brahmaṃs tad api kartāsmi yad bhavān vakṣyate punaḥ
vyāsena kathitaṃ pūrvaṃ putrāya sumahātmane
śrotraṃ tvakcakṣuṣī jihvā nāsikā caiva pañcamī
pravṛttaṃ raja ity evaṃ tatra cāpy upalakṣayet
vimuktātmā tathā yogī guṇadoṣair na lipyate
pratyakṣeṇa parokṣaṃ tad anumānena sidhyati
tadvat kāmā yaṃ praviśanti sarve sa śāntim āpnoti na kāmakāmaḥ
asṛṅ majjā ca yac cānyat snigdhaṃ vidyāt tadātmakam
mahoṣmāntargataś cāpi garbhatvaṃ samupeyivān daśa māsān vasan kukṣau naiṣo 'nnam iva jīryate
pauramantraviyuktāyāḥ so 'rthaḥ saṃsīdati kramāt
etebhya ete nirvṛttāḥ svaguṇāyātmanopi vā
putratvenānusaṃkalpya tvayāhaṃ tapasāpy aja
tvaṃ hi saṃhārabuddhyā me cintitā ruṣitena ca
dve cāyute naraśreṣṭha vāyvāhārā mahāmate
tvaṃ hi yattā ca yuktā ca pūrvotpannā ca bhāminī anuśiṣṭā ca nirdoṣā tasmāt tvaṃ kuru me matam
klinnā babhūvur grathitā āplutasya jaṭāḥ prabho
ajo 'gnir varuṇo meṣaḥ sūryo 'śvaḥ pṛthivī virāṭ dhenur vatsaś ca somo vai vikrīyaitan na sidhyati
devaiḥ pravartitaṃ hy etaṃ viddhi dharmaṃ ca jājale aparā hy anavasthaiṣā nāsmākaṃ buddhir īdṛśī
tasmāt tān ṛtvijo lubdhā yājayanty aśubhān narān
ity uktvā sa tadā vipro gautamas tapatāṃ varaḥ avimṛśya mahābhāgo vanam eva jagāma ha
prāpnuyād eva harṣaṃ sa cintātmā mānuṣaḥ svayam
āvayoś cittasaṃtāpaḥ na hy asatphalatas tathā
gaurajo manujo meṣaḥ aśvāśvataragardabhāḥ ete grāmyāḥ samākhyātāḥ paśavaḥ sapta sādhubhiḥ siṃhā vyāghrā varāhāś ca mahiṣā vāraṇās tathā mahiṣī vānarāś caiva saptāraṇyās tathā smṛtāḥ
yataḥ svarūpataś cānyo jātitaḥ śrutito 'rthataḥ katham asmin sa ity eva saṃbandhaḥ syād asaṃhitaḥ
indriyārthāś ca bhavatāṃ samānāḥ sarvajantuṣu evaṃ caturṇāṃ varṇānām āśramāṇāṃ pravṛttiṣu evam ālambamānānāṃ nirṇaye sarvatodiśam
ānantyaṃ vadamānena śaktena vijitātmanā
ekam eva brahmacārī śuśrūṣur ghoraniścayaḥ
dhanārthī yadi vipro 'yaṃ dhanam asmai pradīyatām
brāhmaṇaḥ sa ca saṃtapto rājyalobhād ariṃdama
rājyaṃ vā mama saṃtuṣṭo naṣṭo 'haṃ syāṃ na saṃśayaḥ
kuśalenaiva dharmeṇa gatim iṣṭāṃ prapadyate
dharme sthitānāṃ kaunteya sarvabhogakriyāsu ca
jñānam ātmāvabodhena yacched ātmānam ātmanā
atrāpy udāharantīmam itihāsaṃ purātanam hārītena purā gītaṃ tan nibodha yudhiṣṭhira

nityatṛptaḥ susaṃtuṣṭaḥ prasannavadanendriyaḥ dhyānajapyaparo maunī vairāgyaṃ samupāśritaḥ asvantaṃ bhautikaṃ sargaṃ paśyan bhūtātmikāṃ gatim niḥspṛhaḥ samadarśī ca pakvāpakvena vartayan ātmārāmaḥ praśāntātmā laghvāhāro nirāmayaḥ
pādayor bhūḥ sapātāḷā hṛtasūryasyaiva maṇḍalam
atiprasakto nirayāc ca daitya tatas tataḥ saṃparivartate ca
evaṃ sa devo bhagavān uvāca sanatkumāro madhurābhibhāṣī
turīyārdhena brahmāṇaṃ tasya viddhi mahātmanaḥ
samudvignaṃ samīkṣya tvāṃ svastīty ūcur jayāya te
iyaṃ vṛtrād anuprāptā brahmahatyā mahābhayā puruhūtaṃ caturthāṃśam asyā yūyaṃ pratīcchata
upāsanta mahātmānam uśanā ca mahākaviḥ sanatkumārapramukhās tathaiva ca maharṣayaḥ
vyacarat sarvato devān prādravat sa ṛṣīṃs tathā
hāhābhūtaṃ jagat sarvam upalakṣya tadā prabhuḥ
katheyaṃ kathitā puṇyā dharmyā dharmabhṛtāṃ vara kim anyat kathayāmīha tad bhavān vaktum arhati
svāśramaṃ samanuprāptaṃ nāradaṃ devavarcasam
durvṛtto 'pi varo vipro na ca śūdro jitendriyaḥ kaḥ parityajya gāṃ duṣṭāṃ duhyec chīlavatīṃ kharīm paṇḍitasyāpi śūdrasya sarvaśāstraratasya ca vacanaṃ tasya na grāhyaṃ śunocchiṣṭaṃ havir yathā
sa tu praviṣṭa uśanā pāṇiṃ māheśvaraṃ prabhuḥ
tata eva ca deveṣu sapratiṣṭho mahāmuniḥ paurohityaṃ ca daityānāṃ cakre tejovivṛddhaye
dharmeṇa sahitaṃ yat tu bhaved alpaphalodayam tat kāryam aviśaṅkena karmātyantasukhāvaham
ity uktvā varado devo bhagavān nitya avyayaḥ sādhyair devagaṇaiḥ sārdhaṃ divam evāruroha saḥ etad yaśasyam āyuṣyaṃ putryaṃ svargāya tu dhruvam darśitaṃ devadevena parameṇāvyayena ca
tayos tu darśanaṃ samyak sūkṣme bhāve prasajyate
itareṣu ca ye doṣā guṇās teṣu ca bhārata parisaṃkhyāya saṃkhyānaṃ matvā sāṃkhyaṃ guṇādhikam
durlabhatvaṃ ca mokṣasya vijñāya śrutipūrvakam
mūtraśleṣmapurīṣādīn svedajāṃś ca sukutsitān
tamo vahati rājendra rajasaḥ paramāṃ gatim
saṃhṛtya sarvaṃ nijadehasaṃsthaṃ kṛtvāpsu śete jagadantarātmā
sahastyaśve saśārdūle saṛkṣagavi caiva hi
tiryagyonisahasreṣu kadā cid devatāsv api
phalakaṃ paridhānaś ca tathā kaṇṭakavastradhṛk
pulināni viviktāni viviktāni vanāni ca devasthānāni puṇyāni viviktāni sarāṃsi ca viviktāś cāpi śailānāṃ guhā gṛhanibhopamāḥ
prakṛtyā sarvam evedaṃ jagad andhīkṛtaṃ vibho rajasā tamasā caiva vyāptaṃ sarvam anekadhā
sukhārthī ca tyajed duḥkhaṃ sukhaduḥkhaviparyayam
akartā kartṛ cātmānam abījo bījam ātmanaḥ
sūkṣmadehagatā mātrā bījāpyāyitavṛddhikāḥ
uttīrṇo 'smād agādhāt sa param āpnoti śobhanam
mānasaṃ vṛddhasevābhir duḥkhaṃ śārīram auṣadhaiḥ vācikaṃ mantrajāpyena vidvān yatnād vināśayet
sa tu vipras tathā pṛṣṭo rājñā jānakinā vane proktavān akhilaṃ dharmaṃ mokṣāśramam anuttamam
samudbhūtāni manaso mahābhūtāni pārthiva
maharṣayaḥ sapta pūrve catvāro manavas tathā
karṇāv adhyātmakaṃ jñeyaṃ prāhuḥ sāṃkhyanidarśanāḥ
cittam adhyātmam ity āhur yoginaḥ sūkṣmadṛṣṭayaḥ adhibhūtaṃ caityam āhū rudras tatrādhidaivatam
avyaktarūpo bhagavāñ śatadhā ca sahasraśaḥ
sattvaṃ prapadyate sattvād avyaktād vyaktam eva ca
daivatāni ca me brūhi dehaṃ yāny āśritāni vai
kartṛtvāt prasavānāṃ ca tathā prabhavadharmitā
na caiva muñjasaṃyogād iṣīkā kartṛ budhyate
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi prāṇāyāmaṃ ca pārthiva
ekāgratā ca manasaḥ prāṇāyāmas tathaiva ca
vaiśaṃpāyananāmāsau mātulo me mahāmuniḥ mucyatāṃ yad adhītaṃ te matta ity eva so 'bravīt tenāmarṣeṇa tapto 'haṃ mātulasya mahātmanaḥ
upadhāritaṃ tathā vāpi purāṇaṃ romaharṣaṇāt
**** **** puruṣaṃ prakṛtiṃ tathā tathaiva puruṣavyāghra
sūryāṃ ca prakṛtiṃ vidyād asūryā niṣphalaḥ smṛtaḥ vidyeti puruṣaṃ vidyād avidyā prakṛtiḥ parā
avyakteneti tac cintyam anyathā mā vicintaya
satyaś ca te yathātmā ca tyaktaḥ syāt kim anena ca
kṣīṇavāsanayā buddhyā karma yat kriyate 'nagha tad dagdhabījavad bhūyo nāṅkuraṃ pravimuñcati
evaṃ hi jantuḥ saṃpūrṇo navame māsi maithila
tṛṇāgnijvalanaprakhyaṃ phenabudbudasaṃnibham
avyaktavyaktatattvānāṃ niścayaṃ buddhiniścayam vaktum arhasi kauravya devasyājasya yā kṛtiḥ
na hi pratīkṣate mṛtyuḥ kṛtaṃ vāsya na vā kṛtam
aham eko na me kaś cid ahaṃ vāpi na kasya cit taṃ na paśyāmi yasyāhaṃ taṃ na paśyāmi yo mama
tatas tasya mahādevo darśayām āsa sāmbikaḥ
śukaṃ prāveśayan mantrī pramadāvanam uttamam
prayayau yogam āsthāya tuṣṭo diśam athottarām
mokṣopāyān bahuvidhāñ śukasyādeṣṭum īpsitān
tulyajātivayorūpān hutān paśyasi mṛtyunā na ca nāmāsti nirvedo lauhaṃ hi hṛdayaṃ tava
mahābhūtāni khaṃ vāyur agnir āpas tathā mahī ṣaṣṭhas tu cetanā yā tu ātmā saptama ucyate aṣṭamaṃ tu mano jñeyaṃ buddhis tu navamī smṛtā
sūryasya tapataś cāhaṃ jagat sthāvarajaṅgamam
evam uktaḥ pitus tena snehayuktena cetasā naivecchām akarot tasya niḥsaṅgenāntarātmanā
kṛtāñjalipuṭāḥ sarve tuṣṭuvur hṛṣṭamānasāḥ
kam arcasi mahābhāga tan me brūhīha pṛcchataḥ
tasmād anujñāṃ mama dehi deva taṃ vai dṛṣṭvā kṛtakṛtyo bhavāmi
śaṃtanoḥ kathayām āsa nārado munisattamaḥ rājñā pṛṣṭaḥ purā prāha tatrāhaṃ śrutavān purā
vedaiś caturbhiḥ samitaṃ kṛtaṃ merau mahāgirau āsyaiḥ saptabhir udgīrṇaṃ lokadharmam anuttamam
bhūtabhavyabhaviṣyajñāḥ satyadharmaparāyaṇāḥ

uparicaravasur uvāca hutaṃ tvayāvadānīha puroḍāśasya yāvatī gṛhītā devadevena matpratyakṣaṃ na saṃśayaḥ ity evam ukto vasunā saroṣaś cābravīd guruḥ na yajeyam ahaṃ cātra paribhūtas tvayānagha tvayā paśur vāritaś ca kṛtaḥ piṣṭamayaḥ paśuḥ tvaṃ devaṃ paśyase nityaṃ na paśyeyam ahaṃ katham paśuhiṃsā vāritā ca yajurvedādimantrataḥ ahaṃ na vāraye hiṃsāṃ drakṣyāmy ekāntiko harim tasmāt kopo na kartavyo bhavatā guruṇā mayi vasum evaṃ bruvāṇaṃ tu kruddha eva bṛhaspatiḥ uvāca ṛtvijaś caiva kiṃ naḥ karmeti vārayan athaikato dvitaś caiva tritaś caiva maharṣayaḥ
śṛṇu tvaṃ vacanaṃ putra asmābhiḥ samudāhṛtam
ekatadvitatritaś cocus tataś citraśikhaṇḍinaḥ
snigdhagambhīrayā vācā praharṣaṇakarī vibho
sahasābhihatāḥ sarve tejasā tasya mohitāḥ
ākāśaṃ pūrayan sarvaṃ śikṣākṣarasamanvitaḥ
bhaktyā paramayā yuktair manovākkarmabhis tadā
sa rājā rājaśārdūla satyadharmaparāyaṇaḥ

iyaṃ vai karmabhūmir hi svargo bhogāya kalpitaḥ tasmād indro mahīṃ prāpya yajamānas tu dīkṣitaḥ savanīyapaśoḥ kāla āgate tu bṛhaspatiḥ piṣṭam ānīyatām atra paśvartha iti bhāṣata tac chrutvā devatāḥ sarvā idam ūcur dvijottamam bṛhaspatiṃ māṃsagṛdhnāḥ pṛthak pṛthag ariṃdama
yuṣmākam ajabuddhir hi ajo bījaṃ tad ucyate
viruddhaṃ vedaśāstrāṇāṃ na vaktavyaṃ hitārthinā
asmatpakṣanimittaṃ te vyasanaṃ prāptam īdṛśam
taṃ bhakto 'si mahātmānaṃ devadevaṃ sanātanam
gṛhītvā dakṣiṇāṃ sarve gatāḥ svān āśramān punaḥ vasuṃ vicintya śakraś ca praviveśāmarāvatīm vasur vivaragas tatra vyalīkasya phalād guroḥ
gṛhītvā taṃ vasuṃ bhaktaṃ sahasā vasudhātalāt

anindriyān anāhārān aniṣyandān sugandhinaḥ baddhāñjalipuṭān hṛṣṭāñ jitaṃ ta iti vādinaḥ mahopaniṣadaṃ mantram adhīyānān svarānvitam pañcopaniṣadair mantrair manasā dhyāyataḥ śucīn śāśvataṃ brahma paramaṃ gṛṇānān sūryavarcasaḥ pūjāparān balikṛtaḥ stuvataḥ parameṣṭhinam ekāgramanaso dāntān ekāntitvam upāśritān
udgiraṃś caturo vedāñ śe[? n saśe]ṣān vasudhādhipa
na vidur munayaś caiva yāthārthyaṃ munipuṃgava

sarvasthaḥ sarvago viśvaṃ guṇabhuṅ nirguṇo 'pi ca bhojyo 'haṃ bhojako bhoktā paktāhaṃ jaṭhare 'nalaḥ bhūtagrāmam imaṃ kṛtsnaṃ pṛthak karma pṛthaṅmukham prakṛtistho 'vatiṣṭhāmi na ca tiṣṭhāmi mūrtimān prāṇāpānapravāreṇa śarīraṃ prāpya dhiṣṭhitaḥ aham eva hi jaṃtūnāṃ nimeṣonmeṣakṛd dvija māṃ tu jānīhi viprarṣe puruṣaṃ sarvagaṃ prabhum
kālo hi paramaṃ bhūtaṃ manasy eṣa pralīyate
māṃ tu jānīhi brahmarṣe puruṣaṃ sarvagaṃ prabhum
pṛthagbhūtāś ca te nityaṃ kṣetrajñaḥ pṛthag eva ca sattvaṃ rajas tamaś caiva na guṇās tasya bhojakāḥ ete pañcasu bhūteṣu śarīrastheṣu kalpitāḥ
lalāṭāc caiva me rudro devaḥ krodhād viniḥsṛtaḥ
evaṃ rudrāya manave indrāyāmitatejase
avadhyaḥ sarvalokānāṃ sadevāsurarakṣasām

jaṭī gatvā yajñasadaḥ stūyamāno dvijottamaiḥ yajñastavaṃ kariṣyāmi śrutvā prīto bhaved baliḥ kim icchasi baṭo brūhīty ukto yāce mahad varam dīyatāṃ tripadīmātram iti yāce mahāsuram sa dadyān mayi saṃprītaḥ pratiṣiddhaś ca mantribhiḥ yāvaj jalaṃ hastagataṃ tribhir vikramaṇair vṛtam
**** **** dvāviṃśad yugaparyaye bhaviṣyāmi ṛṣis tatra jamadagnisuto balī bāhuvīryayuto rāmo
mahābalā mahāvīryāḥ śakratulyaparākramāḥ
tadrājye sthāpayiṣyāmi vibhīṣaṇam akalmaṣam ayodhyāvāsinaḥ sarvān neṣye 'haṃ lokam avyayam vibhīṣaṇāya dāsyāmi rājyaṃ tasya yathākramam
kalidvāparayoḥ saṃdhāv aṣṭāviṃśe caturyuge prādurbhāvaṃ kariṣyāmi bhūyo vṛṣṇikulodvahaḥ madhurāyāṃ kaṃsahetor vāsudeveti nāmataḥ tṛtīyo rāma ity eva vasudevasuto balī
kṛkalāsabhūtaṃ ca nṛgaṃ mocayiṣye ca vai punaḥ tataḥ pautranimittena gatvā vai śoṇitaṃ puram bāṇasya ca puraṃ gatvā kariṣye kadanaṃ mahat

kaṃsaṃ keśiṃ tathā krūram ariṣṭaṃ ca mahāsuram cāṇūraṃ ca mahāvīryaṃ muṣṭikaṃ ca mahābalam pralambaṃ dhenukaṃ caiva ariṣṭaṃ vṛṣarūpiṇam kālīyaṃ ca vaśe kṛtvā yamunāyā mahāhrade gokuleṣu tataḥ paścād gavārthe tu mahāgirim saptarātraṃ dhariṣyāmi varṣamāṇe tu vāsave apakrānte tato varṣe girimūrdhany avasthitaḥ indreṇa saha saṃvādaṃ kariṣyāmi tadā dvija
laghvācchidya dhanaṃ sarvaṃ vāsudevaṃ ca pauṇḍrakam
yudhiṣṭhiraṃ sthāpayiṣye svarājye bhrātṛbhiḥ saha
śastrair nipatitāḥ sarve nṛpā yāsyanti vai divam
rājyaṃ praśāsati punaḥ kuntīputre yudhiṣṭhire
vārāho nārasiṃhaś ca vāmano rāma eva ca rāmo dāśarathiś caiva sātvataḥ kalkir eva ca
puruṣaḥ sarvam evedam akṣayaś cāvyayaś ca ha
evaṃ paraṃparākhyātam idaṃ śaṃtanunā śrutam
nāradāc caiva devarṣeḥ purāṇam aham āptavān
ākhyānam uttamaṃ cedaṃ śrāvayed yaḥ sadā nṛpa sadaiva manujo bhaktaḥ śucir bhūtvā samāhitaḥ prāpnuyād acirād rājan viṣṇulokaṃ sanātanam
vāsudevaṃ mahātmānaṃ śrotavyaṃ vidhipūrvakam
pūjanīyo sadāvyagro munibhir vedapāragaiḥ

sūta uvāca etat te sarvam ākhyātaṃ vaiśaṃpāyanakīrtitam janamejayena yac chrutvā kṛtaṃ samyag yathāvidhi yūyaṃ hi taptatapasaḥ sarve ca caritavratāḥ sarve vedavido mukhyā naimiṣāraṇyavāsinaḥ śaunakasya mahāsatraṃ prāptāḥ sarve dvijottamāḥ yajadhvaṃ suhutair yajñair ātmānaṃ parameśvaram
sūta uvāca janamejayena yat pṛṣṭaḥ śiṣyo vyāsasya dhīmataḥ tat te 'haṃ kīrtayiṣyāmi paurāṇaṃ śaunakottama śrutvā māhātmyam etasya dehināṃ paramātmanaḥ janamejayo mahāprājño vaiśaṃpāyanam abravīt
kiṃ tu brahmātha rudro vā devatā ṛṣayas tathā prāyaḥ pravṛttimārgasthāḥ kasya devasya śāsanāt ke vai nivṛttimārgasthāḥ kasya devasya śāsanāt ke vai yajante sarve 'pi ka eṣām īśvaraḥ paraḥ
etān vai sumahābhāgān ṛṣīṃl lokapitāmahān
tripādahīno dharmaś ca yuge tasmin bhaviṣyati
tatra vadhyanti paśavo yūpeṣv atra nibadhyate
devā devarṣayaś cocus tam evaṃvādinaṃ gurum
guravo yatra pūjyante sādhuvṛttāḥ śamānvitāḥ vastavyaṃ tatra yuṣmābhir yatra dharmo na hīyate
sa ādiḥ sa ca madhyaṃ vai buddhaḥ sṛjati vai jagat
ity āha bhagavān vyāsaḥ parāśarasutaḥ prabhuḥ
yo 'sau rudraḥ so 'ham asmi yo 'ham asmi śivaḥ paraḥ yathā rudras tathāhaṃ ca nāvayor antaraṃ tathā
śrutir apy atra bhavati | indro dadhīco 'sthibhiḥ kṛtam (Ṛv. 1.84.13a) iti | svasthānaṃ dattvā tapasvy abhavat |3| indro dadhīco 'bhavat |4| tāvat pūrṇe sendrā devā āgaman kālo 'yaṃ dehanyāsāyeti |5|
takṣṇā yajñapaśoḥ śiras te dadāmīty uktvā
nahuṣasya śāpamokṣanimittaṃ devair ṛṣibhir yācyamāno 'gastyaḥ prāha | yāvat svakulajaḥ śrīmān dharmarājo yudhiṣṭhiraḥ kathayitvā svakān praśnān svaṃ bhīmaṃ ca vimokṣyate |
aditiḥ śaptā aditer udare bhaviṣyati vyathā
punar umā dakṣakopād dhimavato girer duhitā babhūva
nāmnāṃ niruktaṃ vakṣyāmi śṛṇuṣvaikāgramānasaḥ
adho na kṣīyate yasmād vadanty anye 'py adhokṣajam
nādimantaṃ na cāntaṃ ca kadā cid vidyate surāḥ
rudrasya bhāgaṃ pradadur bhāgam uccheṣaṇaṃ punaḥ śrutir apy atra bhavati vedair uktas tathā punaḥ uccheṣaṇabhāgo vai rudras tasyoccheṣaṇena hotavyam iti sarve gamyarūpeṇa tadā ||
yaḥ sa te kathitaḥ pūrvaṃ krodhajeti punaḥ punaḥ tasya prabhāvam evāgryaṃ yac chrutaṃ te dhanaṃjaya
dṛṣṭavān yo hariṃ devaṃ nārāyaṇam ajaṃ vibhum

sūta uvāca tasya tad vacanaṃ śrutvā kṛṣṇadvaipāyanas tadā śaśāsa śiṣyam āsīnaṃ vaiśaṃpāyanam antike tad asmai sarvam ācakṣva yan mattaḥ śrutavān asi guror vacanam ājñāya sa tu viprarṣabhas tadā ācacakṣe tataḥ sarvam itihāsaṃ purātanam
nāsti nārāyaṇasamaṃ na bhūtaṃ na bhaviṣyati etena satyavākyena sarvārthān sādhayāmy aham nāradena purā yā me gurave viniveditā ṛṣīṇāṃ pāṇḍavānāṃ ca śṛṇvatoḥ kṛṣṇabhīṣmayoḥ
svārthena vidhinā yuktaḥ sarvakṛcchravrate sthitaḥ
sarvaṃ sa te kathitavān devadevo mahāmune
pṛṣṭena śaunakādyeha naimiṣāraṇyavāsiṣu
kṛṣṇadvaipāyanaṃ vyāsam ṛṣiṃ vedanidhiṃ prabhum paripapraccha rājendraḥ pārīkṣita yudhiṣṭhiraḥ
ādikarmā sa bhūtānām aprameyo hariḥ prabhuḥ
vibuddhaḥ sumahātejā yodhayām āsa tāv ubhau
vaiśaṃpāyana uvāca evaṃ sa bhagavān vyāso gurur mama viśāṃ pate kathayām āsa dharmajño dharmarājñe dvijottamaḥ
adhiṣṭhānaṃ tathā kartā karaṇaṃ ca pṛthagvidham vividhā ca tathā ceṣṭā daivaṃ caivātra pañcamam
