tad eva kevalaṃ sthānaṃ muktānāṃ paramaṃ bhavet
vada sarvaṃ yathādṛṣṭaṃ pravṛttiṃ ca yathākramam
tathākaroc ca dharmātmā brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ
bhaviṣyati mahāsattva khyātiś cāpy atulā tava
tathaitām eva guruṇā yathākhyātaṃ gatārthataḥ
tasya brāhmaṇavaryasya atitheś cāpi bhārata
anugrahārtham asmākam āhāraṃ kartum arhasi anaśnati tvayi brahman gacchema narakaṃ vayam
tapodhyānaparo nityaṃ satyasaṃdho jitendriyaḥ
prārthitārthābhihantā te mā bhūt kaś cit kule 'nagha sāmarthye sati nāgendra narake sa hi majjati
tathā śakrapratispardhī roṣasya vaśam āgataḥ māndhātā nihato yuddhe lavaṇeneha rakṣasā
āścaryāṇām anekānāṃ pratiṣṭhā bhagavān raviḥ yato bhūtāḥ pravartante sarve trailokyasaṃmatāḥ
śakracāpāṅkitaghaṭaiḥ yaḥ sa vārighaṭodaraiḥ toyaṃ sṛjati varṣāsu kim āścaryam ataḥ param yasya maṇḍalamadhyastho mahātmā paramatviṣā dīptaḥ samīkṣate lokān kim āścaryam ataḥ param
devo mantramayo 'nādiḥ kālātmā tejasāṃ nidhiḥ jaganmayasya kṣetrajñaḥ kim āścaryataraṃ tataḥ
eṣa svena prabhāvena saṃprāpto nirmalāṃ gatim sukṛtenāsya yatnena spṛhayante bhavadvidhāḥ

vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ śaratalpe mahātmānaṃ śayānam aparājitam yudhiṣṭhira upāgamya praṇipatyedam abravīt śokenāpahataḥ sūto vihvalan bhṛśaduḥkhitaḥ cintayan vaiśasaṃ ghoraṃ sūtaputrasya pāṇḍavaiḥ kṛṣṇadvaipāyanaṃ vyāsaṃ viddhi nārāyaṇaṃ svayam ko 'nyo hi puṇḍarīkākṣān mahābhāratakṛd bhavet
idaṃ tu dhārtarāṣṭrasya śreyo manye janādhipa imām avasthāṃ saṃprāptaṃ yad asau tvāṃ na paśyati

duryodhano hi samare sahasainyaḥ sahānujaḥ nihataḥ kṣatradharme 'smin durātmā kulapāṃsanaḥ na sa paśyati duṣṭātmā tvām adya patitaṃ kṣitau ataḥ śreyo mṛtaṃ manye neha jīvitam ātmanaḥ ahaṃ hi samare vīra gamitaḥ śatrubhiḥ kṣayam abhaviṣyaṃ yadi purā saha bhrātṛbhir acyuta na tvām evaṃ suduḥkhārtam adrākṣaṃ sāyakārditam nūnaṃ hi pāpakarmāṇo dhātrā sṛṣṭāḥ sma he nṛpa anyasminn api loke hi yathā mucyema kilbiṣāt tathā praśādhi māṃ rājan mama ced icchasi priyam
yadi vāsmiṃs tu nihate pannage 'rjunaka tvayā jīved ayaṃ bālako me tan na me 'rjunaka priyam
nāsyāmṛtatvaṃ bhavitā vai hate 'smiñ jīvaty asmin ko vyasuḥ syād anante
kilbiṣaṃ manyase hi tvaṃ vadhyam evaṃ prabhāṣase
tadvidhas tadvaśe cāhaṃ kālasya vaśagaś ciram
rājā paramadhārmikaḥ sarvalokeṣu vikhyātaḥ
sudurjaya iti khyātaḥ sarvaśastrabhṛtāṃ varaḥ
ikṣvākos tu śataṃ putrā daśāśvo daśamaḥ smṛtaḥ māhiṣmatyām abhūd rājā madirāśvas tato 'bhavat tasya ca dyutimān nāma suvīras tasya cātmajaḥ durjayas tasya tasyāpi duryodhana iti smṛtaḥ
viṣaye vāsavas tasya samyag eva pravarṣati
vyādhito durgataś caiva puruṣaḥ pratyadṛśyata

na tu rājā pradānāya tasmai bhāvam akalpayat niyuktā pitṛsaṃdeśād ārirādhayiṣuḥ śikhim tasyā manoramaṃ rūpaṃ dṛṣṭvā devo hutāśanaḥ manmathena samāviṣṭaḥ patnītve yatate mithaḥ bhaja mām anavadyāṅgi kāmāt kamalalocane rambhoru mṛgaśāvākṣi pūrṇacandranibhānane tavedaṃ padmapatrākṣaṃ mukhaṃ dṛṣṭvā manoharam bhrūlatālalitaṃ kāntam anaṅgo bādhate hi mām lalāṭaṃ candralekhābhaṃ śiroruhavibhūṣitam dṛṣṭvā te patralekhāṅkam anaṅgo bādhate bhṛśam bālātapenākulitaṃ sasvedapulakodgamam bimbādharoṣṭhaṃ vadanaṃ vibuddham iva paṅkajam atīva cāruvibhrāntaṃ mudam āvahate mama dantaprākāraniyatā vāṇī tava surakṣitā tāmrapallavasaṃkāśā jihveyaṃ te manoharā samāḥ snigdhāḥ sujātāś ca sahitāś ca dvijās tava dvijapriye prasīdasva bhaja māṃ subhagā hy asi manojñaṃ sukṛtāpāṅgaṃ mukhaṃ tava manoharam stanau te saṃhatau bhīru hārābharaṇabhūṣitau pakvabilvapratīkāśau karkaśau saṃgamakṣamau gambhīranābhisubhage bhaja māṃ varavarṇini saivam uktā virahite pāvakena mahātmanā īṣad ākampihṛdayā vrīḍitā vākyam abravīt nanu nāma kulīnānāṃ kanyakānāṃ viśeṣataḥ mātā pitā prabhavataḥ pradāne bāndhavāś ca ye pāṇigrahaṇamantraiś ca hute caiva vibhāvasau satāṃ madhye niviṣṭāyāḥ kanyāyāḥ śaraṇaṃ patiḥ sāhaṃ nātmavaśā deva pitaraṃ varayasva me atha nāticirāt kālād rājā duryodhanaḥ kila yajñasaṃbhāranipuṇān mantrīn āhūya coktavān yajñaṃ yakṣye 'ham iti vai saṃbhārāḥ saṃbhriyantu me tataḥ samāhitas tasya yajño brāhmaṇasattamaiḥ
iti tasmai na vai kanyāṃ ditsāṃ cakre narādhipaḥ

atha dīkṣām upetasya yajñe tasya mahātmanaḥ āhito havanārthāya vedyām agniḥ praṇaśyata tataḥ sa bhīto nṛpatir bhṛśaṃ pravyathitendriyaḥ mantriṇo brāhmaṇāṃś caiva papraccha kim idaṃ bhavet yajñe samiddho bhagavān naṣṭo me havyavāhanaḥ saṃmantrakuśalais tais tu brāhmaṇair vedapāragaiḥ amānuṣo vikāro 'yam iti tair eva bodhitaḥ dharmavighnakaraṃ vīra naitat tvayy upapadyate stūyatāṃ bhagavān vahnir brāhmaṇair vedapāragaiḥ ṛtvigbhir mantrakuśalair gīyatāṃ vai hutāśanaḥ atha ṛksāmayajuṣāṃ pāragair vedapāragaiḥ vedatattvārthakuśalaiḥ stutaḥ stomapuraskṛtaiḥ guhyeṣu nāmadheyeṣu kīrtyamāneṣu pāvakaḥ
sudarśanas tu rūpeṇa pūrṇendusadṛśopamaḥ
hīnapratijñam atraikaṃ saṃprāptasya tu gacchati
sā ca vavre varaṃ tasmāt putraṃ brahmarṣisattamam
atha mātā sutā cāpi vyatyāsena carudvayam bhuktavatyau mahārāja tato garbham upeṣyataḥ dṛṣṭvā kadā cit svāṃ bhāryām ṛcīkas tv abravīd vacaḥ
svam apatyaṃ viśiṣṭaṃ hi sarva icchaty anāvilam
ete cānye ca bahavo mahātmāno jitendriyāḥ
atrāpy udāharantīmam itihāsaṃ purātanam vāsavasya ca saṃvādaṃ śukasya ca mahātmanaḥ
jānann api ca tatprāptiṃ pṛcchate pākaśāsanaḥ
anuraktasya bhaktasya saṃspṛśen na ca pāvakam
samastham upajīvan vai viṣamasthaṃ kathaṃ tyajet
punar jīvatv ayaṃ vṛkṣo yadi syān mayy anugrahaḥ

brahmā bījato hy aṅkurotpattir aṅkurāt parṇasaṃbhavaḥ parṇān nālāḥ prasūyante nālāt skandhaḥ prasūyate skandhān nivartate puṣpaṃ puṣpān nivartate phalam phalān nivartate bījaṃ bījāt syāt saṃbhavaḥ punaḥ
puruṣa iha mahātmā prāpnute nityayuktaḥ
hanta te kathayiṣyāmi yan māṃ pṛcchasi bhārata
tatparā ye dvijā loke tasya lokāḥ sanātanam
yathaiva te namaskāryāḥ proktāḥ śakreṇa mānada tathaiva mayi cācakṣva yeṣāṃ spṛhayase nṛpa
jñānavijñānayuktānāṃ teṣāṃ ca spṛhayāmy aham
bhadraṃ tu janma saṃprāpya bhūyo brāhmaṇako bhavet bandhumadhye kule jātaḥ sudurāpam avāpnuyāt
brāhmaṇānujñayā grāhyaṃ rājyaṃ ca sapurohitaiḥ tadrakṣaṇena svargo 'sya tatkopān narako 'kṣayaḥ
dūrato mātṛvat pūjyā vipradārāḥ surakṣayā
akopanāparādhena bhūyo narakam aśnute
dānadharmeṣu bho bhīṣma sadaiva niścayo hi me
saṃbhāṣamāṇau tu tataḥ sakhyaṃ tatra parasparam

bhīṣma uvāca sa cāpy āha brāhmaṇānāṃ phalāhāraḥ plavaṃgamaḥ tasmān na brāhmaṇasvaṃ tu hartavyaṃ viduṣā sadā sīmāvivāde moktavyaṃ dātavyaṃ ca pratiśrutam tenāhaṃ karmadoṣeṇa vānaratvam upāgataḥ evaṃ tau kathayitvā tu karmadoṣān parasparam sṛgālo vānaraś cāpi pratiyātau yathāgatam
na hartavyaṃ vipradhanaṃ kṣantavyaṃ teṣu nityaśaḥ bālāś ca nāvamantavyā daridrāḥ kṛpaṇā api
duruktaṃ vacanaṃ rājan yathānyāyaṃ yathāgatam
nādhyāpayec chūdram iha tathā naiva ca yājayet
śuśrūṣayā parāṃl lokān avāpsyasi na saṃśayaḥ
śucir bhūtvā namaskṛtya tasya pādyam athānayat
akrodhane devapare kṛtajñe jitendriye nityam udīrṇasattve
avandhyakāleṣu sadā snānaśaucarateṣu ca brahmacaryatapojñānagodvijātipriyeṣu ca
svadharmaśīleṣu ca dharmavitsu vṛddhopasevānirate ca dānte kṛtātmani kṣāntipare samarthe kṣāntāsu dāntāsu tathābalāsu satyasvabhāvārjavasaṃyutāsu vasāmi devadvijapūjitāsu
yasmin yajñe hūyati havyavāhe gobrāhmaṇābhyarcitadevatāsu
na caivāsyāntaraṃ rājan sa dadarśa mahātmanaḥ
hāvabhāvādilāvaṇyastrīguṇād vā kutūhalam
nāmagotrāṇi cābhāṣya dārāṇāṃ mantriṇāṃ tathā
deve nārāyaṇe bhaktiḥ śaṃkare sādhupūjayā dhyānenātha japaiḥ kāryā svadharmaiḥ śucitejasā
śubhāny evācaraṃl loke bhakto nārāyaṇasya hi tasyaiva tu padaṃ sūkṣmaṃ prasādād aśnuyāt param

vāsudevaṃ mahātmānam idaṃ vacanam abravīt deve nārāyaṇe bhaktaḥ śaṃkaraṃ sādhu pūjaya yo hi sarvagato devo na ca sarvatra dṛśyate brahmaviṣṇusureśānāṃ sraṣṭā yaḥ prabhur eva ca brahmādayaḥ piśācāntā yaṃ hi devā upāsate prakṛtīnāṃ paratvena puruṣasya ca yaḥ paraḥ cintyate yo yogavidbhir ṛṣibhis tattvadarśibhiḥ akṣaraṃ paramaṃ prāhur asac ca sadasac ca yaḥ prakṛtiṃ puruṣaṃ caiva kṣobhayitvā svatejasā brahmāṇam asṛjat tasmād devadevaḥ prajāpatiḥ ko hi śakto guṇān vaktuṃ devadevasya dhīmataḥ garbhajanmajarāyukto martyo mṛtyusamanvitaḥ ko hi śakto bhavaṃ jñātuṃ madvidhaḥ parameśvaram ṛte nārāyaṇāt putra śaṅkhacakragadādharāt eṣa vidvān yaduśreṣṭho viṣṇuḥ paramadurjayaḥ divyacakṣur mahātejā vīkṣyate yogacakṣuṣā rudrabhaktyā tu kṛṣṇena jagad vyāptaṃ mahātmanā taṃ prasādya tadā devaṃ badaryāṃ kila bhārata arthāt priyataratvaṃ ca sarvalokeṣu vai tadā prāptavān eva rājendra suvarṇākṣān maheśvarāt pūrṇaṃ varṣasahasraṃ tu taptavān eṣa mādhavaḥ prasādya varadaṃ devaṃ carācaraguruṃ śivam yuge yuge tu kṛṣṇena toṣito vai maheśvaraḥ bhaktyā paramayā rājan prītaś caiva mahātmanaḥ aiśvaryaṃ yādṛśaṃ tasya jagadyoner mahātmanaḥ tad ayaṃ dṛṣṭavān sākṣāt putrārthe harir acyutaḥ yasmāt parataraṃ caiva nānyaṃ paśyāmi bhārata vyākhyātuṃ devadevasya śakto nāmāny aśeṣataḥ eṣa śakto mahābāhur vaktuṃ bhagavato guṇān vibhūtiṃ caiva kārtsnyena satyāṃ māheśvarīṃ nṛpa evam uktvā tadā bhīṣmo vāsudevaṃ mahāyaśāḥ bhavamāhātmyasaṃyuktam idam āha pitāmahaḥ
athocatuḥ prītiyutau tadānīṃ tapaḥsamṛddhir bhavato 'stv avighnam

tataḥ kṛtasvastyayanas tayāhaṃ nivedya mātuś ca pituḥ samīpe tathābhyanujñāya gurūṃś ca sarvān mahābalaṃ tārkṣyam acintayaṃ vai so 'haṃ himavataḥ pārśvaṃ prāpya tārkṣyaṃ vyasarjayam sthitaḥ prahṛṣṭo bhavabhāvabhāvitaḥ
nityapuṣpaphalopetair vṛkṣair aviralair vṛtam supuṣpaiś ca latāgulmair nirbhayaiś ca mṛgair yutam viśālaiś cāgniśaraṇair yathāsthānāhitāgnibhiḥ
nānāvṛndair vedaṣaḍaṅgapāragair dharmābhirāmair munibhiḥ samāhitaiḥ
aśvatthaphalabhakṣāś ca tathā hy udakaśāyinaḥ cīracarmāmbaradharās tathā valkaladhāriṇaḥ
manuṣyatānuvṛttyā tvāṃ jñātvā tiṣṭhāma sarvagam

sadṛśaṃ bhavatety uktaṃ darśanena tathāstu tat jalāntaracaraṃ hatvā daityaṃ ca balagarvitam utpāditaṃ vṛṣāṅkena dīptajvalanasaṃnibham dattaṃ bhagavatā tubhyaṃ durdarśaṃ tejasādbhutam na śakyaṃ draṣṭum anyena varjayitvā pinākinam sudarśanaṃ bhavety evaṃ bhavenoktaṃ tadā tu tat sudarśanaṃ tadā tasya loke nāma pratiṣṭhitam taj jīrṇam abhavat tāta grahasyāṅgeṣu keśava grahasyātibalasyāṅge varadattasya dhīmataḥ na śastrāṇi vahanty aṅge cakravajraśatāny api
tatheti bhagavān āha tasya tad vacanaṃ vibhuḥ
yājñavalkya iti khyāta ṛṣiḥ paramadhārmikaḥ ārādhya sa mahādevaṃ prāptavāñ jñānam uttamam vedavyāsaś ca yogātmā parāśarasuto muniḥ so 'pi śaṃkaram ārādhya prāptavān atulaṃ yaśaḥ
atrer bhāryā sutaṃ dattaṃ somaṃ durvāsasaṃ prabhoḥ
tataḥ pānīyam abhavat prasanne tryambake bhuvi
vikarṇaś ca mahādevaṃ tathā bhaktasukhāvaham prasādya bhagavān siddhiṃ prāptavān madhusūdana

śākalyo granthakartā ca sāvarṇiś ca tathābhavat bāṇaḥ skandasamatvaṃ ca kāmo darpavimokṣaṇam lavaṇo 'vadhyatām anyair daśāsyaś ca punar balam antako 'ntam anuprāptas tasmāt ko 'nyo 'paraḥ prabhuḥ tasya prīto mahādevo jagau devagurur guruḥ tejasā tapasā kīrtyā tvatsamo na bhaviṣyati gītenaiva ca divyena nityaṃ mām anuyāsyasi
mahādevo mayā prabhuḥ yatnena mahatā cāpi
tadāprabhṛti caivāham arudaṃ madhusūdana dīyatāṃ dīyatāṃ kṣīraṃ mama mātar itīritam
pitrāhaṃ yajñakāle hi nīto jñātikulaṃ mahat tatra sā kṣarate devī divyā gauḥ suranandinī tasyāhaṃ tat payaḥ pītvā rasena hy amṛtopamam jñātvā kṣīraguṇāṃś caiva upalabhya hi saṃbhavam
abhāvāc caiva dugdhasya duḥkhitā jananī tadā

āsthitānāṃ nadīṃ divyāṃ vālakhilyair niṣevitām kutaḥ kṣīraṃ vanasthānāṃ munīnāṃ girivāsinām pāvanānāṃ vanāśānāṃ vanāśramanivāsinām grāmyāhāranivṛttānām āraṇyaphalabhojinām nāsti putra payo 'raṇye surabhīgotravarjite nadīgahvaraśaileṣu tīrtheṣu vividheṣu ca tapasā japyanityānāṃ śivo naḥ paramā gatiḥ

sarvakāraṇabhūto 'yaṃ dhātā rudras trilocanaḥ aṣṭabāhur jaṭī nāgabhūṣaṇaś candraśekharaḥ nāgopavītī sagaṇo nīlakaṇṭha umāpatiḥ sudaṃṣṭraḥ susmito nāgakuṇḍalo bhasmabhāsitaḥ sarvakāmaprado bhaktyā pūjitaḥ puṣpamūlakaiḥ
bhaktyā pratyakṣatāṃ nītaḥ sarvakāmaprado haraḥ
ekabhakta iti jñātvā jijñāsāṃ kurute tadā
ahaṃ tam abruvaṃ tāta devendraṃ madhusūdana
satyaṃ kauśika saṃsārān mā mamāstu vinirvṛtiḥ adya maheśvarabaddhā kathā mamānyā priyā śrotum

janma śvapākamadhye 'pi me 'stu haracaraṇavandanaratasya mā vānīśvarabhakto bhavāmi bhavane 'pi śakrasya vāyvambubhujo 'pi sato narasya duḥkhakṣayaḥ kutas tasya bhavati hi surāsuragurau yasya na viśveśvare bhaktiḥ alam anyābhis teṣāṃ kathābhir atyarthadharmayuktābhiḥ yeṣāṃ na kṣaṇam api rucito haracaraṇasmaraṇavicchedaḥ haracaraṇaniratamatinā bhavitavyam anārjavaṃ yugaṃ prāpya saṃsārabhayaṃ na bhavati harabhaktirasāyanaṃ pītvā divasaṃ divasārdhaṃ vā muhūrtaṃ vā kṣaṇaṃ lavam na hy alabdhaprasādasya bhaktir bhavati śaṃkare

śvāpi maheśvaravacanād bhavāmi sa hi naḥ paraḥ kāmaḥ tridaśagaṇarājyam api khalu necchāmy amaheśvarājñaptam na nākapṛṣṭhaṃ na ca devarājyaṃ na brahmalokaṃ na ca niṣkalatvam na sarvakāmān akhilān vṛṇomi harasya dāsatvam ahaṃ vṛṇomi
dhik teṣāṃ dhik teṣāṃ punar api dhig astu dhik teṣām yeṣāṃ na vasati hṛdaye kupathagativimokṣako rudraḥ

na padmāṅkā na cakrāṅkā na vajrāṅkā yataḥ prajāḥ liṅgāṅkā ca bhagāṅkā ca tasmān māheśvarī prajā devyāḥ kāraṇarūpabhāvajanitāḥ sarvā bhagāṅkāḥ striyo liṅgenāpi harasya sarvapuruṣāḥ pratyakṣacihnīkṛtāḥ yo 'nyat kāraṇam īśvarāt pravadate devyā ca yan nāṅkitaṃ trailokye sacarācare sa tu pumān bāhyo bhaved durmatiḥ puṃliṅgaṃ sarvam īśānaṃ strīliṅgaṃ viddhi cāpy umām dvābhyāṃ tanubhyāṃ vyāptaṃ hi carācaram idaṃ jagat
vajrasāramayaiḥ śṛṅgair niṣṭaptakanakaprabhaiḥ tīkṣṇair amṛduraktāgrair utkirantam ivāvanim
kirīṭaṃ ca jaṭābhāraḥ sarpādyābharaṇāni ca vajrādiśūlamātaṅgagambhīrasmitam āgatam
praśāntamanasaṃ devaṃ trinetram aparājitam
sarvavidyādhipaṃ devaṃ śaraccandrasamaprabham nayanāhlādasaumyo 'ham apaśyaṃ parameśvaram
rāmaniḥkṣatriyakaraḥ paraśuḥ śaṃkarājñayā śaṅkhaśūlāsibhiś caiva paṭṭasai rūpavān sthitaḥ yena ca tripuraṃ dagdhaṃ sarvadevamayaḥ śaraḥ śūlaṃ ca yauvanopetaṃ lavaṇasya kare sthitam
śūlaṃ ca yauvanāśvaghnaṃ lavaṇasya kare sthitam evaṃ dṛṣṭvā mahādevaṃ jānubhyām avanīṃ gataḥ
paramaṃ tīkṣṇasāreṇa śastraṃ tasyāpi yat purā
sarvabhūtagaṇāś caiva mātaro vividhāḥ sthitāḥ
jaganmūrtiṃ mahāliṅgaṃ tanmadhye sphītarūpiṇam
ayutāni ca candrārkān apaśyaṃ divi keśava
.... .... saphalaṃ janma cādya me surāsuragurur devo yat tiṣṭhati mamāgrataḥ
yugānte sarvabhūtāni grasann iva vyavasthitaḥ
abravaṃ tam ahaṃ bhūyaḥ praṇamya śirasā bhavam
taṃ tvāṃ praṇamya śirasā prasādya prārthaye prabho
ṛṣīṇām abhigamyaś ca matprasādād bhaviṣyasi
tatra tatraiva sāṃnidhyaṃ kariṣyati na saṃśayaḥ
akṣayā bāndhavāś caiva kulaṃ gotraṃ ca te sadā bhaviṣyati dvijaśreṣṭha mayi bhaktiś ca śāśvatī
smṛtas tvayā punar vipra kariṣyāmi ca darśanam
paśya vṛkṣalatāgulmān sarvapuṣpaphalapradān

vāsudeva uvāca etac chrutvā vacas tasya pratyakṣam iva darśanam vismayaṃ paramaṃ gatvā abruvaṃ taṃ mahāmunim dhanyas tvam asi viprendra kas tvad anyo 'sti puṇyakṛt yasya devātidevas te sāṃnidhyaṃ kurute ''śrame api tāvan mamāpy evaṃ dadyāt sa bhagavāñ śivaḥ darśanaṃ muniśārdūla prasādaṃ cāpi śaṃkaraḥ

drakṣyase puṇḍarīkākṣa mahādevaṃ na saṃśayaḥ acireṇaiva kālena yathā dṛṣṭo mayānagha cakṣuṣā caiva divyena paśyāmy amitavikrama ṣaṣṭhe māsi mahādevaṃ drakṣyase puruṣottama ṣoḍaśāṣṭau varāṃś cāpi prāpsyasi tvaṃ maheśvarāt sapatnīkād yaduśreṣṭha satyam etad bravīmi te atītānāgataṃ caiva vartamānaṃ ca nityaśaḥ viditaṃ me mahābāho prasādāt tasya dhīmataḥ
evaṃ kathayatas tasya mahādevāśritāṃ kathām dināny aṣṭau tato jagmur muhūrtam iva bhārata
maheśvaraṃ nandivināyakādyaiḥ
ekādaśā gatāś caiva rudrāś cainaṃ sukhāvaham
vṛkṣauṣadhyaś ca rājendra dhātavo vividhās tathā
tvayā hy ārādhitaś cāhaṃ śataśo 'tha sahasraśaḥ tvatsamo nāsti me kaś cit triṣu lokeṣu vai priyaḥ

yogeśvarāḥ subahavo maheśaṃ bahudhāstuvan mahābhūtāni cchandāṃsi prajānāṃ patayo makhāḥ saritaḥ sāgarā nāgā gandharvāpsarasas tathā vidyādharāś ca gītena vādyanṛttādinārcayan tejasvināṃ madhyagataṃ tejorāśiṃ jagatpatim īkṣituṃ ca mahādevaṃ na me śaktir abhūt tadā tato devena paśyeti vadasvety abhibhāṣitam dṛṣṭvā devaṃ tathā devīm astuvaṃ saṃstutaṃ suraiḥ
tvayā sṛṣṭam idaṃ kṛtsnaṃ trailokyaṃ sacarācaram
tattvavid brāhmaṇo vidvān aprameyagatis tathā
mūrdhnā praṇamya tu bhavaṃ devam īśānam avyayam
bhavantu nityam atithīnāṃ bahūni gṛhe ca tubhyaṃ prītimatāṃ śatāni

iti taṇḍis tapoyogāt paramātmānam avyayam cintayitvā mahātmānam idam āha suvismitaḥ yaṃ paṭhanti sadā sāṃkhyāś cintayanti ca yoginaḥ paraṃ pradhānaṃ puruṣam adhiṣṭhātāram īśvaram utpattau ca vināśe ca kāraṇaṃ yaṃ vidur budhāḥ devāsuramunīnāṃ ca paraṃ yasmān na vidyate ajaṃ tam aham īśānam anādinidhanaṃ prabhum atyantasukhinaṃ devam anaghaṃ śaraṇaṃ vraje evaṃ bruvann eva tadā dadarśa tapasāṃ nidhim tam avyayam anaupamyam acintyaṃ śāśvataṃ dhruvam niṣkalaṃ sakalaṃ brahma nirguṇaṃ guṇagocaram yogināṃ paramānandam akṣaraṃ mokṣasaṃjñitam manorindrāgnimarutāṃ viśvasya brahmaṇo gatim agrāhyam acalaṃ śuddhaṃ buddhigrāhyaṃ manomayam durvijñeyam asaṃkhyeyaṃ duṣprāpam akṛtātmabhiḥ yoniṃ viśvasya jagatas tamasaḥ parataḥ param paraṃ purāṇaṃ puruṣaṃ parebhyaḥ parataḥ param yaḥ prāṇavantam ātmānaṃ jyotir jīvasthitaṃ manaḥ taṃ devaṃ darśanākāṅkṣī bahūn varṣagaṇān ṛṣiḥ tapasy ugre sthito bhūtvā dṛṣṭvā tuṣṭāva ceśvaram
oṃkāraratham āruhya te viśanti maheśvaram
ṛtaṃ satyaṃ paraṃ brahma stuvanty ātharvaṇā dvijāḥ
upamanyur uvāca evaṃ stuto mahādevas taṇḍinā brahmavādinā uvāca bhagavān deva umayā sahitaḥ prabhuḥ

mahāroṣo mahārūpo makhas tribhuvaneśvaraḥ satyaḥ satyāśrayaḥ siddhaś caṇḍāṃśuḥ sarpakuṇḍalaḥ vṛṣaś ca vṛṣarūpaś ca vṛṣastho vṛṣabhākṣagaḥ bhīmaś ca śitikaṇṭhaś ca śivaḥ śvetaḥ śivottamaḥ niṣaṅgī śitikeśaś ca ditipo nīlalohitaḥ śarabhaḥ śaṅkukarṇaś ca vilāso viśvakartṛkaḥ paraḥ pāśupato bhadro nīlagrīvo vibhīṣaṇaḥ gaṅgādharaḥ pṛthuś caiva janeśvarakuleśvaraḥ uttamastrīsahāyaś ca madhuvindo mahāgrahaḥ divyaḥ sūkṣmaḥ parāgaś ca vīrabhadro vibhinnagaḥ śivaḥ śaṃbhur bhuvo bhartā śrīkaṇṭhas tridaśārcitaḥ kravyādaḥ kīrtimān krīḍī kālāgniḥ kāryakāraṇaḥ aṇḍaś ca bahiraṇḍaś ca virāḍbhūto viśeṣakṛt hiraṇyagarbhahetuś ca bahirbhūtaḥ prayojakaḥ jāgratsvapnasuṣuptiś ca turīyaś ca vidhūtanaḥ manobuddhir ahaṃkāro vyaktāntaḥkaraṇātmakaḥ viśado vikramaś caiva viśvo viśvasya saṃgrahaḥ arūpaś caṇḍarūpaś ca vajrahastaḥ puraṃdaraḥ jātavedāś ca jāgartir viśvāvāso vināyakaḥ ājānur vainateyaś ca viśvakarmā vicakṣaṇaḥ hiraṇyākṣaḥ sukeśaś ca ṛkṣaḥ kakṣataras tamaḥ vṛṣo vṛṣāḍhyo vṛṣado vṛṣaparvā prajāharaḥ
sakārmuko mahābāhur mahāghoro mahātapāḥ
gambhīraghoṣo yogātmā yajñahā kāmanāśanaḥ
sutīkṣṇadaśanaś caiva mahākāyo mahānanaḥ viṣvakseno harir yajñaḥ saṃyugāpīḍavāhanaḥ
vīṇī ca paṇavī tālī nālī kaṭikaṭus tathā
praskando 'py avibhāvaś ca tulyo yajñavibhāgavit
sarvakāmavaraś caiva sarvadā sarvatomukhaḥ
bhikṣuś ca bhikṣurūpaś ca raudrarūpo 'ṅgirāḥ khagaḥ
vasuraśmiḥ suvarcasvī vasuvego mahābalaḥ manovego niśācāraḥ sarvalokasukhapradaḥ
samīro damanākāro hy artho hy arthakaro vaśaḥ vāsudevaś ca devaś ca vāmadevaś ca vāmanaḥ
nimittastho nimittaṃ ca nandir nandikaro hariḥ
nityo hy anīśaḥ śuddhātmā śuddho māno gatir haviḥ
mahākaṭir mahāgrīvo mahābāhur mahākaraḥ
lambamāno lambitoṣṭhaś caladgāmī yaśonidhiḥ
māyāvī sarvakāmakṛt mahādayāḷur mantavyo
prāṇeśo bandhakī vṛkṣo nakulaś cādrikas tathā hrasvagrīvo mahājānur alolaś ca mahauṣadhiḥ
bhūtālayo bhūtapatir ahorātro malo 'malaḥ vasubhṛt sarvabhūtātmā niścalaḥ suvidur budhaḥ asuhṛt sarvabhūtānāṃ niścalaś calavid budhaḥ
girāvāso visargaś ca sarvalakṣaṇalakṣavit
namaḥ śivāyeti sadā pradānaṃ bhagavān iti bhaktyā stuto mayā yat tad vidus tattvaṃ surarṣabhāḥ japata bahubhir īritaṃ viśeṣyaṃ śivapadamantravighaṭṭanena tīvram
bhaktyā hy ananyam īśānaṃ paraṃ devaṃ sanātanam karmaṇā manasā vācā bhāvenāmitatejasaḥ svapanto jāgramāṇāś ca vrajann upaviśaṃs tathā unmiṣan nimiṣaṃś caiva cintayantaḥ punaḥ punaḥ
śṛṇvantaḥ śrāvayantaś ca kathayantaś ca te bhavam

gīyate ca sa budhyeta brahmā śaṃkarasaṃnidhau idaṃ puṇyaṃ pavitraṃ ca sarvadā pāpanāśanam yogadaṃ mokṣadaṃ caiva svargadaṃ toṣadaṃ tathā evam etat paṭhante ya ekabhaktyā tu śaṃkare yā gatiḥ sāṃkhyayogānāṃ vrajanty etāṃ gatiṃ tadā stavam etaṃ prayatnena sadā rudrasya saṃnidhau abdam ekaṃ cared bhaktaḥ prāpnuyād īpsitaṃ phalam etad rahasyaṃ paramaṃ brahmaṇo hṛdi saṃsthitam
kapilaś ca tataḥ prāha sāṃkhyarṣir devasaṃmataḥ mayā janmāny anekāni śaktyā cārādhito bhavaḥ prītaś ca bhagavāñ jñānaṃ dadau mama bhavāntakam
viśvāmitras tadovāca kṣatriyo 'haṃ purābhavam brāhmaṇo 'haṃ bhavānīti mayā cārādhito bhavaḥ tatprasādān mayā prāptaṃ brāhmaṇyaṃ durlabhaṃ mahat

jaigīṣavyas tathā prāha jagaddhātā maheśvaraḥ suvarṇākṣo mahādevas tapasā toṣito mayā tato 'tha bhagavān āha prīto māṃ vai yudhiṣṭhira annāt priyataraḥ kṛṣṇa matprasādād bhaviṣyasi aparājitaś ca yuddheṣu tejaś caivānalopamam evaṃ sahasraśaś cātmā mahādevo varaṃ dadau maṇimanthe 'tha śaile vai purā saṃrādhito mayā varṣāyutasahasrāṇāṃ sahasraśatam eva ca tato māṃ bhagavān prīta idaṃ vacanam abravīt varaṃ vṛṇīṣva bhadraṃ te yas te manasi vartate tataḥ praṇamya śirasā idaṃ vacanam abruvam yadi prīto mahādevo bhaktyā paramayā prabhuḥ nityakālaṃ taveśāna bhaktir bhavatu me sthirā evam astv iti bhagavāṃs tatroktvāntaradhīyata
parāśaraś cāha muniḥ purā mama ca toṣitaḥ
tad abhijñāya mām āha śaṃkaras tripurārdanaḥ pitṛkanyā vasoḥ putrī śāpād dāśagṛhoditā tasyāṃ viṣṇukṛtā nāma vidyayā śodhakaḥ satām
māṇḍavyaś cāha deveśa bhakto lokahite bhave

vāsudeva uvāca upamanyur mayi prāha tapann iva divākaraḥ aśubhaiḥ pāpakarmāṇo ye narāḥ kaluṣīkṛtāḥ īśānaṃ na prapadyante tamorājasavṛttayaḥ īśvaraṃ saṃprapadyante dvijā bhāvitabhāvanāḥ sarvathā vartamāno 'pi yo bhaktaḥ parameśvare sadṛśo 'raṇyavāsīnāṃ munīnāṃ bhāvitātmanām brahmatvaṃ keśavatvaṃ vā śakratvaṃ vā suraiḥ saha trailokyasyādhipatyaṃ vā tuṣṭo rudraḥ prayacchati manasāpi śivaṃ tāta ye prapadyanti mānavāḥ vidhūya sarvapāpāni devaiḥ saha vasanti te bhittvā chittvā ca kūlāni hatvā sarvam idaṃ jagat yajed devaṃ virūpākṣaṃ na sa pāpena lipyate sarvalakṣaṇahīno 'pi yukto vā sarvapātakaiḥ sarvaṃ tudati tat pāpaṃ bhāvayañ chivam ātmanā kīṭapakṣipataṃgānāṃ tiraścām api keśava mahādevaprapannānāṃ na bhayaṃ vidyate kva cit evam eva mahādevaṃ bhaktā ye mānavā bhuvi na te saṃsāravaśagā iti me niścitā matiḥ tataḥ kṛṣṇo 'bravīd vākyaṃ dharmaputraṃ yudhiṣṭhiram
ananyastrījanaḥ prājño hy apravāsī priyaṃvadaḥ surūpaḥ saṃmato vīraḥ śīlavān bhogabhuk śuciḥ dārānumatayajñaś ca sunakṣatrām athodvahet sabhṛtyaḥ svajanopeta iha pretya ca modate
kailāse śaṃkarāvāsam abhivīkṣya praṇamya ca gaurīśaṃ śaṃkaraṃ dāntaṃ śaraṇāgatavatsalam gaṅgādharaṃ gopatigaṃ gaṇāvṛtam akalmaṣam
tayā saṃpūjitas tatra śayane cātinirmale
śuddhakṣetre brahmahatyā prāyaścittam athocyate punaś ca pātakaṃ dṛṣṭaṃ viprakṣetre viśeṣataḥ
prāyaścittaṃ mahad ato dāragrahaṇapūrvakam bījaṃ na śudhyate voḍhur asya cākṛtaniṣkṛteḥ mātṛtaḥ pitṛtaḥ śuddho jñeyaḥ putro yathārthataḥ
saṃdhyopāsanam ity āho sarvapāpaharaṃ name
pṛthak caiva tathā suptau sā strī sa ca munis tadā athārdharātre sā strī tu śayanaṃ tad upāgamat
tvayy āveśitacittā ca svatantrāsmi bhajasva mām
anyat karma na cānyasya svātantryaṃ tan na yujyate
na vṛddhām akṣamāṃ manye na cecchā tvayi me 'naghe
aṣṭāvakro 'tha sa muniś cintayām āsa vismitaḥ
aviśvasan na vyasanī nātisakto 'pravāsakaḥ vidvān suśīlaḥ puruṣaḥ sadāraḥ sukham aśnute
nikṛtiḥ strī bhogaparā priyavādāpravāsanāt rakṣyate ca kucelādyair aprasaṅgānuvartanaiḥ aparvāsv aniṣiddhāsu rātriṣv apy anṛtau vrajet rātrau ca nātiniyamo na vai hy aniyamo bhavet
bhīṣmaḥ brāhmaṇāḥ pātrabhūtāś ca śuddhā naivaṃ pitṛṣv iha
aśvamedhasahasrād dhi satyam eva viśiṣyate
tṛpte tṛptāḥ sarvadevāḥ pitaro munayo 'pi ca
mātā pātraṃ pitā pātraṃ pātraṃ kṣīṇāś ca bāndhavāḥ dīnaḥ pātraṃ vratī pātraṃ pātraṃ vṛttair alaṃkṛtam

muhūrtānāṃ trayaṃ pūrvam ahnaḥ prātar iti smṛtam japadhyānādibhis tasmin vipraiḥ kāryaṃ śubhavratam saṃgavākhyaṃ tribhāgaṃ tu madhyāhnas trimuhūrtakaḥ laukikaṃ saṃgave 'rdhaṃ ca snānādi hy atha madhyame caturtham aparāhṇaṃ tu trimuhūrtaṃ tu pitryakam sāyāhnas trimuhūrtaṃ ca madhyamaṃ kavibhiḥ smṛtam caturthe tv aparāhṇākhye śrāddhaṃ kuryāt sadā nṛpa prāgudīcīmukhā viprā viśvedevāś ca dakṣiṇāḥ śrāviteṣu sutṛpteṣu piṇḍaṃ dadyāt sadakṣiṇam

gohiṃsāyāṃ caturbhāgaṃ pūrvaṃ viprādiketanaḥ varṇāvareṣu bhuñjānaṃ kramāc chūdre caturguṇam nānyatra brāhmaṇo brūyāt pūrvaṃ vipreṇa ketitaḥ abhojane ca doṣaḥ syād varjayec chūdraketanam śūdrānnarasapuṣṭāṅgo dvijo nordhvāṃ gatiṃ labhet aśucir naiva cāśnīyān nāstiko mānavarjitaḥ na pūrvaṃ laṅghayel lobhād ekavarṇo 'pi pārthiva viprāḥ smṛtā bhūmidevā upakurvāṇavarjitāḥ
pālāśo dvijadaṇḍaḥ syād aśvatthaḥ kṣatriyasya tu audumbaraś ca vaiśyasya dharma eṣa yudhiṣṭhira

vratānāṃ pāraṇārthāya gurvarthe yajñadakṣiṇām niveśārthaṃ ca vidvāṃsas teṣāṃ dattaṃ mahāphalam pitroś ca rakṣaṇārthāya putradārārtham eva ca mahāvyādhivimokṣārthaṃ teṣu dattaṃ mahāphalam bālāḥ striyaś ca vāñchanti subhaktaṃ cāpy asādhanāḥ svargam āyānti dattvaiṣāṃ nirayān nopayānti te
viṣamavyavahārāś ca viṣamāś caiva vṛddhiṣu lābheṣu viṣamāś caiva te vai nirayagāminaḥ dyūtasaṃvyavahārāś ca niṣparīkṣāś ca mānavāḥ prāṇihiṃsāpravṛttāś ca te vai nirayagāminaḥ
saṃśrutya cāpradātāro daridrāṇāṃ vinindakāḥ śrotriyāṇāṃ vinītānāṃ daridrāṇāṃ vinindakāḥ kṣamiṇāṃ nindakāś caiva te vai nirayagāminaḥ
bhakṣyapānānnadātāras tathā pādukadā narāḥ ye vai svaśaktitaḥ kuryus te vai nirayaśatravaḥ
gaṅgāditīrthaniratāḥ pitṛtīrthakarāś ca ye iṣṭāpūrtaratā ye ca te narāḥ svargagāminaḥ
jātito brāhmaṇānāṃ hi mahāparibhavāt tathā tadvṛtticchedanaṃ caiva taddāraparibhāvanāt
brāhmaṇena ca tat kuryāt taṃ vidyād brahmaghātakam sādhvācāreṣu vipreṣu sāsūyo nikṛtiḥ śaṭhaḥ
sindhum āsādya vimalāṃ vigāhya svargam āpnuyāt
na kva cid bhayam āpnoti sarvatra labhate śubham
tṛtīyaṃ parvataṃ krauñcaṃ śudhyate brahmahatyayā
agnikanyāpure vaset karavīrapure snātvā
divaṃ vrajen mahābāho sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate
kālodakaṃ nandikuṇḍaṃ tathaivottaramānasam abhyetya yojanaśatād bhrūṇahā vipramucyate nandīśvarasya mūrtiṃ tu dṛṣṭvā mucyeta kilbiṣaiḥ svargamārge naraḥ snātvā svargalokaṃ sa gacchati
darśanād gamanāt pūto bhaved anaśanād api
uvāsa rajanīṃ tatra susukhaṃ sukhabhāg ṛṣiḥ śilavṛttis tu yat kṛtyaṃ prātas tat kṛtavāñ śuciḥ

siddha uvāca puṣkaraṃ ca prabhāsaṃ ca naimiṣaṃ himavān giriḥ gaṅgā ca yamunā caiva vedikā mathurā gayā sarasvatyāruṇā caiva kurukṣetraṃ pṛthūdakam eteṣāṃ katamasyāhaṃ māhātmyaṃ kathayāmi te bālyāt prabhṛti viprendra bhaktiḥ kautukam eva ca māhātmyaṃ prati viprendra gaṅgāyā mama tattvataḥ
tyaktāni yāni vai yeṣāṃ tyāgāt svargo vidhīyate
ye vā yathāvidhi snātā gaṅgāyāṃ sāghamarṣaṇāḥ
yuktāś ca pātakais tyaktvā dehaṃ śuddhā bhavanti te mucyante dehasaṃtyāgād gaṅgāyamunasaṃgame
anye ca devā munayaḥ pretāni pitṛbhiḥ saha tarpitās tṛptim āyānti triṣu lokeṣu sarvaśaḥ
saṃvatsaraṃ jale vāsaṃ gaṅgāyāṃ tatsamaṃ matam

gaṅgā gaṅgeti yo brūyād yojanānāṃ śatair api mucyate sarvapāpebhyo viṣṇulokaṃ sa gacchati prāyaścittāni dīyante yatra gaṅgā na vidyate gaṅgā ca vidyate yatra prāyaścittaṃ kathaṃ bhavet darśanāj jāyate śuddhiḥ snānena paramā gatiḥ dhanyā gaṅgā kanakhale kurukṣetre sarasvatī grāme vā yadi vāraṇye puṇyā sarvatra narmadā
gaṅgām upāśritā ye vai śivās te 'pi bhavanty api
upajīvyā yathā dhenur lokānāṃ brāhmam eva vā haviṣāṃ ca yathā somas taraṇeṣu tathākṣayam
tathā spṛśan so 'sya pāpaṃ sarvam eva prakarṣati
utpādayati gaṅgā vai prītiṃ nityasukhapradām
tattīragānāṃ tapasā śrāddhapārāyaṇādibhiḥ gaṅgādvāraprabhṛtibhis tattīrthair na paraṃ nṛṇām sāyaṃ prātaḥ smared gaṅgāṃ nityaṃ snāne tu kīrtayet tarpaṇe pitṛpūjāsu maraṇe cāpi saṃsmaret
durmṛtān anapatyāṃś ca sā mṛtān anayad divam
nārāyaṇād akṣayāt pūrvajātā viṣṇoḥ padāc chiṃśumārād dhruvāc ca somāt sūryān merurūpāc ca viṣṇoḥ samāgatā śivamūrdhno himādrim
viṣṇoḥ pādakṣāḷinī jahnukanyā yā śaṃkareṇa bhuvanatrayaśaṃkareṇa
sarveṣāṃ caiva jātānāṃ satām etan na saṃśayaḥ
tvarayā taṃ kharair yuktam āsthāya ratham āvrajat
vinaśiṣyasi durbuddhe tad upārama māciram
brāhmaṇyaṃ durlabhaṃ tāta prārthayāno na lapsyase
na hi śakyaṃ tvayā prāptuṃ brāhmaṇyam iha durmate
sarvastrīṣu pravṛttāś ca ye ca vedabahiṣkṛtāḥ kāṇḍapṛṣṭhās tu te jñeyāḥ sarvakarmabahiṣkṛtāḥ

evam ukto mataṅgas tu saṃśitātmā yatavrataḥ sahasram ekapādena tato 'bdānām atiṣṭhata taṃ sahasrāvare kāle śakro draṣṭum upāgamat tad eva ca punar vākyam uvāca balavṛtrahā idaṃ varṣasahasraṃ vai brahmacārī samāhitaḥ atiṣṭham ekapādena brāhmaṇyaṃ nāpnuyāṃ katham caṇḍālayonau jātena nāvāpyaṃ vai kathaṃ cana anyaṃ kāmaṃ vṛṇīṣva tvaṃ mā vṛthā te 'stv ayaṃ śramaḥ
viruddham iha dṛśyate brāhmaṇyaṃ durlabhataraṃ
tad utsṛjyeha duṣprāpaṃ brāhmaṇyam akṛtātmabhiḥ anyaṃ varaṃ vṛṇīṣva tvaṃ durlabho 'yaṃ hi te varaḥ

evaṃ varaṃ vṛṇe deva sa me sidhyatu vāsava etām avasthāṃ saṃprāpto dharmajñaḥ san puraṃdara nūnaṃ daivaṃ na śakyaṃ hi pauruṣeṇātivartitum yad ahaṃ yatnavān evaṃ na labhe vipratāṃ vibho evaṃ gate tu dharmajña dātum arhasi me varam bhīṣma uvāca vṛṇīṣveti tadā prāha tatas taṃ balavṛtrahā coditas tu mahendreṇa mataṅgaḥ prābravīd idam
kīrtiś ca te 'tulā vatsa triṣu lokeṣu yāsyati striyaś ca sarvās tvā loke yakṣyante bhūtikarmaṇi evaṃ tavākṣayā kīrtir bhaviṣyati tapodhana
martyānāṃ bharatarṣabha brāhmaṇyaṃ nāma duṣprāpam indreṇoktaṃ mahātmanā

viśvāmitro mahārāja rājā brāhmaṇatāṃ gataḥ kathitaṃ bhavatā sarvaṃ vistareṇa pitāmaha tac ca rājan mayā sarvaṃ śrutaṃ buddhimatāṃ vara āgamo hi paro 'smākaṃ tvattaḥ kauravanandana vītahavyas tu rājarṣir viśruto vai pitāmaha brāhmaṇatvam anuprāpta iti rājan mahāyaśāḥ
yuddhe vinirjito rājan gaṅgāyamunayor anu
prapadya śaraṇaṃ tasya mūrdhnā ca nipapāta ha uvāca bhagavantaṃ taṃ putraṃ mānyaṃ bṛhaspateḥ
tam uvāca bharadvājo jyeṣṭhaḥ putro bṛhaspateḥ purodhāḥ śīlasaṃpanno divodāsaṃ mahīpatim kim āgamanakṛtyaṃ te sarvaṃ prabrūhi me 'nagha yat te priyaṃ tat kariṣye na me 'trāsti vicāraṇā
purodhās tasya rājendra divodāsasya dhīmataḥ
stūyamānaḥ surarṣibhiḥ bandibhir vandyamānaś ca babhau sūrya ivoditaḥ sa rathī baddhanistriṃśo
tam abhyanandad bhagavān satkāreṇa svayaṃ bhṛguḥ uvāca cainaṃ bhagavān kiṃ kāryam iti satkṛtam tam uvāca tato rājā daivodāsiḥ pratardanaḥ
ṛṣer hi vacanaṃ satyaṃ sarve syur brāhmaṇā iti
avandhyakālā ye 'lubdhās trivarge sādhaneṣu vā viśiṣṭācārayuktāś ca nārāyaṇa namāmi tān
tapasvinaś ca ye nityaṃ kaumārabrahmacāriṇaḥ tapasā bhāvitātmāno durgāṇy atitaranti te devatātithibhṛtyānāṃ pitṝṇāṃ cārcane ratāḥ śiṣṭānnabhojino ye ca durgāṇy atitaranti te
kartavyaṃ pārthiveneha tad viddhi bharatarṣabha
mānyās teṣāṃ sādhavo ye na nindyāś cāpy asādhavaḥ
satyaṃ bravīmi te rājan vinaśyeyur asaṃśayam
iti māṃ nāradaḥ prāha satataṃ sarvabhūtaye
prayato bharatarṣabha brāhmaṇāñ śrutasaṃpannān
sarvān ete haniṣyanti brāhmaṇā jātamanyavaḥ
yuṣmatsaṃmānanāṃ prītiṃ pāvanaiḥ kṣatriyāśramam amutreha samāyānti vaiśyaśūdrādikās tathā arakṣitāś ca yuṣmābhir viruddhā yānti viplavam yuṣmattejodhṛtā lokās tad rakṣatha jagattrayam
sa pṛṣṭas tān uvācedaṃ siddhāṃs tatra niśākaraḥ
vidyāvido lokavidas tapodamasamanvitāḥ nityaṃ pūjyāś ca vandyāś ca dvijā lokadvayecchubhiḥ
vidyātapobhyāṃ hīnena na tu grāhyaḥ pratigrahaḥ gṛhṇan pratigraham atho nayaty ātmānam eva ca pratigrahasamartho 'pi nādatte yaḥ pratigraham ye lokā dānaśīlānāṃ sa tān āpnoti puṣkalān
pātrāṇām uttamaṃ pātraṃ tad āhur dharmacintakāḥ
duṣṭācārāḥ pāparatā asatyā māyayā vṛtāḥ adṛṣṭabuddhibahulāḥ prāyeṇety avagamyatām
suhṛdy avadyahṛdyās tā vairakopālayāḥ sma tāḥ
susnātaṃ puruṣaṃ dṛṣṭvā sucandanalavokṣitam yoniḥ svadyati nārīṇāṃ dṛteḥ pādād ivodakam
yadi jihvāsahasraṃ syāj jīvec ca śaradāṃ śatam ananyakarmā strīdoṣān anuktvā nidhanaṃ vrajet
doṣāspade 'śucau deśe hy āsāṃ raktās tv aho narāḥ
imāḥ prajā mahābāho dhārmikya iti naḥ śrutam satkṛtāsatkṛtāś cāpi vikurvanti manaḥ sadā
dvijānāṃ ca gurūṇāṃ ca mahāgurunṛpādinām kṣaṇastrīsaṅgakāmotthā yātanāho nirantarā araktamanasāṃ nityaṃ brahmacaryamalātmanām tapodamārcanādhyānayuktānāṃ śuddhir uttamā
tan nibodha mahārāja kathayāmi samāsataḥ
sā tvayā satataṃ rakṣyā ity uktvā prayayau muniḥ
mana eva manuṣyāṇāṃ kāraṇaṃ bandhamokṣayoḥ anyathāliṅgyate kāntā duhitāliṅgyate 'nyathā garbhasaṃstho yathā putro jāyamāno na lipyate evaṃ jñānī na laukyaiś ca karmabhir naiva duṣyate
vipulo 'tha ruciṃ tasmin yogāt tāṃ praviveśa ha rakṣituṃ gurupatnīṃ sa bahurūpāc chatakratoḥ
devaśarmā mahāmatiḥ sthitiṃ ca dharme jagrāha
gaccha gaccheti puṣpārtham āśramaṃ me 'tha bhārata
tathaiva hi bhaveyus te lokāḥ pāpakṛto yathā kṛtvā nācakṣataḥ karma mama tac ca tvayā kṛtam
tat tvayā vai tathā kāryam abhicārabhayātmakam

manodoṣavihīnānāṃ na doṣaḥ syāt tathā tava anyathāliṅgyate kāntā snehena duhitānyathā yateś ca kāmukānāṃ ca yoṣidrūpe 'nyathā matiḥ aśikṣayaiva manasaḥ prāyo lokas tu vañcyate lolety udvijate loko vaktrāsava iti spṛhā abandhāyogyamanasām iti mantrātmadaivatam na rāgasnehalobhāndhaṃ karmiṇāṃ tan mahāphalam niṣkaṣāyo viśuddhas tvaṃ rucyāveśān na dūṣitaḥ
anṛtān api parvādidoṣavarjī nirāmayaḥ
suptāṃ mattāṃ pramattāṃ vā raho yatropagacchati sa pāpiṣṭho vivāhānāṃ paiśācaḥ prathito 'dhamaḥ
nātibālāṃ vahanty anye anityatvāt prajārthinaḥ vahanti karmiṇas tasyām antaḥśuddhivyapekṣayā aparānvayasaṃbhūtāṃ saṃsvapnādivivarjitām kāmo yasyāṃ niṣiddhaś ca ke cid icchanti cāpadi
sā praśastā dvijātīnāṃ dārakarmaṇi maithune
striyo yatra ca pūjyante ramante tatra devatāḥ
smṛta ekaś caturbhāgaḥ kanyābhāgas tu dharmataḥ abhrātṛkā samagrārhā cārthasyety apare viduḥ
vaiśyāputro 'pi bhūyāṃś ca śūdrāputrān na saṃśayaḥ bhayaṃ saṃjanayaty eva tasmād deyadhanas tv asau
kārṣṇāyasam alaṃkāraṃ parigṛhya ca nityaśaḥ vaseyur ete pitryais tu vartayantaḥ svakarmabhiḥ
ātmānam ātmanākhyāti karmasvaiḥ karmabhir naraḥ svaśīlacāritrakṛtaiḥ karmair vāpi (sic) śubhāśubhaiḥ

bhīṣmaḥ yaṃ brāhmaṇas tu śūdrāyāṃ kāmād utpādayet sutam sa pārayann eva śavas tasmāt pāraśavaḥ smṛtaḥ dāsyāṃ vā dāsadāsyāṃ vā yaḥ śūdrasya suto bhavet so 'nujñāto hared aṃśam iti dharmo vyavasthitaḥ kṣetrajādīn sutān etān ekādaśa yathoditān putrapratinidhīn āhuḥ kriyālopān manīṣiṇaḥ bhrātṝṇām ekajātānām ekaś cet putravān bhavet sarvāṃs tāṃs tena putreṇa putriṇo manur abravīt sarvāsām ekapatnīnām ekā cet putriṇī bhavet sarvās tās tena putreṇa prāha putravatīr manuḥ putraṃ putraguṇair yuktaṃ vijñeyas tu sa kṛtrimaḥ utpadyate yas tu gūḍhaṃ na ca jñāyeta kasya cit sa bhaved gūḍhajo nāma tasya syād yasya talpajaḥ mātāpitṛbhyām utsṛṣṭaṃ tayor anyatareṇa vā yaḥ putraṃ pratigṛhṇīyād apaviddhaḥ sa ucyate pitṛveśmani kanyā tu yaṃ putraṃ janayed rahaḥ kānīnaṃ taṃ vaden nāmnā voḍhuḥ kanyāsamudbhavaḥ yā garbhiṇī saṃskriyate jñātājñātāpi vā satī voḍhuḥ sa garbho bhavati sahoḍha iti cocyate yā patyā vā parityaktā atha vā svecchayāpi vā utpādayed akṣatāyāṃ sa paunarbhava ucyate mātāpitṛvihīno vā sakto vā syād akāraṇāt ātmānaṃ sparśayed yas tu svayaṃdattaḥ sa ucyate krīṇīyād yas tv apatyārthaṃ mātāpitror yam antikāt sa sutas tasya sadṛśaḥ krīto nāma budhaiḥ smṛtaḥ dvādaśaite pare prāhur evaṃ dharmasya pāṭhakāḥ
saṃskṛtasya satas tasya varṇagotraṃ bhavaty uta
dīyatāṃ te purohita avilambitam ity evam ṛṣiḥ kaṣṭāt pramucyatām
gavijātaḥ brāhmaṇānāṃ gavāṃ caiva kulam ekaṃ dvidhā kṛtam ekatra mantrās tiṣṭhanti havir anyatra tiṣṭhati
atyantāpadi śaktānāṃ paritrāṇaṃ hi kurvatām yā gatir viditā tv adya narake śaraṇaṃ bhavān
ārohaṇaṃ niṣādānāṃ matsyānāṃ caiva bhārata
tvayāpi gauḥ pradātavyā sālaṃkārā bhaven nṛpa
brāhme bale supūrṇānām eteṣāṃ cyavanādinām
dvāviṃśena samutthāya niścakrāma tapodhanaḥ
athāha bhagavāṃs tau tu pratibuddho viśāṃ pate tailābhyaṅgaṃ prayacchetāṃ snātum icchāmi pārthiva
brāhmaṇā eva jāyeran nānyo varṇaḥ kathaṃ cana īdṛśaṃ ratham āruhya ko 'nyo jīvitum utsahet
brāhmaṇyaṃ durlabhaṃ loke tal labdhvā durlabhaṃ tapaḥ siddhis tatrāpi duṣprāpā siddher api parā gatiḥ
rathena vāhitaś cāpi śramāt krodhodbhavāya te
jamadagnau mahābhāga tapasā bhāvitātmani sa cāpi bhṛguśārdūlas taṃ vedaṃ dhārayiṣyati
kṣatrahantā bhaved dhiṃsram iti devaṃ sanātanam nārāyaṇam upāsyāsya varāt taṃ putram icchati
labheta kāmaṃ sa bhaved arogas tathā surūpaś ca narendraloke
pustakaṃ ca tathā gāvaḥ kanyā dānaṃ tathaiva ca ye na dāsyanti puruṣās teṣāṃ saukhyaṃ pareṇa kim
apūjyamānāḥ kauravya pūjārhās te tathāvidhāḥ
yat kiṃ cit pāṇḍaraṃ puṣpaṃ yat kiṃ cid anulepanam alakṣmīparihārāya nityaṃ deyaṃ yudhiṣṭhira
nityānuṣṭhānayuktāś cet pratigṛhṇanti sādhavaḥ
yājakā dvijasattamāḥ dhane satyapradātṝṇāṃ
vidvadbhyaḥ saṃpradānena tatrāpy aṃśo 'sya pūjayā yajvabhyaś cātha vidvadbhyo dattvā lokaṃ pradāpayet pradadyāj jñānadātṝṇāṃ jñānadānāṃśabhāg bhavet

tadarthaṃ jīvitaṃ te 'stu mā tebhyo 'pratipālanam anartho brāhmaṇasyaiṣa yad vittanicayo mahān śriyā hy abhīkṣṇaṃ saṃvāso darpayet saṃpramohayet brāhmaṇeṣu pramūḍheṣu dharmo vipraṇaśed dhruvam dharmapraṇāśe bhūtānām abhāvaḥ syān na saṃśayaḥ yo rakṣibhyaḥ saṃpradāya rājā rāṣṭraṃ vilumpati yakṣye rāṣṭrād dhanaṃ tasmād ānayadhvam iti bruvan yac cādāya tad ājñaptaṃ bhītaṃ dattaṃ sudāruṇam yajed rājā na taṃ yajñaṃ praśaṃsanty asya sādhavaḥ apīḍitāḥ susaṃvṛddhā ye dadaty anukūlataḥ tādṛśenābhyupāyena yaṣṭavyaṃ nodyamāhṛtaiḥ yadā pariniṣicyeta nihito vai yathāvidhi tadā rājā mahāyajñair yajeta bahudakṣiṇaiḥ vṛddhabāladhanaṃ rakṣyam andhasya kṛpaṇasya ca na khātapūrvaṃ kurvīta na rudantīdhanaṃ haret hṛtaṃ kṛpaṇavittaṃ hi rāṣṭraṃ hanti nṛpaśriyam dadyāc ca mahato bhogān kṣudbhayaṃ praṇudet satām yeṣāṃ svādūni bhojyāni samavekṣyanti bālakāḥ nāśnanti vidhivat tāni kiṃ nu pāpataraṃ tataḥ yadi te tādṛśo rāṣṭre vidvān sīdet kṣudhā dvijaḥ bhrūṇahatyāṃ ca gacchethāḥ kṛtvā pāpam ivottamam dhik tasya jīvitaṃ rājño rāṣṭre yasyāvasīdati dvijo 'nyo vā manuṣyo 'pi śibir āha vaco yathā yasya sma viṣaye rājñaḥ snātakaḥ sīdati kṣudhā avṛddhim eti tad rāṣṭraṃ vindate saha rājakam krośantyo yasya vai rāṣṭrād dhriyante tarasā striyaḥ krośatāṃ patiputrāṇāṃ mṛto 'sau na sa jīvati
ya etāṃ viduṣe dadyāt pṛthivīṃ pṛthivīpatiḥ pṛthivyām etad iṣṭaṃ sa rājyād rājyam iti vrajet punaś ca jananaṃ prāpya rājaiva syān na saṃśayaḥ
daśahastena vaṃśena daśavaṃśān samantataḥ pañcahastādhikaṃ dadyād etad gocarma ucyate
sauvarṇā yatra prāsādā vasor dhārāś ca kāmadāḥ gandharvāpsaraso yatra tatra gacchanti bhūmidāḥ
vidyādānaṃ ca kanyānāṃ dānaṃ pāpaharaṃ param
brāhmaṇārthe gavārthe vā rāṣṭraghāte 'tha svāminaḥ kulastrīṇāṃ paribhave mṛtās te bhūmidaiḥ saha
sunirmitāṃ suvikrītāṃ subhṛtāṃ vāpi yan nṛpaḥ
hṛte kṣetre daridrāṇām aśrupātaḥ sudāruṇaḥ iṣṭāpūrtaṃ narasyāsya hanyāt tripuruṣaṃ kulam
vimuktaḥ sarvapāpebhyaḥ svargaloke mahīyate
brahmaloke dharāpradam upatiṣṭhanti bhūtāni
āśayābhyāgataṃ vipraṃ bhojanārtham upasthitam
tāmrāṇi tilapātrāṇi triṃśatpalamitāni tu
tāṃ prāpnuvanti gāṃ dattvā vimuktāḥ sarvakilbiṣaiḥ
gorasānāṃ na vikretur apañcayajanasya ca
teṣāṃ māghyāṃ pradānena sarvān kāmān avāpnuyāt
pānīyābhyarthinaṃ dṛṣṭvā prītyā dadyāt tvarānvitaḥ vastre tantupramāṇena dīpe nimiṣavatsaram gavāṃ lomapramāṇena svargabhogam upāśnute jale bindupramāṇena tad etāny upavartaya
saṃtāḍyā na tu pādena gavāṃ madhye ca na vrajet
arthasya daśabhāg dātā tan nivṛttapravṛttaye

yudhiṣṭhira uvāca na mṛtaḥ svargam āpnoti putrapautrasamanvitaḥ paritrāyanti śaktās tu namas tebhyo mṛtās tu vā na pālayanti nihatā ye tān vaivasvato yamaḥ daṇḍayan bhartsayan nityaṃ nirayebhyo na muñcati tathā gavāṃ paritrāṇe pīḍane ca śubhāśubhe vipragoṣu viśeṣeṇa rakṣiteṣu gṛheṣu vā
kṣīrasravā vai sarito girīṃś ca sarpiṣāṃ tathā vimalaṃ caiva toyaṃ ca sarvaṃ svādu tathaiva ca
gā vai dadyān nyāyabhūtā dvijebhyo yo yātum ākāṅkṣati devalokam

mṛtyukāle sahasrākṣa yaś ca gāṃ saṃprayacchati mṛtyuṃ sukhaṃ sa labhate lokāṃś cāpnoty anuttamān kṣatriyo yaś ca vai kaś cid yātrākāle prayacchati gobhiś ca samanudhyāto jitvā śatrūn mahīyate yaḥ kaś cit karma yat kiṃ cit kartum ārabhate nṛṣu gāvo dattvā sa tat sarvaṃ sukhopāyena vindati yaṃ yaṃ kāmaṃ samuddiśya gāṃ dvijāya prayacchati tasya saṃpatsyate kāmaḥ paratra ca śubhāṃ gatim
dānād damo viśiṣṭo hi dānaṃ kiṃ cid dvijātaye
vidyādānāt paraṃ nāsti vedavidyā mahāphalā
śūrāṇāṃ cāpi nirdiṣṭaṃ phalaṃ ca niyataṃ śṛṇu
tataḥ prajāsu sṛṣṭāsu dakṣādyaiḥ kṣudhitāḥ prajāḥ prajāpatim upādhāvan viniścitya caturmukham
mukhajā sāsṛjad dhātuḥ surabhiṃ lokamātaram
atrāpy udāharantīmam itihāsaṃ purātanam vasiṣṭhasya ca saṃvādaṃ saudāsasya mahātmanaḥ
lokatraye muniśreṣṭha bhagavaṃl lokabhāvana
gāvo bhaviṣyaṃ bhūtaṃ ca goṣu yajñāḥ pratiṣṭhitāḥ
prātar namasyās tā gāvas tataḥ puṣṭim avāpnuyāt
lokān anantān samavāpya dhīraḥ pramodate sukṛtī svargaloke
saurabhyaḥ puṇyakarmāṇaḥ pāvakāḥ śubhadarśanāḥ yadarthaṃ gośatāś caiva saurabhyaḥ surasattama tac ca me śṛṇu kārtsnyena vadato hy arisūdana purā devayuge tāta daityendreṣu mahātmasu
tāḥ kila śṛṅgam ākāṅkṣan varṣātapanivāraṇam mānuṣīṃ ca tvacaṃ gurvīṃ śītavātātapāsahām vastrāvaraṇagocarmam avirodhaḥ parasparam tato brahmā dadau tāsāṃ manasā dhāritāṃ parām

āhūya manujaṃ prāha goṣu svāṃ tanum ādadhaḥ ācchādanaṃ cāvaraṇaṃ yūyaṃ gṛhṇīta mānavāḥ śītavātātapaṃ yena dhārayanti prajārthinaḥ sukumāratvacaṃ yūyaṃ vastrair ācchādayiṣyatha evam astv iti tāḥ prādāt tvacaṃ svāṃ carma eva ca
phalāni ca rasāḍhyāni mṛdūni rucirāṇi ca
apsarobhiś ca sahito bhāti vai goprado naraḥ
mayābhipannā devāś ca modante śāśvatīḥ samāḥ
brahmacaryeṇa tapasā satyena ca damena ca
vaiśaṃpāyana uvāca evaṃ śrutvā paraṃ puṇyaṃ gavāṃ dānam anuttamam dharmarājaḥ prahṛṣṭātmā kauravaṃ punar abravīt
nidarśitaṃ pūrvam eva ṛṣiṇā nāsiketunā
vareṇyaṃ varadaṃ devaṃ stotum ārebhire prabhum
viveśa kīcakānantaḥ praviśann eva sūcitaḥ ūṣmāyāṃ cittalair vaṃśais tāṃs tyaktvā prāviśac chamīm
kriyamāṇā ca te vāṇī bhaviṣyati narair bhuvi
ṛgvedaś cāgamat tatra sāmāni ca yajūṃṣi ca
anantaṃ brahma satyaṃ ca tapaś ca paramaṃ bhuvi
ity uktaḥ sa tadā tais tu brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ tathety evābravīt prītas te 'pi jagmur yathāgatam
valmīkasya vapāyāṃ ca karṇe vājasya dakṣiṇe śakaṭorvyāṃ parasyāpsu brāhmaṇasya kare 'pi vā
suvarṇaṃ ye prayacchanti narāḥ śuddhena cetasā

eṣā suvarṇasyotpattiḥ kathitā te mayānagha kārttikeyasya ca vibho tad viddhi bhṛgunandana kārttikeyas tu saṃvṛddhaḥ kālena mahatā tadā devaiḥ senāpatitvena vṛtaḥ sendrair bhṛgūdvaha jaghāna tārakaṃ cāpi daityam anyāṃs tathāsurān tridaśendrājñayā brahmaṃl lokānāṃ hitakāmyayā suvarṇadāne ca mayā kathitās te guṇā vibho tasmāt suvarṇaṃ viprebhyaḥ prayaccha dadatāṃ vara
evam etan mahārāja suvarṇasya mahātmanaḥ janma te kathitaṃ puṇyaṃ pradānaṃ ca yudhiṣṭhira iti rāmam uvācedaṃ vasiṣṭhaḥ śreṣṭhavāg ṛṣiḥ suvarṇadāne māhātmyaṃ tat kuruṣva yudhiṣṭhira
tasmai pradadur agryāṇi vāhanāni dhanāni ca
piṇḍān vāhāryakaṃ śrāddhaṃ kuryān māsānumāsikam pitṛyajñaṃ tu nirvartya vipraś candrakṣaye 'gnimān piṇḍānāṃ māsikaṃ śrāddham anvāhāryaṃ vidur budhāḥ tadāmiṣeṇa kurvīta prathamaḥ prāñjaliḥ śuciḥ
caturdaśīṃ prakurvāṇaḥ sukhabhāgī bhaven naraḥ
yajed vā aśvamedhena nīlaṃ vā vṛṣam utsṛjet
phalgunīṣu dadac chrāddhaṃ labhed rūpavataḥ sutān uttarāsu dadac chrāddhaṃ rūpavān abhijāyate haste caiva dadac chrāddhaṃ sukham atyantam aśnute citrāsu ca dadac chrāddhaṃ nānāphalam avāpnuyāt
śravaṇe śrutisaṃpattir dhaniṣṭhāsu dhanaṃ bhavet tathā śatabhiṣagyoge vyādhimokṣo balaṃ tathā
tilair virahitaṃ śrāddhaṃ kṛtaṃ krodhavaśena ca
sadācāraparāś caiva vijñeyāḥ sarvapāvanāḥ
pañcarātravido mukhyās tathā bhāgavatāḥ pare vaikhānasāḥ kulaśreṣṭhā vaidikācāracāriṇaḥ
atharvavedavit sarvaṃ paṅktidoṣaṃ vyapānudet vedaśāstravidaṃ vipraṃ sarvadoṣair vivarjitam
buddhvātriṃ manasā dadhyau bhagavantaṃ samāhitaḥ
somapāś ca haviṣmantas tathā barhiṣadā api
ajo marīcir ity eva viśvedevāḥ sanātanāḥ
yo na bhuṅkte sa bhavati upavāsī sadā dvijaḥ
kāśyapo 'trir bharadvājo viśvāmitro 'tha gautamaḥ jamadagnir vasiṣṭhaś ca sādhvī caivāpy arundhatī
pratigrahanimittaṃ vai pratyuvāca sa tān nṛpaḥ
tasmād dadāmi vo vittaṃ tad gṛhṇīdhvaṃ tapodhanāḥ
manojavān pradadāmy arbudāni
daśasūnāsamaś cakrī daśacakrisamo dhvajī daśadhvajisamā veśyā daśaveśyāsamo nṛpaḥ daśasūnāsahasrāṇi yo vāhayati sainikaḥ tena tulyo bhaved rājā ghoras tasya pratigrahaḥ
yad ahobhiḥ subahubhiḥ saṃcitaṃ paramaṃ tapaḥ
dṛṣṭvā phalāni munayas te grahītum upādravan
atriḥ na jātu kāmaḥ kāmānām upabhogena śāmyati haviṣā kṛṣṇavartmeva bhūya evābhivardhate
yathā caranti vidvāṃsas tathā dharmaparāyaṇāḥ tad eva viduṣā kāryam ātmano hitam icchatā
kaśmalādhamadānāya pratiyatnāḥ prajādhamāḥ vinayāt sa samṛddhārthān samupāsīta yatnataḥ
atha te mantriṇaḥ sarve rājānam idam abruvan
gobhis tamo mama dhvastaṃ jātamātrasya dehataḥ
vaktraikadeśe gaṇḍeti dhātum etaṃ pracakṣate tenonnatena gaṇḍeti viddhi mānalasaṃbhave
udapāne śleṣmamūtre cotsṛjed vṛṣalīpatiḥ yātu pāpīyasāṃ lokaṃ bisastainyaṃ karoti yaḥ
śvaśrvā vivādaṃ vadatu bhartṛhīnā ca jīvatu
śukaḥ śūdrayonau dvijātis tu reto muñcatu kāmataḥ yamaḥ aupāsanavihīnas tu devabrāhmaṇanindakaḥ devasatrādhikāryas tu yas te harati puṣkaram
bharadvājaḥ sadā vasatu saṃnyāsī grāme vā nagare 'pi vā bandhubhiḥ saha vāso 'stu yas te harati puṣkaram
vāsudevaṃ jagadyoniṃ sarvādhāram anāmakam parāṇāṃ paramaṃ yātu yas te harati puṣkaram
tvayā lokahitārthāya pīto vai lavaṇāmbudhiḥ vindhyo nivārito yena vātāpiś ca niṣūditaḥ nahuṣaḥ sarpatāṃ nīto bhavatā yad dvijottama jijñāsamānena mayā kṛtaṃ tat kṣantum arhasi
puṇyatīrtheṣu gātrāṇi plāvayām āsur añjasā
bahuṣv api nimitteṣu puṇyam āśritya dīyate
upānahau ca yo dadyāc ślakṣṇau snehasamanvitau
mayā bhārataśārdūla kiṃ bhūyaḥ śrotum icchasi
vasantakāle pānīyaṃ taḍāge yasya tiṣṭhati
ekāham api kaunteya bhūmistham udakaṃ kuru kulaṃ tārayate janma sapta sapta ca sapta ca
sasyāni ropaṇād eṣāṃ tṛptir bhavati śāśvatī nāgikā maricā vallyo mālatītyādikā latāḥ veṇukramukatvaksārāḥ sasyāni tṛṇajātayaḥ
ropayitvā tu yo vṛkṣān kāle śuśrūṣate nagān
pūjayanti kṣitiruhāś chāyayā hy atithīn sadā
sumanogandhadhūpādyair ijyante daivatāni ca
agniṣomādisṛṣṭau tu viṣṇoḥ sarvātmanaḥ prabho
amṛtaṃ mano hlādayati śriyaṃ caiva dadāti ha
tasmai sumanaso devās tasmāt sumanasaḥ smṛtāḥ
padmaṃ ca tulasījātir api sarveṣu pūjitāḥ
devālaye sabhāyāṃ ca girau caitye catuṣpathe gobrāhmaṇālaye durge dīpo bhūtipradaḥ śuciḥ
phalaṃ pradānena ca tad bhūyo vaktuṃ tvam arhasi
tathā cakāra tat sarvaṃ papāta nahuṣo yathā
pitaraś ca mahābhāgā ṛṣayaś ca tapodhanāḥ
surendrapātanāyeti sa ca netre nyamīlayat
śrutismṛtī pramāṇaṃ vā neti vāde sa devarāṭ
ya idaṃ śṛṇuyād vāpi paṭhate yo dvijottamaḥ brahmalokam avāpnoti sa ca naivātra saṃśayaḥ
pātakānāṃ paraṃ hy etad brahmasvaharaṇaṃ balāt sānvayās te vinaśyanti caṇḍālāḥ pretya ceha ca
bhṛtyānām api rājñāṃ tu rajasā dhvaṃsitaṃ makhe tatpānāc ca dvijāḥ sarve kṣipraṃ narakam āviśan
na paśyen nānumodec ca na hartuṃ kiṃ cid ācaret
etad dhi dhanam utkṛṣṭaṃ dvijānām aviśeṣataḥ
so 'haṃ vai viditaḥ sarvair dūrago malino vane sādhūnāṃ paribhāvepsur viprāṇāṃ garvito dhanaiḥ
ya idaṃ śṛṇuyān nityaṃ yaḥ paṭhed vā jitendriyaḥ sa yāti brahmaṇo lokaṃ brāhmaṇo gautamo yathā
śamyākṣepeṇa pṛthivīṃ tridhā paryacaraṃ yajan
brāhmaṇārthāya karmāṇi raṇaṃ caiva karomi yat
pūjitair brāhmaṇair nityaṃ vacanenāham āgataḥ

tasmād anaśanair yukto viprān pūjaya nityadā viprāṇāṃ vacanāt sarvaṃ paratreha ca sidhyati vāsobhir annair gobhiś ca śubhair naiveśikair api śubhaiḥ surakṣaṇaiś cāpi toṣyā eva dvijās tvayā etad eva paraṃ guhyam alobhena samācara
ācārād dhanam akṣayyam ācāro hanti kilbiṣam
sa vināśaṃ vrajaty āśu sūdako 'śucir eva ca
nopasṛṣṭaṃ na vāristhaṃ na madhyaṃ nabhaso gatam
sa darbhapāṇis tat kurvan vāgyatas tanmanāḥ śuciḥ
devālaye 'tha govṛnde caitye sasyeṣu viśrame bhokṣyan bhuktvā kṣute 'dhvānaṃ gatvā mūtrapurīṣayoḥ dvir ācāmed yathānyāyaṃ hṛdgataṃ tu pibann apaḥ
tatrācāntaḥ spṛśed agniṃ tathā mṛdugatir vrajet
agrāsano jitakrodhī bālapūrvas tv alaṃkṛtaḥ ghṛtāhutiviśuddhānnaṃ hutāgniś cākṣipan graset
na śūdrapatitābhyāśe caṇḍālaśravaṇena ca
karṇinālīkanārācān nirharanti śarīrataḥ vākśalyas tu na nirhartuṃ śakyo hṛdiśayo hi saḥ
amāvāsyām ṛte nityaṃ dantadhāvanam ācaret itihāsapurāṇāni dānaṃ vedaṃ ca nityaśaḥ gāyatrīmananaṃ nityaṃ kuryāt saṃdhyāṃ samāhitaḥ
japtavyasyānusaṃdhāne snāne maunaṃ praśasyate
bhūmāv ekena pāṇinā gurūn dṛṣṭvā samuttiṣṭhet
akṛtvā devapūjāṃ ca nācared dantadhāvanam
dārasaṃgrahaṇāt pūrvaṃ nācaren maithunaṃ budhaḥ anyathā tv avakīrṇaḥ syāt prāyaścittaṃ samācaret nodīkṣet paradārāṃś ca rahasy ekāsano bhavet indriyāṇi sadā yacchet svapne śuddhamanā bhavet
āsanaṃ tu padākṛṣya na prasajjet tathā naraḥ
tiryaṅ na ca śayen nityaṃ nāntardhānena saṃyutaḥ na niśāyāṃ punaḥ snāyād āpady agnidvijāntike snāne nirmālyakaṃ varjet snātvā nāṅgāni mārjayet
nopavāsaṃ vṛthā kuryād dhanaṃ nāpahared iha
nāvalīḍham avajñātam āghrātaṃ bhakṣayed api
śuṣkam annaṃ na bhuñjīta śūdrānnaṃ ca vivarjayet
dadhisaktu na doṣāyāṃ piben madhu ca nityaśaḥ
yo 'tithīnām adattvā ca bālānāṃ jaraṭhaiḥ saha
niṣṭhīvane maithune ca kṣute kakṣyāvimocane udakyādarśane tadvan nagnasyācamanaṃ smṛtam spṛśet karṇaṃ sapraṇavaṃ sūryam īkṣet sadā tadā
kulīnaḥ paṇḍita iti rakṣyā niḥsvāḥ svaśaktitaḥ
devatāḥ pratimādarśāś candanāḥ puṣpavallikāḥ śuddhaṃ jalaṃ suvarṇaṃ ca rajataṃ gṛhamaṅgalam
na bhuktvā maithunaṃ gacchen na dhāven nātihāsakam
tailābhyañjanam aṣṭamyāṃ caturdaśyāṃ ca parvasu
sāmudreṇāmbhasā snānaṃ kṣauraṃ śrāddheṣu bhojanam antarvatnīpatiḥ kurvan na putraphalam aśnute satāṃ gurūṇāṃ vṛddhānāṃ kulastrīṇāṃ viśeṣataḥ
varjayed atiduṣṭāṃ ca vyādhinīṃ vyaṅgikāṃ tathā saromaśām atisthūlāṃ kanyāṃ mātṛpitṛsthitām alajjāṃ bhrātṛjāṃ duṣṭāṃ varjayed raktakeśinīm
yatno vai bhojane kāryo atyāśaṃ ca vivarjayet
ātmānaṃ śuci manyeta brāhmaṇān na ca paspaśet taṃ brūyād brāhmaṇaghnaṃ ca tasya cāyur vinaśyati brāhmaṇā hi sadā pūjyā nareṇa bhūtim icchatā
samāvṛttaḥ śucīn viprān devān atha gurūn namet kuryād vyāhṛtihomādīn arghyārhaś ca sadā bhavet
nānāpadi parasyānnam animantritam āharet ekoddiṣṭaṃ na bhuñjīta prathamaṃ tu viśeṣataḥ sapiṇḍīkaraṇaṃ varjyaṃ savidhānaṃ ca māsikam
kṣatriyas tu viśeṣeṇa dhanurvedaṃ samabhyaset

mānyānāṃ mānanaṃ kuryān nindyānāṃ nindanaṃ tathā gobrāhmaṇārthe yudhyeta prāṇān api parityajet na strīṣu sajjed draṣṭavyaṃ śaktyā dānarucir bhavet na brāhmaṇān paribhavet kārpaṇyaṃ brāhmaṇair vṛtam patitān nābhibhāṣeta nāhvayeta rajasvalām
ā ṣoḍaśād ṛtur mukhyaḥ putrajanmani śabditaḥ
ya idaṃ śṛṇuyān nityaṃ yaś cāpi parikīrtayet sa śubhān prāpnuyāl lokān sadācāraparo nṛpa
śriyābhitaptās tadbhedān na bhinnāḥ syuḥ samāhitāḥ
jyeṣṭho 'pi durvinītas tu kaniṣṭhas tu viśeṣataḥ
gurūṇām aparādho hi śakyaḥ kṣantavya eva ca
upoṣya ekabhaktena niyatātmā jitendriyaḥ
dhanavān kīrtimāṃś caiva kule mahati jāyate
ramate strīsahasrāḍhye sukṛtī virajā naraḥ
na caitad rocate teṣāṃ ye dhanaiḥ sukhamedhinaḥ
agnikāryaparo nityaṃ nityaṃ kalyaprabodhanaḥ agniṣṭomasya yajñasya phalaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ haṃsasārasayuktaṃ ca vimānaṃ labhate naraḥ indraloke ca vasate varastrībhiḥ samāvṛtaḥ
atirātraphalaṃ prāpya apsarobhiḥ pramodate
juhvāno jātavedasam niyamena samāyuktaḥ
tatra gatvā samutthito devakanyābhir āvṛtaḥ
nānāvidhasugaṃdhābhir nānāveṣābhir eva ca
tāvad brahmādikā lokā varṣadhārāpramāṇataḥ
vaiṣṇavīṃ vātha raudrīṃ vā pañcamīṃ brahmacāriṇaḥ saṃvatsaravrataṃ kṛtvā kramante lokam uttamam
nārāyaṇe 'tha rudre vā bhaktis tīrthaṃ paraṃ matam
prāpnute jīva eva hi tato 'sya karma paśyanti śubhaṃ vā yadi vāśubham devatāḥ pañcabhūtasthāḥ kiṃ bhūyaḥ śrotum icchasi
bhogavaśyaṃ karmavaśyaṃ yātanāvaśyam ity api etat trayāṇām āsādya karmataḥ so 'śnute phalam
duḥkhasyānantaraṃ sukham etad dvayaṃ dhruvaṃ baddhaḥ

iha sthānāni puṇyāni devatulyāni bhūtale tiryagyonyatiriktāni gatimanti ca sarvaśaḥ yamasya viṣaye puṇye brahmalokasame guṇaiḥ karmabhir niyatair baddho jantur duḥkhāny upāśnute yena yena tu pāpena karmaṇā puruṣo gatim prayāti narakaṃ ghoraṃ tat te vakṣyāmy ataḥ param
kukkuṭaḥ pañca varṣāṇi pañca varṣāṇi jambukaḥ
gardabhatvaṃ tu saṃprāpya daśa varṣāṇi jīvati saṃvatsaraṃ tu kumbhīras tato jāyati mānavaḥ putrasya mātāpitarau yasya ruṣṭāv ubhāv api gurvapadhyānataḥ so 'pi mṛto jāyati gardabhaḥ
mṛto vānarayonau syāt tato bhavati sūkaraḥ tataḥ śvā cāpi bhavati tato bhavati mānuṣaḥ
asūyakaḥ kutsitaś ca caṇḍālo duḥkham aśnute
mūṣako jāyate paścāt sūkaro jāyate tataḥ
śvā biḍālaḥ kukkuṭaś ca jāyetāpi pipīlikāḥ
vilāḷaḥ pañca varṣāṇi pañca varṣāṇi kukkuṭaḥ
varṣāt pañcadaśāt pūrvaṃ kramād bhavati mānuṣaḥ śvā bhūtvā sapta janmāni tato jāyati mānavaḥ dvijagrāmādhipatyaṃ hi kṛtvā brahmasvabhakṣakaḥ śvānayoniśataṃ prāpya caṇḍālaḥ puṣkalas tataḥ
tato nidhanam āpanno mānuṣatvam upāśnute
tato hataḥ kṛtaghnaḥ sa tatrograir bharatarṣabha
mṛgo bhūtvā tataḥ śastrair vadhyate bhṛśadāruṇam
naro mohasamanvitaḥ so 'pi rājan mṛto jantus
corayitvā tu niṣpāvaṃ jāyate halagolakaḥ
chāgaś cāpy āvikaṃ hṛtvā kūrmaś carmāpahārakaḥ kauśikaṃ tu tato hṛtvā naro jāyati vartakaḥ aṃśukaṃ corayitvā tu śuko jāyati mānavaḥ corayitvā dukūlaṃ tu mṛto haṃsaḥ prajāyate
tatra jīvati varṣāṇi tato daśa ca pañca ca adharmasya kṣayaṃ gatvā tato jāyati mānuṣaḥ
janmaprabhṛti pāpāni varjayanti ca ye narāḥ
yathā yathā manas tasya duṣkṛtaṃ karma garhate tathā tathā śarīraṃ tu tenādharmeṇa mucyate yadi vyāharate rājan viprāṇāṃ dharmavādinām tato 'dharmakṛtāt kṣipram apavādāt pramucyate

suvarṇadānāt pāpāni naśyanti subahūny api dattvā vṛttikarīṃ bhūmiṃ pātakenāpi mucyate pārāyaṇaiś ca vedānāṃ mucyate pātakair dvijaḥ gāyatryāś caiva lakṣeṇa gosahasrasya tarpaṇāt vedārthaṃ jñāpayitvā tu śuddhān viprān yathārthataḥ sarvatyāgādibhiś cāpi mucyate pātakair dvijaḥ sarvātithyaṃ paraṃ hy eṣāṃ tasmād annaṃ paraṃ smṛtam
śūdrānnaṃ naiva bhoktavyaṃ viprair dharmaparāyaṇaiḥ āpady eva svadāsānāṃ bhoktavyaṃ svayam udyatam
na bhakṣayeta yo māṃsaṃ trividhaṃ sa vimucyate
hiṃsāṃ tu nopayuñjīta tathā hiṃsā caturvidhā kāye manasi vākye ca doṣā hy ete prakīrtitāḥ
māṃsaṃ mohasamāviṣṭaḥ puruṣaḥ so 'dhamaḥ smṛtaḥ
hiṃsāṃ kṛtvāvaśaḥ pāpo bhūyiṣṭhaṃ jāyate tathā
pareṣāṃ dhanadhānyānāṃ hiṃsakāḥ stāvakās tathā praśaṃsakāś ca māṃsasya nityaṃ svarge bahiṣkṛtāḥ
aviśvāsyo 'vasīdet sa iti hovāca nāradaḥ
bhakṣayitvā nimitte 'pi duṣkaraṃ kurute tapaḥ
vikīrṇakaṇṭakenāpi tṛṇapraspandane bhayam
mṛtyuto bhayam astīti śaṅkāyāṃ duḥkham uttaram dharmasyāyatanaṃ tasmān māṃsasya parivarjanam
rākṣasendrabhayān muktāḥ sarvabhūtaparāyaṇāḥ
udyateṣu ca śastreṣu mṛgavyālabhayeṣu ca
bhīṣmaḥ mārkaṇḍeyena yac coktaṃ śṛṇu me paramaṃ vacaḥ yudhiṣṭhira mahābāho ye doṣā māṃsabhakṣaṇe
vidhināpy avaidikeneti dāntānām iha niścayaḥ
kṛto hi manaso yajñas tena devāś ca tarpitāḥ
etaiś cānyaiś ca rājendra kṛpeṇa bharatena ca
duḥṣantena ca rājendra kuśena ca lavena ca virūpākṣeṇa kurūṣeṇa nṛgālarkanarais tathā
ajena dhundhunā caiva tathaiva ca subāhunā haryaśvena ca rājendra kṣupeṇa bharatena ca
yathaitad yādṛśaṃ caitad guṇā ye cāsya varjane doṣā bhakṣayato ye ca tan me brūhi pitāmaha

nāśo bhakṣaṇadoṣasya dānam eva satāṃ matam kṣudhitānāṃ dvijānāṃ ca sarveṣāṃ caiva jīvanam dattvā bhavati pūtātmā śraddhayā lobhavarjitaḥ śikṣayanti na yācante darśayantaḥ svamūrtibhiḥ avastheyam adānasya mā bhūd evaṃ bhavān iti dānādyaiḥ suśucir māṃsaṃ punar naiva sa bhakṣayet
rakṣaṇārthāya bhūtānāṃ hiṃsrān hanyān mṛgān punaḥ
agastyena purā rājan māṃsabhakṣaṃ tu jāṅgale
tyaktvākasmān niśāyāṃ ca na dattam abhayaṃ mayā
tenaiṣā kṛmitā prāptā bhayasya jananī sadā
dadarśa ca mahārāja saṃprāptaṃ rājaputratām cakrākrameṇa bhinnaś ca kīṭaḥ prāṇān mumoca ha saṃbhūtaḥ kṣatriyakule prasādād amitaujasaḥ
etāsv eva krameṇaiva yoniṣv āsa svakarmaṇā
paryāyeṇa tataḥ prāpya kṣātraṃ sthānam anuttamam

pālanāc ca viśiṣṭānāṃ suyuddhamaraṇena ca śiṣṭasaṃsevanāc caiva sa gatiṃ paramāṃ gataḥ tataḥ sa pararāṣṭreṇa rājānaṃ pīḍitāḥ prajāḥ hṛte ca taddhane tāta yuddhāya samupāgataḥ hatvā taṃ nihato yuddhe tasmād vipratvam āgataḥ ājagāma tataḥ prājñaḥ kṛṣṇadvaipāyanas tadā pārāśaryaṃ mahāprājñam upayāntaṃ dayāparam nityaṃ prasannavadanaṃ nabhaḥsnigdhāmbudaprabham ajñānatimirādityaṃ nityaṃ vyāsaṃ namāmy aham ity uktvā patitaṃ padbhyāṃ prītyā prāha mahāmuniḥ brāhmaṇān pūjayasveha japasatyaparāyaṇaḥ kramād brahma prāpsyasi tvaṃ viṣṇudhyānena nirmalam
ity uktvā samanujñātas tathā cakre dvijottamaḥ
śrutvaitad rājaśārdūla satkarmaparamo bhava
tapobhāgyān mahābhāga sukhabhāgyāt tathaiva ca
dānam eva paraṃ dvija no cet sarvapavitrebhyo
nityaṃ cākṛpaṇo bhuṅkte svajanair dehi yācitaḥ bhāgyakṣayeṇa kṣīyante nopabhogena saṃcayāḥ dravyāṇy ādadate caiva duḥkhaṃ yānti patanti ca tato 'nyat karma yat kiṃ cin na puṇyaṃ na ca pātakam
asaṃskārāt kṣatravaiśyau naśyete brāhmaṇād ṛte śūdro naśyaty aśuśrūṣur āśramāṇāṃ yathārhataḥ
prabhur hy anupabhogī syād adattvānnam asaṃśayaḥ yas tārayati vai vidvān pitṝn devān samādṛtān
tat tad bahuguṇaṃ dānaṃ śraddhayā svaguṇair api

viṣṇor abhyarcanena ca brāhmaṇaḥ sa mahābhāga taret saṃsārasāgarāt svakarmaśuddhasattvānāṃ tapobhir nirmalātmanām vidyayā gatamohānāṃ tāraṇāya hariḥ smṛtaḥ tadarcanaparo nityaṃ tadbhaktas taṃ namaskuru tadbhaktā na vinaśyanti hy aṣṭākṣaraparāyaṇāḥ praṇavopāsanaparāḥ paramārthaparās tv iha etaiḥ pāvaya cātmānaṃ
bhīṣmaḥ kṛṣṇadvaipāyano rājan maitreyaṃ dvijasattamam

agnisaṃrakṣaṇaparā gṛhaśuddhiṃ ca kāraye pātrāṇāṃ dhanadhānyānāṃ śayanāsanavastunām kumārān pālaye nityaṃ kumārīḥ pariśikṣaye ātmapriyāṇi hitvāpi garbhasaṃrakṣaṇe ratā bālānāṃ varjaye nityaṃ śāpaṃ kopaṃ pratāpanam avikṣiptāni dhānyāni nānnavikṣepaṇaṃ gṛhe ratnavat spṛhaye gehe gāvaḥ sayavasodakāḥ samudgamya ca śuddhāhaṃ bhikṣāṃ dadyāṃ dvijātiṣu
notthāpaye sukhaṃ suptaṃ hy āturaṃ pālaye patim
bandhakīṃ varjayāmy eva kuhakāmūlakarma ca
nūnaṃ śaktyā samārambhān vihitān sumahodayān vipannārthān vijānāsi tenāsi hariṇaḥ kṛśaḥ ekadravyaniviṣṭena tulyārthaśrutasaṃpadā paribhūto 'si nūnaṃ tvaṃ tenāsi hariṇaḥ kṛśaḥ

sudurvinītaḥ putro vā jāmātā vā pramārjakaḥ dārā vā pratikūlās te tenāsi hariṇaḥ kṛśaḥ bhrātaro 'tīva viṣamāḥ pitā vā kṣutkṣato mṛtaḥ mātā jyeṣṭho gurur vāpi tenāsi hariṇaḥ kṛśaḥ brāhmaṇo vā hato gaur vā brahmasvaṃ vā hṛtaṃ purā devasvaṃ vādhikaṃ kāle tenāsi hariṇaḥ kṛśaḥ hṛtadāro 'tha vṛddho vā loke dviṣṭo 'tha vā naraiḥ avijñātena vā vṛddhas tenāsi hariṇaḥ kṛśaḥ vārdhakyārthaṃ dhanaṃ dṛṣṭvā svā śrīr vāpi parair hṛtā vṛttir vā durjanāpekṣā tenāsi hariṇaḥ kṛśaḥ saṃpatkāle na te dharmaḥ kṣīṇas tāta suhṛdbruvaiḥ asaṃnyāsam atas tatra tenāsi hariṇaḥ kṛśaḥ
parokṣavādibhir mithyā doṣas te saṃpradarśitaḥ
alam arthayase hīnāṃs tenāsi hariṇaḥ kṛśaḥ
bibhratī paramaṃ rūpaṃ sarvabhūtamanoharam
vānaprasthoñchavṛttīnāṃ tapovistṛtacetasām
nārada uvāca evam uktvā mahādevaḥ śrotukāmaḥ svayaṃ prabhuḥ anukūlāṃ priyāṃ bhāryāṃ pārśvasthāṃ samabhāṣata
daṃpatyor eṣa vai dharmaḥ sahadharmakṛtaḥ śubhaḥ
viṣṇuṃ jiṣṇuṃ mahāviṣṇuṃ prabhaviṣṇuṃ maheśvaram anekarūpadaityāntaṃ namāmi puruṣottamam amṛtāṃśūdbhavo bījaṃ śaktir devakīnandanaḥ trisāmā hṛdayaṃ tasya śāntyarthe viniyujyate
etat stotraṃ bhagavatā vyāsena parikīrtitam yaḥ paṭhec chṛṇuyād vāpi śreyaḥ prāpnoty anuttamam

arjuna uvāca jitaṃ te puṇḍarīkākṣa namas te viśvabhāvana namas te 'stu hṛṣīkeśa mahāpuruṣapūrvaja ākāśāt patitaṃ toyaṃ yathā gacchati sāgaram sarvadevanamaskāraḥ keśavaṃ prati gacchati sarvavedeṣu yat puṇyaṃ sarvavedeṣu yat phalam tat phalaṃ puruṣa āpnoti stutvā devaṃ janārdanam rāma rāmeti rāmeti rame rāme manorame śrīsahasranāmatattulyaṃ rāmanāma varānane
mahātmanāṃ jñānavidāṃ tapa eva dhanaṃ param
teṣāṃ vṛddhāś ca bālāś ca sarve sanmārgadarśinaḥ
utathyārthe tu cārvaṅgī paraṃ niyamam āsthitā
kasmāt tvaṃ hatavān asi iti śrutvā vacas tasya
muktas tvam āyuḥśeṣeṇa mā bhair gaccha jaleśvara māvamaṃsthāḥ punar mohān mā tvāṃ ninyur yamakṣayam
vaikhānasavidhānena gaṅgātīraṃ samāśritāḥ
evam atrer mahārāja kathitaṃ karma cādbhutam
cyavanasya mahārāja śṛṇu māhātmyam uttamam iṣṭvā yajñaṃ mahābhāga cyavanaḥ sumahātapāḥ nāsatyau balinau rājaṃś cakre vai somapīthinau

yad anyad vakṣyase vipra tat kariṣyāma te vacaḥ pibetām aśvinau somaṃ bhavadbhiḥ sahitāv imau ubhāv etāv api surau sūryaputrau sureśvara kriyatāṃ madvaco devā yathā vai samudāhṛtam etad vaḥ kurvatāṃ śreyo bhaven naitad akurvatām aśvibhyāṃ saha somaṃ vai na pāsyāmi dvijottama
tatheti śakras tasyātha praṇāmam akaron nṛpa
garbhiṇīvatsakādiṣu pūrvāhṇeṣu na dīvyanti

hatvā vai dānavān devāḥ sarve saṃbhūya saṃyuge te nābhyajānan hi tadā brāhmaṇair nihatān kapān athāgamya mahātejā nārado 'kathayad vibho yathā hatā mahābhāgais tejasā brāhmaṇaiḥ kapāḥ nāradasya vacaḥ śrutvā prītāḥ sarve divaukasaḥ
sa parvatān vyasṛjad vai diśaś ca
śatakratuṃ jitya sa viśvakarmā sa viśvasṛk pārtha sa viśvarūpaḥ sa viśvabhug viśvadhṛg viśvajic ca
taṃ ghoṣārthe gīrbhir indrāḥ stuvanti sa cāpīśo bhārataikaḥ paśūnām
hiraṇmayaḥ saptagūḍhaḥ sasaṃvic caturbāhuḥ padmagaḥ padmanābhaḥ
tam ṛksahasraiḥ puruṣaṃ purāṇaṃ suparṇam ādau cayanaiḥ stuvanti
vaśe sthitaṃ tasya samastayoneḥ
ṛtūn māsān vividhaṃ kāryajātaṃ vidyutsaṃghair āpatantaś ca meghāḥ
sṛṣṭvā viśvaṃ viśvayonir mahātmā tatrātiṣṭhad viśvarūpo hi yogāt
tādṛśaḥ keśavo devo bhūyo nārāyaṇaḥ paraḥ ādir antaś ca madhyaṃ ca deśataḥ kālato hariḥ jagatāṃ tasthuṣāṃ caiva bhūtānāṃ prabhavāpyayaḥ
vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ pitāmahavacaḥ śrutvā rājaṃs te prapitāmahaḥ praṇamya puṇḍarīkākṣam idaṃ vacanam abravīt
dvāravatyāṃ samāsīnaṃ purā māṃ kurunandana
trivarge cāpavarge ca yaśaḥśrīrogaśāntiṣu devatāpitṛpūjāsu saṃtoṣyā eva no dvijāḥ
roṣaṇaṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ sūkṣme 'py apakṛte kṛte
adahat sa mahātejās tataś cābhyapatat svayam
śivaḥ sarvagato rudraḥ sraṣṭā yas taṃ śṛṇuṣva me
tatkṣaṇād eva kuryāt sa bhasma vahniśikhā yathā
yudhiṣṭhiraḥ tripurāṇi mahābāho jitavān sa maheśvaraḥ ācakṣva me yathātattvaṃ sarvajña madhusūdana śṛṇu me gadatas tāta yathā dagdhaṃ puratrayam
rudraṃ taṃ raudrakarmāṇi sarvāstrakuśalaṃ prabhum
hatāni petuḥ sahasā vipule sāgarāmbhasi
sa vai rudraḥ sa ca śivaḥ so 'gniḥ śarvaḥ sa sarvajit
bhaktānugrahaṇārthāya gūḍhaliṅgas tataḥ smṛtaḥ
prahṛṣṭaś caiva śaṃkaraḥ sukhaṃ vittaṃ paraṃ loke
hetunāmantrite vāpi dharmaśāstreṇa cottamam
ye dharmam abhyasūyante te dharmaṃ paryupāsate
satyārjavaparāyaṇāḥ eteṣāṃ dharmaśīlānāṃ

sāmānyaṃ bhojanaṃ kuryāt svayaṃ nāgryāśanaṃ vrajet na satyārjavadharmasya tulyam anyac ca vidyate bahulā nāma gaus tena gatim agryāṃ gatā kila muniśāpād dvijaḥ kaś cid vyāghratāṃ samupāgataḥ bahulāṃ bhakṣaṇarucim āsvādya śapathena tu vimucya pītavatsāṃ tāṃ dṛṣṭvā smṛtvā purātanam jagāma lokān amalān sā svarāṣṭraṃ tathā punaḥ tasmāt satyārjavarato rājā rāṣṭraṃ samānavam tārayitvā sukhaṃ svargaṃ gantāsi bharatarṣabha
dānāgāre gavāṃ caiva brāhmaṇānāṃ ca saṃnidhau
tad dharmasādhanaṃ nityaṃ saṃkalpād dhanam ārjayet
tat kathaṃ labhate kena tan me tvaṃ vaktum arhasi
bhāvaśuddhis tu tapasā devatānāṃ ca pūjayā sanātanena śuddhyā ca śrutadānajapair api

pālaya tvaṃ prajāḥ sarvāḥ śāntātmā cānuśāsitaḥ dvaipāyanas tv ayaṃ cakṣuḥ kṛṣṇas te 'stu parāyaṇam ity uktvopāsanārthāya virarāma mahāmatiḥ pañcabhūtaśarīrāṇāṃ sarveṣāṃ sadṛśātmanām lokadharme ca dharme ca viśeṣakaraṇaṃ kṛtam yatraikatvaṃ punar yānti prāṇinas tatra vistaraḥ adhruvo hi kathaṃ lokaḥ smṛto dharmaḥ kathaṃ dhruvaḥ yatra kālo dhruvas tāta tatra dharmaḥ sanātanaḥ sarveṣāṃ tulyadehānāṃ sarveṣāṃ sadṛśātmanām kālo dharmeṇa saṃyuktaḥ śeṣa eva susaṃgrahaḥ evaṃ sati na doṣo 'sti bhūtānāṃ dharmasevane tiryagyonāv api satāṃ loka eva mato guruḥ
vaiśaṃpāyana uvāca śaratalpagataṃ bhīṣmaṃ pāṇḍavo 'tha kurūdvahaḥ yudhiṣṭhiro hitaprepsur apṛcchat kalmaṣāpaham
tasmai śuśrūṣamāṇāya bhūyaḥ śāṃtanavas tadā devavaṃśaṃ yathānyāyam ācaṣṭa puruṣarṣabha

yudhiṣṭhiraḥ yad ahnā kurute pāpam indriyaiḥ puruṣaś caran buddhipūrvam abuddhir vā rātrau yaś cāpi saṃdhyayoḥ mucyate sarvapāpebhyaḥ kīrtayan vai śuciḥ sadā nāndho na badhiraḥ kāle kurute svastimān sadā tiryagyoniṃ na gacchec ca narakaṃ saṃkarāṇi ca na ca duḥkhabhayaṃ tasya maraṇe na sa muhyati
viṣṇor nābhisarojāto brahmā bhuvanapāvanaḥ
ananto nāgarājaś ca vāsukis takṣakas tathā mahāpadmaś ca vikhyātaḥ karkoṭakadhanaṃjayau
carmaṇvatī nadī puṇyā kauśikī yamunā tathā
etāḥ pāpaharāḥ sarvā devanadyaḥ prakīrtitāḥ
rājā rathaṃtaraś caiva bhārgavaś cyavanas tathā
udarkaś caiva māndhātā tathaivoḍo mahodayaḥ
jahnur jāhnavisevitaḥ ādirājaḥ pṛthur vainyo
pṛthus tathoparicaraḥ kekayaś ca mahāyaśāḥ
kalyam utthāya yo nityaṃ saṃdhye dve 'stamayodaye paṭhec chucir anāvṛttaḥ sa dharmaphalabhāg bhavet devā devarṣayaś caiva stutā rājarṣayas tathā puṣṭim āyur yaśaḥ svargaṃ vidhāsyanti mameśvarāḥ
avikārāya śuddhāya nityāya paramātmane sadaikarūparūpāya viṣṇave prabhaviṣṇave

janamejaya uvāca śaratalpagate bhīṣme kauravāṇāṃ dhuraṃdhare śayāne vīraśayane pāṇḍavaiḥ samupasthite yudhiṣṭhiro mahāprājño mama pūrvapitāmahaḥ dharmāṇām āgamaṃ śrutvā viditvā dharmasaṃśayān dānānāṃ ca vidhiṃ śrutvā chinnadharmārthasaṃśayaḥ vaiśaṃpāyana uvāca abhūn muhūrtaṃ stimitaṃ sarvaṃ tad rājamaṇḍalam

tataś ca puṇḍarīkākṣam āha dharmabhṛtāṃ varaḥ bhagavan yogayukto 'si tūṣṇīṃ dhyāyasi śatruhan brūhi māṃ puruṣaśreṣṭha ājñāpyo bhavatā hy aham śrībhagavān śaratalpagato bhīṣmaḥ śāmyann iva hutāśanaḥ māṃ dhyāti puruṣavyāghras tato me tadgataṃ manaḥ
bhrātṝṃś caiva puraskṛtya mātaraṃ ca pṛthām api
dhyāyantaṃ paramātmānaṃ kṛṣṇadharmaṃ sanātanam
dvaipāyanaprabhṛtibhir munibhiḥ pratinanditaḥ
mādhavena mahārājaḥ kṛṣṇenākliṣṭakarmaṇā
vāsudevo hiraṇyātmā puruṣaḥ savitā virāṭ jīvabhūto 'nurūpas tvaṃ paramātmā sanātanaḥ tvadbhaktaṃ tvadgatasvāntam adāram aparigraham trāyasva puṇḍarīkākṣa puruṣottama nityaśaḥ
duryodhanaṃ durācāraṃ kṣatriyāntakaraṃ raṇe
suhṛdbhiḥ sahito rājan bhuṅkṣva rājyam akaṇṭakam
sa māṃ tvam anujānīhi kṛṣṇa mokṣye kalevaram tvayāhaṃ samanujñāto gaccheyaṃ paramāṃ gatim
dhanaṃ bahuvidhaṃ rājan dattvā nityaṃ dvijātiṣu
devaduṃdubhinādaś ca puṣpavarṣaiḥ sahābhavat siddhā brahmarṣayaś caiva sādhu sādhv iti harṣitāḥ
candanānāṃ ca khaṇḍāni mahārghāṇi bahūni ca

ity etad bahuvistāram ānuśāsanikaṃ śubham yatroktāḥ sarvadharmāś ca parvaṇy asmiṃs trayodaśe śrutvā yān svasthatām āpa dharmaputro yudhiṣṭhiraḥ bhīṣmād bhāgīrathīputrāt sarvasaṃdehahāriṇaḥ etat trayodaśaṃ parva dharmaniścayakārakam adhyāyānāṃ śataṃ cātra ṣaṭcatvāriṃśad eva tu nava ślokasahasrāṇi śatāny aṣṭau tathaiva ca vyāsenodāramatinā dṛṣṭo grantho mahātmanā ānuśāsanikaṃ parva śrutvā bhaktisamanvitaḥ mucyate sarvapāpebhyaḥ sarvadharmaphalaṃ labhet nārāyaṇaṃ pūjayitvā bhaktyā paramayā tataḥ bhīṣmoddeśena kartavyaṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ ca tarpaṇam vyāsarūpī hariḥ sākṣāt paśyatām iti kīrtayet dadyād dhenuhiraṇyādi vācakāya viśeṣataḥ sarvakāmān avāpnoti dīrgham āyuś ca vindati dvaipāyanaprasādena nityam utsavavān bhavet
dvaipāyanoṣṭhapuṭaniḥsṛtam aprameyaṃ puṇyaṃ pavitram atha pāpaharaṃ śivaṃ ca yo bhārataṃ samadhigacchati vācyamānaṃ kiṃ tasya puṣkarajalair abhiṣecanena
śuklāmbaradharaṃ viṣṇuṃ śaśivarṇaṃ caturbhujam prasannavadanaṃ dhyāyet sarvavighnopaśāntaye
vināśam upayāsyanti tava putrā na saṃśayaḥ
atithīn annapānena kāmair anyair akiṃcanān
kṛtakṛtyo bhaviṣyāmi iti me niścitā matiḥ
yathā vai kāmajāṃ māyāṃ parityaktuṃ tvam arhasi
pūyante tu narā rājaṃs tasmād yajñāḥ parāyaṇam
kośaś cāpi viśīrṇo 'yaṃ paripūrṇo bhaviṣyati
kāraṃdhama iti khyāto babhūva jagatīpatiḥ
śayanāni ca mukhyāni mahārhāṇi ca sarvaśaḥ
yatra sākṣān mahādevo dehānte parameśvaraḥ vyācaṣṭe tārakajñānaṃ jantūnām apavargadam
yojanīyo 'ham adhunā bhavatā munisattama
na māṃ rocayate rājyam ayājyaṃ mām amānuṣam
brahmādayaś ca maruto munayo 'dhyātmacintakāḥ
tatra gatvā tvam anvāsya mahāyogeśvaraṃ śivam kuru praṇāmaṃ rājarṣe bhaktyā paramayā yutaḥ
ebhis tvaṃ nāmabhir devaṃ sarvavidyādhipaṃ stuhi
bahurūpāya śarvāya priyāya priyavāsase
lelihānāya gotrāya siddhamantrāya vṛṣṇaye
vilohitāya dīptāya dīptākṣāya mahaujase
anantaṃ śāśvataṃ devaṃ triśṛṅgaṃ vṛṣabhekṣaṇam

virocamānaṃ vapuṣā divyābharaṇabhūṣitam anādyantam ajaṃ śaṃbhuṃ sarvavyāpinam īśvaram nistraiguṇyaṃ nirudvegaṃ nirmalaṃ nidhim ojasām praṇamya prāñjaliḥ śarvaṃ prayāmi śaraṇaṃ haram sāmānyaṃ niścalaṃ nityam akāraṇam alepanam adhyātmavedam āsādya prayāmi śaraṇaṃ muhuḥ yasya nityaṃ viduḥ sthānaṃ mokṣam adhyātmacintakāḥ yoginas tattvamārgasthāḥ kaivalyaṃ padam akṣaram yaṃ viduḥ saṅganirmuktāḥ sāmānyaṃ samadarśinaḥ taṃ prapadye jagadyonim ayoniṃ nirguṇātmakam asṛjad yas tu bhūtādīn sapta lokān sanātanān sthitaḥ satyopari sthāṇus taṃ prapadye sanātanam bhaktānāṃ sulabhaṃ taṃ hi durlabhaṃ dūrapātinām adūrastham ajaṃ devaṃ prakṛteḥ parataḥ sthitam namāmi sarvalokasthaṃ vrajāmi śaraṇaṃ śivam
labhante gāṇapatyaṃ ca tadekāgrā hi mānavāḥ kiṃ punaḥ svarṇabhāṇḍāni tasmāt tvaṃ gaccha mā ciram mahattaraṃ hi te lābhaṃ hastyaśvoṣṭrādibhiḥ saha
gaṅgādharaṃ namaskṛtya labdhavān dhanam uttamam kubera iva tat prāpya mahādevaprasādataḥ
ubhābhyāṃ vadhyate moho vidhānam idam ucyate
sarve kāmā manaso 'ṅgāt prasūtā yān paṇḍitaḥ saṃharate vicintya bhūyo bhūyo janmano 'bhyāsayogād yogī yogaṃ sāramārgaṃ vicintya
tathā vidhatsva viprarṣe tvayyāyattaḥ sa me kratuḥ
kathayām āsa yogena kathayām anupūrvaśaḥ (sic)
na ca śakyaḥ punar vaktum aśeṣeṇa dhanaṃjaya
paripṛṣṭaś ca sa tadā yad āha dvijasattamaḥ
loke 'sminn anubhūyāham imaṃ mārgam anuṣṭhitaḥ
siddhaḥ asminn evāśubhaphalā āyuṣyās tu kriyāḥ smṛtāḥ
arvāg gatir iyaṃ kaṣṭā yatra pacyanti mānavāḥ
śubhapradāni yāny āhus tāni kuryāc ca buddhimān
sadbhir ācarito dharmaḥ sadācāre pratiṣṭhitaḥ ubhayārtho bhavaty eva svargārtho mokṣadas tathā
nityam eva yathānyāyaṃ yaś caren niyatendriyaḥ
sarvasaṃsthānanirmukto nirmamo niṣparigrahaḥ upaśāmyendriyagrāmaṃ yaś caren mukta eva saḥ
samyag yuktvā sa ātmānam ātmany evāvatiṣṭhate
sadaiva muktasaṃsāro bhavaty ātmani yogataḥ
dehān yatheṣṭam abhyeti hitvemāṃ mānuṣīṃ tanum
sarvataḥśrutimaṃl loke sarvam āvṛtya tiṣṭhati
tad evam āśrayaṃ kṛtvā mokṣaṃ yāti tato mayi
mantavye 'py atha boddhavye subhage paśya sarvadā

śrutvā cittaṃ srug ity eva manaś cittaṃ tad ucyate tayor viviktā nāgāsīd acalā śabdalakṣaṇā nagneva yoṣā savrīḍā sā vāsaḥ paryavekṣate tasmāt saṃjajñire varṇāḥ svarā mantrās tathaiva ca etac ca naḥ sarasvatyāḥ prajāpatir athābravīt indraḥ prajāpatir mitram agnayo daśa bhāmini daśendriyāṇi hotṝṇi havīṃṣi daśa bhāmini viṣayā nāma samidho hūyante tu daśāgniṣu
ghrāṇaṃ cakṣuś ca śrotraṃ ca tvag jihvā buddhir eva ca
śreṣṭho 'ham asmi sarveṣāṃ śrūyatāṃ yena hetunā
tato vyānaḥ samānaṃ tu prāṇāpānau tathocatuḥ
yo hṛcchayas tam aham anubravīmi
visṛjanto mahāvṛkṣā vyāpya tiṣṭhanti tad vanam
naujaṃ tu dehāni tathā sametya (sic)
indriyārtheṣu sarveṣu buddhis teṣv iha gṛdhyati tasmād buddhiṃ prati śarān atimokṣyāmy ahaṃ śitān
anyān bāṇān samīkṣasva yais tvaṃ māṃ sūdayiṣyasi
bhogatṛṣṇāsamāyuktaiḥ pūrvaṃ rājyam upāsitam
ity uktaḥ pitṛbhiḥ so 'tha tapo ghoraṃ samāsthitaḥ jāmadagnyo mahābhāgaḥ siddhiṃ ca paramāṃ gataḥ
etair doṣaiḥ punar dehī badhyamānaḥ punaḥ punaḥ bhuktvā vai rājasān bhogāñ jāyate karma cehate
yathā mama tathānyeṣām iti manye dvijottama

tvad anyaḥ kaś ca na praśnān etān vaktum ihārhati brūhi dharmavidāṃ śreṣṭha paraṃ kautūhalaṃ mama mokṣadharmārthakuśalo bhavāṃl lokeṣu gīyate sarvasaṃśayasaṃchettā tvad anyo na ca vidyate saṃsārabhīravaś caiva mokṣakāmās tathā vayam
naiṣṭhiko 'tha yatir vāpi vibhakto brahmacāriṇaḥ
tāmasaṃ rūpam etat tu dṛśyate cāpi saṃgatam
āśīryuktāni karmāṇi paurtāni vividhāni ca
dānaṃ pratigrahaś caiva prāyaścittāni maṅgalam
pretyabhāvakarīṃ siddhim īhante rājasā janāḥ
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi sarvaṃ vividham indriyam
raso 'dhibhūtaṃ vijñeyam āpas tatrādhidaivatam
ahaṃkāras tathādhyātmaṃ sarvasaṃsārakārakam abhimāno 'dhibhūtaṃ ca rudras tatrādhidaivatam
etad eva hi loke 'smin mano hṛdi samāśritam
dṛśyam ādityam evāhur adhyātmaviduṣo janāḥ
pañcendriyamahākūlāṃ manovegamahodakām
trīṇi dhārayate nityaṃ kamaṇḍalum atandritaḥ ekam ācamanārthāya ekaṃ vai pādadhāvanam ekaṃ śaucavidhānārtham ity etat tritayaṃ tathā
na cātibhikṣāṃ bhikṣeta kevalaṃ prāṇayātrikaḥ
**** **** tattvajñānāsinā budhaḥ hitvā saṅgamayān pāśān mṛtyujanmajarodayān
guruṇā śiṣyam āsādya yad uktaṃ tan nibodhata
tat padaṃ samanuprāptaṃ yatra gatvā na śocati tvam apy etan mahābhāga yathoktaṃ brahmavarcasā vyaktaḥ sattvaguṇas tv evaṃ buddhimān sukham edhate
rasanaṃ rūpasaṃsparśaṃ śabdavan manyate manaḥ yat paraś ca tato buddhyā
sarvabhūtātmabhūtātmā gacchaty ātmānam akṣaram
ya evam amṛtaṃ nityam agrāhyaṃ śaśvad akṣaram vaśyātmānam asaṃśliṣṭaṃ yo veda na mṛto bhavet
niḥsaṅgenaiva tat sarvaṃ nirāśīpādalopanāt

yad iṣṭaṃ kuru sarvasyāpīśvaro 'smān prapālaya namas te sarvalokātman nārāyaṇa parātpara manomalāt tapo 'śakyaṃ karma cāvidyayā hatam dānam apy arthadoṣeṇa nāma tasmāt kalau smaret yadi gantuṃ kṛtā buddhir vāsudeva namo 'stu te
bhaktāṃs tvam āśritān asmān pālayāmutra ceha ca
bhavāmi satataṃ kṛṣṇa tathā kuru mahāmate
tasmāt tvam eva saṃcintya hitaṃ kuru yathā tathā
mahātmānau mahāvīryau tathā pādau vavandatuḥ
pariṣvajya mahātmānaṃ vaiśyāputraṃ mahāratham
ity ukte dharmarājena phalgunaḥ pratyabhāṣata
svargāpavargaviṣayaṃ tvadbhaktānāṃ na durlabham saṃsāragahane tv adya pāpāgniṃ praśamāmbuda
maharṣiṃ siddhatapasaṃ sarvalokāntaviśrutam
nāśakyanta yadā sāmye te sthāpayitum añjasā
yathā tu militaṃ sarvaṃ mahyaṃ bhīṣmasya saṃgaram
sthitisṛṣṭilayādhyakṣo viṣṇubrahmeśasaṃjñitaḥ kadā cit tamasā rudro viṣṇuḥ sattvaguṇe sthitaḥ rajasy api tathā brahmā guṇād anyaguṇānugau praṇavātmā ca śabdādīṃs triguṇātmā carācaram
**** **** yakṣagandharvarākṣasān nāgān apsarasaś caiva
sahasrasūryapratimaṃ dīptimat pāvakopamam sarvam ākāśam āvṛtya tiṣṭhantaṃ viśvatomukham tad dṛṣṭvā paramaṃ rūpaṃ viṣṇor vaiṣṇavam adbhutam

namo namas te sarvātman nārāyaṇa parātpara paramātman padmanābha puṇḍarīkākṣa mādhava hiraṇyagarbharūpāya saṃsārottāraṇāya ca puruṣāya purāṇāya cāntaryāmāya te namaḥ avidyātimirādityaṃ bhavavyādhimahauṣadham saṃsārārṇavapāraṃ tvāṃ praṇamāmi gatir bhava sarvavedaikavedyāya sarvadevamayāya ca vāsudevāya nityāya namo bhaktipriyāya te dayayā duḥkhamohān māṃ samuddhartum ihārhasi karmabhir bahubhiḥ pāpair baddhaṃ pāhi janārdana
muniṃ vitrastamanasaṃ dṛṣṭvā kṛṣṇo mahāmanāḥ manasā suprasannena prīyamāṇo janārdanaḥ
sa tathā tena rūpeṇa vāsavas tvām upāgataḥ
na cānyām api paśyāmi gatiṃ gatimatāṃ vara
bilvaprahārais tasyātha vyaśīryād bandhanaṃ tathā sakuṇḍalaṃ tad ajinaṃ papāta sahasā taroḥ nyapataṃs tāni bilvāni tasminn evājine vibho
ahāni triṃśad avyagraḥ pañca cānyāni bhārata
yatra te kuṇḍale nīte bhujagena dvijottama
vāsukipramukhānāṃ ca nāgānāṃ janamejaya sarvaṃ śaśaṃsa gurave yathāvad dvijasattamaḥ
mālyotkarayuto vīṇāveṇuśaṅkhamṛdaṅgavān

stuvanty antarhitā devā gandharvāś ca saharṣibhiḥ sādhakaḥ sarvadharmāṇām asurāṇāṃ vināśakaḥ tvaṃ sraṣṭā sṛjyam ādhāraṃ kāraṇaṃ dharmavedavit tvayā yat kriyate deva na jānīmo 'tra māyayā kevalaṃ tv abhijānīmaḥ śaraṇaṃ parameśvaram brahmādīnāṃ ca govinda saṃnidhyaṃ śaraṇaṃ namaḥ iti stute mānuṣaiś ca pūjite devakīsute
dṛṣṭvā samāgataṃ kṛṣṇaṃ snehena muśalāyudhaḥ vanamālī halī rāmaḥ paryaṣvajata keśavam kṛṣṇo 'pi bhrātaraṃ rāmaṃ yatnāt samabhivādya ca
ayudhyamānaṃ gāṅgeyaṃ śikhaṇḍī taṃ mahādyutim
kṛtvā vyūhaṃ mahāyuddhe pātayitvā mahārathān antakapratimaś cogro rātriyuddhe dahan prajāḥ
pratāpya pāṇḍavān sarvān pāñcālān astratejasā saputraḥ samare karṇaḥ saṃśāntaḥ pārthatejasā
ākhyāpayan mahat tatra hy abhimanyor vadhaṃ raṇe
evaṃ vilapatīṃ tāṃ tu sātyakis tu tadābravīt
**** **** śūlapāṇiṃ trilocanam anādinidhanaṃ śaṃbhuṃ namasyāma maheśvaram lokanāthaṃ gaṇādhyakṣaṃ

sa hi devaḥ prasannātmā bhaktānāṃ parameśvaraḥ dadāty amaratāṃ cāpi kiṃ punaḥ kāñcanaṃ prabhuḥ vanasthasya purā jiṣṇor astraṃ pāśupataṃ mahat raudraṃ brahmaśiraś cādāt prasannaḥ kiṃ punar dhanam vayaṃ sarve hi tadbhaktāḥ sa cāsmākaṃ prasīdati tatprasādād vayaṃ rājyaṃ prāptāḥ kauravanandana abhimanyor vadhe vṛtte pratijñāte dhanaṃjaye jayadrathavadhārthāya svapne lokagurur niśi prasādya labdhavān astram arjunaḥ sahakeśavaḥ tataḥ prabhātāṃ rajanīṃ phalgunasyāgrataḥ prabhuḥ jaghāna sainyaṃ śūlena pratyakṣaṃ savyasācinaḥ kas tāṃ senāṃ tadā rājan manasāpi pradharṣayet droṇakarṇakṛpair guptāṃ maheśvāsaiḥ prahāribhiḥ ṛte devān maheśvāsād bahurūpān maheśvarāt tasyaiva ca prasādena nihatāḥ śatravas tava aśvamedhasya saṃsiddhiṃ sa tu saṃpādayiṣyati
prayayuḥ pāṇḍavā vīrā niyamasthāḥ śucivratāḥ
odanaṃ kumbhaśaḥ kṛtvā purodhāḥ samupāharat brāhmaṇebhyaḥ sahasrāṇi gavāṃ dattvā tu bhūmipaḥ naktaṃcarāṇāṃ bhūtānāṃ vyādideśa baliṃ tadā dhūpagandhaniruddhaṃ tat sumanobhiś ca saṃvṛtam
**** **** jīvati tvayi mānada pāṇḍavān api sarvāṃs tvaṃ
brahmāstreṇāsya bālasya garbhasthasya nikṛntanam
yadi me brahmacaryaṃ syāt satyaṃ ca mayi saṃsthitam avyāhataṃ mamaiśvaryaṃ tena jīvatu bālakaḥ
pādena kamalābhena brahmarudrārcitena ca sa spṛṣṭvā puṇḍarīkākṣa āpādatalamastakam spṛṣṭamātras tu kṛṣṇena sa hi bālo 'bhimanyujaḥ
pitāmahasamāno 'yaṃ parīkṣid bhavitā nṛpaḥ

merukūṭanibhān bhāṇḍān kalaśān bhājanāni ca kṛtākṛtaṃ mahad dhemam ādāya puruṣottamāḥ bhārārtair vāhanais tatra gorute gorute pathi nivasanto yayur devaṃ smarantaḥ parameṣṭhinam nāsīt tatra naraḥ kaś cid abhārārto nṛpaṃ vinā bhīmādayo 'pi yajñārthaṃ vahante kiṃ punar janāḥ
**** **** prayayau sasuhṛdgaṇaḥ te sametya yathānyāyaṃ
**** **** mahīṃ sāgaramekhalām rakṣitaḥ paryaṭann eva yaśovardhana tavāyatam
na vivyādha raṇe kruddhaḥ kuntīputro hasann iva saubhadrasyeva tat karma dṛṣṭvā bālasya vismitaḥ
babhūva sadṛśaṃ rūpaṃ śakracāpasya bhārata
hatāvaśiṣṭā hi purā pārthaṃ dṛṣṭaparākramāḥ
āgacchadhvaṃ nṛpatayaḥ parāṃ caitrīm upasthitām yudhiṣṭhirasyāśvamedho bhavadbhir anubhūyatām
dodhūyamānena tathā cāmareṇa mahārathaḥ
jitvā prasādya rājānaṃ bhagadattasutaṃ tadā visṛjya yāte turage saindhavān prati bhārata
evaṃ nirjitya tān vīrān saindhavān sa dhanaṃjayaḥ
sutīkṣṇair ātmajaṃ vīraṃ prahasan pāṇḍavarṣabha
hṛdi vivyādha bāṇena dṛḍhena jagatīpatiḥ
papāta so 'pi dharaṇīm āliṅgya raṇamūrdhani
**** **** śilpa ity api pāragaḥ
parājito 'smi bhadraṃ te nāhaṃ yoddhum ihotsahe yac ca kṛtyaṃ mayā te 'dya tad brūhi kṛtam eva tu
tāṃś cāpi vijayo jitvā nātitīvreṇa karmaṇā
te nyavartanta gāndhārā hataśiṣṭāḥ svakaṃ puram
yajñaślāghyaṃ tadā sthānaṃ sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyutam
prāsādaśatasaṃbādhaṃ maṇipravarakuṭṭikam
pratyudgamya namaskṛtya brāhmaṇāṃś ca nyavedayat
varṇāḥ pṛthak saṃniviṣṭā hy uttarottarapūjitāḥ
śrīmannāmā ca bhavatu janānāṃ puṇyadaḥ prabhuḥ
sarve rājan yathānyāyam ānītā nṛpaśāsanāt
aniśaṃ dīyate ca sma tatra bhojyaṃ pṛthagvidham
yajñeśo yajñapuruṣaḥ sarvavedāntaveditaḥ devāś ca munayo viprā manasā vandya keśavam pratyutthitās tatas tatra praviveśa sa mādhavaḥ
atīva duḥkhabhāgī sa satataṃ pāṇḍunandanaḥ
saumyātmany amṛtādhāre pariṣvakte sukhaṃ yayau
tatra vṛddhān yathā vatsa kurūn anyāṃś ca pārthivān
abhivādya mahābāhus taiś cāpi pratinanditaḥ
**** **** mātṛbhyāṃ sahito vaśī praśrayāvanataḥ kuntyā gāndhāryāś ca yathāvidhi vavande caraṇau tatra
sarvān etān yathāśāstraṃ yājakāḥ samayojayan
sarvaśāstrapraṇetāraḥ kuśalā yajñakarmasu
govindaṃ ca mahātmānaṃ baladevaṃ mahābalam tathānyān vṛṣṇivīrāṃś ca pradyumnādīn sahasraśaḥ pūjayitvā mahārāja yathāvidhi mahādyutiḥ bhrātṛbhiḥ sahito rājā prāsthāpayad ariṃdamaḥ
**** **** tatra śabdo mahān abhūt pīyatāṃ dīyatāṃ ceti
ātmānumānato vidvān sa tu viprarṣabhas tadā
dharmakāmārthakāryāṇi śuśrūṣā kulasaṃtatiḥ dāreṣv adhīno dharmaś ca pitṝṇām ātmanas tathā na vetti karmato bhāryārakṣaṇe yo 'kṣamaḥ pumān ayaśo mahad āpnoti narakāṃś caiva gacchati
tam uvāca tataḥ putraḥ pitaraṃ dīnamānasam praśrayāvanato bhūtvā hetuyuktam idaṃ vacaḥ
putro 'haṃ tava viprarṣe tvayā pālyo 'smi sarvadā idānīṃ tu imān saktūn dīyatāṃ kṣudhitāya ca
praśrayeṇa tathā buddhyā vṛttyā kṣāntyā tathaiva ca
gantāśu devavarṣāṇi anantāni mahāmate
prītātmā devatāḥ sarve yate na tapasā tathā
nṛṇāṃ puṇyaṃ sa śaktyā ca varjitaṃ garjanaṃ tadā
saktuprasthena vo nāyaṃ yajñas tulyo matir mama
yajñais tapobhir vipulai rājāno dvijasattamāḥ iha loke parāṃ kīrtiṃ vimucya divi saṃsthitāḥ
iti hetor mahārāja nakulo 'garhayac ca tat karma rājño mahābuddhe dharmaḥ sūkṣmo mahīpate
dharmasaṃśayam āpannān satyaṃ brūhi mahāmate
tasmān na vācyaṃ hy ekena bahujñenāpi saṃśaye prajāpatim apāhāya svayaṃbhuvam ṛte prabhum
**** **** yo hi dadyād yajeta vā na tasya sa phalaṃ pretya bhuṅkte pāpadhanāgamāt
dhyeyātmanā hariṣyāmi yajñān etān yatavrataḥ yadi dvādaśavarṣāṇi na varṣiṣyati vāsavaḥ
tasya dīptāgnimahasas tv agastyasyātitejasaḥ
vipine tatra nakulo nakulo 'ntarhitas tadā
jite tasmin bhṛguśreṣṭham abhyabhāṣad amarṣaṇaḥ
tenāpy ukto mahārāja dharmarājasya vai tadā aśvamedhe tadāgantā śāpān mukto bhaviṣyati

etat puṇyaṃ mahārāja śṛṇvatāṃ bhuktimuktidam śrotā ca śrāvako yaś ca sa yāti paramāṃ gatim vāsudevo harir viṣṇur ananto bhaktavatsalaḥ ā samāpter jagannātho yajñaṃ rakṣitavān hariḥ rakṣitvā sa mahābāhur jagāma dvārakāṃ purīm
kastūrinikarākāraṃ vastūtīkṛtarakṣaṇam (sic) astu bhūr dadhidugdhābhyām astu muktyaiva muktaye
etāś cānyāś ca bahvyo vai yoṣito bharatarṣabha
kauravaś caiva bhīmaś ca hṛdānyonyam amṛṣyatām dhyāyantau ślakṣṇayā vācā anyonyām abhitiṣṭhatām
asakṛc cāpy uvācedaṃ hatās te mandacetasaḥ
asakṛc cāpy uvācedaṃ hatās te mandacetasaḥ
imau pīnau suvṛttau me nāgarājakaropamau yāv āsādya raṇe mūḍhā dhārtarāṣṭrāḥ kṣayaṃ gatāḥ
śrutvā nirvedam āpede bhīmavāgbāṇacoditaḥ
kuntyāḥ saparyāṃ saṃvīkṣya śāpe nāsyākaron matim
sukhāsaktaṃ kṛcchraparaṃ jñātvā caiva yudhiṣṭhiram tapoyogāt tapas taptuṃ manaś cakre mahāmatiḥ
sa bhīmavākyāgnividīpitāṅgo nirviṇṇacetā nṛpatiḥ saśokaḥ sapaurabhṛtyaṃ janam ānināya vanaṃ yiyāsur vacanaṃ babhāṣe
vartamāneṣu sadvṛttiṃ pāṇḍaveṣu mahātmasu prītimānam abhavad rājā kuntīputro yudhiṣṭhiraḥ
tasya trailokyanāthasya samupetyābhiyācataḥ akṛtvā vacanaṃ paścāt tapsyāmy adya sudurmatiḥ
hataṃ śataṃ tu putrāṇāṃ yayor yuddhe 'palāyinām
vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ tarasā manasā dhyātvā gamanaṃ sa vanaṃ prati tasya rājñas tadā rājā provācedaṃ vacaḥ śubham
uvāca rājadharmajño dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ śubhaṃ vacaḥ
svastho bhavatv ayaṃ dhīmān vaneṣu madhugandhiṣu
alubdhaiś cāsya vyasanibhiḥ snigdhair ātmasamaiḥ sadā
na vṛthā vyavatiṣṭheta pārihāryādibhūṣaṇam prayojyaṃ sarvadeveha māṅgalyaṃ pāpanāśanam
anantaraṃ hi pitaram anujāto yudhiṣṭhiraḥ nātra kiṃ cin mṛṣā jātu bhaviteti matir mama
ghātitāḥ kuravo yac ca pṛthivī ca vināśitā
caturṇāṃ lokapālānāṃ madhye viparivartate
