evam eṣa mahābāhur bhīmārjunayamair vṛtaḥ
ity evaṃ bruvatas tasya dhṛtarāṣṭrasya dhīmataḥ
priyāṇi kurvan sarveṣām anuvṛttyartham udyataḥ
na sa rājñāṃ vadhe sūnuḥ kāraṇaṃ te mahātmanām
veda dharmaṃ mahābāho laukyaṃ vaidikam eva ca
dṛṣṭipradānam api te pāṇḍavān prati no vṛthā
āgatāyāṃ ca śarvaryāṃ sukhaṃ śete narādhipaḥ
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā phalgunasya mahātmanaḥ viduraṃ prāha dharmātmā kuntīputro yudhiṣṭhiraḥ
nakulaḥ sahadevaś ca tad anujñātavān vibho
itīdam ukto vidureṇa rājā tasyābhinandyātha vaco vicintya gantuṃ sa cakre vanam eva vegāt tadā manaḥ kārtikapaurṇamāsyām
vanaṃ viveśa dharmātmā śatacityo mahīpatiḥ
mādryā saha mahātmānam indrārdhāsanasaṃsthitam yudhiṣṭhirādisatputrakṛtapuṇyopabṛṃhitam
tatra tatra kathā hy āsan dvijānāṃ kauravān prati
te śokavegābhihatā vicetaso dine dine taiḥ puravāsibhiḥ saha vihāya bhogān pararāṣṭramardanāḥ pratyaktakāmās tv avatasthur ādṛtāḥ
tayos tu pādayo rājan nyapatan hataputrayoḥ
iyaṃ ca jāmbūnadaśuddhagaurī pārthasya bhāryā bhujagendrakanyā citrāṅgadā caiva narendrakanyā yaiṣā savarṇāgryamadhūkapuṣpaiḥ
kaccit te 'pi nirātaṅkā vasanti viṣaye tava
sarve te āśramā varṇā dharmasthā ye ca vittamāḥ
**** **** dhṛtarāṣṭrasya dhīmataḥ jagāma sa vanaṃ rājā dharmarājo yudhiṣṭhiraḥ dṛśyate viduras tatra
tūṣṇīṃ gacchantam ekāgre viduraṃ samudaikṣata
na dagdhavyo na dagdhavya eṣa rājan mahātapāḥ jñānadagdhasya dehasya punardāho na vidyate
atha rājābravīd vṛddhaḥ kururājo yudhiṣṭhiram
tat sarvaṃ pradadau rājā kuntīputro yudhiṣṭhiraḥ
pratyakṣaṃ pūjito yena cittasthaś cinmayo hariḥ śuddhāśayasya bhaktyā ca saṃbhramārādhitaḥ purā
vanavāsagataṃ rājan dhṛtarāṣṭraṃ mahīpatim yudhiṣṭhiro 'bhyayād draṣṭuṃ sasainyo bhrātṛbhiḥ saha prathame divase caiṣām āpo mūlaṃ phalaṃ tathā bhojanaṃ bhūmiśayyā ca tatrāsīd bharatarṣabha
prāpto 'smi kuruśārdūla saṃśayacchedanāya vaḥ
bhogāṃś ca vividhāṃs tāta iṣṭāpūrtāṃs tathaiva ca
lokāntaragatān putrān ayaṃ kāṅkṣati mānada tac cāsya mānasaṃ jñātaṃ bhagavaṃs tapasā tvayā
tam ahaṃ bhayasaṃvignā yāce sānunayaṃ dvijam
sthityarthaṃ tena devena buddhis te parivartitā
gāṅgeyo vasuvīryeṇa devo mānuṣatāṃ gataḥ
pratīkṣya tasthus te sarve teṣām āgamanaṃ prati
yad varma yat praharaṇaṃ tena tena sa dṛśyate

duryodhano dharmarājam abhivādyāpatad bhuvi gāḍhaṃ pariṣvajya suyodhanaṃ taṃ sabhrātṛkaṃ sahitaḥ sodaraiḥ svaiḥ karṇaḥ pādāv abhivādya pūrvaṃ bhīṣmaṃ ca sarvān abhipūjya tasthau dharmarājaṃ samāśliṣya bhīmaṃ ca yamajāv api pṛṣataṃ sodaraṃ jiṣṇuṃ sugāḍhaṃ pariṣasvaje draupadīṃ ca subhadrāṃ ca saubhadro mahiṣīṃ svakām samāśvāsya sthito vīraḥ paśyan putraṃ parikṣitam
parasparaṃ samāgamya yodhās te bharatarṣabha

rājānaḥ puṇyakarmibhiḥ ye cāpi vāruṇaṃ lokaṃ ye ca golokam āśritāḥ tathā vaivasvataṃ lokaṃ ye ca yakṣān upāgatāḥ rākṣasāṃś ca piśācāṃś ca kurūṃś cāpi tathottarān vicitrāś ca gati[tī]r anye ye prāptāḥ karmanirbharāḥ sarve te tadvayorūpaveṣās tatra samabhyayuḥ
uttarādyāḥ pradāyātha putrān svān anumānya ca ta * * bhūriśravaso droṇādīn anumānya ca
**** **** gacchadhvaṃ patibhiḥ sadā tatas tāḥ kṣatriyā rājan yā yā vinihateśvarāḥ
te naṣṭabhayasaṃkalpā narā vigatakalmaṣāḥ babhūvuḥ pauravāḥ sarve tad dṛṣṭvāścaryam uttamam
sa yaśaḥ prāpnuyāl loke paratra ca śubhāṃ gatim
punas te darśanaṃ prāptāḥ punaś ca parikīrtitāḥ punaḥ punaḥ prayacchanti śṛṇvatām abhayaṃ sadā
parikṣid api tatraiva babhūva ca tirohitaḥ dhṛtarāṣṭro mahārāja prasādāt tasya vai muneḥ
dvaipāyana upāgamya rājānam idam abravīt
yathāyaṃ vāsudevas tu dhṛtarāṣṭra balena vai jagatpati yathā dharmo loke tiṣṭhan kalāv api tatprasādena rājāsau mahān dharmam avāpnuyāt tatpādakamalaspṛṣṭāṃ kalir neyān mahīm imām
tatkālayuktaṃ tathyaṃ ca buddhimān sa yudhiṣṭhiraḥ
śuśrūṣātikṛśā tvaṃ ca nātaḥ puṇyaṃ paraṃ mama na yuktaṃ tapaso vighnaṃ kartuṃ dīkṣākṛśā vayam antakāle na yuktaṃ hi apatyādiparigraham
sa vṛddhaṃ prīyate nityaṃ sa ca devaḥ parātmabhūḥ
ājñāpaya mahābāho sarve tvacchāsanānugāḥ
kadā cin nagare nāgasāhvaye ca yadṛcchayā
uvāca vacanaṃ vāgmī praśrayāvanataḥ sudhīḥ
abhivādyābravīd rājan bhrātṛbhiḥ saha pāṇḍavaḥ
vadanti pitaraṃ jyeṣṭham āsthitaṃ paramaṃ tapaḥ taṃ draṣṭuṃ tatra gatvāham āgato nṛpasattamam
tatrograṃ tapa āsthāya dhṛtarāṣṭro mahāmanāḥ
antaḥpureṣu sumahāṃs tato ruditanisvanaḥ
bhīma māṃ trāhi dāvāgner bhayād ity abhiyācatī
anyonyaṃ vīkṣya vīkṣyaivaṃ smṛtvā mātur upaplavam sehire na mahīpālā nipetuḥ pṛthivītale punar utthāya cāliṅgya rudanto viṣamasvanāḥ nipetuḥ pāṇḍavāḥ śokād dharmarājasya pādayoḥ
saṃkīrtya nāmāni dadau rājan dānāni pārthivaḥ mahārhāṇi vicitrāṇi dadau kauravanandanaḥ
yāvad icchanti viprās tu tāvanti prāpnuyur dvijāḥ
siktasaṃmārjitapathaṃ patākātoraṇocchritam hṛṣṭapuṣṭajanākīrṇaṃ puraṃ teṣāṃ praveśane
dhṛtarāṣṭrasya gāndhāryāḥ kuntyāś cakruś ca saṃghaśaḥ gaṅgādvāre śubhe puṇye yathoddiṣṭaṃ mahātmanā
dvārakāyāṃ tataḥ kṛṣṇaṃ vāsudevaṃ janārdanam anādinidhanaṃ viṣṇuṃ śaṅkhacakragadādharam rahasyakathane yuktaṃ nārāyaṇam anāmayam
tathāśramavāsike tu parvaṇy api samāhitaḥ gandhamālyādiyuktaṃ ca haviṣyaṃ bhojayed dvijān
nārāyaṇaṃ namaskṛtya naraṃ caiva narottamam devīṃ sarasvatīṃ caiva tato jayam udīrayet
yasya prasādād dharmo 'yaṃ kṛte yadvat kalāv api pāṇḍavās tu mahābhāgā yuktās tu yaśasānaghāḥ
etad bhavantaṃ pṛcchāmi saṃmānyābhipraṇamya ca
yena vṛṣṇyandhakakule puruṣā bhasmasāt kṛtāḥ
janārdanasya rāmasya babhroś caiva mahātmanaḥ
tam aghnanta maheṣvāsāḥ śaraiḥ śatasahasraśaḥ na cāśakyata veddhuṃ sa sarvabhūtātyayas tadā
keśā nakhāś ca suptānām adyante mūṣakair niśi
aśrūyanta śunāṃ śabdāḥ sarvataḥ karṇavedhakāḥ
puṇyadānapradāc cāpi śāntimohāc ca kevalāt puṇyakarmaprayogāc ca nānyac chreyo bhaved iti
kurvanto bhīṣaṇān nādān karālāś cāpy asaṃgatāḥ tathā dviśiraso raudrāś caturbāhava eva ca strīṇāṃ garbheṣu jāyante rākṣasā guhyakās tathā
bhagavaddarśanasparśasnehair vitatabhoginām divaḥ praveśanārthaṃ te vimānair divam āyayuḥ
na tan mṛṣyati hārdikyo yad avocat tadā ruṣā
vyāyacchamānau tau vīrau bāhudraviṇaśālinau
śveto yayau cāpi mahānubhāvo mahārṇavaṃ yena tam īkṣamāṇaḥ
saṃdṛśya taṃ sāgarāntaṃ viśantaṃ
kulastrīṇāṃ suvratānāṃ gavāṃ ca dvijendrāṇāṃ balam ādāya dharme yonir devānāṃ varado brahmadevo govindākhyo vāsudevo 'tha nityaḥ
yathā ca lokasthitipālanārthaṃ durvāsavākyapratipālanārtham devo 'pi saṃdehavimokṣahetor nimittam aicchat sakalārthatattvavit
kṛṣṇaṃ śayānaṃ sa vikṛṣya bāṇaṃ vivyādha pāde mṛgaśaṅkayā jarā
taṃ yogayuktyā sahasā hi lakṣya ūrdhvaṃ gacchan vyāpya lokān svalakṣmyā devaiḥ svargaṃ prāpitas tyaktadehaḥ gaṇair munīnāṃ pūjitas tatra kṛṣṇaḥ
gandharvamukhyā uragāś caiva sarve pratuṣṭuvus tatra varāpsarobhiḥ
tataḥ sameto madhusūdanas tair devaiḥ sarvair ṛṣibhiś cāraṇaiś ca
śivabrahmādyair lokapālaiḥ sametya saṃstūyamānaḥ surasiddhasaṃghaiḥ
arjunaṃ tāḥ sma nāthaṃ ca dṛṣṭvānāthaṃ vicukruśuḥ
tasya mūrdhānam āghrātum iyeṣānakadundubhiḥ svasrīyasya mahābāhur na śaśāka ca śatruhan

tvaṃ hi taṃ nāradaś caiva munayaś ca sanātanam govindaṃ paramaṃ devam abhijānīdhvam acyutam pratyapaśyac ca sa vibhur jñātikṣayam adhokṣajaḥ upaprekṣitavān nityaṃ svayaṃ sa mama putrakaḥ gāndhāryā vacanaṃ yat tad ṛṣīṇāṃ ca paraṃtapa tan nūnam anyathā kartuṃ naicchat sa jagataḥ prabhuḥ pratyakṣaṃ bhavataś cāpi tava pautraḥ paraṃtapa aśvatthāmnā hataś cāpi jīvitas tasya tejasā imāṃs tu naicchat svāñ jñātīn rakṣituṃ sa sakhā tava
yathā jīvaṃ paraṃ brahma mahāvākyasya niścayāt
prāpya vṛṣṇipravīreṇa yadubhiś caiva pālitaḥ tair hīnāṃ pṛthivīṃ draṣṭuṃ na ca śakṣyāmi phalguna
tato bhagavato dehaṃ dṛṣṭvā śiṣyaḥ pralapya ca smṛtvā tad vacanaṃ sarvaṃ mohaśokopabṛṃhitam
aṣṭau mahiṣyaḥ kṛṣṇasya rukmiṇīpramukhā nṛpa revatī ca mahābhāgā viviśur jātavedasam tayoḥ śarīre saṃśliṣya tatsaṅgāhlādaśītaḷe

abravīc ca tadā sarvān prāṇinas tatra sāgaraḥ tyaktvā suvarṇanicayān ratnāni vividhāni ca bhājanāni ca haimāni raupyāṇi vividhāni ca parityajyeha saṃyātam abhedyaṃ dravyasattamam saveśmakā purī ceyaṃ hareḥ pālyā mayādhunā punar yatrāvatāraś ca bhaviṣyati kṛte yuge kośādhyakṣo 'smy ahaṃ tasya tasyaitāny api no dhanam
bhīṣmadroṇamukhān hatvā nivātakavacān api jitvā śakraṃ ca rudraṃ ca so 'smān adyāvamanyate
ākroṣṭuṃ nāśakaj jiṣṇuḥ sarvaprāṇaiś ca bhārata
**** **** tac cābhūc chithilaṃ punaḥ tvagbhedaṃ na śarāś cakrur astā gāṇḍīvadhanvanā
yudhiṣṭhirasyānumate vaṃśakartṛkumārakān
dagdhe 'tra khāṇḍavāraṇye rājye taṃ saṃnyaveśayat
sarasvatīṃ praviviśus tathānyāḥ śuddhacetasaḥ
phalamūlādibhojinyo haridhyānaikatatparāḥ himavantam atikramya kalāpagrāmam āviśan

paricārakeṣu yaḥ kaś cit tiṣṭhann eva vinidritaḥ patitas tavopariṣadād gata ...................... sarvopaniṣadām arthaṃ yo brūte sa mahāguruḥ tena saṃpūjitaṃ liṅgam uddiśya prativāsaram niṣkadāne namaskāre niyame kena vighnitaḥ ahany ahani vedāntaśravaṇaṃ ghaṭikādvayam
vaiśaṃpāyanaḥ tataḥ pārtho viniḥśvasya śrūyatāṃ bhagavan iti proktvā yathāvad ācaṣṭe vyāsāyātmaparābhavam
bhīṣmadroṇāṅgarājādyās tathā duryodhanādayaḥ yatprabhāveṇa nirdagdhāḥ sa kṛṣṇas tyaktavān bhuvam tvadvākyasparśanālokasukhaṃ cāmṛtasaṃnibham saṃsmṛtya devadevasya pramuhyāmi mahātmanaḥ
tad dhanus tāni cāstrāṇi sa rathas te ca vājinaḥ sarvam ekapade bhraṣṭaṃ dānam aśrotriye yathā
devakīnandanaṃ devaṃ vāsudevam ajaṃ prabhum
devāṃśā devadevena saṃbhūtās te gatāḥ saha dharmavyavasthārakṣārthaṃ devena samupekṣitāḥ
striyaś ca tāḥ purā śaptāḥ prahāsakupitena vai aṣṭāvakreṇa muninā tadarthaṃ tvadbalakṣayaḥ
tvayaikena hatāḥ pūrvaṃ bhīṣmakarṇādayo nṛpāḥ te mām arjuna kālotthakarmaṇābhibhavo na saḥ tvayā yat kauravā dhvastā yadābhīrair bhavāñ jitaḥ

dvaipāyanaṃ nāradaṃ ca mārkaṇḍeyaṃ tapodhanam bhāradvājaṃ yājñavalkyaṃ harim uddiśya yatnavān abhojayat svādu bhojyaṃ kīrtayitvā ca śārṅgiṇam
āhūya bharataśreṣṭha saṃniveśyāsane tadā

iti cintya gate rājan govinde dharmadhāraṇe dhanecchā yugapat prāptā kṣetrataḥ svāmibhūbhṛtām prāptaṃ kaliyugaṃ jñātvā sahadevo hasann iva rājñas tu kathayām āsa dharmo naṣṭas tu bhārata rājā ca durmanā rājan paryāptaṃ jīvitaṃ mama
yathā ghanasya gagane śabdo bhavati bhārata salile kṣipyamāṇasya gāṇḍīvasya tathā hy abhūt
jagmur bharataśārdūla tīreṇa lavaṇāmbhasaḥ tataḥ punaḥ samāvṛttā jagmur dakṣiṇapaścimām
haripādāṅkavinyāsatīrthīkṛtamahābhuvam manobhiḥ pūjayantaś ca janārdanam aninditāḥ

tatas te brāhmaṇīṃ snātvā dṛṣṭvā devaṃ jale sthitam madhyamāṃśaṃ śivaṃ gatvā dṛṣṭvā rudraṃ mahābalam prayāgapañcake snātvā gatvā himagiriṃ śubham īśānaṃ tu namaskṛtya snātvā haṃsodake śubhe devadevaṃ tu kedāraṃ dṛṣṭvā spṛṣṭvā prayatnataḥ piṇḍaṃ dattvā vidhānena pitṝn devāṃś ca tarpya vai udakaṃ vidhivat pītvā tato nandāṃ jagāma vai mahāpanthānam āvṛtya himavantaṃ jagāma ha
kālatrayavidaś cāpi na me guhyaṃ prakāśitam saṃpratijñāgataś cāhaṃ nākariṣyaṃ janakṣayam
bhītaṃ bhaktaṃ nānyad astīti cārtaṃ prāptaṃ kṣīṇaṃ rakṣaṇe prāṇalipsum prāṇatyāgād apy ahaṃ nota moktuṃ yateyaṃ vai nityam etad vrataṃ me
tejāṃsi yāni dṛṣṭāni bhūmiṣṭhena tvayā vibho veśmāni karmadevānāṃ paśyāmūni sahasraśaḥ
nārāyaṇaṃ namaskṛtya naraṃ caiva narottamam devīṃ sarasvatīṃ caiva tato jayam udīrayet
na hi tṛpyāmi sarveṣāṃ śṛṇvānaś caritaṃ mahat
brahmann etān prapaśyāmi svargaloke 'tra karhi cit
sudurgamāṃ vaitaraṇīṃ pūyapūrṇāṃ dadarśa saḥ
pavanas tāta tenāsmāṃs taptān sukhayati prabho
uvāca vadatāṃ śreṣṭho dharmaputro yudhiṣṭhiraḥ
karṇaś ca draupadeyāś ca pāñcālī vā sumadhyamā
bhūyiṣṭhaśubhakarmā tvam alpaṃ jihmaṃ tavācyuta
